title: A crown of hair
lyrics:
A crown of hair, an orange robe
Loving eyes, a heart of gold
He floats to us across the sand
Sacred ash pours from His hand
Millions call Him living Lord, a living Lord is He
Millions wave with tearful eyes, tearful eyes with joy inside
A million hearts in sweet devotion filled with the love of the Lord

title: A Temple In My Heart
lyrics:
A Temple In My Heart, A Prayer In My Soul, 
    A Song On My Lips, And I Sing To You
[Chorus:] Baba Sai Baba, Sathya Sai Baba, 
    Baba Sai Baba, I Sing To You
Sathya Sai Baba, Baba Sai Baba, Sathya Sai Baba, I Call To You

A Light In My Heart, A Yearning In My Soul,
    A Name On My Lips, And I Call To You
[Chorus:] Baba Sai Baba, Sathya Sai Baba ... 

Joy In My Heart, Peace In My Soul,
    A Smile On My Lips And I Sing To You
[Chorus:] Baba Sai Baba, Sathya Sai Baba ...

title: Aa Gyen Baba Ji
lyrics:
Aa Gyen Baba Ji Tvadde Naam De Bhikhari
Naam De Bhikhari Tvadde Naam De Bhikhari [ Aa Gyen ... ]
Sabto Unchan Tera Naam Merey Vahey Guru Tera Naam
Sabto Unchan Tera Naam Merey Saiyaa Tera Naam
Mein Mangta Dar Terey Aiyaa Chod Ke Duniya Saari

Sat Naam Vahey Guru Sat Naam Vahey Guru
Vahey Guru Ji Vahey Guru Vahey Guru Ji Vahey Guru
meaning:
Baba, Your devotees have come to You; O Lord Sai, You are the Supreme; Your devotees seek refuge at Your Feet leaving everything behind; Hail to You, O Sai!

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Aao Aao Hey Bhagawan
lyrics:
Aao Aao Hey Bhagawan
Sab Jeevan Ke Karo Kalyan [ Aao Aao ... ]
Tum Ho Parama Krupa Ke Sagar
Tum Ho Guna Mandir Nata Naagara
Tum Ho Sathya Sanathana Swami
Ghat Ghat Vasi Antaryami
meaning:
Welcome O Lord Sai. Bless and grant auspiciousness and peace. You are the ocean of compassion, the temple of virtues. You are the Truth and Eternal Bliss and the one who is omnipresent in every being.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Aao Aao Nandalala
lyrics:
Aao Aao Nandalala
Sundara Shyama Gopala [ Aao Aao ... ]
Tum Hi Ho Bansidhari Shyama
Ayodhya Pathi Sita Rama
Parthi Baba Karuna Nidhan
Maakhan Chora Yashoda Bala
meaning: Welcome O Nandalala (Krishna), You are the beautiful, dark-hued one with the divine flute. You are Lord Rama of Ayodhya, the Lord of Sita. You are Lord Sai of Parthi, the compassionate one. You are also the butter-stealing son of Mother Yashoda.

title: Aao Aao Sai Natha
lyrics:
Aao Aao Sai Natha
Aao Aao Hey Jagannatha [ Aao Aao ... ]
Darshan Ke Liye Taras Rahey Hain
Nayan Hamarey O Sai
Darsha Dikhao Daya Ke Sagar
Aao Shankara Hey Parameshwara
Aao Aao Sai Natha
Aao Aao Hey Jagannatha (2)
meaning: Welcome O Sai, Lord of the Universe, our eyes are eager to see Your Divine form. Kindly grant us Your Divine Darshan, O Ocean of Compassion Sai. Welcome, O Lord Shiva, Lord Krishna.

title: Aao Aao Sai Pyaarey
lyrics:
Aao Aao Sai Pyaarey
Keertan Karoon Main Sai Tumharey [ Aao Aao ... ]
Tum Ho Merey Nayanon Ke Taarey
Darshan Do Jeevan Ke Saharey
meaning: Welcome, O beloved Lord Sai, I sing Your glory. O Supreme Lord, You are the twinkling star of my eyes. O companion of my life, kindly grant us Your Divine Darshan.

title: Aao Gopala Giridhari
lyrics:
Aao Gopala Giridhari
Aao Aao Antaryami
Aao Aao Ananda Sai [ Aao Gopala ... ]
Aao Aao Hrudaya Nivasi
Aao Aao (Pra) Shanthi Nivasi
meaning: Welcome Lord Gopala (Krishna), the one who lifted the Govardhana hill, the indweller of our hearts. Welcome, O blissful Lord Sai, Lord of Prasanthi, You are verily Lord Krishna.

title: Aao Prabhu Aao Sai Bhagawan
lyrics:
Aao Prabhu Aao Sai Bhagawan
Sathya Sai Bhagawan [ Aao Prabhu ... ]
Sathya Dharma Shanthi Prema Pradatha
Nithya Nirmala Jeevan Daata
Jagadodharana Bhaktha Parayana
Aao (Sai) Narayana Bhakthon Ke Pran
meaning: Welcome, O Lord Sathya Sai, You endow everyone with purity of life, truth, righteousness, bliss and love. O Lord Sai Narayana! You are the saviour of entire creation and the very life breath of Your devotees.

title: Aao Pyaarey Nayana Hamarey
lyrics:
Aao Pyaarey Nayana Hamarey Sai Hamarey Aao
Tum Bin Koi Nahin Rakhwaley
Tum Bin Kaun Saharey (Baba)
Tum Bin Kaun Saharey Aao Sai Pyaarey
Sai Hamarey Aao (3)
meaning: Welcome, O Beloved Lord Sai, You are our protector. Without You, there is no one to protect and support us.

title: Aao Sai Gopal
lyrics:
Aao Sai Gopal
Aao Gopal Aao Gopal Aao Sai Gopal [ Aao Sai ... ]
Aao Hey Prabhu Parama Dayal
Aao Natavara Lal
Aao Shankara Aao Abhayankara Aao Shiva Shankara Sai
meaning: Welcome O Sai Gopal, the most merciful Lord who is who is the form of Lord Shiva and the protector of the Universe.

title: Aao Sai Narayana Darshan Deejo
lyrics:
Aao Sai Narayana Darshan Deejo
Tum Ho Jagat Vidhata (2)
Tum Hi Ho Brahma Tum Hi Ho Vishnu
Tum Hi Ho Shankara Roopa (2)
meaning: Welcome Sai Narayana grant us Your Darshan. You are Brahma, Vishnu, Shiva, Rama, Krishna and You are the one who creates and organizes the universe.

title: Abhaya Pradayini Ananda Roopini
lyrics:
Abhaya Pradayini Ananda Roopini
Sai Mata Sathya Sai Mata
Himagiri Nandini Bhava Bhaya Bhanjani
Jaya Jagat Janani Devi Bhavani
Parthi Pureeshwari Sai Janani
meaning: Mother Sai is the embodiment of Truth, the one who bestows protection from fear and bliss personified. She is verily Mother Parvathi, the daughter of Daksha (Ice Mountain) and destroyer of worldly miseries. Victory to this Universal Mother Bhavani, the Goddess of Parthi.

title: Abhaya Pradayini Ananda Roopini
lyrics:
Abhaya Pradayini Ananda Roopini
Rajeeva Lochani Raja Rajeshwari
Parthi Pureeshwari Paapa Vimochani
Hrudaya Viharini Sai Janani (2)
meaning: Oh Mother, you are the one who bestows protection from fear, you are bliss personified having eyes resembling the lotus petal. Oh goddess, of Parthi you are the remover of sins and the one who revels in our hearts.

title: Abhaya Pradayini Mata Mahalakshmi
lyrics:
Abhaya Pradayini Mata Mahalakshmi
Alankara Roopini Mata Mahalakshmi [ Abhaya Pradayini ... ]
Mata Mahalakshmi Sai Mahalakshmi
Ananda Dayini Mata Mahalakshmi
Amrutha Varshini Mata Mahalakshmi [ Mata Mahalakshmi ... ]
meaning:
Mother Mahalakshmi (the Goddess of wealth) is the One who has decorated Herself grandly. She confers freedom from fear, Bliss and Grace in a torrent who is presently moving on Earth as Sai Mahalakshmi.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Abhayankara Sai Shiva
lyrics:
Abhayankara Sai Shiva
Avinashi Naga Bhooshana [ Abhayankara ... ]
Hara Hara Shambho Haalaahala Dhara
Pinaka Vaibhava Sai Shiva
meaning: Chant the name of Lord Sai who destroys the fear of birth and death. He is verily Lord Shiva who is eternal and indestructible, and swallowed the haalaa-hala poison to protect the world. He is adorned with the cobra and the Pinaka bow. Glory to Sai Shiva.

title: Adbhuta Keshava Krishna
lyrics:
Adbhuta Keshava Krishna
Hrudaya Kamala Nivasa
Chitha Chora Lavanya Krishna [ Adbhuta Keshava ...  ]
Mora Mukuta Hari Bansidhara
Navaneetha Chora Yashoda Lal
meaning:
Glory to Lord Krishna, the miraculous one who destroyed the demon Keshi. Glory to the enchanting Lord who resides in the lotus of our hearts. Wearing a peacock feather on His Hair, He mesmerizes us with His flute. He is the beloved son of Yashoda who steals butter and our hearts.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Adi Mudalvane Ganapathiye
lyrics:
Adi Mudalvane Ganapathiye
Anaittu Vinaigalaiyum Tirppavane
Ettu Disaigalilum Undan Namame
Olittidum Podellam Paramanandame
Vezha Mugattone Gnana Porulone
Naada Brahma Shiva Balagane
Sharanam Sharanam Vinayagane
Sharanam Sai Vinayagane
meaning:
Glory to Lord Ganesha, the primeval God, the destroyer of all ill-effects. Son of Lord Shiva, You are the symbol of knowledge. It brings us immense joy when Your name resonates in all eight directions. We surrender to You, Lord Sai, who is verily Lord Ganesha and the embodiment of eternal Aum.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Adi Narayana Sai Narayana
lyrics:
Adi Narayana Sai Narayana
Jaya Hari Narayana Jaya Jaya
Pandari Vasa Hari Narayana
Parthi Nivasa Sai Narayana
Varada Narayana Veda Narayana [ Jaya Hari ... ]
meaning: Victory to Lord Sai who is verily Lord Narayana, the primordial one. O Lord, You are the resident of Pandari and the Lord of Parthi. Victory to Lord Narayana who confers boons and who is the source of the Vedas.

title: Adi Parashakthi Ma Ananda Roopini
lyrics:
Adi Parashakthi Ma Ananda Roopini Ma
Parthi Nivasini Ma Jagadodharini Ma
Teri Mahima Jo Koi Gave
Janam Janam Ka Dukh Bisrave
Premamayi Sai Ma Sathya Swaroopini Ma [ Parthi Nivasini Ma ... ]
meaning:
O Mother Sai, the resident of Parthi, You are the supreme power and the embodiment of Bliss who sustains the universe. Those who sing Your glory would be free from miseries accumulated from multiple lives. You are suffused with Love and is verily the supreme Truth.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Adi Poojita Gajanana
lyrics:
Adi Poojita Gajanana
Mangala Kari Maha Ganadhipa [ Adi Poojita ... ]
Ambika Tanaya Gajanana
Amba Bhavani Shiva Shambho Kumara
Jaya Jaya Jaya Hey Gajanana
meaning:
O the elephant-faced Lord Ganesha, You are worshipped as the foremost deity. You are the bestower of auspiciousness and the leader of the Ganaas (group of demigods). Victory to Thee, the son of Lord Shiva and Mother Parvathi (also known as Bhavani and Ambika).

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Adi Poojya Deva Gajanana
lyrics:
Adi Poojya Deva Gajanana
Gowrivara Tanaya Shubhanana [ Adi Poojya ... ]
Vighna Vinashaka Siddhi Vinayaka
Jaya Jagavandana Tava Charanam
meaning: At the outset, worship Lord Ganesha, son of Mother Gowri who bestows good fortune. He destroys difficulties and grants success. The entire Universe worships His Feet.

title: Adi Shesha Anantha Shayana
lyrics:
Adi Shesha Anantha Shayana
Srinivasa Sri Venkatesha
Raghukula Tilaka Raghu Ramachandra
Sita Pathey Sri Ramachandra [ Adi Shesha ]
Yadu Kula Tilaka Yashoda Bala
Radha Pathey Gopala Krishna
Pannaga Bhooshana Gowri Manohara
Uma Pathey Shiva Shambho Shankara
meaning:
Adore the Lord Srinivasa also known as Venkatesha, who reclines on the seven headed serpent. Sing the glory of Ramachandra, the supreme of Raghu dynasty who is worshipped by his consort Sita. Chant the name of Krishna, the son of mother Yashoda and the supreme of Yadu dynasty who fostered the cowherds and who is worshipped by His consort Radha. Worship Lord Shiva bestower of auspiciousness, one who wears a serpent as His ornament and who is adored by his consort Parvathi.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Aganita Guna Abharana Vibhushani
lyrics:
Aganita Guna Abharana Vibhushani
Adi Parashakthi Devi Namo
Sakala Charachara Srishti Samrakshini
Jagadeeshwari Jaganmata Namo
meaning: O Supreme Goddess Shakthi (Parvathi), salutations to Thee, who has immeasurable good qualities as Your ornaments and who protects and sustains both animate and inanimate things of this creation. O Goddess of the universe, salutations to Thee.

title: Ai no Kami Sathya Sai
lyrics:
Ai no Kami Sathya Sai Shirdi Sai Prem Sai
Ai no Kami Sathya Baba Shirdi Baba Prem Baba
Waga Inochi Buddha Sai
Waga Inochi Mahavira Sai
Yeshu (Allah) Sai, Subete no Kami yo
Ai no Kizuna de, Musubi Tamae
Waga Inochi Nanak Sai
Waga Inochi Sathya Sai
meaning:
God of Love and God of All, Sathya Sai, Shirdi Sai, Prem Sai, Jesus, Allah, Guru Nanak, Mahavir; All names are connected by love, Sai, You are my life.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Ajanu Bahum Aravinda Netram
lyrics:
Ajanu Bahum Aravinda Netram
Atmabhi Ramam Manasa Smarami
Prabhu Sai Ramam Manasa Smarami
Bhooloka Vaikunta Parthi Nivasam
Prabhu Sai Ramam Manasa Smarami (2)
meaning: Meditate on the form of Lord Rama, whose abode is the heart of devotees, whose arms extend upto His knees and whose eyes are like the blooming lotus. Meditate on Lord Sai Rama, the Dweller of Parthi, which is verily the Heaven on Earth.

title: Akhanda Jyothi Jalao Sai
lyrics:
Akhanda Jyothi Jalao Sai Man Mandir Mey
Akhanda Jyothi Jalao
Koti Surya Sama Teja Swaroopa
Sai Tum Ho Divya Swaroopa
Akhanda Jyothi Jalao (2)
Divya Jyothi Gnana Jyothi Prema Jyothi Jalao
Akhanda Jyothi Jalao
meaning: O Lord Sai! Illumine the temple of my mind so that the flame of knowledge may glow continuously. O Sai, the one with the effulgence of ten million suns, kindle the infinite flame of divinity, wisdom and Divine Love in my mind.

title: Akhila Jagat Ke Daata Sai
lyrics:
Akhila Jagat Ke Daata Sai
Shirdi Nivasi Bhagawan
Darshan Do Bhagawan (Sai)
Kalimala Bhanjana Parama Dayaghana
Karuna Nidhey Shirdi Vasa (Parthi Vasa)
Deena Janavana Parthi Mahesha
Shirdi Nivasi Bhagawan [ Darshan Do ... ]
meaning: O Lord Sai, the dweller of Shirdi, grace us with Your divine presence. You are the supreme reserve of compassion and kindness. Annihilate our acquired impurities. O Lord of Parthi, You are the refuge of the forlorn.

title: Alakh Niranjana Bhava Bhaya Bhanjana
lyrics:
Alakh Niranjana Bhava Bhaya Bhanjana Narayan Narayan
Narayan Narayan Narayan Sriman Narayan (2)
meaning: O Lord Narayana, the one who is free of all blemishes and the remover of fear and ignorance in this world, we chant Your Holy Name.

title: All I ask of You
lyrics:
All I ask of You is forever to remember Me--as loving You 
Ishk Allah Mahbud Illah (2)

title: All praise to You, Lord of the Worlds
lyrics:
All praise to You, Lord of the Worlds
Swami Sathya Sai, our Lord
You protect devotees who cling to You
Show Your mercy to us who sing to You
Knowing You are God in human form
All praise to You, Lord of the Worlds

With captivating grace and loveliness
You do everything to bring us happiness
You're aware of all through infinite consciousness
You are master of every living thing
For devotees You're wish-fulfilling
Helping us when we are in distress
All praise to You, Lord of the Worlds

Mother, Father, Teacher and Lord
You remind us there is only one, not two
Swami, there is truly no one else but You
Master of creation, You are adored
People of all nations are striving toward
Realization of our true reward
Our unity with You, Lord of the Worlds

You are the Word of God, pure and bright
The embodiment of all true and right
Sathya Sai, fill our hearts with pure delight
Do accept our prayer and heed us
From darkness we can't bear please lead us
With Your might You make our burdens light
All praise to You, Lord of the Worlds

Narayana Narayana Om, Sathya
Narayana Narayana Narayana Om
Narayana Narayana Om, Sathya
Narayana Narayana Om, Sathya
Narayana Narayana Om
All praise to our Teacher Divine

title: Allah Allah Karo Pukar
lyrics:
Allah Allah Karo Pukar
Sathya Sai Ki Jai Jai Kaar
Yesu Pitha Ki Jai Jai Kaar
Mahavir Ki Jai Jai Kaar
Zohrashtra Ki Jai Jai Kaar
Sarva Dharma Ki Jai Jai Kaar
meaning: Victory to Lord Allah, Yesu, Mahavir, Zohrashtra and Sathya Sai who is the embodiment of all religions.

title: Allah Allah Sai Baba
lyrics:
Allah Allah Sai Baba
Yesu Masiha Sai Baba [ Allah Allah ... ]
Nanak Sri Buddha Sai Baba
Zohrashtra Mahavir Sai Baba
meaning: Chant the divine name of Sai Baba who is also Allah, Yesu, Nanak, Zohrashtra and Mahavir.

title: Allah Bhajo Maulah Bhajo
lyrics:
Allah Bhajo Maulah Bhajo Hey Allah Sai Bhagawan
Ram Bhajo Hey Krishna Bhajo Hey Rama Krishna Bhagawan
Nanak Bhajo Gautam Bhajo Hey Buddha Sai Bhagawan
Yesu Bhajo Zohrashtra Bhajo Hey Mahavir Bhagawan
Sai Bhajo Shirdi Sai Bhajo Hey Shirdi Sai Bhagawan
Sathya Bhajo Sathya Sai Bhajo Hey Sathya Sai Bhagawan
meaning: Chant the divine names of the Lord - Allah, Rama, Krishna, Guru Nanak, Buddha, Zohrashtra, Mahavir, Shirdi Sai and Sathya Sai.

title: Allah Enbargal Silapergal
lyrics:
Allah Enbargal Silapergal
Yesu Enbargal Silapergal
Iraivan Enbargal Palapergal
Ellam Sai Baba
Parppadum Nalladaai Irukka Vendum
Ketpadum Nalladaai Ketka Vendum
Seivadum Nalladaai Seiyya Vendum
Solvadum Nalladaai (Sai Naamam) Solla Vendum
Baba Sai Baba
meaning: O Lord Sai, some people call You Allah, others call You Jesus. Many call You God, all forms are Yours. Bless us O Lord, so we see only good, hear only good, do only good, speak only good and always chant Your holy name.

title: Allah Eshwar Ek Hi Naam
lyrics:
Allah Eshwar Ek Hi Naam
Bhajarey Manuva Mohammad (Baba) Naam [ Allah Eshwar ... ]
Allah Bolo Eshwar Bolo Bolo Sai Ram
Nanak Bolo Yeshu Bolo Bolo Sai Ram
Gautama Buddha Mahavir Bolo Bolo Sai Ram
Bolo Sai Ram Bolo Bolo Sai Ram
meaning: O mind, chant the names of Allah, Eshwar, Guru Nanak, Buddha, Jesus, Mahavira, and Sai. All are one and all are our saviors.

title: Allah Eshwar Tu
lyrics:
Allah Eshwar Tu
Yesu Buddha Prabhu Tu
Zohrashtra Mahavira Tu
Sai Rama Tu Sai Krishna Tu
Sarva Dharma (Sathya Sai) Prabhu Tu
Sathya Sai Prabhu Tu
Treta Yug Mey Rama Prabhu Tu
Dwapara Yug Mey Krishna Prabhu Tu
Kali Yug Mey Sai Prabhu Tu [ Sarva Dhama ... ]
meaning: O Lord Sai, You are Allah, Eshwar, Jesus, Buddha, Zohrashtra, Mahavir, Rama, Krishna. In the Treta Age, You incarnated as Lord Rama; in the Dwapara Age as Lord Krishna and in the Kali Age as Lord Sathya Sai who fosters the unity of all religions.

title: Allah Ho Akbar
lyrics:
Allah Ho Akbar, Allah Ho Akbar, Allah Ho Akbar
Yesu Pitha Prabhu Allah Ho Akbar, Shirdi Sai Parthi Sai Tum Ho
Guru Nanak Bhi Tum Ho
Zohrashtra Mahavir Tum Ho
Yesu Pitha Prabhu Tum Ho
Allah Ho Akbar Tum Ho ( Sai )

(only in 2nd speed)
La Ilaha Il Allah, Mohammadur Rasool Allah
meaning: Allah is the Supreme. He is also Jesus Christ, Shirdi Sai, Parthi Sai, Guru Nanak, Zohrashtra and Mahavir. Chant their glorious names.

title: Allah Ho Akbar Tum Ho
lyrics:
Allah Ho Akbar Tum Ho Sai
Tum Ho Antaryami (Baba)
Tum Hi Saar Ho Geeta Quran
Tum Ho Sab Ka Jeevan Ka Aadhaar
Daya Karo Merey Baba
Tum Ho Antaryami (Baba)
meaning: O Lord Sathya Sai, You are the most merciful and benevolent Allah, the supreme sovereign. O Baba, You are the indweller of our hearts. You are the quintessence of the Bhagawad Geeta and the Holy Quran. You are the saviour and sustainer of all life. O Lord, please have mercy and compassion for us.

title: Allah Ho Tum
lyrics:
Allah Ho Tum Eshwar Bhi Tum Mahavir Nanak Ram
Partheesha Sai Shankara Tum Hi Ho Merey Pran [ Allah Ho ... ]
Zohrashtra Yesu Buddha Tum Ho Sab Ke Palanhaar
Satchidananda Sai Tera Brindavana Shubh Dham
meaning: O Sai who dwells in the sacred abode of Brindavan, You are Allah, Eshwar, Mahavira, Nanak, Ram. O Sai Shankara of Parthi, You are our very life, our protector and the embodiment of existence, knowledge and bliss.

title: Allah Jehovah Jesus Christ Our Lord
lyrics:
Allah Jehovah Jesus Christ Our Lord
Lord Sai You Are Ever Beside Me
Lord Sai You Are Ever Within Me
All Names Are Yours My Lord, All Forms With You Begin
Formless Or Form We Adore Thee
God Is Love, We Are Love Ever Expanding (4)

title: Allah Naam Bhajo Bhajorey Bhajo
lyrics:
Allah Naam Bhajo Bhajorey Bhajo Maulah Naam Bhajo Bhajorey Bhajo
Nanak Yesu Mahavir Naam Bhajo
Sri Buddha Deva Bhajo Bhajorey Bhajo Shirdi Sai Baba Bhajo Bhajorey Bhajo
Sri Raghu Rama Bhajo Govinda Krishna Bhajo
Sri Sathya Sai Bhajo Bhajorey Bhajo
meaning: Chant the divine names Allah, Maulah, Nanak, Mahavir, Buddha, Shirdi Sai Baba, Rama, Govinda, Krishna and Sri Sathya Sai.

title: Allah Sai Bolo
lyrics:
Allah Sai Bolo Maulah Sai Bolo
Prem Se Bolo Jo Bhi Naam Bolo [ Allah Sai ... ]
Zohrashtra Mahavir Buddha Naam Bolo
Sathya Dharma Shanthi Prema Roopa Sai Bolo
meaning: Chant the name of Lord Sai who is verily Allah. Chant with love the name of any God. Chant the name of Lord Zohrashtra, Mahavira and Buddha. Chant the name of Lord Sathya Sai who is the embodiment of Truth, Righteousness, Peace and Love.

title: Allah Sai Maulah Sai
lyrics:
Allah Sai Maulah Sai
Sadguru Sai Antaryami
Nanak Sai Prema Sai
Yesu Sai Karuna Sagara
Sarva Dharma Priya Sathya Sai
meaning: O Lord Sai, You are Allah, the all pervading Divine Teacher, You are Guru Nanak and Jesus, the loving and compassionate one. You are the one fostering all faiths.

title: Allah Tero Naam Sai
lyrics:
Allah Tero Naam Sai Maulah Tero Naam
Ram Rahim Sai Krishna Karim Sai
Parthi Vihara Sai Bhaktha Janon Ke Sai
Deena Dayalu Sai Parama Krupalu Sai
meaning:
O compassionate and kind Lord Sai residing in Parthi, You incarnated for the sake of Your devotees, You are none other than Allah, Rama and Krishna.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Allah Tum Ho Eshwar Tum Ho
lyrics:
Allah Tum Ho Eshwar Tum Ho
Tum Hi Ho Ram Rahim
Merey Ram Merey Ram Ram Rahim
Yesu Tum Ho Nanak Tum Ho
Zohrashtra Bhi Ho Mahavir Tum Ho
Gautama Buddha Karim [ Merey Ram ... ]

Merey Ram Merey Ram Ram Rahim (3)
meaning: Oh Lord! You are Allah, Eshwar, Rama, Rahim, Jesus, Guru Nanak, Zohrashtra, Mahavir, Gautama Buddha.

title: Allah Yeshu Sai Ram
lyrics:
Allah Yeshu Sai Ram
Buddha Mahavir Sai Ram
Treta Mey Tum Sai Ram
Dwapar Mey Tum Sai Shyam
Sarva Dharma Priya Sai Ram
Parthi Pureeshwara Sai Ram
meaning: O Lord Sai, You are Allah, Yeshu, Buddha and Mahavira. In Treta era, You incarnated as Lord Rama and in Dwapara as Lord Krishna. You are the patron of all religions and the Lord of Puttaparthi.

title: Allah Yesu Niyanro
lyrics:
Allah Yesu Niyanro
Anaittume Sai Un Uruvamanro
Makka Madina Vazh Deivamanro
Nabigal Nayagam Niyallavo
Buddha Mahavir Zohrashtranumai
Yesuvai Avataram Seidavane
Ellaiyilla Karunai Kadalallavo
Nambinarkku Arulbavan Niyallavo
meaning: Lord Sai, You are Allah and Jesus. Everything visible is Your own form. You are the Lord of Mecca and Madina as well as Mohammad Nabi. Incarnated previously as Buddha, Mahavir, Zoroaster and Jesus, You are the boundless ocean of compassion and the Lord who blesses the faithful.

title: Amba Bhavani Shiva Shambhu Kumara
lyrics:
Amba Bhavani Shiva Shambhu Kumara
Sri Gananatha Shanthakara
Purana Purusha Sathya Sai Natha
Pranava Swaroopa Partheesha
meaning: O Lord Ganesha, beloved son of Shiva and Mother Parvathi, You are the embodiment of peace. O Lord Sathya Sai, You are the one adored in ancient Holy scriptures and You are the very form of the primordial sound Om.

title: Amba Manda Haasa Vadani
lyrics:
Amba Manda Haasa Vadani Manohari Sai Jagat Janani
Mata Mata Mata Jagat Janani [ Amba Manda ... ]
Jagat Janani Shubha Karini
Sai Jaganmata
Sathya Sai Jaganmata
meaning: Worship the auspicious Mother of the Universe, Mother Sai who has an enchanting face with a charming smile.

title: Amba Parameshwari Akhilandeshwari
lyrics:
Amba Parameshwari Akhilandeshwari
Adi Parashakthi Palaya Maam
Sri Bhuvaneshwari Raja Rajeshwari
Ananda Roopini Palaya Maam
meaning: O Divine Mother of the Universe (Bhuvaneshwari, Raja Rajeshwari) and the Consort of Lord Shiva, the all-powerful one, You are bliss personified, we pray to You to protect us.

title: Amba Shankari Parameshwari Shashi Shekari
lyrics:
Amba Shankari Parameshwari Shashi Shekari Amba
Sarveshwari Jagadeeshwari Maheshwari Amba
Sundari Guna Manjari Shiva Shankari Amba
Kadambari Shwetambari Hari Sodari Amba
meaning: Glory to Mother Shankari (Parvathi), the consort of Shiva who is adorned with the beautiful Crescent Moon. O Mother, You are the Goddess who is the Protector of the Universe, the most beautiful one with abundant good qualities. You are the sibling of Lord Hari. We offer our salutations to You.

title: Amba Vandanam Eshwaramba Vandanam
lyrics:
Amba Vandanam Eshwaramba Vandanam
Janani Vandanam Jagat Janani Vandanam (2)
Sai Vandanam Sai Mata Vandanam
Mata Vandanam Eshwaramba Nandanam
meaning:
O Universal Mother Sai, we bow to You and we bow to Mother Eshwaramba who was blessed to be Your physical mother during Your advent on earth.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Ambe Gowri Ma
lyrics:
Ambe Gowri Ma Jagadambe Gowri Ma
Ambe Jagadambe Jaya Ambe Gowri Ma
Mahalakshmi Mata Meri Ambe Gowri Ma
Daya Nidhey Dukha Harnevali Ambe Gowri Ma
Bholi Bhaali Mata Meri Ambe Gowri Ma [ Ambe Jagadambe ... ]
meaning:
Victory to Mother of the Universe. You are Mother Lakshmi, the compassionate one and the remover of worldly miseries and who is innocence personified.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Ambe Jagadambe Kali
lyrics:
Ambe Jagadambe Kali Ambe Jagadambe
Bhaava Priyey Raga Priyey
Gaana Priyey Bhaava Priyey
Gaana Priyey Bhaava Priyey Amba Bhavani [ Ambe Jagadambe ... ]
Mahalakshmi Ambe Gowri Mahalakshmi Ambe 
Mahishasura Mardini Bhavani Mahalakshmi Ambe
Jai Ambe Sri Ambe Amba Bhavani

Sheravali Ambe Maiya Jyotavali Ambe Maiya
meaning:
Victory to the Mother of the universe, Mother Kali, who enjoys music that is rendered with deep yearning and devotion. She is Goddess Mahalakshmi and the destroyer of demon Mahishasura. She is the effulgent one riding on a lion.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Ambe Janani Abhirami
lyrics:
Ambe Janani Abhirami
Abhaya Pradayini Shivakami [ Ambe Janani ]
Sambhavi Shankari Sarveshwari
Shantha Swaroopini Shivaranjani
Sathya Swaroopini Sai Mata
Shashwata Ananda Dayini Mata
meaning: Oh pleasing divine mother, the consort of Shiva known also as Abhirami Sambhavi, Shankari the one who grants fearlessness and is omnipresent. We chant your glorious names. You are Sai Mata the embodiment of truth and peace who grants us with eternal peace.

title: Ambika Tanaya Gajanana
lyrics:
Ambika Tanaya Gajanana
Gajavadana Gananatha Gajanana
Paahi Ganesha Vinayaka
Tribhuvana Palaka Mangala Dayaka
Vidya Buddhi Siddhi Pradayaka
Paahi Ganesha Vinayaka (2)
meaning: O loving son of Mother Parvathi, the elephant-headed Lord Ganesha, kindly protect us. You are the sustainer of the three worlds, the one who confers auspiciousness, knowledge, wisdom and success.

title: Anai Mugane Sri Ganesha
lyrics:
Anai Mugane Sri Ganesha
Adi Mudalvane Sri Ganesha
Arul Ni Purivai Sri Ganesha
Arivai Koduppai Sri Ganesha
Bhaktharai Kappai Sri Ganesha
Padam Panindom Sri Ganesha

Padam Panindom Sri Ganesha (3)
meaning:
O elephant-faced Lord Ganesha, the source of all sources, bless us and enlighten our intellect. Protect us devotees; We surrender at Your feet.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Anand Se Bolo Jai Baba Jai
lyrics:
Anand Se Bolo Jai Baba Jai Prem Se Bolo Jai Baba Jai
Jai Jai Jai Jai Amba Ki Jai
Jai Jai Jai Mahalakshmi Ki Jai [ Ananda Se ... ]
Jai Jai Jai Shirdi Ki Jai
Jai Jai Jai Sathya Sai Ki Jai
meaning: Chant "Victory to Lord Sai" blissfully and suffused in Love. Victory be to Mother Mahalakshmi, to Shirdi Sai and Sathya Sai.

title: Ananda Ram Ananda Shyam
lyrics:
Ananda Ram Ananda Shyam
Narayana Hari Narayana
Narayana Sai Narayana
Prema Swaroopa Brahmananda
Satchidananda Hari Narayana
Narayana Hari Narayana [ Narayana Sai ... ]
meaning: O blissful Lord Ram and Shyam (Krishna), we chant Your name Narayana, Hari and Sai. O Lord, You are the embodiment of Divine Love, truth, awareness and bliss.

title: Ananda Sagara Muralidhara
lyrics:
Ananda Sagara Muralidhara
Meera Prabhu Radhey Shyam Venu Gopala [ Ananda Sagara ... ]
Nanda Yashoda Ananda Kishora
Jai Jai Gokula Bala Jai Venu (Sai) Gopala
meaning: O Lord Krishna, You are the ocean of bliss and the one who plays captivating music on the flute. You are the Lord of Meera and Radha. Glory to Thee, the blissful son of Nanda and Yashoda. Victory to the Divine child of Gokula who has incarnated as Lord Sai.

title: Ananda Sagari Dayakari
lyrics:
Ananda Sagari Dayakari
Adi Parashakthi Krupakari
Hey Jagadeeshwari Partheeshwari
Hey Jagadeeshwari Sayeeshwari
meaning:
Glory to Mother Sai, the Goddess of the Universe, the primal and supreme force, the one who is an ocean of bliss. She confers mercy and compassion.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Anandamaya Bhagawan
lyrics:
Anandamaya Bhagawan Hey Premamaya Bhagawan
O Bhagawan Sai Bhagawan [ Anandamaya Bhagawan ... ]
Hey Karuna Nidhey Prabhu Sai Ram
Krupa Nidhey Deenon Ke Pran
Lelo Prabhu Mujhey Sharan Lagalo
Mujhey Daya (Krupa) Karo Bhagawan
meaning: O Lord Sai, You are love and bliss personified, repository of compassion and kindness and hope of the downtrodden. Kindly accept us at Your Lotus Feet.

title: Anandamey Sai Naamamey
lyrics:
Anandamey Sai Naamamey
Adbhutamey Sai Geetamey
Akhandamey Jyothirmayamey
Sundaramey Sai Roopamey (Ati)
meaning: Oh Lord Sai! Chanting Your divine name is true bliss and singing Your glory confers ecstasy. Your infinite effulgence is all pervading and Your form is beauty personified.

title: Anatha Bandho Sai Prabho
lyrics:
Anatha Bandho Sai Prabho
Aparadha Kshama Karo Sai Prabho
Jeeva Yatra Mey Saath Raho Tum
Prem Bhakthi Hum Ko Deejo
Hrudaya Mandir Se Math Jao
Charanamrutha Seva Deejo Prabhu
meaning:
Oh Lord Sai! You are the protector and kin of the destitute. Kindly forgive our misdeeds and be with us in our journey of life. Bless us with Divine Love and devotion and be constantly in our thoughts and our hearts, grant us the opportunity to serve Your Lotus feet.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Anjana Nanda Veeram
lyrics:
Anjana Nanda Veeram Ashoka Vana Sancharam
Vande Lanka Bhayankaram
Sita Shoka Vinashakaram
meaning: Salutation to thee, O son of mother Anjana, the valorous and powerful. You wandered the Ashoka vana (forest) and instilled fear among the demons to redeem Mother Sita from distress.

title: Anjana Sutha Anjaneya
lyrics:
Anjana Sutha Anjaneya
Vayu Putra Vathathmaja
Vanarotthama Bala Bheema
Rama Dootha Ranadheera
meaning: Oh Anjaneya, the son of Mother Anjana and Vayu, You are the supreme among the Vanaras (monkeys) and the strongest. You are a supreme warrior and the humble emissary of Rama.

title: Anjaneya Veera Hanumantha Shoora
lyrics:
Anjaneya Veera Hanumantha Shoora
Vayu Kumara Vanara Veera [ Anjaneya ... ]
Vayu Kumara Vanara Veera
Sri Ram Jaya Ram Jai Jai Ram Sita Ram Jai Radhey Shyam (4)
meaning: Victory to the brave and powerful Lord Anjaneya (Hanuman), the offspring of the Wind God, Vayu. Chant the names of Lord Rama, Mother Sita and Lord Krishna (Shyam).

title: Antar Jyothi Jalao Sai
lyrics:
Antar Jyothi Jalao Sai
Brahma Sanathani Daya Karo
Daya Karo Hey Poorna Jyothirmayi
Shiva Shakthimayi Krupa Karo
Deena Dayamayi Patitha Pavani
Sai Jagat Janani Raksha (Krupa) Karo
meaning: Oh Mother Sai! You have neither beginning nor end. Kindly illumine our soul and shower your mercy. Oh Effulgent Mother of the Universe! You are the form of Shiva and Shakthi and merciful to the deprived. Kindly protect us.

title: Antaranga Sai Anatha Natha Sai
lyrics:
Antaranga Sai Anatha Natha Sai
Deena Bandhu Sai Karuna Sindhu Sai [ Antaranga Sai ... ]
Rama Krishna Shiva Shakthi Prema Roopa Sai
Yuga Avatara Baba Sri Sathya Sai
meaning: O Lord Sai, You are love and bliss personified, repository of compassion and kindness and hope of the downtrodden. You are verily Rama, Krishna and the incarnation of Supreme Love in the modern era.

title: Antaryami Aao Nandalala
lyrics:
Antaryami Aao Nandalala
Sathya Dharma Premi Sai Gopala
Ghana Shyama Neela Karunya Sheela
Hey Madhava Govinda
Narayana Govinda
Radha Pathey Krishna Gopala (Priya) [ Sathya Dharma ... ]
meaning:
Wecome O Lord Krishna, the indweller of our hearts, the compassionate son of Nanda and the Lord of Radha. You are worshipped by many names such as Madhava, Govinda, Narayana and Gopala. You are verily Lord Sai who loves Truth and Righteousness.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Antaryami Sai
lyrics:
Antaryami Sai
Poorna Brahma Avatari
Hey Giridhari Hrudaya Vihari Krishna Kunja Vihari [ Antaryami ... ]
Gopala Leela Dhari
Hey Gopi Mana Sanchari
Madhusudhana Murari [ Hey Giridhari ... ]
meaning: Oh Indweller Sai, You have descended from the Supreme unmanifested state (Brahman). You are Krishna, the resident in the hearts of devotees, who wandered in the Brindavan, lifting the Govardhana mountain. You exhibited divine Leela (sports) with Gopi imprinting Yourself in their minds. You are the one who annihilated the demons Madhu and Mura.

title: Antaryami Sri Raghurama
lyrics:
Antaryami Sri Raghurama
Akhilanda Koti Nayaka Rama [ Antaryami ... ]
Atmabhi Rama Pavana Naama
Sathya Dharma Shanthi Palaka Rama
Kali Yug Ke Avatar Sai Rama
Sarva Dharma Priya Sri Sai Rama
meaning:
O Lord Rama, You the indweller of the heart, the supreme leader of the universe, the Atma (soul) in all and Your name is ever purifying. You foster truth, righteousness and peace in the world. You have incarnated in this Kali Age as Lord Sai who loves and fosters all faiths.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Anupama Sundara Nanda Kishora
lyrics:
Anupama Sundara Nanda Kishora
Brindavana Ghana Shyam
Murali Madhava Radhey Govinda
Madhusudhana Ghana Shyam Sathya Sai Sundara Shyam
Brinda Vihari Mandara Giridhari
Kamala Nayana Bhagawan
Bhakthon Ke Prabhu Partheeshwara Sai
Natavara Sundara Shyam Sathya Sai Sundara Shyam
meaning: O Krishna, son of Nanda, You are unsurpassingly beautiful. You are dark as the clouds and is adored in Brindavan as Radhey Govinda, Madhusudhana and Giridhari. O lotus-eyed Lord Sathya Sai, You are beloved to Your devotees and adored as the same dancing Shyam (Krishna).

title: Any Time Of Day
lyrics:
(At) Any Time of Day, Morning Noon or Night
I Always Sing Sai Ram
Sai Rama Sai Rama Sai Rama Sai Rama (3)
Sai Rama Sai Rama Sai Rama 
His Love Brings Us joy, Eternal Happiness Within, His Name is Bliss, Ananda
Ananda Ananda Ananda Ananda (3)
Ananda Ananda Ananda

Ananda Sai Rama Ananda Sai Rama (3)
Ananda Sai Rama Ananda

title: Apaara Karuna Sindho Krupa Sindho
lyrics:
Apaara Karuna Sindho Krupa Sindho Daya Sindho 
Aganita Gunagana Dhama Atma Rama Ananda Rama 
Bhaashpavaari Paripoorna Lochanam 
Maruthim Bhajey Ram Ram Ram Sita Ram Ram Ram Raja Ram Ram Ram
Bhaktha Jana Priya Sai Ram Sathya Sai Ram Parthi Sai Ram
meaning: Lord Sathya Sai is the boundless ocean of mercy. Lord Sai's attributes are beyond perception. Lord Sai's eyes are infinitely beautiful. As Hanuman worships the holy name of Rama, we too worship Lord Sai Rama. Lord Sathya Sai who resides at Puttaparthi is worshipped by all of His dear devotees.

title: Araj Suno Merey Parama Krupalu
lyrics:
Araj Suno Merey Parama Krupalu
Partheeshwara Sai Deva [ Araj Suno ... ]
Sathya Sanathana Antaryami
Sakala Charachara Tum Ho Swami
Janam Maran Se Paar Karo
Bhava Bandhan Se Uddhar Karo (Baba)
meaning: O Supremely merciful Lord of Parthi! Kindly listen to my prayer and help me come out of the bondage of the cycle of birth and death. O Lord Sai! You are omnipresent, infinite and the indweller of our heart.

title: Aravinda Lochana Aartha Janavana
lyrics:
Aravinda Lochana Aartha Janavana
Sai Narayana Sathya Narayana [ Aravinda Lochana ... ]
Eshwaramba Nandana Dosha Nivarana
Parama Niranjana Hey Shubhanana
meaning: O lotus-eyed Lord Narayana, You are the protector of the deprived and distressed. O Lord Sai, the auspicious son of Mother Eshwaramba, the blemishless one, You are the redeemer of our defects.

title: Arul Tara Varuvai Guru Nada
lyrics:
Arul Tara Varuvai Guru Nada
Parthi Pureesha Sai Mahesha [ Arul Tara ... ]
Annaiyum Niye Tandaiyum Niye
Arulum Niye Anaittum Niye
Gathi Niye Ena Saranamadaindom
Parindemai Kappai Parthi Pureesha
Guru Nada Sai Guru Nada
meaning:
Grace us with Your presence, our guru Lord Sai. You are full of mercy. You are our mother, father and our all; We surrender to You, our only refuge. Save us Guru Sai, O compassionate one.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Aruna Ramana Sri Guru Deva
lyrics:
Aruna Ramana Sri Guru Deva
Shesha Ramana Sadguru Deva [ Aruna Ramana ... ]
Bhava Bhaya Harana Sri Sai Deva
Sri Sai Deva Sri Sai Deva [ Bhava Bhaya ... ]
Guru Hai Sath Chith Ananda Deva
Ananda Deva Sri Sai Deva
meaning: O Lord Sai, the divine Preceptor, You are the one who protects us from fear and worldly miseries. You are the embodiment of existence, awareness and bliss. You are verily Lord Arunachaleshwara (Shiva) who enlightened Saint Ramana and His Preceptor Saint Seshadri Swamigal.

title: Arunachala Shiva, Arunachala Shiva
lyrics:
Arunachala Shiva, Arunachala Shiva, Arunachala Shiva, Aruna Shiva
Akshaya Linga Atma Linga
Tejonmaya Vigraha Linga
Iha Para Sukha Dayaka, Esha (Sai), Iha Para Sukha Dayaka
Om Namah Shivaya, Shivaya Namah Om (3)
meaning: O Lord Shiva, You reside in the Arunachala hill in the form of imperishable Atma Linga, the effulgent symbol, which bestows peace and happiness in this and the higher world. O Lord, salutations to Thee, the embodiment of the Primordial sound "Om".

title: Asathoma Sath Gamaya
lyrics:
Asathoma Sath Gamaya
Thamasoma Jyothir Gamaya
Mruthyorma Amrutham Gamaya
Om Shanthi Shanthi Shanthihi



English version
From The Unreal, Lead Me To The Real
From Darkness, Lead Me To The Light
From Death, Lead Me To Immortality
Aum Peace, Peace, Peace

title: At this time of our devotion
lyrics:
At this time of our devotion
Let there be no barriers
Cast them away, Lord Ganesha (2x)
Bless us with your loving grace
Oh Lord with the elephant face
May out hearts be filled with joy
Singing out in love for Sai
Bless us, bless us, Sai Ganesha (2x)

title: At Your Feet Dear Lord We Pray
lyrics:
At Your Feet Dear Lord We Pray
Grace Us With Your Love This Day
Sai Baba, Sai Baba, You Are Krishna, You Are Rama
Oh Baba, Oh Baba, You Are Mother, You Are Father
All Names, Every Form, All That Was And Will Be Born
(You Are) All Names Every Form All That Is Forever More

title: Atma Jyothi Namo
lyrics:
Atma Jyothi Namo Paramatma Jyothi Namo
Akhanda Jyothi Namo Mama Jeevana Jyothi Namo
Antaryami Namo Sri Sadguru Sai Namo
meaning: Bow to the omnipresent light, the light of God within. Bow to the never-ending light, which is the very essence of life. Bow to the indwelling true Guru, Lord Sai.

title: Atma Lingam Bhajorey
lyrics:
Atma Lingam Bhajorey Ati Adbhuta Lingam Bhajorey
Naga Lingam Navamani Lingam
Nabhi Kamala Udbhava Lingam
Eshwara Lingam Bhajorey Sayeeshwara (Partheeshwara) Lingam Bhajorey
meaning: Sing in praise of the Atma Lingam, the auspicious and astonishing divine form of Lord Shiva, the Naga Lingam studded with nine precious stones that has emerged out of the navel of Shiva. Sing in praise of the Eshwara Lingam and Sayeeshwara Lingam.

title: Atma Mey Bas Jao Baba
lyrics:
Atma Mey Bas Jao Baba Atma Mey Bas Jao Baba
Tum Bina Sab Mandir Hai Sune [ Atma Mey ... ]
Paramatma Tum Sare Jagat Ke
Ram Rahim Tum Sare Jagat Ke
Sune Mana Mey Vas Karo Tum
Ghar Ghar Mey Bas Jao Baba (2)
meaning: Baba, please reside in our empty heart; the temple is empty without You. You are the Lord of the Universe, Rama and Rahim. Please stay in our home.

title: Atma Ram Ananda Dham
lyrics:
Atma Ram Ananda Dham
Achyutha Ram Ayodhya Ram
Sita Ram Sathya Sai Ram
Sundara Ram Sugunabhi Ram
Sai Ram Sai Ram Sai Ram Ram (3)
meaning: Worship the beautiful Form of Lord Rama, the resident of Ayodhya who is indweller of our heart and who confers bliss. Chant the name of Ram, the Lord of Sita and the virtuous one. Chant the name of Lord Sai who is none other than Lord Rama.

title: Atma Rama Ananda Naama
lyrics:
Atma Rama Ananda Naama
Ananda Mohana Sri Parandhama [ Atma Rama ... ]
Mayabhi Rama Manasa Prema
Sundara Naama Sugunabhi Rama
meaning: O Lord Rama, the indweller of hearts, Your form gives happiness, bliss and love. You are the embodiment of virtues who assumed an illusive form of a human being.

title: Atma Rama Ananda Ramana
lyrics:
Atma Rama Ananda Ramana
Achyutha Keshava Hari Narayana
Bhava Bhaya Harana Vanditha Charana
Raghukula Bhooshana Rajeeva Nayana
Adi Narayana Anantha Shayana
Satchidananda Sathya ( Sai ) Narayana
meaning: O Lord Rama! You are indweller of hearts and You are the embodiment of bliss. Chant the names of Keshava, Narayana and Sai, the remover of worldly fears. O Lotus eyed jewel of the Raghu dynasty, the embodiment of truth, awareness and bliss, we bow down to Your lotus feet.

title: Ave Maria Kyrie Eleison
lyrics:
I Am One With The Heart Of The Mother
I Am One With The Heart Of Love
I Am One With The Heart Of The Father
I Am One With God
Ave Maria Kyrie Eleison
meaning: Hail Mary, Christ Have Mercy On Us.

title: Ayodhya Ke Sita Ram
lyrics:
Ayodhya Ke Sita Ram Brindavan Ke Radhey Shyam
Radhey Shyam Jaya Radhey Shyam
Radha Madhava Radhey Shyam
Sai Ram Jaya Sai Ram
Parthi Pureeshwara Sai Ram
meaning: Chant the names of Sita Ram, the Lord of Ayodhya and Radhey Shyam who resides in Brindavan. Victory to Lord Sairam of Parthi.

title: Ayodhya Shiromani Dasharatha Rama
lyrics:
Ayodhya Shiromani Dasharatha Rama
Saketa Ranjana Kaivalya Dhama [ Ayodhya Shiromani ... ]
Neeraja Lochana Sai Narayana
Bandha Vimochana Bhaktha Parayana
Prana Sakha Merey Prabhu Sai Rama [ Saketa Ranjana ... ]
meaning: Sing the glory of the lotus-eyed Lord Rama, the son of Dasharatha and the crown jewel of Ayodhya. O Lord Sai, You are verily Lord Rama. Free us from the bondage of life and death as You are our dearest companion and our ultimate abode.

title: Ayodhya Vasi Ram Hai
lyrics:
Ayodhya Vasi Ram Hai Dwaraka Mey Aayey
Dwaraka Vasi Shyam Hai Shirdi Mey Aayey
Shirdi Vasi Shyam Hai Parthi Sathya Sai
Bolo Ram Sai Ram Bolo Sathya Sai Ram
meaning: Chant the name of Sathya Sai Ram, who is the same Lord who incarnated in Ayodhya as Ram, in Dwaraka as Shyam, in Shirdi as Lord Shirdi Sai and in Puttaparthi as Sathya Sai.

title: Ayodhya Vasi Ram Ram Ram
lyrics:
Ayodhya Vasi Ram Ram Ram Dasharatha Nandana Ram
Patitha Pavana Janaki Jeevana Sita Mohana Ram
Ayodhya Vasi Ram Ram Ram Dasharatha Nandana Ram
Patitha Pavana Janaki Jeevana Sita Mohana Ram
meaning: Chant the name of Rama, the Lord of Ayodhya, the Son of Dasharatha and the consort of Sita and whose name purifies the deprived.

title: Ayodhya Vihari Sri Rama Rama
lyrics:
Ayodhya Vihari Sri Rama Rama Rama
Dwaraka Vihari Sri Krishna Krishna Krishna
Saptagiri Vihari Govinda Govinda
Nija Bhaktha Hrudaya Vihari Sri Sai Natha Deva
meaning: Sing the glory of Rama who is the resident of Ayodhya, Krishna the resident of Dwaraka and Govinda the God of seven hills. O Lord Sai, You revel in the hearts of devotees.

title: Ayyappa Sharaname Swami Ayyappa
lyrics:
Ayyappa Sharaname (3) Swami Ayyappa Sharaname (2)
Sabarinayaka Shanthi Dayaka, Ayyappa Sharaname Swami Ayyappa Sharaname
Parthi Nayaka Prashanthi Dayaka, Ayyappa Sharaname Swami Ayyappa Sharaname
meaning: Take refuge in Ayyappa, the Lord of Sabari mountain and Puttaparthi, who bestows supreme peace.

title: Baar Baar Tum Aao Sai
lyrics:
Baar Baar Tum Aao Sai
Darshana Do Bhagawan (2)
Nithya Nirmala Nithyananda
Satchidananda Prabho
Darshana Do Bhagawan
meaning:
Welcome O Lord Sai. Grant us the darshan of Your ever pure and blissful Form again and again.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Baba Aao Merey Keertan Mey
lyrics:
Baba Aao Merey Keertan Mey
Antaryami Darsha Dikhao
Naiya Hamarey Paar Lagao [ Baba Aao ... ]
Antar Jyothi Jalao Sai
Jeevan Jyothi Tum Ho Sai
meaning: O beloved Baba, grant Your Divine Darshan while we sing Your glory and help us cross the boat of life. Kindle the lamp of wisdom in our hearts just as You illuminate our lives.

title: Bada Chitha Chora Brindavana Sanchara
lyrics:
Bada Chitha Chora Brindavana Sanchara
Gopala Gopala Hey Murali Gopala
Govardhanodhara Gopala Bala
Gopi Manohara Radhey Gopala
meaning: Chant the name of Lord Gopala (Krishna), who played in Brindavan, who lifted the Govardhana mountain and who captivated the hearts of Radha and the Gopis.

title: Bala Gopal Jai Jai Sai Shyam
lyrics:
Bala Gopal Jai Jai Sai Shyam
Prem Bharo Dil Mey Hamarey Sai Ram
Hamarey Sai Ram Badey Pyaarey Sai Ram [ Prem Bharo... ]
Hum Bhakthon Ke Tum Ek Sai Ram
Tumharey Jagat Mey Bada Pyaara Pyaara Naam
Sangh Raho Har Dum Hamarey Sai Ram
Sangh Raho Hamarey Sai Ram
meaning: Victory to Sai Shyama, the Infant Gopala, our Beloved Lord. Saturate our hearts with Divine Love and be with us in every moment of our life. Your dear name and glory engulfs the entire world.

title: Bala Gopala Sai
lyrics:
Bala Gopala Sai Bala Gopala
Devaki Nandana Gopala [ Bala Gopala ... ]
Vasudeva Nandana Gopala
Yashoda Nandana Gopala
Nanda Gopala Ananda Gopala
Sai Gopala Sathya Sai Gopala
meaning: Chant the names of Lord Gopala (Krishna). Gopala is the dear son of Mother Devaki and Vasudeva and fostered by Mother Yashoda and Nanda. He is the one who confers bliss. He is verily Lord Sathya Sai.

title: Bansidhara Kanhaiya
lyrics:
Bansidhara Kanhaiya Ghana Shyama Sundara
Giridhari Gopa Bala Brindavana Vihara [ Bansidhara ... ]
Govinda Madhava Harey Madhusudhana Mukunda
Radhey ( Sai ) Govinda Radhey ( Sai ) Gopala Radhey ( Sai ) Govinda Radhey ( Sai )
meaning: Chant the various names of Lord Krishna - Govinda, Madhava, Madhusudhana, Mukunda, Sai Gopala, the one who plays the enchanting flute and who resides in Brindavan. He is verily Lord Sai.

title: Beautiful God Hallelujah
lyrics:
Beautiful God, Hallelujah (3)
O-o-o-o-om
Perfect Love, Hallelujah
Divine Mother, Hallelujah
Heavenly Father, Hallelujah
O-o-o-om
Sweet Jesus, Hallelujah
Lord Buddha, Hallelujah
Beloved Satsang, Hallelujah
O-o-o-om
Sathya Sai Baba, Hallelujah (3)
O-o-o-om

title: Beda Paar Karo Merey Sai
lyrics:
Beda Paar Karo Merey Sai
Uddhar Karo Merey Baba [ Beda Paar ... ]
Allah Eshwar Sai Baba
Shirdi Baba Parthi Baba
Reham Nazar Karo Sai Baba
Daya Karo Sai Krupa Karo
meaning: O Lord Sai, uplift and help us cross the ocean of life and death. You are Allah, Eshwar and Shirdi Baba. Shower Your mercy, Compassion and Grace on us.

title: Bhagawan Bhagawan Bhagawan Sai Ram
lyrics:
Bhagawan Bhagawan Bhagawan Sai Ram
Sai Ram Sai Ram Sai Ram Bhagawan [ Bhagawan Bhagawan ... ]
Aparadha Kshama Karo Sai Bhagawan
Araj Suno Merey Sai Bhagawan
Bhagawan Bhagawan Bhagawan Sai Ram
Deena Dayala Parama Krupala Bhakthoddhara Sai Bhagawan
meaning:
We chant Your name Lord Sai, the most gracious and compassionate one who uplifts His devotees. Kindly listen to our earnest prayer and pardon us for our misdeeds.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Bhagawan Bhagawan Patitha Pavana Ram
lyrics:
Bhagawan Bhagawan Patitha Pavana Ram
Daya Karo Daya Karo Daya Karo Bhagawan
Patitha Pavana Ram ( Sai )
Deena Dayalu Parama Krupalu
Raksha Karo Bhagawan
Sai Krupa Karo Bhagawan
meaning: O Lord Sai, chanting Your name purifies the downtrodden. O the ever merciful and compassionate Lord, please shower Your grace and protect us.

title: Bhagawan Krishna Namo
lyrics:
Bhagawan Krishna Namo Bhagawan Krishna Namo
Patitha Pavana Patitha Palana
Ramachandra Namo [ Bhagawan Krishna ... ]
Kaalatheethaya Shirdi Roopaya Sathya Sai Namo
Antaryami Namo Sarvantaryami Namo
meaning: Salutations to Lord Krishna and to Lord Rama, who is the saviour and uplifter of the afflicted and miserable. Salutations to Lord Sathya Sai who is above and beyond time and is the very embodiment of all virtues and success. Salutations to Lord Shiva who sustains the entire creation. Salutations to the omniscient Lord.

title: Bhairavi Ambe Bhavani
lyrics:
Bhairavi Ambe Bhavani (Amba)
Jagadambe Ma Jagat Janani [ Amba Bhairavi ... ]
Narayani Patitha Pavani
Parthi Purandari Sai Janani
meaning: Glory be to Lord Sai of Puttaparthi, the Mother Goddess, who is the source, support and mother of the Universe. She is the savior of the fallen.

title: Bhaja Mana Govinda Gopala
lyrics:
Bhaja Mana Govinda Gopala
Govinda Gopala Gopala [ Bhaja Mana Govinda ... ]
Govinda Bolo Hari Gopala Bolo (2)
Govinda Gopala Gopala
meaning: O Mind, worship and chant the name of Govinda and Gopala (names of Lord Krishna).

title: Bhaja Mana Krishna Gopal
lyrics:
Bhaja Mana Krishna Gopal
Bhaja Krishna Gopal Bhajo Manarey [ Bhaja Mana ... ]
Yadu Nanda Gopal Bhajorey
Mukunda Gopal Bhajorey
Bhaja Govindam Bhaja Govindam Bhaja Govindam Bhajarey (2)
meaning: O Mind, worship the name of Lord Krishna and Gopala. The son of Yadu dynasty bestows liberation to devotees. Chant the name Govinda.

title: Bhaja Mana Narayana Narayana Narayana
lyrics:
Bhaja Mana Narayana Narayana Narayan
Shirdi Narayana Narayana Narayana
Parthi Narayana Narayana Narayana [ Bhaja Mana ... ]
Lakshmi Narayana Narayana Narayana
Badri Narayana Narayana Narayana
meaning:
O mind, worship the Lord who is known by many names such as Narayana, Lakshmi Narayana, Badri Narayana. Lord Sai of Shirdi and Parthi is verily Lord Narayana.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Bhaja Mana Panduranga Vittala
lyrics:
Bhaja Mana Panduranga Vittala Jai Vittala
Purandara Vittala Vittala Jai Vittala [ Bhaja Mana Panduranga ... ]
Bhaja Mana Panduranga Vittala Jai Vittala
Purandara Vittala Vittala Jai Vittala
meaning: Oh Mind! Worship Lord Panduranga Vittala, Lord Purandara Vittala. Victory to Vittala.

title: Bhaja Mana Radhey Shyama Gopala
lyrics:
Bhaja Mana Radhey Shyama Gopala
Murali Manohara Radhey Gopala [ Bhaja Mana Radhey ... ]
Nanda Kishora Natavara Lala (2)
Parthi Vihara Sai Gopala
meaning: O mind, worship Lord Krishna, the beautiful one with His flute, son of Nanda. He resides in Parthi as Lord Sai Gopala.

title: Bhaja Mana Raghava Rama Hey
lyrics:
Bhaja Mana Raghava Rama Hey Bhaja Mana Raghava Rama (Rama)
Hey Rama Hey Rama Bhaja Mana Sai Ram
Bhaja Mana Madhava Krishna Hey Bhaja Mana Madhava Krishna (Krishna)
Hey Krishna Hey Krishna Bhaja Mana Sai Shyam
Bhaja Mana Sundara Baba Hey Bhaja Mana Sundara Baba (Baba)
Hey Baba Hey Baba Bhaja Mana Sai Naam
meaning: O mind, chant the names of Rama, Krishna, and our beautiful Lord, Sai Baba.

title: Bhaja Mana Ram
lyrics:
Bhaja Mana Ram Bhaja Mana Ram
Panduranga Sri Ranga Bhaja Mana Ram
Bhaja Mana Madhava Bhaja Mana Keshava
Bhaja Mana Yadava Bhaja Mana Ram [ Panduranga Sri ... ]
Bhaja Mana Mukunda Bhaja Mana Govinda
Bhaja Mana Ananda Bhaja Mana Ram [ Panduranga Sri ... ]
meaning: Worship and chant the Holy names Ram, Panduranga, Madhava, Keshava, Mukunda, Govinda.

title: Bhaja Mana Ramam Sri Ramam
lyrics:
Bhaja Mana Ramam Sri Ramam
Shyamala Komala Nayanabhi Ramam [ Bhaja Mana ... ]
Bharata Lakshmana Pramudita Ramam
Maruti Sevitha Manobhi Ramam
Pankaja Lochana Prabhu Sita (Sai) Ramam
meaning:
O Mind, chant the Holy name of Lord Rama, the one with soft, beautiful eyes, the one who was the source of joy for His brothers Bharata and Lakshmana and the one who was served by Hanuman. Glory to the lotus-eyed one, the consort of Mother Sita. Glory to Lord Sai who is none other than Lord Rama.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Bhaja Mana Shyama Sundara Giridhari
lyrics:
Bhaja Mana Shyama Sundara Giridhari
Mora Mukuta Peetambara Dhari [ Bhaja Mana Shyama ... ]
Meera Ke Prabhu Giridhara Naagara
Giridhara Naagara Giridhara Naagara [ Meera Ke ... ]
Murali Manohara Shyama Murari
meaning: O Mind, chant the name of Lord Krishna, the beautiful, dark-complexioned Lord who lifted the Govardhana mountain with His little finger, who adorns a crown of peacock feathers and is draped in yellow silk. Glory to the one who plays the Divine Flute and to the Lord of Meera.

title: Bhaja Mana Sita Ram
lyrics:
Bhaja Mana Sita Ram
Bhaja Mana Sri Raghu Rama Sai Ram [ Bhaja Mana Sita ... ]
Bhajarey Manasa Bhaja Sai Ram
Bhajo Bhajo Parthi Baba Naam (Bhajo)
meaning: O mind, meditate and sing the glory of Mother Sita and Lord Rama of Raghu dynasty. O mind, chant incessantly the name of Lord Sai, the Lord of Parthi who is none other than Lord Rama.

title: Bhaja Ramam Bhaja Ramam
lyrics:
Bhaja Ramam Bhaja Ramam
Bhajorey Manasa Bhaja Ramam [ Bhaja Ramam ... ]
Kalyana Ramam Bhaja Ramam
Kodanda Ramam Bhaja Ramam
Pattabhi Ramam Bhaja Ramam
Pavana (Taraka) Naamam Bhaja Ramam
meaning: O Mind, chant the name of Lord Rama, the one who bestows welfare, who wields the Kodanda bow and the one who was the coronated as the emperor. Chant the sacred name of Lord Rama that liberates us from the cycle of birth and death.

title: Bhaja Sai Natham Bhaja Sai
lyrics:
Bhaja Sai Natham Bhaja Sai Natham Sai Natham Bhajarey Manasa
Parthi Pureesham Prashanthi Nilayam Parama Pavitram Paramatma Roopam
Shirdi Nivasam Shiva Sayeesham
Shantha Swabhavam Shankara Roopam [ Bhaja Sai Natham ... ]
Chinmayanandam Chithravathi Teeram Chitha Pariharam Chinni Sai Natham
Neela Mandaram Divya Swabhavam 
Dattatreyam Deiva Swaroopam [ Bhaja Sai Natham ... ]
Sathya Swaroopam Sadguru Charanam Samba Shivoham Sarthaka Naamam
Jyothi Swaroopam Preeti Swabhavam Parthi Nivasam Paapa Vinasham
meaning: O mind, chant the name of Lord Sai who is the sacred form of supreme Lord residing at Prashanthi Nilayam. He resides in Shirdi as Shiva Sai. He is the embodiment of peace, auspiciousness and bliss, dwelling at the shores of Chitravathi river sanctifying us. He is Lord Dattatreya. His form is Truth. He is the Divine Preceptor under whose lotus feet let us reside. His form is effulgent, lovable and which destroys sins.

title: Bhajan Karo Manuva Govinda Harey
lyrics:
Bhajan Karo Manuva Govinda Harey
Govinda Murari Gopala Murari [ Bhajan Karo ... ]
Mathura Natha Hey Giridhari
Radha Madhava Hey Giridhari (2)
meaning: O mind, worship Lord Krishna, known by many names - Govinda, Murari, Gopala, the Lord of Mathura, Giridhari, the Lord of Radha.

title: Bhajarey Rama Charan Satatam Bhajarey
lyrics:
Bhajarey Rama Charan Satatam Bhajarey Rama Charan
Bhajarey Janaki Jeevana Ramam
Bhajarey Ramam Bhadrachala Ramam
Bhajarey Pavana Taraka Naamam
Bhajarey Sri Rama Ramethi Ramam
meaning: Constantly chant and pray to the Lotus feet of Lord Rama. Pray to the Lord of Janaki, Lord Rama, the resident of Bhadrachala. Chant the sacred and pious name of Lord Rama.

title: Bhajo Bhajo Ram Sathya Sai
lyrics:
Bhajo Bhajo Ram Sathya Sai Ram
Bhajo Bhajo Shyam Sai Ghana Shyam [ Bhajo Bhajo ... ]
Kali Yug Ke Avatar
Jagadodhara Sai Bhagawan
Patitha Pavana Sita Ram ( Sai Ram )
meaning: Worship Lord Sai Bhagawan, who has incarnated in the Kali Age to uplift humanity and lead the fallen to deliverance.

title: Bhajo Bhajo Vittala Panduranga Vittala
lyrics:
Bhajo Bhajo Vittala Panduranga Vittala
Pandari Natha Panduranga Bhajo Mana Vittala [ Bhajo Bhajo ... ]
Partheeshwara Sai Natha Vittala
Parameshwara Sathya Sai Vittala
Rakumayi Vittala Ranga Sai Vittala
meaning: Worship Lord Vittala of Pandharpur, Sai Vittala of Parthi who is the supreme Lord of the Universe and Lord of Rakumayi.

title: Bhajo Gananayaka Gajavadana
lyrics:
Bhajo Gananayaka Gajavadana
Mangala Dayaka Shubha Charana [ Bhajo Gananayaka ... ]
Siddhi Vinayaka Shiva Nandana
Ananda Dayaka Chitha Chandana
Buddhi Pradayaka Jaga Vandana
meaning: Worship the elephant-faced Lord Ganesh, son of Lord Shiva. He confers auspiciousness, liberation, bliss and intelligence.

title: Bhajo Ghana Shyam Bhajo Sita Ram
lyrics:
Bhajo Ghana Shyam Bhajo Sita Ram Bhajo Sathya Sai Ram
Bhajo Ghana Shyam Bhajo Radhey Radhey Shyam Bhajo
Murali Manohara Sai Ghana Shyam
Mata Pitha Guru Deva Brahma Vishnu Mahadeva
Mata Pitha Guru Deva Sathya Sai Mahadeva
meaning:
Worship Lord Krishna, Lord Sai, Lord Ram, the Lord of Sita. O Lord Sai, O the enchanting Flutist, You are father, mother, preceptor, Brahma, Vishnu and Shiva (Lord of Lords).

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Bhajo Madhura Hari Naam Nirantara
lyrics:
Bhajo Madhura Hari Naam Nirantara Bhajo Madhura Hari Naam
Sarala Bhaav Se Sai Bhajo
Madhura Bhaav Se Baba Bhajo
Hari Hi Sukh Hai Hari Hi Shanthi
Hari Prashanthi Nivasi Ram
meaning:
Worship and recite forever the enchanting and sweet name of Lord Hari. There is no happiness and peace without chanting the sweet name of the Lord Sai, the resident of Prashanthi Nilayam, the abode of everlasting peace.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Bhajo Man Bhajo Rama Ram
lyrics:
Bhajo Man Bhajo Rama Ram
Sri Ram Sri Rama Ram 
Sai Rama Rama Rama Ram [ Bhajo Man Bhajo ... ]
Bhajo Bhajo Man Baba Naam
Bhajo Bhajo Man Sai Naam
Rama Rama Rama Ram (Sai)
meaning: O mind, chant the name of the Lord Rama and Lord Sai.

title: Bhajo Radhey Govinda Bhajo Shyama
lyrics:
Bhajo Radhey Govinda Bhajo Shyama Gopal
Shyama Gopal Bhajo Murali Gopal [ Bhajo Radhey ... ]
Keshava Narahari Shyama Gopal
Madhava Murahara Murali Gopal
meaning: Worship by chanting the many names of the Lord Krishna - Govinda, Gopala, Murahara, Shyama, Keshava and Madhava.

title: Bhajo Sita Ram Bhajo Radhey Shyam
lyrics:
Bhajo Sita Ram Bhajo Radhey Shyam
Govinda Gopala Sai Harey Ram [ Bhajo Sita Ram ... ]
Keshava Madhava Radha Vallabha
Varada Narayana Nayanabhi Ram [ Govinda Gopala ... ]
meaning: Worship the Lord of Sita, Lord Rama. Worship the Lord of Radha, Lord Shyama. Chant the names of the Lord Govinda, Gopala, Sai, Keshava, Madhava and Narayana who confers boons.

title: Bhajorey Bhai Sai Ram
lyrics:
Bhajorey Bhai Sai Ram
Shirdi (Parthi) Pureesha Sai Ram [ Bhajorey Bhai ... ]
Dwarakamayi Sai Ram
Sada Sukha Dayi Sai Ram
Shirdi (Parthi) Pureesha Sai Ram
meaning:
Worship Lord Sai, the Lord of Puttaparthi and Shirdi where He lived in Dwarakamayi. He is always granting happiness to all.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Bhajorey Bhai Sai Ram
lyrics:
Bhajorey Bhai Sai Ram
Sai Sab Ka Hai Bhagawan [ Bhajorey Bhai ... ]
Ram Hi Sai Krishna Hi Sai
Yuga Avatara Narayana Sai [ Sai Sab Ka ... ]
meaning: Let us chant the name Sai Ram who is the Lord of all. He is Lord Rama, Lord Krishna and Lord Narayana who has descended in the Kali Yuga.

title: Bhajorey Bhajo Sada Durga Bhavani
lyrics:
Bhajorey Bhajo Sada Durga Bhavani
Mangala Kaarini Sai Janani [ Bhajorey Bhajo ... ]
Mahishasura Mardhini Bhavani
Daya Sagari Hey Jagat Janani
meaning: Always worship the Mother of the Universe, Durga (Parvathi), the bestower of auspiciosness. She is the slayer of the demon Mahishasura. O Mother of the Universe, You are the ocean of mercy.

title: Bhajorey Bhajo Sai Harey Ram
lyrics:
Bhajorey Bhajo Sai Harey Ram
Govinda Gopala Sai Harey Ram
Madhava Mohana Sai Harey Ram (Hey) [ Bhajorey Bhajo ... ]
Sri Madhusudhana Bhava Bhaya Bhanjana
Bharey Premanand Se Bolo Ram Harey Ram
Govinda Gopala Sai Harey Ram [ Madhava Mohana ... ]
meaning: Chant the holy name and sing the glory of Lord Sai, Govinda, Gopala, Madhava and Madhusudhana (names of Lord Krishna). O Lord, You remove the fear of birth and death. Chant the names of the Lord filled with love and bliss.

title: Bhajorey Bhajorey Gananatham Bhajorey
lyrics:
Bhajorey Bhajorey Gananatham Bhajorey
Bhajorey Gananatham Bhajorey
Buddhi Pradayaka Paapa Vinashaka
Vighnesham Bhajorey
Abhaya Pradayaka Ananda Dayaka
Shiva Nandanam Bhajorey Gananatham Bhajorey
meaning:
Chant the name of Lord Ganesha, the son of Shiva who bestows intellect, destroys sins and removes obstacles, protects from fear and grants joy.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Bhajorey Manasa Sai Ram
lyrics:
Bhajorey Manasa Sai Ram
Parthipuri Ke Sai Bhagawan [ Bhajorey Manasa ... ]
Eshwar Allah Terey Naam
Yesu Buddha Bhi Terey Naam
Shirdi (Parthi) Puri Ke Sai Bhagawan
meaning: O mind, worship and chant the name of Sai, the Lord of Parthi and Shirdi. Eshwar, Allah, Yesu, Buddha are all His names.

title: Bhajorey Manuva Sadguru Deva
lyrics:
Bhajorey Manuva Sadguru Deva
Parama Krupalu Sai Mahadeva [ Bhajorey Manuva ... ]
Nis Din Dhyan Karoon Mein Tera
Janam Janam Ka Mitey Andhera
Parabrahma Parameshwara Roopa (Deva) [ Parama Krupalu ... ]
meaning:
O Mind, chant and worship Lord Sai who is the supreme God and preceptor. O Lord, from the day I started meditating on You, the ignorance accumulated from several births is vanished. You are the Supreme God.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Bhajorey Sada Bhajo Rama Krishna
lyrics:
Bhajorey Sada Bhajo Rama Krishna Govinda
Bhajo Hari Deena Bandhu Krishna Rama Govinda
Bhajorey Anatha Natha Sai Rama Govinda [ Bhajo Hari ... ]
meaning: Always chant the name of Lord Rama, Krishna Govinda and Sai Ram. The Lord's name support and shelter the meek and is the friend of the weak.

title: Bhaktha Vatsala Tero Naam O
lyrics:
Bhaktha Vatsala Tero Naam O Sai
Dukha Bhanjana Tero Naam O Sai
Tum Sangh Baandhi Prem Ki Dori
Sumiran Karoon Tero Naam O Sai
Patithodharana Bhaktha Parayana
Partheeshwara Sai Ram
meaning: O Sai, the Lord of Parthi, we chant Your name, which is loved by Your devotees as it destroys their miseries. You bind everything in this universe by the cord of love. We chant Your name mentally all the time. You are uplifter of downtrodden and Your devotees sing Your praise.

title: Bhakthon Ne Hai Aaj Pukara
lyrics:
Bhakthon Ne Hai Aaj Pukara
Hum Ne Pukara Baba Sab Ne Pukara
Deejo Deejo Hum Ko Sahara
Aana Hi Padega Baba Aana Hi Padega
Shirdi Se Aao Chahey Parthi Se Aao
Mathura Se Aao Ya Ayodhya Se Aao
Mecca Se Aao Ya Madina Se Aao
O Merey Baba (Maulah) O Merey Sai Tum Kahin Se Bhi Aao [ Aana Hi Padega ... ]
meaning: O Lord Baba, I personally appeal and all devotees also appeal to You earnestly. Please grant us solace. You must come without fail from wherever You are - from Shirdi, Parthi, Mathura, Ayodhya, Mecca or Madina.

title: Bhasma Bhooshitanga Sai Chandrashekara
lyrics:
Bhasma Bhooshitanga Sai Chandrashekara
Phaala Netra Shooladhari Sai Shankara [ Bhasma Bhooshitanga ... ]
Saama Gaana Priyakara Sai Shankara
Hara Hara Hara Shiva Shambho Natana Shekara
Parthi Vasa Sai Deva Sai Shankara
Sai Shankara Sathya Sai Shankara
meaning: Glory to Lord Shiva who is besmeared with sacred ash, who is adorned with the moon on His head, who has a third eye on His forehead and who holds the Trident. O liker of music of the Sama Veda, O King among the dancers, we bow down to You, Sai Shankara, the resident of Parthi.

title: Bhasma Vibhushitha Bhavani Shankara
lyrics:
Bhasma Vibhushitha Bhavani Shankara
Bhava Bhaya Nasha Bhola Shankara
Hara Hara Shankara Samba Shiva
Hara Hara Shankara Sai Shiva
Om Namah Shivaya Shivaya Namah Om (3)
meaning: Worship Lord Shankara, the Lord of Bhavani(Parvathi), who has sacred ashes smeared all over the body. The easy-to-please Lord Shankara destroys the fear of the cycle of birth and death. Chant the mantra 'Om Namah Shivaya'.

title: Bhava Bhaya Bhanjana Shesha Shayana
lyrics:
Bhava Bhaya Bhanjana Shesha Shayana Hari
Pranava Swaroopa Narayana
Rajeeva Lochana Adi Sanathana
Bandha Vimochana Narayana
Padmanabha Prabhu Kamala Manohara
Vaikuntapathey Narayana (2) [ Pranava Swaroopa ... ]
meaning:
Glory to Lord Hari (Narayana), the one reclining on the Celestial Serpent Sesha and the one who removes the fear of worldly sorrows. O Lord, You are the embodiment of the Primordial sound (Om), the one having eyes resembling a lotus, one who is eternal from the beginning, one who frees us from the cycle of birth and death. You are the captivating Lord from whose navel rose the Lotus of Creation and Your abode is Vaikunta.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Bhava Bhaya Harana Vanditha Charana
lyrics:
Bhava Bhaya Harana Vanditha Charana
Jaya Radha Jaya Madhava (Shourie)
Mangala Charana Kalimala Dahana
Narayana Keshava (Sai) [ Jaya Radha ... ]
meaning: O Lord, we worship Your Holy Feet that frees us from the continuous cycle of birth and death. Glory to Radha, victory to Lord Krishna, the slayer of the demon Madhu, and the sustainer of the Universe. Thy Holy Feet dispels the sins of the Kali age. Glory to Lord Narayana, the eternal guardian and to Keshava, the slayer of demon Kesi.

title: Bhava Nasha Puttaparthi Pureesha
lyrics:
Bhava Nasha Puttaparthi Pureesha
Jaya Shiva Shankara Hey Jagadeesha [ Bhava Nasha ... ]
Mruthyunjaya Hima Shaila Girisha
Mohanakara Mana Moha Vinasha
Jyothi Prakasha Sathya Sayeesha
Jaya Shiva Shankara Hey Paramesha
meaning: Glory to Thee, Lord Sai, Lord of Puttaparthi, You destroy the cycle of birth and death. Glory to Lord Shiva, the Lord of the Universe. You are the conqueror of Death and You reside on the snow-clad mountain. O enchanting one, You are the remover of the mind's attachment. O Sathya Sai, You are full of effulgence and luster.

title: Bhava Sagar Se Paar Utharo
lyrics:
Bhava Sagar Se Paar Utharo
Sai Nath Bhagawan [ Bhava Sagar ... ]
Allah Yesu Buddha Mahavira
Sab Naamon Ki Ek Hai Mahima
Sarva Dharma Ke Palanhaarey [ Sai Nath Bhagawan ]
meaning: Oh Sainath Bhagawan! Help me to cross the ocean of continuous passage of life and death. You are Allah, Yesu, Buddha, Mahavira - all these names have the same magnitude of power. You are the sustainer of all the different faiths.

title: Bhavani Nandana Bala Gajanana
lyrics:
Bhavani Nandana Bala Gajanana
Pranava Swaroopa Paahi
Hey Parthi Pureeshwara Sai
meaning: O young Lord Ganesh, the elephant-headed son of Mother Bhavani (Parvathi), please protect us, O Lord, the embodiment of the primordial sound Om (Pranava). You are verily Lord Sai of Parthi.

title: Bhavatharini Partheeshwari
lyrics:
Bhavatharini Partheeshwari
Sukha Dayini Sayeeshwari [ Bhavatharini ... ]
Bandha Mochani Prashanthi Eshwari
Janani Devi Leela Vinodini
Shiva Vama Bhage Sayeeshwari
Charanam Sharanam Samrajya Dayini
meaning: O Mother Sai, residing in Parthi, You help us cross the worldly existence. O Sai Mother, You grant us all the pleasures and comfort. O Mother, Goddess of Parthi, You free us from bondage and bestow joy upon us. O Eshwari, the consort of Lord Shiva and the one capable of bestowing kingdom, we surrender at Your feet.

title: Bhola Bhandari Baba
lyrics:
Bhola Bhandari Baba Shiva Shiva Shiva Sai Baba
Anatha Rakshaka Deena Dayala Patitha Pavana Sai Baba [ Bhola Bhandari ... ]
Yogeshwara Sai Murari Yogeshwara Hey Tripurari
Nithyananda Brahmananda Premananda Sai Baba
meaning: O Lord Sai Baba, You are the Lord who can be pleased easily, You are the treasure of mercy and prosperity, You are the supporter of the orphans, protector and the refuge to the destitute and You uplift them and make them sacred. O Lord of the Yogis, O Sai Murari, Tripurari, the destroyer of three worlds, You are the embodiment of eternal, supreme bliss and love.

title: Bhola Jai Bhola Jai
lyrics:
Bhola Jai Bhola Jai Sathya Sai Ki Jai Bolo Sathya Sai Ki Jai
Rama Krishna Ki Jai Pavana Purusha Jai Bolo Narayana Ki Jai [ Bhola Jai ... ]
Sanathana Dharma Uddharaka Sai
Apad Bandhava Govinda Sai
Eshwaramba Priya Sutha Sai
Sathya Sai Ki Jai Bolo Sathya Sai Ki Jai
meaning:
Victory to Lord Sathya Sai who can be pleased easily. Victory to Rama, Krishna, Supreme Lord and Narayana. Victory to Lord Sai, the upholder of ancient Dharma (faith), the caretaker of the afflicted and the beloved son of Mother Eshwaramba.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Bhola Nath Harey Jagadeesha
lyrics:
Bhola Nath Harey Jagadeesha
Shaileshwara Hara Uma Mahesha [ Bhola Nath Harey ... ]
Bhava Bhaya Haari Hey Tripurari
Shiva Gangadhara Sai Murari
Bhola Nath Bhola Nath
Sai Nath Sai Nath
meaning: Chant the name of the easy-to-please Lord of the Universe, Lord Shiva, who grants all that is asked for without any question, the Lord who resides on the mountain, the Lord of Mother Uma, the one who destroys the cycle of birth and death. The Lord of the three worlds who has the Holy river Ganga in His matted hair is verily Lord Sainath.

title: Bhola Nath Shambho Shankara
lyrics:
Bhola Nath Shambho Shankara
Sai Nath Bhola Maheshwara
Dama Dama Damaru Bholey Shankara
Dhimi Dhimi Dhimi Dhimi Natana Manohara
Parthi Pureeshwara Sai Shankara 
Bhola Maheshwara Sai Shankara
meaning:
Chant the name of the easy to please Lord Shankara (Shiva), the conferrer of all prosperity. Lord Sai is the incarnate of Lord Shiva also known as Maheshwara (Greatest Lord), the destroyer of all that is transient. He is the enchanting dancer to the rhythmic beats of the Damaru (kettle-drum). He has won over death, He is the eternal one and the bestower of all auspiciousness and prosperity.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Bhola Shankara Bhola
lyrics:
Bhola Shankara Bhola ( Hara )
Shaileshwara Hara Vishwambara Dhara [ Hara Bhola Shankara ... ]
Surya Chandra Pralayagni Netra Dhara
Shakthi Sahita Shiva Natana Manohara
meaning: O Lord Shankara (Shiva), the giver of prosperity, You are easily pleased. You are the one who resides on the snow-clad mountain, You pervade the entire universe. Your three eyes denote the Sun, the Moon and the Agni (the fire of deluge). You are the Enchanter who dances with His consort Shakthi (Parvathi).

title: Bhuvana Bandhava Sai Bhagawan
lyrics:
Bhuvana Bandhava Sai Bhagawan
Mata Pitha Bandhu Sakha Tum Ho Bhagawan
Eshwar Bhi Tum Ho Allah Nanak Tum Ho
Prabhu Yesu Tum Ho Mahavir Tum Ho
Buddha Deva Tum Ho Merey Pran ( Sai ) Nath Tum Ho
Sai Ram Sai Ram (2)
meaning: Chant the name of Lord Sai, the Lord of this Universe. O Sai, You are my mother, father, relative and friend. You are verily Lord Shiva, Guru Nanak, Jesus Christ, Mahavir and Buddha. You are my very life force.

title: Bhuvana Pradeepa Tribhuvana Mohana
lyrics:
Bhuvana Pradeepa Tribhuvana Mohana
Sai Natha Bhagawan (2)
Bhaktha Janonke Tum Ho Daata
Yuga Avatar Bhagawan
Parthi Pureeshwara Prashanthi Nilaya
Dukha Bhanjana Bhagawan [ Sai Nath... ]
meaning: O Lord Sai who resides at Prashanthi Nilayam in Puttaparthi, the one who illuminates the entire universe, the protector of the three worlds, You have incarnated in this Kali Age to eradicate the sorrows of the devotees and bestow Your Grace.

title: Bismillah, Bismillah
lyrics:
Bismillah, Bismillah
Erachman Erahim
Bismillah, Bismillah
Hu Allahu
We begin in the Name
Of the One who is Love
Who is Mercy, Mercy and Compassion
Mercy, Mercy, and Compassion
Shalom
De l’Amour, de la Paix, dans le Monde (4x)
meaning:
Send Love and Peace to the world

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Bolo Bolo Sab Mil Bolo
lyrics:
Bolo Bolo Sab Mil Bolo Om Namah Shivaya
Om Namah Shivaya Om Namah Shivaya [ Bolo Bolo ... ]
Joota Jata Mey Gangadhari
Trishoola Dhari Damaru Bajaavey
Dama Dama Dama Dama Damaru Bajaa
Goonj Utao Om Namah Shivaya
Om Namah Shivaya (3)
meaning: Let us all chant together, "Om Namah Shivaya" and bow down to Lord Shiva, the bestower of all prosperity. He holds the Holy Ganges in His matted locks of hair. He holds the Trishoola (the trident) and plays on the Damaru (kettle-drum). Let us all play the Damaru in a rhythmic fashion. Let the chanting "Om Namah Shivaya" resonate.

title: Bolo Bolo Sai Ram Bolo
lyrics:
Bolo Bolo Sai Ram Bolo Bolo Sai Ram Bolo Sai Ram Ji Ki Jai
Bolo Sai Ram Ji Ki Jai
Bolo Bolo Shirdi Sai Bolo Bolo Parthi Sai Bolo Sathya Sai Ki Jai
Bolo Sathya Sai Ki Jai [ Bolo Sai Ram ... ]
meaning:
Let us all join in proclaiming the glory of our beloved Lord, Sai Ram. He resides in Shirdi and Puttaparthi. All praises to You, our dear Lord.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Bolo Jai Jai Kaar Bolo
lyrics:
Bolo Jai Jai Kaar Bolo Jai Jai Kaar
Bolo Jai Jai Kaar Sai Baba Ki
Patitha Pavana Hey Ghana Shyama
Sai Gopala Hey Ghana Shyama
Prema Bhagawan Sai Bhagawan
Sai Ram Sai Ram (2)
meaning: Chant victory to Lord Sai Baba who is also Lord Ghana Shyama (Krishna), the saviour of afflicted and the Lord whose very form is Love.

title: Bolo Jai Sai Ram
lyrics:
Bolo Jai Sai Ram Bolo Jai Sai Ram
Bolo Jai Sathya Sai Ram (2)
Mandir Mey Sai Ram
Masjid Mey Sai Ram
Gurudware Mey Sai Ram
Girjaghar Mey Sai Ram [ Bolo Jai Sathya ... ]

Bolo Jai Sai Ram Bolo Jai Sai Ram (5)
meaning: Chant victory to Lord Sai Rama whose form is Truth and who is the dweller of Temples (for Hindus), Masjids (for Muslims), Gurudwaras (for Sikhs) and Girjaghars (Churches for Christians or Synagogues for Jews).

title: Bolo Narayana Jai Jai Vittala
lyrics:
Bolo Narayana Jai Jai Vittala
Sai Narayana Ranga Ranga Vittala [ Bolo Narayana ... ]
Govinda Vittala Rakumayi Vittala
Gopala Vittala Panduranga Vittala
Sri Ranga Vittala Sai Ranga Vittala
meaning: Let us chant the many names of the Lord: Narayana, Vittala, Govinda, Gopala, Panduranga and Sai who is verily Lord Narayana.

title: Bolo Ram, Sai Ram
lyrics:
Bolo Ram, Sai Ram, Sathya Sai Ram
Sathya Naam, Sai Naam, Hari Ka Naam
Sri Hari Hari Bol, Hari Narayana
Bhajo Manuva Tu, Sathya Narayana
Merey Ram, Hey Ghana Shyam, Sathya Sai Ram [ Sathya Naam ... ]
meaning:
Chant the name of the Lord Sathya Sai Ram, The Lord's name is Sathya, the eternal, changeless truth. Chant the name of Lord Hari and Lord Narayana. O Mind, chant the names of Sathya Narayana, Rama, my Ghana Shyama and Sathya Sai Rama.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Brahma Guru Sai Narayana Guru
lyrics:
Brahma Guru Sai Narayana Guru
Brahma Guru Mahadeva
Sadguru Sai Dhyana Karey Nithya
Atma Linga Guru Deva (Sai)
Parama Guru Sathya Sai Guru
Nithyananda Guru Deva
Rama Guru Sri Krishna Guru Jaya [ Atma Linga ... ]
meaning:
Always worship the Divine Preceptor Lord Sathya Sai, who is also Brahma, Vishnu, Shiva, Rama, Krishna.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Brahma Murari Sada Poojita Namah
lyrics:
Brahma Murari Sada Poojita Namah Shivaya Namah Shivaya
Bilvarchana Priya Bhavani Shankara Namah Shivaya Namah Shivaya
Mruthyunjaya Mahadeva Maheshwara Namah Shivaya Namah Shivaya
Bhasmoddhoolita Tejo Vigraha Namah Shivaya Namah Shivaya
Lingodhbhavakara Sai Maheshwara Namah Shivaya Namah Shivaya
Namah Shivaya Namah Shivaya (Om)
meaning:
Glory to Lord Shiva who is worshipped by Brahma and Lord Vishnu. Lord Shiva is fond of being worshipped by Bilva leaves. He is the Lord of Lords and the conqueror of death. We bow to Lord Sathya Sai who manifests the Lingam and brings forth from within himself. We bow to the Supreme Lord, who is the conqueror of death. We bow to Lord Sai, the embodiment of Lord Shiva who has sacred ashes emanating from Him and whose Light illumines the Universe. We bow to the Lord who is fond of the 8 versed hymn, Lingashtakam. Chant the mantra, "Om Namah Shivaya". We bow to Thee, O Lord Shiva.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Brahma Swaroopa Naada Swaroopa
lyrics:
Brahma Swaroopa Naada Swaroopa
Sathya Swaroopa Dharma Swaroopa [ Brahma Swaroopa ... ]
Jyothi Swaroopa Divya Swaroopa
Shanthi Swaroopa Prema Swaroopa
Shirdi Swaroopa Parthi Swaroopa
Deva Deva Deva Sathya Sai Deva
meaning:
O Lord Sathya Sai, You are the Supreme Brahman (Universal God), the embodiment of the primordial sound Om. You are truth, righteousness, effulgence, peace and divine love. You are the resident of Shirdi and Parthi.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Brahma Vishnu Maheshwara Sayeeshwara (Hey)
lyrics:
Brahma Vishnu Maheshwara Sayeeshwara (Hey)
Daya Karo Krupa Karo Parameshwara
Sai Ram Sai Ram (2)
Parama Dayala Paapa Vinasha
Raksha Karo Raksha Karo Sayeeshwara [ Daya Karo ... ]
meaning: O Lord Sai, You are verily the Trinity - Brahma, Vishnu and Shiva (Creator, Sustainer and Annihilator). You are the most compassionate one and the destroyer of sins. Please shower Your grace on us and protect us, O Lord.

title: Brahmananda Roopa Sri Sai Deva
lyrics:
Brahmananda Roopa Sri Sai Deva
Brinda Vihara Ananda Chandha [ Brahmananda Roopa ... ]
Nithyananda Atmananda Keshava Govinda
Govinda Gopala Jaya Ananda Mukunda
Govinda Gopala Jaya Ananda Mukunda (4)
meaning: Glory to Lord Sai, the very embodiment of Supreme Bliss. In the incarnation as Lord Krishna, he was the resident of Brindavan who bestowed bliss on all. Chant the names of Keshava and Govinda, who is ever blissful and immersed in the Self. Victory to Lord Govinda, Gopala and Mukunda.

title: Brahmanda Nayaka Baba
lyrics:
Brahmanda Nayaka Baba Parthi Pureeshwara Baba
Chand Aur Suraj Tum Ne Banayey
Nadiya Sagar Tum Ne Banayey (2) [ Brahmanda ... ]
Ayodhya Nagari Tum Ne Banayi Dwaraka Nagari Tum Ne Basayi
Shirdi Parthi Tum Ne Banayi
meaning: Oh Baba, Creator of the entire Universe! You reside in Parthi (Prashanthi Nilayam). You created the sun and the moon, You made the rivers and oceans, You made the city of Ayodhya and established the city of Dwaraka. You created the holy cities of Shirdi and Parthi.

title: Buddha Mahavir Yesu Sai
lyrics:
Buddha Mahavir Yesu Sai
Vahey Guru Vahey Guru Bol Manuva
Allah Yesu Sadguru Sai
Geeta Veda Quran Ho Sai
Tan Mey Sai Man Mey Sai
Rom Rom Mey Sai Sai [ Vahey Guru ... ]
meaning: O mind, chant the name of Vahey Guru, Buddha, Mahavir, Jesus and the Divine Preceptor Sai, who are the essence of scriptures Bagawad Gita, Quran and Bible. O Sai, You are the indweller of the body and mind and every atom of body is filled by You.

title: Chanda Kirana Kula Mandana Ram
lyrics:
Chanda Kirana Kula Mandana Ram
Srimad Dasharatha Nandana Ram
Kausalya Sukha Vardhana Ram
Vishwamitra Priya Dhana Ram
Rama Rama Jaya Raja Ram
Rama Rama Jaya Sita Ram
Rama Rama Jaya Raja Ram
Rama Rama Jaya Sai Ram
meaning: O beloved Prince of King Dasharatha, Lord Rama, You are the crown jewel of the Solar Dynasty, radiating bliss and happiness. You are the cause of Mother Kausalya's happiness and Sage Vishwamitra's beloved treasure. Victory to You, O King Rama, consort of Mother Sita.

title: Chandi Chamundi Jaya Vaishnavi Devi
lyrics:
Chandi Chamundi Jaya Vaishnavi Devi Ma
Mahisha Samhaarini Mangala Roopini Jaya Maha Kaali Ma
Chandi Chamundi Jaya Mangala Gowri Ma
Bhava Bhaya Harini Pashupathi Mohini Jaya Jaya Lalitey Ma
Jagadodharini Jaya Bhavadharini Jaya Jaya Devi Ma
Trishoola Dharini Trinetra Dharini Jaya Jaya Durge Ma
meaning:
