Victory to Mother Durga, Mother of the Universe who bestows auspiciousness and removes the fear of worldly existence. She is also Mother Kali who slew the demon Mahisha. She is the consort of Shiva and the one who fosters all beings. Victory to Mother Durga, the three-eyed one who holds the Trident.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Chandra Vadana Kamala Nayana
lyrics:
Chandra Vadana Kamala Nayana
Narayana Hari Narayana
Anantha Shayana Deena Sharanya [ Narayana Sai ... ]
meaning: Glory to Lord Narayana who has a face pleasing like the moon and whose eyes are like lotus. He is reclining eternally on the Celestial Serpent Sesha and is the refuge to the weak and meek.

title: Chandrakala Dhara Samba Sadashiva
lyrics:
Chandrakala Dhara Samba Sadashiva
Shambho Mahadeva (Shiva) (3)
Om Namah Shivaya Shivaya Namah Om (2)
meaning: Lord Shiva, who is eternal and unchanging, wears the crescent moon on His head as a decoration. The Lord of the Lords is the bestower of good. Let us chant the mantra "Om Namah Shivaya" which means, "I bow to Lord Shiva".

title: Chandrakala Dhara Shambho Deva
lyrics:
Chandrakala Dhara Shambho Deva
Partheesha Sai Jagadeesha [ Chandra Kaladhara ... ]
Akhilandeshwara Paramesha
Karunakara Sayeesha
Trinetra Dhari Shiva Shankara [ Partheesha Sai ... ]
meaning: Salutations to Lord Sai who is none other than Lord Shiva, who is the Lord of the Universe adorning the crescent moon on His head, with the third eye in the forehead and who is the most compassionate one.

title: Chandrashekara Sayeeshwara
lyrics:
Chandrashekara Sayeeshwara
Chandrakala Dhara Hrudayeshwara [ Chandrashekara ... ]
Prema Pradayaka Parameshwara
Parameshwara Sayeeshwara Sathya Sayeeshwara [ Prema Pradayaka ... ]
Prashanthi Nilaya Hara Shankara
meaning: Glory to Lord Sai who is none other than Lord Shiva who wears the crescent moon on His head. He is also the Lord who resides in the Heart. He is Parameshwara, the greatest Lord who grants love to all. He is our Lord Sathya Sai whose abode is Prashanthi Nilayam.

title: Chandrashekaraya Namah Om
lyrics:
Chandrashekaraya Namah Om
Gangadharaya Namah Om [ Chandrashekaraya ... ]
Om Namah Shivaya Namah Om
Hara Hara Haraya Namah Om
Shiva Shiva Shivaya Namah Om
Sayeeshwaraya Namah Om (Sathya)
meaning: Obeisance to Lord Shiva, who is decorated with the crescent-moon on His head, who makes the Holy Ganges flow through His matted hair. I bow to Lord Shiva, who destroys the illusion and all that is transient. Chant the mantra " Hara Hara Haraya Namah Om, Shiva Shiva Shivaya Namah Om, Sayeeshwarya Namah Om."

title: Chant the name of God
lyrics:
Chant the name of God, Sing the Glory of the Lord
Harey Ram Harey Ram Harey Krishna Sai Ram
Call Him Allah or Buddha Jesus Zohrashtra
Say Ram Rahim Mahaveer Sai Natha
He is All names and All forms choose anyone
He is All names and All forms Almighty One

title: Charana Kamala Bando
lyrics:
Charana Kamala Bando Sai Nath Ke Charana Kamala Bando (2)
Jo Trishavanto Piyo Charanamrutha Jeevan Mey Paavey Anando [ Charana Kamala ... ]
meaning:
Offer salutations at the Lotus Feet of Lord Sai. Whoever pines for His nectar-like Feet will be filled with bliss throughout his lifetime.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Chitha Chora Muraliwala
lyrics:
Chitha Chora Muraliwala
Nandalala Nanda Gopala
Nandalala Nandalala
Brindavana Shyama Gopala
Mathura Vraja Gokula Bala
Mana Mohana Madana Gopala
Nandalala Nandalala
Nandalala Nanda Gopala
Nandalala Nandalala
meaning: Chant the many names of Lord Krishna, the stealer of hearts, the seat of consciousness, the enchanting Flutist, the dark-blue complexioned Lord Gopala moving about in Brindavan.

title: Chitha Chora Yashoda Ke Bal
lyrics:
Chitha Chora Yashoda Ke Bal Navaneetha Chora Gopal
Gopal Gopal Gopal Govardhanadhara Gopal
Gopal Gopal Gopal Gopal Govardhanadhara Gopal
meaning: O Lord Gopala (Krishna), the beloved Prince of Mother Yashoda, You are the captivator/stealer of the hearts of devotees, their Chitta, the spiritual Heart which is the seat of consciousness. You are the stealer of butter, i. e. hearts of the Gopis (devotees). Chant the name of Gopala, the one who protects the cows or tends the cows as a cowherd. Chant the name of the Govardhanadhara Gopal, who held aloft the mountain Govardhana to protect the villagers against the torrential rain.

title: Chitha Raja Chitha Raja
lyrics:
Chitha Raja Chitha Raja
Brindavana Ghana Mangala Charana
Savari Surath Prema Bharana [ Chitha Raja ... ]
Roopa Manohara Murali Madhuvana
Parthi Pureeshwara Chitha Raja Chitha Raja
meaning: O Sai, Lord of Parthi, You are the king of my mind (Chitha - the spiritual Heart). Your auspicious feet (when You incarnated as Lord Krishna) rambled the thick forests of Brindavan and made them auspicious. Your beautiful complexion captivates us and fills us with Love. O Lord of Parthi and King of my mind, You have a charming beautiful loving Lotus face. O holder of the Flute, You are the bestower of auspiciousness.

title: Daasharathey Rama Jaya Jaya Rama
lyrics:
Daasharathey Rama Jaya Jaya Rama
Raghukula Bhooshana Raja Rama [ Daasharathey ... ]
Sita Vallabha Sundara Rama
Sri Rama Jaya Rama Sathya Sai Rama
meaning: Victory to Lord Rama, the Prince of King Dasharatha. Lord Rama is the Jewel of the Raghu Dynasty. Chant the name of Lord Rama, the beloved of Mother Sita. Chant the name of Lord Rama, who is verily Lord Sathya Sai.

title: Dakshina Murthim Sai Mahesham
lyrics:
Dakshina Murthim Sai Mahesham
Sathyam Shivam Sundaram
Sundaram Sundaram
Chinmaya Mudram Chidananda Roopam
Sanakaadi Yogi Jana Vanditha Sri Gurum [ Sathyam ... Sundaram ]
meaning:
O Lord Sai, You are Dakshinamurthy (God of silence), the embodiment of truth, awareness, beauty. You are the Lord with blissful form sitting in the posture Chinmudra facing south. You are worshipped by yogis like Sanaka etc.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Dama Dama Dama Dama Damaru
lyrics:
Dama Dama Dama Dama Damaru Baajey
Nachey Shankara Nacherey [ Dama Dama ... ]
Tunga Himachala Shringa Nivasita
Nachey Pralayankara Nacheyrey
Srishti Shankara Laya Pralayankara
Nacherey Shiva (Sai) Nacherey
meaning: O Lord Shankara (Shiva), dance in rhythm with the Damaru (drum), You are the one who dwells at the peak of highest ice-laden mountain, Himachala, You perform the cosmic dance of creation, sustenance and destruction. Dance O Lord Sai Shiva.

title: Dama Dama Damaru Damaru Natha
lyrics:
Dama Dama Damaru Damaru Natha Shiva
Dhimitha Dhimitha Dhimi Bholey Natha Shiva [ Dama Dama ... ]
Natana Manohara Nataraja Shiva
Hara Hara Shankara Bholey Nath Shiva
Shambho Shankara Vishwanath Shiva
Shivaya Namah Shiva Sai Nath Shiva
meaning: Glory to Lord Shiva who loves the sound of the Drum "Dum Dum Dum", "Dhim Dhim Dhim"" and ""Bhum Bhum Bhum". Chant the name of Bholey Nath, the easy-to-please Lord Shiva, Lord Gowri Natha, the Lord of Goddess Parvathi, Lord Nataraja, the Lord of dance, Lord Shankara, the one who gives happiness, Lord Shambho, the bestower of good and Lord Sai who is verily Lord Shiva.

title: Danava Bhanjana Rama Sai Shyamala
lyrics:
Danava Bhanjana Rama Sai Shyamala Komala Ram
Hey Rama Rama Jaya Rama Sai Rama Rama Ram [ Danava Bhanjana ... ]
Dasharatha Nandana Rama Sai Daya Sagara Ram
Deenon Ke Prabhu Rama Sai Rama Rama Ram
meaning: O charming and sweet Lord Rama, You annihilated the demons (Danavas). Victory to You, Lord Rama, son of Dasharatha. You are an ocean of compassion, the refuge to the destitute. O Rama, You are verily our Lord Sai Rama.

title: Dance Shiva Dance
lyrics:
Dance Shiva Dance In Our Hearts (2)
Blow Out The Winds Of Desire ( Sai )
Purify Our Hearts Purify
Let Our Sins Die In Your Fire
Dance Shiva Dance In Our Hearts (3)
And Love Will Flow Like A River

title: Darsha Dikhao Bhagawan (Mujhe)
lyrics:
Darsha Dikhao Bhagawan (Mujhe)
Hey Sai Natha Bhagawan [ Darsha Dikhao ... ]
Tum Janat Sab Antaryami
Deejo Merey Prabhu Amrutha Vani
Tum Ho Merey Atma Ram Baba
Pooran Karo Merey Man Ki Kamna
meaning: Show me Your Divine Form, O Lord Sai, You are omniscient, You are the in-dweller. Give me Your nectarine message, O my Lord. You are my Atma Ram (in-dweller). Please fulfill my heart's desire, O Lord.

title: Darsha Dikhao Merey Sai Nandalala
lyrics:
Darsha Dikhao Merey Sai Nandalala
Daya Karo Mujhey Krishna ( Sai ) Gopala [ Darsha Dikhao ... ]
Devaki Nandana Deena Dayala
Mathura Natha Madana Gopala
Sai Narayana Sada Krupala [ Daya Karo ... ]
meaning: O Lord Gopala (Krishna), the beloved son of Nanda, grant me Your Vision and shower Your compassion on me. O Lord, the loving son of Mother Devaki, You are the compassionate Lord of the meek and weak, the Lord of Mathura and the most beautiful one. O the ever-compassionate Lord Sai, You are none other than Lord Krishna and Narayana. Shower Your mercy and grace on me.

title: Darshana Deejo Bhagawan
lyrics:
Darshana Deejo Bhagawan
Parama Dayalu Bhagawan [ Darshana Deejo ... ]
Adi Anantha Adbhuta Roopa
Ananda Daata Aashritha Vatsala
Prema Swaroopa Shanthi Pradatha
Satchidananda Sri Sathya Sayeesha
meaning: Grant me the vision of Your Divine Form O Lord, the supremely merciful Sai, You are Infinite and Your beautiful Form is unsurpassed and indescribable. Thou art the grantor of joy and happiness to those who have come to Thee for refuge. Your Form is Love and You are the bestower of Peace. O most Supreme Lord Sri Sathya Sai, You are the embodiment of Truth, Awareness and Bliss.

title: Dasharatha Nandana Rama Daya Sagara
lyrics:
Dasharatha Nandana Rama Daya Sagara Rama
Dasha Mukha Mardhana Rama Daithya Kulaantaka Rama [ Dasharatha Nandana ... ]
Lakshmana Sevitha Rama Lakshmi Manohara Rama
Sookshma Swaroopa Rama Sundara Vadana Rama
meaning: O merciful Lord Rama, beloved son of King Dasharatha, You are an ocean of mercy. You slayed the ten headed Ravana thereby putting an end to the clan of demons. You are worshipped and attended by brother Lakshmana and You are the enchanter of Goddess Lakshmi. O beautiful-faced Rama, You are the formless one.

title: Dasharatha Nandana Rama Daya Sagara
lyrics:
Dasharatha Nandana Rama Daya Sagara Rama
Raghukula Tilaka Rama Sathya Sai Sri Parandhama [ Dasharatha Nandana ... ]
Ahalyodharaka Rama Shaapa Vimochana Rama
Shirdi Pureesha Rama Puttaparthi Puri Parandhama
meaning: Glory to Thee, O Lord Rama, the darling son of King Dasharatha, You are an ocean of compassion and the Crown Jewel of the Raghu Dynasty. You are the saviour of Ahalya from the curse that had turned her into a stone. You are Lord Sathya Sai, the indweller of hearts, with Shirdi and Parthi as Your supreme abodes.

title: Dasharatha Nandana Sri Ramachandra Dharma
lyrics:
Dasharatha Nandana Sri Ramachandra Dharma Samrakshaka Ram
Devaki Nandana Muralidhara Ananda Dayaka Shyam
Eshwaramba Sutha Sri Sathya Sai Premamrutha Bhagawan
Jaya Jaya Jaya Shiva Shakthi Swaroopa Mangala Dayaka Naam
Dasharatha Nandana Ram
Ananda Dayaka Shyam
Premamrutha Bhagawan
Jai Jai Jai Sai Ram (Bolo)
meaning: Glory to the son of Dasharatha, Lord Rama, who has a blissful and serene face and who upholds righteousness. He is the same as the son of Devaki, Lord Krishna (Shyama), who, holding the enchanting flute bestows happiness. He is verily the son of Eshwaramba, Lord Sathya Sai, who is the embodiment of love. Victory to Lord Sai, the embodiment of Shiva and Shakthi and the all powerful one whose name bestows auspiciousness. Chant victory to Sai Ram.

title: Dasharatha Ram Janaki Ram
lyrics:
Dasharatha Ram Janaki Ram
Maruti Sevitha Manobhi Ram
Sita Ram Sri Raghu Ram
Parthi Pureeshwara Sri Sai Ram
Jaya Jaya Ram Janaki Ram
Ahalyodharaka Ananda Ram
meaning: O Lord Rama, Prince of King Dasharatha, O Lord of Sita, You are constantly worshipped by Maruti (Hanuman, a monkey devotee of Lord Rama). Chant the name of the Lord of Parthi, Lord Sai Ram. Victory to Lord Rama, Lord of Janaki (Sita), blissful Rama, the saviour of Ahalya.

title: Datta Guru Datta Guru Dattatreya
lyrics:
Datta Guru Datta Guru Dattatreya Guru
Sai Natha Deena Natha Brahma Roopa Guru [ Datta Guru ... ]
Alakh Niranjan Bhava Bhaya Bhanjana Dattatreya Guru
Dattatreya Guru
Sai Nath Guru
meaning: Chant the Holy names of the Noble Teacher Dattatreya and Lord Sai. Reciting the ever pure and spotless names of the Noble Teacher Lord Dattatreya and Lord Sainath, destroys the fear of the bondage of birth and death.

title: Dattatreya Sadguru Deva
lyrics:
Dattatreya Sadguru Deva
Dehi Dehi Tava Sri Paada Seva
Tum Hi Brahma Sanathana Deva
Vishnu Narayana Sri Vasudeva
Pannaga Bhooshana Shiva Mahadeva
Dehi Dehi Tava Sri Paada Seva (2)
meaning: Oh God and Noble teacher Dattatreya, grant us to serve Your Feet. You are Brahma the eternal God, Vishnu, Narayana who is indweller in all. You are Shiva, Mahadeva adorned with the serpent.

title: Daya Karo Bhagawan Krupa Karo
lyrics:
Daya Karo Bhagawan Krupa Karo Bhagawan (2)
Bhagawan Bhagawan
Hey Sai Nath Bhagawan
Hey Krupa Nidhey Bhagawan
meaning:
Oh Lord, bestow on us your compassion and mercy, Oh Lord Sai, who is the treasure house of compassion.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Daya Karo Bhagawan Shankara Daya
lyrics:
Daya Karo Bhagawan Shankara Daya Karo Bhagawan
Parvathi Ramana Pannaga Bhooshana Neelakanta Daya Karo [ Daya Karo ]
Chandrashekara Chandrakala Dhara Vibhuti Sundara Daya Karo [ Daya Karo ... ]
Trishoola Dhari Trinetra Dhari Gangadhari Daya Karo
meaning: Show us Your compassion, O Lord Shankara, the blue-throated one who adorns the snake and who is the consort of Goddess Parvathi. You are beautiful with Vibhuthi (holy ash) besmeared all over Your body and the moon adorned on Your head. Be merciful towards us O Lord, who has the third eye, possesses the trident and holds the river Ganga in Your matted hair.

title: Daya Karo Hari Narayana
lyrics:
Daya Karo Hari Narayana
Krupa Karo Hey Mana Mohana [ Daya Karo ... ]
Deena Dayala Dashavathara (2)
Darshan Do Hey Sai Gopala
meaning: O Lord Hari Narayana, bestow on us Your mercy, You are the Lord of the destitute and the helpless who incarnated ten times for the sake of Your devotees. O Lord Gopala (Krishna), grant us Your Darshan.

title: Daya Karo Hari Narayana
lyrics:
Daya Karo Hari Narayana
Krupa Karo Hey Jaga Vandana [ Daya Karo ... ]
Bhavatheetha Bhagya Vidhata
Deena Natha Anatha Ke Natha
meaning: O Lord Hari Narayana, bestow on us Your mercy, You are worshipped by the whole world. You are the Lord of the destitute and the helpless; You are the saviour from worldly miseries and the bestower of auspiciousness.

title: Daya Karo Hey Daya Nidhey
lyrics:
Daya Karo Hey Daya Nidhey Hey Bhagawan
Tan Man Dhan Sab Sharana Tumharey [ Daya Karo ... ]
Adi Anantha Hari Avinashi
Sada Nirantara Ghat Ghat Vasi
Deena Dayala Sada Krupala (2)
meaning: Oh Bhagawan, the treasure house of mercy, have mercy on us. This body, mind and money (all the material possessions) are all Yours. Oh infinite and the primal one, You are all pervading; Oh the saviour of destitute, You are ever compassionate.

title: Daya Karo Hey Karuna Nidhan
lyrics:
Daya Karo Hey Karuna Nidhan Sai
Tum Ho Daata Daya Karo
Tum Ho Sai Krupa Karo
Prabhu Tum Sai Antaryami
Parthi Puri Bhagawan (2)
Tum Ho Daata Daya Karo [ Tum Ho... ]
meaning:
Oh Lord Sai, the treasure house of Grace and compassion, kindly bless us with Your mercy. You are the ever-giver, please bestow on us Your mercy. Oh Lord Sai, You are the indweller of hearts. Oh resident of Parthi, bestow on us Your grace and mercy.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Daya Karo Krupa Karo Partheeshwara
lyrics:
Daya Karo Krupa Karo Partheeshwara Sai Deva
Janam Janam Tum Saath Rahorey
Sai Nath Mahadeva
Daya Karo Krupa Karo Partheeshwara Sai Deva
Shirdeeshwara Sai Deva Partheeshwara Sai Deva
meaning:
O Lord Sai, the Lord of Parthi be compassionate and merciful towards us and accompany us from birth to birth. You are the Lord of the Lords and the resident of Shirdi and Parthi.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Daya Karo Sadguru Sai Daya
lyrics:
Daya Karo Sadguru Sai Daya Karo
Shirdi Nivasa Sai Daya Karo
Parthi Nivasa Sai Daya Karo [ Daya Karo ... ]
Meera Ke Prabhu Giridhara Naagara
Tum Ho Brahma Eshwara
Radha Kantha Parvathi Ramana
Deena Bandhava Sai Daya Karo [ Parthi Nivasa ... ]
meaning: O Lord Sai, our divine Preceptor who dispells the darkness of ignorance, the resident of Shirdi and Parthi, please shower Your mercy. O Lord Krishna, the one who held aloft the mountain to save the devotees, You are the Lord of Meera. You are Brahma (creator) and Eshwara (destroyer - Lord Shiva). O Radha's beloved and the enchanter of Goddess Parvathi, You are the Saviour of the helpless and the destitute. O Lord Sai, the dweller of Parthi, shower Your compassion on us.

title: Daya Karo Sai Narayana
lyrics:
Daya Karo Sai Narayana
Karuna Sagara Narayana
Pankaja Nayana Pannaga Shayana
Sri Vasudeva Narayana
Paapa Vinashaka Prashanthi Vasa
Parthipuri Sai Narayana
Paramananda Narayana
meaning: O Lord Narayana, show us Your mercy. You are the ocean of compassion, the lotus-eyed one reclining on the celestial serpent Adi Sesha. O Lord, You are the indweller of all the beings. You have incarnated in this Kali Yuga as Lord Sai who resides in Prashanthi Nilayam at Puttaparthi. You destroy our sins and You are the personification of Supreme Bliss.

title: Daya Karo Shiva Gangadhari
lyrics:
Daya Karo Shiva Gangadhari
Krupa Karo Shiva Hey Tripurari [ Daya Karo ... ]
Naama Madhura Shubha Mangala Kaari
Alakha Niranjana Trishoola Dhari
Daya Karo Daya Karo Daya Karo Bhola Bhandari
meaning: O Lord Shiva, the one who holds the Holy Ganges in Your locks of hair, shower Your compassion on us. O Lord who destroyed the city of Tripura, shower Your mercy on us. Your sweet name bestows all auspiciousness. O the imperceptible and faultless one, the holder of the trident, O the easy-to-please Lord, shower Your mercy on us.

title: Daya Sagara Karunakara
lyrics:
Daya Sagara Karunakara
Jagadeeshwara Sayeeshwara [ Daya Sagara ]
Bhuvaneshwara Akhileshwara
Guna Gambhira Sayeeshwara (2)
meaning: Oh Lord Sai, you are the ocean of compassion and mercy. Oh Lord of the entire creation, Oh Sai eshwara You are the Lord of the entire world, You are the master of the entire world and the entire Universe Oh Lord Sai, You are the embodiment of all virtues qualities.

title: Daya Sudha Barsao Mata Jaya
lyrics:
Daya Sudha Barsao Mata Jaya Jaya Jaya Ambe
Prema Sudha Barsao Mata Jaya Jaya Jaya Ambe
Devi Niranjani Sai Bhavani
Jaya Jaya Jaya Ambe (2)

Jaya Jaya Jaya Ambe (3)
meaning: Victory to Mother Ambe! Oh Ocean of mercy and love! Shower Your grace. Oh Purest One! (Mother Sai). You are the destroyer of the cycle of birth and death.

title: Dayabhi Rama Janaki Rama
lyrics:
Dayabhi Rama Janaki Rama
Madhura Manohara Prabhu Sai Rama
Atma Rama Nayanabhi Rama
Kodanda Rama Pattabhi Rama
Raghupathi Raghava Raja Rama [ Madhura Manohara ... ]
meaning: O Lord Rama, who resides in the heart of devotees and holder of the Kodanda bow, You are merciful and beautiful to behold. Chant the name of the King Rama of the Raghu dynasty and the beautiful and enchanting Lord Sai who is verily Lord Rama.

title: Dayamaya Hey Maheshwara
lyrics:
Dayamaya Hey Maheshwara
Krupamaya Hey Sadashiva
Dama Dama Damaru Maheshwara
Damaruka Natha Sadashiva
Hari Om Hari Om Sadashiva
meaning: Hey Maheshwara (Shiva) you are full of compassion. You are also Shiva the embodiment of auspiciousness show us your kindness who loves the sound of damaru (drum) dama, dama. . chant Hari Om.

title: Dayamaya Sri Rama Harey
lyrics:
Dayamaya Sri Rama Harey
Krupamaya Sri Sai Harey
Dharma Swaroopa Rama Harey
Prema Swaroopa Sai Harey
Sathya Dharma Shanthi Daata Sathya Sai Baba Harey
meaning: Chant the name of Rama, the compassionate one and Sai, who is highly merciful. Rama is the embodiment of righteousness. Sai is the embodiment of love and the one who bestows truth, righteousness and peace.

title: Deena Bandhava Baba Daya Sagara
lyrics:
Deena Bandhava Baba Daya Sagara
Patitha Pavana Sai Karunakara [ Deena Bandhava ... ]
Sathya Sai Prema Sai Shanthi Dharma Sindhu Sai
Jeevan Ka Aadhaar Sai Janam Janam Bandhu Sai [ Patitha Pavana ... ]
meaning: O Baba, the ocean of compassion, You are the kinsman to destitute, uplifter of afflicted. You are Sathya Sai whose form is Truth and Righteousness, refuge of all lives, father, mother and perpetual companion from birth to birth.

title: Deena Bandhava Sri Sai Deva
lyrics:
Deena Bandhava Sri Sai Deva
Daya Sagara Devadi Deva [ Deena Bandhava ... ]
Paahi Prabho Sayeeshwara
Dehi Vibho Jagadeeshwara
Sharanam Prabho Sathya Sai Deva
meaning: Oh Lord Sai, You are the kinsman of the destitute and the afflicted. Oh Lord of Lords, you are a ocean of compassion. Oh Lord Sayeeshwara, kindly protect me. O Lord of the universe, grant yourself to me Oh Sai deva, I surrender to thee.

title: Deena Bandhu Vittala Jai
lyrics:
Deena Bandhu Vittala Jai Karuna Sindho Vittala Jai
Vittala Vittala Vittala Jai Vittala Vittala Vittala Jai
Pandari Natha Vittala Jai Panduranga Vittala Jai
Parthi Pureesha Vittala Jai Prashanthi Nilaya Vittala Jai [ Vittala Vittala ... ]
meaning: Victory to Lord Panduranga Vittala of Pandharpur, who is the refuge of the downtrodden and the reservoir of compassion. He is none other than our Sai who resides at Prashanthi Nilayam in Puttaparthi.

title: Deena Dayala Hari Parama Dayala
lyrics:
Deena Dayala Hari Parama Dayala
Radha Ramana Hari Govinda Gopala
Madhura Manohara Krishna Gopala
Radha Ramana Hari Govinda Gopala
Meera Ke Prabhu Giridhara Bala
Brindavana Ghana Madana Gopala
meaning: Chant the many names of the supremely merciful, sweet and beautiful Lord Krishna - Hari, Govinda, Gopala. He is the one who liftted the Govardhana mountain and is the Lord of Meera.

title: Deena Dayala Sri Sai Rama
lyrics:
Deena Dayala Sri Sai Rama
Jagadodhara Prashanthi Rama
Anatha Rakshaka Ananda Rama
Ananda Rama Sadananda Rama [ Anatha Rakshaka ... ]
Atmabhi Rama Prabhu Sai Rama
meaning: O Lord Sri Rama, Sai Rama, You are merciful and kind towards the weak and the meek. O Lord of Prashanthi, You have come to uplift mankind. O Rama, the always blissful one, You are the protector of those who are orphaned. O Lord Sai Rama, You are the indweller of our hearts.

title: Deena Dukhiyon Ke Taarana Kaarana
lyrics:
Deena Dukhiyon Ke Taarana Kaarana
Tum Ho Eesa Masiha O Sai Baba [ Deena Dukhiyon ... ]
Dharma Uddharana Bhaktha Parayana
Adi Narayana Sai
Alakh Niranjan Bhava Bhaya Bhanjana
Parthi Narayana Sai (2)
meaning: O Lord Sai Baba, You are the destroyer of the miseries and pain of the destitute, You are the Supreme Lord descended for the revival or upliftment of righteousness and for guiding the devotees. O Lord Sai, You are the imperceptible and faultless and are the destroyer of the fear of the cycle of birth and death. O Sai, resident of Parthi, You are verily Lord Narayana.

title: Deena Dukhiyon Se Prem Karo
lyrics:
Deena Dukhiyon Se Prem Karo Mera Sai Prasanna Hoga
Sai Mera Main Tera Yeh Prem Ki Beheti Dhaara
Yeh Prem Ki Beheti Dhaara
Mera Sai Prasanna Hoga
meaning: My Lord Sai will be very happy, if you love and serve those afflicted with misery and pain. The flow of love binds us to Sai and binds Sai to us. This is the Stream of Love that flows amongst us.

title: Deena Janavani Vara Dayini
lyrics:
Deena Janavani Vara Dayini
Gnana Swaroopini Narayani
Sayeeshwari Amba Jagadeeshwari
Veda (Swa)Roopini Vageshwari
Prema Pradayini Partheeshwari
Mata Maheshwari Mana Mohini [ Sayeeshwari Amba ... ]
meaning: O Mother Sai, the goddess of the universe, You are the refuge to the destitute. You bestow boons and You love divine music. You are the essence of the Vedas and the Goddess of speech who bestows love. You are Partheeshwari (Goddess of Parthi) and Maheshwari (the great Goddess). You are the one who delights the mind.

title: Deena Natha Sai Guru Natha
lyrics:
Deena Natha Sai Guru Natha
Prema Swaroopa Shanthi Pradatha [ Deena Natha ... ]
Jaya Jaya Guru Deva Satchidananda
Shashi Vadana Alankruta Kesha
Sundara Sai Ananda Dayi
Daya Sagara Karunakara Sai Guru Deva
meaning: O Divine Preceptor Sai, the Lord of the destitute, You are the embodiment of love. You grant peace to the devotees. Victory unto You, O Lord, the embodiment of truth, awareness and bliss, who has a face like the moon, decorated with a crown of hair. O Sai, You are the ocean of compassion and kindness.

title: Deena Natha Shankara
lyrics:
Deena Natha Shankara
Karuna Sagara Shankara
Parthi Pureeshwara Shankara
Bhola Natha Kailasa Vasa
Parthi Pureeshwara Hey Paramesha
Sayeeshwara Deva
meaning: Salutations to You O Lord Shankara (Shiva), the bestower of happiness. You are the Lord of the destitute. You are none other than Lord Sai who resides in Parthi. O Lord, You are an ocean of compassion who is easy-to-please and whose abode is Mount Kailasa. O Lord of Parthi, You are the greatest Lord.

title: Deena Sharanya Deena Natha
lyrics:
Deena Sharanya Deena Natha
Karuna Sagara Sai Baba
Karuna Sagara Sai
Sita Rama Radhey Shyama
Sai Sundara Rama
Maya Manusha Vesha Dharey Tum
Jaya Leeladhara Sai Baba
Jaya Leeladhara Sai
meaning: Oh radiant Lord Sai, You are the protector of needy and downtrodden, the ocean of compassion, You are Lord Rama, the consort of Mother Sita. You are also Lord Krishna, the beloved of Radha. You have incarnated in these beautiful human form to be among Your devotees.

title: Dehi Sharanam Simha Vahini
lyrics:
Dehi Sharanam Simha Vahini
Dehi Sharanam Asura Vinashini
Dehi Sharanam Bhava Bhaya Haarini
Dehi Sharanam Hari Narayani
Dehi Sharanam Brahma Sanathani
Dehi Sharanam Sai Narayani
meaning: Grant me protection, oh Goddess Durga, who rides the lion. Oh Sai Narayani, the destroyer of demons and of fear of the cycle of birth and death, the consort of Lord Narayana, the eternal infinite one, grant me protection.

title: Deva Deva Mahadeva Sai Shankara
lyrics:
Deva Deva Mahadeva Sai Shankara
Sai Shankara Shirdeeshwara
Bhasmodbhavakara Partheeshwara
Swarna Varna Tejonmaya Jagadeeshwara
Sarva Mantra Swaroopa Sayeeshwara
Vamadeva Virupaksha Vishweshwara
meaning: God of gods O Mahadeva, You are Sai Shankara, the resident of Shirdi. You are Partheeshwara, who creates the sacred and divine ash. You are the effulgent God of the universe. You are Sayeeshwara, Vama Deva, Virupaksha and Vishveshwara who are the embodiment of all mantras.

title: Deva Devothama Deena Samrakshaka
lyrics:
Deva Devothama Deena Samrakshaka
Devadi Deva Dayamaya
Sri Sai Deva Krupamaya [ Deva Devothama ... ]
Patithodhara Paapa Vidhura
Parthi Vihara Parameshwara
Bhasmodbhavakara Bhava Bhaya Nashana [ Sri Sai Deva ... ]
meaning: O Lord Sri Sai, You are Supreme among Gods, the protector of the afflicted. Oh Lord of all Lords, You are the embodiment of compassion, You are the embodiment of mercy, the uplifter of the fallen and the destitute, O the Supreme Lord who moves about in Parthi, the Creator of Bhasma, the sacred ash and the remover of the fear of the bondage of cycle of birth and death, glory be to Thee.

title: Deva Senapathey Skanda Subrahmanya Paahi
lyrics:
Deva Senapathey Skanda Subrahmanya Paahi Maam
Paahi Parameshwara Skanda Subrahmanya Paahi Maam
Subrahmanya Shanmukha Natha
Sai Natha Karuna Sindho [ Paahi Parameshwara ... ]
meaning: O Lord Subrahmanya (son of Shiva), the chief of the battalion of Gods (Devas), protect us. O Skanda, the Supreme God, protect us. Protect us, O Lord with six faces, You have incarnated as Lord Sai, the embodiment of kindness.

title: Devadi Deva Vinayaka
lyrics:
Devadi Deva Vinayaka
Pranava Swaroopa Suramuni Vanditha [ Devadi Deva ... ]
Mangala Charana Paahi Gajanana
Hey Shubha Dayaka Vighna Vinashaka
Sri Charanam Bhava Dukha Haranam (2)
meaning: God of Gods Lord Ganesha, the elephant-faced one, You are the embodiment of Pranava, the primordial sound, You are the one who is worshipped by Gods and saints. We surrender at Your auspicious Feet, protect us, O Lord. We pray to You to bestow goodness and frees us from the miseries of the world.

title: Devaki Tanaya Daya Nidhey
lyrics:
Devaki Tanaya Daya Nidhey
Daya Nidhey Krupa Nidhey [ Devaki Tanaya ... ]
Darshan Deejo Deva (Sai) Deva
Deena Natha Sai Natha
meaning: Worship the merciful and compassionate Son of Mother Devaki, Lord Krishna. O Lord, You are the treasure house of compassion and mercy. O Lord of Lords, Sai, the up-lifter of the forlorn, please grant us Your Darshan, the view of Your Divine Form.

title: Devasena Pathey Subrahmanya
lyrics:
Devasena Pathey Subrahmanya 
Subrahmanya Shanmukha Natha [ (Valli) Devasena Pathey ... ]
Hara Haro Hara Gowri Nandana
Paahi Maam Paahi Maam Pazhani (Parthi) Pureesha

Hara Haro Hara Muruga Hara Haro Hara
Hara Haro Hara Shanmukha Hara Haro Hara
meaning: Lord Subrahmanya is the consort of Valli and Devasena, and the son of Mother Gowri (Parvathi). O Lord of Pazhani and Puttaparthi, please protect me. Destroy all our troubles and afflictions, O Lord Muruga.

title: Devi Bhavani Jagat Janani
lyrics:
Devi Bhavani Jagat Janani
Manda Haasini Ananda Dayini [ Devi Bhavani ... ]
Mangala Kaarini Karunya Roopini
Narayani Devi Narayani
Mahishasura Mardhini Ambe Bhavani
meaning: Glory to Goddess Bhavani, the Mother of Universe and the destroyer of cycle of birth and death. She has a bewitching smile and she confers bliss. She confers auspiciousness and is the embodiment of mercy. Worship Goddess Narayani. She is the annihilator of the demon Mahisha. She is worshipped as Goddess Amba.

title: Devi Bhavani Ma Jaya Sai
lyrics:
Devi Bhavani Ma Jaya Sai Bhavani Ma
Daya Karo Sai Ma Krupa Karo Sai Ma
Jaya Ma Jaya Ma Jaya Devi Bhavani Ma
Jaya Parthi Nivasini Ma Jaya Sai Bhavani Ma
meaning: Victory to Mother Sai, the destroyer of the cycle of birth and death. O Mother Sai, bestow on us Your mercy and compassion. O Mother, the resident of Parthi, victory to Thee.

title: Devi Durga Dasha Bhuja Dharini
lyrics:
Devi Durga Dasha Bhuja Dharini
Danava Daithya Dushta Samhaarini [ Devi Durga ... ]
Bhagawathi Bharati Bhava Bhaya Haarini
Mata Maheshwari Mangala Kaarini
Raja Rajeshwari Girija Bhavani
Bhaktha Janashraya Sai Bhavani
meaning:
Chant the name of Goddess Durga, who has ten arms. She is the destroyer of evil people and demons. Mother Maheshwari, confers auspiciousness. Mother Bhavani, the daughter of Himavan, mountain king, is also Raja Rajeshwari - the queen of queens. She is verily Sai Bhavani, who protects the devotees.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Devi Durga Kalyani
lyrics:
Devi Durga Kalyani
Maha Shakthi Bhavani Shivani [ Devi Durga ]
Suguna Manohari Sai Bhavani
Devi Jagadambe Janani Dayamayi
Vande Bhagawathi Mata Bhavani
meaning:
Oh goddess Durga, who confers auspiciousness. You are Bhavani with tremendous power, who is the consort of Shiva. You are the captivating Sai Bhavani with virtuous qualities. Oh divine mother of the universe, who is highly compassionate. Oh mother who is adored as Bhagawathi and Bhavani, we bow to you.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Devi Jagat Janani Sai Mata
lyrics:
Devi Jagat Janani Sai Mata
Pranava Swaroopini Praneshwari [ Devi Jagat ... ]
Gnana Pradayini Gnaneshwari
Tripura Sundari Daakshayini
Bhagawathi Bharati Narayani
Jagadeeshwari Jaganmohini
Karunamayi Sathya Sayeeshwari
meaning:
O Mother Sai, You are the Mother to the entire world, You are the form of Pranava (Primordial Sound, Om) and You are the very life. O Embodiment of wisdom, You grant us the knowledge and wisdom. O Daughter of Dhaksha (Goddess Parvathi), You are the most beautiful one in all the three worlds. You are Bhagawathi, Bharati and Narayani. O Goddess of the entire world, You enchant the whole world. O Mother Sathya Sai, You are the embodiment of compassion.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Devi Ma Jagadambe Ma
lyrics:
Devi Ma Jagadambe Ma
Chinmaya Roopini Sai Ma [ Devi Ma … ]
Gaana Manohari Sai Ma
Manjula Bhaashini Sai Ma
Bhakthoddharini Sai Ma
(Pra) Shanthi Dayini Sai Ma
meaning: Glory to the Mother of the world, Mother Sai, the embodiment of consciousness, the one who is pleased by music, whose words are nectarine and pleasing. Glory to the one who uplifts Her devotees and grants Supreme Peace.

title: Devi Sai Ma Devi Saraswathi
lyrics:
Devi Sai Ma Devi Saraswathi Ma
Durga Bhavani Ma Kaali Kapalini Ma
Jagadodharini Ma
Sai Daya Karo Ma (Sathya)
meaning: Worship Mother Sai, Mother Saraswathi (Goddess of knowledge and wisdom), Mother Durga Bhavani (Destroyer of the cycle of birth and death) and Mother Kaali (Destroyer of demonic qualities and the One holding a skull as a symbol). O Uplifter of the entire universe, please be compassionate towards us.

title: Dhanya Ho Eshwaramba
lyrics:
Dhanya Ho Eshwaramba
Jag Ko Deejo Lal Baba
Dhanya Ho Dhanya Ho
Kali Yug Mey Avatar Liye
Sakala Charachara Ke Bhagawan
Jagadodhara Sai Narayana
Dhanya Ho Dhanya Ho
Dhanya Ho Eshwaramba (2)
meaning: Glory to Thee, O auspicious Mother Eshwaramba, You have gifted Lord Sai to the world in the present Kali age. Lord Sai is verily Lord Narayana who is omnipresent and has come for the deliverance of mankind.

title: Dharani Nayaka Govinda
lyrics:
Dharani Nayaka Govinda
Dinakara Teja Govinda [ Dharani Nayaka ... ]
Venu Gaana Priya Govinda
Venkata Ramana Govinda
Geeta Dayaka Govinda
Shritha Paripalaka Govinda
meaning:
Glory to Lord Krishna (Govinda), the Lord of the Universe who has the effulgence of the Sun, who loves to play beautiful music on His flute, who gave us the Bhagawad Geeta and who protects and sustains His devotees.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Dhim Dhim Dhimi Dhimi Natana
lyrics:
Dhim Dhim Dhimi Dhimi Natana Shiva
Tandava Keli Vilasa Shiva
Leela Manusha Vesha Shiva
Lingodhbhavakara Sai Shiva (Atma)
Sai Shiva Hara Bala Shiva
meaning: Lord Shiva's rhythmical dance is referred to here as 'Dhim Dhim Dhimi'. He performs the cosmic dance, Tandava and has taken the human form, which is like a sport (leela) for Him. Glory to Sathya Sai, our young Shiva, who brings out the Lingam from within, by His Divine Will.

title: Dhimitha Dhimitha Dhim Dhimitha Dhimitha
lyrics:
Dhimitha Dhimitha Dhim Dhimitha Dhimitha Dhim Nachey Bhola Nath
Nachey Bhola Nath (4)
Mrudanga Boley Shiva Shiva Shiva Om
Damaru Boley Hara Hara Hara Om
Veena Boley Sai Ram Sai Ram
Nachey Bhola Nath (4)
meaning: Lord Shiva dances in ecstacy with the tune, "Dhimita Dhimita Dhim". The Mrudanga (musical instrumental) chants the auspicious name of, "Shiva Shiva Shiva". Along with it, the drum vibrates with the sound, "Hara Hara Hara Om" and the Veena (musical instrument) chants "Sai Ram".

title: Divine Mother Soham
lyrics:
Divine Mother Soham You And I Are One
Shirdi Baba Soham You And I Are One
Jesus Christ Soham You And I Are One
Divine Father Soham You And I Are One
Brahma Brahma Soham You And I Are One
Allah Allah Soham You And I Are One
Buddha Buddha Soham You And I Are One
Sathya Sai Soham You And I Are One

title: Door Of My Heart
lyrics:
Door Of My Heart Open Wide I Keep For Thee
Wilt Thou Come (2), Precious Baba, Come To Me [ Door Of ... ]
Will My Days Fly Away Without Seeing Thee My Lord
Night And Day, Night And Day, I Look For Thee Night And Day

title: Dum Dum Dum Dum Damaru
lyrics:
Dum Dum Dum Dum Damaru Bajey
Bhola Nath Shiva Shambho Bhajey
Hara Sai Nath Shiva Shambho Bhajey
Ghana Ghana Ghana Ghana Ghanta Bajey
Gowri Nath Shiva Shambho Bhajey [ Hara Sai Nath ... ]
meaning: In ecstacy, the drum (Damaru) beats "Dum Dum Dum". It plays in the worship of Lord Sai and Lord Shiva, the easy-to-be-pleased Lord and the destroyer of ignorance. The gong rings out the sounds "Ghan Ghan Ghan". Worship the Lord of Goddess Parvathi (the consort of Lord Shiva).

title: Durga Amba Bhavani Jai Jai
lyrics:
Durga Amba Bhavani Jai Jai Durga Amba Bhavani
Sankata Harini Mangala Karini
Pranava Swaroopini Mata Jai Jai
Durga Amba Bhavani
meaning: Victory to goddess Durga, glorified by the names Amba and Bhavani, the annihilator of miseries, bestower of auspiciousness and the embodiment of the primordial sound Om.

title: Durga Bhavani Ma Jaya Jaya
lyrics:
Durga Bhavani Ma Jaya Jaya Sai Ma
Kaali Kapalini Ma Jaya Jaya Sai Ma [ Durga Bhavani ... ]
Parama Shivani Ma Jaya Jaya Sai Ma
Jagadodharini Ma Jaya Jaya Sai Ma
meaning: Victory to Mother Sai who is verily Mother Durga (Parvathi). Victory to the Divine Mother hailed as Bhavani, Kaali. Victory to Mother Sai, who is the embodiment of Supreme Power and who has come to save and deliver mankind.

title: Durge Durge Devi Durgati Nashini
lyrics:
Durge Durge Devi Durgati Nashini
Kaali Kaali Maha Kaali Kapalini [ Durge Durge ... ]
Bhagawathi Bharati Devi Saraswathi
Ambe Bhavani Lakshmi Narayani
Parthi Nivasini Sai Janani
meaning: Chant the name of Durga, the goddess who removes poverty. Chant the name of Kaali, the goddess who adorns the garland of skulls (of evil doers). O Mother Sai, You are also adored as Bhagawathi, Bharati, Saraswathi, Bhavani and Lakshmi.

title: Durge Durge Durge Jai Jai
lyrics:
Durge Durge Durge Jai Jai Ma (2)
Karuna Sagari Ma
Kaali Kapalini Ma
Jagadodharini Ma
(Amba) Durge Jai Jai (Sai) Ma
meaning: Victory to Mother Durga, the ocean of compassion. Glory to Mother Kaali, who is adorned with a garland of human skulls (represents the destruction of our ego) and who uplifts the whole world. Victory to Mother Durga who is none other than our dear Mother Sai.

title: Ek Baar Kshama Karo Sai
lyrics:
Ek Baar Kshama Karo Sai Merey Baba Sri Sathya Sai
Kshama Murthy Sai Baba Prema Murthy Sathya Sai [ Ek Baar ... ]
Shirdi Ke Sai Teri Dwarakamayi
Parthi Ke Sai Teri Yaad Mujhey Aayi [ Kshama Murthy ... ]
meaning: O dear Lord Sathya Sai Baba, the Merciful One, please forgive me. You are full of forgiveness and love. O Shirdi Sai, residing in Dwarakamayi, You remind me that You are none other than Sathya Sai, the dweller of Parthi.

title: Eka Dantha Sri Gananatha
lyrics:
Eka Dantha Sri Gananatha
Eshwara Priya Sutha Vinayaka
Pranava Swaroopa Gananatha [ Eka Dantha Sri ... ]
Adi Poojya Sri Gananatha
Parvathi Tanaya Vinayaka
Paahi Paahi Hey Gananatha
Lambodhara Ganadhipa
Vighna Harana Sai Vinayaka
meaning: Pray to Lord Ganesha, Lord of the Ganaas (Shiva's hordes), the elephant-faced one with a single tusk. Pray to Him who removes obstacles, the beloved son of Shiva. Pray to Him who is the embodiment of the life-giving force, Pranava. Pray to Him, with whom all Holy rituals begin. Pray to the pot-bellied one, the son of Parvathi and the one who removes obstacles.

title: Eka Dantham Sai Gajananam
lyrics:
Eka Dantham Sai Gajananam
Ganapathim Vara Siddhi Vinayakam [ Eka Dantham ... ]
Gananatham Shiva Gowri Sutham
Gajamukham Sai Gajananam (2)

Gajamukham Sai Gajananam (3)
Gajananam Sai Gajananam (2)
meaning:
Glory to Lord Ganesha, the single tusked, elephant-faced lord, the leader of Ganaas (demigods), bestower of boons, the one who as none above, the beloved son of Mother Gowri (Parvathi) and Lord Shiva.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Eres mi Madre y Padre
lyrics:
Eres mi Madre y Padre, eres mi Dios Sai Baba
Eres mi Divina Madre, Cristo, Ala, Buda y Rama
Harey Krishna, Harey Krishna, Krishna Krishna Harey Harey
Harey Rama, Harey Rama, Rama Rama Harey Harey
meaning:
You are my Mother, Father and God, Sai Baba. You are my Divine Mother, Christ, Allah, Buddha, and Rama.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Eshwar Allah Ek Tum Hi
lyrics:
Eshwar Allah Ek Tum Hi Ho
Karuna Sindho Ram
Deena (Bhaktha) Janon Ke Jeevan Saharey
Daya (Mujhey Krupa) Karo Bhagawan
Karuna Sagara Dayabhi Rama
Jai Sai Ram Bolo Jai Sai Ram (2)
meaning: Eshwara (refers to God in Hinduism) and Allah (God in Islam) are both one and the same. The name refers to the same Almighty. O Lord Rama, You are the most compassionate one, You are the refuge to the destitute and the saviour of the devotees. Chant victory to Lord Sai who is verily Lord Rama and Allah.

title: Eshwar Allah Terey Naam Sai
lyrics:
Eshwar Allah Terey Naam Sai Terey Naam
Sarva Dharma Priya Sai Ram Sathya Sai Ram
Allah Sai Maulah Sai
Yesu Buddha Sai Hey Mahavir Sai
Govinda Sai Gopala Sai Nanak Sai [ Sarva Dharma ... ]
meaning: O Lord Sai, Eshwara is your name, so is the name Allah (the names Eshwar and Allah, both reach You, O Lord Sai). O Sathya Sai Rama, You are fond of all the faiths, You are Allah and You are Maulah. O Sai, You are Jesus Christ, Buddha, Mahavir. You are Govinda, Gopala, Guru Nanak. You are fond of all the faiths (all the Faiths lead to You).

title: Eshwaramba Nandana Jagat Vidhata
lyrics:
Eshwaramba Nandana Jagat Vidhata
Parthi Nivasa Sai Deva Daya Karo Guru Deva (Hey)
Kamala Nayana Hey Hrudaya Vihari
Ananda Dayaka Hey Giridhari
Charan Sharan Mey Lelo Hum Ko
Yuga Avatara Krishna (Sai) Murari [ Parthi Nivasa ... ]
meaning: O Lord Sai Baba, son of Eshwaramba, creator of the universe, dweller of Puttaparthi, noble Lord and Teacher, O lotus-eyed one, indweller of devotees' hearts, O Sai Krishna, incarnation of this age, bestow Thy Grace on us, make us merge in You.

title: Eshwaramba Priya Nandana
lyrics:
Eshwaramba Priya Nandana
Ratnakara Kula Bhooshana
Akhila Loka Nayaka
Parama Poojya Pavana
Apastamba Sutrana
Antaranga Rangana
Bharadwajasa Gotrana
Bhavya Naama Keerthana
meaning:
Glory to Lord Sathya Sai, the beloved son of Mother Eshwaramba. Glory to the crown jewel of the Ratnakara clan, the Master of the whole world, the supremely sacred Lord worthy of worship, the one born in the lineage of sages Bharadwaja and Apastamba. Glory to the omniscient one, the indweller of all beings. We offer our salutations and reverentially sing Your Holy Name.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Eshwaramba Priya Nandana
lyrics:
Eshwaramba Priya Nandana
Sai Jaya Jaga Vandana (2) [ Eshwaramba ... ]
Ratnakara Kula Bhooshana
Rajeeva Nayana Narayana
Narayana Hari Narayana
Narayana Sai Narayana
Narayana Hari Narayana (3) (Narayana Sai Narayana)
meaning: O Lord Sai, You are the beloved son of Mother Eshwaramba. You are worshipped by the whole world. You are the jewel of the Ratnakara clan. You have beautiful eyes. O Lord Sai, You are verily Lord Hari, Narayana.

title: Eshwaramba Priya Nandana Hey Sai
lyrics:
Eshwaramba Priya Nandana Hey Sai Rama
Ikshvaku Vamsha Deepa Hey Sai Rama
Devagiri Sutha Sai Shirdi Sai Rama
Godavari Thata Vasi Hey Sai Rama
Prema Sai Natha Avatara Sai Rama
Sarvatma Swaroopa Sathya Sai Rama
meaning: Glory to Lord Sai, the darling son of Mother Eshwaramba who incarnated as Lord Rama, the radiant lamp of the Ishvaku lineage, who is verily Lord Sai of Shirdi, the son of Devagiri amma. Glory to the one who resides on the banks of river Godavari, who is the very incarnation of Love, who is the embodiment of every soul, Lord Sathya Sai Rama.

title: Eshwaramba Priya Tanaya
lyrics:
Eshwaramba Priya Tanaya
Esha Mahesha Sri Sayeesha
Yuga Avatara Sayeesha
Poornavatara (Premavatara) Sayeesha
meaning: Glory to the loving son of Mother Eshwaramba, Lord Sai, the embodiment of Lord Shiva. Sai is the incarnation of the Kali Age in His complete glory. He is the very incarnation of Love.

title: Eshwaramba Priya Tanaya Sai Narayana
lyrics:
Eshwaramba Priya Tanaya Sai Narayana
Sai Narayana Sathya Narayana [ Eshwaramba ... ]
Kali Yug Mey Avatar Liye
Kan Kan Mey Tera Naam (O Sai) (2)
meaning: O Lord Narayana, You are the beloved son of Mother Eshwaramba, to whom You are Sai Narayana. You have incarnated in this present Kali Age as our Lord Sathya Narayana. You are all pervading and Your name is present in every atom.

title: Eshwari Nandana Parthi Gajanana
lyrics:
Eshwari Nandana Parthi Gajanana
Pranava Swaroopa Paahi Prabho
Omkareshwara Uma Maheshwara
Parthi Pureeshwara Palaya Maam
meaning:
O Lord Sai, son of Mother Eshwaramba, You are verily Lord Ganesha, the elephant-faced one, the son of Mother Eshwari (Parvathi). O Lord, the embodiment of primordial sound 'Om', please protect us. You are adored as Lord Maheshwara (Shiva), the consort of Mother Uma. O Lord of Parthi, please protect and sustain us.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Eshwari Nandana Sai Gopala
lyrics:
Eshwari Nandana Sai Gopala
Sri (Sai) Madhusudhana Krishna Krishna [ Eshwari Nandana ... ]
Jagadodhara Parthi Vihara
Prema Swaroopa Premavatara
Dwarakamayi Sri Sathya Sai
Hey (Sai) Jaganmohana Krishna Krishna
meaning: Glory to the son of Eshwaramba, Lord Sathya Sai, who is verily Lord Krishna, the destroyer of the demon Madhu. O Lord who resides in Parthi, You have come to uplift the whole world. You are the very embodiment of Love and the incarnation of Love. You are none other than Lord Sai of Shirdi whose abode was the Dwarakamayi. O Lord Sai, You enchant the entire world.

title: Every Moment Of My Life
lyrics:
Every Moment Of My Life Please Be With Me
In Every Single Act Of Mine Be Thou My Guide
Baba Sai Baba
When I Slip When I Fall Lend Me A Hand
When I Stray Far Away Lead Me Back Again
Baba Sai Baba
From The Darkness Into Light Lead Me, Father
From The Unreal To The Real
Baba Sai Baba (2)

title: Everyone Is My Brother
lyrics:
Everyone Is My Brother When I Say Sai Ram, Sai Ram Sai Ram
No More Difference Between Us When I Say Sai Ram, Sai Ram Sai Ram
Sai Ram, Sai Ram, Baba Help Me Always Say Sai Ram
Sai Ram, Sai Ram, Everyday Please Help Me Say Sai Ram
Only Light Is Around Me When I Say Sai Ram, Sai Ram Sai Ram
No More Darkness Around Me When I Say Sai Ram, Sai Ram Sai Ram
Sai Ram, Sai Ram, Baba Help Me Always Say Sai Ram
Sai Ram, Sai Ram, Everyday Please Help Me Say Sai Ram

title: Gaana Lola Gopala
lyrics:
Gaana Lola Gopala
Sai Manohara Gopala [ Gaana Lola ... ]
Jagadoddhara Parthi Vihara
Meera Ke Prabhu Giridhara Bala

Gopala Sai Gopala (5)
meaning: Glory to Lord Gopala (Krishna), the beautiful one who enjoys music, the liberator of the universe, the child who lifted the Govardhana hill and the Lord of Meera. Glory to Lord Sai residing at Parthi who is verily Lord Gopala.

title: Gaana Priyey Sai Karunamayi
lyrics:
Gaana Priyey Sai Karunamayi
Kadambari Amba Katyayani [ Gaana Priyey ... ]
Hari Vallabhey Sukha Dayini
Omkara Roopini Narayani
Bhuvaneshwari (Amba) Jaganmohini
Sri Chakra Vasini Sayeeshwari
meaning: The Merciful Mother Sai is delighted by Music. Chant the names of the Deities Kadambari, Amba and Katyayani (different names of Goddess Parvathi). O Goddess Lakshmi, the beloved of Lord Hari (Vishnu), You are the bestower of happiness and all comforts. O Goddess Narayani, You are the embodiment of the Primodial Sound Om. You are the Goddess of the entire world and the one who beautifies the world. O Sayeeshwari, You reside in the Sri Chakra.

title: Gajamukha Gajamukha Gananatha
lyrics:
Gajamukha Gajamukha Gananatha
Suramuni Vanditha Guna Sheela [ Gajamukha ... ]
Suramuni Vanditha Guna Sheela
Gajamukha Gajamukha Gananatha [ Suramuni ... ]
meaning: We chant the glory of Gajamukha, the elephant faced Lord Ganesha, who is the leader of Ganaas (demigods), who is worshipped by the sages and noble people and who is the embodiment of virtues.

title: Gajamukha Hey Gajamukha Hey
lyrics:
Gajamukha Hey Gajamukha Hey Gajamukha Natha Vinayaka
Gowri Putra Modaka Hasta Gajamukha Natha Vinayaka
Shanthakara Vighna Vinasha Gajamukha Natha Vinayaka
Parthi Pureesha Sai Ganesha Gajamukha Natha Vinayaka

Gajamukha Natha Vinayaka (4)
meaning:
Glory to the elephant-faced Lord Vinayaka (Ganesha) who is the master, the son of Mother Gowri and the one who has Modaka (a ball shaped sweet produced out of coconut, jaggery and rice) in His hand, the one who has a serene appearance and who destroys hurdles. He is verily Sai, the Supreme Lord residing at Puttaparthi.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Gajanana Gajanana
lyrics:
Gajanana Gajanana
Prathama Poojana Ganaraya [ Gajanana ... ]
Prathama Prarthana Sri Ganaraya
Lambodhara Ganaraya
meaning: O Lord Ganesha, the elephant-faced one, You are the one whom all worship and pray. You are the one to whom the first prostrations should be offered. O Ganaraya, the controller of all the Ganaas (the Demigods), we offer You our first obeisance. O mighty one, You are the King of the Divine Forces.

title: Gajanana Hey Gajanana
lyrics:
Gajanana Hey Gajanana
Gowri Tanaya Gajanana [ Gajanana Hey ... ]
Hey Shiva Nandana Jaya Jaga Vandana
Vidya Buddhi Pradayaka
Parama Niranjana Mooshika Vahana
Parthi Pureeshwara Gajanana
meaning: Glory to Lord Gajanana (Ganesha), beloved son of Mother Gowri (Parvathi). O Son of Shiva, You are revered by the whole world, You are the one who bestows knowledge and intelligence, You are the supreme one who has the mouse as Your vehicle. You are Lord Sai, Lord of Puttaparthi.

title: Gajanana Hey Shubhanana
lyrics:
Gajanana Hey Shubhanana
Parama Niranjana Gajavadana
Vakratunda Dhara Vighna Vinasha
Pranava Swaroopa Parthi Pureesha
Siddhi Vinayaka Paahi Gajanana [ Parama Niranjana ... ]
meaning: Oh elephant-faced Lord Gajanana, You confer auspiciousness, You are supremely pure, Oh the one with a curved trunk, the destroyer of all the obstacles, grant us victory. Oh Lord, Your form is that of the primordial Om (Pranava) and You are none other than the Lord of Parthi. Oh the all powerful one, protect us Your devotees.

title: Gajanana Hey Shubhanana
lyrics:
Gajanana Hey Shubhanana
Gowri Manohara Priya Nandana
Pashupathi Tanaya Gajanana
Parama Niranjana Shubhanana (Hey)
meaning: O elephant-faced Lord Ganesha, You are the loving son of Mother Gowri and the beloved son of Lord Shiva, who is the Lord of all creatures. You are the Supreme Lord, pure and free of all blemishes and the bestower of auspiciousness.

title: Gajavadana Gajanana
lyrics:
Gajavadana Gajanana
Gowri Tanaya Gajanana [ Gajavadana ... ]
Jai Jai Jai Jai Gajanana (3)
Devadi Deva Gajanana [ Gowri Tanaya ... ]
meaning: Victory to the Lords of Lords, Lord Gajanana, the elephant-faced Lord, the beloved son of Mother Gowri. Chant the different names of Lord Ganesha.

title: Gajavadana Gananatha
lyrics:
Gajavadana Gananatha
Gowri Tanaya Dayamaya [ Gajavadana ... ]
Bhuvanaadhara Pranava Swaroopa
Palaya Palaya Parthi Pureesha
meaning: O Lord Ganesha, the elephant-faced Lord, the son of Mother Parvathi, You are extremely compassionate. You are the one whose is the very form of the Pranava (Om) and who is the basis of the entire creation. Protect us, O Sai, the Lord of Parthi, You are verily Lord Ganesha.

title: Gajavadana Gananatha Gajavadana Vinayaka
lyrics:
Gajavadana Gananatha Gajavadana Vinayaka
Siddhi Vidhata Shiva Tanaya
Buddhi Pradayaka Gajanana
Parvathi Nandana Bhava Bhaya Bhanjana
Yuga Yuga Vanditha Jaya Sri Ganesha
meaning: Worship the elephant-faced Ganesha, the Lord of the demigods, the son of Lord Shiva who can bestow powers and intellectual prowess. O Son of Mother Parvathi, You remove the fear of the cycle of birth and death and help cross it. Victory to Lord Ganesha, who is worshipped in all ages (yugas).

title: Gajavadana Gananatha Natha
lyrics:
Gajavadana Gananatha Natha
Gowri Vara Tanaya Gunaalaya [ Gajavadana ... ]
Vidya Dayaka Buddhi Pradayaka
Siddhi Vinayaka Hey Shubha Dayaka
meaning: Glory to the elephant-faced Lord Ganesha, the Lord of the demigods and the beloved son of Mother Gowri. O Lord, Thou art extremely merciful. You bestow Knowledge and Wisdom. You grant auspiciousness and gifts.

title: Gajavadana Gananatha Natha
lyrics:
Gajavadana Gananatha Natha
Gowri Vara Tanaya Gunaalaya [ Gajavadana ... ]
Vidya Dayaka Buddhi Pradayaka
Siddhi Vinayaka Hey Shubha Dayaka
meaning: O Ganesha, the elephant-faced Lord, You are the Lord of the Divine Forces. O beloved son of Mother Gowri (Parvathi), You are full of virtues. O bestower of knowledge, intelligence, wisdom and power, You are the conferrer of all auspiciousness.

title: Gajavadana Ganeshwara
lyrics:
Gajavadana Ganeshwara
Suramuni Sevitha Vighna Vinasha [ Gajavadana … ]
Shwethambhara Dhara Pranava Swaroopa
Mangala Dayaka Paapa Vinashaka
Partheeshwaraya Sai Ganesha
meaning: Glory to the Lord of the Ganas, Lord Ganesha, the elephant-faced one, the destroyer of obstacles and who is worshipped by the sages and noble people. Glory to one clad in white, the very embodiment of Om, who bestows auspiciousness and destroys our sins. Salutations to the Lord of Parthi who is verily Lord Ganesha.

title: Gajavadana Jaya Namosthuthey
lyrics:
Gajavadana Jaya Namosthuthey
Nagaja Nandana Namosthuthey
Vijaya Pradayaka Vighna Nasha
Gajavadana Jaya Namosthuthey
(Shubha) Mangala Dayaka Namosthuthey
meaning:
Salutations to Lord Ganesha, the elephant-faced one, the son of Mother Parvathi. Victory to Thee, O Lord, You are the one who bestows victory, destroys obstacles and blesses all with auspiciousness.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Gajavadana Sai Gajanana
lyrics:
Gajavadana Sai Gajanana
Gajanana Hey Shubhanana [ Gajavadana ... ]
Buddhi Pradayaka Gajanana
Siddhi Vinayaka Gajanana
Moksha Pradayaka Gajanana
Mangala Dayaka Shubhanana
Gajanana Shubhanana [ Gajanana Hey ... ]
meaning:
Oh Lord Ganesha, You bestow auspiciousness, intellect and liberation. Please fulfill our wishes.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Gana Natha Omkara Roopa
lyrics:
Gana Natha Omkara Roopa
Sri Gananatha Gnana Roopa [ Gana Natha ... ]
Siddhi Vinayaka Heramba
Sri Gananatha Gnana Roopa
meaning:
Glory to Lord Ganesha, the lord of the Ganaas, the one who has the form of Om. He is the bestower of accomplishments. He is the five-headed form of Ganesha and the embodiment of wisdom.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Ganadhi Pathayey Paahi Maam
lyrics:
Ganadhi Pathayey Paahi Maam
Girija Tava Sutha Raksha Maam (2)
(Shubha) Mangala Moorata Palaya Maam
meaning: O Lord Ganesha, the Leader of Ganas, son of Mother Girija (Parvathi), You are the very embodiment of auspiciousness. Please protect us, O Lord.

title: Gananatha Gananatha
lyrics:
Gananatha Gananatha
Mooshika Vahana Jaya Gananatha
Sharanam Sharanam Gananatha [ Gananatha ... ]
Siddhi Vinayaka Gananatha
Buddhi Pradayaka Gananatha
Jagadodhara Jaya Gananatha [ Sharanam ... ]
meaning: Oh Lord of the Lords, Ganesha, victory to Thee whose vehicle is a mouse. You are the bestower of all powers, success and intellectual prowess. Oh Lord, the sustainer of the entire creation, we surrender at Your Lotus Feet.

title: Gananatha Sai Gajanana
lyrics:
Gananatha Sai Gajanana
Partheeshwara Dukha Bhanjana [ Gananatha ... ]
Kailasa Pathey Shiva Nandana Deena Natha Harey Hey Niranjana
Siddhi Pradatha Shubhanana Jagadeeshwara Shanthi Niketana
Jagadeeshwara Shanthi Niketana
meaning: O Lord Ganesha, the Lord of all Ganaas (Demigods), O Lord of Parthi, You relieve us of all anxieties and sadness. O the Son of Shiva (the Lord of Kailasa), who is the embodiment of purity and the Lord of the destitute, O bestower of all the siddhis and prowess, the one whose face radiates goodness, O sustainer of the whole world and the abode of all peace, glory be to Thee.

title: Gananayakam Ganeshwaram (Sai)
lyrics:
Gananayakam Ganeshwaram (Sai)
Gowri Tanayam Gajananam [ Gananayakam ... ]
Mooshika Vahana Sri Gananatham
Paashankusha Dhara Bala Gajananam
Ananda Tandava Narthana Ganapathim
Vinayakam Vimalacharam Vighneshwaram
meaning:
O Lord Ganesh, You are the leader of the demigods, beloved son of Gowri (Mother Parvathi) and the one who rides the mouse. You hold the noose and hook in Your hands and is the delightful cosmic dancer having a spotless form. You are the Supreme Lord who removes all our obstacles.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Gananayakam Sai Gananayakam
lyrics:
Gananayakam Sai Gananayakam
Sadananda Sundara Gananayakam
Vara Dayakam Sai Shubha Dayakam
Parthi Pureeshwara Gananayakam
meaning:
Salutations to You, O Lord Ganesha, the Lord of the Ganaas (Demigods), You are eternally blissful and most beautiful. You bestow various boons and confer all auspiciousness. O Lord of Lords, You reside at Parthi as Lord Sai.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Ganapathi Deva Hey Gananayaka
lyrics:
Ganapathi Deva Hey Gananayaka
Pranava Swaroopa Hey Shubha Dayaka
Parvathi Nandana Hey Dukha Bhanjana
Lambodhara Hey Mooshika Vahana (2)
Prathama Poojana Hey Sai Gajanana
meaning: O Lord Ganesha, the Lord of the Ganas, You are the embodiment of the Primodial Sound Om. O son of Goddess Parvathi and the one who rides on Mooshika, You bestow auspiciousness and destroy wordly afflications. Our foremost obeisance to You who is none other than Sai.

title: Ganapathi Om Jaya Ganapathi Om
lyrics:
Ganapathi Om Jaya Ganapathi Om
Gajamukha Varada Ganapathi Om [ Ganapathi Om ... ]
Mooshika Vahana Gajanana
Modaka Hasta Gajanana
Parama Niranjana Gajanana
Paada Namasthey Gajanana
meaning: Glory to Thee, O Ganesha, the elephant faced one, the bestower of boons, the one who has the mouse as His vehicle, the one who has Modaka (a sweet preparation) in His hand, the one who is supremely pure. O Lord, I offer obeisance at Your Lotus feet.

title: Ganesha Charanam Parama Pavanam
lyrics:
Ganesha Charanam Parama Pavanam Sathya Sainam Gajananam
Nithya Smaranam Parama Pavanam Sathya Sainam Gajananam
Sadguru Charanam Parama Pavanam Sathya Sainam Gajananam
Bhava Bhaya Haranam Parama Pavanam Sathya Sainam Gajananam
meaning: Let us bow in reverence to Lord Ganesha, let us bow in absolute purity to the name of Sai, to the elephant-faced Lord Ganesha. Constantly remember the purifying name of Sai and Lord Ganesha. The sacred feet of Sadguru are purifying, so is the name of Sai and Ganesha which removes the fear of the cycle of birth and death.

title: Ganesha Charanam Sharanam Ganesha
lyrics:
Ganesha Charanam Sharanam Ganesha (4)
Sayeesha Charanam Sharanam Sayeesha (4)
meaning: Surrender to the Lotus Feet of Lord Ganesh. Surrender to the Lotus Feet of Lord Sai.

title: Ganesha Sharanam Ganesha Sharanam
lyrics:
Ganesha Sharanam, Ganesha Sharanam (2)
You Are Always Protecting Me
You Are Always Guiding Me ... Om

Saiesha Sharanam, Saiesha Sharanam (2)
You Are Always Protecting Me
You Are Always Guiding Me ... Om

title: Ganesha Shiva’s Son
lyrics:
Ganesha Shiva's Son Humbly I Implore Thee
Ganesha You're The One To Clear The Path Before Me
Ganesha Shiva's Son Humbly I Implore Thee
Ganesha You're The One To Clear The Path Before Me
Lord Sai Within My Heart Humbly I Adore Thee
Lord Sai I Pray Thou Art Kept In Mind Before Me
Lord Sai Within My Heart Humbly I Adore Thee
Lord Sai I Pray Thou Art Kept In Mind Before Me

title: Ganesha Son Of Shiva
lyrics:
Ganesha Son Of Shiva
Ganesha Charanam Sharanam
Warrior Of Our Hearts
Ganesha Son Of Shiva
Remove All Fear And Trepidation
Warrior Of Our Hearts
Remove All Fear And Trepidation
Lead Us Out Of The Darkness

title: Ganesha tú eres la fuerza del universo
lyrics:
Ganesha tú eres la fuerza del universo, 
Eres ternura, eres amor, 
Siempre te llevo en el corazón 
Y te rogamos que nos conduzcas por el sendero, 
con paso firme en la devoción 
hasta llegar a la salvación
meaning:
Ganesha, You are the strength of the universe; You are tenderness, You are love. I always carry You in my heart. We beg you to lead us on the path with a firm step in devotion until we arrive at salvation.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Ganeshwara Ganadhipa
lyrics:
Ganeshwara Ganadhipa
Vighneshwara Vinayaka [ Ganeshwara ... ]
Nirvikalpa Niramaya
Gunaatheetha Niranjana
Bhava Bhanjana Manoranjana
meaning:
O Lord Ganesha (elephant-headed God), You are the Supreme Lord and the chief of the Ganaas (demigods), You are the remover of obstacles. You exist in the thoughtless and pure mind. You are attributeless and spotless who delights the mind and destroys the worldly miseries.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Ganga Jatadhara Gowri Shankara Girija
lyrics:
Ganga Jatadhara Gowri Shankara Girija Mano Ramana
Jaya Mruthyunjaya Mahadeva Maheshwara Mangala Shubha Charana
Nandi Vahana Naga Bhooshana
Nirupama Guna Sadana
Natana Manohara Neelakanta Sai
Neeraja Dala Nayana
meaning: Glory to Lord Shankara, who bears the Holy Ganges in His hair and whose consort is Goddess Girija, born of the mountains. Glory to the One, who is the Lord of Lords and who has conquered death and whose Feet confer auspiciousness. Glory to the One who rides the bull, Nandi. Glory to the One who has a cobra around His neck. Glory to the One who is the embodiment of unparalleled virtues. Hail the enchanting dancer, the blue-throated Shiva who is none other than Sai and whose eyes are like the petals of the lotus.

title: Gangadhara Gowri Mahesha
lyrics:
Gangadhara Gowri Mahesha
Tripurantaka Jyothi Prakasha
Haalaahala Dhara Paramesha
Chandrashekara Sai Mahesha
meaning: Sing the glory of Lord Shiva, the consort of Gowri and the one who bears the Ganges and the moon on His head. He illuminates us by destroying the demon "Tripura" who symbolizes the darkness within us. He is the ultimate Lord who drank the deadly poison of "Haalaa-hala" for the welfare of the world during the churning of the ocean. He is verily our Lord Sai Mahesha.

title: Gangadhara Hara Gangadhara Hara Kailasa
lyrics:
Gangadhara Hara Gangadhara Hara Kailasa Natha Prabhu Shankara
Bhava Nasha Bhava Bandha Vimochana
Sathya Sai Shiva Shankara
meaning: We praise the Lord Sathya Sai Shiva Shankara-The One who is Auspicious, Captivating - The One who bears the Ganges on his head, One who is the Lord of the mountain 'Kailasa' and the One who liberates us from the bondage of the world and prevents us from taking birth again and again.

title: Gangadhara Hara Gowri Shiva
lyrics:
Gangadhara Hara Gowri Shiva
Shambho Shankara Samba Shiva
Jaya Jagadeeshwara Jaya Parameshwara [ Gangadhara Hara ... ]
Shirdi Nivasa Sayeeshwara
Parthi Pureesha Sayeeshwara
Jagadodhara Sayeeshwara [ Shambho Shankara ... ]
meaning: Glory to Lord Shiva, the one who has the river Ganges on His head and the consort of Gowri. Glory to Lord Sai Shiva, the auspicious one who confers happiness and prosperity. Glory to Thee, the Lord of the world, the greatest Lord who resided as Sai in Shirdi and is now residing in Parthi. Glory to Lord Sai who liberates the world.

title: Gangotri Natha Ganga Shiva
lyrics:
Gangotri Natha Ganga Shiva
Shambho Mahadeva Samba Shiva
Ganga Jatadhara Gowri Shiva
Sugandha Kuntalamba Sametha Shiva
Matrubhuteshwara Mahadeva
Bhaktha Jana Priya Lingeshwara
Shiva Shakthi Roopa Sarveshwara
Om Namah Shivaya Shivaya Namah Om (7)
meaning:
Chant the name of Shiva who adorns the Ganges, who is also the Lord of Gangotri and whose other names are Shambho, Mahadeva and Samba Shiva. O Lord, You are the consort of Gowri or Kuntalamba (one who has naturally fragrant hair). You are the Lord of mighty earth, protecting the devotees. You are Sayeeshwara who is the embodiment of Shiva and Parvathi.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Garuda Gamana Panduranga
lyrics:
Garuda Gamana Panduranga
Kamala Vadana Panduranga
Vittala Ranga Panduranga 
Vittala Ranga Jaya Sai Ranga [ Garuda Gamana ... ]
Maya Lola Panduranga (3) [ Vittala Ranga ... ]
Vittala Ranga Jaya Sai Ranga
meaning:
Victory to the lotus-faced Lord Panduranga (Vittala), who rides on the Garuda, who likes to play illusive tricks. He is none other than Lord Sai.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Garuda Vahana Narayana
lyrics:
Garuda Vahana Narayana
Hey Shesha Shayana Narayana [ Garuda Vahana ... ]
Sri Lakshmi Ramana Narayana
Hari Om Hari Om Narayana
meaning: Glory to Lord Narayana, who is the beloved of His consort, Goddess Lakshmi, whose vehicle is Garuda, who sleeps on the serpent (also known as "Adi Sesha"- who incarnated as Lakshmana - Lord Rama's brother) and who is also known as Hari.

title: Ghana Ghana Neela Bansi Adhariya
lyrics:
Ghana Ghana Neela Bansi Adhariya
Madhura Madhura Smitha Vadana Savariya [ Ghana Ghana Neela ... ]
Mora Mukuta Peetambara Gatiya
Jhumaka Jhumaka Jhuma Baja Ghungharia
meaning:
Glory to Lord Krishna who has a beautiful form with a body of thick blue color, with the flute on His lips, gentle smile on His bluish face, adorning the peacock feather on His crown, wearing yellow silk and His anklets making pleasant sound.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Ghana Ghana Neela Om Shivaya
lyrics:
Ghana Ghana Neela Om Shivaya
Om Shivaya Om Shivaya [ Ghana Ghana ... ]
Shivaya Namah Om Sai Shiva
Sai Shiva Sai Shiva [ Shivaya Namah ... ]
Sai Shiva Hara Sai Shiva

Shankaraya Shiva Shankaraya Shiva Shankaraya Shiva Namostuthey (3)
meaning: Chant the divine name of Lord Shiva, whose throat is dark blue in color (due to consumption of deadly poison). Salutations to Lord Shankara who is none other than our Sai.

title: Ghana Ghana Neela Vadana Ati
lyrics:
Ghana Ghana Neela Vadana Ati Sundara
Megha Shyamala Madhava Murahara [ Ghana Ghana ... ]
Mandasmitha Mukha Radha Manohara
Govinda Gopala Natavara Giridhara [ Megha Shyamala ... ]
meaning: Lord Krishna is described as the one having a dark blue complexion like that of a rain cloud, one who is very sweet in nature and one who killed the demon Mura. He has a gentle smile on His face and is adored by Radha. He is the Supreme Cowherd looking after His cows (mankind), He is the Supreme Dancer and Actor, the one who lifted the mountain Govardhana for protecting the people of Gokula from the wrath of Indra.

title: Ghana Shyama Bhajo Giridhari
lyrics:
Ghana Shyama Bhajo Giridhari Bhajo
Mana Mohana Muralidhari Bhajo [ Ghana Shyama ... ]
Brinda Vihari Shyama Bhajo
Madhuvana Sanchari Shyama Bhajo
Hrudaya Nivasi Shyama Bhajo
(Sarva) Antaryami Sai Bhajo
meaning:
Chant the name and sing the glory of Lord Krishna, the dark-complexioned one who lifted the Govardhana mountain to protect His devotees. Chant the name of the Divine Flutist who enchants our mind, who resides in Brindavana and who moves about the forest inhabited by the demon Madhu. Chant the name of Lord Shyama (Krishna), the indweller of the heart who is verily the omniscient Lord Sai of Parthi.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Ghana Shyama Gopala Ghana Shyama
lyrics:
Ghana Shyama Gopala Ghana Shyama Gopala
Mana Mohana Jaganmohana
Yadu Nandana Gopal
Gopala Gopala Shyama Gopala
Gopala Gopala Sai Gopala
meaning: Glory to Lord Gopala, the dark complexioned one who captivates the mind and the whole Universe. He is the little child of the Yadava clan and is verily Lord Sai of Parthi.

title: Ghana Shyama Sundara
lyrics:
Ghana Shyama Sundara
Bansidhara Prabhu Krishna Kanhaiya
Tum Hi Merey Ma Baap Bhaiyya [ Ghana Shyama ... ]
Devaki Tanaya Hey Nandalala
Deena Bandhava Dwaraka Natha
Radha Hrudaya Nivasa Harey Krishna
Madhusudhana Muralidhara
Partheeshwara Sathya Sayeeshwara
meaning: O beautiful Lord Krishna holding the flute and of blue color, You only are my mother, father and brother. O son of Devaki and the foster son of Nanda, O relative of the downtrodden and orphans and the Lord of Dwaraka, O Lord Krishna who dwells in the heart of Radha, O slayer of the demon Madhu, You are none other than Sathya Sayeeshwara, the Lord of Parthi.

title: Giridhara Bala Gopala (Harey)
lyrics:
Giridhara Bala Gopala (Harey)
Govinda Govinda Gopala [ Giridhara Bala ... ]
Gopi Lola Gopala
Govardhanodhari Gopala
meaning: Glory to Lord Krishna, the cowherd boy who danced with the Gopis and the one who lifted the Govardhana mountain.

title: Giridhara Bala Hey Nandalala
lyrics:
Giridhara Bala Hey Nandalala
Devaki Nandana Shyama Gopala [ Giridhara ... ]
Keshava Madhava Shyama Gopala
Shyama Gopala Shyama Gopala
Bansidhara Hey Sai Gopala
meaning: Lord Krishna is extolled with different names as the one who lifted the Govardhana mountain, the son of Devaki, the Lord of Radha, the one who danced with the Gopikas, the one with the flute and He is none other than our Lord Sai.

title: Giridhara Gopala Gopala
lyrics:
Giridhara Gopala Gopala
Sai Gopala Sai Gopala [ Giridhara ... ]
Shirdi Pureeshwara (Parthi Pureeshwara) Sai Shankara
Sai Shankara Sai Shankara
meaning: Chant the divine name of Lord Krishna, Giridhara Gopala and of Lord Sai, the resident of Shirdi and Parthi, who is verily Lord Krishna. He is also Lord Shankara (Shiva) who bestows auspiciousness.

title: Giridhara Gopala Hey Giridhara Gopala
lyrics:
Giridhara Gopala Hey Giridhara Gopala Hey Giridhara Gopala
Meera Ke Prabhu Giridhara Naagara
Surdas Ke Shyama Manohara
Bhakthon Ke Sathya Sai Manohara
meaning: Chant the name of Lord Gopala, One who lifted the mountain The Lord of Meera and Surdas and the beautiful Lord Sathya Sai the beloved of his devotees.

title: Giridhara Gopala Muralidhara Harey
lyrics:
Giridhara Gopala Muralidhara Harey
Govinda Gopala Damodara
Giridhara Gopala Muralidhara Harey [ Govinda Gopala ... ]
meaning: Chant the names of the Lord Krishna - Gopala, Giridhara. Glory to the One with the flute who is also called Damodara.

title: Giridhara Gopala Sai Giridhara Gopala
lyrics:
Giridhara Gopala Sai Giridhara Gopala
Parthi Pureeshwara Sai Gopala [ Giridhara Gopala ... ]
Meera Ke Prabhu Giridhara Naagara
Paahi Maam Ghana Shyam O Shyama (2)
meaning: O Lord Sai Gopala, the lifter of the Govardhana mountain, the Lord of Meera, You are verily Lord Sai, the Lord of Parthi. O Lord, kindly protect me.

title: Giridhara Govinda Gopala Ghana Shyama
lyrics:
Giridhara Govinda Gopala Ghana Shyama Nandalala
Mana Mohana Madhusudhana Hey Madhava [ Giridhara Govinda ... ]
Damodara Janardhana Muralidhara Mana Mohana
Namo Sai Narayanaya Namo Sathya Narayanaya
Namo Sai Narayanaya
meaning: Chant the various names of Lord Krishna, the divine flutist and the beautiful son of Nanda. Lord Krishna with a dark complexion is the slayer of the demon Madhu. Salutations to the Lord Sai who is verily Narayana.

title: Giridhara Madhava Murahara
lyrics:
Giridhara Madhava Murahara Natavara, Jaya Jaya Jaya Hey Madhusudhana 
Jaya Jaya Jaya Hey Madhusudhana
Jaya Jaya Jaya Hey Janardhana
Venu Vilolana Vedoddharana
Yashoda Nandana Bhaktha Samrakshana
Ratnakara Bhooshana Hrudaya (Parthi) Viharana  [ Jaya Jaya ... ]
meaning: Victory to Lord Krishna, the one who lifted the Govardhana hill, the one who vanquished the demons Mura and Madhu. Victory to the protector of mankind, the one who plays blissful music from the flute, the one who fosters the Vedas. Victory to the son of Yashoda and the one who protects His devotees. Victory to Lord Sai, the crown jewel of the Ratnakara dynasty who resides at Parthi and in the hearts of devotees and who is verily Lord Krishna.

title: Giridhara Merey Gopala
lyrics:
Giridhara Merey Gopala
Radhey Gopala Radhey (Sai) Gopala [ Giridhara Merey ... ]
Nanda Kishora Maakhan Chora
Yashoda Bala Gopala [ Radhey Gopala ... ]
meaning: Chant the name my Lord Gopala, the one who lifted the hill, the Lord of Radha, the beloved son of Nanda and Yashoda, and the one who steals butter.

title: Giridhara Naagara Kunja Vihari
lyrics:
Giridhara Naagara Kunja Vihari
Madhuvana Sanchari Parthi Vihari [ Giridhara Naagara ... ]
Shyamala Sundara Mayura Mukutadhara
Pankaja Lochana Madhava Mohana
Madhuvana Sanchari Parthi Vihari (2)
meaning: Chant the name of the Lord Giridhara who roams in the garden and in the forest of Madhu. He is very beautiful with the peacock feather as His crown and lotus eyes. He is none other than our Sai who resides in Parthi.

title: Giridhari Hey Nandalala
lyrics:
Giridhari Hey Nandalala
Yashoda Ke Bala Tribhuvana Pala
Jagata Uddhara Gokula Bala
Murali Lola Munijana Pala
Parthi Vihara Sai Gopala
meaning: Oh Giridhari, the son of Nanda and Yashoda The protector and sustainer of all the three worlds The liberator of the world and the boy of Gokula The player of flute and the protector of the Saints and Rishis Oh Lord Sai Gopala who wanders in Parthi.

title: Giridhari Jaya Giridhari
lyrics:
Giridhari Jaya Giridhari
Sugandha Tulasi Dala Vanamali [ Giridhari ... ]
Munijana Sevitha Madhava Murahara
Murali (Gopa Gopi) Manohara Giridhari
meaning: Victory to Lord Giridhari (Krishna, who lifted the Govardhana mountain), the one who wears the garland of fragrant basil leaves and the garland made of jungle flowers. Chant the name of Lord Madhava who is worshipped by the sages and saints and the one who destroyed the demon 'Mura'. Glory to the the beautiful flute player and the beloved of the Gopas and Gopikas.

title: Giridhari Lal Shyama Gopal
lyrics:
Giridhari Lal Shyama Gopal
Natavara Lal Madana Gopal
Mathura Natha Krishna Gopal
Sri Madhusudhana Murali Gopal
Yashoda Ke Bal Nanda Gopal
Eshwaramba Priya Sai Gopal
meaning: Chant the name of the handsome boy Gopala (Krishna) who is the supreme dancer and actor, who is the Lord of Mathura and the slayer of demon Madhu. He is the player of flute, the beloved son of Yashoda and Nanda. He is verily Lord Sai whom Mother Eshwaramba is very fond of.

title: Giridhari Murari Govinda
lyrics:
Giridhari Murari Govinda
Ghana Shyama Murari Gopala [ Giridhari ... ]
Radhey Krishna Murari Govinda
Sathya Sai Murari Gopala
meaning: Chant the name of Giridhari Govinda who is the destroyer of the demon 'Mura' chant the name of Radha Krishna and Sathya Sai Gopala.

title: Gloria a Ti, mi Señor
lyrics:
Gloria a Ti, mi Señor,
hacedor de toda la vida.
Como la luna tranquila, con Tu dulzura iluminas,
la luz de nuestro corazón. Gloria a Ti mi Señor.
Eres Padre y Madre de la alegría,
el Señor de toda armonía,
el Señor de toda armonía,
mi Dios, mi Maestro y mi Guía,
mi Dios, mi Maestro y mi Guía.
El néctar de la compasión.
Gloria a ti mi Señor.

Manantial de gracia y consuelo,
Eres el Padre Supremo,
eres el Padre Supremo,
que nos envuelve en su juego,
que nos envuelve en su juego.
Eres nuestro protector.
Gloria a Ti mi Señor.

Salvador de los afligidos,
ante Tus Pies nos rendimos,
ante Tus Pies nos rendimos,
y con amor Te pedimos,
y con amor Te pedimos,
que nos des Tu bendición,
Oh, mi Dulcísimo Señor.

Alabado seas Señor,
alabado seas mi Señor,
te entrego todas mis faltas,
te entrego todas mis dudas,
para que Tú las consumas
en el puro fuego de tu amor.

Om Paz, Paz, Paz

title: Gokula Nandana Shyama Murari
lyrics:
Gokula Nandana Shyama Murari
Maakhan Chora Gopala Sai
Mathura Natha Madana Murari
Shyama Sundara Sai Gokula Bala
Surdas Prabhu Hey Giridhari
Natavara Shyama Gopala Sai [ Maakhan Chora ... ]
meaning: O Lord Shyama (Krishna), the dark complexioned one who plays the flute, You are the beloved of Gokula who is the stealer of butter. You are the Lord of Mathura, the most beautiful one, the Lord of Surdas. You are the one who held the mountain to protect Your devotees. You are the delightful dancer who has incarnated as Lord Sai of Parthi.

title: Gopala Daya Nidhey
lyrics:
(Bala) Gopala Daya Nidhey
Sri Parthi Krupa Nidhey Sai Rama [ Gopala Daya ... ]
Nanda Mukunda Govinda Nithyananda
meaning: Sing the glory of Lord Gopala (Krishna), the treasure house of compassion who is none other than Lord Sai Rama, the most compassionate one residing at Parthi. Glory to the son of Nanda, Lord Govinda (Krishna), who is ever blissful and who grants liberation.

title: Gopala Giridhara Bala
lyrics:
Gopala Giridhara Bala
Gopi Lola Gokula Bala [ Gopala ... ]
Goparipala Narayana (2)
Narayana Narayana [ Goparipala ... ]
Govinda Govinda Narayana (Sai)
meaning: Chant the name of Gopala, who lifted the Govardhana mountain, who is the boy of Gokula and who gave happiness to the Gopis. Chant the name of Lord Narayana, Govinda - the protector of cows.

title: Gopala Gopala Nacho Gopala
lyrics:
Gopala Gopala Nacho Gopala
Nacho Nacho Sai Nandalala
Rhuma Jhuma Rhuma Jhuma Nacho Gopala
Nacho Nacho Sai Nandalala
meaning: Please dance and give us the enjoyment of seeing you dance - Gopala and son of Nanda. While you dance, let us hear the sound of your anklets "Rhuma Jhuma".

title: Gopala Gopala Radhey Nandalala
lyrics:
Gopala Gopala Radhey Nandalala
Govinda Gopala Radhey Nandalala [ Gopala ... ]
Brindavana Sanchara Radhey Nandalala
Murali Manohara Radhey Nandalala
meaning: Chant the name of Gopala, the one who is the beloved of Radha and the darling son of Nanda, the one who resides in Brindavan, the one with an enchanting form and who holds the flute.

title: Gopala Govinda Govinda Harey Murarey
lyrics:
Gopala Govinda Govinda Harey Murarey
Mayura Mukuta Peetambara Dhari
Brindavana Sanchari [ Gopala Govinda ... ]
Shankha Chakra Gadha Padmadhari
Krishna Mukunda Murari ( Sai )
meaning:
Oh Lord Gopala, You are extolled by various names such as Govinda, Hari and Murari; You are the one who wears the peacock crown and the yellow cloth; You are the one who wanders in Brindavan; You are the one who bears the Conch, Disc, Mace and Lotus in Your hands. You are verily Sai.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Gopala Govinda Narayana Hari
lyrics:
Gopala Govinda Narayana Hari
Nandalala Mukunda Narayana Hari [ Gopala Govinda ... ]
Narayana Hari Narayana Hari
Narayana Hari Veda Parayana Hari
Narayana Hari Jai Jai Narayana Hari (2)
meaning:
Chant the divine names of Lord Narayana and Lord Krishna such as Gopala and Govinda, the beloved of Nanda and the one who bestows liberation to the devotees. O Lord, Your glory has been extolled in the Vedas. Victory to You, O Lord Narayana.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Gopala Radha Lola
lyrics:
Gopala Radha Lola
Murali Lola Nandalala [ Gopala ... ]
Keshava Madhava Janardhana
Vanamala Brindavana Bala [ Murali Lola ... ]
meaning: Chant the name of Gopala, who gives joy to Radha, who is the son of Nanda. He is the one who played the flute, who is also known as Keshava, Madhava and Janardhana. He is the sweet child of Brindavan who wears the garland made of jungle flowers.

title: Gopala Radhey Krishna Govinda Govinda
lyrics:
Gopala Radhey Krishna Govinda Govinda Gopal
Gopal Gopal Gopal [ Gopala Radhey ... ]
Govinda Govinda Gopala Radhey Krishna
