Govinda Govinda Gopala Sai Krishna
Govinda Govinda Gopal
meaning: Chant the different names of Lord Krishna - Gopala, Radha Krishna and Govinda. Lord Krishna is verily Lord Sai.

title: Gopala Radhey Krishna Madhusudhana
lyrics:
Gopala Radhey Krishna Madhusudhana
Gopala Radhey Krishna Mana Mohana 
Gopala Radhey Krishna Sai Madhava
Radhey Radhey Radhey Madhusudhana
Radhey Radhey Radhey Mana Mohana
Radhey Radhey Radhey Sai Keshava
Gopala Radhey Krishna Sai Madhava
meaning:
Lord Krishna is the protector of cows, the beloved of Radha and the destroyer of all evil entities. He enchants the minds of all. Glory be to Lord Krishna who is verily our Lord Sathya Sai who dons beautiful hair and is beloved by all.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Govinda Bolo Gopala Bolo
lyrics:
Govinda Bolo Gopala Bolo
Ram Ram Bolo Hari Naam Bolo
Allah Sai Yesu Nanak
Zohrashtra Mahavira Buddha Naam Bolo [ Govinda Bolo ... ]
Yeh Naam Saarey Hai Jeevan Saharey
Paramananda Ke Yeh Kholtey Hai Dwarey
Jo Naam Chaho Woh Naam Bolo
Prem Se Bolo Bhaav Se Bolo
meaning: Sing the glorious names of Govinda, Gopala, Rama, Hari, Allah, Sai, Yesu, Nanak, Zohrashtra, Mahavira and Buddha. When these names are chanted with love and devotion, they sustain the devotee through the journey of life.

title: Govinda Bolo Guru Sai Bolo
lyrics:
Govinda Bolo Guru Sai Bolo
Gopala Bolo Guru Sai Bolo [ Govinda Bolo ... ]
Shirdi Sai Bolo Shiva Guru Naam Bolo
Sathya Sai Bolo Sadguru Naam Bolo
Sai Ram Sai Ram
Prema Sai Bolo Parabrahma Bolo
Parthi Baba Bolo Paramatma Bolo
Sai Ram Sai Ram
meaning:
Chant the names of Lord Sai, the Divine Preceptor, Lord Govinda, Gopala (names of Lord Krishna). Chant the names of  Lord Sai of Shirdi, Parthi and Prema Sai who are all the embodiments of Love and the very incarnation of the Lord Supreme.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Govinda Gopal Jaya Narayana
lyrics:
Govinda Gopal Jaya Narayana Gopal
Madhava Gopal Madhusudhana Gopal
Keshava Gopal Mukunda Gopal
meaning: Victory to You, Oh Narayana, Gopal and Govinda, You are the slayer of demon Madhu and the one who gives liberation to the deserved.

title: Govinda Gopala
lyrics:
Govinda Gopala
Jaya Madhava Gopala
Mukunda Murali Gopala
Madhusudhana Gopala
Yashoda Nanda Gopala
Yadu Nandana Gopala
Jaya Muralidhara Gopala [ Madhusudhana Gopala ... ]
meaning: Chant the name of Lord Krishna, also known as Govinda and Gopala, the one who fosters cowherds and people. Victory to the enchanting flute player who bestows liberation to devotees, the destroyer of demon Madhu and beloved of Yashoda, Nanda and the Yadu clan.

title: Govinda Gopala Bolo Radhey Shyam
lyrics:
Govinda Gopala Bolo Radhey Shyam
Bolo Radhey Shyam Bolo Sai Ghana Shyam [ Govinda Gopala ... ]
Govinda Gopala Bolo Radhey Shyam (2) [ Bolo Radhey ... ]
meaning: Chant the glorious names of Lord Krishna - Govinda, Ghana Shyam and Lord Sai who is verily Lord Krishna.

title: Govinda Gopala Hey Nandalala
lyrics:
Govinda Gopala Hey Nandalala
Radhey Gopala Gopi Gopala
Meera Ke Natha Prabhu Murali Gopala
Govardhanodhara Gopala Bala [ Radhey Gopala ... ]
meaning: Glory to Lord Krishna also known as Govinda, Gopala, and the one who is the son of Nanda. Glory to the Lord of Radha, Meera and the Gopis. Glory to the one who plays the flute and the one who lifted the Govardhana mountain.

title: Govinda Gopala Narayana
lyrics:
Govinda Gopala Narayana
Govinda Madhava Narayana [ Govinda Gopala ... ]
Govinda Madhava Narayana
Govinda Gopala Narayana (2)
Narayana Hari (Sai) Narayana (4)
meaning: Glory to Lord Govinda (Vishnu) who is known by many names - Gopala, the protector of the cows, Narayana, the infinite, auspicious one, Madhava, the one whose is as sweet as Madhu or honey and Hari. Glory to Lord Sai who is verily Lord Narayana.

title: Govinda Gopala Narayana Hari
lyrics:
Govinda Gopala Narayana Hari
Narayana Hari Narayana Hari (2) [ Govinda Gopala ... ]
Jagadodhara Narayana Hari
Bhaktha Uddhara Narayana Hari
Parthi Pureesha Narayana Hari [ Narayana Hari ... ]
Narayana Hari Jai Jai Narayana Hari (2)
(Jai Jai) Narayana Hari (2)
meaning: Chant the names of Lord Krishna - Govinda, Gopala and Lord Narayana, the sustainer of the universe, the one who is the redeemer of devotees' sufferings. Glory to You O Lord of Parthi, You are verily Lord Narayana.

title: Govinda Gopala Prabhu Giridhari
lyrics:
Govinda Gopala Prabhu Giridhari
Govinda Gopala Hrudaya Vihari [ Govinda Gopala ... ]
Nanda Kumara Navaneetha Chora
Parthi (Hrudaya) Vihara Bada Chitha Chora
meaning: Glory to Lord Krishna, who is the protector of cows, the one who lifted the Govardhana hill and the one who is the indweller of our hearts. The one who is the son of Nanda and the one who stole butter in Gokula, is verily Sai, the Lord of Parthi who steals our hearts.

title: Govinda Govinda
lyrics:
Govinda Govinda
Mukunda Madhava Govinda
Gopala Sai Gopala [ Mukunda Madhava ... ]
Jai Jai Govinda Jai Jai Gopala (4)
meaning: Chant the name of Lord Krishna, Govinda (foster of cow herd) who gives liberation to devotees. Victory to Govinda who is also Sai Gopala.

title: Govinda Govinda Bhaja Mana Radhey
lyrics:
Govinda Govinda Bhaja Mana Radhey Govinda
Radha Lola Govinda Raasa Vilola Gopala
Krishna Keshava Harey Madhava Govinda Jaya Govinda
Harey Murarey Sai Murarey Govinda Jaya Govinda
Govinda Jaya Govinda Govinda Jaya Govinda (2)
meaning: Let us chant the divine name of Lord Govinda (Krishna) reverberating in the mind of Radha, whose beloved is Lord Krishna who is engrossed in the divine sports with the Gopikas. O Lord, You are the destroyer of demon Keshi. Victory to You O Sai who is none other than Govinda.

title: Govinda Govinda Gayiyere Bhajo Radhey
lyrics:
Govinda Govinda Gayiyere Bhajo Radhey Gopala Krishna Gayiye
Murali Manohara Gayiyere Bhajo Nanda Ke Lal Prabhu Gayiye
Giridhari Giridhari Gayiyere Maayi Meera Ke Nath Prabhu Gayiye (2)
meaning: Sing the name of Lord Krishna - Govinda, Gopala and worship the Lord of Radha. Sing the name of the handsome flute player and worship the Lord, the son of Nanda. Sing the name of the Lord of Mother Meera.

title: Govinda Govinda Gokula Brinda
lyrics:
Govinda Govinda Gokula Brinda
Govinda Govinda Satchidananda [ Govinda Govinda ... ]
Sri Ranga Ranga Hrudayanta Ranga
Bhaktha Vatsala Sai Ranga
Govinda Govinda (4)
meaning: Glory to Lord Govinda (Krishna) of Brindavan and Gokula, who is the existence, awareness and bliss. He is also the Lord residing in Srirangam who resides in our hearts and who showers His Love on His devotees.

title: Govinda Harey Gopala Harey
lyrics:
Govinda Harey Gopala Harey
Govinda Harey Avatar Harey [ Govinda ... ]
Treta Mey Sita Rama Baney
Dwapara Mey Radhey Shyama Baney
Kali Yug Mey Sai Naam Liye
Sai Naam Liye Sarva Naam Liye
meaning: Glory to Govinda, Gopala, the one who plays the flute and the one is dark complexioned. The One who was Rama in Treta yuga, and the one who was Lord Shyama the consort of Radha. In the Kali Yuga, We chant the name of Sai and Surrender to His Lotus Feet.

title: Govinda Harey Gopala Harey
lyrics:
Govinda Harey Gopala Harey
Muralidhara Hey Ghana Shyama Harey [ Govinda ... ]
Meera Ke Prabhu Giridhara Naagara (3)
Giridhara Naagara
Charana Kamala Balihaari Rey
meaning: Chant the name of Govinda, who is of dark blue complexion, holding the enchanting flute in his hand. Oh Lord of Meera who is adored as Giridhara Naagara, we salute at your divine lotus feet.

title: Govinda Harey Gopala Harey Hey
lyrics:
Govinda Harey Gopala Harey Hey Gopi Gopa Bala
Govinda Harey Gopala Harey Hey Murali Gaana Lola
Govinda Harey Gopala Harey Hey Radha Ramana Lola
Govinda Harey Gopala Harey Hey Nanda Gopa Bala
meaning: Glory to Lord Govinda and Gopala (names of Krishna), the one who enchants with His flute, the one who is the Lord of Radha and the one who is the son of Nanda.

title: Govinda Jaya Govinda
lyrics:
Govinda Jaya Govinda
Gokula Nandana Govinda
Ghana Ghana Neela Govinda
Bala Mukunda Govinda
Hey Ghana Shyama Govinda [ Gokula Nandana ... ]
meaning: Glory to Lord Govinda (Krishna), the beloved child of Gokula, whose complexion is dark like the cloud. Glory to the child Mukunda, the one who grants liberation.

title: Govinda Krishna Jai Gopala Krishna
lyrics:
Govinda Krishna Jai Gopala Krishna Jai Govinda Govinda Govinda Gopala Jai
Krishna Krishna Radha Krishna Govinda Krishna Gopala Krishna [ Govinda ... ]
Keshava Madhava Sai Narayana Govinda Govinda Narayana
Nandalala Vraja Bala Hey Sai Narayana Krishna Krishna
meaning: Victory to Lord Govinda, Gopala, Krishna, Madhava, Keshava, Narayana. Victory to the son of Nanda and the darling child of Vraja.

title: Govinda Krishna Jai Gopala Krishna
lyrics:
Govinda Krishna Jai Gopala Krishna Jai Gopala Pala Bala Radha Krishna Jai
Krishna Jai Krishna Jai Krishna Jai Krishna Krishna Krishna Krishna Jai [ Govinda ... ]
Gopika Mala Haari Pyaari Maayi Meera Mana Vihari Madana Mohana Muralidhari Krishna Jai
Krishna Jai Rama Krishna Jai Radha Krishna Jai Bala Krishna Krishna Krishna Krishna Jai
Krishna Jai Krishna Jai Krishna Jai Krishna Jai Krishna Krishna Krishna Krishna Jai
meaning: Victory be to Krishna, the Lord of Radha; Victory be to the beloved Lord who wears the garland of the Gopis; Victory be to the one who dwells in the heart of Meera; Victory be to the Lord of Love who enchants our hearts and who plays flute.

title: Govinda Krishna Vittala Venu Gopala
lyrics:
Govinda Krishna Vittala Venu Gopala Krishna Vittala
Panduranga Vittala Jaya Pandari Natha Vittala
Govinda Vittala Gopala Vittala
Panduranga Vittala Pandari Natha Vittala
Vittala Vittala Panduranga (4)
meaning: Chant the names of Lord Govinda, Lord Krishna who plays the flute, Lord Vittala and Panduranga, the Lord of Pandharpur.

title: Govinda Krishna Vittaley
lyrics: Govinda Krishna Vittaley Gopala Krishna Vittaley (2)
meaning: Chant the Holy names of Govinda, Gopala, Krishna and Vittala.

title: Govinda Krishna Vittaley Venu Gopala
lyrics:
Govinda Krishna Vittaley Venu Gopala Krishna Vittaley
Ranga Ranga Vittaley Sri Panduranga Vittaley
Govinda Krishna Vittaley Venu Gopala Krishna Vittaley [ Ranga Ranga ... ]
meaning: Sing the Glory of Govinda, Krishna, Vittala. Sing the Glory of Venugopala, the one who plays the flute. O Krishna, You are Panduranga who is the Lord of Pandari.

title: Govinda Madhava Gopala Keshava
lyrics:
Govinda Madhava Gopala Keshava (3)
Krishna Krishna Sai Krishna
Krishna Krishna Gopala
Gokula Bala Gopi Ramana
Mana Mohana Madhusudhana Jaya Madhava Jaya Keshava
meaning: Glory to Thee O Lord Krishna who is known by many names - Govinda, Madhava, Gopala and Keshava. You are the adorable child of Gokula and the Lord of Gopis. You are the one who enchants and attracts, the slayer of demon Madhu. Victory to Lord Sai who is none other than Lord Krishna.

title: Govinda Madhava Gopala Keshava
lyrics:
Govinda Madhava Gopala Keshava
Jaya Nanda Mukunda Nanda Govinda Radhey Gopala [ Govinda Madhava ... ]
Giridhari Giridhari Jaya Radhey Gopala
Ghana Shyama Shyama Shyama Jaya Jaya Radhey (Sai) Gopala [ Jaya Nanda ... ]
meaning: Chant the divine names of Govinda and Madhava (names of Lord Krishna) who protects cowherds and who slayed the demon Keshi. Victory to the beloved of Nanda and the one who confers liberation to the devotees. O Lord You are adored as the beloved of Radha, as Giridhari, (the one who lifted the Govardhana mountain), the dark-hued one who has now incarnated as Lord Sai of Parthi.

title: Govinda Murahari Madhava
lyrics:
Govinda Murahari Madhava
Govinda Gopala Keshava [ Govinda Murahari ... ]
Janardhana Sai Parthi Vihari
Govardhanodhari Madhava
Madhava Keshava Hari Narayana
meaning: Glory to Lord Narayana who is known by many names - Govinda, Gopala, Madhava, Keshava, Janardhana and Hari. Glory to the one who slayed demon Mura and who lifted the Govardhana mountain. Glory to Lord Sai who resides at Parthi and who is none other than Lord Narayana.

title: Govinda Muralidhara Murahara
lyrics:
Govinda Muralidhara Murahara
Govinda Ghana Shyama Harey
Govinda Govinda
Govinda Govardhana Giridhara
Govinda Ghana Shyama (Parandhama) Harey
Govinda Sai Shyama Harey
meaning:
Chant the divine names of the Lord Krishna - Govinda, Muralidhara, Murahara, Ghana Shyama and Giridhari. Chant the name of Lord Sai who is verily Lord Krishna.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Govinda Murari Gopala Murari
lyrics:
Govinda Murari Gopala Murari
Vittala Sri Hari Panduranga
Hrdaya Vihari Hey Giridhari
Murahara Shourie Panduranga
meaning: Glory be to Lord Govinda, the protector of cows (Veda, senses), who slayed the demon Mura. Glory to Lord Vittala who stands on a brick (or the idol of knowledge) in the city of Pandharpur and to Lord Giridhari, who lifted the mountain and who resides in our hearts.

title: Govinda Narayana Gopala Narayana
lyrics:
Govinda Narayana Gopala Narayana
Govinda Govinda Narayana
Govinda Gopala Narayana
Govinda Govinda Narayana
Govinda Gopala Narayana
meaning: Chant the names of Lord Krishna - Govinda, Gopala and Lord Narayana.

title: Govinda Radhey Krishna Govinda Govinda
lyrics:
Govinda Sai Krishna Govinda Govinda
Gopala Sai Krishna Govinda Govinda
Mohana Bala Krishna Govinda Govinda
Parthi Nivasa Krishna Govinda Govinda
meaning: Chant the names of the Lord Govinda and Gopala, the handsome boy Krishna who is same as Sai, the resident of Parthi.

title: Govinda Rama Jai Jai Gopala
lyrics:
Govinda Rama Jai Jai Gopala Rama
Madhava Rama Jai Jai Keshava Rama [ Govinda Rama ... ]
Durlabha Rama Jai Jai Sulabha Rama
Ek Tu Rama Jai Jai Anek Tu Rama
meaning: Victory to Lord Rama who is difficult to attain when sought externally but easily attained when sought within. He is the same Lord who incarnated as Krishna (Gopala, Madhava and Keshava). Victory to Lord Rama, You are the one Lord who has manifested in many forms.

title: Govindam Bhaja Mooda Mathey (Bhaja)
lyrics:
Govindam Bhaja Mooda Mathey (Bhaja)
Samprapte Sannihite Kaale
Nahi Nahi Rakshati Dukrin Karane [ Govindam Bhaja ... ]
Punarapi Jananam Punarapi Maranam
Punarapi Janani Jathare Shayanam
meaning: O mind pray to Govinda (Krishna), the protector of cows. O mind, when the time comes, the grammar and recitation of grammar will not help. Again and again we have to take births in the mother's womb, and die, so please remember the name of the Lord Govinda.

title: Govindethi Sada Snanam
lyrics:
Govindethi Sada Snanam
Govindethi Sada Japam
Govindethi Sada Dhyanam
Sada Govinda Keertanam
meaning: Always immerse (wash sins away) yourself in the name of Lord Govinda. Always chant, meditate and sing on the name of Govinda.

title: Gowri Ganesh Uma Ganesh
lyrics:
Gowri Ganesh Uma Ganesh
Parvathi Nandana Sri Ganesh
Sharanam Ganesh Sharanam Ganesh
Shiva Nandana Ganapathi Ganesh
meaning: Chant the name of Lord Ganesh, the beloved son of Mother Gowri. I surrender to Thee, O Lord of all Demigods, beloved child of Lord Shiva and Goddess Parvathi.

title: Gowri Ganesha Vinayaka
lyrics:
Gowri Ganesha Vinayaka (3)
Shuklambara Dhara Natha Gajanana
Sri Ganaraya Vinayaka
Gajavadana Jaya Ganapathi Vandana
Mangala Murthy Gajanana (2)
meaning: Victory to the son of Gowri, Lord Ganesha, who is adorned with white garment and who bestows auspiciousness. Victory to Thee, O Lord of the demigods, we offers our obeisance to You.

title: Gowri Manohara Hey Nataraja
lyrics:
Gowri Manohara Hey Nataraja
Shiva Shiva Shankara Hey Shiva Raja
Pavana Charitha Paahi Mahesha
Paahi Mahesha Hey Jagadeesha
Karunamaya Prabho Hey Jagadeesha
meaning: Glory to Thee, Lord Nataraja (dancing Shiva), the beloved of Gowri, You are the supreme God who grants us auspiciousness. Those who extol You merge in divinity. Protect us, oh Lord Mahesha, the compassionate Lord of the universe.

title: Gowri Nandana Bala Gajanana
lyrics:
Gowri Nandana Bala Gajanana
Gajavadana Gananatha Gajanana [ Gowri Nandana ... ]
Maha Ganapathey Paahi Gajanana
Gajanana Sai Gajanana
meaning: Victory to the son of Mother Gowri (Parvathi), the little Lord Ganesha, who has the face of an elephant and who is the Master of Shiva's army. Protect us O Lord, You are none other than Lord Sai.

title: Gowri Nandana Gajanana
lyrics:
Gowri Nandana Gajanana
Gangadhara Hara Shambho Nandana
Parama Sumangala Mooshika Vahana
Gaana Vilolana Gajanana
meaning: O Lord Ganesha, the elephant-faced one, You are the beloved son of Mother Gowri (Parvathi) and Lord Shiva, who adorns the Ganges on His head blissfully. You are the supremely auspicious Lord who rides the mouse (Mooshika) and who loves music.

title: Gowri Nandana Gajanana (Hey)
lyrics:
Gowri Nandana Gajanana (Hey)
Girija Nandana Niranjana [ Gowri Nandana ... ]
Parvathi Nandana Shubhanana
Paahi Prabho Maam Paahi Prasanna
meaning: Oh Lord Ganesh, son of Mother Gowri, You are blemishless and Your countenance is most auspicious. O Lord, protect us.

title: Gowri Nathaya Vishwanathaya
lyrics:
Gowri Nathaya Vishwanathaya
Sai Nathaya Namah Shivaya
Gunatheethaya Gunadharaya [ Sai Nathaya ... ]
Kaala Kaalaya Kaalatheethaya
Kaala Roopaya Namah Shivaya
Prema Roopaya Parthi Vasaya [ Sai Nathaya ... ]
Om Namah Shivaya Sai Shivaya (4)
meaning: Obeisance to Lord Shiva, who is the consort of Gowri and the Lord of the universe. You are Sai Natha who embodies all attributes yet attributeless. You are the embodiment of time, beyond time and the Lord of time. You are the resident of Parthi whose form is Love.

title: Gowri Suthaya Om Namah Om
lyrics:
Gowri Suthaya Om Namah Om
Lambodharaya Om Namah Om [ Gowri Suthaya ... ]
Vighneshwaraya Om Namah Om
Bhava Dukha Bhanjana Om Namah Om
meaning: We bow to Lord Ganesha, son of Mother Gowri, remover of obstacles and destroyer of sorrows.

title: Gowri Vara Gangadhara
lyrics:
Gowri Vara Gangadhara
Shambho Shiva Bimbadhara [ Gowri Vara ... ]
Vyagrambaradhara Jyothi Prakasha
Pavana Naama Harey Paramesha
Om Namah Shivaya Shivaya Namah Om (2)
meaning: Salutation to Shiva, the embodiment of Aum, who is the consort of Gowri. You are adorned with the Ganges on the head and the crescent moon, wearing the tiger skin as your attire. You are the supreme God of effulgence and the saviour of all.

title: Guru Baba Guru Baba
lyrics:
Guru Baba Guru Baba
Charana Namostuthey Guru Baba
Vidya Dayaka Guru Baba
(Pra)Shantha Swaroopa Guru Baba
Guruvara Guruvara Guru Baba
meaning: Worship and pay obeisance at the lotus feet of the most supreme, noble teacher, Lord Sai Baba. He is the embodiment of truth, love and peace. He grants spiritual knowledge.

title: Guru Bhagawan Ai no Kami
lyrics:
Guru Bhagawan Ai no Kami
Anata no Miashi ni Inorimasu
Kokoro o Tsukushite Anata o Aisuru
Guru Bhagawan Ai no Kami 
Subete no Inochi wa Michibikare
Anata no Ai ni Furerutoki
Tada Kami no Mi ga Ikirumichi
Subete ga Ai ni
meaning:
O Divine Preceptor, Lord of Love, we pray at Your beautiful feet, we devote our hearts to loving You. Please guide every moment of our lives. Touch us with Your love. The path to one's divinity is simply to love all.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Guru Brahma Guru Vishnu Guru
lyrics:
Guru Brahma Guru Vishnu Guru Devo Maheshwara
Jaya Deva Priya Deva Sri Sathya Sayeeshwara
Jai Jai Jai Karunakara
Jai Jai Jai Akhileshwara
Jai Jai Jai Shirdeeshwara
Jai Jai Jai Partheeshwara
meaning: O Lord Sai, the Divine Preceptor who is the verily the Trinity - Brahma, Vishnu and Shiva, victory to Thee, the merciful one, the Lord of the Universe. Victory to the Lord of Shirdi and Parthi.

title: Guru Brahma Guru Vishnu Guru Devo
lyrics:
Guru Brahma Guru Vishnu Guru Devo Maheshwara 
Guru Sakshath Parabrahma 
Tasmai Sri Guruvey Namah [ Guru Brahma ... ]
Dharma Kshetra Sthapaka 
Taraka Mantra Bodhaka 
Shantha (Prashantha) Swaroopa Nayaka 
Sharanam Sharanam Guru (Sai) Deva
meaning: Surrender to the Supreme Lord, Divine Preceptor Sai, who is Brahma (creator), Vishnu (preserver) and Shiva (destroyer) incarnate. He is the very embodiment of Peace who leads us into the path of righteousness and enlightenment.

title: Guru Deva Guru Deva
lyrics:
Guru Deva Guru Deva
Guruvayur Pura Hari Deva
Hari Narayana Jaya Narayana
Sharanam Sharanam Sai Deva
meaning:
Victory to the Divine Preceptor, Lord Sai, You are verily Lord Narayana (Hari), the Lord of Guruvayur (a place in Kerala). We surrender to You, O Lord Sai.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Guru Deva Guru Govinda
lyrics:
Guru Deva Guru Govinda
Mandara Giridhara Shirdi Pureeshwara
Jaya Partheeshwara Sai Shiva [ Guru Deva ... ]
Sundara Roopa Sri Sai Deva
Vaidehi Mohana Narayana (2)
meaning: Glory to the Lord Sai of Shirdi and Parthi. Glory to Lord Vishnu, the benevolent teacher whose beautiful form enchanted Vaidehi (Goddess Lakshmi).

title: Guru Deva Jaya Deva
lyrics:
Guru Deva Jaya Deva
Charanam Sharanam Sai Deva Deva
Pranava Swaroopa Devadi Deva
Gnana Pradayaka Sadguru Deva [ Charanam ... ]
meaning: Victory to our Divine Preceptor and God of Gods, Lord Sai. We surrender to Thee, O Lord, who is the embodiment of Om, the Lord of the Universe and the bestower of wisdom.

title: Guru Deva Priya Deva Sai
lyrics:
Guru Deva Priya Deva Sai Deva Dayamaya
Vibhuti Sundara Shashankha Shekara
Sai Shankara Daya Karo (2) [ Guru Deva ... ]
Gokula Nandana Sai Gopala
Raghukula Bhooshana Sai Rama
Hey Madanaantaka Daya Karo (2)
meaning: Lord Sai is the merciful and enchanting Guru who is verily Lord Shiva, adorned with Vibhuti and crescent moon on the head. O Sai, You are Shankara, who is merciful, You are Gopala who delights people of Gokula, You are Rama the jewel of Raghu dynasty.

title: Guru Deva Sai Guru Namah
lyrics:
Guru Deva Sai Guru Namah (3)
Sadguru Brahma Sanatana
Janardhana Jagat Palana
Deena Nath Parama Niranjana
Guru Deva Sai Guru Namah
meaning: I bow to the supreme Guru Sai, the Guru of Gurus, the most real one; He is the caretaker of the universe; He is the lord of the helpless. I bow to that supreme Guru Sai.

title: Guru Deva Sharanam Deva
lyrics:
Guru Deva Sharanam Deva
Paahi Prabho Sharanam Deva [ Guru Deva ... ]
Sundara Roopa Sri Sai Deva
Sharanam Sharanam Sadguru Deva
meaning: We surrender to our Guru and God, Lord Sai. Protect us O Lord, Your form is beauty itself. We surrender to You, our true guru.

title: Guru Devaya Namo Namo
lyrics:
Guru Devaya Namo Namo
Hey Parameshwara Namo Namo [ Guru Devaya ... ]
Omkaraya Namo Namo
Parthi Pureeshwara Namo Namo
Jagadeeshwaraya Namo Namo
Prashanthi Eshwara Namo Namo
meaning: Salutations to the Supreme Noble Teacher, Lord Sai, the Supreme Lord, the Lord whose form is Om, the Lord of Prashanthi Nilayam at Puttaparthi and the Lord of the Universe.

title: Guru Hara Guru Hari Guru
lyrics:
Guru Hara Guru Hari Guru Brahma
Guravey Sakshath Parabrahma
Jaya Jaya Jaya Jaya Jagat Guru
Jagadidam Akhilam Tava Roopam
Jaya (4) Hara (4) Shiva (4) Jagat Guru
Jagat Guru Hey (Sathya) Sai Guru
meaning:
Glory to the Divine Preceptor Sathya Sai who removes ignorance and is Lord Shiva (Hara), Lord Vishnu (Hari) and Lord Brahma. He is verily the Parabrahma, the Supreme Lord who is formless. Victory to the Guru of whole world whose beauty is supreme and who is auspicious.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Guru Mahima Gao
lyrics:
Guru Mahima Gao (3)
Sadguru Sai Anantha Guru
Brahmananda Ananda Guru
Sarva Dharma Sathya Sai Guru
Sai Guru Sathya Sai Guru [ Sarva Dharma ... ]
Guru Ke Vani Gao
meaning: Sing about the greatness of the eternal, universal and ever-blissful teacher, Sathya Sai who loves all the religions. He is the truth, knowledge and bliss.

title: Guru Nanak Ji Ki Jai
lyrics:
Guru Nanak Ji Ki Jai Jai Kaar
Jo Boley So Hoyey Nihaal
Allah (Maulah) Sai Lelo Salaam
Salaam Salaam Lakhon (Mera) Salaam
Yesu Pitha Prabhu Sai Ram
Buddha Zohrashtra Mahavira Naam [ Salaam Salaam ... ]
meaning: Glory to Guru Nanak; whoever sings thus, that person becomes liberated. Accept my salutations, O Lord Sai, You are Allah; Accept these ten million salutations of mine; O Sai, You are Father Jesus, our Lord and You are Buddha, Zohrashtra and Mahavira.

title: Guru no Miashi wo Agamemasho
lyrics:
Guru no Miashi wo Agamemasho
Eichi no Hikari ni Terasarete
Toutoki Guru Sai Baba
Ooi Naru Kami, Ooi Naru Kami, Ooi Naru Kami, Sai Baba
Kagiri Naki Ai no, Kagiri Naki Ai no, Kagiri Naki Ai no, Sai Baba
Michibiki Tamae, Michibiki Tamae, Michibiki Tamae, Sai Baba
meaning:
Let us worship the lotus feet of our Guru (Preceptor). Please illuminate our minds. Sai Baba, You are our Precious Guru. You are awe-inspiring. Your love is without limits. Please guide us.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Guru Pada Ranjana Rama Jaya
lyrics:
Guru Pada Ranjana Rama Jaya Jaya
Bandha Vimochana Rajeeva Lochana
Abhaya Karambhuja Rama Jaya Jaya
Jai Jai Ram Sita Ram (4)
meaning:
Victory to pleasing Noble Teacher - Lotus-Eyed Lord Rama, who unties the knots and tangles of life - thereby leading to liberation. Victory to charming Supreme Guide - Lord Rama, worship of whose Lotus Feet removes fear. Victory to Lord of Sita - Lord Rama and Lord Sai Ram.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Guru Pada Vandana Guru Vandana
lyrics:
Guru Pada Vandana Guru Vandana
Guru Natha Sai Natha Jaga Vandana [ Guru Pada ... ]
Shiva Rama Krishna Roopa Jagannatha Sai Deva
Shirdi Prashanthi Vasi Sukha Shanthi Daata
meaning:
Worship and bow to the lotus feet of Guru Sainath whom the people from all over the world worship. He is Shiva, Rama, Krishna and the Lord of the world. He is the resident of Shirdi and Parthi who bestows happiness and peace.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Guru Sai Maheshwara
lyrics:
Guru Sai Maheshwara
Karunakara Karunamaya
Prashanthi Sai Sundara
Parabrahma Roopa Parathpara
Trivikrama Narayana
Brahma Vishnu Maheshwara
meaning:
Worship Lord Sai, the Divine Preceptor who is the embodiment of kindness and mercy, having a delightful form and who is the resident of Prashanthi Nilayam in Puttaparthi. He is the embodiment of the Supreme Lord and is verily Lord Narayana, treading the three worlds (in the Vamana avatar). He is the Creator (Brahma), Sustainer (Vishnu) and the Destroyer (Shiva) of the Universe.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Gurudev Gurudev
lyrics:
Gurudev Gurudev
Sathya Sai Natha Sadguru Dev
Sharanam Sharanam Guru Charanam
Sharanam Sharanam Brahma Charanam
Sharanam Sharanam Vishnu Charanam
Sharanam Sharanam Shiva Charanam
Om Namah Shivaya Shivaya Namah Om (4)
meaning:
We chant and worship the divine preceptor Sathya Sai, who is Brahma, Vishnu and Maheshwara. We bow to Thy lotus feet and our obeisance to Lord Shiva who is the embodiment of primordial sound.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Gurudev Gurudev Sathya Sai Gurudev
lyrics:
Gurudev Gurudev Sathya Sai Gurudev Gurudev Jai
Gurudev Gurudev Bhagawan, You are the light in everyone
Take my Hands and take my Love, lead me and guide me from above
Twirl me around in Your dance of light, destroy the darkness of the night
Gurudev Gurudev Jai Gurudev Gurudev Jai
Gurudev Gurudev Bhagawan, You are the light in everyone

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Guruvara Guruvara Sai Namo
lyrics:
Guruvara Guruvara Sai Namo
Sadguru Satchidananda Namo [ Guruvara ... ]
Veda Gamanutha Sai Namo
Naada Priya Shiva Baba Namo
meaning:
Salutations to Sai, our guru (preceptor) who grants us boons. He is the embodiment of existence, awareness and bliss, the essence of Vedas, lover of divine music and the primordial sound Om.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Guruvara Naam Pavana Naam
lyrics:
Guruvara Naam Pavana Naam
Sadguru Naam Guru Nanak Naam
Guruvara Naam Pavana Naam
Sadguru Sai Baba Naam
Jai Guru Sadguru Nanak Naam Jai Bolo Sai Baba Naam
meaning: Sing the names of the Guru - Guru Nanak and Sai Baba; these names purify one's heart.

title: Guruvayurpura Sri Hari Krishna Narayana
lyrics:
Guruvayurpura Sri Hari Krishna Narayana Gopal
Mukunda Madhava Muralidhari Narayana Gopal
Narayana Gopal Sai Narayana Gopal (2)
Govardhana Giridhari Murari Narayana Gopal [ Mukunda Madhava ... ]
meaning: Chant the names of the Lord of Guruvayur, Lord Hari, Krishna, Narayana, Gopal, Madhava, Muralidhara, Mukunda and Sai Narayana. Chant the name of Krishna who lifted the Govardhana mountain.

title: Hara Bhola Natha Uma Pathey
lyrics:
Hara Bhola Natha Uma Pathey, Shambho Shankara Pashupathey
Kailasa Vasa Chidambaresha, Neelakanta Sadashiva
Bham Bham Hara Hara Bhola Maheshwara, Parvathi Ramana Sadhashiva
meaning: Let us chant the divine names of Shiva or Shambho who is the consort of Uma, the blue-throated Lord who resides in mount Kailasa and Chidambaram, whose drum resounds Bham Bham, who is the consort of Parvathi.

title: Hara Gowri Nath Shiva Shankara
lyrics:
Hara Gowri Nath Shiva Shankara
Bhola Harey Shambo Bhola Harey
Hara Gowri Nath Shiva Shankara
Shambho Shiva Shambho Deva
Kailasa Vasa Mahadeva
Bhola Harey Shambho Bhola Harey
meaning: Chant and celebrate the many names of Lord Shiva. He is the consort of Gowri and the auspicious one. He is the Supreme Being who resides in Mount Kailasa and remains an abode of joy for all who seek him.

title: Hara Hara Gangey Hara Hara
lyrics:
Hara Hara Gangey Hara Hara Gangey
Hey Nataraja Hey Shiva Raja Hara Hara Hara Hara Gangey [ Hara Hara ... ]
Parthi Pureeshwara Jaya Gangadhara
Hara (4) Gangey [ Hara Hara ... ]
Shankara Shiva Shankara Shiva Shankara Shankara Sai (2)
meaning: Let us chant the glorious name of Shiva who adorns the Ganges in His matted hair. Oh Shankara, You are the master of the divine dance and none other than Lord Sai, the resident of Parthi, who bestows auspiciousness.

title: Hara Hara Hara Hara Mahadeva
lyrics:
Hara Hara Hara Hara Mahadeva
Shiva Shiva Shiva Shiva Sadashiva
Om Hara Hara Hara Hara Mahadeva
Om Namo Namo Namah Shivaya
Brahma Vishnu Surarchitaya Om Namo Namo Namah Shivaya
Uma Ganesha Sharavana Sevitha Om Namo Namo Namah Shivaya [ Om Namo ... ]
meaning: Glory to the Lord of the Lords, Lord Shiva. Chant the auspicious name of "Shiva" who is worshipped by the other two Gods, Brahma and Vishnu. O Lord, You are served by Your consort, the Divine Mother Uma and by Your sons, Ganesha and Sharavana (Subrahmanya).

title: Hara Hara Hara Hara Namami
lyrics:
Hara Hara Hara Hara Namami Shankara Bhaja Mana Sai Ram
Hara Hara Shiva Shiva Sadashiva Bhaja Mana Sai Ram
Shiva Shiva Shiva Shiva Sadashiva Bhaja Mana Sai Ram
meaning: Sing (chant) the name of Lord Shiva and the name of Sai Ram.

title: Hara Hara Hara Hara Samba
lyrics:
Hara Hara Hara Hara Samba Shiva
Vibhuti Sundara Sai Shiva
Gangadhara Hara Gowri Shiva
Trishoola Dhari Trinetra Shiva
Parthi Puri Paramesha Shiva [ Vibhuti Sundara ... ]
meaning:
Chant the name of Shiva the three-eyed destroyer of evil. He bears the Ganges and the trident; chant the name of Sai Shiva of Parthi Who is adorned with holy ash.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Hara Hara Hara Shambho Shambho
lyrics:
Hara Hara Hara Shambho Shambho
Om Namah Shivaya Shivaya Namah Om (3) [ Hara Hara ... ]
Ganga Jatadhara Gowri Shiva
Paapa Vinashaka Parama Shiva
Maya Manusha Vesha Shiva
Parthipuri Paramesha Shiva [ Hara Hara ... ]
Pannaga Bhooshana Phaala Lochana
Nandi Vahana Nagabharana
Bhaktha Janavana Patitha Pavana
Kailasa Vasa Sai Shankara
Shambho Shambho Shambho Shambho
meaning:
Glory to Lord Shiva, the resident of Kailasa who holds the Holy Ganges in His matted locks, the consort of Mother Parvathi, the Supreme Lord who destroys our sins, who disguises in human form, who is adorned with the cobra, who has the third eye in His forehead, who has the divine bull Nandi as His vehicle, who protects His devotees and who is the saviour of the downtrodden. He is verily Lord Sai who resides at Parthi.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Hara Hara Shambho
lyrics:
Hara Hara Shambho Karuna Sindho
Shiva Shiva Shankara Loka Pathey
Paripalaya Maam Parthi Pureeshwara
Sai Shiva Kailasa Pathey
meaning: Salutations to Lord Shiva, the ocean of compassion and the Lord of the world. O Sai, Lord of Parthi, please protect me. You are verily Lord Shiva, the Lord of Kailasa.

title: Hara Hara Shankara Samba Sadashiva
lyrics:
Hara Hara Shankara Samba Sadashiva Esha Mahesha
Tandava Priyakara Chandrakala Dhara Esha Mahesha
Amba Guha Lambodhara Vanditha Esha Mahesha
Vindhya Himachala Shringa Nivasita Esha Mahesha
meaning: Chant the many names of the Lord Shiva - Shankara, Sadashiva and Mahesha. O Lord, You are fond of the Tandava Dance (cosmic dance). You are adorned with the moon on Your forehead. You are worshipped by the darling son of Mother Parvathi - Lord Ganesh, the pot-bellied one. You are the resident of the Himalayas. By chanting the above divine names, the Lord destroys evil and grants protection.

title: Hara Hara Shankara Shiva Shiva
lyrics:
Hara Hara Shankara Shiva Shiva Shankara Bham Bham Bholey Nath
Bham Bham Bholey Nath Sai Bham Bham Bholey Nath
Dama Dama Damaru Damaru Ka Natha Bham Bham Bholey Nath
Bham Bham Bholey Nath Sai Bham Bham Bholey Nath (2)
meaning:
Chant the divine name of Shiva, who redeems us from all troubles, the Lord who is easy to please, whose damaru (drum) creates sounds like 'Bham Bham' and 'Dama Dama' during the cosmic dance.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Hara Hara Shiva Shiva Ambalavana
lyrics:
Hara Hara Shiva Shiva Ambalavana
Ambalavana Ponnambalavana
Ananda Tandava Nataraja
Nataraja Nataraja
Narthana Sundara Nataraja
Shivaraja Shivaraja
Shivakami Priya Shivaraja
Chidambaresha Nataraja
meaning:
Glory to Lord Shiva, the beloved of Parvathi and the Lord of dance. He is the one who delights in the beautiful cosmic dance. He resides in the temple of the heart and in Chidambaram (a temple in southern India).

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Hara Shiva Shankara Bholey Nath
lyrics:
Hara Shiva Shankara Bholey Nath Shirdi Pureeshwara Sai Nath
Shiva Shiva Shankara Bholey Nath Parthi Pureeshwara Sai Nath
Phani Bhooshana Shiva Gowri Nath
Parama Sumangala Sai Nath
Girija Ramana Paramananda Samadhipriya Ganga Nath
meaning: Chant the name of Lord Shiva who is none other than Lord Sai of Parthi. The Lord of Gowri is adorned with a cobra, is always blissful and is the delight of Girija (Parvathi). He bears the river Ganges, bestows auspiciousness and rejoices in the bliss of meditation.

title: Hara Shiva Shankara Shashankha Shekara
lyrics:
Hara Shiva Shankara Shashankha Shekara Hara Bham Hara Bham Bham Bham Bolo
Bhava Bhayankara Girija Shankara Dhimi Dhimi Dhimi Thaka Narthana Kelo
Hara Shiva Shankara Shashankha Shekara Hara Bham Hara Bham Bham Bham Bolo [ Bhava Bhayankara ... ]
meaning: Chant the name of Lord Shiva, dancing to the rhythm of drums. Shankara, Lord of Girija, destroys the fear of the cycle of birth and death.

title: Harey Krishna Harey Krishna Krishna
lyrics:
Harey Krishna Harey Krishna Krishna Krishna Harey Harey
Harey Rama Harey Rama Rama Rama Harey Harey
Harey Krishna Harey Krishna Krishna Krishna Harey Harey
Harey Rama Harey Rama Rama Rama Harey Harey
meaning: Chant the names of Lord Hari (Narayana), Lord Krishna, Lord Rama incessantly. Glory be to them.

title: Harey Krishna Harey Krishna Krishna
lyrics:
Harey Krishna Harey Krishna Krishna Krishna Harey Harey
Harey Rama Harey Rama Rama Rama Harey Harey
Harey Krishna Harey Krishna Krishna Krishna Harey Harey
Harey Rama Harey Rama Rama Rama Harey Harey
meaning: Chant the names of Lord Krishna and Lord Rama.

title: Harey Krishna Harey Ram Sai
lyrics:
Harey Krishna Harey Ram Sai Ram Sai Ram
Gopal Govinda (Madhava Mukunda) Bolo Jai Sai Ram
Hey Parameshwara Parthi Pureeshwara Daya Karo Hey Sai Ram
Jai Jai Ram Sai Ram Jai Jai Ram
Jai Jai Ram Sai Ram Jai Jai Ram Bolo [ Jai Jai Ram ... ]
meaning: Chant the names of the Lord Krishna, Rama, Gopala, Govinda, Madhava and Mukunda (names of Lord Krishna). Bless us O Sai, the Lord of Parthi. You are the Supreme Lord. Victory to Thee, O Sai Rama.

title: Harey Krishna Harey Rama Harey Harey
lyrics:
Harey Krishna Harey Rama Harey Harey Harey Harey
Harey Harey Harey Harey
Krishna Rama Rama Krishna Harey Harey (Jai)
Govinda Krishna Gopala Krishna (2)
Radhey Krishna Radhey Krishna Harey Harey (Jai)
meaning: Chant the names of Lord Rama and Lord Krishna. Victory to Lord Rama and Radha's Lord, Krishna who is known by many names such as Govinda and Gopala.

title: Harey Krishna Madhusudhana
lyrics:
Harey Krishna Madhusudhana
Harey Krishna Guna Ranjana
Harey Krishna Yadu Nandana

title: Harey Murali Manohara Shyama
lyrics:
Harey Murali Manohara Shyama
Harey Gopi Manohara Shyama [ Harey Murali ... ]
Harey Devaki Nandana Shyama
Nandana Shyama Nandana Shyama [ Harey Devaki ... ]
Harey Vasuki Shayana Shyama
meaning:
Glory to Lord Krishna who has an enchanting form with the flute in His hands, who is dear to the Gopis, who is the son of Devaki and the one who reclines on the serpent Vasuki.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Harey Murarey Sai Ram Harey
lyrics:
Harey Murarey Sai Ram Harey Murarey Ram
Parama Sumangala Sai Ram Parama Sumangala Ram
Eshwar Allah Terey Naam Sab Tum Ho Bhagawan [ Parama Sumangala ... ]
meaning: Glory be to Lord Sai Ram, the one who is supremely auspicious who is glorified by many names - Rama, Allah and Eshwara (Shiva).

title: Harey Ram Harey Ram Harey
lyrics:
Harey Ram Harey Ram Harey Rama Krishna Harey Ram
Mukunda Madhava Sri Sai Ram [ Harey Ram ... ]
Govinda Gopala Radha Ke Shyam
Giridhara Gopala Meera Ke Shyam
Bolo Ram Bolo Shyam Bolo Sai Ghana Shyam
meaning: Chant the different names of the Lord, Rama, Krishna, Mukunda, Madhava, Govinda, the blue complexioned Gopala who is dear to Radha and Meera.

title: Harey Rama Harey Rama Rama
lyrics:
Harey Rama Harey Rama Rama Rama Harey Harey
Harey Krishna Harey Krishna Krishna Krishna Harey Harey
Satsangathwey Nithsangathwam Nithsangathwey Nirmohathwam
Nirmohatwey Nischala Thatwam Nischala Thatwey Jeevan Mukthi
meaning: Chant incessantly the holy names of Lord Hari, Lord Rama and Lord Krishna. Good company leads to blissful solitude, which further leads to freedom from infatuation, mental equanimity and finally to liberation even as one is alive. This is how an aspirant progresses by chanting the Lord's name with sincere devotion.

title: Harey Sai Harey Sai Sai
lyrics:
Harey Sai Harey Sai Sai Sai Harey Harey
Harey Baba Harey Baba Bala Baba Harey Harey [ Harey Sai ... ]
Achyutham Keshavam Rama Narayanam
Krishna Damodaram Vasudevam Bhajey
Sridharam Madhavam Gopika Vallabham
Sadguru Nayakam Sai Ramam Bhajey
meaning: Chant various names of the Lord Krishna - Achyutha, Keshava, Rama, Narayana, Damodara, Vasudeva, Sridhara and Madhava. Glory to the Lord of the Gopis who has incarnated as our sacred preceptor, Lord Sathya Sai.

title: Hari Anandamaya Jaya Narayana ( Sai )
lyrics:
Hari Anandamaya Jaya Narayana ( Sai )
Vasudeva Nandana Radha Jeevana
Paramananda Madhava
Narayana Hari ( Sai ) Narayana (3)
meaning: Praise be to Lord Narayana who is Supreme Bliss personified, who incarnated as Lord Krishna, the son of Vasudeva and who is the very life of Radha.

title: Hari Bhajana Bina Sukh Shanthi
lyrics:
Hari Bhajana Bina Sukh Shanthi Nahin
Hari Naam Bina Ananda Nahin
Prema Bhakthi Bina Uddhar Nahin
Guru Seva Bina Nirvana Nahin [ Hari Bhajan ... ]
Japa Dhyana Bina Sam Yoga Nahin
Prabhu Darsha Bina Pragyana Nahin
Daya Dharma Bina Sath Karma Nahin
Bhagawan Bina Koi Apna Nahin
Hari Naam Bina Paramatma Nahin
meaning: O Mind, understand that there is no peace without chanting the glory of the Lord Hari, which itself is Bliss. There is no progress without loving devotion to the Lord and no liberation without service to the feet of the Guru. There is no equanimity of mind without remembering the Lord's name and meditation. There is no integrated awareness without the Lord's vision. No deed or action can be deemed good if performed bereft of righteousness and compassion. Only the Lord is one's own, and no one else. There is no realization of the Supreme Consciousness without chanting the Lord's name.

title: Hari Bol Hari Bol Hari
lyrics:
Hari Bol Hari Bol Hari Hari Bol
Mukunda Madhava Govinda Bol
Hari Bol Hari Bol Hari Hari Bol
Keshava Madhava Govinda Bol
meaning: Contemplate on the name and meditate on the Lotus Feet of Lord Hari. Worship the divine Flutist, Lord Madhava (Krishna). Sing the glory of Lord Keshava.

title: Hari Bolo Harey Rama Naam
lyrics:
Hari Bolo Harey Rama Naam
Hari Bolo Harey Krishna Naam
Hari Bolo Sathya Sai Ram
Hari Bolo Harey Rama Naam
meaning: Chant the many names of the Lord Hari, Rama, Krishna and Sathya Sai.

title: Hari Guna Gaana Karo Mana
lyrics:
Hari Guna Gaana Karo Mana Mero
Sai Guna Gaana Karo Mana Mero
Harey Rama Harey Krishna Krishna Krishna Sai Krishna
Sai Guna Gaana Karo Mana Mero (2)
meaning: Oh Mind! Sing blissfully the divine attributes of Hari, Rama, Krishna and Sairam.

title: Hari Guna Gao Hari Naama
lyrics:
Hari Guna Gao Hari Naama Gao
Nanda Ananda Hari Naama Re [ Hari Guna ... ]
Japana Manana Karo Hari Naama Re 
Shravana Smarana Karo Hari Naama Re
Sai Om Sai Om Bhajo Mana Re
meaning:
Sing the glorious name of the Lord Hari. He grants bliss to all. Chant, contemplate, hear, and meditate on His name. O Mind, chant the name of Lord Sai.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Hari Guru Natha Prabhu Guru
lyrics:
Hari Guru Natha Prabhu Guru Natha Partheesha Natha 
Sri Sathya Sai Guru Natha
Talli Tandriyu Neevey Kadaa Daari Chupe Guru Devudu Kadaa
Narayana Govinda Mukunda Maaku Prapanchamu Neevey Kadaa
Nanda Sunanda Nanda Mukunda Brindavana Chandha
Sri Sathya Sai Guru Natha
meaning: Let us worship Sri Sathya Sai as our preceptor, the one who is both Mother and Father, the Divine Master who guides on our path of Spiritual progress. There is no other world for us except You dear Lord Sai. You are verily Lord Krishna, the dear child of Nanda. You are none other than Narayana glorified by the names Govinda and Mukunda, the pleasing child of Brindavana.

title: Hari Hari Bhajo Mana Sai
lyrics:
Hari Hari Bhajo Mana Sai Ram Bhajorey
Sai Ram Bhajo Mana Sai Krishna Bhajorey [ Hari Hari ... ]
Mukunda Madhava Vittala Bhajorey
Govinda Govinda Madhava Bhajorey
meaning: O Mind, sing the glory of Lord Hari who incarnated as Lord Rama, Krishna, Vittala and Lord Sai.

title: Hari Hari Govinda Narayana
lyrics:
Hari Hari Govinda Narayana
Sri Hari Bol Jaya Hari Bol [ Hari Hari ... ]
Harey Rama Harey Krishna Prashanthi Raja Ram
Sai Ram Sai Ram Sai Ram Bolo
meaning: Sing the Glory of the Lord Hari who is also known by different names Govinda, Narayana, Rama, Krishna. Sing the praises of Sai Ram who is the Divine Master of Prashanthi Nilayam.

title: Hari Hari Hari Hari Hari
lyrics:
Hari Hari Hari Hari Hari Hari Bolo
Hari Hari Ke Gun Gao
Govinda Govinda Govinda Bolo
Govinda Ke Gun Gao
Sai Ram Bolo Sai Shyam Bolo
Sai Ram Gun Gao
Govinda Govinda Govinda Bolo [ Govinda Ke ... ]
meaning: Sing the Holy Name and divine attributes of Lord Hari, Govinda who has incarnated as Lord Rama, Krishna and Sai.

title: Hari Hari Hari Hari Smaran
lyrics:
Hari Hari Hari Hari Smaran Karo
Hari Charana Kamal Dhyan Karo [ Hari Hari ... ]
Murali Madhava Seva Karo
Murahara Giridhari Bhajana Karo
meaning: Let the Mind dwell incessantly on the Lotus Feet of Hari, let the hands indulge in the service of Madhava who holds Flute in His Hands, Let the mouth sing the Glory of the One who vanquished the demon Mura and lifted the Mountain with a finger.

title: Hari Hari Narayana
lyrics:
Hari Hari Narayana
Hari Govinda Narayana
Hari Gopala Narayana
Hari Hari Narayana
Hrishikesha Narayana
Partheesha Narayana
meaning: Worship Lord Narayana who is none other than Hari, Govinda, Gopala, the master of senses and who has incarnated in Parthi as Lord Sai.

title: Hari Hari Om Shiva Shankara
lyrics:
Hari Hari Om Shiva Shankara Om
Narayana Hari Om (2)
Keshava Hey Shiva Madhava Hey
Narayana Hari Om (2)
Paramatma Antaryami
Narayana Hari Om (3)
meaning: Meditate on the primordial sound Om and chant the divine names of the Lord - Hari, Shiva, Shankara, Narayana, Keshava and Madhava. Lord Narayana is the indweller, the Supreme Consciousness.

title: Hari Hari Sumiran Hari Hari
lyrics:
Hari Hari Sumiran Hari Hari Bhajo Man
Hari Hi Tero Tan Man Aur Dhan [ Hari Hari ... ]
Tulsidas Bhajey Ramam Ramam
Meera Daasi Bhaja Govindam
Hari Bin Jeevan Kaisa Jeevan
Hari Charanan Mey Arpan Kar Man
meaning: O Mind, meditate upon the name of Lord Hari, who is your body, mind and wealth. Lord Hari's devotees Tulasidas sang Rama's name and Meera sang Govinda's name (Krishna). This life without Hari is not worth it. O Mind, surrender at the feet of Hari.

title: Hari Mhana Tuhi Govinda Mhana Tuhi Gopala Mhana Tuhi Narayana
lyrics:
Hari Mhana Tuhi Govinda Mhana Tuhi Gopala Mhana Tuhi Narayana
Govinda Gopala Hari Narayana
Shyama Mhana Radha Shyama Mhana Radha Shyama Mhana Sai Shyama Mhana
Shyama Mhana Ghanashyama Mhana Megha Shyama Mhana Sai Shyama Mhana
Esha Mhana Sarvesha Mhana Partheesha Mhana Sayeesha Mhana
Govinda Gopala Hari Narayana (3)
meaning: O Lord Hari, You are mine and mine alone. You are Krishna, Narayana, Govinda, Gopala, Shyama. You are the Lord of the Lords, Sathya Sai of Puttaparthi. We sing Your various names in rapture.

title: Hari Naam Gaate Chalo Sai
lyrics:
Hari Naam Gaate Chalo Sai Naam Gaate Chalo
Madhava Govinda Govinda Madhava Naam Gaate Chalo [ Hari Naam ... ]
Govinda Vittala Gopala Vittala
Jaya Parthi Vittala Jaya Sai Vittala (2) [ Madhava Govinda ... ]
meaning: Let every moment be spent in singing and contemplating on the Lord's name Hari, Madhava, Govinda, Gopala, Vittala and Sai who dwells in Parthi.

title: Hari Narayana Govinda
lyrics:
Hari Narayana Govinda (2)
Hari Narayana Duritha Nivarana
Hari Narayana Govinda
Keshava Madhava Govinda
Govinda Govinda
Govinda Hari (Sai) Govinda
meaning: Contemplate on the sweet names of the Lord Narayana - Hari, Govinda, Keshava and Madhava. Chant the Holy name of Sai, who is verily Narayana, the one who dispels the negative consequences of our deeds.

title: Hari Narayana Hari Narayana
lyrics:
Hari Narayana Hari Narayana
Nithya Niranjana Sai Narayana
Narahari Roopa Namo Narayana
Rajeeva Lochana Sai Narayana
meaning: Glory to Lord Narayana, the eternally pure one who incarnated as Lord Narasimha. Salutations to the lotus-eyed Lord Sai who is verily Lord Narayana.

title: Hari Narayana Hari Narayana
lyrics:
Hari Narayana Hari Narayana
Hari Narayana Sai Narayana
Hari Narayana Hari Narayana
Jaya Hari (Sai) Narayana Narayana
meaning: Sing the glory of Lord Narayana and Hari (names of Lord Vishnu). Victory to Lord Sai who is verily Lord Narayana.

title: Hari Narayana Hari Narayana Hari
lyrics:
Hari Narayana Hari Narayana Hari Narayana Bhajorey (2)
Shyama Sundara Madana Gopala
Satchidananda Sai Gopala
Gopalana Gopi Gopalana Gopi Gopalana Bhajorey
Narayana Hari Narayana Hari Narayana Bhajorey
Hari Narayana Bhajorey (4)
meaning: O Mind, sing the Glory of Lord Narayana also known as Hari, who has descended on Earth as the dark-complexioned and enchanting Gopala (Krishna). He is the very embodiment of Truth, Awareness and Bliss and the one who protects the cows and the Gopis.

title: Hari Om Ananda Narayana
lyrics:
Hari Om Ananda Narayana
Narayana Hari (Sai) Narayana [ Hari Om ... ]
Triloka Palana Narayana
Parthi Nivasa Narayana
meaning: Glory to Lord Narayana, sustainer of the three worlds, embodiment of Bliss and the source of the Primordial sound 'Om'. He is none other than Lord Sai who dwells in Parthi.

title: Hari Om Hari Om Hari
lyrics:
Hari Om Hari Om Hari Om Narayana (2)
Shanthakara Bhujanga Shayana Padmanabha Narayana
Lakshmi Ramana Kamala Nayana Sai Natha Narayana
Hari Om Hari Om Hari Om Narayana
meaning: Glory to the Lord Narayana, the one who is resting on the Celestial Serpent Adisesha and the one who is the personification of serenity. He is the lotus-eyed one who is the beloved of Goddess of wealth (Lakshmi). He is none other than Lord Sai of Parthi.

title: Hari Om Namah Shivaya
lyrics:
Hari Om Namah Shivaya
Shiva Shiva Shankara Hara Parameshwara Sayeeshwaraya Namah Om (2)
meaning: Chant the mantra "Hari Om Namah Shivaya". Let us offer our obeisance to Lord Shiva who bestows auspiciousness and is the Lord of the Lords. He has presently incarnated as Lord Sathya Sai.

title: Hari Om Namah Shivaya (2)
lyrics:
Hari Om Namah Shivaya (2)
Hari Om Hari Om Hari Om Namah Shivaya (2)
meaning: Chant "Hari Om Namah Shivaya". Lord Shiva is the embodiment of auspiciousness and the origin of the primordial sound Om.

title: Hari Om Namo Shiva Shakthi
lyrics:
Hari Om Namo Shiva Shakthi Namo
Sadguru Sri Sathya Sai Namo
Hari Om Namo Sita Rama Namo
Jaya Sadguru Sri Sathya Sai Namo
Hari Om Namo Radhey Shyam Namo
Jaya Sadguru Sri Sathya Sai Namo
meaning: Let us offer our salutations to our sacred preceptor Sathya Sai who is none other than the incarnation of Shiva and Energy Principle Shakthi, Sita Rama as well as Radhey Shyam.

title: Hari Om Tat Sath Namah
lyrics:
Hari Om Tat Sath Namah Shivaya
Sai Om Tat Sath Namah Shivaya [ Hari Om ... ]
Shiva Shiva Shivaya Namah Shivaya
Sai Om Tat Sath Namah Shivaya
Hari Om Tat Sath Namah Shivaya
Sai Om Tat Sath Namah Shivaya
Shiva Shiva Shivaya Namah Shivaya
Hari Om Tat Sath Namah Shivaya
Sai Om Tat Sath Namah Shivaya
meaning: Understand O Mind, the Mantra 'Namah Shivaya' is the embodiment of that Supreme Effulgent Consciousness. Lord Shiva Himself is the embodiment of that Supreme Effulgent Consciousness.

title: Hari Sri Ganapathi Om
lyrics:
Hari Sri Ganapathi Om
Harey Ganapathi Om
Vishwadhara Vighna Vinashaka
Veera Ganapathi Om
Harey Ganapathi Om
Veera Ganapathi Om Om Om
meaning: Glory to the Lord of Ganaas (Lord Shiva's army), Lord Ganesha, the valiant one who is the very basis of the universe and who is the remover of obstacles.

title: He Is Lord
lyrics:
I Got Something To Tell You
You Might Not Want To Know
But Jesus Christ Is Lord Of All
And This I'll Tell You So
He Is Lord (4x)

Got Something Else To Tell You
You Really Ought To Know
So Is Allah And Krishna Too
Sai Baba Is My Lord
He Is Lord (4x)

Choose Any Name And Any Form
He Answers To Them All
Cuz God Is Love And Love Is God
He Wants To Hear You Call
So Find The Peace And Love Inside
Indeed Its Who You Are
See The Good That's All Around
Its Really Not That Far

Got Another Thing To Tell You
Its Gonna Make You Glow
He Lives Right Down Inside Your Heart
... He's Never Gonna Go (2x)
He Is Lord (4x)

Choose Any Name And Any Form
He Answers To Them All
Cuz God Is Love And Love Is God
He Wants To Hear You Call
So Find The Peace And Love Inside
Indeed Its Who You Are
See The Good That's All Around
Its Really Not That Far
Cuz He Is Love (4x)

Got One More Thing To Tell You
You Might Not Think Its So
But He Lives Through Each One Of Us
We're Really One In All
He Is Lord (4x)

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Hey Akhilandeshwari Ma
lyrics:
Hey Akhilandeshwari Ma
Anatha Rakshaki Ma
Chamundeshwari Karuna Sagari
Palaya Maam Dehi
Hey Tribhuvana Palini Ma
Hey Trishoola Dharini Ma
Jaya Ma Jaya Ma Jaya Ma
Jagadeeshwari Sai Ma
Partheeshwari Sai Ma
meaning:
Glory to Mother of the Universe, the ocean of mercy, and the savior of the unfortunate. She holds a trident and protects and preserves all the three worlds. Glory to Mother Sai of Parthi.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Hey Anatha Nath Sai Tum
lyrics:
Hey Anatha Nath Sai Tum Ho Antaryami
Tum Ho Merey Bhagawan
Deena Dukha Bhanjana Sahara Do Mujhey
O Merey Sai Bhagawan
Hrudaya Mandir Mey Aao Sai Merey
Deejo Krupa Vardaan [ Tum Ho ... ]
meaning: Oh Sai! You are verily my Lord, for You are the indweller and champion of distraught and helpless. Oh Lord! Take up my cause for You are the one who destroys the sorrows of the forlorn. Enter the temple of my heart and shower Your blessings.

title: Hey Bhagawan Sai Bhagawan
lyrics:
Hey Bhagawan Sai Bhagawan
Daya Karo Bhagawan
Krupa Karo Bhagawan
Janana Marana Bhaya Shoka Nivarana
Deena Janon Ke Pran
Patitha Pavana Paapa Nivarana
Sai Nath Bhagawan [ Daya Karo ... ]
meaning: Salutations to You O Lord Sai, the Lord of Puttaparthi, please have compassion on us and deliver us from the fear of life and death. O Lord Supreme, the compassionate one who has come as a savior of the less privileged and deprived, deliver us from our sins.

title: Hey Brahma Hey Vishnu
lyrics:
Hey Brahma Hey Vishnu
Dayamaya Hey Maheshwara
Sathya Sai Parameshwara [ Hey Brahma ... ]
Maha Shakthi Shiva Sai Shankara
Poorna Teja Sai Avatara
meaning: Glory to Lord Sathya Sai who is the Creator, Sustainer and Destroyer and the Supreme Sovereign Lord who is full of compassion. Lord Sathya Sai is the Total Incarnation of the Supreme Energy.

title: Hey Brij Bal Yadu Nanda
lyrics:
Hey Brij Bal Yadu Nanda Gopal
Shyama Sundara Mohana Gopal [ Hey Brij ... ]
Yashoda Ke Bal Yadu Nanda Gopal
Gopal Gopal Gokula Bal
meaning: Oh Lord Gopala, You are the son of Nanda and Yashoda and of the Yadava lineage. You are the one who moved about in the thick bushes of Brindavan, is of dark complexion and attractive to behold.

title: Hey Chinmayi Sai Janani
lyrics:
Hey Chinmayi Sai Janani
Mata Jaganmayi Sai Janani
Shabdha Brahmamayi Sai Janani
Parathparamayi Sai Janani
Shiva Shakthimayi Sai Janani
Nithyanandamayi Sai Janani
meaning: Oh Mother Sai! You are that Pure Consciousness, Mother of the entire universe and the originator of the Primordial sound 'Om' from which this Universe has come into being. Oh Mother! You are superior even to the best, the embodiment of Matter and Energy principle and the ever-blissful.

title: Hey Deena Dayalu Harey Harey
lyrics:
Hey Deena Dayalu Harey Harey Sai Ram Harey Harey
Sai Ram Ghana Shyam Sai Ram
Hey Bandha Vimochana Rama Harey
Hey Paapa Samharaka Sai Harey
Sai Ram Harey Harey [ Sai Ram Ghana Shyam ]
meaning: Glory be to the Lord Sai Rama who has a soft corner to the deprived ones, the One who relieves us of Bondages of the World, the annihilator of Sins.

title: Hey Deena Dayalu Sai Rama
lyrics:
Hey Deena Dayalu Sai Rama Ram
Parama Krupalu Sai Rama Ram
Sai Rama Rama Rama Ram (2)
Hey Patitha Pavana Sai Rama Ram
Bhaktha Vatsala Sai Rama Ram [ Sai Rama ... ]
meaning: Repeat the name of Sai Rama, the redeemer of the forlorn, the ever compassionate, the uplifter of the oppressed and the one who is ever endearing to His devotees.

title: Hey Gananatha Gajanana
lyrics:
Hey Gananatha Gajanana
Heramba Gajanana [ Hey Gananatha ... ]
Gowri Nandana Gajanana Gajanana Hey Gajanana
Siddhi Vinayaka Gajanana
meaning: Glory to Lord Ganesha, Lord of the Ganaas (Shiva's army) and the dear son of Mother Gowri. Lord Ganesha, also known as Heramba, bestows spiritual powers.

title: Hey Giridhari Gopala
lyrics:
Hey Giridhari Gopala
Keshava Madhava Gopala [ Hey Giridhari ... ]
Nanda Mukunda Gopala
Navaneetha Chora Gopala
Antaryami Gopala
Hrudaya Vihari Gopala
Aao Pyaarey Muraliwale Darshan Do Prabhu Gopala
meaning: Oh Lord Gopala (Krishna) also known by names Giridhari, Keshava, Madhava, Mukunda, You are the indweller of our hearts. Oh loving Lord holding the Flute, give me Your vision, Oh Lord Gopala.

title: Hey Giridhari Hey Nandalal
lyrics:
Hey Giridhari Hey Nandalal
Yashoda Tanaya Hey Nandalal [ Hey Giridhari ... ]
Radha Pyaarey Hey Nandalal
Nandalal Nandalal
meaning:
Praises be to the son of Nanda and Yashoda, who is dear to Radha and the One who lifted the Mountain to save his tribesmen.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Hey Govinda Hey Gopala Hey
lyrics:
Hey Govinda Hey Gopala Hey Madhava Madhusudhana
Aao Aao Prabhu Aao Aao
Mujhey Aakar Darsha Dikhao [ Hey Govinda ... ]
Sathya Dharma Shanthi Prema Swaroopa
Aao Prabhu Aao Aao [ Mujhey Aakar ... ]
meaning: Come, O dear Lord Gopala (Krishna), the destroyer of the demon Madhu, please come and grace us with the vision of Your beautiful form. You are the very embodiment of Truth, Righteousness, Peace and Love.

title: Hey Indushekara Raja Shiva Raja
lyrics:
Hey Indushekara Raja Shiva Raja Shankara
Hey Indushekara Shambho Shiva Raja Shankara
Om Hara Hara Shiva Shiva Pinaka Vaibhava Raja Shankara
Shiva Raja Shankara
meaning: Sing the Glory of Sovereign Lord Shankara (Shiva) who adorns the crescent moon on His head. He is the most auspicious one who holds the Pinaka Bow in His hands.

title: Hey Kamala Vadana Sai Ranga
lyrics:
Hey Kamala Vadana Sai Ranga
Kaivalya Panduranga (2)
Sai Gopala Ghana Ghana Neela
Kutila Kuntala Tribhuvana Pala
Brahma Vishnu Maheshwara Roopa (2)
Maheshwara Roopa [ Brahma Vishnu ... ]
Maya Lola Brahma Swaroopa
meaning: Hail the lotus-faced Lord Ranga who is the Absolute reality. Sing in praise of Lord Gopala of the complexion of thick dark clouds, of curly hair and who is the sustainer of the three worlds. He is verily the Embodiment of the Trinity and who uses Illusion as His instrument to destroy the sinner.

title: Hey Krishna Hey Krishna
lyrics:
Hey Krishna Hey Krishna
Vittala Jaya Panduranga Panduranga
Nanda Kishora Shyama Gopala
Shyama Gopala Madana Gopala (2)
Vittala Jaya Panduranga Panduranga
Panduranga Panduranga Panduranga Panduranga (3) [Vittala Jaya ...]
meaning: Chant the names of Panduranga, Vittala, and of the dark complexioned, enchanting Gopala who is the son of Nanda.

title: Hey Krishna Madhava Govinda Gopala
lyrics:
Hey Krishna Madhava Govinda Gopala
Mathura Natha Madana Gopala
Nanda Mukunda Shyama ( Sai ) Gopala
Krishna Harey Jaya Krishna Harey Jaya Hari Govinda Krishna Harey (2)
meaning: Chant the various names of Gopala, Govinda, Krishna, Madhava, the One who gives delight and the one who is the Lord of Mathura. Glory be to Him.

title: Hey Madhava Hey Madhusudhana
lyrics:
Hey Madhava Hey Madhusudhana
Damodara Hey Muralidhara [ Hey Madhava ... ]
Mana Mohana Hey Yadu Nandana
Deenavana Bhava Bhaya Bhanjana
meaning: Glory be to the Lord Madhava, who vanquished demon Madhu and who holds the Flute in His hands. Lord Damodara removes the fear of repetitive births, has an Enchanting Form and the source of succor to the underprivileged.

title: Hey Madhava Yadu Nandana
lyrics:
Hey Madhava Yadu Nandana
Mana Mohana Hey Madhusudhana
Janardhana Radha Jeevana
Gopalana Gopi Ranjana
meaning: Glory to Lord Krishna, the beloved son of the Yadhava clan, the one who vanquished the demon Madhu. He is the one who enchants the mind of His devotees, the one who is the very life of Radha. He is the protector of the cows and is the source of delight to the Gopis.

title: Hey Nanda Nanda Gopala Ananda
lyrics:
Hey Nanda Nanda Gopala Ananda Nanda Gopala (2)
Hey Nanda Nanda Ananda Nanda Yadu Nanda Nanda Gopala
meaning: Glory to the divine child Gopala (Krishna), the one who gives delight to Nanda, who belongs to the Yadava lineage and is ever blissful.

title: Hey Nandalala Gopala
lyrics:
Hey Nandalala Gopala
(Ghana) Shyama Gopal Sai Gopal [ Hey Nandalala ... ]
Giridhara Gopala Sai Gopala [ Shyam Gopal ... ]
meaning: Sing the Glory of Lord Gopala (Krishna) who is of dark complexion, the dear son of Nanda and the one who protected everyone by holding the Govardhana mountain with His little finger.

title: Hey Nandalala Hey Vraja Bala
lyrics:
Hey Nandalala Hey Vraja Bala
Maakhan Chora Yashoda Ke Bala
Brindavan Ke Gokula Bala
Daya Karo Hey Sai Nandalala [ Maakhan Chora ... ]
meaning: O Lord Krishna, son of Nanda and of Yashoda, You are the one who stole butter from the houses of Gopis and who moved about the gardens of Brindavan. Please have mercy on us , O Lord Sai, You are verily Lord Krishna.

title: Hey Nirakari Allah Hey Avatari
lyrics:
Hey Nirakari Allah Hey Avatari Prabhu Ram
Janam Janam Merey Saath Raho Tum Sathya Sai Bhagawan [ Hey Nirakari ... ]
Nanak Yesu Buddha Mahavir
Sab Hai Sai Bhagawan [ Janam Janam ... ]
meaning: Oh Lord Sai, be with us through many lives. You are the Formless Allah, Guru Nanak, Yesu, Buddha, Mahavir and every other form of Divine Personage.

title: Hey Parthi Pureesha Prashanthi Vasa
lyrics:
Hey Parthi Pureesha Prashanthi Vasa Sai Murari
Sai Murari Sai Murari Sai Murari Sai Murari [ Hey Parthi Pureesha ... ]
Hey Hrishikesha Hrudaya Nivasa Hrudaya Nivasa [ Sai Murari ... ]
meaning: The Lord of Parthi, Sai, the resident of Prashanthi Nilayam, is the indweller of every heart. He is Lord Sai who also dwells at Hrishikesh and is verily Lord Krishna who annihilated the demon Mura.

title: Hey Parthi Pureesha Prashanthi Vasa
lyrics:
Hey Parthi Pureesha Prashanthi Vasa Sadguru Sai Ram
Sadguru Sai Ram (Hey)
Harey Ram Harey Ram Harey Ram Harey Ram
Harey Ram Sai Ram
Hey Anatha Natha Deena Bandhu Sadguru Sai Ram
Sadguru Sai Ram (Hey)
Harey Ram Harey Ram Harey Ram Harey Ram
Harey Ram Sai Ram
meaning: Lord Sai Ram is our sacred Preceptor who dwells in Prashanthi Nilayam in Parthi and the refuge of forlorn. Repeat the name of Lord Rama who is none other than Lord Sai.

title: Hey Ram Bhagawan
lyrics:
Hey Ram Bhagawan
Hey Karuna Sindhu Ram
Hey Deena Bandhu Sai Ram
Bhaktha Premi O Karuna Karo
Daya (Mujhey Krupa) Karo Bhagawan
Hey Janaki Jeevana Ram
Hey Parthi Pureeshwara Ram [ Hey Deena Bandhu ... ]
meaning: Let Your benedictions be on us devotees, O Lord Rama. You are the ocean of compassion and refuge of the forlorn. Please shower Your grace on us, O merciful one. You are the very life of Mother Janaki. You are none other than Lord Sai, the Lord of Parthi.

title: Hey Ram Hey Guna Dham
lyrics:
Hey Ram Hey Guna Dham
Raghava Sundara Ram
Janaki Jeevana Ram [ Hey Ram ... ]
Kausalya Tanaya Raghukula Ram
Ayodhya Shiromani Dasharatha Ram
Jaya Jaya Ram Jaya Sai Ram
meaning: Glory to Lord Rama, the repository of virtues, the most beautiful one, the descendant of the Raghu dynasty and the very life of Mother Janaki (Sita). Lord Rama is the crest jewel of Ayodhya and the son of Mother Kausalya and King Dasharatha. Victory to Lord Rama and Lord Sai who is verily Lord Rama.

title: Hey Ram Parthi Pureeshwara Ram
lyrics:
Hey Ram Parthi Pureeshwara Ram
Hey Ram Vaidehi Priya Ram
Hey Patitha Pavana Sai Ram
Manimaya Bhooshana Ram
Kausalyatmaja Ram
Ravana Mardhana Ram
Pavana Putra Priya Ram (Hey) [ Patitha Pavana ... ]
meaning: Lord Rama, You are the loving prince of Mother Kausalya and beloved Sita. You look handsome adorned with precious gems and jewels. O Slayer of demon King Ravana, You are the redeemer of the downtrodden and worshipped by Hanuman.

title: Hey Rama Dootha Hey Rama
lyrics:
Hey Rama Dootha Hey Rama Bhaktha Hey Rama Daasa Namo Namo
Sita Mata Shoka Vinasha
Anatha Natha Namo Namo
Maruti Raya Mahanubhava
Ati Balavanta (Veera Anjaneya) Namo Namo
meaning: Salutations to Hanuman, the messenger, devotee and the servant of Lord Rama. Salutations to the one who destroyed Mother Sita's agony. Salutations to Maruti, the guide to the orphaned, the Supreme being and the brave one who possesses magnificent strength.

title: Hey Rama Narayana
lyrics:
Hey Rama Narayana
Harey Krishna Janardhana [ Hey Rama ... ]
Nithyananda Brahmananda
Krishna Madhusudhana [ Harey Krishna ... ]
meaning: Glory to Lord Rama and Krishna who are the incarnations of Lord Narayana. Lord Krishna is the motivator, personification of Supreme Bliss and the one who vanquished demon Madhu.

title: Hey Sai Jagannatha Hey Sai
lyrics:
Hey Sai Jagannatha Hey Sai Jagannatha Hey Sai Jagannatha
Deena Bandhu Sai Natha Karuna Sindhu Jagannatha
Hey Sai Jagannatha Hey Sai Jagannatha
Hey Shirdi Jagannatha Hey Parthi Jagannatha Hey Sai Jagannatha
meaning: Repeat the sacred name of Sai, the Lord of the Universe, the refuge of the forlorn, the ocean of compassion and the one who dwells at Shirdi and Parthi.

title: Hey Sai Ranga Hey Panduranga
lyrics:
Hey Sai Ranga Hey Panduranga
Karunanta Ranga Hrudayanta Ranga [ Hey Sai ... ]
Sri Ranga Ranga Jaya Ranga Ranga
Ananda Ranga Sadananda Ranga [ Karunanta Ranga ... ]
meaning: O Lord Sai Ranga, You are infinitely merciful. Reciting Your name creates waves of sublime feelings and emotions in the heart. Glory to Lord Sai Ranga, who is all bliss and who is ever in bliss.

title: Hey Shesha Shayana Narayana
lyrics:
Hey Shesha Shayana Narayana
Veda Bharana Narayana
Bhava Bhaya Harana Narayana
Pavana Charana Narayana
Narayana Hari (Sai) Narayana (3)
meaning: Glory to Lord Narayana who reclines on the serpent Adi Sesha and the one who fosters Vedas. Repeat the Holy name of Narayana whose sacred feet dispels the fear of repetitive births.

title: Hey Shiva Nandana Jaya Jaga
lyrics:
Hey Shiva Nandana Jaya Jaga Vandana
Jaya Gowri Sutha Paahi Gajanana
Parvathi Nandana Parama Daya Ghana
Paahi Prabho Maam Paahi Gajanana
meaning: O Lord Ganesha, the son of Lord Shiva and Mother Gowri, the entire Universe bows down to You in reverence. Save me, O the elephant-faced son of Mother Parvathi, for You are the one with Supreme compassion.

title: Hey Shiva Shankara Namami Shankara
lyrics:
Hey Shiva Shankara Namami Shankara Shiva Shankara Shambho
Hey Girija Pathi Bhavani Shankara
Shiva Shankara Shambho (3)
meaning: Prostrations to Lord Shiva or Shankara, the One who bestows auspiciousness. He is the Lord of Mother Girija who is also known as Bhavani.

title: Hey Shyama Sundara Hey Sai
lyrics:
Hey Shyama Sundara Hey Sai Sundara
Parthi Pureeshwara Hey Sai Sundara [ Hey Shyam ... ]
Neela Megha Sundara Neeraja Lochana
Brahmanda Nayaka Hey Sai Sundara
meaning: Glory to the Lord Sai who has charming looks and is the Lord of Parthi. He has the complexion of dark blue clouds, lotus eyed and the Lord of the Entire Universe.

title: Hey Vishwa Janani Sri Sai Janani
lyrics:
Hey Vishwa Janani Sri Sai Janani
Bhavani Jagadambe Ma (2)
Tribhuvana Palini Hey Karunamayi
Uma Sharadamba (2)
Raksha Karo Sai Ma
meaning: Protect us O Mother Sai, You are the creator of this Earth, the sustainer of the three worlds and the personification of compassion. O Mother, You are known by the names such as Bhavani, Uma and Sharada.

title: Hey Vishwa Pala Gopala
lyrics:
Hey Vishwa Pala Gopala
Hey Deena Pala Gopala
Meera Ke Prabhu Giridhara Bala
Giridhara Bala Sai Gopala
meaning: Sing the glory of Lord Gopala who sustains the whole Universe and the protector of the downtrodden. He held aloft the Govardhana Mountain and is the Lord of Meera. He is verily Lord Sai.

title: Hey Vishwanath Hey Gowri Nath
lyrics:
Hey Vishwanath Hey Gowri Nath Hey Sai Nath Bhagawan
Daya Karo Daya Karo Daya Karo Bhagawan [ Hey Vishwanath ... ]
Deena Dayala Sai Ghana Shyama
Patitha Pavana Hey Sai Rama [ Daya Karo ... ]
meaning: Show mercy on us, Oh Lord of the Universe and of Mother Gowri. Lord Sai is the redeemer of the downtrodden and provides succor to the weak.

title: Hine ma tov
lyrics:
Hine ma tov u’ma-nayim, Shevet ach-im gam ya-chad (low 2x)
Hine ma tov, Shevet ach-im gam ya-chad (high)
Hine ma tov, Shevet ach-im gam ya-chad (low)
Happy are they who in friendship willingly work together (low 2x)
Happy are they who in peace united, work together, willingly work together (low)

Hine ma tov u’ma-nayim, Shevet ach-im gam ya-chad (high 2x)
Hine ma tov, hine ma tov lai lai lai lai lai lai lai lai lai lai lai (2)
Shalu Shalom Yerushalayim (4)
Pray for the Peace of Israel
Pray for the Peace of Ishmael
Pray for the Peace of all the world
And all the world shall live in Peace
Shalom (6) Shalu Shalom Yerushalayim
Shalom (6) Shalu Shalom Yerushalayim
Hevenu shalom aleichem (3) {faster each time}
Hevenu shalom, shalom shalom aleichem (3x, 3rd time end high)
meaning:
How good and how pleasant it is for us all to be of one heart. How good it is, for us all to be of one heart. For there the Lord brings blessing life forevermore. How good it is and how pleasant for brethren to dwell together. How good it is for brethren to dwell together.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Hrudaya Spandana Sai Vandana
lyrics:
Hrudaya Spandana Sai Vandana
Gaana Lola Prabhu Sai
Baajath Taal Mrudanga Veena
Muraliya Madhura Vadya Manjira
Ananda Mangala Sai
meaning:
Let us offer our prayerful salutations to Lord Sai with every beat of our heart. He is the lover of music. Various sweet musical instruments such as Mrudang, Veena, the Flute and the Manjira resound in His glory. May we be engrossed in the auspicious bliss of chanting the Holy name of Lord Sai.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Hu Allah, Allah Hu Allah
lyrics:
Hu Allah, Allah Hu Allah, Allah Hu Allah, Allah Hu
Let my heart reflect Thy light Lord
As the moon reflects the light of the sun in love always in love
Hu Allah, Allah Hu Allah, Allah Hu Allah, Allah Hu

title: Hum Sab Boley Namah Shivaya
lyrics:
Hum Sab Boley Namah Shivaya Hara Hara Hara Hara Mahadeva, Hara Hara Hara Hara Mahadeva
Terey Dhyan Mey Khoyen Hum Sab Nis Din Tera Bhajan Karoon
Hara Hara Hara Hara Mahadeva, Hara Hara Hara Hara Mahadeva
Tum Hi Badey Dayalu Ho Shankar Tum Hi Badey Krupalu
Sathya Sai Hai Naam Tumhara Jag Ke Tum Rakhwaley Ho [ Hara Hara ... ]
Namah Shivaya Namah Shivaya (8)
meaning:
Let us all chant the Holy mantra "Om Namah Shivaya", the name of the Supreme Lord Shiva. O Lord, let us lose ourselves meditating on You and sing Your praises ceaselessly. You are verily Lord Sathya Sai, the embodiment of compassion and the protector of the entire universe.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Hum Sab Milkar Mangal Gaayen
lyrics:
Hum Sab Milkar Mangal Gaayen
Sai Bhagawan Sathya Sai Bhagawan (2)
Sab Sukh Jeevana Sai Bhagawan
Sab Dukha Harana Sai Bhagawan
Sathya Swaroopa Sai Bhagawan
Hrudaya Nivasa Sai Bhagawan
Parthi Nivasa Sai Bhagawan

Sai Bhagawan Sathya Sai Bhagawan (5)
meaning: Let us all sing together the glory of Lord Sathya Sai, the one who confers happiness to all and removes misery from everyone's life, the one who is the embodiment of Truth, the indweller of our hearts and the resident of Parthi.

title: Hum Tere Hain Sai Hum Tere Hain
Humko Tumse Pyaar Kitna Sai Tum Hi Jaante
I Am God I Am God
lyrics:
I Am God, I Am God, I Am No Different From God
I Am The Infinite Supreme, The One Reality
I Am Satchidananda Swaroopa
I Am Om Tat Sat Om
I Am Love, I Am Truth, I Am Peace Eternally
I Am Ever Pure Delight, I Am Always Full And Free
Fear And Grief Can Never Touch Me [ I Am Om ... ]

title: I am the Light, the
lyrics:
I am the Light, the Light is within me
I am the Light, I am the Light
I am the Light, the Light is within me
The bells of paradise, I hear them ring
Blessed is the Christ, the Christ born within
The bells of paradise, I hear them sing
Sacred Sai Baba, Sai Baba within
All lights are one, all faiths unite
In the human birth lies, the light of the soul

title: I bow down at the Feet of Ganesha
lyrics:
I bow down at the Feet of Ganesha
Ganesha Ganesha [ I bow down … ]
Ganesha, I Pray, You will clear my way (3) 
Ganesha Ganesha [ I bow down … ]
Jai Ganesha, Sai Ganesha, clear my way to Baba
Jai Ganesha, Sai Ganesha, clear my way to Swami
Jai Ganesha, Sai Ganesha, clear my way to Baba
Ganesha Ganesha

title: I Keep Feeling Your Love
lyrics:
I Keep Feeling Your Love In Me Over And Over Again
And Its Sweeter And Sweeter As The Days Go By
Oh What A Love Between My Sai And I
My Sai And I, My Sai And I

title: In the sunrise
lyrics:
In the sunrise (in the sunrise)
In the sunset (in the sunset)
The spirit is calling me, calling me
In the star light (in the star light)
In the moonshine (in the moonshine)
The spirit is calling me, ooohh

Beloved! (Beloved!), I love you! (I love you!)
Forever! (Forever!), Embrace me! (Embrace me!)
Beloved! (Beloved!), You love me! (You love me!)
Forever! (Forever!), Caring for me! (Caring for me!)

In the wind song (in the wind song)
In the ocean (in the ocean)
The spirit is calling me, calling me
In the mountains (in the mountains)
In the meadows (in the meadows)
The spirit is calling me, ooohh

Beloved! (Beloved!), I love you! (I love you!)
Forever! (Forever!), Embrace me! (Embrace me!)
Beloved! (Beloved!), You love me! (You love me!)
Forever! (Forever!), Caring for me! (Caring for me!)

In the cities (in the cities)
In the people (in the people)
The spirit is calling me, calling me
In their gestures (in their gestures)
In their faces (in their faces)
The spirit is calling me, ooohh

Beloved! (Beloved!), I love you! (I love you!)
Forever! (Forever!), Embrace me! (Embrace me!)
Beloved! (Beloved!), You love me! (You love me!)
Forever! (Forever!), Caring for me! (Caring for me!)

The spirit is calling me, calling me (x3)

title: Jagadambe Devi Bhavani
lyrics:
Jagadambe Devi Bhavani
Jaganmatey Shakthi Durge (2) [ Jagadambe ... ]
Kumara Gananathamba Kalyani Shyamalamba
Janani Durge Varadey Mata
(Amba) Uma Maheshwari Kalavathi [ Jaganmatey ... ]
meaning: Bhavani or Durga is the Goddess and Mother of the entire Universe. Chant the various names of Mother Goddess, Janani, Uma Maheshwari, Sharada, Kalyani, Shyamala, Durga and Kalavathi who confer boons to the devotees.

title: Jagadambige Jaya Jagadeeshwari
lyrics:
Jagadambige Jaya Jagadeeshwari
Taye Parashakthi Parameshwari [ Jagadambige Jaya ... ]
Maye Maha Sai Maheshwari
Niye Vinai Tirkkum Vishweshwari
Unaye Sharanadainden Karunakari
Arulvaye Ananda Lahari Gowri
meaning: Glory be to the Mother of the Universe, Mother of Lord Ganesh and Subrahmanya; Glory to the Mother worshipped as Uma, Durga, Shakti and the consort of Lord Shiva. O Lord Sai, the Mother of all, grant us as our wishes.

title: Jagadashraya Sri Raghu Rama
lyrics:
Jagadashraya Sri Raghu Rama
Jagadodhara Sita Rama [ Jagadashraya Sri ... ]
Parama Pavana Taraka Naama
Sri Rama Shata Koti Pranama
Sai Rama Koti Pranama
Sharanam Sharanam Atma Rama
meaning: Glory to Lord Rama of Raghu dynasty, the sustainer of the entire Universe, whose consort is Mother Sita and who has come to uplift the entire world. Reciting the Lord's name helps cross the vicious cycle of birth and death. We surrender ourselves at Your Lotus feet with countless prostrations, O Lord Sai Rama, the indweller of our Heart.

title: Jagadeesha Harey Jaya Ho
lyrics:
Jagadeesha Harey Jaya Ho
Jagadodhara Jaya Jaya Ho [ Jagadeesha Harey ... ]
Allah Yesu Nanak Sai
Antaryami Buddha Mahavir
Zohrashtra Sarva Dharma Priya Deva
Shanthi Nivasa Sathya Sai Deva (Pra)
Jaya Ho Jaya Ho (2)
meaning: Victory to Lord Sai, the Lord and Redeemer of the Universe. Lord Sathya Sai is the very embodiment of Allah, Jesus Christ, Nanak, Buddha, Mahavira and Zohrashtra. Sai is the indweller and embodies Supreme Peace.

title: Jagadeesha Harey Shiva Shambho
lyrics:
Jagadeesha Harey Shiva Shambho
Samba Shiva Hara Sai Shiva
Hey Tripurari Bhava Bhaya Haari
Parthi Pureeshwara Shiva Shambho [ Samba Shiva ... ]
meaning: Glory to Lord Shiva, the Lord of the Universe whose consort is Amba. He removes the fear of the cycle of Birth and Death. Lord Shiva is the one who destroyed the three cities created by the demons. He has incarnated on this earth as Lord Sai, the Lord of Parthi.

title: Jagadeeshwari Daya Karo Ma
lyrics:
Jagadeeshwari Daya Karo Ma
Shiva Shankari Krupa Karo Ma
Sayeeshwari Raksha Karo Ma
Partheeshwari Bhalaa Karo Ma [ Shiva Shankari ... ]
meaning: Mercy on us, O Mother Goddess of the Universe, may Your benedictions be upon us, O Shankari, consort of Lord Shiva, shower Your blessings and protect us O Sayeeshwari, the Goddess of Parthi.

title: Jagadeeshwari Jaya Mata Bhavani
lyrics:
Jagadeeshwari Jaya Mata Bhavani
Karunya Lavanya Akhilandeshwari [ Jagadeeshwari Jaya ... ]
Hey Shiva Shankari Triloka Palini
Sharanagatha Paripalini Mata
meaning: Mother Bhavani is the Goddess of the entire universe. She sustains the three worlds, compassionate and beautiful. She is the consort of Lord Shiva and takes complete care of all who surrender to Her.

title: Jagadodharini Mata Durga Jagadodharini Ma
lyrics:
Jagadodharini Mata Durga Jagadodharini Ma
Jago Jago Ma Jago Jago Ma Jago Jago Ma Janani
Hey Gowri Devi Rana Chandi Devi
Hey Shiva Ramana Jago Ma (2)
Jago Jagadodharini Ma
meaning: Oh Universal Mother Durga! Awaken us from the slumber of ignorance. You are Mother Gowri and the valiant Chandi devi. Awaken us to the inherent Atmic reality, the charmer of Lord Shiva.

title: Jagamey Sarvam Vishnu Mayam
lyrics:
Jagamey Sarvam Vishnu Mayam
Sadguru Sri Sathya Sai Mayam (2) [ Jagamey ... ]
Omkara Naada Mayam
Om Shiva Shakthi Mayam
Prema Mayam Sai Naama Mayam
Pranavakaara Brahma Mayam
meaning: Lord Vishnu, whose incarnation is our sacred preceptor Sathya Sai, is the Supreme Principle from whom the Primordial sound Om originates and pervades the entire Universe. The Universe is the manifestation of Matter and Energy, of Supreme Love and the name of Sai.

title: Jaganmatey Jagat Janani
lyrics:
Jaganmatey Jagat Janani
Jaya Jagadambe Devi Bhavani
Devi Saraswathi Durga Lakshmi
Mahishasura Samhaarini Mata
meaning: Victory to the Divine Mother who nourishes the entire Universe. You are verily Mother Saraswathi, Durga and Lakshmi and the one who removed demon Mahishasura from the face of the Earth.

title: Jagat Janani Shiva Sai Shankari
lyrics:
Jagat Janani Shiva Sai Shankari
Mata Maheshwari Parvathi Ma
Abhaya Pradayini Gaana Vinodini
Mata Bhavani Ma (Jaya Ma)
Jaya Ma Jaya Ma
Kaali Kapalini Ma (Jaya Ma)
meaning: Glory be to the Mother of the Universe Shankari, Parvathi, Bhavani, the one who confers freedom from fear, one who is delighted by music and the one wearing a garland of skulls.

title: Jagat Palana Jaganmohana
lyrics:
Jagat Palana Jaganmohana
Sundara Sai Gopalana
Munijana Sevitha Madhusudhana [ Jagat Palana ... ]
Keshava Govinda Janardhana
Sridhara Madhava Damodara
Achyutha Anantha Narayana
Sri Sai Krishna Narayana (2) [ Munijana Sevitha ... ]
meaning: Sing the various names of the Lord Krishna, Gopala, Keshava, Govinda, Janardhana, Sridhara, Madhava, Damodara, Achyutha, Anantha, Narayana, and Madhusudhana. He is the nourisher and captivator of the Universe, the one who is handsome and served by saints, who has incarnated as Lord Sai.

title: Jagata Uddharana Parthi Viharana
lyrics:
Jagata Uddharana Parthi Viharana
Tum Ho Mangala Dham (Prabhu)
Jai Sai Ram Jai Sai Ram
Paapa Vimochana Bhava Bhaya Bhanjana
Sundara Nayanabhi Ram [ (Baba) Tum Ho ... ]
Jai Sai Ram Jai Sai Ram
