meaning: O Lord Sai, You are the benefactor of the entire Universe, repository of all virtues. Victory be to Thee, the one with beautiful eyes, destroyer of sins and the vicious cycle of birth and death and the one who dwells at Parthi.

title: Jagatpathey Hari Sai Gopala
lyrics:
Jagatpathey Hari Sai Gopala
Jagadodhara Sai Nandalala
Mathuradhipathey Krishna Gopala
Madhura Madhura Hey Gaana Vilola
Jagadodhara Sai Nandalala
Sai Nandalala Jai Jai Gopala (3)
meaning: Glory to Lord Gopala (Krishna), the Lord and sustainer of the Universe. Victory to Lord Krishna, the King of Mathura, the patron of sweet music and the son of Nanda. Victory to Lord Sai who is verily Lord Krishna.

title: Jago Jago Jago Shankara
lyrics:
Jago Jago Jago Shankara
Jago Jago Jago Sayeeshwara [ Jago Jago ... ]
Haalaahala Dhara Hey Paramesha
Hey Tripurari Jaya Partheesha
Gangadhara Shankara
Gowri Vara Shankara
Bala Gangadhara Shankara
Sayeeshwara Shankara (Sathya)
meaning: Awake us to the inner reality, O bestower of auspiciousness, the supreme Lord who has held the vicious poison in His throat. Lord Shankara (Shiva), the one who holds the sacred Ganges in His matted locks, the consort of Mother Gowri, is the same as Lord Sai who dwells in Parthi.

title: Jai Durga Lakshmi Saraswathi Sai Jaganmata
lyrics:
Jai Durga Lakshmi Saraswathi Sai Jaganmata
Sai Jaganmata Maam Paahi Jaganmata (2)
meaning: Glory to Goddesses Durga, Lakshmi, Saraswathi and Mother Sai, the Divine Mother of the Universe, O Mother Sai, please protect me.

title: Jai Ganaraya Sri Ganaraya
lyrics:
Jai Ganaraya Sri Ganaraya
Jai Ganaraya Sri Ganaraya Mangala Murthy Moriya
Siddhi Vinayaka Mangala Daata
Ashta Vinayaka Mangala Dayaka Mangala Murthy Moriya
Sindhura Vadana Pankaja Charana
Sindhura Vadana Pankaja Charana Ganapathi Bappa Moriya
meaning: Victory to Lord Ganesha, the leader of Shiva's army (Ganas), who confers and is also the personification of auspiciousness. Salutations at Thy lotus feet, O elephant-faced Lord.

title: Jai Ganesh Jai Ganesh Jai
lyrics:
Jai Ganesh Jai Ganesh Jai Ganesha Deva
Sri Ganesha Sri Ganesha Sri Ganesha Deva [ Jai Ganesh … ]
Bhakthoddharana Bhaktha Jana Poshana
Paapa Vinashana Bhaktha Samrakshana
Omkaara Pranava Sri Roopa
Parvathi Nandana Jaya Jagavandana
meaning: Victory to Lord Ganesha, the lord of Ganas who is ever auspicious, always engaged in uplifting, nourishing, redeeming and protecting devotees. He is the source of the primordial sound, Pranava. He is the darling son of Mother Parvathi and is worshipped by the whole world.

title: Jai Ganesha Paahi Maam Sri
lyrics:
Jai Ganesha Paahi Maam Sri Ganesha Raksha Maam
Jai Ganesh Jai Ganesh Jai Ganesha Raksha Maam
Lambodhara Gowri Sutha Jai Ganesha Paahi Maam
Mangala Kara Sankata Hara Jai Ganesha Raksha Maam [ Jai Ganesh Jai Ganesh ...]
meaning: Save me Lord Ganesh, the one with a big belly and the son of Mother Gowri. Protect me O Lord Ganesh, for You destroy the plighted condition of Your devotees and confer prosperity and auspiciousness.

title: Jai Ganesha Vighna Vinashaka
lyrics:
Jai Ganesha Vighna Vinashaka
Dukha Bhanjana Shubha Dayaka
Hey Adi Poojya Gajanana
Gajanana Shubhanana
Lambodhara Paapa Nikhandana
Vighneshwara Bhava Dukha Nashana
Dukha Bhanjana Shubha Dayaka (2)
meaning: Victory to Lord Ganesha, the one who removes obstacles, destroyer of sorrows and the one who grants prosperity. The elephant-faced Lord who is offered the first prayers, has a big belly and He roots out our sins.

title: Jai Hari Bol Jai Sita
lyrics:
Jai Hari Bol Jai Sita Ram Gopi Gopala Bhajo Radhey Shyam
Harey Ram Ram Ram Ghana Shyam Shyam Shyam
Sri Raghu Nandana Sri Rama Daasharathey Jaya Raghu Rama
Nanda Kishora Navaneetha Chora Brindavana Govinda Lala [ Harey Ram Ram ... ]
meaning: Victory to Lord Hari, Lord Rama, chant the name of Lord Gopala. Lord Rama belongs to the Raghu dynasty and is the dear son of King Dasharatha. Lord Krishna is the dear son of Nanda. He is the one who stole butter from houses of Gopis and moved about amongst the thick bushes of Brindavan.

title: Jai Hari Krishna Jai Hari
lyrics:
Jai Hari Krishna Jai Hari Krishna Govardhana Giridhari
Radha Jeevana Radha Mohana
Manjula Kunja Vihari
meaning: Praise be to the Lord Krishna who raised the Govardhana Hill on His little finger, the one who is the consort and the very life of Radha, the one who moved about in the beautiful thickly grown bushes of Brindavan.

title: Jai Jai Bhavani Ma Ambe
lyrics:
Jai Jai Bhavani Ma Ambe Bhavani Ma
Ambe Bhavani Ma Sai Bhavani Ma [ Jai Jai Bhavani ... ]
Shirdi Nivasi Ma Parthi Nivasi Ma
Hrudaya Nivasi Ma Ambe (Sai) Bhavani Ma
meaning: Victory to Divine Mother Parvathi who is hailed as Ambe and Bhavani and who is the indweller of the heart. She is none other than Lord Sai who dwells in Shirdi and Parthi.

title: Jai Jai Gopala
lyrics:
Jai Jai Gopala
Sai Gopala Shyama Gopala [ Jai Jai ... ]
Hey Nandalala Gopi Lola Gokula Bala
Brindavana Sanchara [ Sai Gopala ... ]
meaning: Victory to Lord Gopala (Krishna) whose consort is Radha. Victory to the son of Nanda, to the one who is endearing to the Gopis and who moved about in Brindavan.

title: Jai Jai Guru Deva Sri
lyrics:
Jai Jai Guru Deva Sri Sai Mahadeva (3)
Brahma Vishnu Maheshwara Sai Mahadeva
Mata Pitha Guru Deva Sri Sai Mahadeva
meaning: Glory to the revered preceptor Mahadeva, who is the embodiment of Mother, Father, Preceptor and the Trinity Brahma, Vishnu and Maheshwara.

title: Jai Jai Hanuman Jaya Hanuman
lyrics:
Jai Jai Hanuman Jaya Hanuman (2)
Maruti Raya Jaya Hanuman
Mahanubhava Jaya Hanuman
Vayu Kumara Jaya Hanuman
Vanara Veera Jaya Hanuman
Anjana Putra Jaya Hanuman
Ati Balavanta Jaya Hanuman
Sri Rama Dootha (Bhaktha) Jaya Hanuman
meaning: Victory to Hanuman, the son of Maruti and Anjana devi. He is the one who has the authority and wisdom, one of extraordinary strength, a warrior, messenger an ardent devotee of Lord Rama.

title: Jai Jai Jai Devi Jagadamba
lyrics:
Jai Jai Jai Devi Jagadamba
Sankata Harini Mangala Karini [ Jai Jai ... ]
Gnana Shakthi Vignanamayi
Premamayi Kalyanamayi
Shubha Dey Mata Devi Jagadamba
meaning: Glory be to Universal Mother, destroyer of sorrows and promoter of the well being of her devotees. Confer your grace upon us Oh Mother the personification of Integrated awareness, Supreme wisdom, Supreme Love and Auspiciousness.

title: Jai Jai Jai Gananayaka Jai
lyrics:
Jai Jai Jai Gananayaka Jai Jai Vighna Vinashaka
Jaya Shubha Mangala Dayaka Vidya Buddhi Pradayaka
Gajavadana Gowri Nandana (2)
Gangadhara Shiva Shambho Nandana
meaning: Let us sing the glory of Lord Ganesha, the leader of Ganaas (Shiva's army) and the destroyer of all obstacles in the path of spiritual practices. Sing the glory of the bestower of all that is auspicious, intelligence and knowledge. The elephant-headed Lord is the son of Gowri and Shiva who is also known as Gangadhara.

title: Jai Jai Jai Gananayaka, Yukute
lyrics:
Jai Jai Jai Gananayaka, Yukute wo Terasu Kami yo
Tataeyo Eichi no Ganesha wo Shinri e Michibiku Kamiyo
Misakaeare Kami (Sai) no Hikari ni
Eichi to Chikara no Shiva no Mikoyo
meaning:
Victory to Thee O Lord Ganesha, please illuminate the path before me. Praise the all-knowing Ganesha who will us guide us to truth. Under the light of God, we will prosper. Bow to the Wisdom and Power of the Son of Shiva.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Jai Jai Jai Ganesha
lyrics:
Jai Jai Jai Ganesha Ganapathi Deva
Jai Jai Jai Ganesha Vinayaka
Abreme El Camino Ganesha Para Así Llegar
A Los Pies Divinos Ganesha De Sai Avatar [ Jai Jai … ]
Llenanos De Fuerza Ganesha Para Así Lograr
La Liberacion Oh Ganesha En La Era Sai

title: Jai Jai Jai Jai Ganapathi
lyrics:
Jai Jai Jai Jai Ganapathi Deva (3)
Mata Parvathi Pitha Mahadeva (2) [ Jai Jai ... ]
Gajanana Gajanana
Gajanana Hey Ganapathi Deva
meaning: Glory to the elephant-faced Lord of Ganaas (Shiva's tribe) whose Mother is Parvathi and Father Mahadeva (Lord Shiva).

title: Jai Jai Jai Jaya Ma
lyrics:
Jai Jai Jai Jaya Ma Sathya Sai Bhavani Ma
Parthi Pureeshwari Ma Sai Maheswari Ma [ Jai Jai ... ]
Trishoola Dharini Ma Triloka Palini Ma
Sai Ma Sai Ma Sai Ma
meaning: Victory to Mother Sathya Sai, the Goddess of Puttaparthi, who destroys fears of birth and death. She holds Trident and is the sustainer of the three worlds.

title: Jai Jai Jai Mana Mohana
lyrics:
Jai Jai Jai Mana Mohana Jai Jai Jai Madhusudhana
Madhava Keshava
Keshava Madhava
Gopala Gopalana
meaning: Victory to Lord Krishna who is known by many names: Gopala, Madhava and Keshava. He is the divine charmer who destroyed the demon Madhu.

title: Jai Jai Jai Narayana
lyrics:
Jai Jai Jai Narayana
Govinda Gopala Narayana [ Jai Jai ... ]
Mukunda Madhava Narayana
Sri Krishna Govinda Narayana
Narayana (Sathya) Sai Narayana
meaning: Lord Narayana has incarnated as Krishna and is known by various names such as Govinda, Gopala, Mukunda, Madhava and Sai.

title: Jai Jai Janani Sai Janani
lyrics:
Jai Jai Janani Sai Janani Ambe Bhavani Ma
Jaya Ma Jaya Ma
Sai Bhavani Ma (Sathya)
Simha Vahini Trishoola Dharini Ambe Bhavani Ma
Jai Jai Janani Sai Janani Parthi Nivasini Ma
Jaya Ma Jaya Ma [ Sai Bhavani ... ]
meaning: Victory to Mother Bhavani who has the lion as Her vehicle, who holds the Trident in Her hands, who is the same as Mother Sathya Sai who dwells in Parthi.

title: Jai Jai Prabhu Giridhari Natavara
lyrics:
Jai Jai Prabhu Giridhari Natavara Nandalala
Natavara Nandalala Hey Giridhara Gopala (Hey)
Hey Giridhara Gopala Hey Giridhara Gopala Hey Giridhara Gopala
meaning: Sing in praise of Lord Gopala (Krishna), the playful son of Nanda and the one who lifted the mountain Govardhana, to save His tribesmen.

title: Jai Jai Ram Krishna Harey
lyrics:
Jai Jai Ram Krishna Harey
Jai Jai Ram Jai Jai Ram Krishna Harey
Jai Jai Ram Krishna Harey
Jai Jai Ram Sai Harey [ Jai Jai Ram Jai Jai Ram ... ]

Jai Jai Ram Krishna Harey Jai Jai Ram Krishna Harey (3)
Jai Jai Ram Jai Jai Ram Krishna Harey
meaning: Victory to Lord Rama, Krishna, Hari (Vishnu) and Lord Sai.

title: Jai Jai Ram Sita Ram
lyrics:
Jai Jai Ram Sita Ram
Karunya Roopa Raja Ram
Ananda Ram Atmabhi Ram
Premavatara Sai Ram
Poornavatara Sai Ram

Sita Ram Jai Jai Ram, Sita Ram Jai Jai Ram
Jai Jai Ram Jai Jai Ram, Sita Ram Jai Jai Ram
meaning: Victory to Lord Rama, the consort of Sita. Victory to the one who is the very embodiment of compassion, who is full of Atmic Bliss and the indweller of hearts. Victory to Lord Sai, the incarnation of Love who embodies all divine qualities.

title: Jai Jai Sai Ma Jaya
lyrics:
Jai Jai Sai Ma Jaya Sai Saraswathi Ma
Veena Vadini Ma Vidya Daayini Ma [ Jai Jai ... ]
Mukthi Pradayini Ma Shakthi Pradayini Ma [ Veena Vadini ... ]
meaning: Victory to Mother Sai who is Mother Saraswathi Herself, the One who bestows Knowledge and the One who plays on the Veena (stringed instrument). Mother Saraswathi gives strength and grants Liberation.

title: Jai Jai Shiva Shambho
lyrics:
Jai Jai Shiva Shambho Jai Jai Shiva Shambho
Mahadeva Shambho Mahadeva Shambho
Bholey Nath Shambho Sai Nath Shambho [ Jai Jai ... ]
Shiva Shiva Shiva Shambho Hara Hara Shiva Shambho [ Bholey Nath ... ]

Jai Jai Shiva Shambho Jai Jai Shiva Shambho
Jai Jai Shiva Shambho (3)
meaning:
Victory to Lord Shiva, the embodiment of auspiciousness. He is the Lord of the Lords and the Lord of the innocent. Glory to Lord Sathya Sai who is none other than Lord Shiva.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Jai Jai Sri Ram Sai
lyrics:
Jai Jai Sri Ram Sai Harey Ram
Jai Jai Sri Ram Neela Gagana Shyam [ Jai Jai ... ]
Raghu Nandana Bhava Bhanjana Jai Jai Sri Ram
Rajeeva Dala Lochana Jai Jai Sri Ram
Raghuveera Ranadheera Jai Jai Sri Ram
Parthi Puri Raghava Jai Jai Sai Ram
meaning:
Victory to Lord Rama who has Lotus eyes, the one who has the complexion of thick blue clouds, the one who belongs to the Raghu clan and destroys the miseries of devotees. Lord Rama is valiant warrior on the battlefield, is verily Sai Ram residing at Parthi.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Jai Jai Vaishnavi Devi
lyrics:
Jai Jai Vaishnavi Devi Ma Jai Jai Vaishnavi Devi Ma
Jai Ma Jai Ma Jai Ma Sai Ma
Jai Jai Ma Jai Jai Ma Jai Jai Ma Sai Ma [ Jai Jai Vaishnavi ... ]
Sheravali Ma Jyotavali Ma
Pahadavali Ma, Jai Jaga Janani Sai Ma [Jai Ma ... ]
meaning: Victory to Mother Sai, Mother of the Universe. She is none other than Mother Vaishnavi the effulgent one who rides the lion and dwells in the mountains.

title: Jai Jai Vittala Panduranga Vittala
lyrics:
Jai Jai Vittala Panduranga Vittala
Pundarika Varada Panduranga Vittala
Jai Jai Vittala Panduranga Vittala [ Pundarika ... ]
meaning: Sing the praises of Lord Vittala, standing on a brick. Victory to Lord Panduranga Vittala who blessed His devotee Pundarika.

title: Jai Sai Ram Jai Sai
lyrics:
Jai Sai Ram Jai Sai Ram
Premavatara Sai Avatara [ Jai Sai Ram ... ]
Ramavatara Sai Raghu Ram
Krishnavatara Sai Ghana Shyam
Yuga Avatara Sai Bhagawan
Sarvavatara Sathya Sai Ram
Poornavatara Sathya Sai Ram
meaning: Victory to Lord Sathya Sai, the incarnation of Supreme Love and the complete manifestation of everything. He is the incarnation of this Kali Age who had earlier incarnated as Lord Rama, descendant of Raghu dynasty and as the dark complexioned Lord Krishna.

title: Jai Sai Ram Jai Sai
lyrics:
Jai Sai Ram Jai Sai Ram
Jai Sai Ram Jai Jai Ram (Bolo) (2)
Anatha Rakshaka Sai Ram
Apad Bandhava Sai Ram
Prema Swaroopa Sai Ram
Premavatara Sai Ram
Poornavatara Sai Ram
meaning: Victory to Lord Sai who protects the destitute and who is the real friend in times of trouble. Lord Sai is the very personification and the incarnation of Supreme Love.

title: Jai Santoshi Ma Jai Jai
lyrics:
Jai Santoshi Ma Jai Jai Sai Ma (3)
Mangala Karini Ma Sai Sankata Harini Ma
Triloka Palini Ma Sai Trishoola Dharini Ma
meaning: Glory be to Mother Santoshi, who removes misfortune of Her devotees and promotes their welfare. She holds the mighty Trident in Her hand and sustains the three worlds.

title: Janaki Jeevana Rama Raghuvara
lyrics:
Janaki Jeevana Rama Raghuvara
Jaya Bhuvaneshwara Raghava Sundara [ Janaki Jeevana ... ]
Ravikula Mandana Asura Nikhandana
Alakh Niranjana Rama [ Jaya Bhuvaneshwara ... ]
meaning: Victory to Lord Rama of the Raghu clan, who is the very life of Mother Janaki (Sita), the one who is the Lord of the Earth and beauty personified. Glory be to the one who is the descendant of the Solar dynasty and who rooted out the demonic forces to protect the devotees.

title: Janani Janani Sathya Sai Shubha
lyrics:
Janani Janani Sathya Sai Shubha Janani
Jagat Karini Paripoorani Sayeeshwari Janani
Sathya Swaroopini Janani
Dharma Samvardhini Janani
Shantha Swaroopini Janani
Prema Pradayini Janani ( Sai )
meaning:
Let us sing the glory of Mother Sathya Sai, the one who personifies auspiciousness, the originator of the Universe and who is complete perfection. She is the embodiment of Truth, righteousness and peace and bestows Love.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Janani Krupa Karo Ambe
lyrics:
Janani Krupa Karo Ambe
Sai Janani Jaya Jagadambe
Janani Janani Janani Janani [ Janani Krupa ... ]
Mata Maheshwari Mangala Karini Ambe
Mangala Karini Tripureshwari Jagadambe
Abhaya Dayini Amrutha Bhaashini Ambe
Sai Janani Jaya Jagadambe [ Janani Janani ... ]
meaning: Shower Your choicest blessings on us, O Mother Sai. You are the Sovereign Mother of the three worlds, who blesses all with good fortune. O Mother Sai, You are the one of nectarine words who grants freedom from fear.

title: Janani Ma Sai Janani Ma
lyrics:
Janani Ma Sai Janani Ma (3)
Prema Vahini Ma Gnana Vahini Ma
Dharma Vahini Ma Dhyana Vahini Ma
Prashanthi Vahini Chira Sukha Dayini
Jaya Jaya Sai Ma
meaning: O Mother Sai, You are verily the free flowing rivers of Love, Wisdom, Righteousness, Meditation and Supreme Peace reaching out to the far corners of the world and conferring long lasting Happiness on Everyone. Glory to Thee, O Mother.

title: Janani Sai Devi Dayamayi
lyrics:
Janani Sai Devi Dayamayi
Janani Ma Krupalini Ma
Tum Ho Prema Swaroopini Ma
Daya Karo Sathya Sai Ma
Janani Prema Dayini Ma
meaning: Oh Mother Sathya Sai You are the One of compassion and personification of Love. Shower your Grace on us.

title: Janardhana Nandalala Govinda Gopala
lyrics:
Janardhana Nandalala Govinda Gopala
Harey Krishna Harey Krishna
Krishna Krishna Gopala
Sai Krishna Gopala
meaning: Chant the names of Lord Govinda, Gopala, Krishna and Sai. O Lord Krishna, You are the son of Nanda and the one who induces people to do good actions.

title: Jaun Na Jaun Aba Hari Darshan Ma
Jaya Anjaneya Jaya Rama Dootha
lyrics:
Jaya Anjaneya Jaya Rama Dootha Sharanam Prabho Sharanam
Vanara Veera Vayu Kumara 
Ranadheera Sharanam
Rama Priyey Sharanam (Sai)
Sathya Sai Hanuman Sharanam

Ram Ram Jaya Jaya Ram Ram Jaya Jaya Ram Ram Jaya Jaya Ram (2)
Sai Ram Ram Jaya Jaya Ram (2)
meaning:
Victory to Anjaneya, the messenger of Lord Rama and the courageous son of the Wind God. Salutations to the valorous one who is the favorite of Lord Rama. Salutations to Lord Rama and Lord Sathya Sai who is verily Lord Rama.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Jaya Devi Bhavani Ma
lyrics:
Jaya Devi Bhavani Ma
Jaya Sai Bhavani Ma [ Jaya Devi ... ]
Jagadeeshwari Sai Ma Parameshwari Sai Ma
Jaya Sai Bhavani Ma Jaya Parthi Nivasini Ma (2)
meaning: Victory to Goddess Bhavani, the very existence. Victory to Divine Mother Sathya Sai, the eternal one who rules over the entire universe. Puttaparthi is Her divine abode.

title: Jaya Devi Durga Gowri Shankari
lyrics:
Jaya Devi Durga Gowri Shankari Parvathi
Bhuvana Mohini Lalita Lakshmi Kalavathi [ Jaya Devi ... ]
Kamala Kamini Hari Narayani Bhagawathi
Veda Mata Vidya Dayini Bharati
Hamsa Vahini Veena Paani Saraswathi
meaning: Voctory to Mother Durga who is also known as Gowri, Shankari, Parvathi and Bhagawathi. She is also Lakshmi, the Goddess of wealth, known as Kamala and Narayani. She is also Mother Saraswathi, the Goddess of Knowledge and the Mother of Vedas. She holds the Veena, has the Swan as her vehicle, and is also known as Bharati.

title: Jaya Gananayaka Bala Gajanana
lyrics:
Jaya Gananayaka Bala Gajanana
Hey Shiva Nandana Paahi Gajanana [ Jaya Gananayaka ... ]
Prathama Poojya Sri Natha Gajanana
Mooshika Vahana Hey Shubhanana
Yuga Yuga Vanditha Paahi Gajanana
meaning: Victory to Lord Ganesh, the leader of the Shiva's army (Ganas). Protect us O Lord Gajanana, the son of Lord Shiva. Riding on the Mouse, You are the auspicious one who is worshipped first and who has been worshipped for eons.

title: Jaya Gopala Jaya Gopala
lyrics:
Jaya Gopala Jaya Gopala
Jaya Radhey Govinda Gopala [ Jaya Gopala ... ]
Chinmayananda Hey Sai Gopala
Nithyananda Roopa Sai Gopala [ Jaya Radhey ... ]
meaning: Victory to Lord Gopala (Krishna), the consort of Radha. Victory to Lord Sai who is ever in the bliss of pure Consciousness and who is verily Lord Kirshna.

title: Jaya Govinda Jaya Gopala
lyrics:
Jaya Govinda Jaya Gopala
Radha Vallabha Raasa Vilola [ Jaya Govinda ... ]
Nanda Mukunda Goparipala
Munijana Vanditha Murali Gopala
meaning: Chant the name of Gopala, the consort of Radha, who is fond of the Raasa leela (divine folk dance with Gopis). He is the son of Nanda and the protector of cows, who is worshipped by sages and who plays the flute.

title: Jaya Guru Deva Prabhu Sai
lyrics:
Jaya Guru Deva Prabhu Sai Deva
Devadi Deva Pranamamyaham
Shiva Shiva Shambho Kailasa Pathey
Parthi Pureeshwara Palaya Maam [ Devadi Deva ... ]
meaning: Our Salutations to the Preceptor and Lord of Lords Sathya Sai. Protect me O Shiva, the originator of Auspiciousness, Lord of Mount Kailasa who is verily Lord Sai, Lord of Parthi.

title: Jaya Guru Jaya Guru Sai
lyrics:
Jaya Guru Jaya Guru Sai Ram
Jagat Guru Sathya Sai Ram [ Jaya Guru ... ]
Brahma Vishnu Shiva Sai Ram
Parabrahma Roopa Sai Ram
Mata Pitha Guru Sai Ram [ Jagat Guru ... ]
meaning: Prostrations to Lord Sathya Sai Rama, the Divine Preceptor of the Universe. He is the Mother, Father, Preceptor as well as Creator (Brahma), Sustainer (Vishnu), Destroyer (Shiva) and is the very embodiment of the Supreme One.

title: Jaya Guru Natha Shiva Guru
lyrics:
Jaya Guru Natha Shiva Guru Natha
Parthi Pureesha Harey Paramesha [ Jaya Guru Natha ... ]
Parama Dayala Paahi Mahesha
Jaya Jaya Sathya Sayeesha
meaning: Salutations to the venerable Preceptor Sathya Sai, who is the Sovereign Lord, the one who is extremely compassionate and the one who dwells in Parthi.

title: Jaya Guru Omkara
lyrics:
Jaya Guru Omkara
Sadguru Omkara [ Jaya Guru ... ]
Allah Tum Ho Yeshu Tum Ho
Buddha Zohrashtra Mahavir Tum Ho
Sab Ka Malik Baba Tum Ho
Parama Guru Sai Pavana Tum Ho
meaning: Victory to Sadguru Sai, the embodiment of the sacred sound Pranava. You are the verily the Lords Allah, Jesus, Buddha, Zohrashtra and Mahavir. You are the Master and the Supreme Preceptor of all of us.

title: Jaya Guru Omkara Jaya Jaya
lyrics:
Jaya Guru Omkara Jaya Jaya Sadguru Omkara Om
Brahma Vishnu Sadashiva
Hara Hara Hara Hara Mahadeva
Shiva Shiva Shiva Shiva Sadashiva
meaning: Venerable salutations to our Preceptor Lord Sai, who is the form of the primordial sound Om, the creator Brahma, protector Vishnu and destroyer Shiva. Salutations to Sai who is the embodiment of Mahadeva and Sadashiva (names of Lord Shiva).

title: Jaya Ho Jaya Ho Anjaneya
lyrics:
Jaya Ho Jaya Ho Anjaneya
Pavana Kumara Anjaneya [ Jaya Ho ... ]
Maruthiraya Anjaneya
Ati Balabheema Anjaneya
Sri Rama Dootha Anjaneya
Sai Rama Dootha Anjaneya
Sharanam (Sharanam) Sharanam Anjaneya

Jaya Ho Anjaneya (4)
meaning:
Victory to Anjaneya, the son of Pavan, the God of Wind. Victory to the most valorous one. Salutations to the messenger of Lord Rama and Lord Sai who is verily Lord Rama.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Jaya Ho Jaya Ho Gopalana
lyrics:
Jaya Ho Jaya Ho Gopalana
Jaya Ho Jaya Ho Narayana
Jaya Ho Jaya Ho Janardhana
Jaya Ho Jaya Ho Niranjana
meaning: Victory to Lord Krishna who fosters cowherds, victory to the one whom man is a part of, victory to the one who uplifts humanity and the one who is faultless and pure.

title: Jaya Ho Jaya Ho Lingeshwara
lyrics:
Jaya Ho Jaya Ho Lingeshwara
Jaya Ho Jaya Ho Partheeshwara
Jaya Ho Jaya Ho Mruthyunjaya
Jaya Ho Jaya Ho Sayeeshwara
meaning: Victory be to Sayeeshwara, who is in the Form of a Linga (denotes without beginning or end), the One who has conquered Death and the One who resides in Parthi

title: Jaya Ho Jaya Ho Mooshika
lyrics:
Jaya Ho Jaya Ho Mooshika Vahana
Hey Shiva Nandana Prathama Vandana
Parvathi Tanaya Siddhi Vinayaka
Sharanam Sharanam Vighna Haranam [ Hey Shiva Nandana ]
meaning: Victory to the son of Shiva and Parvathi who moves on a mouse and the one who is offered the first prayers. Let us surrender to the one who removes obstacles and grants us spiritual powers.

title: Jaya Ho Nataraj
lyrics:
Jaya Ho Nataraj (2)
Gangadhara Shambho Hey Nataraj
Phaala Lochana Paahi Murari
Haalaahala Dhara Hey Tripurari
Jaya Ho Nataraj
meaning: Victory to the Lord of dance, Lord Shiva, who holds Mother Ganges in His matted locks, the one who has the third eye of wisdom. Protect me, O Lord, the one who destroyed the three cities created by the demons and the one who holds the poison in His throat.

title: Jaya Ho Sai Ram Jaya
lyrics:
Jaya Ho Sai Ram Jaya Ho Sai Ram
Karuna Sindhu Ram Sai Parthi Pureeshwara Ram [ Jaya Ho Sai Ram ... ]
Treta Yug Mey Ram Sai Dwapara Yug Mey Shyam
Ram Tum Hi Rehman Sai Sab Ka Hey Bhagawan
Kali Yug Ke Avatar Sai Parthi Pureeshwara Ram
meaning: Glory to Sai Ram who is an ocean of compassion and Lord of Parthi. He had incarnated as Lord Ram in the Treta age and Shyam in the Dwapara age, has come down as Sai in this Kali age. Oh Lord! You are worshipped by people of all faiths.

title: Jaya Jagadeesha Harey Jaya Govinda
lyrics:
Jaya Jagadeesha Harey Jaya Govinda Harey
Nithyananda Brahmananda Jaya Gopala Harey
Arunachala Shiva Om Trishoola Dhari Shivom
Hari Narayana Om Sai Narayana Om
Jaya Devi Bharati Vidya Dayini Annapoorna Mata Om
meaning: Glory to the Lord of the Universe, Govinda, Gopala who is the personification of Eternal Bliss. He is Lord Shiva who holds the Trident and has made the Mountains of Arunachala as His Abode. Lord Sai is the embodiment of Narayana, Mother Bharati who gives Knowledge and Mother Annapurna who provides food for everyone.

title: Jaya Jagadeesha Harey Prabhuvara
lyrics:
Jaya Jagadeesha Harey Prabhuvara
Hara Hara Shambho Jagadeka Vibho [ Jai Jagadeesha ... ]
Chandrashekara Kailasadhipathey
Bhaava Gochara Bhavani Shankara
meaning: Sing the glory of the Sovereign Lord of the Universe, Shiva, the benevolent one. Lord Shankara bears the crescent moon on His head, is the Lord of Mount Kailasa, imperceptible to the senses and the consort of Mother Bhavani (Parvathi).

title: Jaya Jagadeesha Jaya Paramesha
lyrics:
Jaya Jagadeesha Jaya Paramesha
Neelakanta Sadashiva
Om Hari Om
Hari Om Sai Om
Devadi Deva Deena Dayala
Chandrashekara Shambho (2) [ Neelakanta Sadashiva ]
meaning: Victory to Lord Shiva who is the Supreme Lord. He is the origin of all that is auspicious and the one who is blue throated. He is the Lord of the Lords, the most compassionate one. Glory to the one who bears the crescent moon on His head.

title: Jaya Jagadeesha Jaya Paramesha
lyrics:
Jaya Jagadeesha Jaya Paramesha
Jaya Jagadeesha Harey Jaya Jaya Sai Harey
Keshava Roopa Sai Shareera Jaya Jagadeesha Harey
Jaya Jagadeesha Harey Jaya Jaya Sai Harey (2)
meaning: Victory to the Sovereign Lord and Lord of the Universe Esha (Shiva) who Himself is Keshava and Sai.

title: Jaya Jagat Janani Jagadambe
lyrics:
Jaya Jagat Janani Jagadambe
Mata Bhavani Mata Ambe (2) [ Jaya Jagat ... ]
Jai Jai Jai Jai Jai Jagadambe
Jai Jai Jai Jai Jai Mata Ambe
Vaishnavi Mata Mata Ambe
Mata Ambe (3)
meaning:
Salutations to the Mother of the Universe, Mother Bhavani, the divine consort of Lord Shiva, and to Mother Vaishnavi.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Jaya Jagat Janani Jagat palini
lyrics:
Jaya Jagat Janani Jagat Palini
Sai Bhavani Ma (Sathya)
Paapa Vinashini Parthi Nivasini
Suramuni Vandini Ma (3) [ Sai Bhavani Ma ]
meaning:
Salutations to the Mother Sai Bhavani, who is ever compassionate, the one who destroys sins, One who dwells in Parthi and worshipped by sages and Holy men.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Jaya Jagat Janani Ma
lyrics:
Jaya Jagat Janani Ma
Jaya Ma Jaya Ma Jaya Ma
Sai Shiva Shankari Sai Parameshwari
Ambe Bhavani Ma (Jagad)
meaning:
Victory to Mother Sai, the One who confers all that is Auspicious, Supreme, the one who is also known as Amba Bhavani.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Jaya Jagat Janani Sayeeshwari
lyrics:
Jaya Jagat Janani Sayeeshwari
Jaya Jagat Janani Sarveshwari
Veena Pusthaka Dharini Janani
Jaya Jaya Hey Madhusudhani
Omkara Roopini Hreemkara Roopini
Sreemkara Roopini Janani
Omkara Roopini Janani
Janani Janani Janani
meaning:
Victory to Mother Sai, Goddess of the universe. She is verily Saraswathi, Goddess of learning, the one who holds the Veena and the Holy scriptures. Victory to the Goddess of wealth, Lakshmi, the consort of Lord Madhusudhana (Krishna). Mother Sai is the very embodiment of the Primordial sound 'Om' and the sounds 'Hreem' and 'Sreem'.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Jaya Jaya Deva Jagadeesha Deva
lyrics:
Jaya Jaya Deva Jagadeesha Deva
Daya Sagara Sai Deva [ Jaya Jaya Deva ... ]
Neeraja Nayana Ksheerabdhi Shayana
Neela Megha Shyama
Saama Gaana Priya Sarva Dharma Priya Sathya Sai Mahadeva
meaning: Oh Lord Sai, You are the ocean of compassion. You are verily the lotus-eyed Narayana whose abode is that of the ocean of milk, and Krishna whose complexion is deep blue. Oh Sai Mahadeva, You are the lover of the music of Veda and the one who loves all religions equally.

title: Jaya Jaya Devi Girija Mata
lyrics:
Jaya Jaya Devi Girija Mata
Jaya Jagadambe Pranava Swaroopini
Ashtabhujankita Akhila Dharini
Jaya Yogeshwara Hrudaya Nivasini
meaning: Praises be to the Universal Mother Girija, the embodiment of the Primordial Sound Om. She is the one who has eight arms and the one who bears the universe. She is the one who resides in the heart of Lord Shiva.

title: Jaya Jaya Gajanana Gananatha
lyrics:
Jaya Jaya Gajanana Gananatha
Gowri Nandana Hey Gananatha [ Jaya Jaya ... ]
Buddhi Pradayaka Hey Gananatha
Siddhi Vinayaka Hey Gananatha
Jaya Gananatha Sai Gananatha (4)
meaning: Sing the praises of the elephant-faced Lord, the Leader of the demigods (Ganas), son of Gowri, who confers intelligence and spiritual powers.

title: Jaya Jaya Girija Bala Gajanana
lyrics:
Jaya Jaya Girija Bala Gajanana
Jaya Shiva Shankara Parvathi Nandana [ Jaya Jaya Girija ... ]
Vighna Vinashaka Vimala Gajanana
Sharavana Sevitha Sumukha Gajanana
Tava Pada Sharanam Sharanam Gajanana
meaning: Victory to Lord Ganesha, son of Girija (Mother Parvathi) and Lord Shankara. We surrender at Your feet, O the elephant-faced Lord. You are the supremely pure one who removes obstacles in the spiritual path and are served by brother Lord Sharavana (Subrahmanya).

title: Jaya Jaya Govinda Jaya Nandalala
lyrics:
Jaya Jaya Govinda Jaya Nandalala
Radha Lola Raasa Vilola
Tribhuvana Paripala Deena Dayala [ Jaya Jaya Govinda ... ]
Surdas Prabhu Karuna Sagara
Meera Ke Prabhu Giridhara Naagara
Bhaktha Sakha Bhagawan Gopala
meaning: Victory to Lord Govinda (Krishna), the son of Nanda, and who is dear to Radha. Victory to the one who did the celestial dance with the Gopis (Raasa Leela), who nurtures the three worlds and who is compassionate towards the helpless. Lord Gopala is a friend to His devotees and is the Lord of devotees Surdas and Meera.

title: Jaya Jaya Govinda Narayana
lyrics:
Jaya Jaya Govinda Narayana
Jaya Hari Govinda Narayana [ Jaya Jaya ... ]
Mathuradhipathey Mandara Giridhara
Murali Manohara Narayana
Narayana Namo (Sai) Narayana (3)
meaning: Prostrations to Lord Narayana, who incarnated as Govinda (Krishna), who is the Lord of Mathura and the one who lifted the Mandara mountain and played soulful music with His Flute.

title: Jaya Jaya Hey Jagadeesha Mahesha
lyrics:
Jaya Jaya Hey Jagadeesha Mahesha
Jaya Jaya Hey Kailasa Vasa [ Jaya Jaya Hey Jagadeesha ... ]
Jaya Jaya Jaya Shiva Sai Mahesha
Jaya Hey Shambho Sai Natha
Jaya Jaya Jaya Hey Anatha Natha
meaning: Victory to the Universal Lord Mahesha (Shiva), who dwells at Mountain Kailasa and who is the beloved Lord of Mother Gowri (Parvathi). He is the protector of the destitute and is none other than Lord Sai.

title: Jaya Jaya Jaya Devi Narayani
lyrics:
Jaya Jaya Jaya Devi Narayani
Janana Marana Bhaya Harini [ Jaya Jaya ... ]
Dukha Vinashini Jagat Paripalini
Jaya Jaya Jaya Devi Jagat Janani
Jagat Janani Shubha Karini
Jaya Jaya Jaya Devi Jagat Janani
meaning:
Sing the glory of Mother Narayani, who removes the fear of birth and death, destroys sorrow and fosters the world. She is the Goddess of the Universe and confers welfare to all.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Jaya Jaya Jaya Gananatha
lyrics:
Jaya Jaya Jaya Gananatha
Jaya Gananatha Sri Gananatha
Heramba Gananatha Natha
Hey Shiva Nandana Parvathi Nandana
Jaya Jaya Jaya Gananatha Natha
meaning: Victory to the Lord of the Ganas, Lord Ganesha, the son of Lord Shiva and Mother Parvathi.

title: Jaya Jaya Jaya Hey Gajanana
lyrics:
Jaya Jaya Jaya Hey Gajanana
Gajanana Hey Gajavadana [ Jaya Jaya Jaya Hey ... ]
Parvathi Nandana Gajanana
Pashupathi Tanaya Gajanana
Adi Poojya Deva Gajanana
meaning: Glory to the elephant-faced Lord Ganesha, the son of Mother Parvathi and Lord Shiva, and the one who is offered the foremost prayers.

title: Jaya Jaya Jaya Hey Gajanana
lyrics:
Jaya Jaya Jaya Hey Gajanana
Parvathi Nandana Shubhanana [ Jaya Jaya ... ]
Neelakanta Sutha Gajanana
Nithya Shubhanga Gajanana
meaning: Victory to the elephant-faced Lord Ganesha, the son of Parvathi and the blue-throated Shiva and the one who confers grace on His devotees continuously.

title: Jaya Jaya Jaya Hey Madhusudhana
lyrics:
Jaya Jaya Jaya Hey Madhusudhana
Jaya Brindavana Mana Mohana [ Jaya Jaya ... ]
Sundara Sai Shirdi (Parthi) Vihari
Radhey Shyam Radhey Shyam Radhey Shyam Radhey Shyam
Sai Ram Sai Ram Sai Ram Sai Ram [ Radhey Shyam ... ]
meaning: Glory be to Lord Krishna, the one who vanquished the demon Madhu. Glory to the charmer who moves about in Brindavan. Praise the one who dwells in Shirdi and Parthi as Lord Sai. Repeat the names of Radhey Shyam and Sairam.

title: Jaya Jaya Jaya Hey Sri
lyrics:
Jaya Jaya Jaya Hey Sri Guru Natha
Jaya Jaya Jaya Hey Sadguru Natha
Sadguru Natha Sadguru (Sri Sai) Natha
Sathya Swaroopa Shiva Guru Natha
Antaryami Vishwa Vidhata
Mukthi Pradatha Sai Guru Natha
meaning: Let us sing in praise of our sacred Preceptor Sathya Sai, the embodiment of Truth. He is the indweller and the Creator of the Universe who grants Liberation.

title: Jaya Jaya Jaya Jaga Vandini
lyrics:
Jaya Jaya Jaya Jaga Vandini Ma
Jaya Paramesha Hrudvasini Ma [ Jaya Jaya ... ]
Adi Shakthi Parabrahma Swaroopini
Jagat Janani Chathur Veda Vilasini
Samba Vinodini Mata Bhavani
Sambhavi Shankari Moksha Pradayini
meaning:
Salutations to the Divine Mother who is adored by the entire Universe, the indweller and embodiment of Supreme Energy, the one whom the four Vedas describe and the consort of Lord Shiva. She confers liberation and is known by many names such as Bhavani, Srikari, Shankari and Sambhavi.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Jaya Jaya Jaya Jaya Ma
lyrics:
Jaya Jaya Jaya Jaya Ma
Jagat Janani Shubha Karini [ (Ma) Jaya Jaya ... ]
Jagadodharini Sai Ma
Jagat Paripalini Parvathi Ma
Jagat Janani Shubha Karini
meaning: We offer our obeisance to our Universal Mother who confers all that is sublime and auspicious. The Uplifter, the Administrator and the Mother of the Universe that is Parvathi, is also Mother Sai.

title: Jaya Jaya Krishna Yadu Nandana
lyrics:
Jaya Jaya Krishna Yadu Nandana
Jaya Jaya Brindavana Chandana [ Jaya Jaya ... ]
Jaya Jaya Krishna Mana Mohana
Jaya Jaya Sai Gopalana (2)
meaning: Victory to Lord Krishna of  Yadu lineage, the shining star of Brindavan, the one who charms the mind. He is none other than our Sai Gopala.

title: Jaya Jaya Mangala Sai Namo
lyrics:
Jaya Jaya Mangala Sai Namo
Jaya Partheeshwara Sai Namo [ Jaya Jaya ... ]
Shiva Shaktheeshwara Sai Namo
Sri Shaileshwara Sai Namo
meaning: Prostrations to Lord Sai, the Lord of Parthi, the embodiment of Shiva and Shakthi (Matter and Energy) who also dwells at Shaila Mountains.

title: Jaya Jaya Mohana Murali Gopala
lyrics:
Jaya Jaya Mohana Murali Gopala
Jaya Giridhara Brindavana Bala [ Jaya Jaya Mohana ... ]
Jaya Hey Madhava Ghana Ghana Neela (2)
Jaya Meera Prabhu Radhey Gopala
meaning: Chant the names of the charming Gopala who plays on the Flute, the lad of Brindavan who surprised everyone by lifting the Mountain on His little finger. Sing in Praise of Madhava of the complexion of deep blue clouds and dear Lord of Meera.

title: Jaya Jaya Muruga
lyrics:
Jaya Jaya Muruga Kanda Kumara
Hara Hara Shambho Gowri Tanaya
Ganapathi Anuja Karthikeya
Palaya Palaya Shanmukha Vela

Sharanam Sharanam Shanmukha Vela
Sharanam Sharanam Gowri Tanaya
Sharanam Sharanam Karthikeya
Sharanam Sharanam Sri Sai Natha
meaning:
Victory to Lord Muruga who is worshipped by many names - Kanda, Kumara and Karthikeya. Victory to the son of Lord Shiva and Mother Gowri (Parvathi). Victory to the brother of Lord Ganesha. O the six-faced one who wields the Vel, please protect us. 

Salutations to Thee, O Lord Karthikeya who has incarnated as Lord Sai.

title: Jaya Jaya Pavana Kumara
lyrics:
Jaya Jaya Pavana Kumara
Jaya Jaya Hanumantha Veera
Sankata Mochana Vayu Kumara

Jai Jai Jai Jai Pavana Kumara
Jai Jai Jai Jai Hanumantha Veera
Sankata Mochana Vayu Kumara
meaning:
Victory to the valorous Lord Hanuman, the son of Wind God. Victory to the one who liberates us from wordly afflictions.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Jaya Jaya Raghu Nandana Jaya
lyrics:
Jaya Jaya Raghu Nandana Jaya Janaki Jeevana
Sharanagatha Palana Jaya Jagadodharana [ Jaya Jaya ... ]
Rajeeva Dala Lochana Jaya Jagadanandana
Rajadhi Raja Ramachandra Sai Jaga Vandana
meaning: Extol the lotus-eyed son of Raghu clan, Lord Rama, the very life of Mother Janaki, the sustainer of Universe and protector of those who surrender to Him. He is the king of kings who is the source of delight to the Universe. He is verily Lord Sai who is worshipped by all.

title: Jaya Jaya Ram Jagadabhi Ram
lyrics:
Jaya Jaya Ram Jagadabhi Ram
Deena Bandhu Sai Ram (Hey)
Jai Jai Ram Jaya Ram Sai Ram
Danava Bhanjana Dayamaya
Dayamaya Krupamaya
Alakha Niranjana Asura Nikhandana
Deena Bandhu Sai Ram (Hey) [ Jai Jai Ram ... ]
meaning: Sing the glory of Lord Rama, the friend of the afflicted and the Lord of the World. Victory to Lord Rama who rooted out demonic forces from the face of the Earth, who is blemishless and extremely compassionate.

title: Jaya Jaya Rama Janaki Rama
lyrics:
Jaya Jaya Rama Janaki Rama
Raghukula Bhooshana Raja Rama [ Jaya Jaya ... ]
Tapasa Ranjana Taraka Naama
Danava Bhanjana Kodanda Rama
meaning: Praise be to Lord Rama, the consort of Mother Janaki (Sita) and the Crown Jewel of Raghu dynasty. Chant the Holy name of Rama that liberates one from the cycle of birth and death and which is a source of delight for the sages and saints. Glory to Lord Rama, the wielder of the Kodanda bow and the vanquisher of the demonic race.

title: Jaya Jaya Rama Jaya Raghu
lyrics:
Jaya Jaya Rama Jaya Raghu Rama Dasharatha Nandana Raja Rama
Abhaya Pradayaka Ananda Dayaka
Tribhuvana Mohana Sita Rama
Danava Bhanjana Deenodharana
Prema Sagara Sai Rama
meaning: Lord Rama was the descendant of the Raghu clan, the son of Dasharatha, who confers Bliss and fearlessness. Rama was the most handsome of all the three worlds, beloved of Mother Sita, annihilator of the Demon clan and emancipator of the downtrodden.

title: Jaya Jaya Sadguru Sai Sadashiva
lyrics:
Jaya Jaya Sadguru Sai Sadashiva
Hara Hara Shankara Shambho Mahadeva [ Jaya Jaya ... ]
Neelakanta Sai Bhasma Vibhushitha [ Hara Hara ... ]
meaning: Let us bow down in reverence to the Sacred Preceptor Sai Sadashiva, the one who confers auspiciousness, Mahadeva, the blue-throated one, who has smeared Sacred Ash all over His Body and Maheshwara, who is none other than Sai, the Lord of Parthi.

title: Jaya Jaya Sai Namo Jaya
lyrics:
Jaya Jaya Sai Namo Jaya Shubha Dayi Namo
Jaya Govinda Jaya Gopala Jaya Mahadeva Namo [ Jaya Jaya Sai ... ]
Abhaya Pradatha Vishwa Vidhata
Jagadodhara Namo
Jaya Shirdeesha Jaya Partheesha Jaya Paramesha Namo
meaning: Victory to Lord Sai who confers all that is auspicious. Victory to Govinda, Gopala (names of Lord Krishna) and Mahadeva (Lord Shiva). Salutations to the one who grants freedom from fear and who is the Lord of the Universe. Prostrations to the Supreme consciousness who is the Lord of Shirdi and Parthi.

title: Jaya Jaya Shankari Jaya Parameshwari
lyrics:
Jaya Jaya Shankari Jaya Parameshwari
Jaya Shiva Shankari Ma
Jaya Vishweshwari Jaya Sarveshwari
Vibhuti Sundari Ma
Jaya Ma Jaya Ma
Puttaparthi Pureeshwari Ma [ Vibhuti ... ]
meaning: Victory to Mother Shankari (Parvathi), Goddess of the Universe, who is besmeared with Vibhuti (Holy Ash). She has presently incarnated in Parthi as Lord Sai.

title: Jaya Kailasa Pathey Shiva Shankara
lyrics:
Jaya Kailasa Pathey Shiva Shankara
Samba Sadashiva Shambho
Partheeshwara Sai Shiva Shambho
Shaileshwara Karunamaya Shankara
Lingodhbhavakara Shiva Shambho
Trishoola Jatadhara Gangadhari
Haalaahala Dhara Shambho
Samba Sadashiva Shambho [ Partheeshwara Sai ... ]
Partheeshwara Sai Shiva Shambho (2)
meaning: Glory to the Lord of Kailasa Mountains, Lord Shiva, who is Shiva and Shakthi (Parvathi). Glory to Lord Sai, the Lord of Parthi who is the very embodiment of Lord Shiva. Salutations to the Lord of Shaila mountains, who is full of compassion, who has the Trident and who holds Mother Ganges in His matted locks. Salutations to Lord Sai who creates the Lingam (symbol of infinite proportions).

title: Jaya Kausalya Nandana Ram Paramananda
lyrics:
Jaya Kausalya Nandana Ram Paramananda Ananda Ram
Jaya Shirdeesha Partheesha Ram Jaya Prashanthi Sayeesha Ram [ Jaya Kausalya ... ]
Mangala Pavana Naam Jaya Sundara Vaidehi Ram
Sundara Sayeesha Ram ( Jaya )
meaning: Glory to the son of Kausalya, One of Supreme Bliss, who dwells in Shirdi and Prashanthi Nilayam in Parthi. The Name 'Ram' is supremely Auspicious and He is the beloved of Mother Vaidehi (Sita).

title: Jaya Krishna Kunja Vihari
lyrics:
Jaya Krishna Kunja Vihari
Jaya Radha Hrudaya Vihari
Jaya Yamuna Teera Vihari
Jaya Gopi Ke Hrudaya Vihari
Jaya Madhava Raasa Vihari
Jaya Sai Parthi Vihari
meaning: Victory to Lord Krishna, the one who moves about through thick shrubs, on the banks of Yamuna river, the one who dwells in the hearts of Radha and the Gopis and with whom He performed the celestial dance. Victory to Lord Sai who dwells in Parthi.

title: Jaya Lambodhara Paahi Maam
lyrics:
Jaya Lambodhara Paahi Maam
Jagadamba Sutha Raksha Maam [ Jaya Lambodhara ... ]
Sharanagatha Raksha Maam
Hey Karuna Nidhey Paahi Maam
Sri Gananatha Samraksha Maam
Nija Bhakthi Mudam Dehi Maam
meaning: Protect me O Lord Ganesha, the one with a big belly and the son of Universal Mother Amba. Protect me, for I have surrendered to You. O the ocean of Mercy, give me true devotion to Thee, O Lord of Shiva's forces who looks after my welfare.

title: Jaya Ma Anandamayi Janani
lyrics:
Jaya Ma Anandamayi Janani
Sab Ko Krupa Karo Janani
Bhaktha Janon Ke Mangala Karini
Mangala Karo Janani (Ma)
Tum Ho Prema Dayini (Ma) [ Sab Ko Krupa ... ]
meaning: Victory to Thee, O Mother Sai, You are Bliss personified. Bless us all dear Mother, You bestow auspiciousness and Supreme Love on Your devotees.

title: Jaya Ma Jaya Ma Daya
lyrics:
Jaya Ma Jaya Ma Daya Karo Sai Ma
Krupa Karo Sai Ma (Sab Ko)
Mukthi Pradayini Prema Pradayini Shanthi Pradayini Ma
Janani Ma Janani Jagat Janani Sai Ma
Daya Karo Sai Ma Jaya Ma [ (Sab Ko) Krupa ]
meaning: Glory to Mother who confers Love and Peace and grants Liberation. Shower your mercy on us Oh Mother of the Universe.

title: Jaya Ma Jaya Ma Jagadeeshwari
lyrics:
Jaya Ma Jaya Ma Jagadeeshwari Sai Ma
Jagadeeshwari Maheshwari Sayeeshwari Sai Ma
Jaya Ma Jaya Ma, Jagadeeshwari Sai Ma 
Jagadeeshwari Maheshwari Sayeeshwari Sai Ma (2)
meaning: Victory to Mother Sai who is the Goddess of the Universe. She is the Supreme One and is known as Mother Sayeeshwari.

title: Jaya Mana Mohana Krishna Murari
lyrics:
Jaya Mana Mohana Krishna Murari
Jaya Brindavana Kalimala Haari [ Jaya Mana Mohana ... ]
Jaya Jaya Giridhara Parthi Vihari
Deena Bandhu Karunakar Sharan Tumhari
Jaya Partheeshwara Sai Giridhari
meaning: Victory to the enchanter of our minds, Lord Krishna, the vanquisher of demon Mura. Victory to the one who removes the blemishes of Kali age and the one whose abode was Brindavana. Victory to the one who held aloft the Govardhana mountain to protect devotees from torrential rain. Victory to the resident of Parthi, Lord Sai. O Lord, I surrender to You. You are the most compassionate one who is kith and kin to the downtrodden. Victory to Thee, O Lord of Parthi, You are verily Lord Krishna.

title: Jaya Murali Madhava Shourie
lyrics:
Jaya Murali Madhava Shourie
Parama Pavana Pandari Natha
Paramatma Hey Purandara Vittala
Sri Ranga (Sai) Natha Hrudayanta Ranga
meaning: Chant the different names of the Lord Krishna, Madhava the valorous one, Murali with the Flute in His Hand, Pandari Natha the Lord of Pandharpur. He is Vittala, the Supreme Consciousness and the highly sacred one and Lord of Purandara and Ranganatha, the indweller of the Heart.

title: Jaya Nandalala Jai Jai Gopala
lyrics:
Jaya Nandalala Jai Jai Gopala
Mohana Moorat Sai Gopala [ Jaya Nandalala ... ]
Jaya Brindavana Madana Gopala
Jaya Partheeshwara Sai Nandalala [ Mohana Moorat ... ]
meaning: Praise be to Lord Gopala (Krishna), the son of Nanda and the most charming one who moves about in Brindavan. Lord Sai, the Lord of Parthi has a captivating form and is verily Lord Krishna.

title: Jaya Nandalala Jaya Nandalala
lyrics:
Jaya Nandalala Jaya Nandalala
Gopi Lola Gokula Bala [ Jaya Nandalala ... ]
Vishwa Vanditha Vijaya Gopala
Veda Vedantha Venu Gopala
Radha Vallabha Raasa Vilola
meaning: Victory to Lord Krishna, the son of Nanda and the consort of Radha, who danced the celestial dance with the Gopis. Lord Gopala who holds the flute in His hand, is worshipped by the entire Universe and He is the origin of Vedas and Upanishads.

title: Jaya Narayana Jaya Hari Om
lyrics:
Jaya Narayana Jaya Hari Om
Sai Narayana Jaya Hari Om [ Jaya Narayana ... ]
Brahma Shivaarchita Jaya Hari Om
Paapa Vinashaka Jaya Hari Om
Jaya Hari Om (Om) Jaya Hari Om
meaning: Victory to Lord Narayana (Hari) who is worshipped by even the Lord of creation Brahma and the Lord of dissolution Shiva. Chant the holy names of Lord Narayana and Lord Sai that destroys sins.

title: Jaya Narayana Sadguru Deva
lyrics:
Jaya Narayana Sadguru Deva
Gayana Narthana Priya Mahadeva (Sai Deva) [ Jaya Narayana ... ]
Nirakara Saakara Tum Hi Ho
Poorna Brahma Avatara Tum Hi Ho
Parthi Pureeshwara Sai Mahadeva
meaning: Victory to the Divine Preceptor Sai who is none other than Lord Narayana and Lord Mahadeva. Glory to the one who delights in soulful music and dance. O Lord Sai, You are both the Form and Formless divinity and the Incarnation of God in its Totality. You are the Lord of Parthi.

title: Jaya Narayana Sathya Narayana
lyrics:
Jaya Narayana Sathya Narayana
Keshava Madhava Hari Narayana [ Jaya Narayana ... ]
Sri Krishna Govinda Sai Narayana
Mukunda Madhava Sathya Narayana
meaning:
Victory to Lord Krishna also known as Keshava, Madhava, Govinda, Mukunda. Glory to Lord Krishna who is Lord Narayana. Lord Sathya Sai is none other than Lord Krishna.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Jaya Pandari Natha Panduranga
lyrics:
Jaya Pandari Natha Panduranga Pundalika Varada
Jaya Parthi Pureesha Pavana Naama Prashanthi Sayeesha
Jaya Vittala Vittala Paahi Jaya Vithoba Rakhumayi
Sri Nikethana Srinivasa Shritha Jana Paripala
Paramanda Vigraha Ananda Lola Pandari Pura Vasa
Jaya Parthipuri Vasa [ Jaya Vittala ... ]
meaning: Victory to Lord Panduranga, the Lord of Pandari, the one who blessed Pundalika. Victory to the Lord of Parthi, Lord Sai, whose very name is sacred and who resides at Prashanthi Nilayam. Protect us O Lord Vittala, the consort of Rakhumayi. O Lord, You are Lord Srinivasa (Vishnu) in whom Mother Lakshmi (Sri) resides. You are the protector of Your devotees. You are ever blissful in Your beautiful form at Pandari. Victory to Thee who is none other than Lord Sai whose abode is Parthi.

title: Jaya Panduranga Jaya Vittala
lyrics:
Jaya Panduranga Jaya Vittala
Jagadodhara Hari Vittala
Pandari Natha Jaya Hari Vittala
Purandara Vittala Parama Dayala
meaning: Victory to Lord Vittala, the one standing on a brick, the redeemer of the Universe, Lord of Pandharpur, the Indweller and the one who is supremely compassionate.

title: Jaya Panduranga Prabho Vittala
lyrics:
Jaya Panduranga Prabho Vittala
Jagadodhara Hari Vittala
Panduranga Vittala Pandari Natha Vittala
Sri Ramani Hrudayanta Ranga
Mangala Kara Karunanta Ranga
Aashritha Deena Janavana Ranga
Jagadodhara Hari Vittala [ Panduranga Vittala ... ]
Panduranga Vittala Pandari Natha Vittala (4)
meaning: Victory to Lord Panduranga Vittala, the Lord of Pandharpur, the liberator of the world. Lord Ranga dwells in the heart of His consort, Mother Lakshmi. He is auspiousness personified and is the most compassionate one. He bestows benevolence and compassion on the destitute. Chant the name of Panduranga Vittala.

title: Jaya Partheesha Jaya Paramesha
lyrics:
Jaya Partheesha Jaya Paramesha
Jaya Sayeesha Namo
Abhaya Pradatha Prema Pradatha
Jaya Sayeesha Namo
Karuna Sagara Hey Paramesha
Jaya Sayeesha Namo
meaning: Victory to the Lord of Parthi, Lord Sathya Sai, the Supreme Lord. Salutations to the one who gives protection and Divine Love. Salutations to the ocean of compassion, Lord Sai

title: Jaya Partheesha Jaya Paramesha
lyrics:
Jaya Partheesha Jaya Paramesha
Jaya Gowreesha Jaya Gangadhara
Jatadhara Jaya Sai Shankara
Vijayee Bhava Tava Sharanam Dehi
Sharanam Dehi
meaning: Victory to Lord Shiva, Lord of Gowri, who bears Mother Ganges in His matted locks, who is the personification of Supreme Consciousness, who is Sai Shankara, the Lord of Parthi. O Lord, I sing Your praises and seek Your protection.

title: Jaya Raghu Nandana Jaya Jaya
lyrics:
Jaya Raghu Nandana Jaya Jaya Rama
Jaya Jagat Janani Janaki Rama [ Jaya Raghu Nandana ... ]
Nava Nava Komala Megha Shyama
Bhava Harana Bhadrachala Rama
meaning: Victory to Rama whose consort is Janaki, the Mother of Universe. Victory to the one who is ever new and fresh, the one who is of deep blue complexion, the Lord of Bhadrachala (pilgrim city in Andhra Pradesh) who destroys the cycle of Birth.

title: Jaya Rama Harey Jaya Rama
lyrics:
Jaya Rama Harey Jaya Rama Harey Jaya Sita Rama Harey
Jaya Krishna Harey Jaya Krishna Harey Jaya Radha Krishna Harey
Jaya Sai Harey Jaya Sai Harey Jaya Sai Baba Harey
meaning: Sing the Glory of Rama whose consort is Mother Sita, Krishna whose consort is Radha and Sai who is also known as Sai Baba.

title: Jaya Rama Janaki Rama
lyrics:
Jaya Rama Janaki Rama
Jaya Rama Sai Rama
Jaya Rama Sri Raghu Rama
Jaya Rama Sai Rama
Jaya Rama Sita Rama
Jaya Rama Sai Rama
meaning: Victory to Lord Rama of Raghu clan, whose consort is Janaki, also known as Sita. Lord Rama has incarnated in this age as Sai Rama.

title: Jaya Rama Mohana Ram
lyrics:
Jaya Rama Mohana Ram
Jaya Rama Sri Raghu Ram
Jaya Rama Sai Ram [ Jaya Rama Mohana ... ]
Jaya Rama Sita Ram
Jaya Rama Janaki Ram
Jaya Ram Sai Ram
meaning:
Victory to the enchanting Lord Rama of Raghu dynasty whose consort is Sita (Janaki). Victory to Lord Sai who is none other than Lord Rama.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Jaya Rama Raghu Rama
lyrics:
Jaya Rama Raghu Rama
Ranadheera Sukumara [ Jaya Rama ... ]
Raghupathi Raghava Raja Rama
Rajeeva Lochana Rama Rama
meaning: Victory to the lotus-eyed Lord Rama, the mighty and valorous yet so tender natured, the reputed one who is the crown jewel of the Raghu clan.

title: Jaya Ranga Panduranga
lyrics:
Jaya Ranga Panduranga
Sri Ranga Pandareesha 
Sai Ranga Pandareesha 
Jaya Shirdeesha Jaya Partheesha 
Pavana Purusha Jaya Sayeesha
meaning:
Victory to Panduranga, the Lord of Pandharpur. Victory to Sai, the Supreme Divinity who is the Lord of Shirdi and Parthi.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Jaya Sai Guru Deva Sai
lyrics:
Jaya Sai Guru Deva Sai Guru Deva
Guru Seva Bina Nirvana Nahin Jaya Sai Guru Deva [ Jaya Sai ... ]
Tum Hi Ho Mata Pitha Tum Hi Ho Sai Guru Deva
Sathya Swaroopa Raaha Dikhao Sai Guru Deva [ Guru Seva ... ]
meaning: There is no salvation without Your Service, O Preceptor Sai. Grace me with Your advice. You are the embodiment of Truth, my Mother, Father and Preceptor.

title: Jaya Sai Rama Jaya Raghu
lyrics:
Jaya Sai Rama Jaya Raghu Rama
Hey Jaya Sai Rama Jaya Raghu Rama [ Jaya Sai ... ]
Dukhiyon Ke Daata Sai Rama
Premavatara Sai Rama
Shantha Swaroopa Sai Rama [ Hey Jaya ... ]
meaning: Sing the glory of Lord Sai and the scion of Raghu Clan, Lord Rama. Sai Rama is a champion of the downtrodden, the incarnation of Supreme Love and is the embodiment of Peace.

title: Jaya Sai Shankara Jaya Abhayankara
lyrics:
Jaya Sai Shankara Jaya Abhayankara
Samba Sadashiva Shiva Hara Hey Shiva Hara Hey Shiva Hara Hey [ Jaya Sai ... ]
Jaya Gangadhara Jaya Bimbadhara
Vyagrambara Dhara Shiva Hara Hey Shiva Hara Hey Shiva Hara Hey
meaning: Glory to Lord Sai who is verily Lord Shankara (Shiva) who bestows freedom from fear, the one whose other half is 'Amba' (Parvathi). He is also known as Hara, He holds the river Ganga and crescent moon on His head and sits on tiger skin.

title: Jaya Sayeesha Jaya Sayeesha
lyrics:
Jaya Sayeesha Jaya Sayeesha
Radha Madhava Jaya Partheesha [ Jaya Sayeesha ... ]
Hrudaya Sarathi Sai Kanhaiya
Radhey Govinda Prashanthi Nilaya
meaning: Victory to Lord Sai, who is verily Lord Krishna incarnated again on Earth, who is the charioteer of the Spiritual Heart and dwells at Prashanthi Nilayam in Parthi.

title: Jaya Shankara Bhaava Gochara Shiva
lyrics:
Jaya Shankara Bhaava Gochara Shiva Chidambara Omkara
Parthi Vihara Paapa Vidhura
Jagadodhara Brahmapara (3)
meaning: Glory to Shankara who is beyond senses, Lord of Chidambaram (Holy place in India), personified as Omkara, the Supreme Brahman, the Lord of Parthi who removes sin and uplifts the world.

title: Jaya Sri Ganesha Vighna Nasha
lyrics:
Jaya Sri Ganesha Vighna Nasha Gajanana
Vidya Buddhi Sarva Siddhi Suranjana [ Jaya Sri ... ]
Jaya Heramba Sri Jagadamba Nandana
Eka Dantha Dayavantha Shubhanana
Mangala Dayaka Sri Vinayaka Vandana
meaning: Glory to the Lord of Ganaas, Ganesha, the destroyer of obstacles, who has the head of an elephant, who confers scholarship, intelligence and power. Glory to the son of Universal Mother (Parvathi). Glory to the one who is single tusked, compassionate and who bestows auspiciousness. I bow to Thee who is the highest.

title: Jaya Sri Radhey Jaya Nanda Nandana
lyrics:
Jaya Sri Radhey Jaya Nanda Nandana
Jaya Sri Radhey Jaya Yadu Nandana
Vittala Hari Vittala Panduranga Vittala
Vittala Hari Vittala Pandhari Natha Vittala
Vittala Vittala Vittala Panduranga Vittala
Vittala Vittala Vittala Pandhari Natha Vittala
meaning: Victory to Lord Krishna, the Lord of Radha and the son of Nanda of the Yadu clan. Victory to the Lord Panduranga (Vittala) of Pandharpur.

title: Jaya Vallabha Gananayaka
lyrics:
Jaya Vallabha Gananayaka
Jaya Guha Sodara Shubha Daata
Jaya Hey Eshwari Nandana
Jaya Vara Dayaka Namostuthey
Jaya Partheeshwara Namostuthey
meaning: Glory to the Lord of Ganaas, Lord Ganesha, the brother of Guha (Lord Subrahmanya). Glory to the son of Eshwari (Parvathi) who bestows auspiciousness. Salutations to the one who confers boons, who is none other than Sai, the Lord of Parthi.

title: Jaya Vijayee Bhava Jaya Vijayee
lyrics:
Jaya Vijayee Bhava Jaya Vijayee Bhava
Bhava Bhaya Nasha Hanumantha
Pavana Kumara Paavana Veera
Ati Balavantha Hanumantha
Anjani Putra Veeranjaneya
Niranjana Vijayee Bhava (Bolo) (2)
meaning: Victory to the Lord Hanuman, the one who removes the fear of repetitive Births. The son of Pavana and Anjana is blemishless and is of extraordinary strength.

title: Jaya Vittala Vittala Vittala Jaya
lyrics:
Jaya Vittala Vittala Vittala Jaya Vittala Panduranga
Jaya Vittala Panduranga (3)
meaning:
Chant incessantly the name of Vittala. Victory to Lord Panduranga, the one standing on a brick.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Jayatu Jayatu Rama
lyrics:
Jayatu Jayatu Rama
Janani Janaki Rama
Janana Marana Bhaya Klesha Vinashaka
Raghupathi Sita Rama Rama Ramethi Rama
meaning: Victory to Lord Rama, consort of Mother Janaki, the one who destroys the fear of birth and death, the Emperor of the Raghu dynasty.

title: Jayatu Shiva Natana Shiva
lyrics:
Jayatu Shiva Natana Shiva
Jaya Jagadeesha Mahesha Shiva [ Jayatu Shiva ... ]
Bhasma Vibhushitha Phaala Shashidhara
Pingala Lochana Ganga Mohana
Pinaka Vaibhava Sai Shankara
meaning: Sing the glories of the Lord of Dance, Lord Shiva, the Universal and Sovereign Lord. Shiva has the Sacred Ash smeared all over His body, the Crescent Moon on His forehead, has brown-colored eyes, charms Mother Ganges and holds the Bow (Pinaka) in His hand. Lord Sai is none other than Lord Shiva.

title: Jeevan Jyothi Jalao Kanhaiya
lyrics:
Jeevan Jyothi Jalao Kanhaiya
Jo Kuch Mera Sab Hai Tera [ Jeevan Jyothi ... ]
Daya Karo Mujhey Hey Sai Shyama
Sharan Lagalo Mujhey Krishna Kanhaiya
Hey Anatha Natha Sri Sai Natha
meaning: Light the Lamp of my Life, O Young Krishna, I owe everything to You. O Lord, accept me into Your fold and bless me with Your Grace. You are none other than Lord Sai, the refuge of the forlorn.

title: Jeevan Jyothi Tum Ho Sai
lyrics:
Jeevan Jyothi Tum Ho Sai
Prem Ki Jyothi Jalao Sai Prem Ki Jyothi Jalao
Jeevan Ke In Andhiyaron Mey Sai Deep Jalao
Sai Deep Jalao Sathya Sai Deep Jalao [ Prem Ki Jyothi ... ]
meaning: You are the Lamp of Life O Lord Sai, light in us the lamp of Love. Enlighten our life so we may cross the dark crevices of this turbulent world.

title: Jhulana Jhulaye Brij Bala
lyrics:
Jhulana Jhulaye Brij Bala
Jhule Nandalala Jhule Sai Bala [ Jhulana Jhulaye ... ]
Resham Ki Dori Sone Ka Palna
Arathi Utarey Sai Bala [ Jhule Nandala ... ]
meaning:
Rock the swing gently, my dear Sai Krishna, the sweet child of Brij and the son of Nanda. O Sai Krishna, accept our salutations while You rock in the golden cardle, draped in silk.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Jhulana Mey Jhule Merey Sai Nandalala
lyrics:
Jhulana Mey Jhule Merey Sai Nandalala
Jhulana Jhule Jhulana Jhule [ Jhulana Mey Jhule ... ] 
Ma Eshwaramma Jhulana Jhulave 
Godi Mey Bittake Kahani Sunaye 
Hari Katha Choti Sai Ram Ko Sunaye 
Apni Hi Katha Suno Sai Nandalala 
Jhulana Mey Jhule Sai Bala Gopala
meaning:
O young, Lord Sai, swing my Lord. Mother Eshwaramma rocks Your cradle gently. She seats You on her lap and tells You Your own story. She tells You the stories of Lord Hari. Listen to Your own story, O Lord Sai while You rock gently on the cradle.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Jhule Merey Sai Jhule Mere Baba
lyrics:
Jhule Merey Sai Jhule Merey Baba
Jhulana Jhulaye Merey Sai (Baba) (2)
Resham Ki Dori Sone Ka Palana [ Jhulana Jhulaye ... ]
Shirdi Ke Sai Parthi Ke Baba [ Jhulana Jhulaye ... ]
meaning: Rock gently in the golden swing draped in silk, O my Lord Sai, You are the Lord of Shirdi and Parthi.

title: Jhule Mey Jhule Merey Sai
lyrics:
Jhule Mey Jhule Merey Sai Ram
Sathya Sai Ram Merey Bhagawan [ Jhulana Jhule ... ]
Eshwaramba Nandana Jaya Jaya Ram
Man Mandir Mey Jhule Sai Ram [ Sathya Sai ... ]
meaning:
Rock the swing of our heart to the tune of this song, O Lord Sathya Sai, the son of Eshwaramba. May Lord Sai be in our minds and in our hearts. Victory to Sai Ram.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Joota Jatadhara Gangadhari
lyrics:
Joota Jatadhara Gangadhari
Shivaya Namah Shiva Om
Shiva Shiva Om Hara Hara Om [ Shivaya Namah ]
Gangadhara Gowri Shiva
Shivaya Namah Shiva Om
meaning:
Prostrations to Shiva who has Ganges on His matted Locks of Hair on His Head and consort of Gowri.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Kaalatheethaya Siddhi Roopaya Yogeshwaraya Namo
lyrics:
Kaalatheethaya Siddhi Roopaya Yogeshwaraya Namo
Jagat Vitaya Vishwa Roopaya
(Sathya) Sayeeshwaraya Namo
Om Namah Shivaya Shivaya Namah Om (5)
meaning: We bow to the Lord of Yogis, Lord Sai who is beyond time and who is the embodiment of supreme power. We bow to Lord Sai, the provider of the world, the one who has the Universe as His form, who is verily Lord Shiva and the embodiment of Om.

title: Kaali Kaali Maha Kaali Kapalini
lyrics:
Kaali Kaali Maha Kaali Kapalini
Durga Durga Devi Durga Bhavani
Mangala Gowri Mata Maheshwari
Raja Rajeshwari Lakshmi ( Sai ) Narayani
meaning: Salutations to Mother Kaali, the dark complexioned, ferocious, wearing a garland of skulls. She is Durga Bhavani the destroyer of evil. She is the Lord of Emperors also known as Maheshwari, Gowri, Lakshmi and Narayani the bestower of Auspiciousness.

title: Kab Logey Khabar Morey Ram
lyrics:
Kab Logey Khabar Morey Ram
Mujhey Apna Banalo Ghana Shyam
Sai Ram Sai Ram
Ghana Shyam Ghana Shyam
Sai Ram Ram Ram Sai Ram [ Ghana Shyam ]
meaning: When will you take notice of me Oh Lord Ram? Let me merge in you Oh dark complexioned Shyam. Chant repeatedly the name of Lord Sai Ram, Ghana Shyam.

title: Kahan Main Dhoondoon Hey Bhagawan
lyrics:
Kahan Main Dhoondoon Hey Bhagawan
Darshan Do Darshan Do
Darsha Dikhao Merey Sai Bhagawan
Kahin Mandir Mey Kahin Masjid Mey
Apna Hrudaya Mey Hai Bhagawan
Kahin Teerath Mey Kahin Moorat Mey
Parthi Puri Ke Prabhu Sai Bhagawan
Darshan Do Darshan Do [ Darsha Dikhao ... ]
meaning:
Where shall I search for You, Oh Sai Bhagawan? Grant us Your Divine Darshan. The Lord is not only found in the deities of temples, mosques or holy places but also within our hearts. Grant us Your Darshan Oh Sai Bhagawan.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Kailasa Nathaya Namah Om
lyrics:
Kailasa Nathaya Namah Om
Vaikunta Vasaya Namah Om
Parthi Pureeshaya Namah Om
Sri Sai Devaya Namah Om
meaning: Salutations to Lord Sai, Lord of Puttaparthi, who is verily Lord Shiva, the Lord of Kailasa and Lord Narayana, the resident of Vaikunta.

title: Kailasa Pathey Bhagawan Shankara
lyrics:
Kailasa Pathey Bhagawan Shankara
Ayodhya Pathi Sri Rama Raghuvara
Mathura Pathey Sri Krishna Natavara
Parthi Pathey Sai Ram Shankara
meaning: Shankara is the Lord of Kailasa. Sri Rama belongs to Raghu lineage and is the Lord of Ayodhya. Krishna the supreme actor is the Lord of Mathura and Sai Shankara is the Lord of Parthi.

title: Kailasa Pathey Mahadeva Shambho
lyrics:
Kailasa Pathey Mahadeva Shambho
Hari Om Namah Shivaya (2)
Hey Shiva Shankara Sai Shankara Om Namah Shivaya
Hey Tripurari Bhava Bhaya Haari Om Namah Shivaya
Hey Pralayankara Hara Hara Shankara Om Namah Shivaya
Om Namah Shivaya Sai Om Namah Shivaya (2)
Shivaya Namah Om Namah Shivaya
meaning: Praise be to Lord Shiva, the Lord of Lords, the dweller of Mount Kailasa and the bestower of auspiciousness. Chant the mantra 'Om Nama Shivaya' repeatedly. Shankara who is also Lord Sai bestows welfare, the destroyer of Tripura and who negates the fear of rebirth, the one who causes the final delusion.

title: Kailasa Pathey Sai Karuna Nidhey
lyrics:
Kailasa Pathey Sai Karuna Nidhey
Parvathi Pathey Pashupathey [ Kailasa Pathey ... ]
Shambho Shankara Shirdi (Parthi) Pathey
Ganga Jatadhara Gowri Pathey
Sathya Sai Paramesha Pathey (Sri)

Om Namah Sivaya Namah Shivaya (3)
meaning:
Chant the name of Lord Shiva, the Lord of Kailasa who is the ocean of compassion. He is the consort of Mother Parvathi and is the Lord of Animals. Lord Sai of Shirdi and Parthi is verily Lord Shiva, the one who has Ganges on His head and is the consort of Gowri. Lord Sathya Sai is the Supreme Lord of the Universe.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Kailasa Vasa Gangadhara
lyrics:
Kailasa Vasa Gangadhara
Ananda Tandava Sadashiva
Himagiri Vasa Samba Shiva [ Kailasa Vasa ... ]
Ganapathi Sevitha Hey Jagadeesha
Sharavana Sevitha Hey Paramesha
Shaila Girishwara Uma Maheshwara
Neela Lochana Natana Natesha [ Ananda Tandava ... ]
meaning: Glory to Lord Shiva who holds the holy river Ganges and who dwells in Kailasa in the Himalayan ranges, whose consort is Amba (Parvathi) and who performs the celestial dance of Bliss. The Lord of Universe is served by His sons Ganapathi and Sharavana. The blue-eyed Lord Shiva is the consort of Uma, resides in the Shaila Mountains and is the Lord of dance.

title: Kalavathi Amba Saraswathi
lyrics:
Kalavathi Amba Saraswathi
Naada Brahmamayi Vedavathi
Ananda Roopini Vidyavathi
Veda Brahmamayi Sai Bhagawathi
Parthi Pureeshwari Amba Saraswathi [ Naada Brahma ]
meaning:
Salutations to Mother Saraswathi the mother of all arts. She is also the Mother of Vedas, Brahman in the form of sound. Saraswathi is the mother of all knowledge and has bliss as her form, residing at Parthi.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Kalavathi Kali Kapalini
lyrics:
Kalavathi Kali Kapalini
Devi Saraswathi Veda Narayani [ Kalavathi Kali ... ]
Mangala Gowri Mata Maheshwari
Jagadodharini Durga Bhavani
meaning: Worship Mother Kali, who destroys evil and wears a garland of skulls; Worship Mother Saraswathi, Goddess of knowledge and wisdom, from whom the Vedas emanated; Worship the Supreme Mother Gowri, who confers auspiciousness and is the savior of the Universe.

title: Kali Yuga Avatara Sai Bhagawan
lyrics:
Kali Yuga Avatara Sai Bhagawan
Krupa Nidhey Deenon Ke Pran [ Kali Yuga Avatara ... ]
Eshwaramba Nandana Sai Bhagawan
Antaryami Sai Bhagawan
Karuna Sindhu Sai Bhagawan
Parthi Pureeshwara Sai Bhagawan
meaning: Sing the Glory of Lord Sai, the Incarnation of the Kali Age, son of Mother Eshwaramba, the indweller of every being, the ocean of compassion, the very life of the underprivileged and the Lord of Puttaparthi.

title: Kalimala Bhanjana Kodanda Rama
lyrics:
Kalimala Bhanjana Kodanda Rama
Karunanta Ranga Kaivalya Dhama [ Kalimala Bhanjana ... ]
Maya Manusha Munijana Prema
Madhura Manohara Mangala Naama
Parthi Pureesha Prabhu Paramatma
Patitha Pavana Pattabhi Rama
meaning: The bow wielding Rama who destroys the evil effects of the Kali age, is compassionate and grants liberation. Lord Rama who loves sages has an elusive form of a human being whose name is sweet, enchanting and confers Auspiciousness. The emancipator of the downtrodden, the cosmic consciousness is presently dwelling at Parthi.

title: Kalyana Krishna Kamaneeya Krishna
lyrics:
Kalyana Krishna Kamaneeya Krishna
Kalinga Narthana Sri Krishna
Govardhana Giridhari Murari Gopi Mana Sanchari
Murari Gopi Mana Sanchari
Brindavan Ke Tulasi Mala
Peetambara Dhari Murari
meaning: We bow to the enchanting form of Krishna born to redeem the world of its negative afflictions, who subdued the poisonous serpent Kalinga by dancing on it. Krishna lifted the Govardhan mountains to protect the devotees from the wrath of Indra, has captured the hearts of Gopis, the slayer of demon Mura. Our Salutations to the One who adorns the Tulasi garland and the Yellow cloth.

title: Kalyana Rama Ananda Rama
lyrics:
Kalyana Rama Ananda Rama
Rama Sri Rama Jaya Rama [ Kalyana Rama ... ]
Avatara Sai Avatara Rama
Poorna Avatara Sathya Sai Rama
meaning: Salutations to Lord Rama, who confers bliss and causes the welfare of the world. Salutations to Lord Rama the incarnation and Sathya Sai Rama who has come down with all the facets of an incarnation.

title: Kalyana Ranga Kamaneeya Ranga
lyrics:
Kalyana Ranga Kamaneeya Ranga
Ananda Ranga Sadananda Ranga
Hrudayanta Ranga Karunanta Ranga
Rakumayi Ranga Sayeesha Ranga
Shirdeesha Ranga Partheesha Ranga [ Ananda Ranga ... ]
meaning: Glory to Lord Ranga (Panduranga/Narayana), the one who bestows welfare, one of Everlasting Bliss, of compassion, Lord of Rakumayi. He is verily Lord Sai, who dwells at Shirdi and Parthi.

title: Kamala Nayana Bhagawan
lyrics:
Kamala Nayana Bhagawan
Sathya Sai Bhagawan
Hey Deena Janon Ke Pran
Hey Patitha Pavana Sita Ram
Parthi Pureeshwara Sri Sai Ram
Sri Sai Ram Jaya Jaya Ram
Parthi Pureeshwara Sri Sai Ram [ Hey Deena ... ]
meaning: Salutations to the lotus-eyed Lord Sathya Sai who dwells at Parthi, who is the refuge of the forlorn, emancipator of the downtrodden. He is the same as Lord Rama, the Lord of Mother Sita.

title: Kamala Nayana Narayana
lyrics:
Kamala Nayana Narayana
Ksheerabdhi Shayana Narayana
Megha Varna Hari Narayana
Vaikunta Vasa Narayana
Prasanthi Vasa Narayana
meaning:
Glory to Lord Narayana, the lotus-eyed one who reclines on the Ocean of Milk, the one who is dark-hued like the rain cloud, the one who has Vaikunta as His abode. He is verily Lord Sai whose abode is Prashanthi Nilayam at Puttaparthi.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Kamala Nayana Prabhu Kamala Pathey
lyrics:
Kamala Nayana Prabhu Kamala Pathey
Kamalasana Prabhu Kamala Kantha [ Kamala Nayana ... ]
Kamalanabha Prabhu Kamala Ramana
Kamaleshwara Prabhu Kamala Natha
meaning: Our salutations to the lotus-eyed Lord who is the consort of Kamala (Goddess Lakshmi). The Lord who is the enchanter of Kamala, seated on the lotus from whose navel arises the lotus of creation, is Lord Narayana, the Lord of Kamala (Goddess Kamala).

title: Kamala Nayana Sai Ranga
lyrics:
Kamala Nayana Sai Ranga
Sab Sukh Daata Sai Bhagya Vidhata Sai
Radha Ramana Sai Ranga [ Kamala Nayana ... ]
Parama Pitha Hamey Sahara Do Prabhu
Kar Chintana (Vandana) Sai Ranga
meaning: O Lord Sai with lotus-petal shaped eyes, You are the bestower of happiness and auspiciousness for all. You are verily Lord Krishna, the beloved of Radha. O Supreme Father, You are our only support. O Lord, may we incessantly contemplate on You and offer obeisance to You.

title: Kamala Netra Sayeeshwara
lyrics:
Kamala Netra Sayeeshwara
Kaivalya Teja Sureshwara [ Kamala Netra ... ]
Megha Shyama Ghana Gagana Shareera
Shantha Brahmamaya Abhayakara
Megha Shyama Ghana Gagana Shareera [ Shantha Brahmamaya ]
meaning: Salutations to Sayeeshwara the Lotus eyed One who confers Liberation, whose complexion is that of thick clouds in the sky, guards against fear and embodiment of Peace.

title: Kanda Kumara Kadirvela
lyrics:
Kanda Kumara Kadirvela
Karunakarane Shiva Bala
Varuvai Arulvai Azhaga Muruga
Mayon Maruga Mayil Vaganane

Muruga Muruga Muruga Muruga
Varuvai Muruga Muruga Muruga
Arulvai Muruga Muruga Muruga
Azhaga Muruga Muruga Muruga
meaning: O Lord Skanda, the compassionate Lord Subrahmanya, son of Lord Shiva and the nephew of Lord Vishnu, please come to bless us, riding on the divine peacock, O beautiful one.

title: Kanda Kumara Vadivela
lyrics:
Kanda Kumara Vadivela
Gowri Putra Vadivela [ Kanda Kumara ... ]
Karthikeya Karuna Sagara
Deena Sharanya Vadivela
Sri Sai Natha Vadivela
meaning: Chant the names Kanda, Kumara and Karthikeya which are the names of Lord Subrahmanya, the son of Shiva and Gowri. He is an Ocean of Compassion and friend of the forlorn who is verily Lord Sai.

title: Kanha Kanhaiya Bansi Adhariya Brindavana
lyrics:
Kanha Kanhaiya Bansi Adhariya Brindavana Ghana Raasa Rachaiya
Gokula Nandana Hey Chitha Mohana
Radha Manohara Shyama
Manasa Chora Nanda Kishora
Parthi Vihara Sai Gopala Sai Gopala
meaning:
Lord Krishna also known as Kanha and Kanhaiya performed the Raasa Leela dance in Brindavan. With the flute on His lips, He is the boy of Gokula who enchants everybody's mind, the son of Nanda and the delight of Radha. He is the one who stole butter and is none other than Lord Sai of Parthi.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Kanhaiya Teri Bansi Bajey Merey
lyrics:
Kanhaiya Teri Bansi Bajey Merey Lal
Nis Din Mein Bhajoon Tero Naam [ Kanhaiya Teri ... ]
Hey Nandalala Gopala
Gopala Gopala
Govinda Govinda Govinda Gopala
Sai Krishna Sai Ram
meaning: Play Your enchanting flute, dear Lord Krishna, while I chant Your name everyday. O Lord Gopala (Krishna), the beloved son of Nanda, You are Govinda, the protector of cows and verily Sai Krishna and Sai Rama.

title: Karthikeya Karunakara
lyrics:
Karthikeya Karunakara
Sharanam Sharanam Sayeeshwara [ Karthikeya ... ]
Gowri Nandana Bhava Bhaya Bhanjana
Pashupathi Ranjana Parathpara
meaning:
I surrender to You O Lord Karthikeya, the compassionate one, the son of Mother Gowri. You are the one who destroys the cycle of Birth and death and is a source of delight for Pashupathi (Lord Shiva).

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Karuna Karo Sai Dev
lyrics:
Karuna Karo Sai Dev
Kalyana Karo Sai Dev
Sri Guru Jaya Guru Sathya Sai Dev [ Karuna Karo ... ]
Tum Matrumayi Sai Dev
Tum Shakthimayi Sai Dev
Tum Premamayi Sai Dev
Tum Krupamayi Sai Dev [ Sri Guru... ]
meaning:
Victory be to You O Lord Sathya Sai. Show mercy and let Your benedictions be upon us. You are verily our Mother and the embodiment of Energy, Love and Compassion.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Karuna Nidhey Bhagawan
lyrics:
Karuna Nidhey Bhagawan
Gopala Brindavana Sai Bhagawan
Mana Mohana Madhava Sai Bhagawan [ Karuna Nidhey ... ]
Meera Ke Prabhu Giridhara Bala
Parama Dayala Sai Krupala
Parthi Puri Bhagawan [ Mana Mohana ... ]
Karuna Nidhey Bhagawan (3)
meaning: Glory to the enchanting Lord Gopala (Krishna), the Lord of Meera. He moves about in Brindavan and is extremely compassionate. Lord Sai who is verily Krishna, is an ocean of Mercy and His abode is at Puttaparthi.

title: Karuna Niketana Bhaktha Sakha Prabho
lyrics:
Karuna Niketana Bhaktha Sakha Prabho
Sharan Mey Lo Bhagawan
Dukha Bhanjana Sri Ram
Tribhuvana Sanchari Jyothi Swaroopa
Nithya Niranjana Ram
Adi Ananth Hey Prema Swaroopa [ Dukha Bhanjana ... ]
meaning: O Lord Rama, the ever Compassionate one, the real friend of the devotee and destroyer of sorrow, I seek refuge in You. You move around the three worlds, ever pure, You are both the beginning and the end. You are the very embodiment of Love.

title: Karuna Sadani Ma Sai Karuna
lyrics:
Karuna Sadani Ma Sai Karuna Sagari Ma
Kanchana Abharani Ma Sai Karunya Roopini Ma
Kamala Manohari Ma Sai Kalyana Dayini Ma
Kalusha Vidhurini Ma Sai Kali Avatarini Ma
Kali Avatarini Ma
meaning:
Mother Sai is another name for absolute Compassion, is an enchanting Goddess of Wealth bedecked with Gold jewels. She confers benevolence, removes impurity and is an Incarnation of the present Kali age.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Karuna Sagara Hey Nandalala
lyrics:
Karuna Sagara Hey Nandalala
Murali Manohara Shyama Gopala [ Karuna Sagara ... ]
Giridhara Naagara Sai Gopala
Meera Ke Prabhu Shyama Gopala
meaning: Glory to the son of Nanda, Lord Krishna (Gopala), who is an ocean of mercy, plays lilting tunes with the Flute, dark-complexioned, the one who lifted the Govardhana mountain and the Lord of Meera.

title: Karuna Sagara Prema Swaroopa
lyrics:
Karuna Sagara Prema Swaroopa
Paapa Vimochana Ram
Dukha Bhanjana Sri Ram
Allah Eshwar Terey Naam
Nanak Yesu Terey Naam
Parthi Pureeshwara Deena Dayaghana [ Dukha Bhanjana ... ]
meaning: Lord Sai is an embodiment of Love, the ocean of compassion who removes sin and destroys sorrow. Allah, Eshwar, Nanak and Jesus are all His names. He is highly compassionate towards the distressed and is the Lord of Parthi.

title: Karuna Samudra Sri Rama
lyrics:
Karuna Samudra Sri Rama
Kausalya Tanaya Sri Rama
Sharanagatha Priya Sai Rama
Sharanam Sharanam Sai Rama
meaning: Oh Rama the son of Kausalya, you are verily the ocean of compassion. Oh Sai Rama, you love those who have surrendered to you and hence I thus surrender myself.

title: Karuna Sindhu Dasharatha Nandana Parthi
lyrics:
Karuna Sindhu Dasharatha Nandana Parthi Pureeshwara Ram
Prema Swaroopa Prashanthi Niketana Maruti Sevitha Ram
Ahalyodharaka Rajeeva Lochana Raghukula Bhooshana Ram
meaning: Glory to the compassionate, lotus-eyed Lord Rama, the son of Dasharatha and the one who was served by Maruti (Hanuman). Lord Rama redeemed Ahalya of her curse. He is verily the Lord of Parthi, Lord Sai, the embodiment of Love who resides at Prashanthi Nilayam.

title: Karuna Swaroopini Raja Rajeshwari
lyrics:
Karuna Swaroopini Raja Rajeshwari
Tribhuvana Palini Parthi Pureeshwari
Hrudaya Nivasini Akhilandeshwari
Tripura Sundari Veena Vadini
Dasha Bhuja Dharini Asura Vinashini [ Tribhuvana Palini ... ]
meaning:
Salutations to Mother Sai residing in Parthi, who is the embodiment of compassion, the one who is ruler of the three worlds, the one residing in everyone's hearts, the one who is the most beautiful in all the three worlds and the one who annihilated demons.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Karunakara Narayana
lyrics:
Karunakara Narayana
Kamala Charana Sharanam Sharanam [ Karunakara ... ]
Kamala Netra Kamalasana
Kamala Vallabha Kamala Nabha
Narayana Narayana Narayana Narayana (2)
meaning:
I surrender myself at the Lotus Feet of Lord Narayana, the compassionate one. He is lotus-eyed, seated on a Lotus, the consort of Kamala (Goddess Lakshmi) and from whose Navel arises a Lotus of Creation.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Karunamaya Deva Krupamaya Deva
lyrics:
Karunamaya Deva Krupamaya Deva
Hari Om Hari Om
Hari Mera Jeevan Ka Sahara
Hari Mera Aadhaar
Krupamaya Deva
meaning: We chant Your Glory, O compassionate Lord Hari. You are the most merciful one and the basis and support of my life.

title: Karunamaya Karthikeya
lyrics:
Karunamaya Karthikeya
Kaivalya Daata Sri Sai Natha [ Karunamaya ... ]
Himagiri Nandini Priya Kumara
Iha Para Sukha Dayi Bhava Bhaya Hara
Sharanagatha Priya Shanmukha Natha
Sharanam Sharanam Shambhu Kumara
Sharanam Sharanam Shambhu Kumara (3)
meaning: Karthikeya is epitome of compassion and the One who grants Liberation. The dear son of Himavan's daughter, confers welfare here and hereafter, destroys the vicious cycle of Births. Oh son of Shambho, I surrender myself to thee.

title: Karunamayi Janani Ma
lyrics:
Karunamayi Janani Ma
Hey Prema Swaroopini Ma [ Karunamayi Janani Ma]
Hrudaya Nivasini Sai Ma
Abhaya Pradayini Sai Ma
Gaana Vinodini Ma Sai Ma Sai Ma
meaning: Oh Mother Sai, You are the most compassionate one, personification of Love, the one residing in our hearts. Oh Mother, You enjoy music and are the protector of this world.

title: Karunanta Ranga Kariraja Varada Kamalesha
lyrics:
Karunanta Ranga Kariraja Varada Kamalesha Sri Sai Rama
Omkara Rama Prashanthi Rama
Parabrahma Sathya Sai Rama
Kamalesha Sri Sai Rama
meaning: Glory to the lotus-eyed and compassionate Lord Sai Rama, the one who saved the elephant king Gajendra, as Lord Narayana. He is the embodiment of Om and the Supreme Lord whose abode is Prashanthi Nilayam at Puttaparthi.

title: Kashaya Vesha Dharana
lyrics:
Kashaya Vesha Dharana
Kali Yuga Avatara Radha Ramana [ Kashaya Vesha ... ]
Kunja Vihari Sri Sathya Sai
Dwarakamayi Narayana
Chithravathi Teera Narayana Hari
meaning: Glory be to the incarnations of Kali Age, Shirdi Sai and Sathya Sai who has donned the ochre robe. Lord Krishna, the beloved of Radha and who resides in the gardens has reincarnated as Sai. Dwarakamayi was Shirdi Sai's abode while Sathya Sai has chosen the banks of Chitravathi.
