title: Kasturi Ranga Kaveri Ranga Sri
lyrics:
Kasturi Ranga Kaveri Ranga Sri Ranga Ranga Ranga
Kalyana Ranga Karunanta Ranga
Sri Ranga Ranga Ranga
Garuda Gamana Ranga Shesha Shayana Ranga
Sri Ranga Ranga Ranga
meaning: Sing the name of Lord Ranga (Narayana) with the scented vermillion on His forehead who resides in Srirangam on the banks of river Kaveri. He is the most compassionate one who bestows welfare. He has Garuda as His chariot and reclines on the Celestial Serpent Adi Sesha.

title: Kasturi Tilakam Narayanam
lyrics:
Kasturi Tilakam Narayanam
Kamala Nayanam Narayanam [ Kasturi ... ]
Guruvayur Pura Narayanam
Kali Yuga Avatara Narayanam
Govinda Govinda Narayanam (2)
meaning: Glory to the lotus-eyed Lord Narayana adorning the scented vermillion who is the presiding deity at Guruvayur. He is also the cowherd boy Krishna who has incarnated in this Kali age as Lord Sai.

title: Kausalya Nandana Vaidehi Mohana
lyrics:
Kausalya Nandana Vaidehi Mohana
Rajeeva Lochana Rama
Yuga Avatara Parameshwara Rama
Asura Nikhandana Kodanda Rama
Bharatarchita Sri Rama Parthi Pureeshwara Rama
meaning: The lotus-eyed Lord Rama, son of Kausalya and enchanter of Vaidehi (Sita) is the incarnation of the Treta age. Salutations to the bow-wielding Rama who was worshipped by His brother Bharata. Lord Rama, the uprooter of the demon clan, now dwells at Parthi as Sai.

title: Kausalyatmaja Rama Charan
lyrics:
Kausalyatmaja Rama Charan
Vaidehi Priya Rama Charan
Maruti Sevitha Rama Charan
Bharatarchita Sri Rama Charan
Ahalyodharaka Rama Charan
Prashanthi Niketana Rama Charan
Rama Charan Sada Bhajo
meaning: Worship the Holy Feet of Lord Rama, the son of Kausalya and the enchanter of Vaidehi (Sita). The Holy Feet of Lord Rama confers supreme peace, were worshipped by Maruti (Hanuman) and Bharata and liberated Ahalya from her curse. Sing the glory of the Holy Feet of Lord Sai Rama whose abode is Prashanthi Nilayam.

title: Keshava Madhava
lyrics:
Keshava Madhava
Govinda Gopala
Hari Bol Hari Bol Hari Hari Bol
Keshava Madhava Govinda Bol
meaning: O mind, chant the name of Hari, Keshava, Madhava, Govinda and Gopala incessantly.

title: Keshava Madhava Jaya Deva Madhusudhana
lyrics:
Keshava Madhava Jaya Deva Madhusudhana
Netra Kamala Dala Athiva Manohara
Antaryami Prabhu Parameshwara
Maya Manusha Vesha Leeladhara (2)
meaning: Chant the various names of Lord Krishna (Keshava, Madhava, Madhusudhana), the one who has beautiful eyes like a lotus petal, the indweller, the one who is supremely enchanting and who has taken the deluding human form as a sport.

title: Kodanda Rama Raghava
lyrics:
Kodanda Rama Raghava Jaya Kalyana Krishna Keshava
Govinda Madhava Gopala Keshava
Narasimha Achyutha Narayana
Dasharatha Nandana Sita Manohara Danava Samhara Daya Nidhey
meaning: Victory to Lord Rama, who was born in Raghu dynasty and who held the great Kodanda bow. He is the darling son of Dasharatha and the beloved of Mother Sita. Glory to Lord Krishna whose beauty is unparalleled. He is also known by different names Govinda, Madhava, Gopala, Keshava, Narasimha, Achuyta and Narayana.

title: Koi Boley Hari Hari Koi
lyrics:
Koi Boley Hari Hari Koi Boley Ram Ram
Koi Boley Durga Kaali Koi Boley Sai Ma
Koi Boley Narayana Allah Bismillah
Koi Boley Nanak Buddha Mahavira
Sadhu Sant Fakira Jaane Sab Hai Tero Naam
Bol Man Allah Malik Bol Man Sai Ram
meaning: Some may call God as Hari while some others may call Ram. Some may say Durga Kaali but some others Sai Ma. If Hindus call Him Narayana, Muslims call Allah Bismillah and yet some others Nanak, Buddha and Mahavir. Saints, Sages and Fakirs (Muslim Saints) know that the One God is known by different names.

title: Koti Pranam Shata Koti Pranam
lyrics:
Koti Pranam Shata Koti Pranam
Hey Deena Natha Sai Ram (3)
Tum Ho Bhakthon Ke Yuga Avatar
Tum Ho Ananda Nanda Ke Lal
Parthi Puri Ke Sai Gopal [ Hey Deena Natha ... ]
meaning: Many repeated salutations to You Lord Sai, the refuge of the forlorn. You were born as the son of Nanda and presently the incarnation of our age, Sai Gopala residing at Parthi.

title: Krishna Bhajo Krishna Bhajo Murali
lyrics:
Krishna Bhajo Krishna Bhajo Murali Govinda Bhajo
Radhey Govinda Bhajo Radhey Gopala Bhajo [ Krishna Bhajo ... ]
Giridhari Shyama Bhajo Radhey Govinda Bhajo
Madhuvana Sanchari Shyama Gopala Bhajo (2)
meaning: Chant the name of Lord Krishna, the one holding the flute, the consort of Radha, the dark-complexioned one who held aloft the Govardhan mountain and the one who moved about in the forest inhabited by demon Madhu.

title: Krishna Gopala Yadu Nandana
lyrics:
Krishna Gopala Yadu Nandana
Venu Vilolana Mana Mohana [ Krishna Gopala ... ]
Mora Mukuta Gokula Ramana
Ghana Shyama Ananda Govinda
Krishna Murari Madhusudhana
meaning: Sing the Glory of God by chanting His various names. Krishna, Gopala, Yadu Nandana, Ghana Shyama, Govinda, Ananda and Murari. Krishna delights in playing the Flute, is enchanting in form with a peacock plumage on His head and the chieftain of Gokul.

title: Krishna Kanhaiya Krishna Kanhaiya
lyrics:
Krishna Kanhaiya Krishna Kanhaiya
Natavara Nanda Kumara Kanhaiya
Brindavan Ke Bansi Adhariya
Radha Manohara Raasa Rachaiya
Giridhara Naagara Shyama Kanhaiya
Sri Madhusudhana Sai Kanhaiya
meaning: Glory to Lord Krishna who holds the flute, is the supreme actor, the beloved son of Nanda. He is the one who enacted the Raasa leela (Celestial dance) with Radha and Gopikas in Brindavan and the one who held the mountain high and slayed the demon Madhu. Lord Sai is none other than Lord Krishna.

title: Krishna Krishna Govinda Krishna Gopala
lyrics:
Krishna Krishna Govinda Krishna Gopala Bala Krishna
Nanda Nandana Bhaktha Chandhana Gaana Lola Krishna
Sundara Vadana Saroja Nayana Radha Priya Krishna
Yadava Krishna Yashoda Krishna Sathya Sai Krishna
meaning: Glory to Lord Krishna, the son of Nanda and the one who is dear to His devotees and delights in music. He is Lotus eyed, with a charming countenance and is dear to Radha. He belongs to the Yadava clan, and is the son of Yashoda who has presently incarnated as Sathya Sai Krishna.

title: Krishna Krishna Govinda Narayana
lyrics:
Krishna Krishna Govinda Narayana
Krishna Rama Govinda Narayana
Sai Rama Govinda Sai Shyama Gopala
Sai Krishna Govinda Narayana (Harey)
meaning: Chant the Name of Krishna, Govinda, Narayana, Sai Rama, Sai Shyama and Sai Krishna to the delight of everyone.

title: Krishna Krishna Mana Mohana
lyrics:
Krishna Krishna Mana Mohana
Chitha Chora Radha Jeevana
Megha Shyama Madhusudhana
Radha Kantha Yadu Nandana
meaning: O Lord Krishna of the Yadu clan, You have an enchanting form, You are the very life of Radha. You are the dark-complexioned one who slayed the demon Madhu.

title: Krishna Krishna Mukunda Janardhana
lyrics:
Krishna Krishna Mukunda Janardhana
Krishna Govinda Narayana Hari
Achyuthananda Govinda Madhava (2)
Satchidananda Narayana Hari
meaning: Chant the different names of the imperishable Lord Krishna - Mukunda, Janardhana, Govinda, Narayana and Hari who is verily Truth, Awareness and Bliss.

title: Krishna Krishna Radha Krishna
lyrics:
Krishna Krishna Radha Krishna
Govinda Gopala Venu Krishna
Mana Mohana Krishna Madhusudhana Krishna
Murari Krishna Mukunda Krishna
meaning: Chant the name of Lord Krishna, the one with flute with His consort Radha, the Charmer who slayed the demons Madhu and Mura.

title: Krishna Krishna Yaduvara Krishna
lyrics:
Krishna Krishna Yaduvara Krishna
Murahara Keshava Yadava Madhava [ Krishna Krishna ... ]
Murali Manohara Krishna Murari
Krishna Murari Shyama Murari [ Murahara Keshava ... ]
meaning: Glory to Lord Krishna, born of Yadava clan, the dark complexioned one, the slayer of demons Madhu and Mura. He has an enchanting form with the flute.

title: Krishna Madhava Madhava Krishna
lyrics:
Krishna Madhava Madhava Krishna
Krishna Madhava Sai Harey
Brindavana Sanchari Shyama Gopala
Jaya Madhusudhana Jaya Nandalala
Jhulana Jhule Merey Sai Nandalala
meaning: Oh Krishna, the dark complexioned son of Nanda, the one who moved about in Brindavan, the one who slayed the demon Madhu, please swing in our hearts. You are verily our Lord Sai.

title: Krishna Mukunda Govinda Giridhara
lyrics:
Krishna Mukunda Govinda Giridhara
Murali Mohana Narayana
Parthi Purandara Narayana (2)
Madhava Sri Hari Mandara Giridhari
Govinda Murahara Narayana (Harey) [ Parthi Purandara ...) ]
meaning: Chant the names of Lord Krishna, Mukunda, Govinda, Giridhara, Murali, Narayana, Madhava, Hari, Murahara. Lord Sai is none other than Lord Krishna.

title: Krishna Murari Bhava Bhaya Haari
lyrics:
Krishna Murari Bhava Bhaya Haari Hey Giridhari Gopal
Parthi Vihari Hrudaya Vihari Bhaktha Sakha Bhagawan
Bhaktha Sakha Bhagawan ( Sai ) (2)
meaning: The slayer of demon Murari also destroys the fear of the cycle of birth and death, the resident of Parthi is the true friend of his devotees.

title: Krishna O Krishna Mujhey Darshan
lyrics:
Krishna O Krishna Mujhey Darshan Do Krishna
Krishna Sai Krishna Mujhey Darshan Do Krishna [ Krishna O Krishna ... ]
Giridhari Murari Krishna Ghana Shyama Murari Krishna
Sri Krishna Krishna Krishna Ghana Shyama Murari Krishna
Ab Aajaavo Krishna Mujhey Darshan Do Krishna
meaning:
Hey Krishna! Please grant Your Divine vision (darshan) to me. O blue-complexioned Lord Krishna, the Destroyer of the demon Mura, You lifted the mountain and enchanted everyone with Your Flute music. O Lord Sathya Sai, You are my beloved Lord Krishna, please listen to my heart’s yearnings. Come O Krishna, please come now and grant me Your darshan; I am longing for Your Divine Presence.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Krishna Radha Jaya Krishna Radha
lyrics:
Krishna Radha Jaya Krishna Radha
Nanda Gopa Bala Navaneetha Chora [ Krishna Radha ... ]
Krishna Radha Jaya Krishna Radha (3) [ Nanda Gopa ... ]
meaning: Chant the name of Krishna who is dear to Radha, the son of Nanda and the one who stole butter (worldly desires of devotees).

title: Krishna Rama Govinda Gokula Nandana
lyrics:
Krishna Rama Govinda Gokula Nandana Gopala
Rama Krishna Govinda Jaya Brindavana Gopala
Sai Krishna Govinda Parthi Pureeshwara Gopala
Gopala Sai Gopala
Gopi Manohara Gokula Bala Sai Murari
meaning: Chant the names of Lord Krishna, Rama and Govinda. Chant the name of Gopala, the charming child of Gokula and Brindavan. Gopala, the favourite of the Gopikas, and the one who slayed the demon Mura, is the same as our Sai.

title: Krishna Rama Govinda Narayana
lyrics:
Krishna Rama Govinda Narayana
Madhava Keshava Hari Narayana [ Krishna Rama ... ]
Sri Venu Gopala Krishna
Madhava Madhusudhana Narayana
meaning: Glory to Lord Narayana, the one who resides in the heart of Nara (man) who is also Rama and Krishna, the one bearing the flute in His Hands and the  slayer of demon Madhu.

title: Krishna Sri Hari Krishna
lyrics:
Krishna Sri Hari Krishna
Govinda Gopala Krishna Krishna
Nanda Mukunda Govinda Navaneetha Chora Gopala
Govinda Gopala Gokula Nandana Gopala
Krishna Sri Hari Krishna
Krishna Sri Sai Krishna
meaning: Chant the Various names of the Lord, Krishna, Hari, Govinda, Gopala, Mukunda, of the son of Nanda and the One who steals butter and Sai Krishna.

title: Krishnam Vande Nanda Kumaram
lyrics:
Krishnam Vande Nanda Kumaram
Radha Vallabha Navaneetha Choram
Ramam Vande Dasharatha Tanayam
Sita Vallabha Raghukula Tilakam
meaning: I bow to the little Krishna, the son of Nanda and the consort of Radha and the one who stole butter. I bow to Lord Rama, the son of Dasharatha, consort of Sita and the shining star of Raghu dynasty.

title: Krishnaya Charanam Krishnaya Charanam Krishnaya
lyrics:
Krishnaya Charanam Krishnaya Charanam Krishnaya Charanam Namo Namo
Krishnaya Charanam Namo Namo (2)
Sayeesha Charanam Sayeesha Charanam Sayeesha Charanam Namo Namo
Sayeesha Charanam Namo Namo (2)
meaning: Many prostrations at the Feet of Lord Krishna and Lord Sai.

title: Ksheerabdhi Shayana Narayana
lyrics:
Ksheerabdhi Shayana Narayana
Sri Lakshmi Ramana Narayana
Narayana Hari Narayana
Narahari Roopa Narayana
Vaikunta Vasa Narayana
Vaidehi Mohana Narayana
Narayana Hari Narayana
Natajana Paripala Narayana
meaning: Chant the Name Lord Narayana who reclines on the Ocean of Milk, consort of Sri Lakshmi and who Incarnated as Narasimha (half Man half Lion). Narayana who has Vaikunta as His Abode, is the charmer of Vaidehi, the One who takes complete care of those who have surrendered to Him.

title: Kuzhaludhi Geetai Pozhiyum Deva
lyrics:
Kuzhaludhi Geetai Pozhiyum Deva
Gopiyar Ullam Pugundha Deva
Parthiyil Padam Vaittha Sai Krishna
Shirdi Krishna Parthi Krishna (2)
meaning: You are Lord Krishna, the flute-player who blessed us with the Gita, the one who entered the hearts of Gopis, and the Lord who graces Shirdi and Parthi.

title: La ilaha il-Allah
lyrics: La ilaha il-Allah Allah Allah (4x)
meaning:
There is nothing but God.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Lambodhara Gananatha Gajanana
lyrics:
Lambodhara Gananatha Gajanana
Parvathi Nandana Shubhanana
Pashupathi Tanaya Siddhi Vinayaka
Pranavakaara Shambho Nandana
Parthi Pureesha Paahi Gajanana
Hey Shiva Nandana Shubhanana
meaning: Protect me Lord Ganesha, the Lord of Ganaas, who has an elephant head and is the big bellied son of Mother Parvathi and Lord Shiva. You are the one who embodies the sacred Om and who is verily Sai, the Lord of Parthi.

title: Lambodhara Hey Gowri Nandana
lyrics:
Lambodhara Hey Gowri Nandana
Vighna Vinashaka Shubhanana
Siddhi Vinayaka Hey Dukha Bhanjana
Asura Vinashaka Shubhanana
Gowri Nandana Mooshika Vahana [ Vighna Vinashaka ... ]
meaning: Glory to Lord Vinayaka (Ganesha), the son of Gowri, the one who removes obstacles, destroys worry, grants spiritual powers, bestows auspiciousness and uproots the demon clan.

title: Lambodhara Hey Vighneshwara
lyrics:
Lambodhara Hey Vighneshwara
Shambhu Kumara Siddeshwara [ Lambodhara ... ]
Ambika Tanaya Omkareshwara
Heramba Sai Shirdeeshwara (Partheeshwara)
meaning: Sing the glory of Lord Ganesha who removes obstacles, the son of Shambho (Shiva) and Ambika (Parvathi) and who has a big stomach. He is the Lord of Yogis, the embodiment of Om, and is also known as Heramba. He is none other than Sai, the Lord of Shirdi and Parthi.

title: Lambodhara Hey Vinayaka
lyrics:
Lambodhara Hey Vinayaka
Vighna Harana Girija Nandana
Shambhu Kumara Kalusha Vidhura
Siddhi Sadana Hey Gananatha
Pranavakaara Pashupathi Tanaya [ Vighna Harana ... ]
meaning: Glory be to the Lord of the Ganas, Lord Ganesha, the remover of obstacles, son of Mother Parvathi and Lord Shiva, one who removes our impurities and bestows us with power and wisdom, the very embodiment of the Pranava (Om).

title: Lambodhara Jaya Gajanana
lyrics:
Lambodhara Jaya Gajanana
Parvathi Nandana Parama Daya Ghana [ Lambodhara ... ]
Bandha Vimochana Bhava Bhaya Bhanjana
Pranava Swaroopa Hey Shiva Nandana
Paahi Prabho Maam Paahi Gajanana
meaning: Victory to the elephant-headed and the big-bellied Lord Ganesha, the beloved son of Mother Parvathi. O Lord, You are the most compassionate one who removes the bondage and fear of birth and death.  You are the very embodiment of the sacred Om. Please protect us, O Lord Ganesha.

title: Lambodhara Jaya Gowri Sutha
lyrics:
Lambodhara Jaya Gowri Sutha
Ganadhipa Jaya Gajanana [ Lambodhara ... ]
Phaalachandra Dhara Gaja Karneshwara
Partheeshwara Maam (Sayeeshwara Maam) Paahi Prabho
meaning: Victory to Lord Ganesha, the big-bellied one, the Lord of the Ganas (Shiva's army) and the son of Mother Gowri (Parvathi). Victory to the elephant-faced Lord who adorns the crescent moon on His forehead and who has big ears like that of an elephant. Protect me Lord Sai, the Lord of Parthi. You are none other than Lord Ganesha.

title: Lingodhbhavakara Lingeshwara
lyrics:
Lingodhbhavakara Lingeshwara
Partheeshwara Maam Paahi Prabho
Paahi Prabho Maam Dehi Vibho
meaning: Protect us O Sai, the Lord of Parthi, You are Lingeshwara and the one who creates Lingam out of His own Self.

title: Lord Jesus, Son Of God
lyrics:
Lord Jesus, son of God, son of God, You're the way and the light.
You're the way and the light, You're the love and the light,
When the world's in tears then the Lord appears,
You're the way and the light.

title: Lord Sathya Sai Bhagawan
lyrics:
Lord Sathya Sai Bhagawan Sathya Sai
 Bless Us, Protect us, Sri Sathya Sai
 Shirdi Sai Parthi Sai Prema Sai Jai Jai
 Puttaparthi Sai Jai Jai Brindavan Sai Jai Jai
 Ram Sai Krishna Sai Yesu Sai Jai Jai

title: Love In My Heart
lyrics:
Love in my heart, love in my home, love in my life, Sai is Love
Sai is my heart, Sai is my home, Sai is my life, Sai my own
Love, love, love is God, live, live, live in Love (2x)
Allelujah, Allelu Allelujah, Alleluia, Allelujah (2x)
Allelujah, Alleujah (2x)
 (next two lines sung in rounds)
Allelujah, Allelu Allelujah, Alleluia, Allelujah
Allelujah, Alleujah

title: Love Is My Form
lyrics:
Love Is My Form, Truth Is My Breath, Bliss Is My Food
My Life Is My Message Expansion Is My Life
No Reason For Love, No Season For Love, No Birth, No Death
Prema Sathya Ananda, Dharma Shanthi Ananda
Shirdi Sai, Sathya Sai, Prema Sai Jai Jai
Shirdi Baba, Sathya Baba, Prema Baba Jai Jai

title: Love peace righteousness and truth
lyrics:
Love, peace, righteousness and truth
 Holy spirit dwelling in us all
 Father in Heaven
 Give us Your love
 Father in Heaven
 Give us Your peace
 Love in every heart
 Peace in every mind
 Love here and now Sweet Jesus Christ, our Lord
 Love here and now Sri Sathya Sai Baba

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Ma Hey Ma
lyrics:
Ma Hey Ma (2)
Sai Mata Jagat Janani [ Ma Hey Ma ... ]
Veena Vadini Saraswathi Mata
Jagat Palini Lakshmi Mata
Ambe Bhavani Gowri Mata [ Sai Mata ... ]
meaning:
Sing the glory of Mother Sai, Mother of the Universe. She is the embodiment of Mother Saraswathi who plays on the Veena (a stringed instrument), Mother Lakshmi who sustains the world and Mother Parvathi, the Universal Mother.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Madhava Gopala
lyrics:
Madhava Gopala
Nanda Nandana Ghana Shyama Gopala [ Madhava ... ]
Shyama Sundara Brindavana Lola
Murali Manohara Giridhara Bala
Jaya Hari Govinda Radhe Gopala (3)
meaning: Sing the glory of Lord Krishna, the dark complexioned son of Nanda and dear consort of Radha. With His enchanting form with the Flute in hand, He played in Brindavan. He held aloft the Govardhana mountain to protect His devotees. Victory be to Lord Hari and Govinda.

title: Madhava Gopala Mana Mohana Gopala
lyrics:
Madhava Gopala Mana Mohana Gopala
Sai Mohana Gopala
Yashoda Ke Bala Yadu Nandana Gopala
Bala Gopala Hey Giridhara Gopala
Bala Gopala Giridhara Gopala
Sai Mohana Gopala
meaning:
Glory to Lord Gopala (Krishna), the protector of cows who is hailed as Madhava. Glory to the enchanting son of Yashoda of the Yadu clan. Glory to the one who lifted the Govardana mountain to protect His devotees. The most beautiful Lord Sai is none other than Lord Gopala.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Madhava Harey Krishna Madhura Mohana
lyrics:
Madhava Harey Krishna Madhura Mohana
Gokula Balana Devaki Nandana
Venu Vilolana Paapa Vinashana [ Madhava Harey ... ]
Radhika Jeevana Rajeeva Nayana
Nanda Sunandana Gopi Ramana [ Venu Vilolana ... ]
meaning: Sing the glory of Lord Krishna, the son of Devaki and the dear child of Gokula, who plays the flute and destroys our sins. He is the lotus-eyed lord who is the very life of Radha and the ever joyful lord of Gopis.

title: Madhava Harey Madhusudhana Harey
lyrics:
Madhava Harey Madhusudhana Harey
Yadava Harey Yadu Nandana Harey
Keshava Harey Radha Krishna Harey
Janardhana Mana Mohana Harey
Sai Satchidananda Harey
meaning: Chant the different names of Lord Krishna, of Yadava lineage, Madhava, Madhusudhana, the charmer of the minds and hearts of devotees and the very embodiment of Truth, Awareness and Bliss.

title: Madhava Madhava
lyrics:
Madhava Madhava
Madhusudhana Hari Madhava
Mathuradhipathey Keshava [ Madhava ... ]
Mohana Murali Mukunda Madhava
Pavana Parthi Pura Hari Madhava
Jaya Jaya Jaya Hey Jaya Hari Madhava
meaning: Victory to Lord Krishna, the slayer of demon Madhu. Victory to the Lord of Mathura who is attractive to behold and who plays the flute. Victory to Lord Sai, the resident of the sacred land of Parthi who is verily Lord Madhava (Krishna).

title: Madhava Mohana Harey Harey
lyrics:
Madhava Mohana Harey Harey 
Sai Krishna Harey Harey [ Madhava Mohana ... ] 
Rhuma Jhuma Rhuma Jhuma Nachey Krishna 
Payal Baajey Gopi Krishna 
Bansi Bajaavey Radha Krishna 
Aao Aao Krishna Krishna
meaning: Praise be to the sweet, bewitching Lord Sai Krishna. He dances with the sounds of His anklets. His flute enchants all.

title: Madhava Mohana Murari
lyrics:
Madhava Mohana Murari
Madhusudhana Hey Muralidhara [ Madhava Mohana ... ]
Govinda Ananda Dayaka
Gopala Giridhari Sri Hari
Sri Hari Sai Sri Hari
meaning: Glory to the sweet and enchanting Lord Krishna, the slayer of demon Madhu and the one who holds the flute. He held the Govardhana mountain aloft and grants Supreme Bliss. Lord Hari (Vishnu) is none other than Lord Sai.

title: Madhava Mohana Shyama Gopala
lyrics:
Madhava Mohana Shyama Gopala
Muralidhara Mukunda Gopala
Dwapara Yug Mey Krishna Gopala
Meera Ke Prabhu Giridhara Bala
Shyama Manohara Hey Nandalala
Parthi Pureeshwara Sai Gopala
meaning: Lord Gopala who had taken birth in the Dwapara age, Lord of Meera, son of Nanda has come again as Sai Gopala at Parthi.

title: Madhava Mohana Shyama Murari
lyrics:
Madhava Mohana Shyama Murari
Radha Vallabha Hrudaya Vihari [ Madhava Mohana ... ]
Murali Vinodana Madhuvana Sanchari
Sai Murari Sai Murari
Sharan Mey Lelo Prabhu Charana Tumhari
meaning: Chant the names of Krishna who is the consort of Radha and who is the indweller of the heart, He delights in playing the Flute and moves about in the forests of Madhu. Oh Lord Sai, You are none other than Krishna. I bow at Your feet, please accept me into Your fold.

title: Madhava Murahara Madhura Manohara Giridhara
lyrics:
Madhava Murahara Madhura Manohara Giridhara Gopala
Hey Giridhara Gopala Hey Giridhara Gopala Hey Giridhara Gopala
Nanda Kumara Navaneetha Chora Brindavana Sanchara
Bhakthoddhara Bala Gopala Giridhara Gopala [ Hey Giridhara Gopala ... ]
Murali Lola Munijana Pala Radha Hrudaya Vihara
Navaneetha Chora Nanda Kumara Giridhara Gopala [ Hey Giridhara Gopala ... ]
meaning: Sing continuously the glories of Lord Krishna, the one who lifted the Govardhan Hill to protect His tribesmen from the wrath of Lord Indra in the form of downpour of rain. He is the son of Nanda, with a bewitching form, who moves about in Brindavan and who liberates His devotees. He loves playing the Flute and is the protector of sages. He is adorned with garlands of 'Kausthubha' jewel and pearls. He is the protector of cows and is dear to the Gopis. He resides in the heart of Radha. He is the one who stole butter (hearts) from the Gopis.

title: Madhava Murahara Murali Gopala
lyrics:
Madhava Murahara Murali Gopala
Jaya Govinda Jaya Gopala
Parthi Purandara Parama Daya Ghana
Deena Janavana Sai Gopala [ Jaya Govinda ... ]
meaning: Victory to Govinda and Gopala (names of Lord Krishna), the one of unbounded compassion, dear to the forlorn and who is none other than Lord Sai, the life principle at Parthi.

title: Madhura Madhura Hey Muralidhari
lyrics:
Madhura Madhura Hey Muralidhari
Murahara Shourie Hey Giridhari
Parthi Vihari Hrudaya Vihari
Hari Hari Sri Hari Sai Murari
meaning: Salutations to Lord Hari who incarnated as Lord Krishna, the sweet one with the flute who destroyed the demon Mura,, the one who gives bliss, the resident of every heart and who is verily Lord Sai, the resident of Parthi.

title: Madhura Madhura Murali Ghana Shyama
lyrics:
Madhura Madhura Murali Ghana Shyama
Mathuradhipathey Radhey Shyama
Surdas Prabhu Hey Giridhari
Meera Ke Prabhu Hrudaya Vihari
meaning: Glory to the dark-complexioned Krishna, Lord of Mathura, the one who resides in everyone's heart and the Lord of Surdas and Meera.

title: Madhura Madhura Sai Naama
lyrics:
Madhura Madhura Sai Naama
Madhura Madhura Sai Dhyana [ Madhura Madhura ... ]
Madhura Madhura Sai Geeta
Madhura Madhura Sai Bodha
Sundara Sundara Sai Roopa
Jayatu Jayatu Sai Krishna
meaning: Sing the glories of Lord Sai whose name, contemplation, song, teachings are all sweetness personified and His form is beauty personified. Victory to Lord Sai who is verily Lord Krishna.

title: Madhura Madhuram Sri Rama Naamam
lyrics:
Madhura Madhuram Sri Rama Naamam
Marapurani Madhura Geetam [ Madhura Madhuram ... ]
Om Namo Shirdeeshwaraya
Om Namo Partheeshwaraya
Shirdeesha Naamam Partheesha Naamam
Sri Rama Naamam Madhurathi Madhuram
meaning: Chant the name of Lord Rama which is sweetness personified. Songs on His glory are unforgettably sweet. Salutations to Lord Sai, Lord of Shirdi and Puttaparthi. The name of Sai and the name of Rama are the sweetest of all.

title: Madhusudhana Harey Madhava
lyrics:
Madhusudhana Harey Madhava
Sri Vasudeva (Sai Deva) Janardhana
Hari Keshava Narayana
Sri Hari Govinda Mana Mohana
Janardhana Jagat Palana
Deenavana Dukha Bhanjana
Aravinda Lochana Ananda Naam [ Sri Vasudeva ... ]
meaning: Chant the names of Lord Krishna - Madhusudhana, Madhava, Vasudeva, Janardhana, Hari, Keshava, Narayana and Govinda. Chant the names of the one who charms the Mind, the motivator of people, the sustainer of the Universe, the destroyer of sorrows, the one who is lotus-eyed and whose name itself is Bliss.

title: Madhusudhana Hey Muralidhara
lyrics:
Madhusudhana Hey Muralidhara
Madhava Keshava Devadi Deva [ Madhusudhana Hey ... ]
Mana Mohana Hey Narayana
Narayana Sai Narayana [ Mana Mohana Hey ... ]
Bhuvana Bharana Vanditha Charana
meaning: Madhusudhana, Muralidhara, Madhava, Keshava, Mana Mohana are different names of the same Lord Krishna, the incarnation of Lord Narayana. Lord Sai is verily Lord Narayana and is the bestower of Auspiciousness, jewel of the Earth and whose Holy Feet are worthy of obeisance.

title: Madhusudhana Muralidhara
lyrics:
Madhusudhana Muralidhara
Madhura Madhura Hey Giridhara Bala
Madhava Madhusudhana
Hrudayanta Ranga Sri Sai Ranga
Sri Ranga Ranga Puttaparthi Ranga [ Madhava ... ]
meaning: Glory to Lord Krishna, the slayer of demon Madhu and the one who holds the flute. The child who lifted the Govardhan hill who is the very embodiment of sweetness, lures the minds of everyone. He is also Lord Ranga residing in our hearts and is verily Lord Sai residing at Parthi.

title: Madhuvan Ke Mohana Murali Bajaiyya
lyrics:
Madhuvan Ke Mohana Murali Bajaiyya
Giridhari Nanda Kumara Kanhaiya
Ananda Dham Balaram Ji Ke Bhaiyya (2)
Giridhari Nanda Kumara Kanhaiya
Gopi Manohara Raasa Rachaiya
Giridhari Nanda Kumara Kanhaiya (2)
Giridhari Nanda Kumara Kanhaiya
meaning: O adorable Lord Krishna, You are the son of Nanda, the brother of Balaram, the one who gives bliss and the enchanting one who dances with the Gopikas.

title: Madhuvana Ke Muraliwala
lyrics:
Madhuvana Ke Muraliwala
Nacho Nacho Nacho Nandalala
Nandalala Nandalala [ Nacho Nacho ... ]
Gopi Manohara Gopala Bala
Parthi Pureeshwara Hey Sai Natha [ Nacho Nacho ... ]
meaning: Dance O Krishna, the son of Nanda; dance, the one who holds the flute, moving around the forest of demon Madhu. You are the beloved Gopala of Gopis. You are none other than lord Sai of Parthi.

title: Madhuvana Murali Guna Gao
lyrics:
Madhuvana Murali Guna Gao
Madhusudhana Hari Naam Japo [ Madhuvana Murali ... ]
Vraja Gopi Priya Radhey Shyam Naam
Raghupathi Raghava Raja Ram Naam
Hrudaya Vihari Sri Sathya Sai Ram
Gowri Manohara Shankara Naam Bhajo
meaning: Sing the glory of Lord Krishna, the one with the Flute, who moves about in the forest and who is the slayer of demon Madhu. Chant the name of Shyam, the beloved Radha and the Gopis of Brindavan. Chant the name of Lord Rama of the Raghu dynasty and Lord Shankara (Shiva) who charms Mother Gowri and the name of Lord Sathya Sai who resides in everyone's heart.

title: Madhuvana Murali Shyama Murari
lyrics:
Madhuvana Murali Shyama Murari
Savariya Morey Raasa Vihari
Gokula Nandana Hey Giridhari
Deenan Ke Tum Bhava Bhaya Haari (2)
meaning: O dear Lord Krishna who danced the Raasa leela (celestial dance), O dear child of Gokula who lifted the Govardhan mountain and the one who removes the fear of birth and death, salutations to Thee.

title: Madhuvana Sanchari Shyama Murari
lyrics:
Madhuvana Sanchari Shyama Murari
Sri Madhusudhana Muralidhari [ Madhuvana Sanchari ... ]
Madhava Mohana Mayura Mukutadhara
Mathura Natha Prabhu (Sai) Giridhari
meaning: Glory to You, Lord Krishna. You are the slayer of demon Mura and the one who moved about in the forest of demon Madhu to slay him. You have worn the feather of the Peacock on Your head and is the Lord of Mathura who lifted the Govardhana mountain.

title: Madura Puri Nilayey Meenakshi
lyrics:
Madura Puri Nilayey Meenakshi
Kamakoti Nilayey Kamakshi [ Madura Puri ... ]
Kashi Puradheeshwari Vishweshwari
Parthi Puradheeshwari Sayeeshwari
meaning: Goddess Meenakshi has Her Abode in Madurai while Kamakshi has Her Abode in Kancheepuram, Vishweshwari has Her Abode in Kashi and Sayeeshwari has Her Abode in Parthi.

title: Maha Ganapathey Gajanana
lyrics:
Maha Ganapathey Gajanana
Uma Maheshwara Priya Nandana [ Maha Ganapathey ... ]
Gananayaka Vanditha Charana
Tava Charanam Bhava Bhaya Harana [ Uma Maheshwara ... ]
meaning: The dear son of Uma (Mother Parvathi) is the elephant-faced Lord Ganesha, the Lord of Ganaas (Shiva's army) whose feet are worshipped by everyone. Prostrations to You O Lord, the destroyer of cycle of birth and death.

title: Maha Ganapathey Namostuthey
lyrics:
Maha Ganapathey Namostuthey
Matanga Vadana Namostuthey [ Maha Ganapathey ... ]
Adi Poojita Gananatha
Ananda Dayaka Gananatha
Prathama Vandana Pranavakara
Vighneshwara Vinayaka
meaning: Pranaams to the elephant-faced Lord of the Ganaas, who receives the first prayer, who is the giver of bliss, the embodiment of Pranava Om and destroyer of obstacles in the path of spiritual practices.

title: Maha Ganapathey Namostuthey
lyrics:
Maha Ganapathey Namostuthey
Matanga Mukha Namostuthey [ Maha Ganapathey ... ]
Himadrija Sutha Namostuthey
Omkareshwara Namostuthey ( Sai )
meaning: Salutations to the great Lord of Ganaas, Ganesha, the elephant headed son of Parvathi, born of Himalaya mountains and the very embodiment of sacred syllable Om.

title: Mahadeva Maheshwara Sai Narayana
lyrics:
Mahadeva Maheshwara Sai Narayana
Natanagara Dukha Bhanjana Sai Narayana
Karunakara Akhileshwara Sai Narayana
Allah Ho Tum Mahavir Yesu Sai Narayana
Hrudayeshwara Partheeshwara Sai Narayana
meaning: Glory to Lord Sai, the Lord of all worlds, the epitome of compassion, the destroyer of sin, skillful dancer and the Lord of Lords. He is verily Lord Shiva, Narayana, Allah, Mahavir and Yesu. He is the indweller and the Lord of Parthi.

title: Mahadeva Shiva Shambho Shankara
lyrics:
Mahadeva Shiva Shambho Shankara
Maheshwara Shiva Shambho Shankara [ Mahadeva ... ]
Mouleeshwara Shiva Shambho Shankara
Madanaantaka Shiva Shambho Shankara
Mruthyunjaya Shiva Shambho Shankara
meaning: Glory to Lord Shiva, the Lord of Lords, Sovereign Lord, with braided Hair on His Head, the destroyer of Ego and the conqueror of Death and the one who confers all that is Auspicious.

title: Mahishasura Mardhini Mama Taapa Vimochani
lyrics:
Mahishasura Mardhini Mama Taapa Vimochani
Madhava Sodari Mangala Kaarini [ Mahishasura Mardhini ... ]
Puttapartheeshwari Sathya Sayeeshwari
Sangeeta Roopini Saraswathi Manohari
meaning: Glory be to Goddess Parvathi, the slayer of Mahisha, the remover of sins, the sister of Lord Madhava, the bestower of auspiciousness and Saraswathi, the very embodiment of music. She is verily Lord Sathya Sai, the dweller at Parthi.

title: Man Ek Baar Hari Bol
lyrics:
Man Ek Baar Hari Bol
Hari Hari Bol Hari Bol [ Man Ek Baar ... ]
Hari Pitha Hari Mata
Hari Guru Gnana Daata
Chidananda Roopa Hari Patitha Pavana Man Ek Baar Hari Bol
meaning: O Mind, chant the name of Lord Hari at least once. He is the Mother, Father, Preceptor and the one who bestows wisdom and who is the very embodiment of Awareness and Bliss and who is the redeemer of the downtrodden.

title: Man Mandir Mey Aao Giridhari
lyrics:
Man Mandir Mey Aao Giridhari
Nis Din Barsat Nayan Hamarey [ Man Mandir ... ]
Surdas Ke Shyama Murari
Akhiyan Terey Darsha Ke Pyaasi (2)
meaning: O Lord Krishna, the one who lifted the Govardhana hill, please be seated in our minds, our eyes are shedding tears everyday because of separation from You. O Lord of Surdas, our eyes are pining to have Your Darshan.

title: Man Mandir Mey Aao Pyaarey
lyrics:
Man Mandir Mey Aao Pyaarey Aao Sai Hamarey
Ek Tum Hi Ho Bandhu Sakharey
Aao Sai Hamarey
Man Ki Veena Tujhe Pukarey Aao Sai Hamarey
Bhava Sagar Mey Naiya Mori Paar Karo Rakhwarey
meaning:
O dear Sai, please come into the temple of our hearts. You are our only kin and friend. Our heart pines for You, O Lord, please come. Take our boats safely across this ocean of life, O Protector.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Man Mandir Mey Aao Sai
lyrics:
Man Mandir Mey Aao Sai
Sai Bhagawan Darsha Dikhao [ Man Mandir ... ]
Sada Nirantara Bhajo Sai Ram
Giridhara Naagara Natavara Shyam [ Sai Bhagawan ... ]
meaning: Come and grant me Your Vision in the altar of my mind, O Sai Bhagawan. Chant the name of Sai continuously. He is the Supreme Actor, who was the Lord of Meera.

title: Man Mandir Mey Rajadhi Raja
lyrics:
Man Mandir Mey Rajadhi Raja
Tum Ho Sai Maharaj
Narthana Sundara Nataraja
Shivakami Priya Shiva Raja [ Tum Ho Sai ... ]
meaning:
O Lord Sai, You are the king of kings enshrined in my heart, You are the Shiva Raja, the beloved of Mother Shivakami (Parvathi) and the master of dance.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Man Mandir Mey Sai Ram
lyrics:
Man Mandir Mey Sai Ram
Megha Shyam Radhey Shyam Sathya Sai Ram
Sri Ram Jaya Ram
Janam Janam Ka Tum Se Naata
Parthipuri Parameshwara Roopa
Deena Dayala Hey Jagannatha [ Parthipuri Parameshwara ... ]
Charan Mey Lelo Prabhu Sai Ram [ Megha Shyam ... ]
meaning: The dark complexioned Lord Krishna, Radha's consort is the same as Lord Sathya Sai Ram dwelling in everyone's heart. O Lord, accept me in Your fold, O the refuge of the forlorn. May we be bonded with You in all our lives.

title: Man Mey Merey Gopala Shyama
lyrics:
Man Mey Merey Gopala Shyama Radhey Nandalala
Shyama Gopala Sai Gopala
Brindavan Ke Nandalala Brindavan Ke Nandalala
Yashoda Tanaya Gopala
Yadu Kula Tilaka Gopala
Radha Lola Gopala
Raasa Vilola Gopala
meaning: O Lord Krishna, the dark-hued son of Nanda and Yashoda, You are enshrined in my heart. You are the star of Yadu clan, the beloved of Radha. You are the one who dances the Raasa Leela with the Gopikas in Brindavan.

title: Mana Bangaru Parthi Baba
lyrics:
Mana Bangaru Parthi Baba
Mana Shringara Vadana Sai [ Mana Bangaru ]
Antaryami Baba
Sarva Antaryami Sai (Mana)
meaning: Our dearest Baba of Parthi, the indweller of all beings, has a charming face and a golden heart.

title: Mana Mohana Krishna Kunja Vihari
lyrics:
Mana Mohana Krishna Kunja Vihari
Yadava Madhava Ranga Vittala Murari [ Mana Mohana ... ]
Ghana Shyama Sundara Hey Giridhari
Yadava Madhava Ranga Vittala Murari

Vittala Murari Ranga Vittala Murari
meaning:
O Lord Krishna, You are the charmer of our hearts, You reside in a garden (Kunja means creepers and vine, and here, it is a reference to Brindavan), You held aloft the Govardhana hill and You destroyed the demon Mura. O Madhava, You were born in the Yadava clan, and is verily Lord Vittala and Ranga and the one who has the beautiful complexion of dark rain bearing clouds.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Mana Mohana Murali Gopala Jaya
lyrics:
Mana Mohana Murali Gopala Jaya Govinda Radhey Gopala
Pandari Natha Jaya Hari Vittala
Govardhana Giridhari Gopala
meaning: Gopala with the flute in His hands has a bewitching form, which lures the mind, one who lifted the Govardhan hill to save His devotees is also Lord Vittala of Pandharpur.

title: Mana Mohana Muralidhari Jaya Radhey
lyrics:
Mana Mohana Muralidhari Jaya Radhey Govinda
Jaya Yamuna Teera Vihari Jaya Radhey Govinda
Jaya Brindavana Sanchari Jaya Radhey Govinda
Jaya Meera Prabhu Giridhari Jaya Radhey Govinda
Jaya Brindavana Sanchari Jaya Radhey Govinda [ Jaya Yamuna ... ]
meaning: Glory be to Lord Krishna (Govinda) who is a delight to the Mind, the player of Flute, who moves about on the banks of Yamuna river and Brindavan, and who is the Lord of Meera.

title: Mana Mohana Nandalal
lyrics:
Mana Mohana Nandalal
Mana Mohana Madhusudhana Brindavana Nandalal [ Mana Mohana ... ]
Mana Mohana Nandalal
Brindavana Nandalal [ Mana Mohana Madhusudhana ... ]
meaning: O entrancing Lord Krishna, the son of Nanda, You are the slayer of the demon Madhu and the one who played in the bower of Brindavan. You steal our minds, O Lord, who spent His playful and precious childhood in Brindavan.

title: Mana Mohana Shyama Murari
lyrics:
Mana Mohana Shyama Murari
Hey Giridhari Hrudaya Vihari
Brindavana Sanchari [ Mana Mohana ... ]
Gaana Vilola Murali Gopala
Sundara Shyama Gopala
Gopi Lola Gokula Bala
Hasita Vadana Sai Gopala
meaning: Glory to Lord Krishna who charms the Mind, who held aloft the mountain high, who is of dark complexion, the indweller of the Heart and who moves about the thick bushes of Brindavan. Lord Sai is verily Krishna who loves music, plays the Flute, delights in playing with the Gopis and has a smiling face.

title: Manasa Bhajorey Guru Charanam
lyrics:
Manasa Bhajorey Guru Charanam
Sai Charanam Pranamamyaham (Sathya) (2)
Nirmala Hrudaya Virajita Charanam
Sakala Charachara Vyapaka Charanam
Bhava Sagara Uddharaka Charanam [ (Sathya) Sai Charanam (2) ... ]
meaning: Oh Mind, sing the glory of Guru and adhere to the feet of Sathya Sai, the one seated in the pure heart, the one who is present in both animate and inanimate objects and helps us to cross the ocean of cycle of birth and death.

title: Manasa Bhajorey Guru Charanam
lyrics:
Manasa Bhajorey Guru Charanam
Dusthara Bhava Sagara Taranam
Guru Maharaj Guru Jai Jai
Sai Natha Sadguru Jai Jai
Om Namah Shivaya Om Namah Shivaya Om Namah Shivaya Shivaya Namah Om
Arunachala Shiva Arunachala Shiva Arunachala Shiva Aruna Shivom
Omkaram Baba Omkaram Baba Omkaram Baba Om Namo Baba
meaning: O mind, adhere to the feet of the Guru by singing His glory and take refuge under His feet, which enables us to cross the unconquerable ocean of life. Glory be to the venerable Guru Sainath. Chant repeatedly 'Om Nama Shivaya', 'Arunachala Shiva'. Prostrations to Baba who is the embodiment of Om.

title: Mandara Giridhara Madana Manohara
lyrics:
Mandara Giridhara Madana Manohara
Meera Ke Prabhu Giridhara Naagara
Giridhari Giridhari Govardhanadhara Giridhari (2)
Madhava Madhusudhana
Murali Gaana Vilola
meaning: Glory to Lord Krishna who lifted the Govardhana mountain, which was earlier known as Mandara mountains, to save the people from the wrath of Indra. Glory to the Lord of Meera and to the slayer of demon Madhu. Glory to the one who loves playing the flute.

title: Mandara Mala Dhara Jaya Gowri
lyrics:
Mandara Mala Dhara Jaya Gowri Shankara
Hara Hara Paahi Trinetra
Gangadhara Bimbadhara Chandramouli Shankara [ Mandara Mala Dhara ... ]
Vamadeva Mahadeva Shiva Shiva Shiva Shankara
Sathya Dharma Shanthi Prema Sathya Sai Shankara
meaning: Victory to Lord Shankara, the consort of Gowri, who adorns the garland of 'Mandara' flowers. Victory to the benevolent three-eyed one who wears the Ganga and the moon on His crown of hair. Victory to the God of Gods, Lord Shiva. He is none other than our Sathya Sai who is the embodiment of Truth, Righteousness, Peace and Love.

title: Mandir Mey Aao Madhava
lyrics:
Mandir Mey Aao Madhava
Madhava Keshava [ Mandir Mey ... ]
Adi Narayana Anantha Sai
Aao Aao Hrudaya Nivasi
Radha Lola Rakumayi Vittala
Ranga Panduranga Vittala

Vittala Vittala Panduranga Vittala
Vittala Vittala Parthi Ranga Vittala
meaning: I invite You in the temple of my heart, O Madhava, Keshava (names of Lord Krishna), You are the primordial, infinite Sai, the indweller of my heart. You are the same as Lord Vitthala, the beloved of Radha and Rakumayi.

title: Mandir Mey Tum Ram Ho
lyrics:
Mandir Mey Tum Ram Ho Sai
Masjid Mey Noor Mohammad (Allah Ho Akbar)
Gurudware Mey Tum Guru Nanak
Man Mandir Mey Sai Sai
Bolo Ram Ek Hi Naam
Sab Mil Bolo Sai Ram
Bolo Ram Ek Hi Naam [ Sab Mil ... ]
meaning: You are adored as Ram in the Temple, as the light of Mohammad in the mosque; You are Guru Nanak in the Gurudwara; In the temple of my mind, You are Sai. Chant the name of Ram, let us chant together 'Sai Ram'.

title: Mangala Aarati
lyrics:
Om Jaya Jagadheesa Harey
Swami Sathya Sai Harey
Bhaktha Jana Samrakshaka
Bhaktha Jana Samrakshaka
Parthi Maheshwara
Om Jaya Jagadheesa Harey

Sashi Vadhana Sree Karaa
Sarva Praana Pathey
Swami Sarva Praana Pathey
Aasritha Kalpa Latheeka
Aasritha Kalpa Latheeka
Aapadh Baandhavaa
Om Jaya Jagadheesa Harey

Maatha Pitha Guru Dhaivamu
Mari Anthayu Neevey
Swami Mari Anthayu Neevey
Naadha Brahma Jagan Naatha
Naadha Brahma Jagan Naatha
Naagendra Shayanaa
Om Jaya Jagadheesa Harey

Omkaara Roopa Ojaswi Om Saayi Mahadeva
Sathya Saayi Mahadeva
Mangala Aarathi Anduko
Mangala Aarathi Anduko
Mandhara Giridhari
Om Jaya Jagadheesa Harey

Narayana Narayana Om
Sathya Narayana Narayana Narayana Om
Narayana Narayana Om
Sathya Narayana Narayana Om
Sathya Narayana Narayana Om
Om Jai Sad Guru Devaa

Narayana Narayana Om
Sathya Narayana Narayana Narayana Om
Narayana Narayana Om
Sathya Narayana Narayana Om
Sathya Narayana Narayana Om
Om Jai Sad Guru Devaa

Narayana Narayana Om
Sathya Narayana Narayana Narayana Om
Narayana Narayana Om
Sathya Narayana Narayana Om
Sathya Narayana Narayana Om

Om Jai Sad Guru Devaa

――― देवनागरी ―――

ॐ जय जगदीश हरे
स्वामी सत्य साई हरे
भक्त जन सम्रक्षक
भक्त जन सम्रक्षक
पार्थी महेश्वर
ॐ जय जगदीश हरे

शशि वदन श्री कर
सर्व प्राण पते
स्वामी सर्व प्राण पते
आश्रित कल्प लतिका
आश्रित कल्प लतिका
आपद बाँधव
ॐ जय जगदीश हरे

माता पिता गुरु दैवमु
मरि अंतयु नीवे
स्वामी मरि अंतयु नीवे
नाद ब्रह्म जगन्नाथ
नाद ब्रह्म जगन्नाथ
नागेंद्र शयन
ॐ जय जगदीश हरे

ॐकार रूप ओजस्वी ॐ साईं महादेव
सत्य साईं महादेव
मंगल आरती अन्दुको
मंगल आरती अन्दुको
मंदर गिरिधारी
ॐ जय जगदीश हरे

नारायण नारायण ॐ
सत्य नारायण नारायण नारायण ॐ
नारायण नारायण ॐ

सत्य नारायण नारायण ॐ

नारायण नारायण ॐ
सत्य नारायण नारायण नारायण ॐ
नारायण नारायण ॐ
सत्य नारायण नारायण ॐ
सत्य नारायण नारायण ॐ
ॐ जय सद्गुरु देव

नारायण नारायण ॐ
सत्य नारायण नारायण नारायण ॐ
नारायण नारायण ॐ
सत्य नारायण नारायण ॐ
सत्य नारायण नारायण ॐ

ॐ जय सद्गुरु देव

title: Mangala Charana Gajanana
lyrics:
Mangala Charana Gajanana
Gajavadana Shubhanana [ Mangala Charana ... ]
Vidya Dayaka Buddhi Pradayaka
Gowri Tanaya Gajanana
meaning: Salutations to the Lotus Feet of the benevolent and goodness bestowing elephant-faced Lord Ganesha. He is the provider of knowledge and intelligence, the son of Gowri (Parvathi).

title: Mangala Dayaka Hey Gananatha
lyrics:
Mangala Dayaka Hey Gananatha
Pranava Swaroopa Vighna Vinasha
Hey Shiva Nandana Paahi Dayala
Parthi Pureeshwara Jagat Paripala [ Pranava Swaroopa ... ]
meaning: Glory to Lord Ganesha, the bestower of auspiciousness, Lord of the Ganaas, the very embodiment of Pranava (Omkar) and destroyer of obstacles. O the merciful, loving son of Lord Shiva, You are none other than the Lord of Parthi, Sai, the protector of the Universe.

title: Mangala Dayaka Matanga Mukha
lyrics:
Mangala Dayaka Matanga Mukha Jaya Jaya Jaya Gananatha
Mahadeva Shiva Gowri Nandana Jaya Jaya Jaya Gananatha
Mooshika Vahana Mukthi Pradayaka Jaya Jaya Jaya Gananatha
Mahadeva Shiva Gowri Nandana Jaya Jaya Jaya Gananatha
meaning:
Victory to Lord Ganesha who bestows auspiciousness, who is the beloved son of Lord Shiva and Mother Gowri. Victory to the Lord of Ganaas (Shiva's army), provider of liberation who rides on the mouse (represents the temperamental mind).

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Mangala Kaarini Jai Sai Ma
lyrics:
Mangala Kaarini Jai Sai Ma
Jai Sai Ma Jai Sai Ma [ Mangala Kaarini ... ]
Bhagya Pradayini Sai Ma
Bhava Bhaya Haarini Sai Ma
Tribhuvana Palini Jai Sai Ma
Mata Maheshwari Sai Ma
Jai Jai Jai Sai Ma (3)
meaning: Victory to Mother Sai who bestows auspiciousness and wealth, who is the destroyer of fear (worldly attachments) and who is the ruler of the three worlds.

title: Mangala Kara Hey Santoshi Ma
lyrics:
Mangala Kara Hey Santoshi Ma
Santoshi Mata Darshana Dey [ Mangala Kara ... ]
Sundara Roopini Suguna Manohari
Shanthi Pradayini Santoshi Ma (2)
meaning:
Glory to Mother Santoshi, the bestower of auspiciousness. O Mother Sai who is verily Mother Santoshi, please give Your vision. O the most beautiful one full of virtues, You bestow peace on the entire Universe.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Mangala Murthy Maruti Raya Raghava
lyrics:
Mangala Murthy Maruti Raya Raghava Priya Jaya Hanuman
Anjani Putra Anjaneya Vayu Kumara Jaya Hanuman
Sita Shoka Vinasha Kaaraka Rama Dootha Jaya Hanuman
Sakala Mangala Moola Kaarana Sarva Mangala Jaya Hanuman
Jai Jai Hanuman Jaya Hanuman Jai Jai Hanuman Jaya Hanuman (2)
meaning:
Victory to Hanuman, the embodiment of auspiciousness who is also known as Maruti Raya (King of Monkeys), who adores Lord Rama and is the son of Anjani and Vayu (Wind god). He is the one who removed the sorrow of Sita, the messenger of Rama and the one who bestows auspiciousness.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Mangala Shubhakari Mata Maheshwari
lyrics:
Mangala Shubhakari Mata Maheshwari
Ambe Bhavani Akhilandeshwari [ Mangala Shubhakari ... ]
Rajeeva Lochani Raja Rajeshwari
Adi Parashakthi Sri Parameshwari
Ananda Roopini Hey (Sai) Shiva Shankari
meaning: I propitiate Mother Maheshwari (Parvathi), who bestows auspiciousness, Mother Bhavani, the mother of the universe, the lotus-eyed Raja Rajeshwari and Shiva Shankari who is the personification of the primordial energy and eternal bliss. Glory to Lord Sai who is verily the Divine Mother.

title: Manuva Bolo Guru Charanam Manasa
lyrics:
Manuva Bolo Guru Charanam Manasa Bhajarey Sai Charanam
Sri Guru Charanam Sadguru Charanam
Sai Charana Namo [ Manuva Bolo ... ]
Sri Guru Charanam Prabhu Paada Charanam
Sai Charana Namo
Sadguru Charanam Pavana Charanam [ Sai Charana Namo ... ]
meaning:
Meditate upon the divine feet of the preceptor, Lord Sai, that liberates us from worldly existence.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Manuva Bolo Jai Sita Ram
lyrics:
Manuva Bolo Jai Sita Ram Bolo Jai Radhey Shyam
Jai Sita Ram Bolo Jai Radhey Shyam (3)
meaning: Let us chant and meditate on Lord Rama whose consort is Mother Sita, and Lord Shyam (Krishna), the savior of Mother Radha. Victory to Lord Rama and Lord Krishna.

title: Manuva Bolo Radhey Radhey Radhey
lyrics:
Manuva Bolo Radhey Radhey Radhey Radhey Shyam Naam
Ram Ram Ram Bolo Ram Sita Ram Naam [ Manuva Bolo ... ]
Ranga Ranga Ranga Bolo Panduranga Baba Naam
Parthi Vasa Sai Deva Panduranga Baba Naam
Tukaram Namdeva Bhaktha Sakha Baba Naam
Panduranga Panduranga Panduranga Baba Naam
meaning: Meditate on the various names of the Lord such as Shyam (Krishna), Ram and Panduranga, who is none other than our Sai, Lord of Parthi. The very same Lord was the friend of Saints like Tukaram and Namdev.

title: Mata Bhavani Jagadambe Ma
lyrics:
Mata Bhavani Jagadambe Ma
O Ma O Ma O Ma [ Mata Bhavani ... ]
Shakthi Pradayini Ananda Roopini
Katyayani Karuna Sadani [ O Ma ... ]
meaning: Glory to the Mother of the Universe, Mother Katyayani (Parvathi), the bestower of Power, the embodiment of bliss and the very abode of compassion.

title: Mata Bhavani Maheshwari
lyrics:
Mata Bhavani Maheshwari Sai Mata Bhavani Parameshwari
Mata Bhavani Sarveshwari
Mata Bhavani Krupa Sagari
Krupa Sagari Krupa Sagari Krupa Sagari [ Mata Bhavani ... ]
Kaarini Poorani Dharini Amba Mata Bhavani (2)
Durga Devi Duritha Nivarini Mata Bhavani (2)
meaning: Chant the name of Mother Bhavani, Maheshwari, who is none other than our Mother Sai. She is the goddess of all goddesses. She is the Ocean of Grace (Krupa Sagari), She is the Cause (Kaarini), She is the Fulfillment (Poorani), She is the one who sustains the Universe (Dharini), Mother Bhavani is the destroyer of evil.

title: Mata Maheshwari Tribhuvana Janani
lyrics:
Mata Maheshwari Tribhuvana Janani
Premamayi Sathya Sai Janani
Shiva Mana Mohini Paapa Vinashini
Veda Kalamayi Kalyana Dayini
Jagadodharini Parthi Narayani [ Premamayi ]
meaning: The mother of three worlds, Maheshwari (who is Parvathi the Consort of Shiva) who is none other than Lord Sathya Sai is the personification of Love, is the enchanter of Lord Shiva. She is the destroyer of sins, the embodiment of Vedas and the one who bestows auspiciousness. The goddess Narayani of Parthi is the uplifter of the Universe.

title: Mata Mata Sai Mata
lyrics:
Mata Mata Sai Mata
Jagatha Mata Sai Vishwa Mata [ Mata Mata ... ]
Durga Bhavani Kaali Kapalini
Shanthi Dayini Sai Mata
meaning: Mother Sai is the mother of the Universe. She is known by names like Durga, Bhavani, and Kali. She is the bestower of peace.

title: Mata Pitha Guru Bandhu Sakha
lyrics:
Mata Pitha Guru Bandhu Sakha Hari
Narayana Sai Narayana (2)
Allah Tum Ho Yesu Tum Ho
Buddha Zohrashtra Mahavir Tum Ho
Sab Ka Malik Ek Hai Bhagawan [ Narayana Sai ]
meaning: Oh Lord Sai Narayana you are the Mother, Father, Guru, Kith and Kin. You are none other than Allah, Jesus, Buddha, Zohrashtra, Mahavir and the Lord of the entire humanity.

title: Mata Rani Teri Jai Jai Kaar
lyrics:
Mata Rani Teri Jai Jai Kaar Ambe Rani Teri Jai Jai Kaar
Mata Rani Teri Jai Jai Kaar Ambe Rani Teri Jai Jai Kaar
Ma Sheravali Ma Jyotavali
Pahadavali Ma Lattavali
Prem Se Bolo (Jai Matadi)
Sare Bolo (Jai Matadi)
Sab Mil Bolo (Jai Matadi)
Baar Se Bolo (Jai Matadi)
Mata Rani Jai Jai Kaar Ambe Rani Jai Jai Kaar
meaning: Victory be to the divine mother, who rides majestically on a lion, who is effulgent, and who resides in mountainous terrain. Chant with love and jointly with everyone, victory be to the divine mother.

title: Mata Saraswathi
lyrics:
Mata Saraswathi
Vidya Dayini Veena Paani [ (Jagan) Mata ... ]
Shwethamayi Sangeethamayi
Chinmayi Chiraamayi
Veda Mata Gayathri
Premamayi Sathya Sai Mayi
meaning: O Mother Saraswathi, playing divine music with the Veena, You are the Mother of the whole world. Adorned in white, You are the embodiment of music, full of consciousness and is permanent. You are the Mother of the Vedas and the bestower of Knowledge. You are none other than Sathya Sai who is full of Love.

title: Matanga Vadana Ananda Sadana
lyrics:
Matanga Vadana Ananda Sadana
Mahadeva Shiva Shambho Nandana [ Matanga Vadana ... ]
Maya Vinashaka Mooshika Vahana
Mata Maheshwari Bhavani Nandana
Maha Ganapathey Mangala Charana (2)
meaning: Salutations to Lord Ganesha, the one with the face of elephant (Matanga), who is the abode of bliss (Ananda), the loving son of Lord Mahadeva (Shiva) the remover of Maya (illusion, ignorance), who rides on the mouse (Mooshika), the beloved son of Goddess Maheshwari (Parvathi), we bow to the Lotus Feet of the Great Lord Ganapathi.

title: Matanga Vadana Maam Palaya
lyrics:
Matanga Vadana Maam Palaya
Mouleeshwara Shiva Gowri Nandana (2)
Mangala Dayaka Siddhi Vinayaka
meaning: O elephant-faced Lord Ganesha, protect me. O beloved son of Lord Shiva and Gowri, You are the one who bestows auspiciousness and success in our endeavors.

title: Mathura Natha Gopala
lyrics:
Mathura Natha Gopala
Gokula Bala Gopala [ Mathura Natha ... ]
Goparipala Gopala
Gopala Sai Gopala
Murali Manohara Shyama Gopala
meaning: This song extols the attributes of Lord Krishna who is also called Gopala (protector of cows). He is described as the Lord of Mathura, the one who is dark complexioned, fond of flute and cares for the cows. He is none other than Lord Sai.

title: Mathuradhipathey Krishna Mukunda
lyrics:
Mathuradhipathey Krishna Mukunda
Madhusudhana Ghana Shyama Mukunda
Venu Vilolana Parthi Ramana
Yadu Kula Bhooshana Rajeeva Lochana
Parthi Pureeshwara Jaya Mana Mohana [ Madhusudhana ... ]
meaning: Glory to the Lord of Mathura, Lord Krishna, also known as Mukunda and Madhusudhana (the slayer of demon Madhu). He has a dark complexion, plays enchanting music on the Flute, the crown jewel of the Yadava clan and is lotus-eyed. Victory to Lord Sai, Lord of Parthi, who fills our minds with bliss. He is verily Lord Krishna.

title: May The Love We're Sharing
lyrics:
May The Love We're Sharing Spread Its Wings
Fly Across The Earth And Bring 
New Joy To Every Soul That Is Alive
Samastha Loka Sukhino Bhavanthu
May All The Beings In All The Worlds Be Happy

May The Grace Of God Flow From Our Hearts
Revealing All That's True
And Bringing Peace To Every Soul That Is Alive
Samastha Loka Sukhino Bhavanthu
May All The Beings In All The Worlds Be Happy

title: Meera Nath Harey Giridhari
lyrics:
Meera Nath Harey Giridhari
Radha Pyaarey Krishna Murari [ Meera Nath ... ]
Brindavana Ke Sai Murari
Bhakthoddhari Baba Murari
meaning: O Lord Krishna, You are the Lord of Meera, You are the beloved of Radha and the one who resides in Brindavan. You are verily Sai, who liberates all devotees.

title: Meherbaan Mera Allah Sai
lyrics:
Meherbaan Mera Allah Sai
Allah Sai Maulah Sai [ Meherbaan Mera ... ]
Tum Ho Yesu Buddha Sai
Zohrashtra Mahavir Nanak (Vahey Guru) Sai
meaning: O Lord Sai, You are the most compassionate Allah. You are Jesus, Buddha, Zohrashtra, Mahavira, Vahey Guru and Guru Nanak. Glory to Thee.

title: Mera Jeevan Terey Hawaley Prabhu
lyrics:
Mera Jeevan Terey Hawaley Prabhu Isey Pag Pag Tu Hi Sambhaley
Pag Pag Tu Hi Sambhaletey Ho Pag Pag Tu Hi Sambhaley [ Mera Jeevan ... ]
Bhava Sagar Mey Jeevan Naiya Dol Rahi Hai O Rakhvaiyya
Dol Rahi Hai O Rakhvaiyya
Isey Paar Tu Hi Utharey Prabhu Isey Pag Pag Tu Hi Sambhaley
Moh Maya Ke Bandhan Todo Hey Prabhu Apni Sharan Mey Lelo
Hey Prabhu Apni Sharan Mey Lelo
Is Paapi Ko Apnalo Prabhu Isey Pag Pag Tu Hi Sambhaley
meaning: I submit my life in Your care, O Lord. Please take care of it every moment. The boat of my life is wobbling in this sea of worldliness, O dear Caretaker, only You should take it across. Liberate us from the bondage of illusion, take us in Your care and shelter. Please accept this sinner, O Lord.

title: Mitha Smitha Sundara Mukharavinda Nacho
lyrics:
Mitha Smitha Sundara Mukharavinda Nacho Nandalala
Nacho Nandalala Nandalala (3)
Meera Ke Prabhu Lala Nandalala (3)
Nacho Nandalala Nandalala
meaning: Dance on in ecstacy, O the gentle, smiling, beautiful lotus-faced Lord Krishna, the darling son of Nanda and the Lord of Meera.

title: Mohana Murali Govinda Jaya Radhey
lyrics:
Mohana Murali Govinda Jaya Radhey Govinda
Hey Giridhari Govinda Jaya Radhey Govinda
Krishna Murari Govinda Jaya Radhey Govinda
Hrudaya Vihari (Parthi Vihari) Govinda Jaya Radhey Govinda
meaning: Victory to the enchanter with the flute, Lord Govinda, who lifted the mountain to protect His devotees and who is the beloved of Radha. Victory to Krishna - slayer of demon Mura (Murari). He is the one who resides in Parthi (and in devotees' hearts), He is Govinda (Vishnu).

title: Mohana Raghurama Ati Sundara Sri
lyrics:
Mohana Raghurama
Ati Sundara Sri Rama
Maruti Sevitha Rama
Sri Rama Rama Jaya Rama (2)
(Sri) Rama Rama Sai Rama
meaning: Chant the name of the enchanting Lord Rama of Raghu dynasty, the ever beautiful Sri Rama, who is served by Maruti (Hanuman). Victory to Thee, O Rama.

title: Mohana Rama Hey Sai Rama
lyrics:
Mohana Rama Hey Sai Rama
Pavana Naama Prashanthi Rama [ Mohana Rama ... ]
Karuna Nidhey Prabhu Karunya Rama
Bhaktha Jana Priya Palita Rama
Parthi Pureeshwara Hey Sai Rama (2)
meaning: The enchanting Rama is our Sai Rama. The blessed name of Prashanthi Rama, the Compassionate Lord who is full of mercy, is the beloved of the devotees.

title: Mother Oh Mother Sai Ma
lyrics:
Mother Oh Mother Sai Ma
You Mean The Whole World To Me Sai Ma
Mother Oh Mother Sai Ma
You Are The Light Of My Life Sai Ma
Ma Sai Ma, Ma Sai Ma
In Times Of Trouble And Despair
I Call Your Name, You Are Always There
How Can We Thank You Oh Dear Sai Ma
For All Your Patience And Love Sai Ma [ Ma Sai Ma ... ]

title: Mruthyunjayaya Namah Om
lyrics:
Mruthyunjayaya Namah Om
Tryambakaya Namah Om
Lingeshwaraya Namah Om
Sayeeshwaraya Namah Om
Om Namah Shivaya Namah Om (4)
meaning: Humble salutations to Lord Sayeeshwara who is none other than Lord Shiva also known as, Mruthyunjaya (one who has conquered death), Tryambaka (one with three eyes) and Lingeshwara (one with a form that has no beginning or end).

title: Mukunda Madhava Karivarada Sri Sathya
lyrics:
Mukunda Madhava Karivarada Sri Sathya Sai Ram
Govinda Keshava Sri Hari Roopa Sathya Sai Ram
Mathsya Kurma Varaha Narahari Dashavatari Ram
Parthi Vasa Palaya Maam Prabho Sathya Sai Ram
meaning:
O Lord Sathya Sai, You were the Kari Varada (Lord Narayana, the saviour of the elephant from the clutches of crocodile), Mukunda, Madhava, Govinda, Keshava (various names of Lord Krishna), You are none other than the Ten Incarnations of Lord Vishnu such as, Matsya (Fish), Kurma (Tortoise), Varaha (Boar), Narahari (Narasimha). I pray to You O Lord Sathya Sai to protect me.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Mukunda Madhava Murali Manohara Govardhana
lyrics:
Mukunda Madhava Murali Manohara Govardhana Giridhari
Gopi Poojita Manasa Chora Peetambara Dhari [ Mukunda Madhava ... ]
Geeta Bodhaka Sai Sundara
Vanditha Hrudaya Vihari (2)
meaning: Salutations to you Oh beautiful Lord Sai Krishna. you were worshipped by Gopikas, you stole their hearts wearing the yellow colored dress, you were called by many other names such as Mukunda, Madhava, Murali Manohara, Govardhan Giridhari (All names of Krishna), you were the preceptor for the Sacred Bhagawath Geeta and you reside in the hearts of the devotees who worship you.

title: Mukunda Murari Murari Gopal
lyrics:
Mukunda Murari Murari Gopal
Hey Gopala Sai Hey Sai Nandalal
Prashanthi Nivasi Nivasi Nandalal
Hey Antaratma Jyothi Hey Jyothi Nandalal
Sathyam Shivam Shivam Sundaram
Hey Sundara Roopa Hey Sai Nandalal
meaning: O Lord Krishna, darling son of Nanda, You are the slayer of demon Mura, You are the effulgent light of the Atma, You are Truth, Auspiciousness and Beauty. You are the embodiment of beauty, You are none other than Lord Sai who resides in Prashanthi.

title: Murali Gaana Lola Nanda Gopa
lyrics:
Murali Gaana Lola Nanda Gopa Bala Raavo Raavo Radha Lola Radha Lola
Treta Yugamuna Sita Ramudai
Dwapara Yugamuna Radha Loludai
Geetanu Drapina Taraka Naamudai
Yuga Yuga Manduna Kaguroopa Dariyai
meaning: Welcome O Lord Krishna, Nanda's Son, the beloved of Radha. In the Age of Treta, You incarnated as Rama. In the Age of Dwapara, You enchanted Radha and taught the Sacred Hymn of Bhagavad Geetha. You are the liberator of humanity and in every Age You are the most beautiful one to look at.

title: Murali Krishna Mukunda Krishna Mohana
lyrics:
Murali Krishna Mukunda Krishna Mohana Krishna Krishna Krishna
Gopi Krishna Gopala Krishna Govardhanadhara Krishna Krishna
Radha Krishna Bala Krishna Raasa Vilola Krishna Krishna
Shirdi Krishna Parthi Krishna Sri Sathya Sai Krishna Krishna
meaning: This song extols Lord Krishna's beauty and glory by chanting His various names and attributes.

title: Murali Manohara Natavara Lala
lyrics:
Murali Manohara Natavara Lala
Shyama Manohara Hey Nandalala [ Murali Manohara ... ]
Nanda Mukunda Goparipala
Jaya Jaya Govinda Gopala Bala
meaning: Victory to the enchanting Flutist, Lord Krishna, the dark-hued son of Nanda and the protector of the cowherd.

title: Murali Manohara Shyama Murari
lyrics:
Murali Manohara Shyama Murari
Gopala Sai Gopala (2)
Radha Lola Harey Giridhari
Gopala Sai Gopala (2)
meaning: Salutations to you Oh Lord Gopala (Krishna) you are fond of the music on flute, you are the beloved of Radha.

title: Murali Murali Murali Ghana Shyam
lyrics:
Murali Murali Murali Ghana Shyam
Mohana Murali Radhey (Sai) Shyam [ Murali Murali ... ]
Kanakambara Dhara Karuna Sagara
Meera Ke Prabhu Giridhara Naagara
Parthi Pureeshwara Sai Shyam
meaning:
Salutations to Lord Krishna (Shyam) who plays enchanting music on the Flute (Murali). He is the beloved of Radha, He adorns the golden colored cloth, He is compassion personified, He is the Lord of His greatest devotee Meera, He saved the cowherds by deftly lifting the Govardhana Mountain. He is none other than Lord Sai residing in Parthi.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Murali Vinodana Munijana Mohana
lyrics:
Murali Vinodana Munijana Mohana
Natana Manohara Gopala
Nithya Niranjana Hrudaya Sanjeevana
Deena Janavana Gopala [ Natana Manohara ... ]
meaning: Oh Krishna, You play the flute, You are charmer of the minds of sages, enchanting dancer, ever new and able to resurrect the heart and who is compassionate towards the afflicted.

title: Muralidhara Bada Chitha Chor
lyrics:
Muralidhara Bada Chitha Chor
Giridhara Bala Nanda Kishore
Rhumka Jhumaka Jhuma Ghungaroo Bajey
Rhuma Jhuma Rhuma Jhuma Payal Baajey
meaning: Glory to the beautiful Flutist Lord Krishna, the stealer of hearts, the one who lifted the Govardhana mountain and the beloved son of Nanda. Dance, dear Lord, may the anklets that adorn Your Holy Feet play mellifluous music.

title: Muralidhara Gopala Madhura
lyrics:
Muralidhara Gopala Madhura
Megha Roopa Hari Manasa Chora [ Muralidhara ... ]
Radha Madhava Kunja Vihara
Ananda Ghana Roopa Naama Madhura (3)
meaning:
O sweet Lord Gopala (Krishna), with the flute in Your hands and with the complexion of dark clouds, You steal the hearts of devotees. You are the beloved of Radha. With beautiful and sweet name and form You stroll in Brindavan.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Muralidhara Hey Ghana Shyama
lyrics:
Muralidhara Hey Ghana Shyama
Partheeshwara Sai Shyama
Giridhari Parthi Vihari
Meera Ke Giridhari
Surdas Ke Krishna Murari
Ghana Shyama Megha Shyama Sai Shyama [ Giridhari ... ]
meaning: Salutations to You Lord Sai, resident of Parthi. You are none other than Lord Krishna, the Lord of Meera and Surdas. You held the Govardhan Mountain to save the cowherds. Your complexion is that of dark clouds.

title: Muralidhara Manamohana Madhusudhana Krishna
lyrics:
Muralidhara Mana Mohana Madhusudhana Krishna
Natanagara Jaya Madhava Hey Keshava Krishna Krishna Krishna [ Muralidhara ...  ]
Bansidhara Dukha Bhanjana Yadu Nandana Krishna
Radhey Govinda Sai Mukunda Gopi Jana Priya Krishna
meaning: O Lord Sai Krishna, son of Yadu Dynasty, the one holding the Flute, You are also known as Madhusudhana, Keshava and adored by Your devotees, whose sorrows were driven away by You.

title: Muralidhara Mukunda Murari
lyrics:
Muralidhara Mukunda Murari
Govardhana Giridhari Murari
Maya Nataka Sutradhari (2)
Maya Manusha Veshadhari
Sai Murari Sathya Sai Murari
meaning: Oh Lord Krishna with the flute in one hand, you have lifted the Govardhana Mountain with the other, you have annihilated the demon Mura, you have assumed the illusory form of human being for directing and guiding humanity. You are none other than Sathya Sai.

title: Muralidhara Murahara Natavara
lyrics:
Muralidhara Murahara Natavara
Gopi Jana Priya Giridhara
Brindavana Sanchara Jagadodhara
Yashoda Bala Nanda Kumara
meaning: Salutations to you Lord Krishna, son of Nanda and Yashoda, holding flute in hand, you are the supreme dancer whom the Gopis adore, you stroll in Brindavan and up lift the humanity from miseries.

title: Muruga Muruga
lyrics:
Muruga Muruga, Muruga Muruga
Muruga Muruga Shakthi Vela Muruga, You Are My Shining Star
Kartikeya Muruga Vadi Vela Muruga, Come To Me Lord Muruga
Muruga Muruga Muruga Muruga
When I Need You, Muruga, You Are There, Muruga, To Take All My Troubles Away
You're My Swami, Muruga, Give Me Life Muruga, Va Va Vadi Velava

title: My eyes are forever seeing Your form
lyrics:
My eyes are forever seeing Your form,
 My ears are forever hearing Sai Ram
 My voice is forever singing Your glory, My Lord
 Sai Natha Sai Natha, Jaya Jaya Hey Sai Natha
 Make my body Your Puttaparthi
 Make my heart Your Prashanthi
 Fill my life with Love, Peace and Joy
 And the music of Your glory Sai Natha,
 Sai Natha Sai Natha, Jaya Jaya Hey Sai Natha

title: Mythili Pathey Raghu Nandana
lyrics:
Mythili Pathey Raghu Nandana
Rama Raghava Rajeeva Lochana [ Mythili Pathey ... ]
Deenavana Hey Karunamaya
Kamala Nayana Kausalya Tanaya
meaning: Glory to the descendant of the Raghu dynasty, Lord Rama, the Lord of Sita, the princess of Mithila. Glory to the lotus-eyed Lord Rama, the protector of the poor, the one filled with compassion and the one who is the son of Queen Kausalya.

title: Naada Brahma Hari Sai Harey
lyrics:
Naada Brahma Hari Sai Harey
Narayana Hari Sai Harey [ Naada Brahma ... ]
Natana Kaladhara Sai Harey
Nagabharana Sai Harey
Sai Harey Sathya Sai Harey (3)
meaning: Salutations to Lord Sai, the one who exists in the form of divine music, the one who is verily Lord Narayana and Lord Shiva, the performer of the divine dance and the one who adorns the snake as a jewel. Salutations to Lord Sathya Sai.

title: Naada Brahma Sayeeshwara
lyrics:
Naada Brahma Sayeeshwara
Hara Hara Shiva Shiva Shankara
Gowri Ramana Sadashiva
Hara Hara Gangey Mahadeva (2)
Hara Hara Gangey Mahadeva (3)
meaning: Glory to Lord Sai, the Lord of divine Music, the very embodiment of Lord Shiva, the one reveling in the cosmic dance, the Lord of Goddess Parvathi, the Eternal Lord holding the Holy river Ganga in His hair locks! Glory to the great Lord Sai Shiva.

title: Naada Brahmam Sayeeshwaram
lyrics:
Naada Brahmam Sayeeshwaram
Nithya Nirmala Sayeeshwaram [ Naada Brahmam … ]
Omkara Roopam Sayeeshwaram
Prema Pradatam Sayeeshwaram
Satchitanandam Sayeeshwaram
Sadguru Natham Sayeeshwaram
meaning: Glory to Lord Sai, the Lord of divine music, the one who is eternally pure, the embodiment of Om, the bestower of divine love, the embodiment of truth, consciousness and bliss. Salutations to the divine Preceptor, Lord Sai.

title: Naada Brahmamayi Sayeeshwari
lyrics:
Naada Brahmamayi Sayeeshwari
Bhagawathi Mata Krupa Sagari [ Naada ... ]
Varahi Vaishnavi Vageshwari
Matangi Mahamaye Mookambikey
Parameshwari Hari Sodari
Bhava Bhaya Haarini Sathya Sayeeshwari
meaning:
O Mother Sai, the abode of divine music, You are the Ocean of compassion. You are adored by various names, Varahi (a form of Shakthi), Vaishnavi (the sister of Vishnu). You are the bestower of speech who is worshipped as Meenakshi, Mahamayi and Mookambike in various forms in temples. O Supreme Mother, the sister of Vishnu, You are the one who removes the fear of worldly existence. O Mother Sathya Sai, You are verily Mother Parvathi.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Naam Bhajo Hari Naam Bhajo
lyrics:
Naam Bhajo Hari Naam Bhajo
Narayana Sai Narayana [ Naam Bhajo ... ]
Nanda Ananda Mukunda Harey (2)
Brindavana Sai Baba Harey
Baba Harey Sai Baba Harey (3)
meaning: Chant the name of Lord Hari who incarnated as Lord Krishna, the adorable son of Nanda in Brindavan. Lord Sai Baba is none other than Lord Hari.

title: Nachey Tribhanga Krishna Murari
lyrics:
Nachey Tribhanga Krishna Murari
Baajey Mrudanga Manjula Bheri [ Nachey ... ]
Karunanta Ranga Yuga Avatari
Sri Sai Ranga Bhava Bhaya Haari
meaning: Glory to Lord Krishna who dances in the pose of tribhanga (three bends). Let the percussion instrument Mrudanga and the temple drums beat. O Lord of Compassion, the Avatar of this age, O Sai, salutations to Thee, who removes the fear of this worldly existence.

title: Nacho Hey Nataraj Shiva Shambho
lyrics:
Nacho Hey Nataraj Shiva Shambho
Hara Bholey Nath Shiva Shambho
Shiva Shambho Shiva Shambho
Dama Dama Dama Dama Damaru Bajey
Hara Bholey Nath (Sai Nath) Shiva Shambho
meaning: Sing the glory of Lord Shiva who performs the Celestial dance while His drum "Damaru" beats.

title: Nacho Nacho Hey Nataraj
lyrics:
Nacho Nacho Hey Nataraj
Jagadeeshwara Partheeshwara Sayeeshwara [ Nacho Nacho ... ]
Vibhuti Sundara Hey Nataraj
Bhavani Shankara Hey Nataraj
Sai Manohara Hey Nataraj [ Jagadeeshwara ... ]
meaning: O Lord Shiva, perform the cosmic dance. O Lord of the Universe, Sai, the Lord of Puttaparthi, You are verily Lord Shiva who is beautifully smeared with the holy ash and the consort of Bhavani (Parvathi). O Sai Shiva, our salutations to You.

title: Nacho Nacho Nacho Nandalala
lyrics:
Nacho Nacho Nacho Nandalala
Nandalala Nandalala [ Nacho Nacho ... ]
Narahari Roopa Narayana
Narayana Sai Narayana [ Nandalala ... ]
Rhuma Jhuma Payal Ghungaroo Bajey
Ghungaroo Bajey Sai Murali Bajey [ Nandalala ... ]
meaning:
Oh Son of Nanda, Krishna, perform the divine dance. Oh Lord Sai Narayana who assumed the form of Lion-God Narasimha, let the anklets, the musical instrument Ghunguroo play, let the flute play the glory of Lord Sai Krishna.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Namah Parvathi Pathayey Hara Hara
lyrics:
Namah Parvathi Pathayey Hara Hara
Hara Hara Shankara Mahadeva
Hara Hara Hara Hara Mahadeva
Shiva Shiva Shiva Shiva Sadashiva
Mahadeva Sadashiva
Sadashiva Mahadeva
Hara Hara Hara Hara Mahadeva (3)
Shiva Shiva Shiva Shiva Sadashiva
Mahadeva Sadashiva [ Sadashiva Mahadeva ]
meaning: Salutations to Hara or Shiva, who is the Lord of Parvathi. You are Shankara or doer of good, you are the greatest Lord (Mahadeva), You are the Eternal Lord (Sadashiva).

title: Namah Shivaya Namah Shivaya
lyrics:
Namah Shivaya Namah Shivaya
Samba Sadashiva Namah Shivaya
Girija Shankara Namah Shivaya
Bhavani Shankara Namah Shivaya
Lingodhbhavakara Sai Manohara
Namah Shivaya Namah Shivaya (2)
meaning: Prostrations to Shiva, One who is with Divine Mother Parvathi, Who is Eternal, Who is the Lord of Parvathi, Who as Sai creates the divine Linga, who conquers the mind.

title: Namami Brahma Namami Vishnu Namami
lyrics:
Namami Brahma Namami Vishnu Namami Maheshwara
Smarami Brahma Smarami Vishnu
Smarami Sayeeshwara (2)
meaning: I salute Brahma, the God of Creation, prostrate to Lord Vishnu, the God of sustenance and worship Lord Shiva, the Lord of Destruction. I meditate on Brahma, contemplate on Vishnu and dwell upon Lord Sai.

title: Namami Nithyam Gananatham
lyrics:
Namami Nithyam Gananatham Smarami Nithyam Gajavadanam
Namami Nithyam Gananatham 
Smarami Nithyam Gajavadanam
meaning:
I worship Lord Ganesha every moment. He is the Lord of the Ganaas or the attendants of Lord Shiva. I meditate daily upon Lord Ganapathi, who has the face of an elephant.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Namami Sai Pada Pankajam
lyrics:
Namami Sai Pada Pankajam
Smarami Sai Naamamrutham
Bhajami Sai Charanambhujam
Karomi Sai Sankeertanam
meaning: Let us worship the Lotus Feet of Lord Sai, meditate upon the nectar of His Name, sing the glory of His Divine Lotus Feet and perform the singing of His glory.

title: Naman Karoon Mein Guru Charanam
lyrics:
Naman Karoon Mein Guru Charanam Guru Charanam Sadguru Charanam
Pranavananda Ananda Chandha
Sai Guru Mama Guru Satchidananda [ Naman Karoon ... ]
Shanthi Vidayaka Guru Govinda
Mangala Dayaka Sadguru Natha
Eshwaramba Priya Tanaya
meaning: I bow down to the feet of the eternal Guru, the embodiment of Om or the Pranava. The blissful Sai is my Guru and the form of Satchidananda - symbolizing Truth, Existence and Bliss. He is the One who bestows everlasting peace, He is Guru Govinda, the great Preceptor, He is the Real Teacher who blesses with auspiciousness. He is Sai, the beloved son of Mother Eshwaramba.

title: Namasthey Namasthey Guru Maharaj
lyrics:
Namasthey Namasthey Guru Maharaj
Sadguru Sri Sathya Sai Maharaj
Sharanam Sharanam Sri Sayeesha
Sashtanga Sharanam Sarvesha
meaning: Oh King of Preceptors! I bow down to You. You are the Eternal Preceptor Sathya Sai. I surrender to You Oh Sai! I offer reverential prostration with all the eight limbs to You, Oh Lord of the Lords!

title: Namo Bhagawathey Vasudevaya
lyrics:
Namo Bhagawathey Vasudevaya
Namo Bhagawathey Rama Roopaya
Namo Bhagawathey Shyama Roopaya [ Namo Bhagawathey ... ]
Rama Rahim Krishna Karim Yesu Buddha Mahavir
Sarva Dharma Priya Sai Devaya
Sarva Dharma Priya Sai Roopaya
meaning: I bow down to the Lord in the form of Krishna, son of Vasudeva, I worship the Lord in the form of Rama, I prostrate the Lord in the form of Krishna, the star of Yadu dynasty or the blue-colored Lord Rama, the star of Raghu dynasty. He is Rahim and Karim (names of Allah), the merciful and compassionate one, Jesus Christ, Buddha and Mahavir. I bow down to Lord Sai who is fond of all faiths.

title: Namo Naarasimha Asura Vinasha
lyrics:
Namo Naarasimha Asura Vinasha
Triloka Pala Trivikrama
Simha Mukha Dhari Hari Narayana
Prahalada Rakshaka Hari Narayana
Sri Parthi Vasaya Sathya Narayana
Bhakthoddharaka Sai Narayana
meaning:
Salutations to Lord Narasimha, the destroyer of demons, the incarnation of Lord Vishnu. He sustains the three worlds, has the fierce face of a lion, and is the protector of Prahalada. He lives in Puttaparthi as our Lord Sathya Sai, the one who rescues all of His devotees.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Namo Namo Hari Narayana
lyrics:
Namo Namo Hari Narayana (3)
Narahari Roopa Narayana
Naada Swaroopa Narayana
Parthi Pureesha Narayana
Paapa Vimochana Narayana
Narayana Hari (Sai) Narayana
meaning: I bow down to Lord Sai who is the incarnation of Lord Vishnu - the ultimate abode of all creation. He is the form of the lion-faced Lord Narasimha. He is the form of divine music. He is the Lord of Puttaparthi. He is the one who cleanses us of our sins.

title: Namo Namo Nataraja Namo
lyrics:
Namo Namo Nataraja Namo Hara Jata Jootadhara Shambho
Namo Namo Nataraja
Pavana Gangadhari
Danava Mada Samhari
Parthipuri Vihari
Parama Dayaghana Shouri
Namo Namo Nataraja

Namo Namo Nataraja (2)
meaning: I bow down to Lord Shiva who is the Lord of the cosmic dance. He is the doer of good, Shambho, who has matted locks on His head, the pure one who bears the holy river Ganga on His hair. He is one who has killed the pride of the demons. He is one who resides in Puttaparthi as Sai. He is full of infinite compassion.

title: Namo Namo Sai Narayana
lyrics:
Namo Namo Sai Narayana (3)
Kali Yuga Avatara Narayana
Karuna Sagara Narayana
Swagatham Sai Narayana
Swagatham Swagatham
Swagatham Sai Narayana (2)
meaning:
I bow to Lord Sai, the incarnation of Lord Narayana in this Kali Age. He is the ocean of compassion. I welcome Thee (to my heart), O Lord Sai Narayana.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Namo Namo Sri Devi Namo
lyrics:
Namo Namo Sri Devi Namo
Shritha Jana Palini Sai Namo
Chinmaya Roopini Devi Namo
Sri Partheeshwari Sai Namo
meaning: Salutations to the Divine Mother Sai, the Goddess of Parthi, the embodiment of pure consciousness and the protector of all those to surrender to Her.

title: Namo Sharada Namo Sharada Namo
lyrics:
Namo Sharada Namo Sharada Namo Sharada Mata
Hey Vidya Gnana Pradayini
Ma Veena Pusthaka Dharini
Bhava Bhanjani Manoranjani
Sathya Sayeeshwari Mata
Sathya Sayeeshwari Sathya Sayeeshwari Sathya Sayeeshwari Mata
Sathya Sayeeshwari Mata
meaning: I bow down to Mother Sharada (Saraswathi), the one who bestows education, knowledge, the one who holds the string instrument 'Veena' and the book in Her hands. She removes the fear of existence and enchants the mind. She is none other than Mother Sathya Sai.

title: Namostuthey Ganapathi Ganaraya
lyrics:
Namostuthey Ganapathi Ganaraya
Namostuthey Namostuthey [ Namostuthey ... ]
Hey Shiva Nandana Bala Gajanana
Bala (Sai) Gajanana Namostuthey [ Namostuthey Namostuthey ... ]
meaning:
I bow down to You, Lord Ganapathi (Ganesha), the Lord of the Ganaas. Salutations to the son of Lord Shiva and the one who has the mouse as His vehicle. I repeatedly bow down to You, O Lord Sai, You are verily the elephant-faced Lord Ganesha.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Namu Amida Butsu Namu Amida
lyrics:
Namu Amida Butsu Namu Amida
Namu Amida Butsu Namu Amida
Namu Amida Butsu (3x) Namu Amida
Namu Amida Butsu
Namu Amida Butsu Namu Amida
meaning:
Salutations to Lord Amida Buddha in which I take refuge.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Nanda Gopal Nanda Gopal
lyrics:
Nanda Gopal Nanda Gopal
Nanda Mukunda Shyama Gopal [ Nanda Gopal ... ]
Radha Madhava Radhey Gopal
Bhakta Uddhara Parthi Gopal
Sai Gopal (Sathya) Sai Gopal
meaning: Glory to the son of Nanda, Lord Krishna, whose is dark-complexioned, the one who is the liberator and the Lord of Radha. He is none other than Lord Sathya Sai of Parthi who fosters His devotees.

title: Nanda Ke Dularey Bhaiyya Nacho
lyrics:
Nanda Ke Dularey Bhaiyya Nacho Nacho Nacho
Murali Ghana Shyama Mora Mukuta Dhama
Nacho Nacho Nacho Nacho Nandalala
Swagatham Krishna Krishna Sharanagatham Krishna
Aao Merey Nayanon Mey Aao Merey Bhajanon Mey
Sundara Sundara Gopala Shyama Sundara Sai Gopala
Antaryami Gopala Hrudaya Nivasi Gopala
meaning: Perform the Divine dance, O Lord Krishna, the darling son of Nanda. You play divine melody with the flute, You are the one as dark as the rain cloud, the one who adorns the peacock feathered crown. Perform the divine dance, O Lord. I welcome you, Lord Krishna. I surrender to You. Be ever in my vision, be ever in my devotional songs. O beautiful Lord of the Gopas, the dark-hued one, You are none other than our Sai,  the indweller of our heart.

title: Nanda Ke Dularey Yashoda Ke
lyrics:
Nanda Ke Dularey Yashoda Ke Pyaarey
Govinda Murarey Deenon Ke Saharey [ Nanda Ke ... ]
Karuna Sagara Giridhara Naagara
Murali Manohara Shyama (Sai) Murarey
meaning: O Lord Krishna, the beloved child of Nanda and Yashoda, O the protector of cows, the supporter of the downtrodden, You are the ocean of compassion who lifted the mountain Govardhana, You are the one who enchants with the sweet music of the flute, the one with a dark complexion like the rain cloud and the one who killed the demon Mura.

title: Nanda Ke Lal Bhajo Murali
lyrics:
Nanda Ke Lal Bhajo Murali Gopala
Radhey Shyam Radhey Shyam
Giridhari Shyam Bhajo Gopi Gopala
Meera Ke Natha Prabhu Hey Nandalala [ Radhey Shyam ... ]
meaning: Sing the glory of the child of Nanda, Lord Krishna, the protector of cows, who plays the flute.
