We pray to You, the blue colored Lord of cowherd girl Radha; You lifted the mountain Govardhana. Sing the glory of the Lord of the cowherds, the Lord of the great devotee saint Meera and the beloved son of Nanda.

title: Nanda Ke Lal Murali Gopal
lyrics:
Nanda Ke Lal Murali Gopal
Giridhari Govinda Radhey Gopal
Nanda Mukunda Radhey Gopal
Radhey Jai Radhey Jai Radhey Gopal
Radhey Radhey Radhey Gopal
Radhey Radhey Murali Gopal
Radhey Radhey Shyam Gopal
Radhey Radhey Sai Gopal
meaning: Oh son of Nanda! Oh Lord Krishna, the player of the flute and the cowherd boy! The One who lifted the Govardhan mountain, the protector of the cows and the Lord of Radha, the cowherd girl. The son of Nanda, who grants liberation and glory to you. You are the blue colored Lord of Radha, the flute playing Lord and the Lord Sai.

title: Nanda Kishora Jaya Gopal
lyrics:
Nanda Kishora Jaya Gopal
Navaneetha Chora Shyama Gopal
Meera Ke Nath Prabhu Giridhara Gopal
Raasa Vilola Radhey Gopal
meaning: Victory be to the beloved son of Nanda, the dark-hued Lord Krishna, the one who stole butter (analogy for a devotee's heart) and the one who lifted the Govardhana hill. He is the Lord of Meera and Radha and the one who performed the Raasa Leela dance with the Gopikas.

title: Nanda Kishora Narayana
lyrics:
Nanda Kishora Narayana
Navaneetha Chora Narayana [ Nanda Kishora ... ]
Narahari Roopa Narayana
Naada Swaroopa Narayana
meaning: You are the son of Nanda and are Lord Vishnu, who is the refuge for all beings, You are Krishna who stole butter, (symbolically, devotee's heart). You are the lion God Narasimha and you are the form of divine music.

title: Nanda Kishora Navaneetha Chora
lyrics:
Nanda Kishora Navaneetha Chora
Brindavana Sanchara
Hey Shesha Shayana Hey Garuda Gamana
Aravinda Nayana Gopalana
meaning: Sing the glory of Lord Krishna, beloved son of Nanda and stealer of butter (devotees' hearts). Glory to the one who wandered about in Brindavana, who is verily Lord Vishnu resting on the celestial serpent Adi Shesha and who rides on Garuda. Glory to the lotus-eyed Lord Gopala.

title: Nanda Kishora Navaneetha Chora
lyrics:
Nanda Kishora Navaneetha Chora
Narayana Hari Madhava
Madhusudhana Muralidhara
Gopi Jana Chitha Chora
Brindavana Sai Kanhaiya [ Narayana Hari ... ]
meaning:
O Lord Krishna, the son of Nanda and the one who stole butter, You are the Lord in whom all beings take refuge. O Lord Vishnu, You are the Lord of Goddess Lakshmi. You play soulful music on the flute. You annihilated the demon Madhu. O Lord, You stole the hearts of the Gopis, You are the child of Brindavan and the one who has incarnated as Lord Sai.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Nanda Kishora Navaneetha Chora Sai
lyrics:
Nanda Kishora Navaneetha Chora Sai Gopala
Govardhana Giridhari Murari Hey Nandalala
Nandalala Nandalala
Goparipala Gokula Bala Giridhara Gopala
Murali Lola Munijana Pala Hey Nandalala [ Nandalala ... ]
meaning: Glory to Lord Krishna, the son of Nanda and the one who stole butter. Oh Lord of the cowherds, You are the one who lifted the mountain Govardhana, the one who killed the demon Mura; You revel in playing the flute. You are the one who protects the saintly. You are verily Sai.

title: Nanda Mukunda Hari Gopala
lyrics:
Nanda Mukunda Hari Gopala
Gopi Jana Priya Goparipala [ Nanda Mukunda ... ]
Bhaktha Samrakshaka Sai Gopala
Nanda Nanda Mukunda Gopala
meaning: Oh Krishna! You are the cowherd boy, the one who grants liberation. You are the favorite of the cowherds and the protector of cows (all noble souls). Oh Sai Krishna you are the one who protects His devotees. You are the one who gives happiness to Nanda too.

title: Nanda Nanda Mukunda Gopala
lyrics:
Nanda Nanda Mukunda Gopala
Murali Mohana Shyama Gopala
Shyama Gopal Ghana Shyama Gopala [ Murali Mohana ... ]
Jai Jai Jai Jai Jai Nandalala
Jaya Nandalala Shyama Gopala [ Murali Mohana ... ]
meaning: Glory to Lord Krishna, the son of Nanda. Glory to the cowherd boy Krishna who grants us liberation. O Lord, You are the one who enchants us by playing the flute. O blue-colored Lord resembling the dark color of the clouds, victory be to Thee, the child of Nanda.

title: Nanda Nandana Hari Govinda Gopala
lyrics:
Nanda Nandana Hari Govinda Gopala
Ghana Shyama Mana Mohana (2)
Gopi Lola Gopala
Gokula Bala Gopala
Hey Nandalala Gopala [ Ghana Shyama ]
meaning: The son of Nanda, Oh Vishnu! You are the protector of cows. You are the blue colored Lord resembling the clouds and the One who enchants the mind. You are the favorite of the devout cowherd girls. The cowherd boy who is the beloved child of the cowherd abode Gokula and the loving child of Nanda.

title: Nanda Nandana Navaneetha Chora
lyrics:
Nanda Nandana Navaneetha Chora
Gokula Bala Venu Gopala [ Nanda Nandana ... ]
Mathura Natha Harey Krishna Gopala
Shyama Gopala Sai Gopala
Vanamali Giridhari Shyama Gopala [ Gokula Bala ]
meaning: The son of Nanda Who stole butter. The child of the cowherd land Gokula, the One playing the flute. The Lord of Mathura, Oh Lord Krishna, the protector of cows. The blue colored cowherd boy Krishna, wearing the garland (Vanamali) and the One who lifted the mountain Govardhana (Giridhari).

title: Nandalal Nandalal Nandalal Yadu Nandalal
lyrics:
Nandalal Nandalal Nandalal Yadu Nandalal
Nandalala Navaneetha Chora
Radha Pyaarey Nandalal
Maayi Meera Manasa Chora
Parthi Vihari Nandalal
meaning: O Lord Krishna, child of Nanda, You are the child of Yadavas, the cowherd clan. You are the one who stole butter (devotees' hearts). You are the beloved of Radha. You stole the heart and mind of the great saint Princess Meera. You are none other than Lord Sai who dwells in Puttaparthi.

title: Nandalala Nandalala
lyrics:
Nandalala Nandalala
Nanda Mukunda Hari Nandalala
Murali Manohara Nandalala
Radha Manohara Nandalala
meaning: Oh son of Nanda, the cowherd chieftain, You are the son who grants liberation! You enchant with your music on the flute! You are the One who adorns the mind of Radha, the cowherd girl.

title: Nandalala Nandalala
lyrics:
Nandalala Nandalala
Nacho Nacho Nacho Nandalala
Navaneetha Chora Hey Bala Gopala
Gopi Manohara Gopala Bala
meaning: Oh child of Nanda! Rejoice in dance, dance and dance! You are the Lord of the cowherds who stole butter! You are the beautiful child Krishna! The one who enchanted the cowherd girls! The cowherd child!

title: Nandalala Nandalala Daya Karo Bhagawan
lyrics:
Nandalala Nandalala Daya Karo Bhagawan
Bhava Sagar Se Paar Utharo
Daya ( Sai Krupa ) Karo Bhagawan
Tumharey Sharan Bin Anath Hai Hum
Daya ( Sai Krupa ) Karo Bhagawan
meaning: Oh child of Nanda! Oh Lord! Have compassion on me. Help me cross this Ocean of life. Have compassion on me. Have pity on me. Without (the shelter of) your feet, we are orphans Oh Lord! Have compassion towards me. Have pity on me Oh Lord Sai!

title: Nandalala Navaneetha Chora Natavara Lala
lyrics:
Nandalala Navaneetha Chora Natavara Lala Gopala
Devaki Vasudeva Kumara
Deva Deva Gopala [ Nandalala ... ]
Mohana Murali Gaana Vilola
Mohana Jaya (Sai) Gopala (Mana)
meaning: Glory to Lord Krishna, son of Nanda, the stealer of butter, the beautiful dancer, the protector of cows, the son of Devaki and Vasudeva, the Lord of the Lords who plays melodiously on the flute. Victory to the one with an enchanting form.

title: Nandalala Shyama Sundara Nandalala
lyrics:
Nandalala Shyama Sundara Nandalala
Kaustubha Dhari Vanamala Dhara Shyamala Madana Gopala
Radhey Shyam Radhey Shyam Sai Shyam Sai Shyam
Radha Madhava Madana Gopala
Mathura Natha Gopala
Parthi Nandana Hrudaya Sanjeevana
Shyamala Madana Gopala [ Radhey Shyam ... ]
meaning: This song praises Lord Sai Krishna as the one who is most charming, the one who wears the jewel Koustubha, one who is the beloved of Radha, the Lord of Mathura and the one who resides in the hearts of His devotees.

title: Nandalala Yadu Nandalala
lyrics:
Nandalala Yadu Nandalala
Brindavana Govinda Lala
Radha Lola Nandalala
Radha Madhava Nandalala (Jai)
meaning: O Lord Krishna, child of Nanda, You are the darling of the Yadava (cowherd) chieftain. You are the child of Brindavan and the protector of cows. You are the favorite of Radha, the cowherd girl. Victory to You, O Krishna.

title: Nandeeshwara Hey Nataraja
lyrics:
Nandeeshwara Hey Nataraja
Nandatmaja Hari Narayana
Narayana Hari ( Sai ) Narayana
Nagabharana Namah Shivaya
Naada Swaroopa Namo Namo [ Narayana Hari ( Sai ) ... ]
meaning: Oh Lord of Nandi, the divine bull, You are the Lord of cosmic dance, Shiva. You are also the son of Nanda, Lord Vishnu, the ultimate refuge of all beings. Oh Sai Narayana, You are Shiva, who is adorned with the snake! You are the one who embodies divine music!

title: Nandi Vahana Nataraja Harey
lyrics:
Nandi Vahana Nataraja Harey
Indushekara Shiva Raja Harey [ Nandi Vahana ... ]
Bandha Vimochana Jaya Baba Harey
Parthi Pureeshwara Shiva Sai Harey
Sai Harey Sri Sai Harey
Baba Harey Sai Baba Harey
Sai Harey Sri Sai Harey
Baba Harey Sai Baba Harey
meaning: O Lord Shiva who rides the divine bull Nandi, You are the Lord of cosmic dance. You are the one who is adorned with the crescent moon on the head. O Lord Sai Baba, the Lord of Puttaparthi, You are the very incarnation of Lord Shiva. You free us of all bondage. Glory be to Thee.

title: Nandi Vahana Nataraja Namo
lyrics:
Nandi Vahana Nataraja Namo
Phaala Lochana Shiva Raja Namo [ Nandi Vahana ... ]
Parama Esha Jagadeesha Namo
Shiva Shakthi Partheesha Namo
Bholey Baba Sayeesha Namo
meaning: Recite the name of Lord Shiva who rides on the celestial Bull Nandi, has the third eye on His forehead, who is the consort of Goddess Shakthi (Parvathi). Lord Sai of Parthi is the very embodiment of Shiva and Shakthi.

title: Narayan Narayan Bhaja Mana Narayan
lyrics:
Narayan Narayan Bhaja Mana Narayan
Sri Hari Madhava Narayan Bhaja Mana Narayan
Murali Shyam Mohana Shyam Murali Mohana Shyam
Merey Ram Hey Ghana Shyam Sai Sadguru Naam
meaning: O mind, sing the glory of Lord Narayana, the abode of all being. He is the dark-hued Lord Krishna who is enchants us with His flute. He is my Lord Ram, who has the complexion of the rain cloud. Sing the name of Lord Sai, the Divine Preceptor who is verily Lord Narayana, Krishna and Rama.

title: Narayana Govinda Harey
lyrics:
Narayana Govinda Harey
Narayana Gopala Harey [ Narayana Govinda ... ]
Shanthakara Bhujanga Shayana
Narayana Veda Parayana
meaning: O Lord Narayana, the refuge of all beings, You are the protector of cows (meek). O Krishna, the cowherd Lord, You are the one who is the embodiment of peace, You are the one who reclines on the serpent Adi Sesha.

title: Narayana Hari Naama Bhajorey Narayana
lyrics:
Narayana Hari Naama Bhajorey Narayana Veda Parayana
Karuna Bharana Bhava Bhaya Harana
Pavana Charana Patitha Janavana
Narayana Hari (Sai) Narayana (3)
meaning: Sing the name of Lord Narayana and Hari, the ultimate shelter for all creatures. He is the Lord of the Vedas who is adorned with compassion. He removes the fear of the mundane world. His Feet are the most sacred that redeems the downtrodden. He has incarnated as Lord Sai.

title: Narayana Hari Narayana
lyrics:
Narayana Hari Narayana
Nanda Govinda Ananda Narayana
Narayana Hari Narayana
Nanda Govinda Ananda Narayana (2)
meaning: Glory to Lord Narayana, the abode of all beings. O Lord, You are Lord Hari, and Lord Krishna, the son of Nanda and the Lord of the cowherds. You are the Lord of bliss.

title: Narayana Hari Narayana
lyrics:
Narayana Hari Narayana
Narahari Roopa Narayana
Vaikunta Vasa Namo Narayana
Vaidehi Mohana Narayana
Narayana Namo Narayana
Narayana Veda Parayana (Sai Narayana)
meaning:
Glory to Lord Narayana, the ultimate destination of all creation, O Lord, You took the form of the lion-faced Lord Narasimha. O resident of Vaikunta, prostrations to You. You were the favorite of Mother Sita when You incarnated as Rama. Salutations to You, O Lord Sai, You are the incarnation of Lord Vishnu.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Narayana Hari Narayana
lyrics:
Narayana Hari Narayana
Narahari Roopa Namo Narayana [ Narayana Hari ... ]
Neeraja Nayana Neeradi Shayana
Narada Sannuta Namo Narayana
meaning: Glory to You O Lord Narayana, You are the final refuge of all beings, the lion-faced Narasimha. Salutations to Thee, O lotus-eyed one who reclines on the ocean and who is praised by Sage Narada.

title: Narayana Hari Narayana Bhaja Narayana
lyrics:
Narayana Hari Narayana Bhaja Narayana Sai Narayana
Narayana Hari Narayana Narayana Sai Narayana (2)
Narayana Hari Narayana Jaya Narayana Sai Narayana
Narayana Hari Narayana Narayana Sai Narayana
meaning: Worship Lord Narayana, the refuge of all beings. Victory be to You, O Lord Hari. O Lord Sai, the incarnation of Lord Narayana, victory to You.

title: Narayana Hari Narayana Hari Narayana
lyrics:
Narayana Hari Narayana Hari Narayana Veda Parayana
Shambho Mahadeva Shambho Mahadeva Shambho Mahadeva Sadashiva
meaning: Glory to Lord Narayana, the author of Vedas. Glory to Lord Shiva who is ever blissful and who bestows welfare.

title: Narayana Hari Om Hari Om
lyrics:
Narayana Hari Om Hari Om Hari Om
Sai Narayana Hari Om Hari Om Hari Om [ Narayana Hari ... ]
Shanthakara Bhujanga Shayana
Padmanabha Hari Om
Sai Narayana Hari Om
meaning: O Lord Narayana, You are the Lord Sai who is the incarnation of Hari. You are the embodiment of peace, You recline on the serpent Adi Sesha. You have a Lotus emerging from Your navel (symbolizes creation arising from the Lord). O Lord Sai! O Lord Narayana! Salutations to You.

title: Narayana Narayana Jaya Govinda Harey
lyrics:
Narayana Narayana Jaya Govinda Harey
Narayana Narayana Jaya Gopala Harey
Narayana Narayana Jaya Govinda Harey
Narayana Narayana Jaya Gopala Harey
meaning: Victory to Lord Narayana and Lord Krishna also known as Govinda and Gopala.

title: Narayanam Bhaja Narayanam
lyrics:
Narayanam Bhaja Narayanam
Narayanam Sathya (Sai) Narayanam [ Narayanam Bhaja ... ]
Tava Paada Charanam Narayanam
Shesha Shayanam Narayanam (Adi)
Narayanam Sriman Narayanam
Narayanam Sathya Narayanam
Narayanam Sai Narayanam
meaning: Sing the glory of Lord Narayana, the one who is the ultimate refuge and the one who recline on the celestial serpent Adi Sesha. We surrender to Your feet, Oh Lord Sai, You are verily Lord Narayana.

title: Narayanam Bhaja Narayanam
lyrics:
Narayanam Bhaja Narayanam
Narayanam Hari Narayanam
Narayanam Sriman Narayanam
Bhaja Mana Narayanam
Bhaja Mana Bhaja Mana Narayanam
meaning:
Sing the glory of Lord Narayana, O mind. Sing the Holy Name of Lord Narayana, the abode of all beings.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Narayani Veda Parayani
lyrics:
Narayani Veda Parayani
Karunanta Ranjani Narayani [ Narayani Veda ... ]
Kamakshi Sundari Katyayani
Vani Saraswathi Vijayambikey
Vageshwari Vaagdevi Janani (2)
Karunya Lavanya Guna Shalini
meaning: O Mother Parvathi, You are the sister of Narayana, You are the protector of all Vedas, You have other names like Kamakshi, the one with attractive eyes, Sundari, the beautiful one, Katyayani or the consort of Shiva. You are the Goddess of learning and art, Saraswathi, You are the Mother responsible for oratory skills, You are endowed with qualities of compassion and beauty.

title: Nataraja Hey Tripurari
lyrics:
Nataraja Hey Tripurari
Jaya Hey Jaya Hey Shambho [ Nataraja Hey ... ]
Nandi Vahana Nagabharana
Phaala Lochana Parama Shiva
Pavana Charana Paahi Mahesha
meaning: Hail Shiva, the destroyer of demon King Tripura. Victory to Lord Shiva who is revered as the master of all dance forms, Nataraja. The celestial snakes adorn Him as garlands. He rides on Nandi, the great bull. We bow at His Lotus Feet seeking solace as He is the Supreme Form with the third eye who grants succor to the whole creation. We bow to Lord Shankara. Protect us O Lord Mahesha.

title: Nataraja Lord of the dance
lyrics:
Nataraja Lord of the dance shining before us Lord divine
Shivaraja King eternally
O cosmic dancer, dance the joy of life
Song of creation Nataraja
Lord of the Lingam Shivaraja

title: Nataraja Namami Shankara
lyrics:
Nataraja Namami Shankara
Shiva Raja Shiva Shiva Shankara [ Nataraja Namami ... ]
Shirdi Pureeshwara Shiva Shankara
Parthi Pureeshwara Parameshwara
Hrudayeshwara Sayeeshwara
meaning: We offer our humble salutations to Lord Shankara (Shiva) who is the source of all dance forms. We pray to Shirdi Sai and Sathya Sai, incarnations of Shiva. We pray to Sai who resides in the hearts of the devoted.

title: Nataraja Nataraja Narthana Sundara Nataraja
lyrics:
Nataraja Nataraja Narthana Sundara Nataraja
Shiva Raja Shiva Raja Shiva Tandava Priya Shiva Raja
Chidambaresha Nataraja
Parthi Pureesha Nataraja
meaning: Salutations of the Lord of dance form, Nataraja (Lord Shiva), who enacts the enchanting cosmic dance known as Tandava. He thrills the whole universe. Lord Shiva who appears in His cosmic dance form as Nataraja at Chidambaram in Southern India, has incarnated as our Lord of Parthi.

title: Nataraja Nataraja Natana Shekara Raja
lyrics:
Nataraja Nataraja Natana Shekara Raja
Shiva Raja Shiva Raja Natana Shekara Raja
Shiva Shiva Namo Hara Hara Namo
Shankara Shiva Nataraja [ Nataraja Nataraja ... ]
Namah Parvathi Pathayey Hara (Om)
Hara Hara Hara Hara Mahadeva
meaning:
Glory to Shiva, the ultimate dancer, who mesmerizes one and all with his cosmic dance. Lord Shiva, who has no parallel to his dance and his dancing style. When his devotees sing his glory incessantly, he is enchanted. We bow to Shiva, the Lord of Parvathi, Hara Hara to bestow eternal bliss on his devotees.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Nataraja Nataraja Om Namah Shivaya
lyrics:
Nataraja Nataraja Om Namah Shivaya Nataraja
Shiva Raja Shiva Raja Om Namah Shivaya Shivaraja
Sai no Hikari o, Shiva no Chikara o, Ware no Kokoro ni Sazuketa Mae (2)
Inochi ni Yadoru, Shiva no Kodou wa Hari Om Hari Om Hari Hara Om (2)
meaning:
Salutations to Lord Nataraja (Shiva), the Lord of Dance. O Lord, grant us the light of Lord Sai and the power of Lord Shiva to our hearts. May the sound of Shiva's drumbeat dwells in our lives.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Natavara Krishna Natavara Krishna Radhey
lyrics:
Natavara Krishna Natavara Krishna Radhey Nandalala
Harey Harey Madhava Harey Gopika Lola
Krishna Ghana Ghana Neela Krishna Gokula Bala
Harey Harey Madhava Hara Gopika Lola
meaning: Pray to Krishna, the little prankster, who is the soul of Radha. Hey Madhava (Lord of Lakshmi)you are the enchanter of the Gopis of Brindavan. The hue of dark blue makes you the endearing child of Gokul. Hail Krishna who showered eternal bliss on the Gopis.

title: Natavara Lal Giridhara Gopal
lyrics:
Natavara Lal Giridhara Gopal
Meera Prabhu Ghana Shyama Gopal [ Natavara Lal ... ]
Veda Saara Jeevan Ka Aadhaar
Murali (Gopi) Manohara Hrudaya Vihar
meaning: Sing the glory of the mischievous child Lord Krishna, the protector of Gokula, the one who lifted the Govardhana mountain, the one who stole the pure hearts of Gopis. He is the Lord of Meera, whose heart was filled with pure love for the dark-hued Gopala. He is the the essence of all Vedas and the life force for us. We bow to Lord Gopala who enchants us with the flute and who always resides in the pure hearts of the cowherd, Gopis.

title: Nayanon Mey Prem Dhaar Vachanon
lyrics:
Nayanon Mey Prem Dhaar Vachanon Mey Amrutha Dhaar
Sadguru Sai Mera Jeevan Aadhaar
Nayanon Mey Prem Dhaar Vachanon Mey Amrutha Dhaar
Sadguru Sai Mera Jeevan Aadhaar (2)
meaning: Glory to Lord Sai, the embodiment of eternal and divine love, who fills our hearts with the nectarine wisdom (Amrut), who showers compassionate love through merciful eyes and sweet and soothing words of wisdom. Guru of gurus Sai, You are the true support and the eternal guide of my life.

title: Neela Megha Shyama Govardhana Giridhari
lyrics:
Neela Megha Shyama Govardhana Giridhari
Parthi Vihari Sai Murari
Brija Gopi Priya Nandana Raasa Vihari
Vanamala Ghana Murali Bansidhari
Krishna Murari Natavara Naagara Shourie
Brindavana Sanchari Shyama (Sai) Murari
meaning:
Salutations to Lord Krishna who is majestic like a dark blue cloud and who lifted Mount Govardhana. He annihilated demon Mura to protect the saintly people. In the land of Brij, He was dear to all cowherd people. He engaged the Gopis in Raasa leela (divine dance). Wearing a garland of Tulasi, playing the divine flute, indulging in playful mischief, He made Brindavan a heaven on earth. He is none other than our beloved Sai who resides in Parthi to uplift the mankind.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Neela Megha Shyama Krishna Gopala Krishna
lyrics:
Neela Megha Shyama Krishna Gopala Krishna
Radha Ramana Sathya Narayana
Vata Patra Shayana Sai Narayana [ Neela Megha ... ]
Manusha Veshadhari Sathya Narayana
Parthipuri Nayaka Sai Narayana
meaning: Chant the name of the dark-hued Lord Krishna, protector of cows and the beloved of Radha. Chant the name of Lord Sathya Narayana who reclines on the Vata leaf and who incarnated in human form. He is none other than Lord Sai, Lord of Parthi.

title: Neela Megha Shyamala Ghana Shyama
lyrics:
Neela Megha Shyamala Ghana Shyama Sundara
Muralidhara Mana Mohana Sathya Sai Sundara
Jagat Karana Paripoorana Hey Sai Sundara
Shirdeeshwara Partheeshwara Sai Prema Mandira
meaning: The beauty of the dark clouds reflects in immensely charming Krishna. The holder of the flute, the enchanter of the hearts, he is also our beautiful Sathya Sai. The cause and completeness of creation, is our beloved Sai. We offer our prayers to both Shirdi Sai and Parthi Sai to adorn our hearts.

title: Neelachala Prabhu Neela Madhava
lyrics:
Neelachala Prabhu Neela Madhava
Jagannatha Swami Prabhuvara
Vasudeva Hari Mayura Mukutadhari
(Jaya) Radha Mohana Murari
Sai Krishna Murari Prabhuvara
meaning:
Glory to Lord Jagannatha (Krishna), the blue-hued Lord of Puri, the city also known as the blue mountain. Glory to the bestower of boons, the one adorned with a peacock feather on His head and who is the divine enchanter of Radha. Glory to Lord Sai who is verily Lord Krishna, the slayer of demon Mura.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Neelagriva Kumara
lyrics:
Neelagriva Kumara
Bala Ganeshwara Gajanana [ Neelagriva ... ]
Mooladhara Nivasa
Palaya Maam Prabho Partheeshwara
meaning: O Lord Ganesha, You are the son of Shiva who is hailed as Neelakanta (blue-throated one) and Mahadeva (Lord of the Lords). You command the army of Lord Shiva (Ganaas). You are the very basis of the universe (also the presiding deity of the Mooladhara Chakra). We offer our prayers to the Lord of Parthi, Lord Sai, who is verily Ganesha, to protect us at all times.

title: Neelakanta Gangadhara Hara Uma Pathey
lyrics:
Neelakanta Gangadhara Hara Uma Pathey
Pralayankara Abhayankara Kailasa Pathey [ Neelakanta ... ]
Dama Dama Dama Dama Dama Dama Damaru Baajey
Nataraja Manohara Tandava Nachey
Partheeshwara Parameshwara Jagadheesha Pathey
meaning: Hail Lord Shankara, the bestower of auspiciousness, the Lord of Uma and whose abode is Kailasa. The blue-throated Lord Shiva is the protector of one and all, who swallowed the poison that rose during the churning of the ocean. Praise the Lord who took all suffering on Himself for the welfare of all beings. He helped Bhagirath to bring river Ganges from heaven and in the process became Gangadhara. He grants bliss by playing the Damaru (drums) and performing the cosmic dance, Tandava. We bow to Lord Shiva, the Lord of the universe, who incarnated at Shirdi and at Parthi as our Sathya Sai. Prayers to Him to bless us all at all times.

title: Neelakanta Mahadeva Gowri Vandana
lyrics:
Neelakanta Mahadeva Gowri Vandana
Chandra Chooda Daya Natha Nandi Vahana
Samba Shiva Shooladhari Naga Bhooshana
Phaala Netra Uma Kantha Parama Pavana
meaning: O God of Gods, Mahadeva (Shiva), the blue-throated one, You are worshipped by the Divine Mother Gowri. You are adorned with the moon on Your tresses, You bless the Nandi (the great bull) as Your vehicle. You are full of compassion. You carry the Trident and wear the snake as ornament. With Mother Uma as consort, You are adorned with the third eye and the purest of the Pure. Bless us all at all times.

title: Niranjani Sai Bhavani
lyrics:
Niranjani Sai Bhavani
Jagat Janani Ananda Dayini [ Niranjani Sai ... ]
Durga Lakshmi Narayani
Sri Kamalasana Hamsa Vahini
meaning: Salutations to the blemishless Mother Sai, the creator and bestower of life. The universal mother is the source of bliss divine. She is the combination of Durga (power) and Lakshmi (wealth), Narayani (all-round welfare) and Hamsa vahini (Saraswathi - education), Kamalasana (seated on the Lotus bloom). We bow to the mother who is everything for us.

title: Nirupama Guna Sadana Charana Neeraja
lyrics:
Nirupama Guna Sadana Charana Neeraja Dala Nayana
Kashayambara Vesha Dharana Kali Yuga Avatara
Nithya Ranjana Nirmala Charitha Nirupama Yogendra
Maha Teja Nataraja Viraja Asha Paasha Nasha Esha
meaning: Glory to Lord Sathya Sai who has no parallel and who is the source of pure and auspicious traits. We take refuge at the lotus feet of the lotus-eyed Lord Sai. He represents sacrifice signified by the orange robe, which He adorns during this Kali age. He is the ever-charming one with blemishless character and is the incomparable Lord of the Yogis. He is verily Eshwara (Shiva), the majestic Lord of dance, who grants us freedom from every kind of worldly attachment and desire.

title: Nithyanandam Satchidanandam
lyrics:
Nithyanandam Satchidanandam
Hari Hari Hari Om Narayana
Narayana Hari Narayana [ Hari Hari ... ]
Prema Swaroopa Premananda (2) [ Hari Hari ... ]
Narayana Sai Narayana [ Hari Hari ... ]
meaning: Glory to the ever blissful Lord Narayana, the embodiment of Truth, Awareness and Bliss. He is the embodiment of pure Love who grants Bliss.

title: O Baba Sai Baba
lyrics:
O Baba Sai Baba
Deenon Ke Dukha Harthey Baba [ O Baba ... ]
Ram Hi Baba Krishna Hi Baba
Nara Dehi Narayan Baba (2)
meaning: O Lord Sai Baba, please remove the miseries of the meek. You are none other than Lord Rama, Krishna and Narayana who has incarnated as Lord Sai Baba.

title: O Bhagawan O Bhagawan Araj
lyrics:
O Bhagawan O Bhagawan Araj Suno Merey Sai Bhagawan
Parthipuri Ke Tum Ho Daata
Brindavan Ke Tum Ho Daata
Sab Bhakthon Ke Man Ko Bhata
Paar Utharo Naiya Mori
Sai Ghana Shyama Sai Ghana Shyama
meaning: O Lord Sai, hear my prayers, You are the boon bestowing Lord of Parthi and Brindavan. You are the beloved of all devotees, enchanting their minds and hearts. Please help us cross this boat safely across the river of life, O Sai. You are none other than Lord Krishna, the one with deep blue complexion.

title: O Holy Father Sai Baba
lyrics:
O Holy Father Sai Baba
O Lord Divine Hallowed Be Thy Name
Make Us Your Childern Deserve Thy Grace
Lead Us To Thy Feet Baba O Lord [ O Holy ... ]
O Sweet Sai Gentle And So Loving
O Sweet Sai So Understanding
Lead Us Kindly Lead Us Gently
Lead Us To Thy Wonderland Of Love [ O Holy ... ]

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Oh Senor Ganesha!
lyrics:
Oh Senor Ganesha!
Oh Senor de fuerza
Ayudame a llegar al Atma
Ayudame a volar en Dharma
Oh Senor de Parthi!
Sosten del Universo
Convierte las cadenas de mi Karma, en suaves espirales de
Ananda
meaning:
Oh the all-powerful Lord Ganesh, help me attain the Atma, help me fly in Dharma. Oh Lord of Parthi, sustainer of the Universe, transform the chains of my karma into soft spirals of Bliss.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Om Ennum Pranava Roopa Nayaka
lyrics:
Om Ennum Pranava Roopa Nayaka
Umayavalin Balane Vinayaka
Devar Muvar Potrum Veda Nayaka
Devadi Devane Vinayaka
Valvinaigal Neekkum Parthi Nayaka
Vendum Varam Thandhidum Vinayaka
Mounathin Muzhu Porule Nayaka
Mukkannan Maindhane Vinayaka
meaning: Lord Vinayaka, You are the embodiment of Om. O son of Uma and Shiva, praised by the trinity of gods, You are the Lord of Lords and  the author of the Vedas. O Lord of Parthi, Lord Sai, You remove all our sins. O Lord Vinayaka, You grant all boons and You are the true meaning of all meditation.

title: Om Hari Om Hari Om
lyrics:
Om Hari Om Hari Om Bhajorey Sada Om Hari Om Hari Om
Sathya (Sai) Narayana Hari Om (2)
Narayana Hari Narayana Hari Narayana Hari Om (2)
Sathya (Sai) Narayana Hari Om
meaning: Chant incessantly the divine names of Lord Hari, Narayana and Sai. Lord Sathya Sai is verily Lord Narayana.

title: Om Hari Om Sai Shankara Om
lyrics:
Om Hari Om Sai Shankara Om
Om Hari Om Shirdi Pureeshwara Om
Parthi Vihari Shivom Trinetra Dhari Shivom
Patitha Pavana Paahi Mahesha Shiva Shiva Hara Hara Om
meaning: Glory to Lord Sai of Shirdi and Parthi, the very embodiment of Om. O Sai, You are verily Lord Hari and the three-eyed Lord Shiva. O uplifter of the downtrodden, grant us Your protection.

title: Om Jagat Janani Sai Mata
lyrics:
Om Jagat Janani Sai Mata
Omkara Roopini Sai Mata [ Om Jaga ... ]
Abhaya Pradayini Sai Mata
Sai Mata Sathya Sai Mata [ Abhaya Pradayini ]
Anatha Rakshaki Sai Mata (2)
meaning: Oh Mother of the Universe, Sai. Your form is the Pranava, Mother Sai. You are the destroyer of fear and the protector of the forlorn. Mother of the Universe Sai, we offer our prayers to you who grants universal protection to the underprivileged, destitute and deprived.

title: Om Jai Jagadeesha Harey
lyrics:
Om Jai Jagadeesha Harey
Swami Sathya Sai Harey
Bhaktha Jana Samrakshaka
Bhaktha Jana Samrakshaka
Parthi Maheshwara
Om Jai Jagadeesha Harey

Sashi Vadana Srikara Sarva Prana Pathey
Swami Sarva Prana Pathey
Aashritha Kalpa Latheeka
Aashritha Kalpa Latheeka
Aapadh Bandhava
Om Jai Jagadeesha Harey

Mata Pitha Guru Dhaivamu Mari Anthayu Neevey
Swami Mari Anthayu Neevey
Naada Brahma Jagan Natha
Naada Brahma Jagan Natha
Nagendra Shayana
Om Jai Jagadeesha Harey

Omkaara Roopa Ojaswi Om Sai Mahadeva
Sathya Sai Mahadeva
Mangala Arathi Anduko
Mangala Arathi Anduko
Mandhara Giridhari
Om Jai Jagadeesha Harey

Narayana Narayana Om
Sathya Narayana Narayana Narayana Om
Narayana Narayana Om
Sathya Narayana Narayana Om
Sathya Narayana Narayana Om
Om Jai Sadguru Deva
meaning:
1. Victory to Lord of Universe, Lord Sathya Sai, Who destroys grief, evil, and miseries of life and Who guards and protects devotees. Victory to Lord of Lords – Lord of Parthi. 
  
2. O Graceful and Charming as a full moon! O Auspicious One! O Lord Sai! Thou art the Indweller and life-force of all Beings; the wish-fulfilling divine creeper to those who have surrendered to Thee; and kinsman, protector, and friend in times of distress and calamities. Victory to Lord of Universe. 
  
3. O Lord Sai! Thou art Mother, Father, noble Teacher, Supreme Divinity, and everything to us. O Lord Universe! Thou art Primeval Sound and art reclined on coiled serpent. 
  
4. O Splendorous One! O Lord of Lords — Lord Sai! Thy Form is Pranava. We pray Thee to accept the auspicious waving of flame of light (signifying the removal of ignorance). Victory to Thee, O Lord of Universe, Resident of Mandhar mountain – Lord Giridhari. 
  
Chant the name of Lord Sathya Sai Narayana, Whose Form is Pranava. Victory to Noble Teacher and Supreme Lord Sai, Sathya Sai.

title: Om Namah Shivaya Namo Narayana
lyrics: Om Namah Shivaya Namo Narayana (4)
meaning: Chant the sacred mantra, Om Nama Shivaya; Chant the sacred name Narayana and bow in reverence and humility.

title: Om Namah Shivaya Om Namah
lyrics:
Om Namah Shivaya Om Namah Shivaya
Om Namah Shivaya Namah Om Namah Om
Gangadhara Hara Gowri Vara
Kailasa Nathaya Namah Om
Gangotri Vasa Sri Sai Natha [ Om Namah Shivaya Namah Om ... ]
meaning: Chant the mantra 'Om Namah Shivaya' and bow to Lord Shiva who is the embodiment of auspiciousness, health and prosperity, the beloved of Gowri, and the one who holds the Ganga in His tresses. We bow down to Him, who is the Lord of Kailasa, who resides in Gangotri (origin of Ganga in Himalayas). He is verily our Lord Sainath.

title: Om Namah Shivaya Shivaya Namah
lyrics:
Om Namah Shivaya Shivaya Namah Om Om Namah Shivaya Shivaya Namah Om
Shiva Shiva Hara Hara Haraya Namah Om Hara Hara Shiva Shiva Shivaya Namah Om
Hara Hara Mahadeva Hara Hara Mahadeva [ Om Namah ... ]
Dama Dama Dama Dama Damaru Baajey
Dhimithaka Dhimithaka Mrudanga Baajey [ Hara Hara ... ]
meaning: Chant the mantra "Om Namah Shivaya". I bow down to Lord Shiva, who confers auspiciousness, who is also Hara, who destroys the evil. He is the Great God - Mahadeva, the destroyer of evil, who plays the hand-held drum, Damaru, while the percussion instrument, Mrudanga, keeps the beat, as He dances the cosmic dance.

title: Om Namo Bhagawathey Vasudevaya
lyrics:
Om Namo Bhagawathey Vasudevaya
Hari Om Namo Bhagawathey Vasudevaya [ Om Namo ... ]
Om Namah Shivaya Om Namo Narayanaya (2) [ Hari Om Namo ... ]
meaning: I bow down to Thee, O Lord Krishna, son of Vasudeva. I bow down to Lord Shiva, to Lord Narayana. Adoration to Lord Vishnu and Lord Shiva, who abide and shine in all beings and is one with the primordial sound Om. Om symbolizes the creator and creation.

title: Om Namo Namah Om Namah
lyrics:
Om Namo Namah Om Namah Om Namah Om
Achyuthaya Namah Om Ananthaya Namah Om
Sundaraya Namah Om Sura Vandithaya Namah Om [ Om Namo ... ]
Kaaranaya Namah Om Narayanaya Namah Om
Eshwaraya Namah Om Sayeeshwaraya Namah Om
meaning: Bow to Lord Narayana in reverence and humility, revere Him as He is the source of beauty, the undecaying, infinite one who is adored by the pious. He is the primal cause of creation and the indweller of all beings. Prayerful salutations to Lord Sai, the very incarnation of Lord Narayana.

title: Om Sahasra Roopa Sayeesha
lyrics:
Om Sahasra Roopa Sayeesha
Veda Vedantha Guna Sheela
Sayeesha Sayeesha Sayeesha Sathya Sayeesha (2)
meaning:
Lord Sathya Sai is the embodiment of the primordial sound Om, who Himself takes on a thousand different forms in this universe. As He is the origin of the Vedas (holy scriptures), Sai is imbued with the best of qualities and virtues. Glory to Lord Sathya Sai.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Om Sai Om Narayana
lyrics:
Om Sai Om Narayana Oh My Sweet Lord
Due To Some Good Karma Sai, I Have Come To Thee
Let The Vibhuti Of Love Flow Sai, Between You And Me [ Om Sai ... ]
We Try To Be What You Want Us To Be So Guide Us Merciful Lord
Work On Us, Be Kind To Us, Show Us The Right Path [ Om Sai ... ]

title: Om Shakthi Om Shakthi Om
lyrics:
Om Shakthi Om Shakthi Om Shakthi Om
Brahma Shakthi Vishnu Shakthi Shiva Shakthi Om [ Om Shakthi ... ]
Ichcha Shakthi Kriya Shakthi Gnana Shakthi Om [ Om Shakthi ... ]
Adi Shakthi Para Shakthi Maha Shakthi Om [ Om Shakthi ... ]
Shirdi Shakthi Sai Shakthi Sathya Shakthi Om
meaning:
Shakti is the power behind the three worlds. It is creative, sustaining, and destructive power inherent in Brahma, Vishnu, and Shiva. It is also the power of action and inaction, of divine will and of truth. All pervading, primeval and unlimited, it is the inherent power of Sai of Shirdi and Parthi.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Om Shivaya Om Shivaya
lyrics:
Om Shivaya Om Shivaya
Shambho Shankara Om Shivaya (3)
meaning: Bow down to Lord Shiva who gives happiness and prosperity and who is the bestower of good. We offer humble prayers to Lord Shankara who grants auspiciousness and Lord Shiva who grants sustenance to be submerged in universal consciousness.

title: Om Sri Ram Jai Ram
lyrics:
Om Sri Ram Jai Ram Jai Jai Ram (4)
Sita Ram Sita Ram Sita Ram
Radhey Shyam Radhey Shyam Radhey Shyam
meaning: Victory to Lord Rama, the Lord of Sita and Shyam, the beloved of Radha. Chant the name of the Lord Sri Rama, Sita Ram and Radhey Shyam.

title: Om Sri Sathya Baba Toutoki
lyrics:
Om Sri Sathya Baba Toutoki Kami Sai Baba
Anata ni Kiesuru Mono wo, Mamaorase Michibiki Tamou, Parthi no Sonshin
Om Sri Sathya Sai Baba

Yasashii Egao de Hohoemu Manazashi, Nayameru Kora no Chikara
Ikitoshi Ikeru Inochi no, Tadashiki Negai wo Mitasu, Shikou no Son Shin
Om Sri Sathya Sai Baba

Haha nari Chichi nari, Jiai no Buddha nari, Swami Jiai no Buddha nari
Uchuu wo Suberu Sai Baba, Om no Sonshin Sai Baba, Eichi no Hikari
Om Sri Sathya Sai Baba

Kiyoki no Hi wo Douzo Ouke Kudasai, Arathi no Seinaru Hi wo
Subete no Kami wa Ai nari, Jiai to Eichi ni Michita, Renge no Miashi ni
Kono Hi wo Sasagemasu

Narayana Narayana Om, Sathya
Narayana Narayana Narayana Om
Narayana Narayana Om, Sathya
Narayana Narayana Om, Sathya
Narayana Narayana Om
Om Jai Sadguru Deva
meaning:
1. Sri Sathya Sai Baba, You are our precious Lord from Parthi who protects and guides. We devote ourselves to You.   2. You look over all living things with oyur kind smile and loving gaze. You fulfill the wishes of the righteous with Your supreme power.   3. Swami, You are Mother, Father, and the love of Buddha. You rule over all the universe with Your wisdom and the eternal Om.   4. Please receive this pure, holy flame in Aarathi. You bless everything with Your love and wisdom. We bow down at Your beautiful lotus feet.   5. Chant the name of Lord Sathya Sai Narayana, Whose Form is Pranava. Victory to Noble Teacher and Supreme Lord Sai, Sathya Sai.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Om Tat Sat
lyrics:
Om Tat Sat Sri Narayana Tu
Purushothama Guru Tu
Siddha Buddha Tu, Skanda Vinayaka
Savita Pavaka Tu, Savita Pavaka Tu

Brahma Mazda Tu, Yahva Shakthi Tu
Yeshu Pitha Prabhu Tu
Rudra Vishnu Tu, Rama Krishna Tu
Rahim Tao Tu, Rahim Tao Tu

Vasudeva Go Vishwa Roopa Tu
Chidananda Hari Tu
Advitiya Tu Akala Nirbhaya
Atma Linga Shiva Tu (Sai) (3)

title: Omkara Priya Sai Rama
lyrics:
Omkara Priya Sai Rama
Munijana Sevitha Sai Rama
Shanthakara Sai Rama
Sakshathkara Sai Rama
Bhaava Raga Priya Sai Rama
Bhaagavatha Priya Sai Rama
Naada Swaroopa Sai Rama
Natya Kalaapa Sai Rama
meaning: We pray to Sai Rama, who loves the Omkar (Primordial sound), who is always worshipped by pious souls, who is the embodiment of peace, who could grant self realization, the one who loves devotees who are immersed in the divine consciousness. He is the embodiment of divine music and dance.

title: Omkara Roopa Sri Sai Natha
lyrics:
Omkara Roopa Sri Sai Natha
Sadguru Sri Sathya Sai Harey
Allah Yesu Eshwar Tum Ho
Gautama Buddha Mahavir Ho
Zohrashtra Guru Grantha Nanak Tum Ho
Ram Rahim Sai Krishna Karim
meaning: Pray to Lord Sathya Sai who is the embodiment of Omkara; who is the True Guru, the one who removes darkness and gives enlightenment; He is verily Allah, Yesu, Eshwar, Buddha, Mahavir, Zohrashtra, Guru Nanak, Ram, Rahim and Krishna.

title: Omkara Roopini Janani Ma
lyrics:
Omkara Roopini Janani Ma
Mangala Kaarini Janani Ma [ Omkara Roopini ... ]
Gaana Vinodini Janani Ma
Ananda Dayini Janani Ma
Janani Ma Partheeshwari Ma (2)
meaning: O Mother Sai residing in Parthi, You are the personification of the Primordial Sound Om. You bestow auspiciousness and happiness to one and all and You are enchanted by music.

title: Our Father Who Art In Heaven
lyrics:
Our Father Who Art In Heaven, Hallowed Be Thy Name
Thy Kingdom Come, Thy Will Be Done, Hallowed Be Thy Name (2)
On Earth, As It Is In Heaven, Hallowed ...
Give Us This Day Our Daily Bread, Hallowed ... (2)
And Forgive Us Our Trespasses, Hallowed ...
As We Forgive Those Who Trespass Against Us, Hallowed ... (2)
Lead Us Not Into Temptation, Hallowed ...
But Deliver Us From All That Is Evil, Hallowed ... (2)
For Thine Is The Kingdom, The Power And The Glory, Hallowed ...
For Ever And Ever And Ever And Ever, Hallowed Be Thy Name ... (2)

title: Our Jesus Came
lyrics:
Our Jesus Came And He Is Here Again
Sai Rama Sai Krishna Sai Is His Name
Sai Rama Sai Allah Sai Is His Name
Zohrashtra Mohammed Jehovah Is His Name
Jesus Christ From Bethlehem And Sai Is The Same
Hallelujah Hallelujah Glory To Thy Name
Sathya Baba Sai Baba Blessed Be Thy Name
Sathya Baba Prema Baba Blessed Be Thy Name

title: Paahi Gajanana Deenavana
lyrics:
Paahi Gajanana Deenavana
Sindhura Vadana Shritha Jana Palana [ Paahi Gajanana ... ]
Ambika Tanaya Amaradheeshwara
Aganita Guna Gana Ananda Dayaka
meaning: We pray to Lord Ganesha to protect us - the unprotected. O Lord, with Your shining face You bestow welfare on those who surrender and the downtrodden. O the beloved child of Ambika, You are praised by the celestial beings and there is no one parallel to You in granting bliss.

title: Paahi Mahesha Hey Jagadeesha
lyrics:
Paahi Mahesha Hey Jagadeesha
Dehi Dehi Tava Pada Seva
Poorana Brahma Sanathana Swami
Jaya Hey Jaya Hey Antaryami
meaning: Hail the Great God, master of the universe, Lord Sai. We pray to that Supreme Lord in human form to protect us. He is holistic and omnipresent Victory to that force who always resides in us.

title: Paahi Paahi Gajanana
lyrics:
Paahi Paahi Gajanana
Parvathi Tanaya Gajanana
Mooshika Vahana Gajanana
Modaka Hasta Gajanana
Chamara Karna Gajanana
Vilambita Sutra Gajanana
meaning: O Lord Ganesha, son of Parvathi, we seek refuge in You, please protect us. You ride on the mouse, holding sweet (modaka) in Your Hand, You have large fan-like ears, You wear a chain around Your waist and are of short stature. Dear son of Lord Shiva, You help us overcome our obstacles. O Ganesha, we prostrate at Your Feet.

title: Paar Karo Uddhar Karo Prabhu
lyrics:
Paar Karo Uddhar Karo Prabhu Parthi Puri Bhagawan
Harey Ram Ram Ram Ghana Shyam Shyam Shyam Hey Sai Natha Bhagawan
Deena Dayakara Karuna Murthy Kali Yuga Avatar Sai Bhagawan
Allah Sai Buddha Zohrashtra Yesu Christhu Bhagawan
meaning: O Lord Sai, Lord of Parthi, please save us and liberate us from the cycle of birth and death. O the most compassionate and merciful Lord, You are the Incarnation of this Kali Age. Chant the name of the Lord Ram, Ghana Shyam (deep blue hued Lord Krishna), Allah, Buddha, Zohrashtra, Jesus Christ.

title: Paavana Purusha Sayeesha
lyrics:
Paavana Purusha Sayeesha
Sharanara Kaava Sarvesha
Sowmya Roopa Sathya Baba
Kavudai Kai Mugive [ Paavana ... ]
Chithravathi Nadhi Teera Nivasa
Shishta Janavana Muni Sharana
Isha Jagatraya Moola Vikasa
Sathya Sayeesha Shritha Bharana (Jai)
Bhaktha Paalana Shritha Bharana
Parthivasa Aashritha Bharana [ Sathya Sayeesha ... ]
meaning: Salutations to the Supreme Lord, Sai, who protects all those who surrender to Him. Salutations to the gentle and pleasing Lord whose abode is Puttaparthi, on the banks of river Chitravathi. The sages and the noblest of men surrender to You, O Sai, You are the source and sustenance for all the three worlds. Victory unto Thee, O Lord Sathya Sai, the protector and sustainer of all devotees and the one who bears the burden of all those who take refuge in You.

title: Padmanabha Narayana
lyrics:
Padmanabha Narayana
Parthi Vasa Narayana (2)
Narayana Namo (Sai) Narayana (3)
meaning: Salutations to the Lord of all beings, Lord Narayana, from whose navel springs the Lotus of Creation. He is none other than Lord Sai who resides at Puttaparthi.

title: Pandari Nivasa Hey Panduranga
lyrics:
Pandari Nivasa Hey Panduranga
Hey Parthi Vasa Sri Sai Deva [ Pandari Nivasa ... ]
Deena Rakshaka Anatha Rakshaka ( Sai )
Bhaktha Vatsala Hey Sayeeshwara (2)
meaning: Sing the glory of the Lord of Pandharpur, Panduranga. He is the resident of Parthi, Lord Sai, who is the protector of the weak, the orphaned and the under privileged. He is the Lord who always takes care of His devotees.

title: Panduranga Panduranga Vittala Paahey
lyrics:
Panduranga Panduranga Vittala Paahey
Deena Natha Karuna Natha
Sai Natha Harey
Pandari Natha Panduranga
Vittala Paahey
meaning: Protect us, O Lord Panduranga. O Lord Vittala, You are the protector of the meek and helpless. You are the merciful Lord. O Sai Natha, You are verily the Lord of Pandharpur. Please protect us.

title: Panduranga Vittala Jai Pandari Natha
lyrics:
Panduranga Vittala Jai Pandari Natha Vittala
Panduranga Vittala Jai Pundarikaaksha Vittala [ Panduranga ... ]
Vittala Jai Vittala Purandara Vittala (2)
Vittala Jai Vittala Jai Rakumayi Vittala
meaning: Victory to the Lord of Pandari, Lord Vittala, who waited patiently for His devotee Pundalika. Victory to that Pundarikaksha. Recite the name of Lord Panduranga and Vittala. Victory to Vittala (Vishnu), the Lord of Rakumayi (Rukmini).

title: Panduranga Vittala Jaya Panduranga Vittala
lyrics:
Panduranga Vittala Jaya Panduranga Vittala
Kasturi Ranga Vittala Kamaneeya Ranga Vittala [ Panduranga ... ]
Govinda Ranga Vittala Gopala Ranga Vittala
Kalyana Ranga Vittala Karunanta Ranga Vittala
Partheesha Ranga Vittala Jaya Sai Ranga Vittala
meaning: Victory to the Lord Panduranga Vittala, the shining one who attracts like the fragrance of musk. He is the protector of all beings who is full of mercy. He is the Lord of Parthi, Sai, the director of the play of life.

title: Panduranga Vittaley Hari Narayana Hari
lyrics:
Panduranga Vittaley Hari Narayana Hari Narayana Govinda (3)
Bhajo ( Sai ) Narayana Govinda (2)
meaning: Sing the glory of Panduranga Vittala, the incarnation of Lord Narayana, the protector and indweller of all beings.

title: Pannaga Shayana Kali Avatara
lyrics:
Pannaga Shayana Kali Avatara
Narayana Hari Om
Parama Niranjana Neeraja Nayana
Sayeeshwaraya Hari Om
Buddhi Pradayaka Paapa Vinashaka
Sathya Sanathana Tum Ho
Deena Natha Hey Prabhu Parameshwara
Karuna Sagara Tum Ho
meaning: Salutations to Lord Narayana who rests on the multi-headed cobra. O Lord Sai, You are the incarnation of the Kali Age. You are the supremely pure, lotus-eyed one. You are the granter of liberating wisdom, the destroyer of sins. You are the eternal reality and the savior of the dejected and destitute. You are the ocean of mercy.

title: Parama Dayalu Sai Ram (Hey)
lyrics:
Parama Dayalu Sai Ram (Hey)
Bhagawan Bhagawan [ (Hey) Parama Dayalu ... ]
Treta Yug Mey Dasharatha Nandana
Dwapara Yug Mey Murali Mohana
Kali Yuga Mey Sai Narayana
Ek Prabhu Anek Naam
meaning: O Lord Sai, You are the most merciful Lord who incarnated as Rama, son of King Dasharatha in the Treta Age. In the age of Dwapara, You incarnated as the charming and enchanting Flutist, Krishna and in this present age of Kali, as Lord Sai Narayana. You are the One Lord assuming many names and forms.

title: Paramananda Govinda Gopal Jai
lyrics:
Paramananda Govinda Gopal Jai
Sai Nanda Mukunda Gopal Jai
Sai Krishna Harey Sai Rama Harey
Sai Keshava Madhava Mohana Harey [ Paramananda Govinda ... ]
Mukharavinda Gopal Jai
Satchidananda Govinda Gopal Jai [ Sai Nanda ... ]
meaning: Glory to the supremely blissful Lord Govinda, Gopala, Mukunda, Keshava, Madhava, Krishna and Rama. Glory to the lotus-faced Gopala (protector of all beings) who is the very embodiment of Truth, Awareness and Bliss and who is verily Lord Sai.

title: Parkadalil Pallikonda Parandhama
lyrics:
Parkadalil Pallikonda Parandhama
Parthipuriyil Avadaritha Sai Rama
Darmam Kaatha Raman Niye Sai Rama
Neela Vanna Kannan Niye Sai Shyama
Kaliyugathu Deivam Niye Parandama
Katharulvai Karunakara Sai Rama (2)
meaning: Glory to Lord Vishnu reclining on the ocean of milk (consciousness), who has incarnated as Lord Sai in Puttaparthi. Lord Rama, the protector of righteousness, and Lord Krishna of blue complexion are none other than Lord Sai of the Kali Age. Bless us and protect us, O compassionate Lord Sai Rama.

title: Partheeshwara Parameshwara
lyrics:
Partheeshwara Parameshwara
Pavana Naama Sayeeshwara
Jagadeeshwara Hrudayeshwara
Jagadodhara Jatadhara [ Pavana Naama ... ]
meaning: Sing the glorious name of Lord Sai, the incarnation of Parameshwara (Shiva). Sing the beautiful name of He who is the Lord of the Universe and the one who resides in our hearts, the Sustainer of Creation, the long-tressed Lord with the glorious name.

title: Partheeshwara Sai Baba Aao Aao
lyrics:
Partheeshwara Sai Baba Aao Aao Sai Nandalala
Jagadeesha Daya Sagara
Paramesha Krupa Sagara
Jai Jai Sai Ram, Bolo Jai Jai Sai Ram
meaning:
O Sai Nandalala of Puttaparthi, come into our hearts. You are the Lord of the Universe, the ocean of compassion and mercy. All praise be unto Thee, O Lord Sai Ram.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Partheeshwara Sathya Sayeeshwara
lyrics:
Partheeshwara Sathya Sayeeshwara
Daya Karo Hari Narayana
Sri Sai Narayana ( Sai )
Bhava Sagaroddhara Bhuvanavana
Sharanagatha Thrana Narayana [ Daya Karo ... ]
Sri Sai Narayana ( Sai )
meaning: Oh Lord Sathya Sai, Lord of Puttaparthi, Oh Lord Sai Narayana, have compassion. You are the One who can help us cross the ocean of wordly existence. Hey Sai Narayana, we surrender to Thee. Please have compassion, Sai Narayana.

title: Partheeshwara Sri Sai Prabho
lyrics:
Partheeshwara Sri Sai Prabho
Eshwaramba Nandana Sai Prabho [ Partheeshwara Sri ]
Eshwar Allah Sri Sai Rama Naam
Buddha Zohrashtra Sai Krishna Naam
Madhava Mohana Sai Narayana
Prema Avatara Prabhu Sai Rama
meaning: Sing the glory of the Lord of Parthi, Sri Sai The darling son of Mother Eshwaramba He is the unifier of all religious denominations. He is the personification of Eshwar, Allah, Krishna, Zohrashtra, Buddha and Madhava. He is the incarnation of Divine Love.

title: Partheeshwari Jagat Janani
lyrics:
Partheeshwari Jagat Janani
Jaya Jaya Jaya Hey Sai Janani [ Partheeshwari Jagat ... ]
Veda Kalamayi Devi Bhavani
Naada Vidyamayi Narayani
Karuna Sadani Karunamayi Ma
Sharanam Sharanam Sai Ma [ Jaya Jaya ]
meaning: Divine Mother of Parthi, Sai Ma, the One who sustains the Universe, victory to you! You are the knowledge of the Vedas, You are the Goddess of Music and the Arts, You are full of Grace, verily the embodiment of Grace. We surrender at Your feet, Mother Sai.

title: Parthi Mera Pandarpur
lyrics:
Parthi Mera Pandarpur
Partheeshwara Sai Ranga
Shiva Hari Roopa Panduranga
Shiva Shakthi Roopa Sai Ranga
Pundarika Varada Panduranga
Bhaktha Janashraya Sai Ranga
Panduranga Pandari Natha Sai Natha Vittala (Hey) (2)
meaning: Puttaparthi is my Pandarpur and Lord Sai is verily Lord Panduranga from whom the devotees seek solace. He is the embodiment of Lord Shiva and Shakthi (Parvathi) as well as Lord Hari, the one who blessed His devotee Pundarika. Lord Sai is the same as Lord Vitthala, the Lord of Pandarpur.

title: Parthi Nandana Radhey Shyama
lyrics:
Parthi Nandana Radhey Shyama
Aao Aao Sai Ghana Shyama [ Parthi Nandana ... ]
Brindavan Ghana Shyama Govinda
Madhura Manohara Mukharavinda
Hey Giridhari Sai Murari [ Aao Aao ... ]
meaning: Come O beautiful and charming Lord Krishna, the dark-hued one who has incarnated as Lord Sai of Parthi. You are the same Lord Krishna of Brindavan, the sweet, enchanting, lotus-faced Lord, who lifted the mountain and conquered the demonic force Mura. Chant the many names of the Lord Govinda and Lord Sai.

title: Parthi Pureesha Sai Deva
lyrics:
Parthi Pureesha Sai Deva
Sthira Chara Vishwa Vidhata Natha
Deena Dayala Anatha Natha
Bhagawantha Hey Dhrata (2) [ Sthira Chara ... ]
meaning:
Lord Sai of Parthi is the eternal protector of the movable and immovable world and the entire Universe. He is the savior of the forsaken and fallen.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Parthi Pureeshwaram Parama Dayalam
lyrics:
Parthi Pureeshwaram Parama Dayalam
Sadguru Devam Pranamamyaham
(Pra) Shanthi Nivasam Jaya Sai Natham
Namami Nithyam Sathya Sai Natham
Shirdi (Parthi) Pureeshwaram Pranamamyaham
meaning: We bow to the Guru of Gurus, Lord Sai of Parthi, the supremely compassionate resident of Prashanthi Nilayam. Victory to our Sai. We incessantly chant the name of Sathya Sai. He is the Lord of Parthi and Shirdi, we bow to Him.

title: Parthi Puri Mata Sri Sathya
lyrics:
Parthi Puri Mata Sri Sathya Sai Mata
Daya Karo Mata Mujhey Krupa Karo Mata
Merey Janam Janam Saathi Merey Jeevan Ke Aadhaar
Terey Charanon Ke Pyaasi Mujhey Darshan Do Mata
meaning:
O Mother Sathya Sai of Puttaparthi, please have mercy and show compassion on me. You are the Eternal Companion and the very basis of my life. I thirst for the vision of Thy Lotus Feet, please grant me Your Divine Darshan, O Mother Sai.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Parthi Puri Mey Janam Liya
lyrics:
Parthi Puri Mey Janam Liya Jo Sai Baba Naam Hai
Mayura Mukutadhara Murali Manohara Sai Shyama Naam Hai
Hey Shiva Shankara Uma Maheshwara Sai Shambho Naam Hai
Hey Parameshwara Parthi Pureeshwara Tu Hi Mera Pran Hai
meaning: O Lord Krishna, You are the one who is adorned with the crown of peacock feathers. You are the enchanter with the flute! You have incarnated in Parthi as Lord Sai Baba. Oh Lord Shambho, Oh Lord Shankara Oh the Lord of Uma, Lord Maheshwara! You have incarnated in Parthi as Sai. Oh Supreme Lord of Parthi, You are my very life.

title: Parthi Vihara Paapa Vidhura
lyrics:
Parthi Vihara Paapa Vidhura
Pavana Charana Sai Narayana 
Allah Tum Ho Yeshu Tum Ho
Sab Ka Malik Sai Tum Ho
Buddha Zohrashtra Nanak Tum Ho
Tum Ho Baba Antaryami 
Sab Bhakton Ke Palanhaarey 
Kaliyuga Avatara Sai Narayana
meaning:
O Lord Sai who resides at Parthi, the very surrender to Thy Feet destroys our sins. You are verily Narayana, Allah, Jesus, Buddha, Zoharashtra and Guru Nanak. You are the omnicient Lord who incarnated in this Kali age to protect all devotees.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Parvathi Nandana Gajanana
lyrics:
Parvathi Nandana Gajanana
Pashupathi Nandana Niranjana [ Parvathi Nandana ... ]
Paahi Prabho Maam Paahi Prasanna
Girija Nandana Shubhanana
meaning: O the elephenat-faced Lord Ganesha, the beloved son of Mother Parvathi, O the pleasant-faced Lord of all beings, kindly shower Your grace and protect us. You are the beloved son of Mother Girija who confers auspiciousness.

title: Parvathi Shankari Girija Shankari
lyrics:
Parvathi Shankari Girija Shankari
Sai Shankari Namostuthey (Sathya) (2)
Hey Jagadeeshwari Parthi Pureeshwari
Sai Shankari Namostuthey (Sathya) (3)
meaning:
Prostrations to Mother Parvathi, daughter of the King of mountains, Himavan, and the consort of Lord Shankara (Shiva). I bow down to Thee, O Mother Sai, You are the Mother of the World, residing in Puttaparthi.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Parvathi Tanaya Siddhi Vinayaka
lyrics:
Parvathi Tanaya Siddhi Vinayaka
Mangala Dayaka Deva
Jai Ganesh Jai Ganesh Jai Ganesh
Sindhura Vadana Prathama Vandana
Alaka Niranjana Mooshika Vahana
Pashankusha Dhara Shambho Nandana [ Mangala Dayaka ... ]
meaning: Victory to the auspicious conferring Lord Ganesha, the son of Mother Parvathi. He is the elephant-faced one to whom the foremost prayers are offered. He is the attributeless and blemishless one who has the Mouse (represents the darkness of ignorance) as His vehicle. He holds the noose and the hook and is the son of Lord Shiva.

title: Pashupathi Tanaya Bala Gajanana
lyrics:
Pashupathi Tanaya Bala Gajanana
Tum Ho Vighna Vinasha Ganesha
Hey Shiva Nandana Bala Gajanana
Vidya Buddhi Pradatha
Mangala Kara Hey Mangala Kara Hey
Sundara Sai Ganesha Ganesha
meaning: Chant the name of the darling son of Lord Shiva (Pashupathi), the elephant-faced Lord Ganesha, the destroyer of obstacles. O Son of Lord Shiva, You are the bestower of wisdom (spiritual and intellectual). Chant the name of the charming Lord Sai Ganesha, who grants auspiciousness.

title: Patitha Pavana Ram
lyrics:
Patitha Pavana Ram
Parthi Pureeshwara Ram
Pavana Naam Taraka Naam Paapa Vimochana Ram [ Patitha Pavana ... ]
Danava Bhanjana Ram Dasharatha Nandana Ram [ Pavana Naam ... ]
meaning: Chant the pure and sacred name of Lord Sai Ram of Parthi, the sacred name that is the Saviour of the fallen, remover of all sins. Oh Lord Rama! Oh Prince of King Dasharatha! You are the destroyer of demonic qualities.

title: Pavana Sutha Hanuman Ki Jai
lyrics:
Pavana Sutha Hanuman Ki Jai
Sita Pathi (Siyavar) Ramachandra Ki Jai [ Pavana Sutha ... ]
Parakrama Anjaneya Ki Jai (2)
Parthi Puri Sai Nath Ki Jai (2)
meaning: Victory to Hanuman, the son of the wind God, victory to the chosen Lord of Sita, Lord Ram, victory to the mighty son of Anjana Devi, victory to the Lord of Parthi, Sai Nath.

title: Pazhani Muruga Vel Muruga
lyrics:
Pazhani Muruga Vel Muruga
Sharanam Sharanam Vel Muruga
Ganapathi Sodara Vel Muruga
Karthikeya Vel Muruga
Subrahmanya Vel Muruga
Sri Sai Natha Vel Muruga

Hara Haro Hara Muruga Hara Haro Hara
Haro Hara Haro Hara Hara Haro Hara
meaning: We surrender to You Lord Muruga, the Lord of Pazhani Hills, the one who holds the 'Vel' (spear), the brother of Lord Ganesha and the one born to the Krithika mothers. You are verily Lord Sai. Destroy all our difficulties and afflictions, O Lord.

title: Poorna Brahma Avatara Sai
lyrics:
Poorna Brahma Avatara Sai
Sakala Jagat Aadhara Sai [ Poorna Brahma ]
Allah Yesu Rama Sai
Buddha Mahavir Nanak Sai
Hum Bhakthon Ke Baba Sai
Sarva Dharma Avatara Sai
meaning: Chant the name of Lord Sai, the incarnation of the Supreme Lord. He is the sustainer of all the worlds. Sai is one with Allah, Jesus, Rama, Buddha, Mahavira and Guru Nanak. He is the beloved of us devotees. Lord Sai has incarnated to preach the oneness of all religions.

title: Poornavatara Sai Guru Deva
lyrics:
Poornavatara Sai Guru Deva
Sathya Sayeesha Paramananda
Prema Sai Bhagawan
Sathya Sai Bhagawan
Parama Purusha Prabhu Sri Sai Natha
Purushottama Hey Parthi Pureesha
Prema Sai Bhagawan [ Sathya Sai ... ]
meaning:
Pray to the Divine Preceptor, the complete Avatar, Sai. He bestows divine bliss on His devotees. He is the very embodiment of Divine Love. Lord Sathya Sai is none other than the Supreme Lord, who took the form as the perfect human. He will incarnate again as Lord Prema Sai.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Prabhu Leela Prabhu Mahima
lyrics:
Prabhu Leela Prabhu Mahima
Kali Avatara Sai Narayana
Prabhu Dhama Parama Dhama
Japorey Japo Mana Sai Naama
Jaya Jaya Jaya Hey Sai Rama
meaning: Lord Sai Narayana, the incarnation of Kali age is the compassionate Lord who works His miracles as part of the divine play. Lord Sai's abode is Supremely sacred. O Mind, chant the name of Lord Sai. Victory to Thee, O Lord Sai Rama.

title: Prabhu Ramachandra Ke Dootha Hanumantha
lyrics:
Prabhu Ramachandra Ke Dootha Hanumantha Anjaneya
Hanumantha Hanumantha Hanumantha Anjaneya
Hey Pavan Putra Hanumantha Balabheema Anjaneya
Balabheema Balabheema Balabheema Anjaneya
meaning: Lord Hanumantha Oh! Anjaneya, Son of Anjana Devi and Pavana (Wind God); The messenger of Lord Ramachandra and one of Mighty Strength.

title: Praise To The Guru
lyrics:
Praise to the Guru a channel of love
Dispeller of darkness embodiment of
God's ever present outstretched hands
 
Praise to the Guru, Jai Guru Jai
Praise to the Guru, Jai Guru Jai

title: Pranam Sweekar Karo Sai Mahadeva
lyrics:
Pranam Sweekar Karo Sai Mahadeva
Sai Mahadeva Sai Mahadeva [ Pranam Sweekar ... ]
Allah Eshwar Yesu Sai
Buddha Zohrashtra Mahavira Sai
Natana Sutradhari Jagannatha Sai [ Sai Mahadeva ... ]
meaning: Accept our salutations O Sai, the Lord of Gods, You are verily the Supreme One, be it Allah, Eshwar, Jesus, Buddha, Zohrashtra, Mahavira. You are the supreme Director and Lord of the world.

title: Pranamami Sri Durge Sai Narayani
lyrics:
Pranamami Sri Durge Sai Narayani
Jaya Jagadambe Devi Bhavani [ Pranamami Sri ... ]
Jaya Mahishasura Samhaarini
Mahamaya Dukha Haarini
meaning: We offer our obeisance to You, Mother Durga (Sister of Vishnu), Jagad Ambe (the Mother of the Universe) and Devi Bhavani, the destroyer of the cycle of birth and death, the destroyer of the demon Mahishasura (ego) and the remover of miseries and the vast illusion or Maya (ignorance).

title: Pranava Swaroopa Hari Om Sai
lyrics:
Pranava Swaroopa Hari Om Sai
Narayana Hari Om
Sayeeshwaraya Hari Om (Sathya)
Yadavaya Madhavaya Govindaya Namah Om
Paramatma Roopaya Hari Om
Hari Om Hari Om [ Sayeeshwaraya ... ]
meaning: O Lord Sathya Sai, You are the very embodiment of the Primordial sound 'Om'. You are Lord Narayana, the indweller of all beings. You are Lord Krishna of the Yadava clan. You are the protector of all beings, Govinda. You are the embodiment of the Supreme soul. We pay our obeisance to You, O Lord Sai.

title: Pranava Swaroopa Paahi Gajanana Vighna
lyrics:
Pranava Swaroopa Paahi Gajanana Vighna Nasha Vinayaka
Eka Dantha Hey Gunavanta Vighna Nasha Vinayaka
Shritha Jana Palana Sindhura Vadana Vighna Nasha Vinayaka
Mahadeva Shiva Gowri Nandana Vighna Nasha Vinayaka
meaning:
Glory to the elephant-faced Lord Ganesha, who is the embodiment of the primordial sound 'Om', destroyer of impediments in the path of seekers, one without any leader, the single tusked one who is the storehouse of sacred qualities, the protector of those who seek His refuge, the son of Lord Shiva and Mother Gowri.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Prasanna Ho Sathya Sai Ganesha
lyrics:
Prasanna Ho Sathya Sai Ganesha
Prathama Poojita Vighna Vinasha [ Prasanna Ho ... ]
Pashankusha Dhara Parama Pavitra
Mooshika  Vahana Gajanana [ Prasanna Ho ... Vighna Vinasha ]
Lambodhara He Shambhu Kumara
Ambika Tanaya Gajanana
meaning:
At the outset, worship Lord Ganesha to remove all obstacles. The supremely sacred Lord uses a mouse as conveyance and carries the symbolic rope and weapon in His hands. He is the pot-bellied son of Mother Ambika (Parvathi). Lord Sathya Sai is none other than Lord Ganesha.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Prashanthi Nilaya Ram Hey Parthi
lyrics:
Prashanthi Nilaya Ram Hey Parthi Puri Bhagawan
Ahalyodharaka Ram Daasharathey Raghu Ram
Sri Ram Jaya Ram
Sri Ram Ram Ram Jaya Ram
Sai Ram Ram Ram Sai Ram
meaning: Glory to Lord Sai Rama of Puttaparthi, the Lord of Prashanthi Nilayam. Glory to the beloved Prince of King Dasharatha, Lord Rama, the saviour of Ahalya. Victory to Thee, O Lord Sai Rama of Prashanthi, salutations to You.

title: Prashanthi Nilayam Paramanin Alayam
lyrics:
Prashanthi Nilayam Paramanin Alayam
Daiva Swaroopanin Devalayam
Kali Yuga Devanin Karunalayam
Manavar Mohikkum Mantralayam
Paapa Vimochanin Charanalayam (Janma)
meaning:
Prashanthi Nilayam is the abode of Parabrahman (Supreme Lord). It is the temple of the one with the Divine Form, of the avatar of the Kali age, who showers compassion on all. It is the enchanting divine abode for all humans, the temple of Love, where the sins of His devotees are washed away at the Lotus Feet.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Prashanthi Sai Prashanthi Baba
lyrics:
Prashanthi Sai Prashanthi Baba
Shivaya Shivaya Namah Shivaya (2)
Shirdi Sai Krishna Kanhayi
Namo Namo Sai Bhajo Bhajo Sai
Sai Namo Namo Sai Namo Namo
Sai Namo Namo Sainatha
meaning:
Chant the name of Lord Sai, whose abode is Prashanthi Nilayam at Parthi. He is the very embodiment of Lord Shiva and Lord Krishna. Worship and sing the Holy name of Sai who is also the Lord of Shirdi.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Prathah Smaranam Sri Guru Charanam
lyrics:
Prathah Smaranam Sri Guru Charanam
Sayeesha Charanam Sri Guru Charanam [ Prathah Smaranam ... ]
Brahmananda Pradayaka Charanam
Sharanam Sharanam Sayeesha Charanam
meaning: Meditate on the Lotus Feet of the Guru (Lord Sai) in the early hours of dawn. Meditate on the holy feet of the Sadguru Sayeesha, the dispeller of ignorance. Surrender to the Lotus Feet of Lord Sai, who confers infinite happiness and heavenly bliss. We take refuge at your Lotus Feet, Oh Sainatha.

title: Prathah Smaranam Sri Ramam
lyrics:
Prathah Smaranam Sri Ramam
Munijana Sevitha Sri Ramam [ Prathah Smaranam ... ]
Ananda Dayaka Sri Ramam
Moksha Pradayaka Sri Ramam
Bhaja Mana Sai Ramam Ramam
meaning: Chant the name of Lord Rama in the dawn, the Lord who is worshipped by the sages and noble souls, who bestows happiness and liberation. Chant the name of Lord Sai who is none other than Lord Rama.

title: Prathama Sharana Gananayaka Om
lyrics:
Prathama Sharana Gananayaka Om
Vighna Vinashaka Siddhi Vinayaka [ Prathama Sharana ... ]
Vidya Dayaka Buddhi Pradayaka
Mooshika Vahana Sai Gajanana
meaning: Let us pay our foremost obeisance and surrender to the Lord of the divine forces, Lord Vinayaka. He destroys obstacles and assures success. He who rides a mouse as a vehicle, grants knowledge and pure intellect, Lord Sai is His embodiment.

title: Prathama Vandana Gananatha
lyrics:
Prathama Vandana Gananatha
Gajavadana Jaya Gananatha [ Prathama Vandana ... ]
Vidya Dayaka Buddhi Pradayaka
Vighna Vinashaka Vinayaka
Suramuni Vanditha Vinayaka
meaning: Our first prayers to the Lord of the ganaas, the elephant-faced Lord Ganesh who confers knowledge and intelligence, the remover of obstacles in the spiritual path, the One who is praised and adored by the wise and saintly.

title: Prathama Vandana Gowri Nandana
lyrics:
Prathama Vandana Gowri Nandana
Hey Shiva Nandana Paahi Gajanana [ Prathama Vandana ... ]
Eka Dantha Gunavanta Vinayaka
Vighna Harana Shubha Mangala Charana
Pranava Swaroopa Paahi ( Sai ) Gajanana
meaning: Foremost obeisance to Lord Ganesh, the beloved Prince of Lord Shiva and Mother Gowri. Oh Lord Sai Gajanana, the single-tusked One of noble character, You are the remover of obstacles, the bestower of auspiciousness. We bow to You, the embodiment of Pranava (Omkar).

title: Prem Bhakthi Jagao Man Mey
lyrics:
Prem Bhakthi Jagao Man Mey
Aao Merey Hruday Mey Baba
Tum Ho Deena Janon Ke Baba
Tum Ho Bhaktha Janon Ke Sai [ Aao Merey ... ]
meaning: Oh Lord Sai Baba! Welcome to my heart and please awake within me the love and devotion for Thee. You are the support of those who are meek. You are the dear Sai of the devoted.

title: Prem Eshwar Hai Eshwar Prem
lyrics:
Prem Eshwar Hai Eshwar Prem Hai
Har Dhadkan Mey Sai Sama Hai Eshwar Prem Hai [ Prem Eshwar ... ]
Ram Rahim Krishna Karim
Zohrashtra Yesu Nanak
Koi Bhi Naam Japorey Manuva Eshwar Prem Hai (Manuva)
meaning: God is Love; Love is God. Lord Sai is the indweller of the heart and is the sustainer of each heart beat, which repeats that God is Love. Oh Mind! worship any name of the Lord - Rama or Krishna, Rahim, Zohrashtra, Jesus or Nanak, as all names and forms are love and only love.

title: Prem Se Bolo Ek Baar
lyrics:
Prem Se Bolo Ek Baar Sai Ram
Bolo Ram Sai Ram [ Prem Se ... ]
Madhura Manohara Ram
Hey Mohan Moorat Ram
Hey Karuna Sindhu Ram
Hey Raghupathi Raghava Ram
Hey Patitha Pavana Ram [ Bolo Ram ... ]
meaning: Chant the Holy name of Lord Sai Ram with love. Chant the name of Lord Rama, of the Raghu dynasty who is charming and pleasing, the ocean of mercy and the saviour of the miserable and fallen.

title: Prem Se Gao Mangala Naam
lyrics:
Prem Se Gao Mangala Naam
Govinda Gopala Bolo Hari Naam
Prem Ke Sindho Deena Ke Bandho
Karunamaya Sai Nayanabhi Ram [ Govinda Gopala ... ]
Harey Krishna Harey Ram Sai Ram Sai Ram (3)
Sai Ram Sai Ram (3)
Harey Krishna Harey Ram Sai Ram Sai Ram
meaning: With love and devotion chant the auspicious name of the merciful and loving Lord Sai, who is an ocean of love and companion of the meek. Chant the names Govinda, Gopala and Hari. Chant the name of the most compassionate Lord Sai. Hail to Krishna, Ram and Sai Ram.

title: Prem Se Gao Pavana Naam
lyrics:
Prem Se Gao Pavana Naam
Rama Rama Raghu Nandana Rama [ Prem Se ... ]
Jaya Jaya Rama Jaya Raghu Rama
Jaya Sai Rama Jaya Sathya Naama
meaning: With love and devotion, sing the purifying and uplifting name of Lord Rama of the Raghu Dynasty. Victory to Lord Rama. Victory to Lord Sathya Sai Baba.

title: Prema Muditha Man Se Kaho
lyrics:
Prema Muditha Man Se Kaho (Rama Rama Ram) x3 Sri Rama Rama Ram
Paapa Katey Dukha Mitey Lekey Rama Naam
Bhava Samudra Sukhada Naava Ek Rama Naam
Parama Shanthi Sukha Nidhana Divya Rama Naam
Niraadhaara Ko Aadhara Ek Rama Naam
Parama Gopya Parama Divya Mantra Rama Naam
Sant Hrudaya Sada Basath Ek Rama Naam
Mata Pitha Bandhu Sakha Sab Hi Rama Naam
Bhaktha Janara Jeevana Dhana Ek Rama Naam
(Rama Rama Ram) x3 Sri Rama Rama Ram
meaning: With the heart and mind full of love and devotion, recite the name of Lord Rama. Reciting the name of Lord Rama cuts down sins and miseries. It is the safe boat that helps to cross the ocean of life and death. So potent is Lord Rama's name that it brings eternal peace and bliss. It is the only support of those who have no support (destitute). So loving and so divine is Lord Rama's name that sages and saints always have only Lord Rama's name in their hearts. O Lord Rama, You are my Mother, Father, Relative, Friend, everything else. The only life-long treasure of the devotee is Your name. Chant the mantra 'Rama Rama Rama'.

title: Prema Sai Parthi Sai
lyrics:
Prema Sai Parthi Sai
Pavana Sai Parama Guru Sai [ Prema Sai ... ]
Mangala Kara Karuna Sai
Karuna Sai Karuna Sai [ Mangala Kara ... ]
Madhura Madhura Hrudaya Nivasi
Murali Gaana Vilola Sai
meaning: Sing the name of Sai who is the embodiment of Love, the inner purifier who is the Supreme Guru, who bestows auspiciousness and full of Grace. Sai is the sweetest indweller of our hearts. He is none other than Lord Krishna, the enchanter with the flute.

title: Prema Sudha Rasa Deejo Sai
lyrics:
Prema Sudha Rasa Deejo Sai
Paramananda Sada Sukha Dayi [ Prema Sudha ... ]
Prashanthi Nilaya Dwarakamayi
Pavana Purusha Sadguru Sai
Deena Dayaghana Sri Raghurayi
meaning:
O Lord Sai, give us the nectar of divine Love and bliss of the highest order. You are the most blissful one who confers endless joy. You are the Divine Preceptor of Dwarakamayi in Shirdi and Prashanthi Nilayam at Parthi. You are verily Lord Rama of the Raghu lineage who has unending compassion for the meek.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Prema Swaroopa Prema Anand
lyrics:
Prema Swaroopa Prema Anand Prema Swaroopa Prema Bhagawan
 Your will is my will, Your will is mine
 Your will is my will, Your will's divine
 My will is Your will, my will is Yours
 My will is Your will, our wills entwine
 Prema Swaroopa Prema Anand Prema Swaroopa Prema Bhagawan
 There's no place to go, there's nothing left to do,
 There's nothing left to see, there's no one left to be
 For Your will is my will, Your will is mine
 Your will is my will, Your will's divine
 Prema Swaroopa Prema Anand Prema Swaroopa Prema Bhagawan

title: Prema Swaroopini Janani Ma
lyrics:
Prema Swaroopini Janani Ma
Charana Namostuthey Sai Ma [ Prema Swaroopini ... ]
Jagadambe Krupakari Sai Ma
Karunamayi Janani Sai Ma
Tribhuvana Palini Sai Ma [ Charana Namostuthey ... ]
meaning: You are embodiment of Divine Love, O Sai, Mother of the Universe. Humble salutations at Your Holy Feet. Please have compassion for me, O Divine Mother of the three worlds.

title: Premamaya Bhagawan Sai Ram
lyrics:
Premamaya Bhagawan Sai Ram
Karunamaya Sai Rama Rama Rama Ram
Hey Dukha Bhanjana Palanhaarey
Hey Leelamaya Apad Saharey
Sharan Mey Lelo Sai Rama Rama Rama Ram
meaning: Lord Sai Rama, You are the personification of Love and compassion, who destroys our miseries, who takes care of our troubles, Oh Lord, take us in Your fold. We surrender at Your Feet.

title: Premamayi Sai Ma Gnanamayi Sai
lyrics:
Premamayi Sai Ma Gnanamayi Sai Ma
Jaya Ma Jaya Ma Jaya Ma
Shiva Shakthi Roopini Sai Ma Moksha Pradayini Ma
Jaya Ma Jaya Ma
Jaya Ma Jaya Ma Jaya Ma
meaning: Victory to Mother Sai, the one who is suffused with love, wisdom and bliss. You are the very embodiment of Lord Shiva and Shakthi in one and ever remaining in a state of bliss. You are supreme consciousness incarnate and You grant Liberation.

title: Premamrutha Barsao Baba
lyrics:
Premamrutha Barsao Baba
Daya Karo Bhagawan
Krupa Karo Bhagawan
Tumhari Daya Bin Kaisa Jeevan
Rom Rom Mey Basneywaale Ram
Janana Marana Se Paar Utharo
Daya Karo Bhagawan [ Krupa Karo ... ]
meaning: Shower Your nectarine Love, Baba, have compassion on me. Shower Your Grace; this life is meaningless without Your compassion. You are the indweller, life force of my every nerve. Oh Compassionate One, please liberate me from this cycle of life and death.

title: Punya Naam Pavitra Naam Rama
lyrics:
Punya Naam Pavitra Naam Rama Naam Sai Ram
Harey Krishna Harey Ram Madhura (Amrutha) Naam Sai Ram [ Punya Naam ... ]
Karuna Sindhu Sita Ram Deena Bandhu Radhey Shyam [ Harey Krishna ... ]
meaning: Recite the pure and holy name of Lord Sai Rama. Glory to the names of the Lord Rama, Krishna and Sai Ram that are sweet and nectarine. Chant the name of Lord Krishna, the protector of the dejected and miserable. Chant the name of Lord Rama, the ocean of mercy. The names confer auspiciousness.

title: Purandara Ranga Harey Vittala
lyrics:
Purandara Ranga Harey Vittala
Pandari Ranga Harey Vittala [ Purandara Ranga ... ]
Narahari Ranga Harey Vittala
Murahara Ranga Harey Vittala
meaning: Chant the name of Purandara Ranga, the Indweller. Glory to Lord Vittala, the Lord of Pandharpur, Murahara Ranga, the glorious one who slayed the demon Mura. Chant the name of Lord Hari, who has taken human form.

title: Pyaarey Nanda Lal Darshan Deejo
lyrics:
Pyaarey Nanda Lal Darshan Deejo
Yashoda Ke Bal Darshan Deejo [ Pyaarey Nandalal ... ]
Natavara Lal Darshan Deejo
Giridhara Bal Darshan Deejo
meaning: O loving Lord Krishna, kindly present Thyself. O the beloved Prince of Nanda and Mother Yashoda, give me Your Darshan, You are the divinely mischievous child and the one who lifted the Govardhan mountain. O Lord, please grant me Your Darshan!

title: Raasa Vilola Nandalala
lyrics:
Raasa Vilola Nandalala
Radha Madhava Nandalala [ Raasa Vilola ... ]
Nanda Kishora Nandalala
Navaneetha Chora Nandalala
Nandalala Sai Nandalala (2)
meaning: Chant the name of the son of Nanda, Lord Krishna, who is fond of the Raasa leela (divine folk dance with Gopis). The Lord of Radha, is the one who steals the hearts of devotees.

title: Radha Ke Natavara Lal Kanhaiya
lyrics:
Radha Ke Natavara Lal Kanhaiya
Gokula Bala Goparipala [ Radha Ke ... ]
Nanda Kumara Raasa Vilola
Meera Ke Prabhu Nanda Lal Kanhaiya
meaning: Lord Krishna (Kanhaiya), the Lord of Radha and Meera (devotees), the child of Gokula (city), is the sustainer of all beings. The darling son of Nanda, Lord Krishna, is fond of the Raasa (divine dance depicting the ecstasy of the union of the individual souls with the Supreme One).

title: Radha Krishna Karuna Lola Radhey
lyrics:
Radha Krishna Karuna Lola Radhey Govinda
Radhey Govinda Murali Govinda
Radhey Radhey Govinda Murali Govinda
meaning: Chant the name of the merciful Lord, Radha Krishna. He is Radhey Govinda and Murali Govinda, who plays the enchanting flute.

title: Radha Lola Ramya Suchela
lyrics:
Radha Lola Ramya Suchela
Rajitha Vanamala Gopala
Venu Vilola Vijaya Gopala
Vedagama Moola Gopala
meaning: O Lord Gopala (Krishna), the delightful, elegant and the beautiful one who adored by Radha, You are embellished with a garland of flowers from the vines of the forest. You are the beautiful player of the flute, the victorious Gopala and You are the origin of the Vedas.

title: Radha Madhava Madana Gopala
lyrics:
Radha Madhava Madana Gopala
Nanda Mukunda Natavara Lala [ Radha Madhava ... ]
Mathura Natha Deena Dayala
Sai Govinda Giridhara Bala
meaning: Sing the glory of Lord Krishna - Madhava, Gopala, Govinda, beloved of Radha. He is the beloved son of Nanda who liberates us with His divine dance. He is the Lord of Mathura, so full of compassion for the meek. Sai is none other than the boy who held up the mountain to save his devotees.

title: Radha Pyaarey Jaya Gopal
lyrics:
Radha Pyaarey Jaya Gopal
Radha Madhava Jaya Gopal
Brindavan Ke Jaya Gopal
Murali Manohara Jaya Gopal
Jaya Gopal Jaya Gopal (4)
meaning: Victory to Lord Krishna, the universal Protector and the beloved of Radha. Victory to Lord Gopal of Brindavan, the one who enchants with the Divine Flute.

title: Radha Radha Gokula Bala
lyrics:
Radha Radha Gokula Bala 
Nanda Nanda Mukunda Gopala 
Navaneetha Chora Shyama Gopala 
Radha Madhava Raasa Vilola
meaning: Sing the glory of Lord Krishna, also known as Gopala, the beloved son of Nanda. Glory to the dark-hued child who grew up in Gokula, who loved to steal butter. He is one who danced the 'Raasa Leela' with the Gopikas and who is the beloved of Radha.

title: Radha Radha Radha Krishna Radha
lyrics:
Radha Radha Radha Krishna Radha
Radha Krishna Radha (Jai) [ Radha Radha ... ]
meaning: Chant the Holy name of Lord Krishna, the Lord of Radha, incessantly.

title: Radhey Govinda Gopala Jaya Govinda
lyrics:
Radhey Govinda Gopala Jaya Govinda Radhey Gopala
Govinda Govinda Gopala (2) [ Radhey Govinda ... ]
Krishna Madhusudhana Madhusudhana Krishna
Govinda Govinda Gopala (Sai)
meaning: Chant the names of Lord Gopala (Krishna), the one who tends to cows, Lord of Radha (devotee). Repeat the names incessantly of Lord Krishna, who slayed the demon Madhu.

title: Radhey Govinda Harey Murarey
lyrics:
Radhey Govinda Harey Murarey
Shyama Mukunda Harey Murarey [ Radhey Govinda ... ]
Krishna Govinda Harey Murarey
Sai Mukunda Harey Murarey
meaning: Chant the many names of Lord Krishna, the one who destroys the miseries of life, the protector of cows, the dark complexioned liberator, the Lord of Radha and the slayer of demon Mura.

title: Radhey Govinda Jai Jai Radhey
lyrics:
Radhey Govinda Jai Jai Radhey Gopala
Deena Natha Govinda Anatha Natha Gopala [ Radhey Govinda ... ]
Radha Lola Govinda Raasa Vilola Gopala
Govinda Jaya Govinda Gopala Sai Gopala
meaning: Victory to Lord Gopala, the Lord of Radha. You are the Lord of the meek and those who have no support. Oh Lord of Radha! You revel in the cosmic dance with the Gopis. Victory to Lord Govinda. Victory to Lord Gopala, the protector and sustainer of all beings and who is one other than Lord Sai.

title: Radhey Govinda Krishna Murari
lyrics:
Radhey Govinda Krishna Murari
Jaya (Sathya) Sai Mukunda Murari [ Radhey Govinda ... ]
Nanda Ananda Radhey Govinda
Radhey Govinda Sai Govinda 
Sathya Sai Mukunda Murari
meaning: O blue-complexioned Lord Krishna, beloved of Radha, You are the destroyer of the demon Mura. Victory to You Lord Sai, You are verily Lord Krishna, the one who bestows liberation. Victory to the blissful son of Nanda, Lord Govinda, the protector of all beings.

title: Radhey Govinda Radhey Gopala Sai
lyrics:
Radhey Govinda Radhey Gopala Sai Ram
Bansidhara Bansidhara Hey Chitha Chora
Hey Natavara Hey Natavara Nanda Kishora
Ghana Shyama Sundara Megha Shyama Sundara Sai Ram
