meaning: Chant the name of the Lord Krishna, the Lord of Radha and the protector of all. O holder of the Flute, You are the stealer (Chitta Chora) of our awareness, mind and heart. Sing the names of Govinda and Gopala. O the handsome and mischievous son of Nanda, You have the complexion of thick black clouds, thou art verily Lord Sai.

title: Radhey Krishna Govinda Bol Manuva
lyrics:
Radhey Krishna Govinda Bol Manuva
Sri Hari Madhava Govinda Bol [ Radhey Krishna ... ]
Nanda Ananda Shyama Govinda
Pandari Natha Panduranga Bhajorey
meaning: O Mind, chant the names of Krishna, the blissful, dark-hued son of Nanda. Chant the names of Govinda, Madhava and Hari, the Lord of Lakshmi and the name of Panduranga, the Lord of Pandharpur.

title: Radhey Krishna Radhey Krishna Jai
lyrics:
Radhey Krishna Radhey Krishna Jai Sri Krishna Radhey Radhey (2)
Radhey Krishna Radhey Radhey
Jai Sri Krishna Radhey Radhey
Shirdi Krishna Parthi Krishna Sai Krishna Radhey Radhey
Radhey Krishna Radhey Krishna Jai Sri Krishna Radhey Radhey
Radhey Krishna Radhey Radhey [ Jai Sri ... ]
meaning: Repeat the names of Radhey Krishna, of Shirdi Krishna and Parthi Krishna. Victory be to Sai Krishna.

title: Radhey Mukunda Murari Govinda
lyrics:
Radhey Mukunda Murari Govinda
Govinda Govinda Ananda (3) [ Radhey Mukunda ... ]
Giridhari Giridhari Ananda (3)
meaning: Chant the names of the Lord Krishna, the Lord of Radha, Mukunda - bestower of liberation, Murari, who slayed the demon Mura, Govinda, the protector of the innocent and Giridhari, who held aloft the mountain. Sing repeatedly the names of Radhey Mukunda, Govinda, Giridhari, the real source of Bliss.

title: Radhey Radhey Brindavana Radhey
lyrics:
Radhey Radhey Brindavana Radhey
Govinda Gopala Nachey Radhey
Radhey Radhey Madhura Murali Baajey
Nanda Kishore Ki Payal Baajey
Rhuma Jhuma Rhuma Jhuma Payal Baajey
meaning:
O Radha of Brindavana, dance in the name of Gopala and Govinda - the names of Lord Krishna, the son of Nanda, the one who plays the Flute sweetly. May the anklets of His and all those who dance in His name ring melodiously.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Radhey Radhey Govinda
lyrics:
Radhey Radhey Govinda
Radhey Radhey Gopala
Radhey Govinda Bhajo Radhey Gopala
Radhey Mukunda Harey
Radhey Mukunda Harey (3)
meaning: Chant the Names of the Radha's Lord Govinda and Gopala, Radhey Gopala and Radhey Mukunda over and over again.

title: Radhey Radhey Govinda Gopala Radhey
lyrics: Radhey Radhey Govinda Gopala Radhey (4)
meaning: Chant the various names of Lord Krishna - Govinda and Gopala, the one who is the protector of cows and the Lord of Radha.

title: Radhey Radhey Radhey Radhey Govinda
lyrics:
Radhey Radhey Radhey Radhey Govinda
Hey Radhey Gopala
Radhey Govinda Bhajo Radhey Gopala (2) [ Radhey Radhey ... ]
Murali Manohara Govinda Hey Madhava Murahara Govinda (2)
meaning: Let us sing in praise of Lord Krishna and Radha. Praise be to Lord Krishna who is the protector and sustainer, whose music from the flute enchants us. He is Madhava, the Lord of Lakshmi.

title: Radhey Radhey Radhey Radhey Radhey
lyrics:
Radhey Radhey Radhey Radhey Radhey Govinda
Brindavana Chandha
Anatha Natha Deena Bandho Radhey Govinda
Nanda Kumara Navaneetha Chora Radhey Govinda
Brindavana Chandha [ Anatha Natha ... ]
Bhaktha Vatsala Bhaagavatha Priya Radhey Govinda
Brindavana Chandha [ Anatha Natha ... ]
Venu Vilola Vijaya Gopala Radhey Govinda
Brindavana Chandha [ Anatha Natha ... ]
Pandari Natha Panduranga Radhey Govinda
Brindavana Chandha [ Anatha Natha ... ]
Pundarikaaksha Purana Purusha Radhey Govinda
Brindavana Chandha [ Anatha Natha ... ]
meaning: Chant continuously the name of Krishna - 'Radhey Govinda' signifying Radha (the individual soul) and Govinda (signifying the Universal soul), the beautiful shining star of Brindavana, who is the refuge of the forlorn. He is the son of Nanda. He is the one who stole butter (steals devotees' hearts), who is dear to His devotees and who takes care of them. He is the victorious one who likes to play scintillating music on His Flute. He is Panduranga, the Lord of Pandharpur. He is the one who waited at the doorstep of devotee Pundarika to grant him liberation. He is the ancient and the Supreme One.

title: Radhey Radhey Radhey Radhey Venu
lyrics:
Radhey Radhey Radhey Radhey Venu Gopala
Venu Gopala Sai Gopala [ Radhey Radhey ... ]
Radhika Manohara Raja Gopala
Gopika Manohara Gopi Gopala
Neela Megha Shyama Sundara Sai Gopala
Madhava Keshava Sai Jai Jai Gopala
meaning: Chant the various names of Lord Krishna, the ever blissful and enchanting Flutist - Govinda, Gopala. Pray to Lord Krishna, the beautiful cowherd boy with dark-blue complexion like a cloud, the one with beautiful hair and who enchants the Gopikas. He is the Lord of Lakshmi. Victory to Lord Sai who is none other than Lord Krishna.

title: Radhey Shyam Panduranga Vittaley Rakhumayi
lyrics:
Radhey Shyam Panduranga Vittaley Rakhumayi
Panduranga Purandara Vittaley Rakhumayi
Radhey Shyam Panduranga Vittaley Rakhumayi (2) [ Panduranga ... ]
meaning: Chant the name of Lord Panduranga Vittala, who is none other than Lord Krishna. Chant the name of Panduranga Vittala, the indweller of hearts, and His consort Rakhumayi.

title: Radhey Shyam Radhey Shyam Radhey Gopala
lyrics:
Radhey Shyam Radhey Shyam Radhey Gopala
Jaya Madhava Jaya Keshava Jaya Murali Gaana Lola [ Radhey Shyam ... ]
Pandari Natha Parama Dayala
Parthi Pureesha Sai Deva [ Jaya Madhava ... ]
meaning: Chant the name of Lord Shyam (Krishna), the dark-complexioned one who is the beloved of Radha. Victory to Thee who is worshipped as Madhava and Keshava, the one who enjoys sweet music from His flute. O Lord, You are verily Lord Vittala, the Lord of Pandari, the most compassionate one and the Lord of Parthi, Lord Sai.

title: Radhey Shyama Gopala Radhika Jeevana
lyrics:
Radhey Shyama Gopala Radhika Jeevana Sri Ranga
Megha Shyama Gopala Mana Mohana Sundara Sri Ranga [ Radhey ... ]
Pandari Natha Gopala Panduranga Sri Ranga
Parthi Pureesha Gopala Sai Ranga Sri Ranga
meaning: Pray to Lord Krishna (Ranga) , the beautiful cowherd boy with dark blue complexion like a cloud, who enchants our minds and who is the beloved of Radha. Pray to the Lord of Pandharpur, Panduranga (Vittala) who resides in Puttaparthi as Sai.

title: Radhey Shyama Hey Ghana Shyama
lyrics:
Radhey Shyama Hey Ghana Shyama
Radha Madhava Mangala Dhama [ Radhey Shyama ... ]
Nanda Nandana Govinda
Navaneetha Chora Govinda
Narada Priya Govinda
Natajana Pala Govinda
Narayana Govinda (Hari)
Govinda Gokula Nandana Govinda
meaning: Glory to the beloved of Radha, Lord Krishna who has the complexion of dark clouds. He is the source of all auspiciousness, the darling son of Nanda and the one who stole butter from the neighboring houses (hearts of devotees). He is dear to Saint Narada. He takes complete care of those who have surrendered to Him.  He is the star of the people of Gokula and is Lord Narayana Himself. Lord Govinda is very dear to His devotees and Saints. He has Garuda (Eagle) as His vehicle and He is the destroyer of sins. He is Lord Narayana Himself.

title: Radhey Shyama Hey Ghana Shyama
lyrics:
Radhey Shyama Hey Ghana Shyama
Radha Madhava Mangala Dhama [ Radhey Shyama ... ]
Jaya Jaya Jaya Hey Megha Shyama
Megha Shyama Megha Shyama [ Jaya Jaya ... ]
Jaya Jaya Jaya Brindavana Dhama
meaning:
Chant the name of the dark hued Lord Krishna, Lord of Radha. Glory to the Lord of Lakshmi, the abode of auspiciousness. Victory to the cloud complexioned Lord. Victory to the Lord of Brindavan, Krishna.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Radhika Jeevana
lyrics:
Radhika Jeevana
Krishna Janardhana
Radhey Govinda Radhey Gopala
Devaki Nandana [ Radhika ... ]
Nanda Nandana Hey Gopika Ranjana
Murali Mohana
Sri Madhusudhana (Krishna Krishna)
meaning: Sing the praises of Lord Krishna, the very soul of His devotee Radha. Lord Krishna is the one adored by all, the darling son of Devaki and fostered by Nanda. He is the enchanter of the Gopikas. He has a beautiful form playing the flute. He is the slayer of the demon Madhu.

title: Radhika Manohara Madana Gopala
lyrics:
Radhika Manohara Madana Gopala
Deena Vatsala Hey Raja Gopala
Bhaktha Jana Mandara Venu Gopala
Muralidhara Hey Gaana Vilola
meaning:
Sing the glory of Lord Krishna (Gopala), who attracts Radha's mind. We bow to Him, the protector of the meek, the Royal Lord. He who enchants the devotees with his divine flute music and songs, our salutations to Thee!

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Raghava Raghu Nandana
lyrics:
Raghava Raghu Nandana
Madhava Madhusudhana [ Raghava Raghu ... ]
Rajeeva Dala Lochana Shyama Bansi Mohana
Donon Hi Naam Hai Anand Dham (2)
meaning: Sing the glory of Raghava, the scion of Raghu dynasty, Lord Rama. He is also the sweet Lord Krishna who slayed demonic force Madhu. He is the lotus-eyed and dark-hued one, who enchants us with His flute. Both the names, Ram and Shyam grant liberation and bliss.

title: Raghava Raghuvara Rama Bhajo
lyrics:
Raghava Raghuvara Rama Bhajo
Mandara Giridhara Shyama Bhajo [ Raghava Raghuvara ... ]
Tulasidas Prabho Rama Bhajo
Meera Mohana Shyam Bhajo
Raghupathi Raghava Rama Bhajo Murali Mohana Shyama Bhajo
Nanda Nandana Shyama Bhajo Dasharatha Nandana Rama Bhajo 
Sai Sundara Naama Bhajo
meaning: Sing the praises of Lord Rama (Raghava) of Raghu lineage, the Lord of Saint Tulasidas, the son of Dasharatha and of Shyama (Lord Krishna), who lifted the Mandara mountain, the Lord of Meera, the one who delights everyone with lilting music of His Flute, the son of Nanda. Praise our beautiful (Sundara) Lord Sai.

title: Raghava Sundara Rama Raghuvara
lyrics:
Raghava Sundara Rama Raghuvara
Parama Pavana Hey Jaga Vandana [ Raghava Sundara ... ]
Patithodharana Bhaktha Parayana
Ravana Mardhana Vighna Bhanjana
Parthi Pureeshwara Sai Narayana
meaning: The beautiful Lord Rama is Supreme among the Raghu dynasty. He is worshipped by the entire creation. Liberator of the chaste, venerated by the devotees, He destroys obstacles and annihilated the demon-king Ravana. Worship Lord Narayana, who has incarnated in Parthi as Lord Sai Ram.

title: Raghu Nandana Hey Raghu Nandana
lyrics:
Raghu Nandana Hey Raghu Nandana (2)
Pyaarey Merey Nandana Raghu Nandana [ Raghu Nandana ... ]
Rajeeva Lochana Raghu Nandana
Dasharatha Tanaya Raghu Nandana
Dasha Mukha Mardhana Raghu Nandana
Janaki Jeevana Raghu Nandana [ Raghu Nandana ... ]
meaning: I bow to the lotus-eyed Lord Rama of Raghu Dynasty who is beloved to me. He is the beloved Prince of King Dasharatha and is the destroyer of the ten-headed Ravana. Salutations to the one who is the very life of Mother Janaki (Sita).

title: Raghu Nandana Raghava Ram Harey
lyrics:
Raghu Nandana Raghava Ram Harey
Hey Janaki Jeevana Ram Harey
Hey Rajeeva Lochana Ram Harey
Sri Rama Harey Sai Rama Harey (5)
meaning: Worship Lord Rama of Raghu Dynasty. Worship the lotus-eyed Lord Rama, who is the very life-breath of Mother Sita. Sai Rama who is verily Lord Rama, we sing Your praises.

title: Raghukula Bhooshana Rajeeva Nayana
lyrics:
Raghukula Bhooshana Rajeeva Nayana
Eshwaramba Nandana Sathya Sai Rama
Janaki Vallabha Lavanya Rama
Nirupama Sundara Sugunabhi Rama
Prashanthi Nilaya Pavana Naama
Jaya Jaya Rama Prabhu Sai Rama
meaning: Glory to the jewel of the Raghu dynasty, the lotus-eyed Lord Rama. He is none other than the darling son of Mother Eshwaramba, Lord Sathya Sai. The beloved of Janaki (Sita), the exquisitely handsome Lord Rama, is beautifully-complexioned and the most virtuous. Victory to Lord Rama, who is verily our Lord Sai Rama, of the Holy abode, Prashanthi Nilayam.

title: Raghupathey Raghava Raja Rama
lyrics:
Raghupathey Raghava Raja Rama
O Raja (Sai) Rama [ Raghupathey ... ]
Dasharatha Nandana Raja Rama Kausalyatmaja Sundara Rama
Rama Rama Jaya Raja Rama Raghava Mohana Megha Shyama
Jai Jai Ram Jai Jai Ram
Jai Jai Ram Jai Jai Ram Jai Jai Rama Rama Raja Ram
Patitha Pavana Sita Pathey Rama
meaning: Pray and chant the name of Lord Rama, the handsome Prince of King Dasharatha and Mother Kausalya. Victory to Lord Rama, the Saviour of the downtrodden and the Lord of Sita. Victory be to You, O Raghava, the Lord of Raghu dynasty, the one with a captivating form and of dark complexion.

title: Raghupathey Sita Rama
lyrics:
Raghupathey Sita Rama
Janaki Jeevana Kodanda Rama [ Raghupathey ... ]
Rajeeva Lochana Ravikula Soma
Ravana Mardhana Jaya Jaya Rama
meaning:
Victory to the Lord Rama, the Lord of the Raghu dynasty, who is the life-breath of Mother Sita. Victory to the lotus-eyed one who is the nectarine essence of the Solar dynasty, the one who wields the Kodanda bow and the one who destroyed the demon Ravana.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Raghupathey Sri Rama Chandra Raghava
lyrics:
Raghupathey Sri Rama Chandra Raghava Daya Nidhey (2)
Pashupathey Sri Parvatheesha Shankara Sadashiva (2)
Madhava Sri Radhikesha Govinda Harey Krishna (2)
meaning: O Rama, Lord of the Raghus, who is still and shining as the moon, You are the Ocean of Mercy. O Lord Shiva, the beloved of Mother Parvathi, You are ever unchanging and the Source of Goodness. Oh Krishna, the Splendorous Lord of Radha, You are the protector of our souls and the remover of sorrows. Oh Lord Sai, You are Lord Rama, Lord Shiva and Lord Krishna.

title: Raghupathi Raghava Raja Ram
lyrics:
Raghupathi Raghava Raja Ram
Patitha Pavana Sita Ram
Raghupathi Raghava Raja Ram
Patitha Pavana Sita Ram
Rama Rama Jaya Raja ( Sai ) Ram
Rama Rama Jaya Raja Ram
Rama Rama Jaya Sita Ram
Rama Rama Jaya Sai Ram
meaning: Chant the name of Lord Sai Rama. O Lord, You are the salvation of the fallen and repentful. Chant the name of the princely Rama of Ayodhya. Chant the name of Sai Ram whose name purifies us.

title: Raghupathi Raghava Raja Ram Patitha
lyrics:
Raghupathi Raghava Raja Ram Patitha Pavana Sita Ram
Sita Ram Jaya Sita Ram Bhaja Pyaarey Tu Sita Ram
Eshwara Allah Terey Naam Sab Ko Sanmati Dey Bhagawan
(Hey Bhagawan Hey Bhagawan Sab Ko Sanmati Dey Bhagawan)
(Sri Ram Jaya Ram Jaya Jaya Ram Sita Ram Jaya Sita Ram)
meaning:
Victory to You, Lord Rama, king of the Raghu dynasty, and the Lord of Sita, the protector of the poor and helpless. Sing praises to our beloved Lord Sita Ram, known also as Ishwara and Allah. O Lord, please endow us with intelligence.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Raghuveera Ranadheera Rama Rama Ram
lyrics:
Raghuveera Ranadheera Rama Rama Ram
Rakumayi Vittala Shyama Shyama Shyam [ Raghuveera ... ]
Sukumara Sundara Rama Rama Ram
Shirdeesha Partheesha (Sayeesha) Rama Rama Ram
meaning: Let us sing the glories of Lord Rama, the champion of Raghu dynasty, the one who is mighty and valorous. Chant the name of Lord Vittala, the dark hued one and His consort Rakumayi. Victory to the good, young and handsome Rama, who is verily Sai, the Lord of Shirdi and Parthi.

title: Rahiman Rahiman Ram Rahim
lyrics:
Rahiman Rahiman Ram Rahim
Sai Ram Sai Ram Krishna Karim
Buddha Zohrashtra Nanak Sai
Yesu Pitha Prabhu Sai Tum Ho
Bhajorey Manuva Ram Rahim
Ram Rahim Sai Krishna Karim
meaning: Oh Mind! Chant the various names of the same Lord Ram, Rahim the gracious One, Krishna, Karim (the compassionate), Sai Ram. Oh Lord Sai! You are Buddha, Zohrashtra, Nanak and You are the one who sent Jesus You are the embodiment of all that has come as One.

title: Raja Rajeshwari Jaganmohini (Amba)
lyrics:
Raja Rajeshwari Jaganmohini (Amba)
Jagadambe Mangala Kaarini [ (Amba) Raja Rajeshwari ... ]
Jagadodharini Vighna Vinashini
Sthira Sukha Dayini Sai Janani
meaning: Effulgent and beautiful Goddess Amba enchants the world and bestows auspiciousness. She destroys obstacles and saves the world. Mother Sai grants ever-lasting happiness.

title: Rajadhi Raja Hey Sai Maharaja
lyrics:
Rajadhi Raja Hey Sai Maharaja
Deenon Ke Nath Bhagawan
Devadi Deva Hey Sai Mahadeva
Parthi Nivasi Sai Ram
Harey Rama Rama Rama Rama
Harey Krishna Krishna Krishna Krishna
meaning:
Chant the name of the King of Kings, the Supreme King, Lord Sai, the protector of the miserable and dejected. O the Lord of Lords, the resident of Parthi, Lord Sai, You are Lord Rama and Lord Krishna.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Rajadhi Raja Raja Gambhira
lyrics:
Rajadhi Raja Raja Gambhira
Raja Marthaanda Raja Kumara
Raavo Raavo Gaana Manohara
Pankaja Lochana Parthi Vihara
meaning:
O Lord Sai, the King of Kings, with the prestige and dignity of a King, please come. O Lover of music, the lotus-eyed one who lives in Parthi, we lovingly beckon You to come.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Rajeeva Lochana Jaya Jaya Rama
lyrics:
Rajeeva Lochana Jaya Jaya Rama
Raghukula Bhooshana Jaya Raghu Rama
Dasharatha Nandana Lavanya Rama
Abhaya Pradayaka Ananda Rama
Janaki Vallabha Sugunabhi Rama
Jagadodhara Sathya Sai Rama
meaning:
Victory to Lord Rama, the lotus-eyed one, the crown jewel of Raghu dynasty, the beloved son of Dasharatha and the consort of Sita. Victory to the virtuous one who protects His devotees and the one who is ever blissful. He is none other than Lord Sai who is the liberator of the entire Universe.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Rajeeva Lochana Sai Narayana
lyrics:
Rajeeva Lochana Sai Narayana
Narahari Roopa Namo Narayana [ Rajeeva Lochana ... ]
Parama Dayaghana Patitha Pavana
Nithya Niranjana Sai Narayana [ Narahari Roopa ... ]
meaning: Worship the lotus-eyed Lord Narayana, who has incarnated as Lord Sathya Sai, the saviour of devotees and towards whom He is extremely merciful and who is the embodiment of purity.

title: Raksha Karo Bhagawan Sathya Sai
lyrics:
Raksha Karo Bhagawan Sathya Sai Bhagawan
Paahi Dayalo Dehi Krupalo [ Raksha Karo ... ]
Sathya Dharma Shanthi Prema Pradatha
Nithya Nirmala Jeevana Daata
Brahma Vishnu Maheshwara Roopa
Sathyam Shivam Sundaram

Raksha Karo Bhagawan (3)
meaning: Protect us, O Lord Sathya Sai, You are the compassionate and merciful Lord of the helpless, the bestower of truth, righteousness, peace and love, the ever - cheerful Lord who sustains all life, the embodiment of Brahma (Creator), Vishnu (Sustainer) and Maheshwara (Destroyer of evil). You are Truth, Auspiciousness and Beauty.

title: Raksha Raksha Jagadeeshwara
lyrics:
Raksha Raksha Jagadeeshwara
Parthi Puri Parameshwara
Paahi Paahi Parameshwara
Dehi Dehi Tava Pada Seva
meaning: Protect us, O Lord of the Universe, Lord Sai. Protect us, O Lord of Parthi and bless us, O Supreme Lord. We pray to Thee to grant us the opportunity to serve at Thy Lotus Feet.

title: Ram Bhagawan Ram Bhagawan
lyrics:
Ram Bhagawan Ram Bhagawan Ram Bhagawan Sita Ram Bhagawan
Krishna Bhagawan Krishna Bhagawan Krishna Bhagawan Radhey Krishna Bhagawan
Prema Bhagawan Prema Bhagawan Prema Bhagawan Sai Prema Bhagawan
Hari Bhagawan Hari Bhagawan Hari Bhagawan Hari Hara Bhagawan
Atma Roopa Bhagawan Paramatma Roopa Bhagawan
Shirdi Swaroopa Sathya Swaroopa Prema Roopa Bhagawan
meaning:
Glory to Lord Sathya Sai of Parthi who is Love incarnate and is verily Lord Rama, Krishna, Hari and Hara (Shiva). He is the very embodiment of the Supreme Atma and of Truth and Love. He is verily Lord Sai who incarnated at Shirdi.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Ram Kaho Krishna Kaho Eshwara
lyrics:
Ram Kaho Krishna Kaho Eshwara Allah Sai Kaho
Buddha Kaho Guru Nanak Kaho Zohrashtra Mahavir Yesu Kaho [ Ram Kaho ... ]
Yug Avatara Tum Ho Vishwa Shakthi Tum Ho
Sarva Dharma Priya Sai Mahesha
Parabrahma Tum Ho (Sai)
meaning: Chant the name of all the Gods - Rama, Krishna, Eshwara (Shiva) or Allah. Chant the name of Buddha, Guru Nanak or Zohrashtra. Chant either Mahavir or Jesus. O Sai, You are the incarnation of this age. You are the power behind the Universe, the one who loves all religion equally. You are the embodiment of the Supreme One.

title: Ram Kaho Sai Ram Kaho
lyrics:
Ram Kaho Sai Ram Kaho
Shyam Kaho Ghana Shyam Kaho
Yesu Kaho Zohrashtra Kaho
Jag Ka Vidhata Sai Kaho
Mandir Mey Kabhi Masjid Mey
Apna Hrudaya Mey Sai Bhagawan
meaning: Call Him by any name be it Rama, Sai Ram, Shyam, Yesu, Zohrashtra, sometimes He is in a temple or mosque, but the Creator of this Universe, Lord Sai, lives in our Heart.

title: Ram Naam Bolo Sai Naam
lyrics:
Ram Naam Bolo Sai Naam Bolo Sai Shyam Ghana Shyam Jai Bolo
Ram Naam Bolo Sai Naam Bolo
Sai Shyam Ghana Shyam
meaning: Chant the names of Lord Rama, Lord Krishna and Lord Sai.

title: Ram Rahim Ho Sai Krishna
lyrics:
Ram Rahim Ho Sai Krishna Buddha Sai
Zohrashtra Yeshu Sai Mahavir Bhi Ho Sai [ Ram Rahim … ]
Sarva Dharma Palaka Hey Prema Roopa Sai
Sarva Jana Rakshaka Sai Ram Ek Ram
Ram Rahim Sai Ram Rahim Sai Ram Rahim Sai Ram
meaning:
O Lord Sai, You are Lord Rama, Rahim, Krishna, Buddha, Zohrashtra, Jesus Christ and Mahavira. You foster all religions and is the very embodiment of Love. You are the protector of all and You preach the oneness of all faiths. Glory to Thee, the most merciful Lord Sai.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Ram Rahim Ko Bhajanewaale
lyrics:
Ram Rahim Ko Bhajanewaale Terey Poojari Baba
Tera Naam Ek Sahara (3)
Tum Hi Ho Geeta Tum Hi Ramayan
Tum Hi Ho Veda Quran [ Tera Naam ... ]
meaning: O Lord Sai Baba, for the devotees of Lord Rama (Hindus) and of Rahim (Islam), Your name is the only refuge. You are the very Form of the teachings of Holy scriptures, Bhagawad Gita, Ramayana, the four Vedas and the Quran.

title: Ram Ram Bhajo Mana Harey
lyrics:
Ram Ram Bhajo Mana Harey Harey
Sai Ram Bhajo Mana Harey Harey [ Ram Ram ... ]
Raghupathi Raja Rama Ram
Patitha Pavana Sita Ram [ Sai Ram ... ]
meaning: O mind, worship Lord Rama of the Raghu Dynasty. The Lord of Sita, Lord Rama, destroys sins and evil, uplifts and liberates the penitent. Chant the name of Lord Sai who is verily Lord Rama.

title: Ram Ram Ram Parama Sumangala
lyrics:
Ram Ram Ram Parama Sumangala Ram Ram Ram
Janani Janaki Jeevana Ram
Jai Jai Ram Sai Ram Jayatu Jayatu Rama
Parama Sumangala Ram Ram Ram
meaning: The name of Ram is highly auspicious. Lord Rama is the life of the universal Mother Janaki (Sita). Victory to Lord Ram and Lord Sai, whose names are highly auspicious.

title: Rama Anarada Marokka Sari Rama
lyrics:
Rama Anarada Marokka Sari Rama Anarada 
Rama Ante Ragamu Tolagunu 
Krishna Anarada Marokka Sari Krishna Anarada 
Krishna Ante Kashtamu Tolagunu 
Sai Anarada Marokka Sari Sai Anarada 
Sai Ante Soukyamu Kalugunu 
Baba Anarada Marokka Sari Baba Anarada 
Baba Ante Badhalu Theeranu
meaning:
Chanting the name of Rama removes all diseases. Chanting the name of Krishna removes all pains. Chanting the name of Sai grants bliss to all. Chanting the name of Baba removes all difficulties.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Rama Charan Sukha Dayi Bhajorey
lyrics:
Rama Charan Sukha Dayi Bhajorey (3)
Ram Naam Ke Do Akshara Mey
Sab Sukh Shanthi Samayirey
Sai Nath Ke Charnon Mey Aakar
Jeevan Saphal Banaorey
meaning: Worshipping the Lotus Feet of Lord Ram endows one with happiness. Reciting only the two letters Ra and Ma, confers everlasting peace and happiness. Finish the mission of human birth by surrendering to the Lotus Feet of Lord Sai (by merging in Lord Sai) who is none other than Lord Rama.

title: Rama Harey Hari Naam Bolo
lyrics:
Rama Harey Hari Naam Bolo
Hari Naam Bolo Sai Naam Bolo [ Rama Harey ... ]
Sai Rama Parama Dayala
Parama Dayala (2)
Man Mandir Mey Diya Ujaala
Allah Sai Bolo Maulah Sai Bolo
Yesu Sai Bolo Buddha Sai Bolo
Nanak Sai Bolo Govinda Sai Bolo
Allah Sai Bolo Maulah Sai Bolo
meaning: Sing the many names of the Lord Rama, Hari, Govinda. Chant the name of Guru Nanak, Allah, Maulah and the all-pervasive Lord who is extremely compassionate and whose presence has kindled the light in the temple of our hearts. Chant the Name of Rama and of Hari. Light the lamp of Love in our Hearts, O Sai, the most merciful One.

title: Rama Harey Sai Krishna Harey
lyrics:
Rama Harey Sai Krishna Harey Sarva Dharma Priya Sai Harey
Allah Eshwar Sai Harey
Guru Nanak Yesu Buddha Harey
Zohrashtra Mahavira Sai Harey
Sarva Dharma Priya Sai Harey (Baba)
Rama Harey Sai Krishna Harey (4)
meaning: Glory to Rama, glory to Krishna, glory to Lord Sai, who loves all religions equally. Glory to the name of the Lord of all faiths; Who is known by different names as Rama, Krishna, Allah, Eshwar, Guru Nanak, Jesus, Buddha, Zohrashtra, Mahavira. Sai responds to any of these names.

title: Rama Harey Sita Ram
lyrics:
Rama Harey Sita Ram
Shyam Harey Radhey Shyam
Sita Vallabha Sundara Ram
Murali Manohara Radhey Shyam
Parthi Pureeshwara Ram
meaning: Chant the name of Lord Rama, the Lord of Sita, Radhey Shyam, the Lord of Radha. Chant the name of Rama, the handsome consort of Sita, Radhey Shyam, the enchanting Flute Player. They are none other than our Lord of Parthi, Sai Ram.

title: Rama Jayam Hari Rama Jayam
lyrics:
Rama Jayam Raghu Rama Jayam
Raghava Dhyanamey Premamayam [ Rama Jayam ... ]
Rama Sita Pathi Raghava Mantram
Prema Niguna Gana Seva Niranthram
Rama Dayapara Parama Pavitram
Raghukula Dasharatha Suthamutha Mitram
meaning: Glory to Lord Rama of Raghu lineage. The entire world meditates on Rama, the dear son of Dasharatha of the Solar Dynasty. Chant the name of Raghava, the Lord of Sita, and immerse ourselves ever in extolling His Divine qualities and in His service. Glory be to Rama who shows immense compassion towards the pure and the good ones.

title: Rama Krishna Govinda Narayana
lyrics:
Rama Krishna Govinda Narayana
Narayana Hari Narayana [ Rama Krishna ... ]
Sri Lakshmi Ramana Narayana
Om Anantha Narayana (Hari) (3)
meaning: Worship Lord Rama, Krishna, Govinda and Narayana, the Lord of the Goddess of Prosperity (goddess Lakshmi). He is the infinite, supreme Lord Hari.

title: Rama Krishna Govinda Narayana Keshava
lyrics:
Rama Krishna Govinda Narayana Keshava
Radhika Ramana Madhava Jaya Ranga Deva
Harey Rama Harey Krishna Sita Rama Raghava [ Radhika Ramana ... ]
meaning: Chant the names of the Lord Rama, Krishna, Narayana, Keshava and Madhava (names of Krishna), the one adored by Radhika (Radha). Victory to You, the Lord of the stage (world). Glory to Lord Rama and Lord Krishna.

title: Rama Krishna Hari Mukunda Murari
lyrics:
Rama Krishna Hari Hari Mukunda Murari
Panduranga Hari Jai Jai Panduranga Hari Hari
Deva Deva Deva Mahadeva Deva
Adi Deva Deva Brahma Vishnu Deva
Brahma Vishnu Deva Sathya Sai Deva [ Panduranga Hari ... ]
Panduranga Hari Jai Jai Panduranga Hari Hari (4)
Panduranga Hari Hari (2)
meaning: Chant the names of Lord Rama, Krishna, Hari, Mukunda, the one who liberates and Murari, the one who slayed the demon, Mura. He is Lord Panduranga, the Lord of Lords. He is the great God, Mahadeva (Shiva), He is the primordial Lord, the trinity of Brahma, Vishnu and Shiva. He has taken form as Lord Sathya Sai. Victory to Lord Panduranga.

title: Rama Krishna Hari Narayana
lyrics:
Rama Krishna Hari Narayana
Deena Janavana Hari Narayana
Deena Sharanya Narayana
Bhava Bhaya Harana Sai Narayana
meaning: Chant the name of Lord Rama, Krishna, Narayana and Hari. Lord Narayana, who is the protector and the one in whom the downtrodden takes refuge. He is none other than Lord Sai, who protects and liberates us from the bondage of life and death.

title: Rama Krishna Hari Sathya Sai
lyrics:
Rama Krishna Hari Sathya Sai Murari
Sai Murari Sathya Sai Murari [ Rama Krishna ... ]
Allah Eshwar Yesu Bhi Tum Ho
Tum Ho Ram Aur Shyama Murari
Buddha Bhi Tum Ho Brahma Bhi Tum Ho [ Sai Murari ... ]
meaning:
Oh Sai Baba, You are none other than Rama, Krishna and Hari. Victory to You! You are Jesus Christ, You are Allah. You are Eshwar, Buddha and Lord Brahma.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Rama Krishna Jaya Bolo (Bhaja Mana)
lyrics:
Rama Krishna Jaya Bolo (Bhaja Mana)
Rama Krishna Jaya Sai Krishna Jaya [ Rama Krishna ... ]
Raghukula Bhooshana Rama Rama Ram
Radha Madhava Shyama Shyama Shyam
Harey Ram Harey Ram Harey Krishna Harey Ram
meaning:
O mind, chant the name of Lord Rama and Krishna. Victory to Lord Rama, the Jewel of the Raghu dynasty. Victory to the dark-hued Lord Krishna, Lord of Radha. Chant the Mantra, 'Harey Ram Harey Krishna'.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Rama Krishna Tum Ho
lyrics:
Rama Krishna Tum Ho Jaya Ram Jaya Ram
Sai Krishna Tum Ho Sai Ram Sai Ram
Yesu Pitha Tum Ho Hey Ram Hey Ram
Allah Eshwar Ho Allah Ho Akbar
Shirdi Sai Tum Ho Sai Ram Sai Ram
meaning: O Lord Sai You are everybody - Rama, Krishna, Jesus, Allah, Eshwar (Shiva) and Shirdi Sai.

title: Rama Krishna Vasudeva Narayana Hari
lyrics:
Rama Krishna Vasudeva Narayana Hari Hari
Vishwa Roopa Vasudeva Narayana Hari Hari
Narayana Hari Hari Om Narayana Hari Hari [ Vishwa Roopa ... ]
meaning: Chant the names of Lord Rama, Krishna, Vasudeva, Hari, Narayana, the all-pervading cosmic form of the Lord of Lords, Lord Hari, who is verily Lord Sai.

title: Rama Lakshmana Janaki Jai Bolo
lyrics: Rama Lakshmana Janaki Jai Bolo Hanuman Ki (4)
meaning: Victory to Lord Rama, Lakshmana, Sita. Victory to Hanuman (monkey devotee of Lord Rama) and Lord Sai Rama.

title: Rama Lakshmana Janaki Jai Bolo
lyrics:
Rama Lakshmana Janaki Jai Bolo Hanuman Ki
Anjani Putra Balabheema Anjaneya Balabheema
Balabheem (6) Balabheema
Vayu Kumara Balabheema Vanara Veera Balabheema [ Balabheem ... ]
Parthi Pureesha Sai Rama Pavana Purusha Sai Rama
Sai Ram (6) Sai Rama
meaning: Victory to Lord Rama, Lakshmana, Sita and Hanuman. Victory to the mighty son of Anjana and Vayu (God of wind). Victory to the valorous one of the monkey clan. Bow to the Lord of Parthi, Lord Sai Rama, the pure and blemishless one.

title: Rama Naama Tarakam Sada Bhajorey
lyrics:
Rama Naama Tarakam Sada Bhajorey
Sada Bhajorey Sada Japo Rey [ Rama Naama ... ]
Rama Rama Rama Jaya Kodanda Rama
Rama Rama Rama Jaya Pattabhi Rama
Rama Rama Rama Jaya Kalyana Rama
meaning: Incessantly worship Lord Rama who helps attain liberation. Victory to Lord Rama, who wields the 'Kodanda' bow. Victory to Lord Rama, the crowned King. Victory to Lord Rama, the bestower of auspiciousness.

title: Rama Namo Rama Namo
lyrics:
Rama Namo Rama Namo Rama Namo Sai Rama Namo
Dasharatha Nandana Rama Namo
Vasudeva Nandana Krishna Namo [ Rama Namo … ]
Shirdi Pureeshwara Baba Namo
Parthi Pureeshwara Sai Namo
Sai Namo Sai Namo Sai Namo Sathya Sai Namo
meaning: Salutations to Lord Rama, son of Dasharatha and to Lord Krishna, son of Vasudeva. Salutations to Lord Sai of Shirdi and Parthi who is verily Lord Rama and Krishna.

title: Rama Raghuvara Ram Sita Ram
lyrics:
Rama Raghuvara Ram Sita Ram Rama Ram (2)
Rama Dasharatha Nandana Kamaneeya Komala Ram
Rama Danava Bhanjana Kodanda Raja Ram
Deena Bandhu Karuna Sindhu Rama Sai Ram
Rama Bhaja Mana Rama Bhaja Mana Rama Pavana Naam
meaning: Chant the name of Lord Rama, the consort of Mother Sita and the son of King Dasharatha. Lord Rama, the tender, handsome one is the annihilator of the demon clan. He is the one who wields the Kodanda bow, the ocean of compassion and who is dear to the forlorn. Sing, O mind, the purifying name of Lord Rama.

title: Rama Raghuvara Rama Sita Rama
lyrics:
Rama Raghuvara Rama Sita Rama Rama Ram
Sri Rama Rama Ram Sai Rama Rama Ram [ Rama Raghuvara ... ]
Hey Patitha Pavana Ram Hey Shyamala Komala Ram
Hey Vaidehi Priya Ram Sai Ram Rama Jaya Ram [ Sri Rama ... ]
meaning: Chant the name of Lord Rama of Raghu dynasty whose consort is Mother Sita; He is the handsome and tender Lord who liberates the penitent. He is the beloved of Vaidehi (Sita), victory to Lord Ram.

title: Rama Rama Jaya Raghukula Tilaka
lyrics:
Rama Rama Jaya Raghukula Tilaka
Rajeeva Lochana Ram
Eshwaramba Sutha Jaya Jaga Vandana
Ratnakara Kula Deepa (3)
meaning: Worship the lotus-eyed Lord Rama, who is the auspicious symbol of the Raghu dynasty. He is verily Lord Sathya Sai, the son of Mother Eshwaramba and is the glory of the Ratnakara dynasty.

title: Rama Rama Jaya Raja Ram
lyrics: Rama Rama Jaya Raja Ram Rama Rama Jaya Sita Ram (4)
meaning: Victory to Lord Rama, the consort of Mother Sita.

title: Rama Rama Rama Jaya Kodanda
lyrics:
Rama Rama Rama Jaya Kodanda Ram
Rama Rama Rama Jaya Kalyana Rama
Rama Rama Rama Jaya Vaidehi Rama
Rama Rama Rama Jaya Pattabhi Rama
Rama Rama Rama Jaya Atmabhi Rama
Rama Rama Rama Prabhu Sai Rama
meaning: Victory to Lord Rama, the one with the famous bow, Kodanda. Victory to Him, the bestower of auspiciousness. Victory to Him, the beloved of Vaidehi (Mother Sita). Victory to Lord Rama, the crown Prince, the one with the sweet form and who resides in our hearts, Victory to Lord Sai who is verily Lord Rama.

title: Rama Rama Rama Rama
lyrics:
Rama Rama Rama Rama Rama Naama Tarakam
Rama Krishna Vasudeva Bhakthi Mukthi Dayakam [ Rama Rama ... ]
Janaki Manoharam Sakala Loka Nayakam
Shankaradi Sevyamana Divya Naama Keertanam
meaning: Chant the sacred name of Lord Rama which liberates one from the cycle of birth and death. Chant the name of Lord Krishna who bestows devotion and liberation. Chant the name of Lord Rama, the Lord of all the worlds and the one who pleases Mother Janaki (Sita). Sing the beautiful name of Lord Rama whose name is chanted even by Lord Shankara (Shiva).

title: Rama Rama Rama Rama Ram
lyrics:
Rama Rama Rama Rama Ram
 Rama Rama Ramachandra
 Lord of Beauty, Lord of Bliss, Lord who made all this
 Bhagawan Sri Sathya Sai, embodiment of Bliss
 Rama Rama Rama Rama Ram
 Rama Rama Ramachandra
 As I look into Your eyes, seeing infinity
 I know that You surely will set my soul free
 Rama Rama Rama Rama Ram
 Rama Rama Ramachandra
 In my heart You softly say, Love is all that's True
 Loving You, sweet Sathya Sai, is all that I can do

title: Rama Rama Rama Sai Rama
lyrics:
Rama Rama Rama Sai Rama Namo
Krishna Krishna Krishna Sai Krishna Namo
Yesu Yesu Yesu Sai Yesu Namo
Buddha Buddha Buddha Sai Buddha Namo [ Rama Rama ... ]
Allah Allah Allah Sai Allah Namo
Zohrashtra Zohrashtra Sai Namo
Mahavira Mahavira Sai Namo
Guru Nanak Guru Nanak Nanak Namo
meaning: I bow to Lord Rama, Krishna, Jesus Christ, Allah, Buddha, Zohrashtra, Mahavir and Guru Nanak. All are but emanations of our Lord Sai.

title: Rama Rama Rama Sita
lyrics:
Rama Rama Rama Sita Ramachandra Paahi Maam
Rama Krishna Govinda Harey Paahi Maam
Krishna Krishna Gopala Vasudeva Paahi Maam [ Rama Krishna ... ]
Hara Hara Gangadhara Neelakanta Paahi Maam [ Rama Krishna ... ]
meaning: Protect me O Lord Rama, the consort of Sita. Protect me O Lord Krishna, the son of Vasudeva and the protector of cows. Protect me O Lord Shiva, the blue-throated one who holds the river Ganges on His head. Protect me O Lord Rama, Krishna and Govinda.

title: Rama Rama Ravikula Soma
lyrics:
Rama Rama Ravikula Soma 
Kodanda Rama Pattabhi Rama
Sai Rama Saketha Rama
Jaya Jaya Rama Janaki Rama
meaning:
O lotus-eyed Lord Rama, the Crown Prince of Solar dynasty, the resident of the heart of devotees and holder of the 'Kodanda' bow, You are merciful and beautiful to look at. Victory to Lord Rama consort of Mother Sita. You are none other than Lord Sai.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Rama Rama Sai Ram Sita
lyrics:
Rama Rama Sai Ram Sita Ram Radhey Shyam
Rama Rama Sai Ram Shyama Shyama Radhey Shyam
Parthi Pureeshwara Sai Ram (2) [ Rama Rama ... ]
Dasharatha Nandana Sita Ram Vasudeva Nandana Radhey Shyam
Eshwaramba Nandana [ Parthi Pureeshwara ... ]
meaning: Glory be to Lord Rama, son of Dasharatha and the consort of Mother Sita. Glory to Lord Krishna, the dark-hued son of Vasudeva and the beloved of Radha. Glory to the very embodiment of Rama and Krishna, Lord Sai of Puttaparthi, son of Mother Eshwaramba.

title: Rama Rama Sai Rama
lyrics:
Rama Rama Sai Rama
Parthi Pureesha Sai Ram [ Rama Rama ... ]
Madhura Manohara Sundara Naam
Shyamala Komala Nayanabhi Ram
Ravikula Mandana Rajana Ram
Parama Pavana Mangala Dham
meaning: Chant the name of Lord Rama and Lord Sai of Puttaparthi. O Lord Rama, nectarine is Thy name. You are exceedingly beautiful and charming with a graceful look. You are the jewel of the Ravi Kula (descendant of the Solar dynasty) and You are the greatest among all kings. Reciting Your name confers auspiciousness.

title: Rama Sai Rama Sai Rama
lyrics:
Rama Sai Rama Sai Rama Sai Ram (2)
Kausalya Nandana Dasharatha Ram
Janaki Vallabha Jaya Jaya Ram
Lakshmana Sevitha Lavanya Ram
Ravana Mardhana Ranadheera Ram
Ayodhya Vasi Raja Ram
Anjana Priya Sutha Atmabhi Ram
meaning: Chant the name of Lord Rama, who has incarnated in this Kali Age as Lord Sai Ram. O Lord Rama, the darling son of Kausalya and Dasharatha, victory to Thee, the beloved of Sita. Glory to the gentle Lord who was served by brother Lakshmana. Glory to the illustrious warrior who destroyed the demon Ravana. Glory to the resident King of Ayodhya, who is the indwelling Lord of Hanuman, the dear son of Anjana.

title: Rama Sita Krishna Radha
lyrics:
Rama Sita Krishna Radha Vitthala Rakhumayi Jai Jai Vittala Rakhumayi (2)
Surdas Prabhu Karuna Sagara Vittala Rakhumayi
Meera Ke Prabhu Giridhara Naagara Vittala Rakhumayi
Sai Natha Prabhu Gaana Manohara Vittala Rakhumayi Jai Jai Vittala Rakhumayi
Vittala Vittala Vittala Jai Jai (3)
Vittala Jai Jai Panduranga Jai Jai
Vittala Vittala Vittala Jai Jai
meaning:
Victory to Lords Rama, Krishna and Vitthala whose praises were sung by Surdas and Meera. Victory to Lord Sai who is pleased with music and who is none other than Vitthala.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Rama Sri Ramachandra Jaya Jaya
lyrics:
Rama Sri Ramachandra Jaya Jaya Rama
Karunabhi Rama Kamaneeya Rama [ Rama Sri ... ]
Kodanda Rama Kalyana Rama
Sharanagatha Paripalana Sri Charana Rama
Rama Sri Rama Sai Rama
Samara Vijaya Rama Saketa Rama
meaning: Pray to Lord Rama, who shines like the full moon, the compassionate, the attractive and the auspicious one who wields the bow, Kodanda . He is the one who protects those who surrender at His Lotus Feet. Pray to Lord Rama, the victorious heavenly warrior.

title: Rama Sumira Man Rama Sumira
lyrics:
Rama Sumira Man Rama Sumira Man
Rama Sumira Man Ram
Janaki Vallabha Dasharatha Nandana
Ramachandra Sri Ram
Bhaja Mana Sita Ram Ram Bhaja Mana Sita Ram
Bhaja Mana Radhey Shyam Shyam Bhaja Mana Radhey Shyam
Bhaja Mana Sai Ram Ram Bhaja Mana Sai Ram
meaning: O mind, chant the name of Lord Rama, the beloved of Sita and the son of King Dasharatha. Worship, O mind, Lord Rama, Lord Krishna and Lord Sai.

title: Rama, Sai Baba, Sita Ram
lyrics:
Rama, Sai Baba, Sita Ram,
Lord of righteousness, again You've come.
Sathya Sai Baba, Sita Ram,
Ram is Sai, God is only one.
Rama, Sai, Ramachandra, Sita Ram,
He is brighter than a thousand suns.
Shining through the hearts of everyone,
Sathya Sayeeshwaraya, Sita Ram.

(Close)
Rama, Sai Baba, Sita Ram,
Lord of righteousness, again You've come.

title: Ramachandra Prabhu Raghu Vamsha Rama
lyrics:
Ramachandra Prabhu Raghu Vamsha Rama
Sita Pathey Jaya Janaki Rama [ Ramachandra ... ]
Ahalyodharaka Sugunabhi Rama
Ravana Samhara Kodanda Rama
Ayodhya Rama Pattabhi Rama
Nava Nava Komala Sri Sai Rama [ Sita Pathey ... ]
meaning: Oh Lord Rama! In the Raghu Dynasty You have incarnated as Lord Ramachandra, the husband of Sita, the Lord of Janaki (Sita). Oh Most virtuous Lord Rama! You liberated Ahalya (devotee), destroyed the demon Ravana, as you wielded the Kodanda bow. Oh Lord of Ayodhya (city in the North of India), the crowned King, Lord Ram! You have incarnated as Lord Sai Ram, the ever new and tender embodiment of Love!

title: Ramachandra Raghuveera Ramachandra Ranadheera
lyrics:
Ramachandra Raghuveera Ramachandra Ranadheera
Ramachandra Raghunatha Ramachandra Jagannatha
Ramachandra Mama Bandho Ramachandra Daya Sindho
Raghuveera Ranadheera
Raghunatha Jagannatha
Raghurama Parandhama
Mama Bandho Daya Sindho (2)
meaning: Glory to Lord Rama, the hero of the Raghu dynasty. Glory to Ramachandra, the illustrious warrior prince. He is verily the heavenly abode, the goal of our life. He is the Lord of Raghu dynasty, the Lord of all worlds. He is our very own relative, the sea of mercy and compassion. Sing the glory of Lord Rama.

title: Ramachandra Sri Ram
lyrics:
Ramachandra Sri Ram
Sai Rama Jaya Rama [ Ramachandra ... ]
Dasharatha Nandana Dayabhi Rama
Dasha Mukha Mardhana Rama Rama
Tapasa Ranjana Taraka Naama
Ahalyodharaka Rama Rama
meaning: Victory to the merciful Lord Ramachandra, the darling son of Dasharatha. Glory to Thee, the slayer of the ten-headed demon - Ravana. We bow to You, O Lord with the liberating name that enthralls the saintly and the one who liberated Ahalya, the chaste devotee.

title: Ramam Bhajo Raghu Ramam Bhajo
lyrics:
Ramam Bhajo Raghu Ramam Bhajo
Raghukula Tilakam Ramam Bhajo [ Ramam Bhajo ... ]
Dasharatha Nandana Ramam Bhajo
Dashamukha Mardhana Ramam Bhajo
meaning: Sing the name of Rama, who is the star of the Raghu clan, who is beloved son of Dasharatha and who slayed the ten-headed demon, Ravana.

title: Ravikula Mandana Rajeeva Lochana Raghava
lyrics:
Ravikula Mandana Rajeeva Lochana Raghava
Vasudeva Nandana Bandha Vimochana Keshava [ Ravikula Mandana ... ]
Karuna Niketana Krishna Janardhana Yadava
Sri Madhusudhana Murali Mohana Madhava
meaning: Lord Sai took the form of Lord Rama of Raghu dynasty. In Dwapara age, He was the son of Vasudeva, as Krishna, who liberates us from bondage. He is the abode of compassion, the protector of all, the one who conquered the demon Madhu and the one who enchants all with the melody from His flute.

title: Remind Me My Lord
lyrics:
Remind Me My Lord (3) Who I Am
I Am Om, I Am Om, Eternal Om
Through This Life Of Distraction And Of Illusion, Remind Me ...
... My Lord, Who I Am
I Am Truth, I Am Peace, Divine Bliss
Ananda Swaroopa, Hey Prema Swaroopa, Remind Me My Lord Who I Am
I Am Love, I Am Love, Pure Love

title: Rhum Jhum Nacho Nanda Dular
lyrics:
Rhum Jhum Nacho Nanda Dular
Madhava Murahara Madana Gopal [ Rhum Jhum ... ]
Radha Manohara Natavara Lal
Govinda Giridhara Murali Gopal
meaning: Chant the many names of Lord Krishna - Madhava, Natavara, Gopala and Govinda. Pray to the Divine Dancer, the beloved child of Nanda. Glory to the Lord of Radha, the destroyer of demon, Mura and the mischievous enchanter with the flute who protected His devotees by lifting the mountain.

title: Sab Ka Malik Ek Hai
lyrics:
Sab Ka Malik Ek Hai Sai Tum Ho Bhagawan
Sarva Dharma Priya Ram Parthi Pureeshwara Ram
Manava Seva Madhava Sab Ko Seva Karo
Bhajan Bina Sukh Shanthi Nahin Sai Bhajan Karo
Prem Se Sab Ko Seva Karo Sai Bhajan Karo
meaning: O Lord Sai, You are the Lord of all. You foster all religions, O Lord of Puttaparthi. Service to mankind is service to God, so serve everyone. There is no happiness or peace without singing the glory of God. Serve all with love and sing the glory of Lord Sai.

title: Sabari Giri Vasa Parama Dayala
lyrics:
Sabari Giri Vasa Parama Dayala
Swamiyey Sharanam Sharanam Ponnaiappa [ Sabari Giri ... ]
Hari Hara Suthaney Sri Manikanta
Swamiyey Sharanam Sharanam Ponnaiappa (2)
meaning: Take refuge in Lord Ayyappa adorned with a necklace of precious gems. He resides in the Sabari mountains and is the all-merciful son of Vishnu (in His Mohini form) and Shiva.

title: Sabari Girisha Engal Nayaga
lyrics:
Sabari Girisha Engal Nayaga, Sharanam Ayyappa Swami Sharanam Ayyappa
Mohana Roopa Mohini Bala
Sharanam Sharanam Bhagawane Sharanam Ayyappa
Parthi Pureesha Sadguru Deva, Sharanam Ayyappa Swami Sharanam Ayyappa
Jyothi Swaroopa Paapa Vinasha [ Sharanam Sharanam ... ]
Sharanam Sharanam Ayyappa Swami Sharanam Ayyappa (2)
meaning: We surrender to Ayyappa, the Lord of Mount Sabari. He is the son of Mohini, a captivating form of Vishnu. He is the none other than Lord Sai, Lord of Parthi, the very embodiment of divine light who destroys our sins.

title: Sada Bhajorey Shankara Naam (2)
lyrics:
Sada Bhajorey Shankara Naam (2)
Sada Bhajorey Sai Naam
Samba Sadashiva Sai Maheshwara
Sundara Roopa Hara Gangadhara
Sada Bhajorey Sai Naam
meaning:
Always sing and chant the name of Lord Shankara (Shiva) who holds the Holy Ganges in His matted locks. May the beautiful form of the Lord Sai, who is embodiment of happiness and prosperity, be ever in our hearts.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Sada Nirantara Hari Guna Gao
lyrics:
Sada Nirantara Hari Guna Gao
Prema Bhakthi Se Bhajan Sunao [ Sada Nirantara ... ]
Sai Nath Ke Charanon Mey Aao
Man Mandir Mey Deep Jalao
Jeevan Naiya Paar Lagao
meaning: Always sing the glory of our Lord; Let them resound with love and devotion; Come to the lotus feet of our Lord Sai; In your heart's temple, light the lamp of love; He will take you across the ocean of life.

title: Sadashiva Ranjani Sai Janani
lyrics:
Sadashiva Ranjani Sai Janani
Sambhavi Shankari Durga Bhavani [ Sadashiva Ranjani ... ]
Akhilandeshwari Raja Rajeshwari
Mata Maheshwari Narayani
meaning: Sing the glory of Mother Durga, the eternal joy of Lord Shiva, the giver of life, the Mother of all worlds, the queen of queens. She is Mother Parvathi, the sister of Lord Vishnu. She is none other than Mother Sai.

title: Sadguru Brahma Sanathana Hey
lyrics:
Sadguru Brahma Sanathana Hey
Parama Dayaghana Pavana Hey
Janmaja Dukha Vinashana Hey
Jagadodharana Karana Hey
Sai Krishna Janardhana Hey
Janardhana Hey Janardhana Hey [ Sai Krishna ...  ]
Bhava Bhaya Jaladhi Taarana Hey
meaning: Worship the most merciful Divine Preceptor, Lord Sai, who is the Supreme Soul (Brahman). He is the saviour of the world and is verily Lord Krishna. O Lord, You are the one who helps overcome sorrows and the fear of crossing the ocean of life and death.

title: Sadguru Brahma Vishnu Maheshwara
lyrics:
Sadguru Brahma Vishnu Maheshwara
Sri Sathya Sai Sadashiva Shankara
Amrutha Amrutha Daana Karey Sai
Aap Haalaahala Paan Karey
Bhava Bhaya Jaladhi Paar Karey Sai
Jagadodhara Jaya Abhayankara (Shiva Shankara) [ Sri Sathya ... ]
meaning:
O Divine Teacher, You represent the Trinity (Creator, Preserver & Destroyer). You are the one who gave the boon of immortality. You drank the poison arising from the churning of the ocean. Help me cross the ocean of fear and sorrow. Grant me fearlessness, O ever blissful Lord Sathya Sai.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Sadguru Dev Raaha Dikhao
lyrics:
Sadguru Dev Raaha Dikhao Prabhu
Raaha Dikhao Sai Deva [ Sadguru ... ]
Tum Ho Merey Prana Daata
Tum Ho Merey Bhagya Daata
meaning: O Lord Sai, our Divine Preceptor, show us the path to liberation, You are our life giver as well as the one who bestows all prosperity.

title: Sadguru Nadane Va Va Va
lyrics:
Sadguru Nadane Va Va Va
Satchidanandane Va Va Va
Sarva dayalane Va Va Va
Sathya Sayi Nadane Va Va Va
Shirdipuri Vasane Va Va Va
Parthipuri Vasane Va Va Va
Shiva Shakthi Roopane Va Va Va [ Sathya Sayi ... ]
meaning: O come, our Divine Preceptor Lord Sathya Sai, the embodiment of true bliss, merciful incarnation of Shiva and Shakthi, and Lord of Shirdi and Parthi.

title: Sadguru Om Sadguru Om
lyrics:
Sadguru Om Sadguru Om
Shiva Shiva Sai Sadguru Om
Shirdi Pureeshwara Sadguru Om
Sri Sai Deva Sadguru Om
Parthi Pureeshwara Sadguru Om
Parama Dayalo Sadguru Om
Hara Shiva Murthy Sadguru Om
Bhavani Shankara Sadguru Om
meaning: Chant the name of the Universal Guru, Lord Sai, who is the embodiment of 'Om'. He is the Lord of Shirdi and Parthi, the most compassionate one who is verily Lord Shiva and Mother Parvathi.

title: Sadguru Sai Ram Jai Bolo
lyrics:
Sadguru Sai Ram Jai Bolo Sadguru Sai Ram
Mata Pitha Prabhu Ram Sai Bandhu Sakha Bhagawan [ Sadguru Sai ... ]
Allah Sai Ram Nanak Yesu Sai Ram
Zohrashtra Sai Ram Sai Ram Gautama Sai Ram
Jai Bolo Sai Ram Jai Jai Sai Ram
Jai Bolo Sai Ram Ram Jai Sathya Sai Ram
Jai Sathya Sai Ram
meaning: Chant Victory to our Divine Preceptor Sai Ram who is our mother, father, lord, relative and friend. O Lord Sathya Sai, You are verily Allah, Guru Nanak, Jesus Christ, Zohrashtra and Gautama Buddha. Victory to Thee, O Lord.

title: Sadguru Sai Saraswathi
lyrics:
Sadguru Sai Saraswathi
Brahma Deva Sati Bharati
Mangala Manjula Vaagvilasini
Veena Vadini Kalavathi
Hamsa Vahini Vidya Daayini
Veda Mata Sri Sai Bhagawathi
meaning: Worship the Supreme Teacher, Lord Sai who is verily Goddess Saraswathi, the consort of Lord Brahma (the Creator). Mother Saraswathi is the auspicious one, the embodiment of all learning and wisdom,  the one who is adept in the art of producing sweet melodies on the Veena (string instrument) and the bestower of all knowledge and who has the celestial swan as Her vehicle.

title: Sahara Do Bhagawan
lyrics:
Sahara Do Bhagawan
Mujhey Daya Karo Mujhey Krupa Karo
Sanmati Do Bhagawan [ Sahara Do ... ]
Sada Saath Raho Hey Bhagawan
Sada Raksha Karo Hey Bhagawan
Shanthi Bhakthi Prem Do Bhagawan
meaning: Oh Lord! Be my companion in this life. Have mercy and shower Your grace on me. Bless me with wisdom. Please be with me always and always protect me. I pray to Thee to grant me peace, devotion and love.

title: Sai (Baba) Sathya Palana
lyrics:
Sai (Baba) Sathya Palana
Shirdipuri Vasa Sai Sarvesha
Hey Parthipuri Vasa Hey Shirdipuri Vasa Sarvesha Sathya Palana [ Sai Sathya ... ]
Akhila Nivasa Jaya Hrishikesha
Mangalakara Hey Pavana Purusha
Shirdipuri Vasa Sai Sarvesha [ Hey Parthipuri Vasa ... ]
meaning: Glory to You Lord Sai Baba, the Embodiment of Truth. Glory to You, Lord of Shirdi and Parthi, the embodiment and protector of Truth. Glory to the Supreme Lord who is Omnipresent and who bestows auspiciousness and Grace.

title: Sai Avatara Yuga Avatara
lyrics:
Sai Avatara Yuga Avatara
Deena Dayala Sankata Haara [ Sai Avatara ... ]
Sai Brahma Sai Vishnu
Sai Maheshwara [ Sai Avatara ... ]
Sathya Sai Prema Sai
Sab Dharmon Ke Baba Sai
Sai Parameshwara
meaning: O Supreme Lord Sai, O Incarnation of this Kali Age, You are the protector of the meek, the remover of danger. You are Brahma (Creator), Vishnu (Sustainer) and Maheshwara (Destroyer of evil) and the beloved Sai of devotees. Chant the name of the Lord of Lords, Lord Sathya Sai, Prema Sai, who loves all true religions.

title: Sai Baba Geeta Sudha Madhuram
lyrics:
Sai Baba Geeta Sudha Madhuram Madhuram Anandam (3)
Shirdi (Parthi) Baba Geeta Sudha Madhuram Madhuram Anandam
meaning: The nectarine words of wisdom and the melodies that flow from Lord Sai Baba confer infinite supreme bliss. Sai Baba is the song, which is sweet and gives bliss. Lord of Parthi is the song, which is sweet and gives bliss. Lord of Shirdi is the song, which is sweet and gives bliss.

title: Sai Baba Pranam
lyrics:
Sai Baba Pranam
Shirdi Baba Pranam
O Merey Atma Ram
Lelo Merey Pranam
Eshwar Allah Ram
Sab Ke Ghar Sai Ram
Pooran Karo Merey Kaam
Hey Parama Shanthi Priya Ram
meaning: Kindly accept my offering of salutations, O indweller of my heart, Lord Sai Baba of Shirdi and Parthi. Chant the name of Eshwar, Allah and Ram. Sai belongs to all. O Lord who loves eternal peace, please bless me for successful completion of all my works.

title: Sai Baba Sadguru Pranaam Pranaam
lyrics:
Sai Baba Sadguru Pranaam Pranaam
Dispeller Of Darkness, Salaam Salaam
Sai Baba Sadguru Pranaam Pranaam
Salaam Salaam Saashtaanga Pranaam
Lord Of The Universe, Salaam Salaam [ Sai Baba ... ]
Guide Us All Dear Lord Through The Journey Of Life
Lead Us From Darkness, Unto Your Light
(You Are) Lord Of The Universe Salaam Salaam

title: Sai Baba Sathya Sai Avatar
lyrics:
Sai Baba Sai Baba Sathya Sai Avatar of the Lord
Rama Krishna Jesus Mohammad Buddha Zorastra Sai Ram
Every Name Is Your Holy Name Sai Every Form Is Your Form Divine
Sai Baba Sai Baba Sathya Sai Avatar of the Lord
Let Me Reach You Dear Sai Let Me Reach You Let Me Reach You Inside of My Heart
Let Me Please You Dear Lord With My Service Let Me Serve You Dear Lord With My Love
I Surrender to You, I Surrender to You, Lord Sri Sai Ram (2)

title: Sai Baba Tera Naam Sathya
lyrics:
Sai Baba Tera Naam Sathya Sai Baba Tera Naam
Tum Ho Brahma Tum Ho Vishnu
Tum Ho Nanak Tum Ho Yesu
Tum Ho Buddha Tum Zohrashtra
Tum Ho Allah Tum Mahavir
Sab Hai Sai Bhagawan (2)
Sai Ram Sai Ram Sai Baba Tera Naam
Allah Sai Tera Naam Maulah Sai Tera Naam
Yesu Sai Tera Naam Buddha Sai Tera Naam
Sai Baba Tera Naam Sai Rama Tera Naam
meaning: You are called Sai Baba, Sathya Sai Baba! You are Brahma (Creator) and Vishnu (Sustainer). You are Guru Nanak, Jesus Christ, Buddha, Zohrashtra, Allah and Mahavir. All are Sai Bhagawan. Your name is Sai Baba; Your Name is Allah Sai & Maulah Sai; Your name is Jesus Sai & Buddha Sai; Your name is Sai Baba and Sai Rama.

title: Sai Bhajana Vaibhavamu
lyrics:
Sai Bhajana Vaibhavamu
Sai Smarana Cheyyudamu
Sai Charana Daasulamu
Sai Sharana Pondedamu
meaning:
Let us experience the grandeur of Sai Bhajans by singing His name. Let us constantly remember Him and His teachings. Let us serve Sai's Lotus Feet and surrender to Him.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Sai Bhavani Sai Bhavani Sai
lyrics:
Sai Bhavani Sai Bhavani Sai Bhavani Ma (2)
Shubhankari Jai Abhayankari Jai Sai Bhavani Ma
Durga Lakshmi Saraswathi Jai Bhavani Sai Bhavani Ma
Gayathri Shiva Gowri Manohari Sai Bhavani Ma
meaning: Victory and salutations to the auspiciousness Mother Sai, who is the destroyer of the bondage of life and death and the remover of fear. Victory to the Mother as Durga, Lakshmi, Saraswathi and Gayathri. Glory to Mother Sai Bhavani, who bestows goodness and who protects us. Glory to goddess Gayathri and Gowri (Parvathi), who is the consort of Lord Shiva.

title: Sai Charan Sukh Dayi Man
lyrics:
Sai Charan Sukh Dayi Man
Sai Bina Jeena Kya Hai (2) [ Sai Charan ... ]
Mata Bhi Tum Pitha Bhi Tum
Aao Bhagawan Deejo Darshan
Basjao Sai Man Mandir Mey [ Sai Bina ... ]
meaning: Know O Mind, there is no greater peace and bliss than when you surrender at the Feet of Sai. What is life without You, O Sai? Sai, You are our Mother and our Father. Please show us Your darshan and install Yourself in our hearts, for what is life without You?

title: Sai Deva Sri Ganesha
lyrics:
Sai Deva Sri Ganesha
Vande Vighna Vinasha
Parvathi Nandana Parthi Pureesha
Hey Shiva Nandana Jaya Sayeesha (2)
meaning: O Lord Sai who is verily Lord Ganesha, the one who removes all obstacles from our path, the beloved child of Goddess Parvathi and Lord Shiva, our prayerful salutations to You. Victory to You, Lord Sai.

title: Sai Ganapathi Jai please help us find our way
lyrics:
Sai Ganapathi Jai, please help us find our way
With Your guiding light, please lead us through the night [ Sai Ganapathi ... ]
Bless us with Your grace this hour, with Your wisdom and Your power
Guide us every day, Om Sai Ganapathi Jai
Guide us all the way, Om Sai Ganapathi Jai

title: Sai Ghana Shyam Sai Ghana Shyam
lyrics:
Sai Ghana Shyam Sai Ghana Shyam
Radhey Govinda Bhajo Radhey Gopal Bhajo
Murali Gopal Bhajo Sai Ghana Shyam
Sai Ghana Shyam (Shyam) Sai Ghana Shyam
meaning: Sing the praises of Lord Krishna who is also known as Govinda and Gopala, who is of deep blue complexion, holding the Flute in His hands. He is none other than our beloved Sai.

title: Sai Govinda Sai Gopala
lyrics:
Sai Govinda Sai Gopala
Terey Bina Sai Sab Hai Andhera [ Sai Govinda ... ]
Lelo Mujhey Sai Sharan Tumharey
Deejo Merey Sai Darsha Tumharey
Aao Merey Sai Man Mandir Mey (2)
meaning: Oh Lord Sai Govinda! Oh Lord Sai Gopala! Without Thee, there is no one to lead us to the light (of wisdom) and to remove the darkness (of ignorance). Oh Lord Sai Govinda! I pray to Thee to kindly accept me at Your Lotus feet. Oh Lord Sai Gopala! Kindly install Thyself in the temple of my mind and heart.

title: Sai Guru Deva Janardhana
lyrics:
Sai Guru Deva Janardhana
Anantha Shayana Narayana
Bhava Bhaya Bhanjana Madhusudhana
Mangala Pavana Sai Guru Charana [ Anantha Shayana ... ]
meaning:
Glory to Lord Sai, the Divine Preceptor, who is none other than Lord Krishna (Janardhana), who is reclining on the serpent Adi Sesha as Lord Narayana. O slayer of the demon Madhu, You are the destroyer of the cycle of birth and death. Praise be to Lord Sai who is our Guru, we bow at His Feet.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Sai Hai Jeevan Jeevan Sathya
lyrics:
Sai Hai Jeevan Jeevan Sathya Sai
Sai Mera Jeevan Sahara [ Sai Hai ... ]
Terey Bina Sai Sab Hai Andhera
Paar Karo Merey Jeevan Naiya
Charan Lagalo Mujhey Sai Kanhaiya
meaning: O Lord Sathya Sai, You are my life. You are the constant companion and the support in my life. Without Thee there is darkness (ignorance) in my life. Kindly help me to cross the ocean of life and death. O Lord Sai Krishna, accept me at Your Lotus Feet.

title: Sai Hamara Hum Sai Ke
lyrics:
Sai Hamara Hum Sai Ke Aisa Prem Hamara
Sai Ram Hamara Sai Ram Hamara
Sathya Sai Hai Naam Tumhara Shirdi Sai Avatara [ Sai Ram ... ]
Hindu Muslim Sikh Isai Sab Ka Palanhaara [ Sai Ram ... ]
meaning: O Lord Sai, we belong to You and You are verily ours; this is the loving relationship that we share; Glory to You, O Lord Sai Ram, You are ours. Praise be to Lord Sathya Sai who is the Avatar of Shirdi Sai and who is the nourisher and protector of Hindus, Muslims, Sikhs and Christians.

title: Sai Kanhaiya Sai Kanhaiya
lyrics:
Sai Kanhaiya Sai Kanhaiya
Paar Karo Merey Jeevan Naiya
Tum Ho Merey Ma Baap Bhaiyya
Hrudaya Nivasi Krishna Kanhaiya
Hrudaya Nivasi Sai Kanhaiya [ Paar Karo ... ]
meaning: Glory to You, O Lord Sai Kanhaiya (Krishna), ferry us across the ocean of Life. You are our mother, father and brother. You are our Sai Kanhaiya who resides in our Inner Conscience.

title: Sai Krishna Kunja Vihari
lyrics:
Sai Krishna Kunja Vihari
Muralidhara Govardhana Dhari [ Sai Krishna ... ]
Shankha Chakra Peetambara Dhari
Karuna Sagara Krishna Murari
Krishna Murari Keshava Murari
Madhava Murari Madhusudhana Murari
meaning: Chant the name of Lord Krishna, the beloved of Radha, who walked the gardens (Brindavan). He is described here as the one who plays the flute, wears saffron robes, an ocean of mercy, who held the mountain (Govardhan) aloft to protect His devotees, who carries a Conch and a Discus and who slayed the demons Madhu and Mura.

title: Sai Krishna Murali Krishna
lyrics:
Sai Krishna, Murali Krishna, Oh Lord You have Stolen My Heart
Sai Krishna, Gopi Krishna, Oh Sweet Cowherd Divine [ Sai Krishna ... ]
Make Me An Instrument Of Your Love ( Sai )
So I May Live A Life Of Pure Love
Let It Grow, Let It Flow, Love Is Your Music Divine

title: Sai Mahadeva (Sathya)
lyrics:
Sai Mahadeva (Sathya)
Parthi Pureeshwara Hey Sai Baba Maheshwara Hey [ Sai Mahadeva ]
Nirupama Guna Sadana Sai Neeraja Dala Nayana
Vibhuti Sundara Hey Sai Baba Maheshwara Hey
meaning: Praise be to our Lord Sathya Sai, who is the very embodiment of Lord Mahadeva (Shiva). Praise be to our Lord Sai Baba - the Lord of Parthi, who is the embodiment of Lord Maheshwara (Shiva). He, who is of pristine virtues, adorned with Vibhuti and whose eyes are like the tender petals of the Lotus.

title: Sai Mata Pitha Deena Bandhu
lyrics:
Sai Mata Pitha Deena Bandhu Sakha
Terey Charanon Mey Sai Mera Koti Pranam
Sai Mata Pitha Deena Bandhu Sakha [ Terey Charanon ... ]
Mujhey Shakthi Do Merey Sai Shiva
Mujhey Bhakthi Do Merey Sai Shiva
Mujhey Mukthi Do Merey Sai Shiva
meaning: O Lord Sai, You are the mother, father, kith, kin and friend of the forlorn. A million prostrations at Your Lotus Feet. O Lord Sai Shiva, grant me strength, devotion and liberation.

title: Sai Mera Jeevan Dhaara
lyrics:
Sai Mera Jeevan Dhaara Mujhe Daya Karo Bhagawan
Peetambara Dhara Sai Kanhaiya
Murali Manohara Megha Shyama
Paramananda Hey Jagannatha
Paar Karo Prabhu Parthi Nivasa
(Mujhe) Daya Karo Bhagawan
meaning: O Lord Sai, You are the very source of my life, please bestow Your compassion on me. You are verily Lord Krishna clad in yellow silk, the one who charms with Divine music from the flute, the one with the complexion of a rain cloud. You are the eternally blissful one, O Lord of the world. O resident of Parthi, please ferry us across this ocean of birth and death.

title: Sai Mera Tum Ho Sahara
lyrics:
Sai Mera Tum Ho Sahara
Shirdi Avatara Sai Parthi Puri Bhagawan
Deenon Ke Tum Prana Sakha Prabhu
Merey Sai Ram
Merey Sai Ram Baba Parthipuri Bhagawan
meaning: My Sai is the support and sustenance of my life; Glory to You, O Lord of Parthi, the re-incarnation of Shirdi Sai. Glory to You O Sai, who is the life-mate of the poor and the downtrodden. You are our very own O dearest Sai, the Lord of Parthi.

title: Sai Naam Bolo Govinda Naam
lyrics:
Sai Naam Bolo Govinda Naam Bolo
Mahadeva Bolo Jai Panduranga Bolo [ Sai Naam ... ]
Rama Krishna Bolo Jai Buddha Sai Bolo
Zohrashtra Mahavira Yesu Sai Bolo
Allah Sai Bolo Maulah Sai Bolo
Prema Sai Shanthi Dayi Sathya Sai Bolo
Govinda Bolo Gopala Bolo (3)
meaning: Sing the name of Lord Sai who is verily Lord Govinda (Krishna). Chant the name of Lord Mahadeva (Shiva) and Panduranga. Chant the name of Lord Rama, Krishna and Buddha. Chant the name of Lord Zohrashtra, Mahavira, Jesus Christ and Allah. Chant the name of Lord Sathya Sai who is the embodiment of Love and Peace.

title: Sai Naam Bolo Sathya Sai
lyrics:
Sai Naam Bolo Sathya Sai Naam Bolo
Sai Madhava Sai Keshava Sri Hari Naam Bolo [ Sai Naam ... ]
Allah Eshwar Eesa Masiha
Buddha Mahavira Naam [ Sai Madhava ... ]
meaning: Chant the name of our dear Lord Sathya Sai. Chant the divine names Madhava, Keshava and Hari (names of Lord Vishnu). Chant the name of Allah, Eshwar, Yesu, Buddha and Mahavir.

title: Sai Naama Keertana Kali Yuga
lyrics:
Sai Naama Keertana Kali Yuga Sadhana
Jagadodharana Krishna Janardhana [ Sai Naama ... ]
Sai Murari Sri Madhusudhana
Mayura Mukutadhara Madhava Mohana
Neela Varna Ghana Natajana Palana [ Jagadodharana Krishna ... ]
meaning: Singing the glory of Lord Sai is the penance for Kali Yuga. He is verily Lord Krishna, the redeemer of the universe. He is the one who slayed the demons Mura and Madhu. He is the enchanter with the peacock feather onHis crown. He is the dark blue-hued one who is the savior of all and who is the mischievous darling son of Nanda.

title: Sai Naamamey Brahmanandamu Sai Charanamey
lyrics:
Sai Naamamey Brahmanandamu Sai Charanamey Divyanandamu
Sathya Sai Roopamey Nayananandamu
Leela Vinodamey Sai Sankalpamu
Premanandamey Sai Sowmya Roopamu (2)
meaning:
Glory to Lord Sai - The chanting of that name confers on all of us supreme Joy, the Lotus Feet confer divine bliss, the vision of the very form of Sri Sathya Sai is blissful to the eyes that see Him He is determined to provide us joy with his miraculous love His subtle and graceful form bestows on us eternal Love and Joy.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Sai Narayana Narayana
lyrics:
Sai Narayana Narayana
Sathya Narayana Narayana [ Sai Narayana ... ]
Gaana Lola Prabhu Narayana
Deena Pala Jaya Narayana
meaning: Chant the name of the merciful and omniscient Lord Sai Narayana, who rejoices when the divine glory is sung. Victory to Lord Narayana who is the protector of the meek.

title: Sai Narayana Narayana Mangala
lyrics:
Sai Narayana Narayana Mangala Naam
Sathya Narayana Narayana Mangala Naam [ Sai Narayana ... ]
Sai Brahma Sai Vishnu
Sai Parameshwara Omkara
Sai Paramananda Mukunda
(Sathya) Sayeesha Mangala Naam
meaning: The divine names of Sai Narayana and Sathya Narayana are most auspicious. Lord Sai is verily Brahma, Vishnu, Shiva, the supremely blissful Krishna and the divine sound Om. Chant the name of Lord Sai that bestows auspiciousness.

title: Sai Narayana Sathya Narayana
lyrics:
Sai Narayana Sathya Narayana
Tribhuvana Vanditha Deva
Deena Natha Harey Harey Sai Natha Harey
Deena Natha Harey Sai Natha Harey
Deena Nath Sai Nath Sai Natha Harey
meaning: O Lord Sathya Sai Narayana, the three worlds pay obeisance to Thee. You are the upholder of Vedas. O Lord Sai, the destroyer of sins and miseries, You are the Lord and Savior of the dejected and miserable. Chant the name of Lord Sai Narayana, Sathya Narayana who is worshipped by all the Gods across the three worlds. Glory to Lord Sai who is the Lord and the protector of the poor and the downtrodden.

title: Sai Natha Anatha Natha
lyrics:
Sai Natha Anatha Natha
Shambho Shankara Parthi Natha [ Sai Natha ... ]
Chandrashekara Shambho Natha
Nandi Vahana Bhola Natha
Shambho Natha (2)
Parthi Natha (2)
meaning:
Glory to Lord Sai, the Lord of Parthi, who is the Lord and Protector of the destitute. He is verily Lord Shankara(Shiva) who is adorned with the crescent Moon on His head, who rides the Nandi (Divine Bull) and who is Lord of the meek and innocent.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Sai Natha Bhagawan Sai Natha
lyrics:
Sai Natha Bhagawan Sai Natha Bhagawan
Sathyam Shivam Sundaram Sai Natha Bhagawan [ Sai Natha ... ]
Buddham Sharanam Gachchami
Dhammam Sharanam Gachchami
Sangham Sharanam Gachchami
Sayeesha Sharanam Gachchami (Sathya)
meaning: O Lord Sai, You are the Truth, Auspiciousness and Beauty. I take refuge in Buddha (the enlightened one); I take refuge in Dhamma (the ultimate Truth); I take refuge in Sangham (the holy community). To Lord God Sai, I surrender all.

title: Sai Natha Deena Natha Brahma
lyrics:
Sai Natha Deena Natha Brahma Roopa Sadguru
Nirakara Hey Akara Sathya Sai Sadguru [ Sai Natha ... ]
Omkara Sadguru Nirvikara Sadguru
Nirvikara Sadguru Omkara Sadguru [ Sai Natha ... ]
Mata Pitha Sadguru Sakala Tum Hi Sadguru
Sakala Tum Hi Sadguru Sakala Tum Hi Sadguru
meaning: Salutations to You, O Lord Sai, the Supreme Guru, who is the protector of the weak and the downtrodden, who is the very embodiment of Brahman. You are the Formless One that has taken the Form of Lord Sai. Glory to You O Lord, the unperturbed one, who is present in the primordial sound "Om". Glory to You, O Divine Preceptor Sai, You are our mother, father and our everything.

title: Sai Om Sai Om Sai
lyrics:
Sai Om Sai Om Sai Om
Tan Man Pran Mey Sai Om [ Sai Om ... ]
Shayan Sapan Mey Sai Om
Gagan Pavan Mey Sai Om [ Shayan ... ]
Nayan Nayan Mey Sai Om
Janam Maran Mey Sai Om
meaning: The entire Universe is permeated with the sound of 'Sai Om' the primordial sound. 'Sai Om' is everywhere, it is in the body, in the conscience, in sleep, in dream, in the sky, ether and wind. Whatever and wherever, the eyes perceive, it is nothing but 'Sai Om'. It is from emergence to dissolution.

title: Sai Pancharatna Kritis - Charana Sevanam
lyrics:
Charana Sevanam Parama Paavanam 
Madhuram Madhuram Sai Roopa Naamam
 (Pallavi)

Arishadvarga Haranam Harishadvarga Varadam
Apaarajana Parivarthana Daksham
(Anupallavi)

Kaarunya Laavanya Kamaneeya Gaathram
(Charanam)

1. Akhanda Vibhuthi Vaibhava Sundaram

2. Sathyam Shivam Sundaram Maanavathaa Moolya Sambharitam

3. Vinaya Bhaasura Mrudhu Subhaashana Sahana Sheela Thyaagamaya Roopa 

4. Pancha Bhoothaadhaara Sarvajeevanaadhaara
Sarvavyaapaka, Sarva Shakthi Maya, Sarvajna

5. Vaathsalyaadhi Gunojwala Sai Sadayaa
Aadhyaathmika Soothrathraya Bodhanaa Chathura 
Bhakthasakhaa Chitthaakaasha Jnaana Bhaaskara

6. Maatha Pitha Gurudaivamu Mari Sakhudavu Neevainaavu 
Puraajanma Paramparaagatha Mokshadaayaka Punyaphalam 
Bhakthaaliki Paramanidhaanam Amulya Mooladhanam

7. Animishula Keesu Janimpaga Anthevaasula Darishana Vela
Pari Pari Natanala Joopuchu
Kushalamuladuguchu, Lekhala Chekonuchu
Abhaya Mosaguchoo, Naa Hakku Meeranuchoo, Mee Vaada Nenanuchu
Sathkeerthinondaga Santhasinthunatanchu Sarvamuthaaneyai
Brathukubaatanu Poodotaga Chesina Hrudaya Brundaavana Vanamaali

Maa Tanuvu Needi Maa Talapu Needi
Maa Hrudhi Velugu Roopu Needi 
Prema Sougandhikaabharithamou Maa Jeevana Kalhaarame
Needhu Charana Yugaliki Nivaali

--------- Sai Pancharatna Kritis - 3 ---------
meaning:
Serving the lotus feet is the most auspicious. Sai's name and form are most nectarous and sweet.  

Vanquisher of the six vices, bestower of the six divine qualities (Sathya, Dharma, Shanthi, Prema, Ahimsa and Thyaaga) and the One who has the ability to transform multitudes of people. 

The One whose enchanting voice is full of compassion and charm. 

1. The beautiful One of endless glory and grandeur. 

2. The One who is embodiment of Truth, Auspiciousness and Beauty and repository of human values. 

3. The One who is radiant with humility, sweet in speech and forbearing by nature has sacrifice as His form. 

4. The One who is omnipresent, omnipotent and omniscient, and is the basis of all five elements and all lives. 

5. Sai's compassion glows with motherly love. He teaches the trilogy of the spiritual principles. He is the dearest friend of His devotees and who is the effulgent knowledge in their minds. 

6. You have become our mother, father, preceptor, friend and God. You are that good fortune that can liberate us from all our past actions and lineage. You are the supreme spiritual home and the invaluable treasure for devotees. 

7. Even the gods are jealous of the Anthevaasis (those who have Swami's proximity) when You grant them darshan and bless them through various divine acts, enquiring about their welfare, accepting their letters and bestowing fearlessness, declaring, "You are Mine. I am yours and I will be happy when you get a good name for yourselves", You have become everything for us. You are the gardener of our hearts who has transformed our path of life into a flowery garden. Our body is Yours; Our thoughts are Yours;  The form which is shining in our hearts is Yours! We reverentially offer our lives as a garland fragrant with the nectar of love at Your Lotus Feet.

title: Sai Pancharatna Kritis - Kaliyuga Avathaari
lyrics:
Kaliyuga Avathaari Bhagawan Sri Sathya Sai
(Pallavi)

Paalithajana Mangalakaari Paavana Chitraa Thata Vihaari
(Anupallavi)

Prema Sudhaapooram Sevaa Soundarya Bhaasitham 
(Charanam)

1. Darahaasa Vilasitha Vadana Sarojam
Kutilakunthala Viraajamaanam

2. Nee Mrudhulaadhara Nirgalitha Vaaksudhalu Groli
Mari Mari Thalachi Thalachi Pulakinchi
Mukthamathulayye Suptha Chitthamulu

3. Kalayo Vaishnavamaayayo
Sathya Sankalpa Paramaardhamo
Parulu Parule Kaadhu Paramaathmaroopulana
Bruhath Sevaa Pradaayakaa

4. Ganga Jatadhara Kataaksha Veekshanamuna Upponge Sai Ganga 
Sujala Pathakamanaga Daahaarthula Aarthi Deerpanga

5. Divya Bhishagvarudu Adbhutha Bhavaroga Nivaarana Samardhudu
Pedala Aatmabandhuvai Velayinche Ghana Aarogya Dhaamam

6. hyaaga Yogamule Punaadhi, Sathseelame Paramaavadhi
Padhaardha, Paraardha Yekeekrutha Ihaparajnaana Vaaradhi
Nihshulka Bodhanaankitha Vishishta Vidyaalayamidhi

7. Sai Divya Darshanam Ghanapaapanaashanam
Divyapaada Sparshanam Karmamochanam
Sathya Sai Sankeerthanam Aathmaanu Sandhaanam

--------- Sai Pancharatna Kritis - 4 ---------
meaning:
Bhagawan Sri Sathya Sai - the Divine Incarnation of the Kali Age.  

You take care of people by bestowing auspiciousness; You dwell on the banks of sacred river Chithravathi. 

You are full of nectarous love and You shine with the beauty of service. 

1. Your flower like face shines with a bright smile. You are adorned with curly hair. 

2. Soaking in the nectarous words emanating from Your tender lips and contemplating on them over and over again, filled with ecstasy, the minds which were in slumber are awakened to the reality. 

3. You have taught us that others are not truly others but very embodiments of Divinity and given us the opportunity to participate in gigantic service projects which reflects the power of Thy divine will and make us wonder if all these are a dream or a divine mystery. 

4. The compassionate glance of Sai Shiva has given birth to the Sai Ganga Drinking Water Project.  That project has slaked the thirst of the drought-struck millions. 

5. You are the wonderful Divine doctor; capable of curing even the disease of worldliness. As the dearest friend of the poor, You have established a temple of healing. 

6. Sacrifice and yoga as the foundation, character-building as the ultimate goal, combining the study of the material and the spiritual, the knowledge of here and beyond, this special University is dedicated to imparting the ‘Highest’ learning, totally free. 

7. The divine Darshan of Sai relieves one of the darkest sins. The touch of the Divine feet relieves one from bondage of actions. Singing the name of Sathya Sai brings about the union with the Atmic principle.

title: Sai Pancharatna Kritis - Pranamaami Saayeesha
lyrics:
Pranamaami Saayeesha Sakala Bhuvana Shubhakara Ghanacharitha
Srushti Sthithi Kaaraka Sugunaakara Ratnaakara Vamshaabdhi Sudhaakara
(Pallavi)

Pranathaarthihara Shivashakti Roopa Bhaaradhvaaja Gothrodbhava
Nee Padamu Soki Bhuvi Dhanyamaaye Nee Karunakilanu Evaru Saati
(Anupallavi)

1. Nee Divya-avataaramu Kalilo Prema Ithihaasamu
Tava Charanam Mama Sharanam Bhakthi Mukti Pradaayakam
(Charanam)

2. Saadhu Maunijana Praarthana Phalitham Easwaraamba Sutha Nee Jananam
Dharmoddharanaku Saaradhyam Vishva Maanavathaku Bhavya Bhavithavyam

3. Surya Chandraagni Trinetra Shobhitha Roopa Jitha Bhaktha Hrudaya
Paamara Jana Thaapatraya Kshayakara Soothrathraya Bodhaka

4. Chandra Bimbamuna Surya Golamuna Velige Thejo Roopam
Anthalona Druggocharamaiye Dashaavataara Vaibhavam

5. Sangeetha Sarvajna Naigama Paaramya Bhaashyaartha Vachonipuna
Nee Leelaa Mahimalu Vinodamulu Chithra Vichithramulu
Divyamu Bhavyamu Navyamu Rasaramyamu Nee Padame Parama Padamu

6. Korina Phalamulanella Nosage Chintha Drumam
Chelimikaandra Muchchata Deerche Kalpabhoojam
Thalachinanthane Srushti Jarugu Sathya Sankalpam
Premaroopa Sai Karathalame Kalpakam

7. Aadi Anthyamu Leni Adbhutha Leelaa Vinodam
Saayi Prema Kadhale Kerataala Laasyam
Bhakthaaliki Oka Kshanamuna Divyaanubhoothula Paaravashyam
Marukshanamuna Sathya Premaakarshana Maanava Sahaja Naijam
Pasithanambunane Paramaathmagaa Nerigina
Alanatibhakthula Bhaagyame Bhaagyam 

--------- Sai Pancharatna Kritis - 1 ---------
meaning:
I bow before You Lord Sai, the bestower of auspiciousness to the entire Universe; the one whose story is the most glorious; the preserver of all creation, the source of all virtues and the crest jewel of the entire Ratnakara clan.
 

O dispeller of the devotees’ distress, You are the embodiment of Shiva and Shakti; the One born in sage Bharadwaja’s lineage. (When) the earth itself has been sanctified by the touch of Your feet; (then) who can equal You in compassion? 

1. Your divine incarnation is a saga of Love in this kali age; Your feet is my refuge, it confers upon me devotion and liberation. 

2. Your birth as the son of Easwaramba is the fruition of the prayers of sages and saints, It upholds Dharma and ushers in a glorious future for the entire mankind. 

3. Your form is adorned with the Sun, Moon, Fire and the third eye; it is capturing the hearts of the devout. You dispel the worry of the ignorant folk by teaching them Your three fold message - Daiva preethi, papa bheethi, sanga neethi (Love for God, Fear of sin, Morality in Society). 

4. Your radiant form was seen in the moonshine and in the solar orb; The very next moment You granted the glorious vision of Dasaavathara (Ten Incarnations of Lord Vishnu). 

5. Knower of all music; Expert in explaining the essence of all esoteric knowledge, Your playful pranks and miracles are exhilarating, fascinating, divine, grand, unique and nectarous. Your feet are our ultimate goal. 

6. The tamarind tree was transformed into the wish fulfilling tree, it gave everything Your childhood friends desired; You possess the Sathya Sankalpa (Resolve of Truth) that make things happen the moment You will it. O embodiment of love, Sai, Your palm itself is verily the wish-fulfilling tree. 

7. Sai's delightful and fascinating play is without a beginning or an end; the stories of Sai’s love are like the gently dancing waves. For the devotees, at one moment it is an overwhelming Divine experience (with You) but the very next instant, it is a powerful attraction to Your (human side) true love.  To have recognised Your divinity even when You were young, is indeed a grand fortune of the devotees of yore.

title: Sai Pancharatna Kritis - Sadaa Bhaavayaami
lyrics:
Sadaa Bhaavayaami Sri Sathya
Sai Paripoornaavataaram
(Pallavi)

Sadaa Naadopaasita Modam
Maayaamaanusha Vesha Dhaaram
(Anupallavi)

Prema Thanumanisham Karunaa Hrudayam
(Charanam)

1. Veda Purusha Veda Poshakam
Veda Saara Roopa Veda Gaanalolam

2. Lingodbhava Bhasmaabhisheka Leelaa Vilaasa Parthi Shivam

3. Nenundaga Bhayamelananuchu Abhayamosage Anugraha Vrushti

4. Bhakthaapa Mruthyu Haranam Gathajeeva Prana Pradaayakam

5. Poovu Puttagane Parimalinchu Reethi Baala
Praayambuna Tyaaga Sheelatha nerpe

6. Nee Avathaara Paramaarthamunu Sunthaina Theliyudure
Nirvyaaja Premaathishayamutho Ninnu Neeveruka Parachani Naadu

7. Purushulalona Purushudavu Pasivaarilona Baaludavu
Mahilala Madhya Mahilavu Manaserigi Manoradhamuleederchu
Prana Vibhudavu Neevu Eakaanthambuna Vishwavibhudaveevu

8. Yuvathaku Anusaraneeyam Sathyam Samaya Paalanam
Hitha Mitha Mrudu Bhaashanam Samuchitha Veshadhaaranam
Prathi Panilo Nindaina Samskaaram Seva Paraayanathvam
Sathyam Nithya Vratham Saayi Jeevithame Jagathiki Sandesham

9. Deena Jana Sevaye Saayiki Santhushti
Sarva Jeeva Raasulapaina Kaarunya Drushti
Janabhaagadheya Easwaraamba Thanayaa
Mee Kanusannala Saagu Ee Sarva Srushti

--------- Sai Pancharatna Kritis - 2 ---------
meaning:
I always meditate on Sri Sathya Sai, the complete and absolute incarnation of God. 

One who always delighted in music, adorning an illusionary human form. 

The embodiment of love with a compassionate heart. 

1. One who is extolled in the Vedas, the sustainer of the Vedas; His form is the very essence of the Vedas; One who enjoys the recitation of the Vedas. 

2. He is Parthi Shiva who brings forth the holy Linga, performs the miraculous Vibhuti abhisheka (the ritual of pouring Vibhuti on the idol of Shirdi Sai Baba). 

3. He is the one who showers abundant grace by declaring, “Why fear when I am here?” 

4. Who wards off the fear of death through devotion, Who brings back to life even the dead. 

5. Just like a flower spreads fragrance even as it blossoms, (Sathya Sai) taught the virtue of sacrifice in childhood itself.  

6. Who can ever comprehend even a fraction of the glory of Your incarnation! With boundless love You have revealed Yourself to all. 

7. You are a man among the men, child among the children, a woman among women; thus You become the beloved knowing each one’s heart and fulfilling their desires. When alone, You are the emperor of the Universe.
