8. You set an ideal for youth, by adhering to Truth and punctuality, through speaking that is good, limited and soft, through appropriate mannerisms. Every act is suffused with refinement and the feeling of service. Truth is Your eternal vow, Sai’s life is His message to the world. 

9. Serving the destitute alone satisfies Sai, His compassionate gaze is on all living beings. O Son of Easwaramma, the giver of all wealth, The entire creation functions by Your mere glance.

title: Sai Pancharatna Kritis - Sathya Sai Avathaara Vaibhavam
lyrics:
Sathya Sai Avathaara Vaibhavam, Nithya Noothanam Sathya Sanaathanam
 (Pallavi)

Sathya Dharma Shanthi Prema
Prathihrudhi Nilipina Vishwaprema Prasthaanam
(Anupallavi)

Prema Ekaika Matham Sai Bodhaamrutha Saaram
(Charanam)

1. Udaattha Maanaveeya Sevaye Aadhyaathmika Saadhana Tholi Sopaanam

2. Graama Sevamari, Deena Jana Sevaye Karma Yogam Chakkani Raaja Maargam

3. Naada Brahma Sai Sankeerthaname Kalilo Mukthi Maargam

4. Bhaava Raaga Thaala Melana, Bhajanaanandame Bhakthi Maargam

5. Soham, Soham, Soham Yerukaye Jnaanam              
Anuvanuvuna Ninnu Kanugonute Jnaana Maargam

6. Kalushitha Kali Maanava Medhaahamkruthi Doorikaranam
Kula Matha Deshaatheeta Vishwajaneena,
Sathyapathanirdheshanam Saayi Mahitodhyamam

7. Premaakarshana Shakthiyutha Sayee    
Janaganamanamula Divyathwa Jaagruthiki Velasina Vishwa Viraat Roopaa
Nithya, Shuddha, Buddha, Chaitanya Deepthaa Apuroopa Leelaavathaara

8. Sai Siddhaanthamulu Vannemeera Saakaaramaaye
Bhuvi Dharmakshetram, Jagathi Vasudaika Kutumbam
Digdhigantha Dheedhithula Thejarille
Sathya Sai Vibhavam Apoorvam Akhandam Anantham

--------- Sai Pancharatna Kritis - 5 ---------
meaning:
The grandeur of the Sathya Sai incarnation is ever new, true and eternal.  

You are the source of Universal Love that established Sathya (Truth), Dharma (Right-conduct), Shanthi (Peace) and Prema (Love) in every heart.  

‘Love is the only religion’ is the essence of Sai's ambrosial message.  

1. One who is extolled in the Vedas, the sustainer of the Vedas; Noble service to mankind is the first step in the practice of spirituality.  

2. Serving the villages and the downtrodden is true karma yoga (path of action) and verily the royal path.  

3. Singing the name of the Lord Sai, who is Nada Brahma (the Primordial Sound), is the pathway to liberation in the Kali age.  

4. Experiencing bhajan bliss through the harmony of the feeling (Bhaava), tune (Raaga) and rhythm (Taala) is the path of Devotion (Bhakti Marga).  

5. Realising ‘I am That’ with every breath is the True Knowledge (Jnana). The path of Knowledge (Jnana Marga) therefore lies in finding You in every atom.  

6. Warding away the intellectual arrogance of the impure minds of humanity in Kali age;  Bringing universality by transcending the caste, religion and nation; Guiding everyone on the path of Truth This is the grand mission of Sai.  

7. Sai is endowed with the magnetic power of Love. Sai is the Cosmic Being whose advent is for awakening the Divinity latent in all. Sai is a rare incarnation of divine playfulness; the effulgent Consciousness which is eternal, pure and enlightened.  

8. Sai's principles have taken shape in a grand manner turning the Earth into a land of righteousness, and the entire world into one family by spreading its effulgence in all directions.  The grandeur of Sathya Sai is unique, ceaseless and infinite.

title: Sai Pitha Aur Mata Sai
lyrics:
Sai Pitha Aur Mata Sai
Deena Dayala Daata Sai [ Sai Pitha ... ]
Sai Guru Sai Sakha Sahodara
Sai Sathya Shiva Sai Sundara
Veda Upanishada Geeta Sai [ Deena Dayala ... ]
meaning: Chant the Holy name of Sai who is our father and mother and who is the protector of the weak and downtrodden. He is the preceptor, friend and sibling. He is verily Truth, Goodness and Beauty. He is the embodiment of Vedas, the Upanishads and the Bhagawad Geeta.

title: Sai Prem Dey Shanthi Dey
lyrics:
Sai Prem Dey Shanthi Dey Ananda Dey Baba Prem Dey
Tum Ho Baba Daya Ke Sagar
Tum Ho Guna Mandira Nata Naagar
Adi Anantha Hey Sathya Sanathana
Alakh Niranjana Sai Janardhana
Satchidananda Prabho Krupa Karo
Prem Dey Shanthi Dey Anand Dey Baba Prem Dey (Sai)
meaning: O Lord Sai, please grant us peace, bliss and love. O Lord, You are an ocean of compassion who possesses all good and pure qualities. Your form is infinite, eternal truth, with no beginning or end. You are beyond the perception of senses, always supremely pure. O Sai, uplifter of humanity, You are Satchidananda - Existence, Consciousness and Divine bliss. Please shower Your Grace on us.

title: Sai Raghuvara Merey Ram
lyrics:
Sai Raghuvara Merey Ram
Sai Giridhara Merey Shyam
Sai Ram Sai Ram Sai Ram Jai Sai Ram
Jagadeesha Srinivasa Partheesha Hrudaya Vasa
Sai Ram Sai Ram Sai Ram Jai Sai Ram
Sai Ram Jai Sai Ram (2)
meaning:
Victory to You O Lord Sai, You are my Rama (Raghuvara), Krishna (Giridhara), Lord Shiva and Lord Srinivasa (Narayana). You are the Lord of Parthi and the indweller of my heart.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Sai Ram Ghana Shyam Bhagawan
lyrics:
Sai Ram Ghana Shyam Bhagawan Tumhara Naam
Tum Bina Koi Nahin Rakhwaley
Tum Bina Koi Nahin Apad Saharey
Tum Bina Prema Koi Nahin Denewaale
Tum Ho Merey Atma Ram Baba
Bhagawan ( Sai Ram ) Tumhara Naam
meaning:
O Lord Sai, You are verily Lord Rama and Krishna. We do not have any one other than You to protect us, to save us from all adversities and to give us unconditional love. O Lord Sai, You are the in-dweller of our hearts.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Sai Ram Radhey Shyam
lyrics:
Sai Ram Radhey Shyam Jai Jai Sai Ram (3)
Ram Tu Hi Rehman Tu Hi Sab Ka Hai Bhagawan
Sai Ram Radhey Shyam Jai Jai Sai Ram
meaning: Victory to Lord Sai who is verily Lord Shyam (Krishna). O Lord, You are Lord Rama and Lord Rehman, the most compassionate one. You are the Lord of all, O Sai, victory to Thee.

title: Sai Ram Sai Ram
lyrics:
Sai Ram Sai Ram
Gaayen Geet Sada Subah Aur Shyam
Har Ek Pal Mey Har Ek Kshan Mey
Bhajey Hum Sada Tero Naam [ Gaayen Geet ... ]
Koi Kahey Tujhe Janaki Rama
Koi Pukarey Radhey Shyama
Hamarey Liye Tum Sai Bhagawan [ Gaayen Geet ... ]
meaning: O Lord Sai Ram, we sing forever Your glory from dawn to dusk. We sing Your glory with every breath, every second and forever. O Sai, some call You Rama, some others prefer to call You Shyama (Krishna), but You will remain as Sai Bhagawan for us.

title: Sai Ram Sai Ram
lyrics:
Sai Ram Sai Ram
Sai Ram Jai Sai Ram
Parthi Pureeshwara Sai Ram [ Sai Ram ... ]
Raghupathi Raghava Raja Ram
Patitha Pavana Sita Ram
Eshwara Allah Terey Naam
Sab Ko Sanmati Do Bhagawan
meaning: Chant the name of Lord Sai Ram who resides in Parthi. He is Lord Rama, the consort of Mother Sita. He is the noblest of the Raghu dynasty who uplifts the sinners. He is none other than Lord Shiva and Allah. Oh Lord, bless us with wisdom.

title: Sai Ram Sai Ram Sai
lyrics:
Sai Ram Sai Ram Sai Ram Bhajo
Sadguru Sai Ram Naam Bhajo
Sai Ram Sai Ram Sai Ram Bhajo [ Sai Ram ... ]
Allah Malik Sai Ram Bhajo
Buddha Mahavir Sai Ram Bhajo
Yesu Pitha Prabhu Sai Ram Bhajo [ Sai Ram ... ]
meaning: Chant the name of Sai Ram, the divine preceptor. He is none other than Allah, Buddha, Mahavir and Jesus.

title: Sai Ram Sai Shyam Merey
lyrics:
Sai Ram Sai Shyam Merey Sai Ram
Merey Sai Merey Baba Merey Prana Natha Ram [ Sai Ram ... ]
Terey Dwar Pey Mein Avoon Mujhey Shanthi Do Bhagawan
Mujhey Shanthi Do Bhagawan
Merey Jeevana Mey Saath Raho Sai Natha Hey
meaning: Oh Lord Sai Rama, Sai Shyama, my dear Baba, I am standing at Your door step, bestow me with peace Oh Lord, be with me all through my life, Oh Lord Sai.

title: Sai Rama Harey Sai Krishna
lyrics:
Sai Rama Harey Sai Krishna Harey (3)
Raghupathi Raghava Rama Harey
Rajeeva Lochana Rama Harey
Sai Rama Harey Sai Krishna Harey
Parthi Pureeshwara Sai Harey
meaning: Salutations to You, Lord Sai, residing in Parthi. You are verily Lord Rama, the one with beautiful Lotus shaped eyes and the noblest of the Raghu Dynasty. You are verily Lord Krishna.

title: Sai Rama Hey Ghana Shyama
lyrics:
Sai Rama Hey Ghana Shyama
Parama Dayaghana Atma Rama [ Sai Rama ... ]
Shantha Saguna Hari Hara Paramatma
Bhaktha Samrakshaka Dayabhi Rama
Patitha Pavana Sathya Sai Rama
Sharanam Sharanam Hey Sai Rama
meaning: Salutations to Lord Sai Rama, You are the most compassionate, the virtuous one who safeguards the devotees and the one who uplifts the downtrodden. O Lord, we seek Your protection.

title: Sai Sai Smarana Karo
lyrics:
Sai Sai Smarana Karo
Guru Charana Kamala Dhyana Karo [ Sai Sai ... ]
Keshava Madhava Bhajana Karo
Sadguru Sai Seva Karo (Sri)
meaning: Chant the name of Lord Sai, meditate upon His Lotus Feet, sing the glory of Keshava, Madhava (names of Lord Krishna), serve the Divine Preceptor Sai.

title: Sai Saraswathi Kalavathi (Sathya)
lyrics:
Sai Saraswathi Kalavathi (Sathya)
Sakala Shastra Vikasini [ Sai Saraswathi ... ]
Bhaava Raga Laya Tala Vinodini (3)
Parthi Nivasini Bharati Brahmani
meaning:
Lord Sai who is residing in Parthi is none other than Goddess Saraswathi, the one who is personification of all types of Arts and the one who enjoys the Art of Music.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Sai Shankara
lyrics:
Sai Shankara
Narayana Bhagawan
Tum Ho Merey Pran (Baba) (2)
Deejo Merey Prabhu Shanthi Mukthi
Sikhao Prabhu Mujhey Prem Aur Bhakthi
Shirdi Roopa Baba (Parthi Pureeshwara) Hey Bhagawan [ Tum Ho ... ]
meaning: O Lord Sai of Parthi and Shirdi, You are Lord Shankara and Lord Narayana, You are my life. O Lord, bestow me with Peace and Liberation and teach me Love and Devotion.

title: Sai Sundara Sundara
lyrics:
Sai Sundara Sundara
Vyagrambaradhara Harey Hari Hara [ Sai Sundara ... ]
Anantha Guna Mandira Sundara
Natana Sundara Bhuvana Sundara
meaning: This song praises Lord Sai as the most beautiful in the world, the one who is none other than Lord Shiva adorning tiger skin, who is highest in virtues and who is the most charming Cosmic dancer.

title: Sai Tero Naam Tero Naam
lyrics:
Sai Tero Naam Tero Naam
Janam Janam Mein Gaoon (2)
Charan Tumharey Sadguru Sai
Apne Hrudaya Basaoon
Shirdi Sai Parthi Sai
Prema Sai Guna Gaoon [ Janam ... ]
meaning: (Aalap: We have been blessed with the ever pure Sai Ram just like how Surdas was blessed by Lord Krishna or Shabari by Lord Rama.) O Lord Sai, I will sing Your name in all my several lives, I will install Your feet in my heart and continue to sing the glory of Shirdi Sai, Parthi Sai and Prema Sai.

title: Sai You Are My Heart
lyrics:
Sai, You are my heart and soul
You are my path and my goal
You make my life more than complete, You give Your love to me
Sai, You are my heart and soul
Born in this world in the name of Sai, hold on to Him if you can
He is in one, He is in all, you can see Him in everything

title: Sakshath Parabrahma Sai Guru Vandana
lyrics:
Sakshath Parabrahma Sai Guru Vandana Sathya Sai
Guru Pada Ranjana Guru Paramesha
Guru Brahma Guru Vishnu Mahesha
Sadguru Sai Parthi Pureesha
Charana Namostuthey Sai Mahesha
meaning: Our salutations at Your divine Lotus feet, Oh Lord Sai. You are our divine preceptor, the Supreme God, and the unified form of the Trinity (Brahma, Vishnu and Shiva).

title: Samba Sadashiva Sayeeshwara
lyrics:
Samba Sadashiva Sayeeshwara
Gangadhara Hara Gowri Shiva [ Samba ... ]
Narthana Sundara Natana Manohara
Natya Priyakara Nataneshwara (2)
meaning: Oh Lord Sayeeshwara you are none other than Lord Shiva also called by other names like Gangadhara, Gowri Shiva and Nataneshwara who performs the beautiful Cosmic dance.

title: Samba Vinodini Shiva Sai Shankari
lyrics:
Samba Vinodini Shiva Sai Shankari
Mangala Gowri Mata Maheshwari
Akhilandeshwari Raja Rajeshwari
Daya Sagari Parama Krupakari
meaning: Salutations to Mother Parvathi, the Goddess of the whole Universe and the consort of Lord Shiva. She is the supremely compassionate Mother who bestows auspiciousness.

title: Sanathana Sarathey Sayeesha
lyrics:
Sanathana Sarathey Sayeesha
Sarvottama Guna Nidhey Paramesha
Ram Sai Ram Sai Ram Ram
Suramuni Vanditha Sadhu Jana Poshita
Sarva Janashraya Sayeesha
Sadguru Deva Satchidananda
Sashtanga Sharanam Mama Guru (Sai) Deva [ Ram Sai Ram ... ]
meaning: Salutations at Your divine lotus feet Oh Lord Sai, You are the upholder of the "Eternal Laws" (Sanathana Dharma), the one who is the embodiment of all virtues, the one who is worshipped by sages and noble ones and the one whom the entire humanity worships.

title: Sankata Harana Govinda
lyrics:
Sankata Harana Govinda
Pankaja Charana Govinda
Sathya Sai Deva Govinda
Saptagiri Vasa Govinda
Govinda Hari (Sai) Govinda
meaning: Glory to Lord Govinda (Narayana) who resides in the seven hills and has now incarnated as Lord Sathya Sai, who is the remover of all obstacles. O Lord, we offer ourselves at Your tender lotus feet.

title: Sankata Harana Sri Sai Ramana
lyrics:
Sankata Harana Sri Sai Ramana
Pankaja Charana Namo Namo
Vedodharana Venkata Ramana
Lakshmi (Sai) Narayana Namo Namo
Namo Namo Namo Namo [ Pankaja Charana ... ]
meaning: Salutations to Lord Sai (who is also the Lord Srinivasa of Tirupati), the one with feet soft like Lotus, the one who is the upholder of Vedas and who is the Consort of Lakshmi.

title: Sapney Mey Aao Shyama Murari
lyrics:
Sapney Mey Aao Shyama Murari
Savari Surath Muralidhari [ Sapney Mey ... ]
Sab Ke Saajan Prabhu Giridhari
Sadguru Sai Parthi Vihari
meaning: Oh dark complexioned Lord Krishna, I invite You to come in my dreams. Oh Lord Sai who strolls in Parthi, You are the beloved companion of all.

title: Saraswathi Devi Saraswathi
lyrics:
Saraswathi Devi Saraswathi
Vani Veena Saraswathi
Brahma Sanathani Brahmamayi
Veda Swaroopini Vedamayi
Vaagdevi Vageshwari
Vaagvilasini Saraswathi
meaning:
Our humble Salutations to Mother Saraswathi who is the embodiment of Sound, Speech and Music, who is the eternal one, who is the embodiment of all Vedas.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Sarva Dharma Priya Deva
lyrics:
Sarva Dharma Priya Deva
Sathya Sai Deva
Allah Yesu Buddha Aur Nanak
Zohrashtra Mahavira Tum Ho
Rama Bhi Tum Ho Krishna Bhi Tum Ho
Vishwa Roopa Tum Ho (2)
meaning: Glory to Lord Sathya Sai who fosters all faiths and religions. He is verily the embodiment of Allah, Christ, Buddha, Nanak, Zohrashtra, Mahavira, Ram and Krishna.

title: Sarva Dharma Priya Sai Deva
lyrics:
Sarva Dharma Priya Sai Deva
Sai Deva Deva Deva [ Sarva Dharma ... ]
Allah Yesu Guru Grantha Govinda
Maulah Sai Mahavira Madhava
Zohrashtra Buddha Sai Shankara [ Sai Deva ... ]
meaning: Salutations to Lord Sai who is the embodiment of all religions and faiths. He is none other than Allah, Jesus, Nanak, Mahavir, Krishna, Buddha and Zohrashtra.

title: Sarva Dharma Swaroopa Sai
lyrics:
Sarva Dharma Swaroopa Sai
Shirdi Ke (Parthi Ke) Avatara
Merey Baba Merey Sai
Sai Ram Sai Ram Sai Ram Sai Ram
Hindu Muslim Isai Aatey Hai Terey Dwarey
Milte Hai Terey Dwarey [ Sai Ram Sai Ram ... ]
meaning: Glory to Lord Sai of Shirdi and Parthi who is the embodiment of all religions and faiths and who draws all to His presence.

title: Sarva Mangala Sai Janani
lyrics:
Sarva Mangala Sai Janani
Parthi Nivasini Parama Shivani [ Sarva Mangala ... ]
Mata Maheshwari Durga Bhavani
Adi Parashakthi Sai Narayani
Jagadodharini Bhava Bhaya Harini
meaning: Glory to Mother Sai, the most auspicious one residing in Parthi, who is verily Mother Parvathi, the consort of Lord Shiva. She is worshipped by names like Shivani, Durga, Maheshwari, and Parashakthi. She bestows liberation and destroys the fear of birth and death.

title: Sarva Naama Swaroopam Sai Baba
lyrics:
Sarva Naama Swaroopam Sai Baba
Sarva Hrudaya Nivasam Sai Baba [ Sarva Naama ... ]
Sarva Daivatva Swaroopam Sai Baba
Sarva Dharma Virajam Sai Baba
Om Brahma Sanathana Sai Baba
meaning: O Lord Sai, You are the personification of all Names (of Gods), You live in everyone's hearts, You are the reflection of all pervading divinity, You are pure and You symbolize all faiths. O Lord Sai, You are the eternal Supreme Conscience.

title: Sarvatra Govinda Naama Sankeertana Govinda
lyrics:
Sarvatra Govinda Naama Sankeertana Govinda Hari Govinda
Govinda Hari Govinda Hari Govinda Hari Govinda
Purana Purusha Govinda Hari Punya Shloka Govinda
Bhaktha Vatsala Govinda Hari Bhaagavatha Priya Govinda
Krishna Rama Govinda Hari Rama Krishna Govinda
Sai Rama Govinda Hari Sai Krishna Govinda
meaning: Chant the name of Lord Govinda, the Supreme Lord who is extolled in the Vedas, the one who is dear to His devotees and to whom He is affectionate. Chant the names of Lord Rama and Krishna who are the same as Lord Sai.

title: Sat Naam, Vahe Guru
lyrics:
Sat Naam, Vahey Guru (3x)
Sat Naam, Vahey Guru (3x)
Sat Naam, Vahey Guru (3x)
Sat Naam, Vahey Guru (3x)
Rab Da Gun Gao Ram Da Naam Japo (2x)
Sat Naam Sat Naam Bol Vahey Guru Vahey Guru Bol (2x)
meaning:
Hail the Supreme Guru whose very name Truth. Sing the glory of God and chant the name of the Lord.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Sathya Dharma Shanthi Prema Sab
lyrics:
Sathya Dharma Shanthi Prema Sab Ko Deejo
Sathya Dharma Shanthi Prema Swaroopa Aap Hai
Sathya Dharma Shanthi Prema Jeevan Ka Marm Hai
Guru Dev Guru Dev (2)
meaning: O Lord Sai, our Divine Preceptor, You are the personification of Truth, Righteousness, Peace and Love, which are the foundations of this human life.

title: Sathya Dharma Shanthi Prema Swaroopa
lyrics:
Sathya Dharma Shanthi Prema Swaroopa Prashanthi Nilaya Deva
Rama Ho Krishna Ho Sai Ram Deva
Shiva Shakthi Swaroopa Baba Hey Deena Palana Baba
Hey Prashanthi Nilaya Deva Hey Poornavatara Baba
Allah Ho Maulah Ho Sai Ram Deva
meaning: Salutations to the Lord of Prashanthi, Lord Sai, who is the embodiment of Truth, Peace, Love and Harmony, O Lord Sai, You are none other than Rama, Krishna, Shiva, Shakthi, Allah and Maulah all of whom offer solace to the weak and the downtrodden.

title: Sathya Narayana Govinda Madhava Sai
lyrics:
Sathya Narayana Govinda Madhava Sai Narayana Govinda Keshava (3)
Harey Rama Harey Rama Harey Rama Harey Harey
Harey Krishna Harey Krishna Harey Krishna Harey Harey
meaning: Salutations to Lord Sathya Narayana, also known as Govinda, Madhava, Narayana, Keshava, Rama and Krishna.

title: Sathya Sai Padambujam Bhajorey Manasa
lyrics:
Sathya Sai Padambujam Bhajorey Manasa Nirantharam
Parama Pavitram Pavana Charanam
Kalimala Dahanam Sri Guru Charanam
Bhava Bhaya Nashana Duritha Nivarana
Parthi Pureeshwara Pankaja Charanam
Bhajorey Manasa Nirantharam
Bhajorey Manasa Nirantharam (2)
meaning: Meditate incessantly upon the most holy and auspicious Lotus Feet of Lord Sathya Sai, the Feet of the Divine Preceptor, which will eradicate the sins of this Kali age, the Feet, which will destroy all the fears of this materialistic world and remove the obstacles.

title: Sathya Sai Rama Hey Ghana
lyrics:
Sathya Sai Rama Hey Ghana Shyama
Prema Sudha Baraso Shanthi Sudha Baraso [ Sathya Sai ... ]
Kali Yuga Mey Tum Yuga Avatari
Sathya Sai Rama Hey Ghana Shyama
meaning: O Lord Sathya Sai, the most venerable one, shower on us Your immense love and bestow peace upon us, O Lord of this Kali age.

title: Sathya Sai Shiva Shambho Shankara
lyrics:
Sathya Sai Shiva Shambho Shankara
Neelakanta Sai Tejonmaya Roopa
Sadguru Satchidananda
Gowri Vara Hara Mruthyunjaya Shiva
Sathya Sanathana Mangala Dayaka
Sadguru Satchidananda
meaning: Oh Lord Sathya Sai, You are Lord Shiva (also called, Shambho, Shankara, Neelakanta) and the personification of radiant effulgence. You bestow auspiciousness.

title: Sathya Sai Smaranam Smaranam Parthi
lyrics:
Sathya Sai Smaranam Smaranam Parthi Sai Smaranam
Tribhuvana Palaka Sai Mahesha Sathya Sai Smaranam
Sri Guru Charanam Bhava Dukha Haranam
Sathya Sai Smaranam Smaranam
Sathya Sai Smaranam
meaning: Constantly remember the name of Sathya Sai - the Lord of Parthi, the one who sustains all three worlds, chant the name of Sai Mahesha the one who removes all fears and sorrows of this materialistic world.

title: Sathya Sanathana Nithya Niranjana Bhaktha
lyrics:
Sathya Sanathana Nithya Niranjana Bhaktha Parayana Narayana
Govinda Govinda Narayana (2)
Narayana Sai Narayana
Parthi Purandara Narayana [ Govinda Govinda ... ]
meaning: Glory to You, O Lord Sai of Parthi, You are verily Lord Narayana. You are the indweller of Your devotees who chant Your name at all times. You are the personification of Truth and Purity.

title: Sathya Swaroopini Ma Sai Prema
lyrics:
Sathya Swaroopini Ma Sai Prema Swaroopini Ma
Ananda Dayini Hrudaya Viharini Parthi Nivasini Ma (Param)
Vighna Vinashini Bhava Bhaya Harini Kaali Kapalini Ma
Hey Tribhuvana Palini Mangala Karini Moksha Pradayini Ma [ Ananda ... ]
meaning: Sing the Glory of Mother Sai - the embodiment of truth and bliss, the one who showers joy, the one who is present in everyone's heart, the one who removes all obstacles, fear and sorrow, the one who protects and sustains all the three worlds and is the embodiment of auspiciousness and the one who leads us to the path of liberation.

title: Sathyam Gnanam Anantham Brahma
lyrics:
Sathyam Gnanam Anantham Brahma (3)
Sathyam Brahma
Gnanam Brahma
Anantham Brahma
meaning: Glory to You, O Lord Sai, who is verily the Supreme Being, the embodiment of Eternal Truth, Wisdom and who is Infinite.

title: Sathyam Shivam Sundaram
lyrics:
Sathyam Shivam Sundaram Sathyam Shivam Sundaram
Hey Paramesha Paapa Vinasha Sathyam Shivam Sundaram
Trinethra Dhari Jaya Shiva Om Trishoola Dhari Jaya Shiva Om
Bhava Bhaya Haari Bhakthoddhari Raksha Karo Shiva Om
meaning:
Glory to Lord Shiva, the embodiment of Truth, Goodness and Beauty, the Supreme Lord who removes our sins. Victory to the three-eyed one who wields the Trident, the one who destroys the fear of birth and death and uplifts His devotees. Protect us, O Lord.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Sayeesha Sharanam Sharanam Sayeesha
lyrics:
Sayeesha Sharanam Sharanam Sayeesha
Sathya Shivatmaka Sundara Esha [ Sayeesha ... ]
Tandava Rudra Sadashiva Sai
Karuna Sagara Raghava Sai
Gaana Manohara Madhava Sai
Madhava Sai Hey Madhava (Raghava) Sai
Buddhi Pradayaka Sambhava Sai
meaning: O Lord Sai, we surrender at Your Lotus Feet. You are the most beautiful and eternal one, the embodiment of all that is good and true. You are verily the most enchanting Cosmic Dancer Shiva, the most compassionate Rama as well as Krishna, the embodiment and connoisseur of all music. O Lord Sai, You are the one who bestows wisdom.

title: Sayeeshwara Jagadeeshwara
lyrics:
Sayeeshwara Jagadeeshwara
Parameshwara Partheeshwara [ Sayeeshwara ... ]
Karunamaya Jagat Kaarana
Shaileshwara Bhuvaneshwara
Kailasa Natha Maheshwara
meaning:
Glory to Lord Shiva who is none other than Lord Sai residing in Puttaparthi. He is the Supreme Lord of the entire universe, the most compassionate one and the cause of all creation. He is the Lord of the mountains and this world. His abode is the mount Kailasa.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Sayeeshwari Amba Jagadeeshwari
lyrics:
Sayeeshwari Amba Jagadeeshwari
Kalyani Kanchi Puri Kamakshi [ Sayeeshwari Amba ... ]
Partheeshwari Amba Parameshwari
Matangi Madura Puri Meenakshi
meaning: Salutations to Mother Sai whose abode is Parthi, who is the mother to this entire universe. She is also the presiding deity in Kanchi (by name Kamakshi) and Madurai (by name Meenakshi).

title: Sayeeshwari Chandramukhi
lyrics:
Sayeeshwari Chandramukhi
Sharanagatha Paripalini
Shashwata Ananda Dayini
Sharanam Sharanam Jaganmayi
meaning:
Glory to you Oh Mother Sayeeshwari who is as resplendent and beautiful as the moon, to the one who showers on all of us eternal bliss and joy. We Offer our humble surrender to you Oh mother Sai.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Señor del sol
lyrics:
Señor del sol, fuente de amor
Señor Shiva, transfórmame, destruye aquello que me impede ver
Señor Shiva, que la verdad sea el camino a la libertad
meaning:
Lord of the Sun, source of Love. Lord Shiva, transform me, destroy what prevents me from seeing. Lord Shiva, may the Truth be the way to freedom.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Señor Señor Señor Shiva Nataraja
lyrics:
Señor, Señor, Señor, Shiva Nataraja, Señor, Señor, Señor, ...
... Maha Sathya Sai
Shiva Nataraja, Shiva Nataraja, Shiva Nataraja, De Mi Corazon
Danza, Danza, Danza Señor, Al Son Del Tambor, Llename, Llename, ...
... Llename, De Amor
meaning: O Lord Shiva Nataraj, who is none other than the great Lord Sathya Sai, You are dear to my heart. O Lord, dance to the beat of the drums, and fill me with Your Divine Love.

title: Shaila Girishwara Uma Maheshwara Kashi
lyrics:
Shaila Girishwara Uma Maheshwara Kashi Vishweshwara Sadashiva
Sadashiva Sadashiva
Sadashiva Shambho Sadashiva
meaning: Salutations to Lord Shiva who is the Lord of Kashi (also known as Banares) and the consort of Goddess Uma (Parvathi).

title: Shambho Mahadeva
lyrics:
Shambho Mahadeva (3) (Shiva)
Chandrakaladhara Gangadhara
Gowri Vara Shankara
Shiva Shiva Shiva Shambho
Hara Hara Hara Shambho
Hara Gowri (Sathya Sai) Natha Shambho
meaning: Glory to Lord Shiva who is also known as Mahadeva and Shambho, the one who adorns the crescent Moon on His forehead and the sacred river Ganges in His matted locks, the one who is the consort of Gowri (Parvathi).

title: Shambho Mahadeva Gangadhara
lyrics:
Shambho Mahadeva Gangadhara
Kailasa Vasa Shiva Shankara [ Shambho Mahadeva ... ]
Parvathi Ramana Parameshwara
Parathpara Jagadeeshwara (Partheeshwara)
meaning: Salutations to Lord Shiva Shankara (also known as Mahadeva) who holds the sacred river Ganges in His matted locks, who has made Mount Kailasa His abode, who is Higher than the Highest, the Lord of the Universe and the consort of Goddess Parvathi.

title: Shambho Mahadeva Mallikarjuna
lyrics:
Shambho Mahadeva Mallikarjuna
Mangala Charana Trilochana
Pinaka Paani Parvathi Ramana [ Shambho Mahadeva ... ]
Bhava Bhaya Harana Sanathana
Parthi Pureeshwara Patitha Pavana
meaning: Our salutations at the sacred feet of Lord Shiva, (also known as Shambho, Mahadeva and Mallikarjuna) who wields the Bow (Pinaka), who is the consort of Parvathi, who destroys the fear of materialistic world and who is none other than Lord Sai of Parthi.

title: Shambho Mahadeva Shiva Shambho Mahadeva
lyrics:
Shambho Mahadeva Shiva Shambho Mahadeva
Samba Sadashiva Sai Shankara Shambho Mahadeva
Hara Hara Hara Shambho Bhava Bhaya Hara Hara Shambho
Shiva Shiva Shiva Shambho Sathya Sayeeshwara Shambho
meaning: Sing the glory of the Lord who is worshipped in the form of Lord Shambho, Mahadeva, Shiva and Shankara.

title: Shambho Mahadeva Shiva Shambho Mahadeva
lyrics:
Shambho Mahadeva Shiva Shambho Mahadeva
Hara Haraya Bhava Bhavaya Shiva Shivaya Namah Om
Om Namah Shivaya Om Om Namah Shivaya Om
meaning: Sing the glory of Lord Shiva who is also called Shambho and Mahadeva. He is the one who destroys the fear of the materialistic world.

title: Shambho Murarey Shankara Murarey
lyrics:
Shambho Murarey Shankara Murarey
Murahara Phani Dhara Shankara Murarey
Shambho Murarey Shankara Murarey [ Murahara Phani ... ]
meaning: Sing the Glory of Lord Shankara (Shiva), the slayer of the three demons of Tripura and the one who adorns the serpent around His neck.

title: Shambho Nachey Maharaja
lyrics:
Shambho Nachey Maharaja
Damaru Baajey Nachey Nataraja [ Shambho Nachey ... ]
Om Namah Shivaya Shivaya Namah Om
Hari Om Hari Om Sai Om Sai Om
Hari Om Hari Om [ Hari Om Hari ... ]
meaning: Sing the glory of Lord Shiva (Shambho) who is worshipped in the form of the cosmic dancer Nataraja, the eternal one who dances to the beat of the Damaru (miniature drum). Chant Hari Om and Sai Om.

title: Shambho Shankara Deva
lyrics:
Shambho Shankara Deva
Bholey (Sai) Baba Mahadeva
Paahi Prabho Sharanam Deva (2) [ Bholey Baba ... ]
Hara Hara Gangey Mahadeva (3)
meaning: Glory to Lord Shiva who bears the Holy river Ganga and who is the Lord of the Lords, Mahadeva. We offer our salutations and surrender to You, O Lord Sai Baba. You are verily the embodiment of Lord Shiva.

title: Shambho Shankara Samba Sadashiva
lyrics:
Shambho Shankara Samba Sadashiva
Hara Hara Shankara Bhola Maheshwara [ Shambho Shankara … ]
Ganga Jatadhara Natana Manohara
Parthi Pureeshwara Sai Shankara
Shiva Shiva Shiva Shiva Shivaya Namah Om
Hara Hara Hara Hara Haraya Namah Om
meaning: Glory to Lord Shankara (Shiva), the auspicious one who confers prosperity, the one who is eternally blissful, the consort of Amba (Parvathi) and the destroyer of evil traits. Glory to the greatest God who holds the sacred river Ganga in His matted locks and the one who pleased by dance. Salutations to the Lord of Parthi, Lord Sai, who is the verily Lord Shiva.

title: Shambho Shankara Shiva Shambho Shankara
lyrics:
Shambho Shankara Shiva Shambho Shankara
Shambho Shankara Samba Sadashiva Shambho Shankara
Parthi Nayaka Paramesha Paahi Maam (2) [ Shambho Shankara ... ]
meaning: Salutations to Lord Sai, the Lord of Puttaparthi, who is none other than Lord Shiva also glorified as Shambho, Shankara, Sadashiva and Paramesha.

title: Shambho Shiva Shankara
lyrics:
Shambho Shiva Shankara
Gangadhara Hara Gowri Shiva [ Shambho Shiva ... ]
Hara Hara Mahadeva Kailasa Vasa
Partheesha Paramesha Paahi Prabho
meaning: Glory to Thee O Lord Sai of Parthi, You are none other than Lord Shiva. You hold the Holy river Ganga on Your matted locks. You are the greatest of Gods and the consort of Mother Gowri (Parvathi). O Supreme Lord whose Holy abode is Mount Kailasa, please protect us.

title: Shambhu Kumara Gowri Tanaya
lyrics:
Shambhu Kumara Gowri Tanaya
Gajanana Sadaya Jaya Jaya
Varada Ganesha Duritha Vinasha
Pranavakaara Natha Sadaya [ Gajanana Sadaya ... ]
meaning: Salutations to Lord Ganesha, the son of Lord Shiva (Shambhu) and Mother Parvathi (Gowri), the one who grants boons, destroys obstacles and who is personification of the Primordial sound "Om".

title: Shambhu Kumara Haro Hara
lyrics:
Shambhu Kumara Haro Hara
Shiva Shankari Bala Haro Hara
Uma Sutha Shanmukha Guha
Shiva Sharavana Bhava Haro Hara
Pazhani Girisha Haro Hara Puttaparthi Pureesha Haro Hara
Hara Hara Hara Hara Shiva Shiva Shiva Shiva [ Shiva Sharavana ... ]
meaning: Worship Lord Karthikeya residing on the hills of Pazhani, the son of Lord Shiva and Mother Parvathi. He is none other than Lord Sai whose abode is Puttaparthi.

title: Shankara Naam Bhajo
lyrics:
Shankara Naam Bhajo
Shankara Shankara Naam Bhajo (3) [ Shankara Naam ... ]
Peetambara Dhara Sai Shankara
Chandrakala Dhara Gowri Manohara
meaning: Chant the name of Lord Shankara (Shiva) the consort of Gowri. Lord Sai, the one who adorns the yellow dress (Peetambara) is verily Lord Shiva who has the crescent Moon on the head.

title: Shankara Sadashiva Chandrashekara
lyrics:
Shankara Sadashiva Chandrashekara
Chandrashekara (Sathya) Sai Shankara [ Shankara Sadashiva ... ]
Neelakanta Shooladhari Sai Shankara
Phaala Netra Tripura Haari Sai Shankara [ Chandrashekara ... ]
meaning: Obeisance to Lord Sai who is none other than Lord Shankara (Shiva), the one who holds the crescent moon on His head. He is also known as Neelakanta, as His throat is blue in color (due to the poison He swallowed during the conflict between Gods and demons). Salutations to the one who holds the Trident and who has the Third Eye on His forehead and who slayed the demon Tripura.

title: Shankara Sadashiva Sabha Pathey Manohara
lyrics:
Shankara Sadashiva Sabha Pathey Manohara
Chandrashekara Jatadhara Uma Maheshwara [ Shankara ... ]
Shankara Sai Shankara (2)
Eshwara Sayeeshwara (Partheeshwara) [ Chandrashekara ... ]
meaning: Salutations to Lord Shankara (Shiva) the master of stage, the one who holds the crescent moon in His matted hair. We offer our humble salutations to the consort of Goddess Uma (Parvathi). Lord Shiva is none other than Lord Sai of Puttaparthi.

title: Shankara Samba Shiva Hara Hara
lyrics:
Shankara Samba Shiva Hara Hara
Shankara Samba Shiva [ Shankara Samba ... ]
Ganga Jatadhara Gowri Mahesha
Chandra Kaladhara Hey Paramesha
Kailasa Vasa Kashi Pathey
Karuna Sagara Gowri (Parthi) Pathey
meaning: Glory to Lord Shankara (Shiva), the one who holds the mighty Ganges in His Locks, the one adorned with the crescent moon, the consort of Gowri and the Lord of Kashi (the city of Banaras where He is adored as Lord Viswanath). O Sai, the Lord of Parthi, You are verily Lord Shiva, You are the ocean of compassion and mercy. We pray and offer our salutations to You.

title: Shankara Shankara
lyrics:
Shankara Shankara
Sai Shankara
Naada Shareera Vedodhara
Kali Yuga Avatara Sai
Hara Shiva Shankara Sai Shiva Shiva Shankara Sai
Chandrashekara Sai Parthi Shankara Sai
meaning: Glory to Lord Sai Shankara who is the embodiment of Music and the Vedas and who has taken the form of Sai in this age of Kali. O Lord Sai, we hail victory to You and offer our salutations to You.

title: Shankara Shankara Chandrashekara
lyrics:
Shankara Shankara Chandrashekara
Hara Hara Hara Shiva Shiva Shiva Chandrashekara [ Shankara ... ]
Neelakanta Shooladhari Chandrashekara
Brihadheeshwara Shaileshwara Chandrashekara
Shirdeeshwara Partheeshwara Sayeeshwara
Bhuvaneshwara Hrudayeshwara Sayeeshwara
meaning: Glory to Lord Shankara (shiva), the blue-throated one who is adorned with the crescent moon on His head and who wields the Trident. He is hailed as Lord Brihadheeshwara in Tanjore and as Shaileshwara, the Lord of the mountains. He is verily our Lord Sai of Shirdi and Puttaparthi. He is the master of this universe as well as our hearts.

title: Shankara Shankara Sadashiva
lyrics:
Shankara Shankara Sadashiva
Sadashiva Hey Samba Shiva [ Shankara ... ]
Amba Sahita Samba Shiva
Samba Shiva Hey Sadashiva
meaning: Pray to the ever blissfull Lord Shankara (Shiva) who is always with Mother Amba (Parvathi).

title: Shankara Shankara Samba Sadashiva
lyrics:
Shankara Shankara Samba Sadashiva Shankara Shankara Shambho
Chandrakaladhara Shankara Ganga Jatadhara Shankara [ Shankara Shankara ... ]
Kailasa Vasa Shankara Trishoola Dhari Shankara
Shivaya Bhavaya
Shiva Bhava Hara Chandrashekhara
meaning: Glory to Lord Shiva, the most auspicious one who is adorned with the crescent moon and who bears the Holy Ganges on His head. He is the resident of Mount Kailasa, wields a Trident and destroys the fear of the materialistic world.

title: Shankara Shankara Shankara Shankara Shambho
lyrics:
Shankara Shankara Shankara Shankara Shambho Shankara
Shiva Shambho Hara Shambho Shiva Shiva Hara Shambho
Shiva Shambho Hara Shambho
Shambho Shankara Sayeesha
Trishoola Dhari Trinetra Dhari [ Shiva Shambho ... ]
meaning: Salutations to Lord Sai who is none other than Lord Shiva (Shankara), the one who is armed with the Trident and with the third eye on His forehead.

title: Shankara Shankara Shankara Shiva Shambho
lyrics:
Shankara Shankara Shankara Shiva Shambho (4)
Shiva Shambho Shiva Shambho Shiva Shambho Shiva Shambho (2)
meaning:
This song is in praise of Lord Shiva, who is the verily auspiciousness.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Shankara Shiva Shankara Shiva Shankara
lyrics:
Shankara Shiva Shankara Shiva Shankara Shambho
Shankara Shiva Shankara Shiva Shambho Mahadeva [ Shankara ... ]
Dama Dama Damaru Bajey Shankara Ghana Ghana Ghanta Bajey
(Hara) Hara Bholey Natha Shambho Hara Sai Natha Shambho
meaning: Salutations to Lord Shankara, also known as Shiva and Shambho who dances to the sound of Damaru (the miniature drum in His hand) and the ringing of bells. Chant the name of Sai Natha who is verily Lord Shiva.

title: Shankara Shiva Shankara Shiva Shankara
lyrics:
Shankara Shiva Shankara Shiva Shankara Roopa Maheshwara Sai
Shankara Shankara Shankara Sai
Omkara Priya Shiva Shankara Sai
Kailasa Priya Shiva Shankara Sai
Nata Jana Priya Shiva Shankara Sai [ Shankara Shankara ]
meaning: Salutations to You Oh Sai who is the embodiment of Lord Shiva (with other names like Shankara and Maheshwara), the one who is worshipped as the  personification of Primordial "Om", the one who is dear to the devotees and whose abode is the Holy mountains of Kailasa.

title: Shankaram Bhajey Shankaram Bhajey
lyrics:
Shankaram Bhajey Shankaram Bhajey
Parthi Vasa Sai Deva Shankaram Bhajey
Sadgurum Bhajey Sadgurum Bhajey
Satchidananda Guru Sadgurum Bhajey
meaning: Chant the name of Lord Sai who resides at Parthi, who is none other than Lord Shankara (Shiva). Chant the name of the Universal Preceptor who is the very embodiment of bliss.

title: Shankari Bhaktha Vashankari Ma
lyrics:
Shankari Bhaktha Vashankari Ma
Sankata Haarini Sai Ma
Pranava Swaroopini Prema Dayini
Parthi Pureeshwari Palaya Maam
Mangala Kaarini Manjula Bhaashini
Gnana Dayini Sai Ma
Sai Ma (Sathya) Sai Ma
meaning: Salutations to Mother Shankari (Parvathi), who is the remover of obstacles, who is verily Mother Sai, the embodiment of the Primordial Sound Om. Protect us O Lord of Parthi, the bestower of love, wisdom and auspiciousness.

title: Shankha Chakra Peetambara Dhari
lyrics:
Shankha Chakra Peetambara Dhari Karuna Sagara Rama Murari
Shankha Chakra Peetambara Dhari Karuna Sagara Krishna Murari
Shankha Chakra Peetambara Dhari Karuna Sagara Sai Murari
meaning: Glory to Lord Narayana, who bears the Conch and the Discus, who wears yellow silk and who incarnated as the ever merciful Lord Rama, Krishna and Sai.

title: Shanmukha Shanmukha Sai Sundara
lyrics:
Shanmukha Shanmukha Sai Sundara
Shiva (Guru) Sharavana Bhava Om
Mangala Gowri Shankara Nandana [ Shiva (Guru) ... ]
Parthi Vihari Pranavakaari [ Shiva (Guru) ... ]
meaning: Glory to Lord Sai who resides in Parthi and who is the personification of the primordial sound "Om", who is worshipped as Lord Shanmukha and as the Guru, who is the blessed son of Mother Gowri and Lord Shankara.

title: Shantha Durge Shanthi Swaroopini
lyrics:
Shantha Durge Shanthi Swaroopini
Shyamala Komala Mana Mohini [ Shantha Durge ... ]
Adi Anadi Anantha Swaroopini
Moksha Pradayini Narayani (2)
meaning: This song extols Mother Durga who has a peaceful appearance, attractive dark complexioned soft features, who is the embodiment of a form that is all pervading without beginning and end and the one who liberates us from the cycle of birth and death.

title: Sharadey Jaya Sharadey Vaagvilasini Sharadey
lyrics:
Sharadey Jaya Sharadey Vaagvilasini Sharadey
Sharadey Jaya Sharadey Vidya Dayini Sharadey
Sharadey Jaya Sharadey Veda Mata Sharadey
Veda Mata Sharadey
meaning: Victory to Mother Sharada (Saraswathi) who resides in our speech, who is the embodiment of knowledge and who is the mother of all Vedas.

title: Sharanam Sharanam Paahi Gajananam
lyrics:
Sharanam Sharanam Paahi Gajananam
Vighna Vinashaka Gananatham
Buddhi Pradayaka Paahi Gajananam
Asura Nikhandana Paahi Gajananam
Paahi Gajananam Paahi Gajananam [ Vighna Vinashaka ... ]
meaning: Surrender to Lord Gajanana, who removes and destroys all obstacles in our path to salvation, the one who bestows wisdom, the one who destroys all the demonic qualities within us.

title: Sharanam Sharanam Sayeesha Sharanam
lyrics:
Sharanam Sharanam Sayeesha Sharanam
Sri Guru Mama Guru Sadguru Sai Guru [ Sharanam Sharanam ... ]
Parthi Pureeshwara Sai Gopalam
Shanthi Nivasam Guru Deva Sharanam (Pra)
meaning: Surrender to our Lord Sai who is our Divine Preceptor and whose abode is Prashanthi Nilayam in Parthi.

title: Shata Baar Kaho Rey Sai
lyrics:
Shata Baar Kaho Rey Sai Ram Sai Ram Sai Ram Sai Ram
Hey Mangala Nayana Ram Hey Gopi Jeevana Shyam
Hey Shirdi Ke Bhagawan Hey Prashanthi Nilaya Ram
Shata Koti Namana Sai Ram
Sai Ram Sai Ram Sai Ram
meaning: Our innumerable salutations to Lord Sai Ram, the one whose look is the most auspicious and the one who is the very life of the Gopikas. He is the Lord of Shirdi and the one who resides at Prashanthi Nilayam in Puttaparthi. Let us chant His name million times.

title: Sheetala Charanam Komala Charanam
lyrics:
Sheetala Charanam Komala Charanam, Manjula Charanam Mama Guru Charanam
Mrudula Charanam Anugraha Charanam
Sadguru Charanam Sada Smarami
Prema Daata Sai Guru Natha
Pavana Charanam Sada Bhajami
meaning: The Feet of my Divine Preceptor Sai are cool and soft, are tender to touch and are full of grace. Let us all meditate and offer our prayers to these holy Feet, which always shower love and grace.

title: Shesha Shaila Vasa Narayana
lyrics:
Shesha Shaila Vasa Narayana
Bhaktha Parijata Narayana [ Shesha Shaila ... ]
Sarva Jeeva Vasa Narayana
Saama Gaana Lola Narayana
Sathya Sai Roopa Narayana (Hey)
meaning: Salutations to Lord Narayana who is reclining on the Celestial Serpent Adi Sesha. O Lord, You are the ever-pleasing Parijata flower for Your devotees, the indweller of all beings. You foster the Saama Veda which is the basis of music. O Lord Sathya Sai, You are none other than Lord Narayana.

title: Shirdi Ke Sai Parthi Ke
lyrics:
Shirdi Ke Sai Parthi Ke Baba
Tum Ho Hamarey Pyaarey Sai Baba [ Shirdi Ke ... ]
Premamaya Sai Prema Pradatha
Eshwaramba Nandana Jagat Paripala
Paapa Vinashaka Parama Krupala
meaning: O Lord Sai, Shirdi and Parthi are Your abodes. You are our loving Sai Baba. You are embodiment of Love and the bestower of Love. O the compassionate Son of Mother Eshwaramba, You are the sustainer of this entire Universe. O Lord, please annihilate our sins.

title: Shirdi Mahadeva Deva Shirdi Mahadeva
lyrics:
Shirdi Mahadeva Deva Shirdi Mahadeva
Shanthi Prema Sadguru Natha
Shirdi Puri Natha (Vasa) Deva
Shirdi Ke Sai Natha Sadguru Natha
Parthi Ke Sai Deva Sadguru Deva
Gurudev Gurudev Gurudev Gurudev (4)
meaning:
Glory to the Divine Preceptor Sai of Shirdi and Puttaparthi, who is the Supreme Lord and is the very embodiment of Love and Peace.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Shirdi Mandir Se Aao
lyrics:
Shirdi Mandir Se Aao Merey Sai
Hrudaya Mandir Mey Bas Rahjao Sai
Tum Ho Merey Mata Pitha Deena Rakshaka
Tum Ho Merey Bandhu Sakha Prana Nayaka
Tum Ho Merey Jeevan Ka Aadhar Baba
Daya Karo Krupa Karo Parthi Nivasa

Shirdi Mandir Se Aao Merey Sai
Parthipuri Se Aao Sathya Sai
Prema Shanthi Sabko Deejo Merey Sai
Aao Merey Sai Aao Merey Sai
meaning:
Please come from Your abode at Shirdi, O my Lord Sai, and install Thyself in the temple of our hearts. O Protector of the forlorn, You are our mother, father, kin and friend. You are the Master of the vital forces and the very basis of our lives. Please bestow Your compassion on us, O resident of Parthi.

O Lord Sai, come from the temple at Shirdi. O Lord Sathya Sai, please come from the Holy place of Puttaparthi and bestow Love and Peace on all.

title: Shirdi Nivasa Sai Shankara
lyrics:
Shirdi Nivasa Sai Shankara
Parthi Nivasa Sai Shankara
Bhaavatheetha Bhaava Gochara
Kaalatheetha Kaala Bhairava
Jai Jagadeeshwara Omkareshwara (5)
meaning: Glory to Lord Sai Shankara who is the embodiment of Shirdi Baba and Parthi Baba, and who is beyond time and imagination. Victory to Lord Sai, the Lord of the world and who is the very embodiment of Om.

title: Shirdi Sai Dwarakamayi Prashanthi Vasi
lyrics:
Shirdi Sai Dwarakamayi Prashanthi Vasi Sai Ram
Sai Ram Sai Ram Ek Naam Sundara Naam [ Shirdi Sai ... ]
Allah Eshwara Sai Ram
Parthipuri Ke Hey Bhagawan
Daya Karo Krupa Karo Raksha Karo Hey Bhagawan [ Sai Ram ... ]
meaning: Salutations to Lord Shirdi Baba, the Lord of Dwarakamayi and to the Lord of Prashanthi, Sai Ram, the name so enthralling. He is none other than Allah and Eshwar (Shiva) and the Lord of Parthi. O Lord show mercy and protect us.

title: Shirdi Sai Pandarpura Parthipura Pandarpura
lyrics:
Shirdi Sai Pandarpura Parthipura Pandarpura
Parabrahma Sakshath Hai Sathya Sai Vittala Vittala [ Shirdi Sai ... ]
Baktha Sakha Panduranga Deena Sakha Sai Ranga (2)
Sri Hari Vittala Jaya Hari Vittala (3)
Vittala Vittala Jaya Hari Vittala
meaning: Lord Sai of Shirdi and Parthi is verily Lord Vittala of Pandharpur. O Lord Sathya Sai, You are the Supreme Lord, the sole protector of the devotees and the downtrodden. Victory to Lord Vittala.

title: Shirdi Sai Parthi Baba
lyrics:
Shirdi Sai Parthi Baba
Deena Janon Ke Sai Bhaktha Janon Ke Baba
Kali Yuga Avatara Merey Jeevan Aadhara
Sri Guru Sai Ram Sadguru Sai Ram
meaning:
Glory to Lord Shirdi Sai who is now in the form of Parthi Baba, the protector of His devotees as well as the weak and the downtrodden, He has incarnated in this Kali age to sustain and protect all beings. We offer our salutations to You, O Lord Sai, You are our divine Preceptor.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Shirdi Sai Parthi Sai Hum
lyrics:
Shirdi Sai Parthi Sai Hum Ko Deejo Premamrutha Dhara Premamrutha Dhara
Tava Seva Ki Avasar Deejo Sathya Sai Mahadev
Ganamrutha Mey Bhaav Bhi Deejo Prema Sai Bhagawan Prema Sai Bhagawan
meaning: O Lord Sai of Shirdi and Puttaparthi, please let the perennial stream of Love flow from You to us, O Lord Sathya Sai, please provide us the opportunity to serve You, O Lord Prema Sai, please instill the devotion and Love whenever we sing Your  Glorious Name.

title: Shirdi Sai Shankara Parthi Vihari
lyrics:
Shirdi Sai Shankara Parthi Vihari Shankara
Shankara Abhayankara Bhava Bhaya Haari Shankara [ Shirdi Sai ... ]
Paramatma Shiva Shankara Pavana Purusha Shankara
Sathya Swaroopa Shankara Sathya Sai Shankara
meaning: Obeisance to Lord Sai of Shirdi who has now incarnated at Parthi. He is the embodiment of Lord Shankara (Shiva). O Lord who is all pervading, the most auspicious and sacred, who removes all fear, we offer our humble salutations.

title: Shirdiyil Vazhnda Baba
lyrics:
Shirdiyil Vazhnda Baba Puttaparthiyil Piranda Baba
Prashanthi Nilaya Baba Trayee Brindavana Baba
Shivashakti Vadivame Baba Brahma Sattiyame Ni Baba
Kaliyuga Deivame Va Va Ennai Kattarulvai Ni Baba (2)
meaning: Baba, who lived in Shirdi, born now in Parthi as incarnation of Shiva and Shakti, is the embodiment of Truth. Please grace us, O Lord of Kali age.

title: Shiva Hara Hey Hara Shiva
lyrics:
Shiva Hara Hey Hara Shiva Hey
Samba Sadashiva Shiva Hara Hey
Hara Hara Hara Hara Mahadeva
Parvathi Ramana Sadashiva
Namami Shankara Tava Charanam
Bhajami Shankara Tava Charanam
meaning: We offer our obeisance at the feet of Lord Shiva who is worshipped as Sadashiva, Mahadeva and as the consort of Mother Parvathi.

title: Shiva Kumarane Shakthi Balane Va
lyrics:
Shiva Kumarane Shakthi Balane Va Va Va
Sharavana Bhava Guha Shanmuga Vela Va Va Va
Omkara Tattuvame Ni Va Va Va
Parthipurisha Sai Natha Va Va Va
Kanda Va Va Va
Vela Va Va Va
Sai Va Va Va
meaning: Grace us with Your presence, O Lord Shanmukha, son of Shiva and Shakthi (Parvathi). You are the inner meaning of Omkara. Please come, O Lord Sai, residing in Parthi.

title: Shiva Maheshwara Shiva Maheshwara Shiva
lyrics:
Shiva Maheshwara Shiva Maheshwara Shiva Maheshwara Sai Ram
Shiva Maheshwara Shiva Shankara Shiva Mahadeva Sai Ram
Kailasa Vasa Mahadeva
Jagadeeshwara Hara Mahadeva
Tribhuvana Pala Baba Sai Deva
meaning: Salutations to Lord Shiva, also known as Maheshwara, who resides in the holy mountains of Kailasa. We sing Your glory, O Lord Sai, You are the Lord and protector of all creatures in the three worlds. (According to Hindu mythology there are three worlds, Sky, Earth and Sub-terrain.)

title: Shiva Nataraj donde estas?
lyrics:
Shiva Nataraj, Donde Estas?
En El Corazon De La Verdad [ Shiva Nataraj ... ]
Baila Al Ritmo Del Tambor,
Ven Conmigo, Oh Señor.
meaning:
Dancing Shiva, where are you? You are in the truth of truth. Dance to the rhythm of the drum; come with me, O my Lord.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Shiva Priya Nandana Bhava Bhaya
lyrics:
Shiva Priya Nandana Bhava Bhaya Bhanjana
Gowri Priya Sutha Om Shadanana [ Shiva Priya ... ]
Hey Mayurasana Smitha Vadana
Sindhura Vadana Shubha Charana
Shanmukha Natha Subrahmanya (Sathya Sai) Deva
meaning: We pray to Lord Shanmukha who is the son of Lord Shiva and Mother Gowri and the one who removes all fears of the materialistic world, the one who sits on a peacock and whose face is charming, the one whose face is of reddish-brown color and whose Holy Feet is worshipped by all. He is none other than Lord Sathya Sai.

title: Shiva Shambho Hara Hara Shambho
lyrics:
Shiva Shambho Hara Hara Shambho
Bhava Nasha Kailasa Nivasa [ Shiva Shambho ... ]
Parvathi Pathey Harey Pashupathey
Gangadhara Hara Gowri Pathey
meaning: O Lord Shiva, You are the destroyer of all fear, the one who resides in the holy mountains of Kailasa, the consort of Mother Parvathi, the one who holds the mighty Ganges in Your matted locks, the consort of Mother Gowri. We pray and offer our humble salutations at Your Feet.

title: Shiva Shambho Narayana
lyrics:
Shiva Shambho Narayana
Parthi Vasa Jagadeeshwara [ Shiva Shambho ... ]
Shirdi Vasa Jagadeeshwara
Sathya Sai Shiva Shankara
meaning: We pray to our Lord Sai who is the embodiment of Lord Shiva and Lord Narayana who has come down to earth as the Lord of Parthi and Shirdi and the Lord of all the worlds. We surrender to you Oh Lord Sathya Sai Shiva Shankara.

title: Shiva Shambho Shambho Shiva Shambho
lyrics:
Shiva Shambho Shambho Shiva Shambho Mahadeva
Hara Hara Hara Hara Mahadeva Shiva Shambho Mahadeva
Haalaahala Dhara Shambho Anatha Natha Shambho
Hari Om (Om Om) Hari Om Hari Om Namah Shivaya
meaning:
We sing the glory of Lord Shiva (Shambho Mahadeva), the one who has consumed the poison to save the world and the one who is compassionate and protects the needy and downtrodden. We pray to You, O Lord Shiva and offer our salutations.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Shiva Shankara Parvathi Ramana
lyrics:
Shiva Shankara Parvathi Ramana
Gangadhara Bhuvanaabharana
Sharanagatha Vanditha Charana
Karunakara Bhava Bhaya Harana
meaning: Glory to Lord Shiva Shankara who is the consort of Mother Parvathi, the one who holds the mighty Ganges in His Locks and whose radiance shines brilliantly over all worlds. We surrender and offer our prayers at Your Holy Feet Oh Lord who is most Compassionate and the one and who removes all fears.

title: Shiva Shiva Auspicious Shiva
lyrics:
Shiva Shiva Auspicious Shiva Sai Shiva
Omnipotent Shiva Omnipresent Sai [ Shiva Shiva ... ]
You hold the world in the palm of Your hands
Past, present, future, at Your command
Shirdi Shiva Sathya Shiva Sai Shiva

title: Shiva Shiva Hara Hara
lyrics:
Shiva Shiva Hara Hara
Shiva Shiva Shankara Samba Sadashiva [ Shiva Shiva ... ]
Shiva Shiva Shiva Shiva Shivaya Namah Om
Hara Hara Hara Hara Haraya Namah Om
Om Namah Shivaya Shivaya Namah Om
meaning: Chant the name of Lord Shiva who is also known as Lord Shankara and Samba Sadashiva.

title: Shiva Shiva Hara Hara Bhola
lyrics:
Shiva Shiva Hara Hara Bhola Maheshwara Shambho Shankara
Ganga Jatadhara Gowri Manohara Shambho Shankara [ Shiva Shiva ... ]
Vyagrambaradhara Chandrakaladhara Shambho Shankara
Haalaahala Dhara Shaila Girishwara Shambho Shankara [ Ganga Jatadhara ... ]
meaning: Salutations to Lord Shiva who is also known by other names such as Hara, Bhola Maheshwara and Shambho Shankara. He supports the sacred river Ganga on His matted hair. He is the Consort of Gowri (Parvathi) and wears tiger skin, adorns the crescent shaped moon on His head and lives in mount Kailasa. He is the one who swallowed the poison to save Gods (during the conflict between the Gods and Demons. That is why Lord Shiva is called haalaa-hala dhara or Neelakanta - blue throated).

title: Shiva Shiva Shambho Hara Hara
lyrics:
Shiva Shiva Shambho Hara Hara Shambho Sai Shambho Shankara
Vyagrambaradhara Vibhuti Sundara Sai Shambho Shankara
Chandrakala Dhara Shankara Ganga Jatadhara Shankara
Tandava Priyakara Natana Manohara Haalaahala Dhara Shankara [ Vyagrambaradhara ... ]
meaning: Sing the glory of Lord Shiva, the one who wears the tiger skin, who besmears ashes all over His body, the one with the crescent moon on His head and the Ganges flowing from His matted locks, the one who loves to do the Cosmic dance, the one who swallowed the deadly poison and held it inside His throat (during the conflict between the Gods and Demons. Hence, Lord Shiva is also called Neela Kanta, the blue-throated one).

title: Shiva Shiva Shambho Mahesha Girisha
lyrics:
Shiva Shiva Shambho Mahesha Girisha
Hara Hara Sai Mahadeva [ Shiva Shiva ... ]
Nandi Vahana Naga Bhooshana
Phaala Lochana Tripura Samhari
Parama Purusha Shiva Ganga Dhari
Chandrakaladhara Parvathi Ramana
meaning: Salutations to Lord Sai who is none other than Lord Shiva, the consort of Parvathi. Salutations to the one who resides on Mount Kailasa, who moves around on Nandi, the celestial Bull, who wears the serpent as an ornament around His neck, has a third eye on the forehead, holds the sacred river Ganga and crescent moon on His head and who slayed the demon Tripura.

title: Shiva Shiva Shambho Tandava Priyakara
lyrics:
Shiva Shiva Shambho Tandava Priyakara
Bhava Bhava Bhairava Bhavani Shankara [ Shiva Shiva ... ]
Hara Hara Bham Bham Bhola Maheshwara
Dama Dama Damaru Natana Manohara
Sathyam Shivam Sai Sundara
meaning: This song extols the attributes associated with Lord Sai who is none other than Lord Shiva. He is described as the one who loves Cosmic dance (Tandava Priyakara), simple in nature (Bhola) and personification of Truth (Sathyam), Goodness (Shivam) and Beauty (Sundaram).

title: Shiva Shiva Shankara Hara Parameshwara
lyrics:
Shiva Shiva Shankara Hara Parameshwara
Bala Gangadhara Sai
Shiva Shiva Shankara Parthi Pureeshwara
Nata Shiva Shankara Sai [ Bala Gangadhara ... ]
meaning: Worship Shiva who is also known as Hara, Shankara, Gangadhara, Parameshwara and Nata Shiva Shankara (the one who performs Cosmic dance). He is also Lord of Parthi.

title: Shiva Shiva Shankara Om Shiva
lyrics:
Shiva Shiva Shankara Om Shiva Om
Hara Hara Shankara Om Shiva Om [ Shiva Shiva ... ]
Gowri Shankara Om Shiva Om
Uma Maheshwara Om Shiva Om
Shiva (Om) Shiva Shakthi Om Shiva Om
Neelakanta Sai Om Shiva Om
meaning:
Chant the name of Lord Shiva who is accompanied by Divine Mother Gowri (Parvathi) also known as Uma and Shakthi. Chant the name of Neelakanta (another name for Shiva as His throat looks blue after swallowing poison for the sake of Gods during their fight for nectar with demons) who is verily Lord Sai.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Shiva Shiva Shankara Parthi Pureeshwara
lyrics:
Shiva Shiva Shankara Parthi Pureeshwara
Vyagrambaradhara Sai Maheshwara [ Shiva Shiva ... ]
Haalaahala Dhara Hey Gangadhara
Natana Manohara Chandra Kaladhara
Samba Sadashiva Hara Parameshwara
meaning: Lord Sai, the resident of Parthi is none other than Lord Shankara, who wears the tiger skin, who swallowed the poison for saving the gods, who holds the sacred river Ganges in His matted hair, who is fond of dance and who wears the crescent moon on the head.

title: Shiva Shiva Shiva Shiva
lyrics:
Shiva Shiva Shiva Shiva Shiva Hara Hey
Hara Hara Hara Hara Hara Shiva Hey
Shiva Hara Hey Hara Shiva Hey
Dhim Dhim Baajey Vadya Mrudanga
Nachey Shankara Shiva Hara Hey
Ghana Ghana Ghana Ghana Ghanta Baajey
Nachey Shankara Shiva Hara Hey [ Shiva Hara Hey ... ]
meaning:
Glory to Thee O Lord Shiva, dance to the rhythm of the Mrudanga and the "Ghan Ghan" sound of the bell.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Shiva Shiva Shiva Shiva Shirdi
lyrics:
Shiva Shiva Shiva Shiva Shirdi Pureeshwara Shambho Shankara Samba Shivom
Bhava Hara Purahara Puttapartheeshwara Shambho Shankara Sada Shivom [ Shiva Shiva ... ]
Kailasachala Bala Shiva Kalakoota Dhara Bala Shiva
Keli Lalasa Bala Shiva Leela Tandava Bala Shiva
meaning: O Lord Sai, Lord of Shirdi and Parthi, we worship You as Shiva, Parameshwara, Shambho and Shankara. You are the remover of fear and worldly misery, Your abode is Kailasa and You are a great dancer of the Tandava (Celestial Dance).

title: Shiva Shiva Shiva Shiva Shivaya
lyrics:
Shiva Shiva Shiva Shiva Shivaya Namah Om
Om Namah Shivaya Shivaya Namah Om [ Shiva Shiva ... ]
Hara Hara Hara Hara Haraya Namah Om
Om Namah Shivaya Shivaya Namah Om
meaning:
Prostrations to You, O Lord Shiva, the destroyer of sins and evils. Let us chant "Om Namah Shivaya"

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Shiva Shiva Shiva Shiva Shivaya
lyrics:
Shiva Shiva Shiva Shiva Shivaya Namah Om
Hara Hara Hara Hara Haraya Namah Om [ Shiva Shiva ... ]
Shivaya Namah Om Haraya Namah Om
Hara Hara Hara Hara Haraya Namah Om
Shivaya Namah Om Haraya Namah Om [ Hara Hara ... ]
meaning: Chant the name of Lord Shiva, the destroyer of sins and the cycle of birth and death.

title: Shiva Shiva Shiva Shiva Shivaya
lyrics:
Shiva Shiva Shiva Shiva Shivaya Namah Om
Hara Hara Hara Hara Haraya Namah Om [ Shiva Shiva ... ]
Alakh Niranjana Bhava Bhaya Bhanjana
Sayeeshwaraya Namah Om
Pranava Swaroopa Parameshwara
Partheeshwaraya (Sathya Sayeeshwaraya) Namah Om
meaning: Worship Lord Shiva with the mantra "Shivaya Namah Om Haraya Namah Om". Pray to Lord Shiva who is ever pure, who dispels the fear of this materialistic world, who is the personification of the Primordial "Om". He is none other than Lord Sai, Lord of Parthi.

title: Shiva Shiva Shivaya Namah Om
lyrics:
Shiva Shiva Shivaya Namah Om
Bhava Bhava Bhavaya Namah Om
Shirdi (Parthi) Pureeshwara Shambho Shankara
Hara Hara Haraya Namah Om
Parthi Shivaya Namah Om
Samba Shivaya Namah Om
Parthi Pureeshwara Shambho Shankara [ Hara Hara ... ]
meaning: Chant the name of Lord Shiva who dispels the fear of the materialistic world, He is none other than Shirdi Sai and Parthi Sai.

title: Shiva, Lord Of My Heart
lyrics:
Shiva, Lord of my heart
Destroying all the evil in the world,
Shiva, Lord of my heart,
Purify me, let me hold the light.
Now I love You, how I love You, Shiva; Shiva, You are always in my heart.

title: Shivaya Namah Shiva Lingaya Namah
lyrics:
Shivaya Namah Shiva Lingaya Namah Om
Bhavaya Namah Bhava Lingaya Namah Om
Sarvaya Namah Sarva Lingaya Namah Om
Rudraya Namah Rudra Lingaya Namah Om
Bhasmaya Namah Bhasma Lingaya Namah Om
Atmaya Namah Atma Lingaya Namah Om
Namah Om Namah Om Namah Om
meaning:
Worship Lord Shiva who is present in the form of sacred Lingam. He manifests Himself in different forms such as, the one who dispels the fear of the materialistic world, the one who is Omnipresent, the one who is our in-dweller (higher self or Conscience).

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Shivaya Namah Shiva Shivaya Namah
lyrics:
Shivaya Namah Shiva Shivaya Namah Shiva Shivaya Namah Om Namah Shivaya
Shivaya Namah Shiva Shivaya Namah Shiva
Shivaya Namah Om Namah Shivaya
meaning: Chant "Shivaya Namah Shiva" every moment of your life. Salutations to Lord Shiva.

title: Shivaya Parameshwaraya Chandrashekaraya Namah Om
lyrics:
Shivaya Parameshwaraya Chandrashekaraya Namah Om
Bhavaya Guna Sambhavaya Shiva Tandavaya Namah Om
Shivaya Parameshwaraya Chandrashekaraya Namah Om [ Bhavaya Guna ... ]
meaning: Chant the name of Lord Shiva, the supreme one, who dispels the fear of the materialistic world, the one who adorns the crescent shaped moon on His head and performs the cosmic dance.

title: Shrivatsankitha Sri Kaustubha Dhara
lyrics:
Shrivatsankitha Sri Kaustubha Dhara
Madhava Mohana Krishna (2)
Sri Tulasi Dala Vanamala Dhara [ Madhava Mohana ... (2) ]
Kali Yuga Varada Kali Avatara
Karuna Sagara Sai (2)
meaning: Glory to Lord Sai, the compassionate one who is the incarnation of Lord Vishnu in Kali age, who is depicted to be bearing the sign of "Srivatsa" (it symbolizes Vishnu's yogic powers) and the splendorous jewel "Kaustubha" (it represents the consciousness of all living things). He is none other than Lord Krishna wearing the garland of Sacred Tulasi leaves (Basil Leaves).

title: Shuklambara Dharam Ganapathi Mantram
lyrics:
Shuklambara Dharam Ganapathi Mantram
Nithyam Nithyam Bhajo Bhajo
Vighna Vinashaka Vishwam Vyapaka
Veera Ganapathi Bhajo Bhajo
meaning: Chant daily the Mantra of Lord Ganapathi (Ganesha), the one who wears a white cloth, the remover of all obstacles, the bestower of knowledge and the one who is very courageous.

title: Shyama Murari Ayo Rey
lyrics:
Shyama Murari Ayo Rey
Sai Murari Ayo Rey [ Shyama Murari ... ]
Gaayo Rey Gun Gaayo Rey
Payo Rey Peetambara Dhari
meaning: Sing in ecstasy of the arrival of Lord Krishna who is none other than Lord Sai. Lord Krishna is also called Shyama (dark-hued) and Murari (slayer of the demon Mura). Wearing the yellow cloth is a characteristic of Lord Krishna's attire.

title: Shyama Sundara Hari Govinda Bolo
lyrics:
Shyama Sundara Hari Govinda Bolo
Govinda Bolo Hari Gopala Bolo [ Shyama Sundara ... ]
Madana Mohana Hari Govinda Bolo
Kamala Nayana Prabhu Gopala Bolo
Radha Ramana Hari Govinda Bolo
Govinda Bolo Gopala Bolo (3)
meaning: Chant the various names of Lord Krishna - Hari and Govinda. Glory to the beautiful, dark-hued, enchanting Lord with lotus petal eyes and who is dear to Radha.

title: Shyama Sundara Madana Mohana
lyrics:
Shyama Sundara Madana Mohana
Mora Makuta Dhari
Madhava Hari Madhava Hari Madhava Giridhari
meaning:
Chant the various names of Lord Krishna, the dark-hued one who is beautiful and enchanting with a peacock feather in His crown. He is the one who lifted the Govardhana mountain to protect His devotees.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Shyama Sundara Madana Mohana Radhey
lyrics:
Shyama Sundara Madana Mohana Radhey Gopal
Jai Radhey Gopal
Radhey Gopal Bhajo Radhey Gopal
Shankha Chakra Gadadhara Radhey Gopal
Jai Radhey Gopal [ Radhey Gopal ... ]
meaning: Chant the various names of Lord Krishna such as, Shyama Sundara, Madana Mohana, Shankha Chakra Gadadhara, Radhey Gopala, Murali Manohara etc.

title: Shyamala Komala Krishna Murari
lyrics:
Shyamala Komala Krishna Murari (2)
Shyamala Ghana Shyamala Megha Shyamala Komala Krishna Murari
Shyamala Komala Krishna Murari
Sridhara Yaduvara Krishna Murari (2)
Sridhara Nanda Yaduvara Bhava Bhaya Hara Giridhara Krishna Murari
Sridhara Yaduvara Krishna Murari
meaning: Chant the name of the dark complexioned and soft natured Krishna, who is also known as, Murari, Ghana Shyama, Megha Shyama, Sridhara, Yaduvara, Giridhara etc.

title: Si Me Caigo, Me Levantas
lyrics:
Si Me Caigo, Me Levantas
Me Proteges Con Tu Amor
Tu Sonrisa Es Todo El Cielo
Yo Te Quiero, Mi Señor.

Ay! Mi Señor, Sin Ti Yo No Podría
Ni Un Solo Paso Dar En Esta Vida.
meaning:
O Lord Sai, if I fall You lift me up. You protect me with Your love. Your smile is all heaven. I love You my Lord. O Lord, without You I could not take even one step in life.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Siddhi Ranjana Duritha Bhanjana
lyrics:
Siddhi Ranjana Duritha Bhanjana
Sri Sathya Sai Gajanana (Bolo)
Vighna Vinashaka Ashta Vinayaka
Sri Sathya Sai Shubhanana
Vakratunda Dhara Pranava Swaroopa
Sri Sathya Sai Shubhanana (Bolo)
meaning: Oh Lord Sai, You are none other than the Lord Gajanana (Ganesha), who bestows auspiciousness, removes the obstacles in life and fulfills every wish. You are the personification of the Primordial sound "Om".

title: Siddhi Vinayaka Mangala Daata
lyrics:
Siddhi Vinayaka Mangala Daata
Buddhi Pradayaka Gananatha [ Siddhi Vinayaka ... ]
Vighna Harana Prabhu Vighneshwara Tum
Gowri Nandana Hey Jaga Vandana
Namostuthey Namostuthey
meaning: Oh Lord Vinayaka (Lord Ganesha), You fulfill our wishes and bestow auspiciousness. You bestow knowledge to all, Oh Lord of Ganaas, You destroy the obstacles in our lives. Oh son of Goddess Gowri (Parvathi), You are worshipped by the entire Universe. Salutations to You, Oh Lord Vighneshwara.

title: Siddhi Vinayaka Paahi Gajanana
lyrics:
Siddhi Vinayaka Paahi Gajanana
Gowri Nandana Hey Jagavandana [ Siddhi Vinayaka ... ]
Pashankusha Dhara Vighna Vinasha
Buddhi Pradayaka Paapa Vinasha
meaning: Salutations to the elephant-faced son of Gowri, Lord Ganesha, bestower of auspiciousness and knowledge. He is the master of the universe who removes obstacles and destroys sins and who carries the noose and the hook.

title: Simha Vahini Sai Narayani
lyrics:
Simha Vahini Sai Narayani
Mata Maheshwari Durga Bhavani [ Simha Vahini ... ]
Akhilandeshwari Jaya Jagat Janani
Abhaya Pradayini Ananda Roopini
Mangala Karini Moksha Pradayini
meaning: Chant the name of Sai Narayani who rides on the Lion and who is known by many names as Maheshwari, Durga Bhavani, Akhilandeshwari, Jagat Janani, Abhaya Pradayini, Ananda Roopini, Mangala Karini and Moksha Pradayini.

title: Sindhura Vadana Gajanana
lyrics:
Sindhura Vadana Gajanana
Siddhi Vinayaka Sai Gajanana [ Sindhura Vadana ... ]
Parvathi Nandana Bala Gajanana
Mruthyunjaya Sutha Veera Gajanana
Jaya Jaya Jaya Hey Gowri Nandana (2)
Jaya Partheeshwara Sai Gajanana
meaning:
Worship the elephant-faced Lord Gajanana, the destroyer of obstacles and bestower of spiritual wisdom. Glory to the valorous son of Mother Parvathi (Gowri) and Lord Shiva. Glory to Lord Sai of Parthi who is verily Lord Ganesha.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Sita Pathey Rama Jaya Shyamala
lyrics:
Sita Pathey Rama Jaya Shyamala Komala Rama
Veda Gamanutha Vimala Charitha
Vathathmaja Priya Rama
Varija Netra Rama
meaning:
Salutations to You, O Lord Rama, the consort of Mother Sita. With Your dark complexion and soft nature, You are the personification of the essence of Vedas. You are the one with blemishless character and adored by Hanuman (Vathathmaja). You are most beautiful with lotus-shaped eyes.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Sita Rakshaka Rama Dootha
lyrics:
Sita Rakshaka Rama Dootha
Lanka Dahana Ravana Mardhana
Sri Rama Daasa Daya Nidhey
Sarva Mangala Anjaneya
meaning:
Glory to You, O Lord Hanuman, You protected Mother Sita and is the messenger of Lord Rama. You are the one who put Lanka in flames and showed the path for Lord Rama who killed Ravana. You are the one who confers auspiciousness on everyone, the son of Anjana. We offer our salutations to You, O Lord Hanuman.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Sita Ram Bolo Bolo Sita
lyrics:
Sita Ram Bolo Bolo Sita Ram Radhey Shyam Bolo Bolo Radhey Shyam
Sai Ram Bolo Bolo Sai Ram (4)
meaning: Sing the names of Lord Rama, the consort of Mother Sita. Chant the names of Lord Krishna and Lord Sai.

title: Sita Ram Naam Bhajo
lyrics:
Sita Ram Naam Bhajo
Madhura Madhura Sai Naam Bhajo
Radhey Shyam Naam Bhajo [ Madhura Madhura ... ]
meaning: Sing the Name and Glory of Lord Rama (Sita Ram), Lord Krishna (Radhey Shyam) and Lord Sai whose names are the sweetest of all.

title: Sita Ram Sita Ram Sita
lyrics:
Sita Ram Sita Ram Sita Ram Radhey Shyam Radhey Shyam Radhey Shyam
Dasharatha Nandana Janaki Jeevana
Raghukula Bhooshana Jaya Jaya Ram
Jaya Jaya Ram (Ram) Jaya Sai Ram
meaning: Victory to Lord Rama, who is the crown jewel of Raghu Dynasty, who is the consort of Sita and the son of Dasharatha.

title: Sita Rama Sri Raghu Rama
lyrics:
Sita Rama Sri Raghu Rama
Ananda Roopa Hey Guna Dhama
Dasharatha Nandana Janaki Rama
Parthi Vihara Sri Sai Rama
Madhuvana Ramana Hey Ghana Shyama
Raasa Vilola Radhey Shyama
meaning:
Glory to the consort of Sita, Lord Rama, of Raghu dynasty, the embodiment of bliss, the abode of good qualities. the son of Dasharatha and the consort of Mother Janaki (Sita). Glory to the dark-hued Lord Krishna of Madhuvana, who danced with the Gopis and who is the Lord of Radha. Lord Sai of Parthi is verily Rama and Krishna.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Sita Rama Sri Raghu Rama
lyrics:
Sita Rama Sri Raghu Rama
Daasharathey Hey Jaya Rama
Atma Rama Aganita Guna Dhama
Pavana Naama Parandhama
meaning: Salutations to Lord Rama from Raghu dynasty, who is the consort of Mother Sita and the son of King Dasharatha. Lord Rama is the one with blemishless character, whose name is sacred and the one who is the supreme Lord.

title: Sita Ramachandra ki
lyrics:
Sita Ramachandra Ki Jai Jai Bolo
Veera Hanuman Ki Jai Jai Bolo [ Sita Ramachandra … ]
Gnana Guna Sagar Ki Jai Jai Bolo
Maruthi Bhagawan Ki Jai Jai Bolo
meaning: Chant victory to Lord Rama, the consort of Mother Sita. Victory to the valorous Lord Hanuman, the ocean of wisdom and supremely good qualities. Victory to the son of wind-god.

title: Soham Soham Dhyan Karo
lyrics:
Soham Soham Dhyan Karo
Sadguru Sai Dhyan Karo [ Soham Soham ... ]
Soham Brahma Soham Vishnu
Soham Sai Dhyana Karo
Soham Atma Shiva Paramatma
Brahmananda Se Hrudaya Bharo
meaning: Meditate on the divine word 'Soham' which means 'I am That'. Meditate on Sai who is our true and Divine Mentor. Soham is none other than Brahma, Vishnu and Shiva and the Atma (Higher self or Higher Conscience). Fill your hearts with Divine Bliss.

title: Sri Ganapathi Hari Om
lyrics:
Sri Ganapathi Hari Om
Ganapathi Hari Om Guna Nidhey Hari Om
Hari Om Ganapathi Hari Om
Varada Abhayakara Ananda Dayaka
Shiva Shakthi Nandana Om
Ganapathi Hari Om Guna Nidhey Hari Om [ Hari Om ... ]
meaning:
Salutations to Lord Ganapath (Ganesha), the virtuous one, the one who destroys fears and bestows happiness, the son of Lord Shiva and Goddess Shakthi (Parvathi).

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Sri Ganesha Jaya Ganesha
deity: Ganesha, Rama, Krishna, Vittala, Subrahmanya, Guru
lyrics:
Sri Ganesha Jaya Ganesha, Sadguru Deva Sai Ganesha
Parvathi Shankara Hey Paramesha
Rama Krishna Hari Govinda Vittala
Subrahmanyam Subrahmanyam Shanmukha Natha Subrahmanyam
Subrahmanyam Subrahmanyam Sai Natha Subrahmanyam
meaning: Glory to Lord Ganesha, son of Mother Parvathi and Lord Shiva. O Lord Ganesha, You are none other than Lord Sai. Chant the names of Rama, Krishna, Hari, Govinda, Vittala, Subrahmanya and Lord Sai.

title: Sri Ganesha Sri Ganesha Sri
lyrics:
Sri Ganesha Sri Ganesha Sri Ganesha Paahi Maam
Jai Ganesha Jai Ganesha Jai Ganesha Raksha Maam
Sri Ganesha Paahi Maam Jai Ganesha Raksha Maam
Jai Ganesha Jai Ganesha Jai Ganesha Raksha Maam
meaning: Victory to Thee, O Lord Ganesha. We pray to You to protect us.

title: Sri Ganesha Vinayaka
lyrics:
Sri Ganesha Vinayaka
Vighna Vinashaka Vinayaka
Mangala Dayaka Vinayaka
Bhava Bhaya Nasha Vinayaka
Parthi Pureeshwara Vinayaka
meaning: Oh Lord Ganesha, remover of the fear of the materialistic world, you remove obstacles and grant auspiciousness, Oh Lord Vinayaka of Parthi.

title: Sri Guru Parthi Vasa
lyrics:
Sri Guru Parthi Vasa
Sai Brahma Vishnu Mahesha [ Sri Guru ... ]
Allah Bhi Tum Ho Maulah Bhi Tum Ho
Zohrashtra Mahavira Yesu Bhi Tum Ho
Ram Rahim Ho Krishna Karim Ho
meaning: Chant the name of Lord of Parthi who is Guru, Brahma, Vishnu, Mahesha, Allah, Zohrashtra, Mahavira and He is also none other than Rama, Krishna and Karim.

title: Sri Lakshmi Ramana Narayana
lyrics:
Sri Lakshmi Ramana Narayana
Narayana Veda Parayana [ Sri Lakshmi ... ]
Bhava Bhaya Harana Vanditha Charana
Alakh Niranjana Narayana
Vaidehi Mohana Narayana (2)
meaning: Salutation to Lord Narayana who is the beloved of Goddess Lakshmi. Salutations to the one who has knowledge of all the Vedas, the one who removes the fear of the materialistic world, whose feet are worshipped by all, who is always pure and who has enchanted Vaidehi (Sita) as Lord Rama.

title: Sri Madhusudhana Krishna Giridhara Shyama
lyrics:
Sri Madhusudhana Krishna Giridhara Shyama Murari
Bhaktha Vatsala Prabhu Hey Giridhari
Radha Ramana Sri Hari
Keshava Madhava Sadhu Samrakshaka
Sai Krishna Murari
meaning: O Lord Krishna, You are adored by Your devotees as well as Your beloved Radha. O Lord who lifted the Govardhana hill, You are saviour of the holy men and ascetics.

title: Sri Mallikarjuna Maheshwara
lyrics:
Sri Mallikarjuna Maheshwara
Shiva Sai Shambho Vishweshwara [ Sri Mallikarjuna ... ]
Srisaila Vasa Sureshwara
Sri Bhramaramba Hrudayeshwara
Parvathi Ramana Parameshwara
meaning:
This song praises Lord Shiva, the presiding deity in Srisailam, in Andhra Pradesh State in India, who is the Consort of Parvathi, with various names and attributes such as, Mallikarjuna, Vishweshwara, Sri Shaila Vasa, the one who resides in the heart of Bhramaramba (Parvathi's name in Srisailam).

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Sri Raghu Nandana Dasharatha Nandana
lyrics:
Sri Raghu Nandana Dasharatha Nandana
Bhadradeeshwara Rama
Vaidehi Priya Vaikunta Vasa
Sada Smarami Ramethi Rama
meaning: Chant incessantly the holy name of Rama from Raghu Dynasty. He is the son of King Dasharatha and who is the presiding deity in Bhadrachalam (a holy place). He is the beloved of Vaidehi (Sita) and the one who resides in Vaikunta (the abode of Lord Vishnu).

title: Sri Raghu Nandana Janaki Jeevana
lyrics:
Sri Raghu Nandana Janaki Jeevana
Rama Rama Rama Sai (Ram)
Alakh Niranjana Asura Nikhandana
Rajeeva Lochana Bhava Bhaya Bhanjana [ Rama Rama ... ]
meaning: Worship Lord Rama, who is the consort of Janaki (Sita), who is always pure, the slayer of demons, the one with eyes like Lotus and who destroys the fear of the materialistic world.

title: Sri Raghu Nandana Rama Harey
lyrics:
Sri Raghu Nandana Rama Harey
Hey Yadu Nandana Krishna Harey
Vaidehi Priya Rama Harey
Radha Ramana Shyama Harey
meaning: Glory to Lord Rama of Raghu dynasty and the beloved of Mother Sita. Glory to Lord Krishna of Yadu dynasty and the beloved of Radha.

title: Sri Raghu Nandana Sita Rama
lyrics:
Sri Raghu Nandana Sita Rama
Rajeeva Lochana Raja Rama
Raja (Sai) Rama
Bhava Bhaya Bhanjana Taraka Naama
Atma Rama Sai Rama
Kalimala Bhanjana Kodanda Rama
meaning: Worship Lord Rama of Raghu Dynasty, the consort of Sita, the one with lotus eyes, the one whose sacred name destroys the fear of the materialistic world and grants liberation, the one who is Atma Rama (inner self or higher conscience), the one who wields the bow named "Kodanda" and the one who destroys the impurities of the age of Kali. He is verily Lord Sai.

title: Sri Ram Jaya Ram Jaya
lyrics:
Sri Ram Jaya Ram Jaya Jaya Ram Janaki Jeevana Ram
Patitha Pavana Rama Harey Jaya Raghava Sundara Ram
Deenodharana Rama Harey Jaya Maruti Sevitha Ram
Jaya Jaya Ram Jaya Raghu Ram Janaki Jeevana Ram
meaning: Victory to Lord Rama, the embodiment of auspiciousness, the very life of Janaki (Sita) the uplifter of downtrodden, the beautiful one from Raghu dynasty, who sanctifies the sinners and the one who is worshipped by Maruti (Hanuman).

title: Sri Ram Jaya Ram Jaya Jaya Ram
lyrics:
Sri Ram Jaya Ram Jaya Jaya Ram
Raghupathi Raghava Raja Ram
Dasharatha Nandana Sri Raghu Ram
Parthi Pureeshwara Sai Ram [ Raghupathi Raghava ... ]
meaning: Victory to Lord Rama, the descendant of the Raghu clan, the son of Dasharatha. Victory to Lord Sai, Lord of Parthi, who is none other than Lord Rama.

title: Sri Rama Charanam Sri Rama
lyrics:
Sri Rama Charanam Sri Rama Charanam Sri Rama Charanam Bhajey (2)
Vaidehi Ramam Vaikunta Dhamam
Bhoopala Choodamani
Atmabhi Ramam Prabhu Sai Ramam
Sri (Sathya Sai) Rama Charanam Bhajey (3)
meaning: Worship the feet of Lord Sri Rama, Lord of Vaidehi, whose abode is Vaikunta. Like the Choodamani, which is the best among the jewels worn on the head, Sri Rama is the Crown Jewel among the kings who have ruled this world. He is the Atma (Higher self or Higher conscience) Rama, Sathya Sai Rama.

title: Sri Rama Jaya Rama
lyrics:
Sri Rama Jaya Rama Jaya Jaya Ram
Govinda Gopala Hey Ghana Shyam
Sundara Shyam Nayanabhi Ram
Madhura Manohara Sai Bhagawan
meaning:
Victory to the Lord Rama, the beautiful lotus-eyed one and Lord Gopala (Krishna), the beautiful dark-hued one who is the protector of cows. Victory to Lord Sai, the sweetest and most pleasing Lord.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Sri Rama Jaya Rama
lyrics:
Sri Rama Jaya Rama
Daasharathey Jaya Raghu Rama
Kalyana Rama Kodanda Rama
Sita Rama Sri Raghu Rama
Sri Ram Jaya Ram
Sri Rama Jaya Rama Sathya Sai Rama
meaning: Victory to Lord Rama of Raghu dynasty, the son of Dasharatha and the consort of Mother Sita. Victory to the one who wields the Kodanda bow and who bestows welfare on all. Victory to Lord Sathya Sai who is verily Lord Rama.

title: Sri Rama Jaya Rama
lyrics:
Sri Rama Jaya Rama
Hey Bhaava Priya Sai Rama (2)
Sathya Priya Dharma Priya
Shanthi Priya Prema Priya [ Hey Bhaava Priya ... ]
meaning: Victory to Sri Rama who responds to a devotee's yearning. You are Sai Rama of Prashanthi Nilayam, the one who is fond of truth, righteousness, peace and divine love.

title: Sri Rama Jaya Rama Jaya
lyrics:
Sri Rama Jaya Rama Jaya Jaya Rama
Sri Rama Jaya Rama Sundara Rama [ Sri Rama ... ]
Sri Rama Jaya Rama Mangala Naama
Sri Rama Jaya Rama Atma Rama
Sri Rama Jaya Rama Sita (Sai) Rama
meaning: Victory to Lord Rama, the most beautiful one whose name is auspicious, the one who is the indweller, Atma Rama (Higher conscience or Higher Self). Victory to Lord Sai who is none other than Lord Rama.

title: Sri Rama Rama Ram Yadu
lyrics:
Sri Rama Rama Ram Yadu Nandana Hey Ghana Shyam
Sri Ram Jaya Ram Jaya Jaya Ram (3)
Raghupathi Raghava Raja Ram
Patitha Pavana Sita Ram [ Sri Ram Jaya Ram ... ]
meaning: Sing the name of Rama, who is beloved of Sita and son of Dasharatha and star of Raghu clan. Fill the mind with the glory of Rama, who sanctifies the sinners. Repeat the name of Sai Ram.

title: Sri Rama Rama Rama Raghuveera
lyrics:
Sri Rama Rama Rama Raghuveera Rama Ram
Sri Rama Rama Rama Bharatagraja Rama Ram
Sri Rama Rama Rama Ranadheera Rama Ram
Sri Rama Rama Rama Sharanam Tava Rama Ram
meaning: I surrender to Thee, O valorous Lord Rama of the Raghu Dynasty, the one who is the elder brother of Bharata.

title: Sri Rama Sri Raghu Rama
lyrics:
Sri Rama Sri Raghu Rama
Sri Rama Sita Rama [ Sri Rama ... ]
Sri Rama Megha Shyama
Sri Rama Sai Rama
meaning: Glory to Lord Rama of Raghu dynasty, the consort of Sita. Glory to the one who is the color of the rain-cloud. Lord Sai is none other than Lord Rama.

title: Sri Ramachandra Jaya Jagannatha
lyrics:
Sri Ramachandra Jaya Jagannatha
Sita Pathey Jaya Raghu Natha
Patitha Pavana Deena Natha
Deena Natha Deena Natha [ Patitha Pavana ... ]
Parthi Pureeshwara Sai Natha [ Sita Pathey ... ]
meaning:
