Worship Lord Rama, who is the Lord of the whole world and of the Raghu Dynasty, the consort of Sita, the one who sanctifies the sinners and who is verily the Lord of Parthi - Lord Sai.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Sri Ramachandra Jaya Ramachandra
lyrics:
Sri Ramachandra Jaya Ramachandra
Raghuveera Ranadheera Raghukula Rama [ Sri Ramachandra ... ]
Dasharatha Nandana Dayabhi Rama
Danava Bhanjana Kodanda Rama
Kalyana Rama Kamaneeya Rama [ Raghuveera ... ]
meaning: Victory to Lord Rama, the valiant hero of the battlefield, the son of Dasharatha. Lord Rama is the most compassionate one, the slayer of demons, the wielder of the sacred bow Kodanda, one who does good to everyone and who is very attractive to look at.

title: Sri Ranga Harey Vittala Sai
lyrics:
Sri Ranga Harey Vittala Sai Ranga Harey Vittala
Hey Daya Nidhey Vittala Hey Krupa Nidhey Vittala
Hey Sai Prabho Vittala Sathya Sai Prabho Vittala
meaning: Glory to Lord Vittala who is all compassionate and merciful. Salutations to Lord Sathya Sai who is verily Lord Vittala.

title: Sri Ranga Sri Ranga Ranga
lyrics:
Sri Ranga Sri Ranga Ranga Ranga Sri Ranga (2)
Kaveri Thata Vasa Kasturi Ranga
Karunya Lavanya Karunanta Ranga
Jaya Panduranga Jaya Sai Ranga (2)
meaning: Chant the name of Lord Sriranga (Narayana) who resides on the banks of river Kaveri and who adorns the fragrant musk. He is compassionate and His beauty is enchanting. Victory to You, O Lord Panduranga who is none other than Sai.

title: Sri Sai Gananayakam Ganapathim
lyrics:
Sri Sai Gananayakam Ganapathim
Bhaktha Jana Vanditham Pavanam [ Sri Sai ... ]
Vidya Buddhi Pradayaka Devam
Bhava Bhaya Haranam Bhavani Tanayam
meaning:
Salutations to Lord Ganapathi (Ganesha), who is the Lord of Ganaas (attendants of Lord Shiva). He is worshipped by His devotees who are sanctified by His grace. O son of Bhavani (Parvathi), You are the provider of knowledge, education and the one who dispels fear of sins and cycle of birth and death. You are none other than Lord Sai.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Sri Sai Natha Guru Govinda
lyrics:
Sri Sai Natha Guru Govinda
Parthi Pureeshwara Jaya Govinda
Prashanthi Nilaya Radhey Govinda
Sri Guru Jaya Guru Vittala Govinda
meaning: Sing the name of Lord Sai who is our Guru, the Lord Govinda who resides in Parthi/Prashanthi Nilayam, the Lord of Radha and also known by the name of Vittala.

title: Sri Sai Rama Sundara Naama
lyrics:
Sri Sai Rama Sundara Naama
Pavana Charana Prashanthi Rama
Jagadashraya Bhava Bandha Vimochana
Ahalyodharaka Rama Harey
Rama Harey Rama Harey
Parthi Pureesha Mangala Dhama
Pavana Charana Prashanthi Rama
meaning: O Lord Sai Rama of Prashanthi, from whom the entire world seeks solace and liberation, You are none other than the Lord Rama who liberated Ahalya. O Lord of Parthi, we offer our salutations at Your sacred feet.

title: Sri Vasudeva Narayana Sai Narayana
lyrics:
Sri Vasudeva Narayana Sai Narayana
Janardhana Hey Madhusudhana Sai Narayana
Govardhanodhara Gopalana Sai Narayana
Hari Om Hari Om Hari Om Narayana
meaning: Worship and chant the Holy names of Lord Krishna - Vasudeva, Janardhana, Madhusudhana and Narayana who as Gopala had lifted  the Govardhana mountain to protect His devotees. Lord Sai is verily Lord Narayana.

title: Sri Venkatesha Sayeeshwara
lyrics:
Sri Venkatesha Sayeeshwara
Tirumalai Vasa Sayeeshwara
Sayeeshwara Sathya Sayeeshwara
Balaji Govinda Sayeeshwara (2)
Akhilanda Natha Ananda Roopa
Venkatesha Sai Venkatesha (3) [ Balaji Govinda ... ]
meaning: Salutations to Lord Sai who is verily Lord Venkatesha or Balaji who resides in Tirumala as Lord Govinda. He is the Lord of the whole Universe and the embodiment of happiness.

title: Sridhara Sundara Radhikeshwara
lyrics:
Sridhara Sundara Radhikeshwara
Gaana Priyakara Murali Manohara [ Sridhara Sundara ]
Natavara Giridhara Gopikeshwara
Sayeeshwara Sathya Sayeeshwara
meaning: The beautiful Lord Vishnu - who is the Lord of Lakshmi and adored by Radha, the Lord who is fond of music and beautiful to look at with his flute, who is the supreme actor and dancer, the Lord of the Gopis, one who lifted the Govardhana Mountain, He is none other than our Lord Sathya Sayeeshwara.

title: Srikari Krupakari Kshemankari Sayeeshwari
lyrics:
Srikari Krupakari Kshemankari Sayeeshwari
Shankari Abhayankari Shubhankari Sayeeshwari [ Srikari Krupakari ... ]
Tandavakeli Priyakari Bhairavi Pralayankari
Sarveshwari Sundari Dayakari Maheshwari
meaning: Glory be to the beautiful, compassionate and all pervading goddess Parvathi, the consort of Shankara (Shiva), the one who bestows auspiciousness, who looks after the welfare of devotees, who bestows fearlessness and who is fond of the 'Tandava' dance.

title: Srinivasa Govinda Sri Venkatesha Govinda
lyrics:
Srinivasa Govinda Sri Venkatesha Govinda
Purana Purusha Govinda Pundarikaaksha Govinda
Dashavidha Roopa Govinda Krishna Rama Govinda
Krishna Rama Govinda Rama Krishna Govinda
Sai Rama Govinda Sai Krishna Govinda
meaning: Chant the divine names Srinivasa, Govinda, Venkatesha - various names of Lord Balaji of Tirupati. He is Lord Narayana, the one who is the Lord of great Epics (Puranas) and the one who has taken ten incarnations. He is verily Lord Sai, who is the same Lord who incarnated as Rama and Krishna.

title: Srinivasa Sri Venkatesha
lyrics:
Srinivasa Sri Venkatesha
Balaji Govinda Sayeesha [ Srinivasa Sri ... ]
Parama Dayala Tirumalai Vasa
Padma Lakshmi Vallabha Esha
Pundarikaaksha Paapa Vinasha
meaning: Chant the names of Lord Srinivasa of Tirupati also hailed as Venkatesha, Balaji, Govinda. O Lord, You are none other than Lord Sai. You are the compassionate Lord residing on the hills of Tirumala accompanied by Goddess Lakshmi. You are the lotus-eyed one who destroys our sins.

title: Srinivasa Venkatesha
lyrics:
Srinivasa Venkatesha
Shritha Jana Paripala Sayeesha [ Srinivasa ... ]
Tirumala Giri Vasa Govinda
Garuda Vahana Govinda Govinda
Govinda Govinda Srinivasa Govinda
Govinda Govinda Shirdi Vasa Govinda
Govinda Govinda Parthi Vasa Govinda
meaning: Sing the names of Lord Srinivasa, Venkatesha (names of Lord Vishnu) and Lord Sayeesha who protects all those who have surrendered to Him. Glory to Lord Govinda who resides in the Tirumala hills and the one who rides on Garuda.

title: Subah Aur Shyam Bol Hari
lyrics:
Subah Aur Shyam Bol Hari Naam
Gopi Gopala Bhajo Sai Ghana Shyam [ Subah Aur ... ]
Chalo Man Chalo Chaley Baba Ke Dham
Shirdi Ke Dhaam Sathya Sai Ke Dham
meaning:
Chant the name of Lord Hari day in and day out. Chant Gopi, Gopala, Ghana Shyam (various names of Lord Krishna) and Sai who is verily Krishna. O Mind, let us proceed with our journey to the abodes of Shirdi Sai Baba and Sathya Sai Baba.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Subrahmanyam Subrahmanyam
lyrics:
Subrahmanyam Subrahmanyam Shanmukha Natha Subrahmanyam
Subrahmanyam Subrahmanyam Sai Natha Subrahmanyam
Shiva Shiva Shiva Shiva Subrahmanyam Hara Hara Hara Hara Subrahmanyam
Shiva Shiva Hara Hara Subrahmanyam Hara Hara Shiva Shiva Subrahmanyam
Shiva Sharavana Bhava Subrahmanyam Guru Sharavana Bhava Subrahmanyam
Shiva Shiva Hara Hara Subrahmanyam Hara Hara Shiva Shiva Subrahmanyam
meaning: We take refuge in Lord Subrahmanya and praise Him as Sharavana. Glory to Lord Subrahmanya and Lord Sai Natha.

title: Sunaada Vinodini Sai Janani
lyrics:
Sunaada Vinodini Sai Janani
Bhavani Jaganmohini Sai Janani [ Sunaada Vinodini ... ]
Sambhavi Shiva Ranjani Sai Janani
Shankari Narayani Sai Janani
Bhagawathi Vara Dayini Sai Janani
meaning: Glory to Mother Sai who enjoys music and who has several forms and names - Bhavani who enchants the whole world, Sambhavi, who pleases and entertains Lord Shiva, Shankari, Narayani and Bhagawathi who bestows boons to all.

title: Sundara Mukha Sri Gajanana
lyrics:
Sundara Mukha Sri Gajanana
Eka Dantha Sri Gajanana [ Sundara Mukha ... ]
Prathama Namami Gajanana
Rishi Muni Vanditha Gajanana
Gajanana Om Gajanana (3)
meaning: Salutations to Lord Ganesh, the beautiful elephant-faced Lord with a single tusk and the one whom the entire universe worships first. The wise and noble sages too worship Him first.

title: Sundara Paadam Sai Paadam
lyrics:
Sundara Paadam Sai Paadam
Pankaja Charanam Paapa Vimochanam [ Sundara Paadam ... ]
Nataraja Natanam Sai Paadam
Sri Krishna Narthanam Sai Paadam
Bhava Dukha Haranam Sai Paadam
Jagadodharanam Sai Paadam
meaning: The feet of Sai are beautiful. The feet, which are soft like Lotus petals relieves us from our sins. The feet of Sai are the dancing feet of Lord Shiva and that of Lord Krishna. The feet of Sai provide solace from the trials and tribulations in our lives and they are the feet that uplift the world from miseries and calamities.

title: Sundara Shyam Nayanabhi Ram
lyrics:
Sundara Shyam Nayanabhi Ram
Hey Ghana Shyam Nayanabhi Ram
Natavara Shyam Nayanabhi Ram
Radhey Shyam Nayanabhi Ram
Sai Shyam Nayanabhi Ram
meaning: This song extols Lord Krishna as the blue, dark complexioned Shyama, the supreme dancer and actor, the Lord of Radha who is very beautiful and enchanting for the eyes.

title: Sundara Shyama Murari Sai
lyrics:
Sundara Shyama Murari Sai
Gopala Sri Hari Sri Hari (2)
Parama Niranjana Madhava Sai
Sakala Charachara Vyapaka Sai [ Gopala Sri ... ]
meaning: Sing the praises of beautiful Lord Sai, who is none other than Lord Krishna also known as Shyama Murari, Gopala, Sri Hari and Madhava. Lord Sai is eternally pure and encompasses all the animate and inanimate things.

title: Sundara Sundara Nachey Sundara Sai
lyrics:
Sundara Sundara Nachey Sundara Sai Ghana Shyam
Nacherey Sai Sundara Shyam
Rhumaka Jhumaka Jhum Ghungaroo Baajey Nachey Ghana Shyam
Nachey Natavara Sai Sundara Merey Sai Ram
Nachey Nachey Man Mandir Mey Merey Sai Ram [ Nacherey ... ]
meaning: O the most beautiful, dark-complexioned Lord Krishna, it is a treat for the eyes and ears when the You dance with the anklets jingling on Thy little feet, which go in rhythm to the tune. O Lord, please dance in our hearts the same way for the song of our life.

title: Sundara Sundara Vinayaka
lyrics:
Sundara Sundara Vinayaka
Shubha Mangala Dayaka Vinayaka
Vighna Koti Hara Vimala Gajanana
Sakala Vighna Hara Sai Gajanana
Eshwari Nandana Parthi Gajanana
Jai Jai Ganesha Jai Sri Ganesha (4)
meaning: Victory to Lord Ganesha who is very beautiful, who bestows everything good and auspicious. He is the remover of millions of obstacles that come in our way. He is the elephant-faced son of Parvathi and is verily Lord Sai who resides in Parthi.

title: Sundara Vadana Sarasija Nayana
lyrics:
Sundara Vadana Sarasija Nayana
Parthi Puri Bhagawan
Jagat Paripala Prashanthi Nilaya
Tum Ho Merey Bhagawan
Daya Karo Bhagawan
Krupa Karo Bhagawan
Parthi Pureesha Hey Bhuvanesha
Raksha (Sai Krupa) Karo Bhagawan
meaning: O Sai, Lord of Parthi, the one with eyes like Lotus, the one who has a beautiful face, who protects and sustains the world and who resides in Prashanthi Nilayam, You are my Lord. Please have compassion on me and shower Your grace on me O Lord of the World.

title: Sundara Vadani Suguna Manohari
lyrics:
Sundara Vadani Suguna Manohari
Manda Haasa Mukha Shashi Vadani
Chandana Kumkuma Alankruta Vadani
Sai Maheshwari Raja Rajeshwari
Om Shakthi Om Om Shakthi Om Om Shakthi Om Om Shakthi Om (2)
meaning: Chant the name 'Om Shakthi Om' repeatedly, which extols the Divine Mother as Maheshwari (great Goddess), virtuous Goddess of Emperors, having a blissful smile with the sandal paste and vermillion on Her beautiful face and who is verily Mother Sai.

title: Suramuni Vanditha Vinayaka
lyrics:
Suramuni Vanditha Vinayaka
Ananda Dayaka Vinayaka
Hey Shiva Nandana Shubhanana
Sai Ganesha Vinayaka
Sai Ganesha Sai Ganesha Sai Ganesha Vinayaka (2)
meaning: Salutations to Lord Sai who is none other than Lord Vinayaka (Ganesha), son of Lord Shiva. O Lord, You are worshipped by all gods and sages and You bestow happiness to all.

title: Surrender To The Feet Of The Lord
lyrics:
Surrender To The Feet Of The Lord Sai Baba Surrender ...
... To The Feet Of The Lord
Surrender To The One We Adore Sai Baba Surrender ...
... To The One We Adore
And With Devotion We Can Cross This Ocean With Baba ...
... Beside Us To Guide Us [ Surrender To The One ... ]

title: Swami Sharanam Ayyan Sharanam Ayyappa
lyrics:
Swami Sharanam Ayyan Sharanam Ayyappa Sharanam Sharanam Ponnaiappa
Sabari Girisha Sadguru Natha Swamiyey Sharanam Sharanam Ponnaiappa
Mohini Suthaney Mohana Roopa Swamiyey Sharanam Sharanam Ponnaiappa
Parthi Pureesha Prashanti Nilaya Swamiyey Sharanam Sharanam Ponnaiappa
meaning:
Surrender to Lord Ayyappa, the son of Mohini (a form of Lord Vishnu) and Lord Shiva. Surrender to the Lord of mountain Sabari, to the true teacher, to Lord Sai, the Lord of Puttaparti who dwells in Prashanti Nilayam, the one who is verily Lord Ayyappa.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Swami Take My Hand
lyrics:
Swami Take My Hand, Jesus Take My Hand,
Dear Lord Take My Hand, Take My Hand And Lead The Way
I'll Never Forget You, You'll Always Be With Me,   [ Dear Lord  ... ]
You Are Guide And Protector, Mother And Father,  [ Dear Lord  ... ]
Teach Me Loving Service, Peace And Contentment
[ Dear Lord ... ]

title: Swamiyey Sharanam Sharanam Ayyappa (2)
lyrics:
Swamiyey Sharanam Sharanam Ayyappa (2)
Sayeesha Sharanam Sharanam Sayeesha (2) [ Swamiyey Sharanam ... ]
Sabari Giri Vasa Dharma Shastha
Parthi Puri Vasa Dharma Rakshaka
Mohini Bala Pampa Vasa
Eshwari Bala Chithravathi Vasa
Bhaktha Samrakshaka Kali Avatara (2)
Swamiyey Sharanam Sharanam Ayyappa (3)
Sharanam Sharanam Ayyappa (2)
meaning:
I surrender myself to thee O Lord Ayyappa, son of Mohini, who has incarnated to establish righteousness on Earth residing on the hills of Sabari near the river Pampa. I surrender myself to Lord Sai, son of Mother Eshwaramba residing on the banks of river Chitravathi, the incarnated in this Kali age to protect His devotees.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Sweet Ganesha
lyrics:
Sweet Ganesha, sweet Ganesha, dancing in my heart
Sweet Ganesha, sweet Ganesha, dancing in the light of love
 
Your compassion guides me through the night
Ganesha, You guide me through the troubles of life
 
Sweet Lord Krishna, Sweet Lord Krishna, dancing in my heart
Sweet Lord Krishna, Sweet Lord Krishna, dancing in the light of love
 
Divine Flute echoes in my heart
Krishna, sweet Krishna, come to me
 
Sweet Sathya Sai, Sweet Sathya Sai, singing in my heart
Sweet Sathya Sai, Sweet Sathya Sai, singing in the light of love
 
Your love is all I need
Sathya Sai, You embrace my truth
 
Sweet Ganesha, sweet Ganesha, dancing in my heart

title: Taraka Naamam Bhajarey
lyrics:
Taraka Naamam Bhajarey Manasa Sai Ram Sai Ram Sai Ram
Dharma Uddharaka Taraka Naamam
Sarva Manohara Sai Naamam
Sayeeshwara Paramatma Naamam
Sai Ram Sai Ram Sai Ram Sai Ram
meaning: O Mind, chant the Holy Name of Lord Sai Rama that liberates one from the cycle of birth and death, the Name that uplifts and fosters righteousness and the Name of the Supreme Lord Sai that is beautiful in all aspects.

title: Tateyou Gananatha Warera no Uchi
lyrics:
Tateyou Gananatha Warera no Uchi ni Hikaru Kami
Iainaru Kami Shiva no Itoshigo
Eichi o Sazukeru Vinayaka
Parvathi no Miko ni Eikou Are
Warera ni Michi o Shimesu Ganesha yo
meaning:
Praise the Lord Gananatha, the God that shines within us. Glory to the beloved son of Parvathi and Shiva. Let Your wisdom show us the way.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Ten Pazhani Nadanukku Hara Haro
lyrics:
Then Pazhani Nadanukku Hara Haro Hara
Eru Mayil Velanukku Hara Haro Hara
Hara Haro Hara Muruga Hara Haro Hara
Hara Haro Hara Shanmuga Hara Haro Hara
Swamimalai Nadanukku Hara Haro Hara
Thiruchendur Velanukku Hara Haro Hara
Parthipuri Nadanukku Hara Haro Hara 
Shakthi Vadivelanukku Hara Haro Hara 
Hara Haro Hara Muruga Hara Haro Hara
Hara Haro Hara Shanmuga Hara Haro Hara
meaning: Glory be to the Lord of Pazhani (Lord Subrahmanya), the one who rides on the peacock, the Lord of holy places Swamimalai and Thiruchendur, and to Lord Sai of Parthi who is none other than Lord Subrahmanya.

title: Terey Siwa Prabhu Koi Nahin
lyrics:
Terey Siwa Prabhu Koi Nahin Hai Tujko Mera Pranam
Tujko Mera Pranam O Sai Baba Tujko Mera Pranam
Murali Manohara Asha Na Todo
Dukh Bhanjana Mera Saath Na Chodo
Dwar Khada Hoon Mein Dukhiyara
Sun Ley Meri Pukar O Sai Baba Sun Ley Meri Pukar
meaning: O Lord Sai, I have none other than You, please accept my salutations. O beautiful Lord Krishna, do not disappoint me. O the destroyer of sorrows, do not leave me. I am standing at Your door with sorrowful mind. Please listen to my cries, O Lord Sai Baba.

title: The Lord of the Universe is here
lyrics:
The Lord of the Universe is here
Swami Sathya Sai is here
Come to save devotees everywhere
Come to bless His children everywhere
Born at Puttaparthi
The Lord of the Universe is here

Calm and tranquil like the moon
Shining with Divine inner light
Filling all with Bliss at His sight
He is always serving those in need
Answering the prayers of devotees
Giving Grace to you and me
The Lord of the Universe is here

Sai You are Guru, God, and Self
Mother You are everything to us
Father You are everything to us
You are the Divine Primal Energy
Manifest as all that we ever see
You are the One Reality
The Lord of the Universe is here

Sai with the sacred form of Om
Universal radiance Divine
Please accept this offering of mine
The flame of love that burns within my heart
Meaning we can never be apart
You and I are ever One
The Lord of the Universe is here.

Narayana Narayana Om Sathya
Narayana Narayana Om
Narayana Narayana Om Sathya
Narayana Narayana Om
Narayana Narayana Om Sathya
Narayana Narayana Om
The Lord of the Universe is here.

title: The Lord unites our many faiths
lyrics:
The Lord unites our many faiths
 Sai brings us together
 Allah Jesus Buddha and Nanak
 You are Zoroastra and Mahavir
 You are Rama, You are Krishna
 You are everything to me (2)

title: The Name Of God Is Flowing
lyrics:
The Name Of God Is Flowing Within Me
I Hear It Always Singing Within Me
Allah, Allah Shivaya Sathya Sai Baba
Rama Rama Jehovah Buddha Lord Jesus
The Name Of God Is Flowing Within Me
I Hear It Always Singing Within Me

title: The star is shining so bright
lyrics:
The star is shining so bright
 Everything is going to be alright
 Remember the Lord within
 And everything is going to be alright
 When you have no one to turn to
 Surrender yourself at His Feet
 Loving Jesus will be by your side
 Our Savior is by our side
 The star is shining so bright
 Everything is going to be alright

title: Tirupati Malaimel Iruppavane
lyrics:
Tirupati Malaimel Iruppavane
Tirada Vinayellam Tirppavane
Srinivasa Govinda Sri Venkatesha Govinda
Ulamam Kovilil Iruppavane Ulagorai Vazhvikka Vandavane
Sankatam Tavirthidum Govinda Venkata Ramana Govinda
Ezhu Malaimel Iruppavane Ella Vinaigalaiyum Tirppavane
Shirdi Sai Govinda Sri Sathya Sai Govinda
meaning: Glory to Lord Govinda who resides on Mount Tirupati and who is the remover of all sins. He dwells in the temple of the heart and incarnates to save the world. Residing on the seven hills, He removes all the afflictions of the devotees. He is none other than Lord Shirdi Sai and Lord Sathya Sai.

title: Triloka Palini Jagadeeshwari
lyrics:
Triloka Palini Jagadeeshwari
Sadananda Roopini Sayeeshwari [ Triloka Palini ... ]
Karunya Lavanya Kadambari
Partheeshwari Amba Shiva Shankari
meaning: Oh Mother Sayeeshwari, the protector of the three worlds, one who is always blissful, compassionate and beautiful, the Mother of Parthi, the consort of Shiva, our salutations to Thee.

title: Tripura Sundari Ma Amba Daya
lyrics:
Tripura Sundari Ma Amba Daya Sagari Ma
Sundara Vadani Ma Amba Suguna Manohari Ma
Jaya Jagat Janani Ma Amba Jagadodharini Ma
Parthi Nivasini Ma Amba Paapa Vimochani Ma
meaning: O Mother of Parthi, You are the most beautiful in all the three worlds, You are the ocean of compassion, full of virtues, You are the Mother who liberates the world and frees us from our sins.

title: Tripurari Shiva Shankara
lyrics:
Tripurari Shiva Shankara
Naga Bhooshana Naga Bharana [ Tripurari Shiva ... ]
Omkareshwara Namah Shivaya
Mahakaleshwara Namah Shivaya
meaning: Oh Lord Shiva (also called Shankara), the slayer of the demons of Tripura, the one who wears the serpent as ornament, the personification of the primordial sound "Om", the Lord Mahakaleshwar (Shiva's another name), I offer my salutations to Thee.

title: Tulasi Mala Dhari Krishna
lyrics:
Tulasi Mala Dhari Krishna
Tunga Teera Vihari Krishna [ Tulasi Mala Dhari ... ]
Gopi Manasa Gopala Krishna
Gopala Krishna Gopala Krishna [ Gopi Manasa ... ]
Govinda Govinda Sai Krishna
meaning:
Chant the names of the Lord Gopala Krishna, Govinda Krishna, the one who wears the Tulasi garland and has installed Himself on the banks of River Tunga and has captured the minds of the Gopikas.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Tum Bin Pran Nahin O
lyrics:
Tum Bin Pran Nahin O Sai Merey
Sab Bhakthon Ka Tum Ho Sahara
Rahim Kaho Raghu Rama Kaho [ Tum Bin ... ]
Nanak Yesu Mahavira Shiva Shankara Premavatara Sai Ram
Tum Ho Merey Pran O Sai Merey
Tum Ho Sai Bhagawan
meaning: O compassionate Lord Sai, You are none other than Lord Shankara(Shiva), Guru Nanak, Yesu and Mahavira. Lord Sai, we adore You as the very personification of Love, the basis of all faiths. Chant the names of Ram, Rahim, Nanak, Yesu, Mahavir. O Sai, there is no life without You.

title: Tum Ho Anatha Nath Bhagawan
lyrics:
Tum Ho Anatha Nath Bhagawan
O Sai Merey Prana Sakha Bhagawan
Mata Pitha Guru Bandhu Tum Ho
Bhaktha (Deena) Sakha Bhagawan
Bhagawan Bhagawan (2)
Prana Sakha Bhagawan (O Sai Merey)
meaning: Oh Sai Bhagawan, You are the Lord of the forlorn, closest friend for your devotees. You are everything, the Mother, Father, preceptor and even the kith and kin.

title: Tum ho Daata Sai Shankara
lyrics:
Tum Ho Daata Sai Shankara
Hum Ko Deejo Ananda Baba [ Tum Ho Daata ... ]
Aao Shankara Anatha Natha
Deejo Darshana Deena Natha
meaning: O Lord Sai who is verily Lord Shiva, You are the one who bestows everything. We pray that You give us the eternal bliss. Please come and give Your Darshan. You are the Lord and savior of the helpless and the downtrodden.

title: Tum Ho Merey Bhagawan (Baba)
lyrics:
Tum Ho Merey Bhagawan (Baba)
Parthi Pureesha Sri Sai Natha
Shirdi Pureesha Hey Jagannatha [ Tum Ho ... ]
Prashanthi Vasa Sri Sai Natha
Purana Purusha Hey Jagannatha
meaning: Glory to Lord Sai, the Lord of Shirdi and Parthi, is also Lord of the world and the Lord who was mentioned in great Epics (Puranas) like Mahabharata, Ramayana etc. O Sai, You are my Lord.

title: Tum Ho Prabhu Ghana Shyam
lyrics:
Tum Ho Prabhu Ghana Shyam O Sai
Parthi Vihari Shyama Murari [ Tum Ho ... ]
Meera Ke Prabhu Giridhara Naagara
Natavara Sundara Shyama Murari
Charana Kamala Balihaari Murari
meaning:
O Lord Sai, You are verily Lord Krishna, the one with the dark complexion of a rain cloud, who slayed the demon Mura. You reside at Puttaparthi. You are the supreme actor, the most beautiful Lord who lifted the Govardhana hill. You are the Lord of Meera. We surrender at Thy Lotus feet, O Lord.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Tum Ho Ram Tum Ho
lyrics:
Tum Ho Ram Tum Ho Shyam
Bhakthon Ke Pran Bhagawan Sai Ram
Sita Ram Radhey Shyam
Ek Prabhu Bhagawan Sai Ram [ Bhakthon Ke ... ]
meaning: O Lord Sai, You are the very life of Your devotees, all forms blended in one, though known as Rama, the consort of Sita and Shyama (Krishna, the Lord of Radha).

title: Tum Ho Shyam Ram Rahim
lyrics:
Tum Ho Shyam Ram Rahim (Baba)
Ram Rahim Shyama Rahim [ Tum Ho ... ]
Allah Yesu Buddha Mahavira
Nanak Sai Zohrashtra Bhi Ho
Sarva Dharma Priya Sai Narayana (Shankara)
meaning: You are the Lord of every religion, O Sai. Devotees adore You as Ram, Rahim, Allah, Yesu, Buddha, Mahavira, Nanak, Zohrashtra, Narayana and Shankara.

title: Tum Ho Vighna Vinasha Ganesha
lyrics:
Tum Ho Vighna Vinasha Ganesha (3)
Parvathi Nandana Paahi Gajanana
Pranava Swaroopa Parthi Pureesha
Paahi Ganesha Vighna Vinasha
meaning: Protect me Oh Lord Ganesha, the destroyer of all obstacles, the son of Parvathi, the embodiment of primordial sound "OM" and the Lord of Parthi.

title: Tus cabellos de luna
lyrics:
Tus cabellos de luna, manantial de agua pura,
Se convierten en Ganges, bañando tu figura
Shiva, Shiva, Shiva, Shiva, Sathya Sai
Voy limpiando mi mente, respiro lentamente,
Y contemplo en mi frente tu sin par hermosura.
Shiva, Shiva, Shiva, Shiva, Sathya Sai
Déjame adorarte, déjame venerarte
Sólo quiero extasiarme en tu fresca ternura.
Shiva, Shiva, Shiva, Shiva, Sathya Sai
meaning:
O Lord Shiva, the spring of pure water on Your moon-decorated hair became Ganges by bathing Your figure. Glory to Thee, O Lord Shiva and Lord Sathya Sai. My mind is cleansed and my breath slows down when admiring Your unmatched beauty face-to-face. O Lord Sathya Sai who is verily Lord Shiva, let me worship You, let me venerate You. I just want to thrill in Your fresh tenderness.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Umayavale Arul Purivaiyamma
lyrics:
Umayavale Arul Purivai Amma
Omkara Roopini Akhilanda Nayaki
Adiyargal Vinai Tirkkum Adi Parasakti [ Umayavale Arul ... ]
Nan Seida Pizhaigalellam Poruppai Amma
Jagadambige Shivaranjani
meaning: Grace us O Goddess Uma! Ruler of the Universe! You are the personification of Aum; You are the divine energy, and the destroyer of sins. Forgive us, all our past errors, O Mother of the Universe, consort of Shiva.

title: Un Solo Dios
lyrics:
Un Solo Dios Eres Tu, Eres Tu Mi Senor
Jesucristo, Mahavira, Un Solo Dios Y Nada Mas
Jehova O Allah, Brahma, Vishnu, Shiva, Sai
Zoroastro, Guru Nanak, Mazda, Buddha,
Narayana
Sathya Sai Baba Nos Unira, En Una Sola
Humanidad
Un Solo Dios Reinara, Un Solo Dios Nos Amara
meaning: You are the One God, my Lord. You are Jesus Christ, Mahavira, Jehovah, Allah, Brahma, Vishnu, Shiva, Sai, Zoroaster, Guru Nanak, Ahura Mazda, Buddha and Narayana. Lord Sathya Sai Baba will unite us into one humanity. One God will reign, one God will love us.

title: Va Va Murugaiyya Vadivel Azhaga
lyrics:
Va Va Murugaiyya Vadivel Azhaga
Ka Va Va Kumara Thiru Karthikeya [ Va Va ... ]
Singara Vela Shiva Shakthi Bala
Sangeeta Lola Sathya Sayeesha
Va Va Muruga Vadivel Azhaga (6)
meaning: Come O beautiful Lord Muruga, protect us, Lord Karthikeya, the youthful son of Shiva and Shakthi, and the bearer of the divine spear. You are verily Lord Sathya Sai, who enjoys divine music.

title: Vahey Guru Vahey Guru
lyrics:
Vahey Guru Vahey Guru Vahey Guru Bol
Sathya Naam Sathya Naam Sathya Naam Bol [ Vahey Guru ... ]
Govinda Bol Hari Gopala Bol
Radha Ramana Hari Govinda Bol
Shirdi (Parthi) Pureeshwara Sri Sai Bol
meaning:
Chant the names of Vahey Guru, Sathya Sai, Govinda, Gopala (names of Krishna) and the name of Lord Sai of Shirdi and Parthi.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Vahey Guru Vahey Guru Vahey
lyrics:
Vahey Guru Vahey Guru Vahey Guru Ji Bolo
Sathya Naam Sathya Naam Sathya Naam Ji Bolo
Nithya Nithya Japiyey Terey Naam Ji Bolo [ Sathya Naam ... ]
Ram(a) Ram(a) Ram(a) Ram(a) Ram(a) Ram(a) Ji Bolo
Nithya Nithya Japiyey Rama Naam Ji Bolo
Krishna Krishna Krishna Krishna Krishna Krishna Ji Bolo
Nithya Nithya Japiyey Krishna Naam Ji Bolo
Govinda Jai Jai Gopala Jai Jai
Radha Ramana Hari Govinda Jai Jai
Govinda Jai Jai Gopala Jai Jai
Radha Ramana Hari Govinda Jai Jai
meaning: Always chant the names of the Divine Preceptor Vahey Guru, Lords Rama, Krishna, Shiva, Dattatreya and Govinda who is the beloved of Radha. Victory to Lord Govinda  and Gopala (names of Lord Krishna).

title: Vaidehi Priya Vaikunta Rama
lyrics:
Vaidehi Priya Vaikunta Rama
Ahalyodharaka Rama
Raghu Vara Janani Janaki Rama
Lakshmana Sevitha Lavanya Rama
Dasharatha Nandana Rama [ Raghu Vara ... ]
meaning: Salutations to You O Lord Rama of Vaikunta, beloved of Vaidehi / Janaki (other names of mother Sita). You are the liberator of Ahalya, You are worshipped by Lakshmana, son of Dasharatha and a blessing for the Raghu dynasty.

title: Vaijayanti Dhara Vanamala Dhara
lyrics:
Vaijayanti Dhara Vanamala Dhara
Shankha Chakra Dhara Peetambara Dhara [ Vaijayanti Dhara ... ]
Sri Kara Purandara Giridhara Naagara
Muralidhara Ghana Shyama Manohara
meaning: Glory to the dark-hued Lord Krishna who wears a garland of flowers and plays the enchanting flute. Wearing the golden robe, He is Lord Vishnu who holds the Discus (time) and the Conch (the sound Om). He is the Indweller who confers auspiciousness.

title: Vaikunta Natha Ananda Daata
lyrics:
Vaikunta Natha Ananda Daata
Alakha Niranjana Sai 
Sathya Swaroopa Sai Mahesha
Dharma Swaroopa Sai Mahesha
Shanthi Swaroopa Sai Mahesha
Prema Swaroopa Sai Mahesha
Alakha Niranjana Sai
meaning: Lord Sai, residing in Vaikunta, is the bestower of bliss. He is unstained from the world and attribute-less. Lord Sai is the supreme embodiment of the human values: Truth, Right Action, Peace, and Love.

title: Vaikuntapathey Narayana
lyrics:
Vaikuntapathey Narayana
Varija Nayana Narayana [ Vaikuntapathey ... ]
Vakshasthala Kaustubha Mani Bhooshita
Shankha Chakra Peetambara Shobhita
Narayana Hari (Sai) Narayana
meaning:
Glory to Lord Narayana, the one who resides in Vaikunta who has eyes the shape of a lotus, the one with the Kaustubha jewel on His chest and who is adorned with Shanka (Conch), Chakra (Disc) and who dons the auspicious yellow silk.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Vaikuntapathey Sai Harey
lyrics:
Vaikuntapathey Sai Harey
Vaijayanti Mala Dhari [ Vaikuntapathey Sai ... ]
Hari Govinda Hari Gopala (3)
Vara Godavari (Chithravathi) Teera Vihari
meaning: Glory to Lord Sai who is verily Lord Narayana of Vaikunta, who wears the Vaijayanti garland (a necklace worn by Lord Narayana as a sign of victory). He is Lord Hari and Govinda who resides on the banks of river Godavari and on the banks of the river Chithravathi as Lord Sai.

title: Vakratunda Bhajey Eka Dantha Bhajey
lyrics:
Vakratunda Bhajey Eka Dantha Bhajey Phaalachandra Bhajey Gananatha 
Gananatha Gananatha Maam Paahi Prabho Gananatha 
Gowri Priya Sutha Gananatha 
Bimbadhara Sutha Gananatha 
Sai Vinayaka Gananatha
meaning: Chant the name of Lord Ganesha, the one with a curved trunk, a single tusk and who is adorned with the moon on His head. O the Lord of Shiva's army, please protect us. O Lord Ganesha, the beloved son of Mother Gowri and Lord Shiva who dons the crescent moon, You are none other than our Lord Sathya Sai.

title: Vakratunda Dhara Vighna Vinashaka Sri
lyrics:
Vakratunda Dhara Vighna Vinashaka Sri Ganesha Sri Ganesha
Siddhi Vinayaka Sumukha Gajanana Sri Ganesha Sri Ganesha
Linga Supoojita Lambodara Prabhu Sri Ganesha Sri Ganesha
Bhavani Nandana Bhaagawatha Priya Sri Ganesha Sri Ganesha
meaning:
Salutations to Lord Ganesha, who bears a curved tusk, and is the remover of all obstacles. He grants intellect and humility. His smile enchants all devotees. He worships the Shiva Linga (representation of the universal divinity). His large stomach symbolizes the repository of all knowledge. He is the dear son of Mother Parvathi. He wrote the holy scriptures, as dictated by sage Vyaasa, using one of His own tusks as a pencil.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Vamana Roopa Ganadhipa
lyrics:
Vamana Roopa Ganadhipa
Parvathi Nandana Paahi Gajanana [ Vamana Roopa ... ]
Eka Dantha Gunavanta Vinayaka
Maya Vinashaka Mooshika Vahana
Vidya Buddhi Siddhi Pradayaka
Pranavakaara Hey Shiva Nandana
meaning:
Sing the glory of Lord Ganesha, the short-statured Lord of the Ganaas (Lord Shiva's army). Protect us, O elephant-faced son of Mother Parvathi. You are the single tusked one, the epitome of good qualities, the destroyer of Maya (illusion) and the one who rides the mouse Mooshika. You are the bestower of superior knowledge, intelligence and powers. O son of Lord Shiva, You are verily the form of Om (Pranava).

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Vanamali Radha Ramana Giridhari Govinda
lyrics:
Vanamali Radha Ramana Giridhari Govinda
Neela Megha Sundara Narayana Govinda [ Vanamali Radha ... ]
Bhaktha Hrudaya Mandara Bhanu Koti Sundara
Nanda Nanda Gopa Vrinda Narayana Govinda
Narayana Govinda (6)
Narayana Narayana Narayana Govinda
Narayana Govinda (3)
meaning: Chant the name of Lord Govinda (Krishna) who wears a garland of forest flowers, who lifted the Govardhana hill and the beloved of Radha. He is beautiful with dark-blue complexion and is none other than Lord Narayana. He is like the Mandara flower in the hearts of His devotees, effulgent like a million Suns, the son of Nanda and one among the cowherds of Brindavan.

title: Vanamali Vasudeva Jaganmohana Radha Ramana
lyrics:
Vanamali Vasudeva Jaganmohana Radha Ramana
Jaganmohana Radha Ramana (2)
Shashi Vadana Sarasija Nayana Jaganmohana Radha Ramana (3)
Radha Ramana Radha Ramana (4)
meaning: Oh Lord Krishna, adorning the garland made of forest flowers, You attract all minds and the whole world. Your charming bright face which is like a shining moon and Your lotus eyes are admired by Radha.

title: Vande Uma Nandanam Gajananam
lyrics:
Vande Uma Nandanam Gajananam
Suramuni Sevitha Sumukha Gajananam [ Vande Uma ... ]
Vidya Dayaka Buddhi Pradayaka
Siddhi Vinayaka Paahi Gajananam
meaning: Salutations to Lord Gajanana, the son of Uma and the one who is worshipped by sages, who is the giver of knowledge, intellect and boons.

title: Varuvai Niye Sai Nada
lyrics:
Varuvai Niye Sai Nada
Padidum Podu Niye Varuvai [ Varuvai Niye ... ]
Annaiyum Niye Tandaiyum Niye
Guruvai Niye Varuvaye
Anbum Niye Arulum Niye
Ellam Alittidum Param Porul Niye
meaning: O Lord Sai, please come as we sing Your Name. You are our mother, father and preceptor. You are verily Love and Grace, You are the Supreme Soul who bestows everything on us.

title: Varuvai Varuvai Varuvai Amma
lyrics:
Varuvai Varuvai Varuvai Amma
Thiruve Uruvai Varuvai Amma
Irulai Neekkida Varuvai Amma
Undan Arulai Pozhindhidu Sai Amma [ Varuvai Varuvai ... ]
Kalyani Karumari Kamakshi Niye
Mahalakshmi Matangi Meenakshi Niye
Varalakshmi Varahi Visalakshi Niye
Ulagalum Maye Prashanthi Thaye
Amma Amma Amma Amma
meaning: O Mother Sai, please come in the form of grace to remove darkness. You are the various goddesses, and the Mother of the Universe who resides in Prashanthi Nilayam.

title: Vayu Kumara Vanara Veera
lyrics:
Vayu Kumara Vanara Veera
Ati Balavanta Hanumantha
Kesari Nandana Anjani Putra
Jaya Ho Jaya Ho Pavana Kumara (2)
Jaya Ho Jaya Ho Pavana Kumara (2)
meaning: O Lord Hanuman, the son of Kesari and Anjana, You are the most powerful. Victory to You, O blessed son of the Wind God (born to Kesari and Anjana out of boon from the Lord of Wind).

title: Veera Dheera Shoora Hanuman Ki
lyrics:
Veera Dheera Shoora Hanuman Ki Jai
Pavana Putra Anjaneya Hanuman Ki Jai [ Veera Dheera ... ]
Sada Rama Naama Japata Hanuman Ki Jai
Rama Rama Rama Rama Rama Rama Rama Ram [ Sada Rama ... ]
Sita Shoka Nasha Kaarana Hanuman Ki Jai
meaning:
Victory to Lord Hanuman, the one of valor, courage, strength, son of Pavan (the wind god) and Anjana Devi. Victory to the one who chants Lord Rama's name incessantly and who is responsible for the removal of Mother Sita's sorrow.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Veera Maruti Gambhira Maruti
lyrics:
Veera Maruti Gambhira Maruti
Dheera Maruti Ati Dheera Maruti
Geeta Maruti Sangeeta Maruti
Dootha Maruti Rama Dootha Maruti
Bhaktha Maruti Parama Bhaktha Maruti
meaning: Maruti, the son of Wind God, is one of supreme valor, courage and is highly talented in Music. He is the messenger and devotee of the highest order of Lord Rama.

title: Ven Mi Sai Rama
lyrics:
Ven Mi Sai Rama
Haz De Mi Mente Un Jardin, Dionde Florezca Dharma Shanthi Prema
Ven Shiva Sathya Sai, Y Baila
Baila En Mi Corazon (4)
Baila En Mi Corazon Tu Cosmica Danza
meaning:
Come my Sai Rama, make my mind a garden where Dharma, Shanthi, and Prema bloom. Come Shiva Sathya Sai and dance. Perform Your cosmic dance in my heart.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Venkuzhal Udi Varum Kanna Kanna
lyrics:
Venkuzhal Oodhi Varum Kanna Kanna
Maya Leelai Seibavane Madhusudhana [ Venkuzhal Oodhi ... ]
Gajarajan Thuyar Theertha Adi Mulame
Kaliyugatthai Katthunirkkum Sai Deivame
Yuga Yugamai Thondri Nirkkum Avatarame
Kamalakkanna Karmega Vanna
Azhi Mazhai Kanna Maale Manivanna
meaning: O Sai, You are Lord Krishna playing the flute. Your divine play happens through Your Maya. You are the primal source who ended the suffering of the helpless elephant Gajendra. Lord Sai, You are the protector of Kali age and You incarnate in every age. You are Krishna with dark complexion and lotus eyes.

title: Vibhuti Sundara Sai Nath
lyrics:
Vibhuti Sundara Sai Nath
Sai Nath Sai Nath Sathya Sai Nath
Gangadhara Hara Samba Sadashiva 
Sai Nath Sathya Sai Nath [ Sai Nath ... ]
meaning: Chant the name of Lord Sathya Sai who is none other than Lord Shiva who is covered in sacred ash and whose head is adorned with the pious river Ganga.

title: Vibhuti Sundara Sai Nath Hara
lyrics:
Vibhuti Sundara Sai Nath Hara Hara Mahadeva
Bilva Dala Priya Chandrakaladhara
Hara Hara Mahadeva
Vyagrambaradhara Sai Sundara
Hara Hara Mahadeva
Shiva Shiva Sadashiva
meaning: Glory to Lord Shiva, the Lord of Lords, the eternally blissful one who is besmeared with sacred ash. Glory to the one who is worshipped with the Bilva leaf (Leaf of wood apple tree or Bel tree) which He likes. Glory to Lord Shiva who bears the Crescent moon on His head and who wears the Tiger skin.

title: Vibhuti – Sacred Ash Prayer
lyrics:
Sanskrit
Paramam Pavithram Baba Vibhuthim
Paramam Vichithram Leela Vibhuthim
Paramartha Ishtartha Moksha Pradanam
Baba Vibhuthim Idham Ashrayami (Sai)
 
* The Vibhuti Mantra was originally sung as a bhajan (devotional song). The 3rd line was composed as 'Paramartha Ishtartha Moksha Pradatham'. Please see video for details.


English version 1
Sacred, Holy and Supreme is Baba’s Vibhuthi
Pouring forth in endless stream His play of Vibhuthi
So auspicious is its might it grants Liberation
Baba’s Vibhuthi its power protects me (Sai)
 






Sacred_Holy_and_Supreme.mp3




English version 2
Sacred Ash, Miraculous, Baba's Creation
Flowing From His Blessed Hand, Holy Creation
Granting Us The Greatest Wealth, God's Divine Protection
Beloved Baba, Grant Us Liberation
 





Sacred_Ash_Miraculous.mp3




Spanish
La Verdad Y El Amor Brotan De Tu Palma
Como el Brillo Del SolIlumina El Alba
Siempre Dando A La Vida, Nuevas Esperanzas
Brindanos Tu Gracia, Dulce Sai Baba


 
This prayer is usually repeated thrice, or until the entire congregation receives the sacred ash.
meaning:
Vibhuti, or Sacred Ash, is distributed at the end of a devotional meeting session. Baba says Vibhuti is  a constant reminder of the evanescence of the body, and all material objects, which, ultimately, reduce to ashes.				The scriptures say Vibhuti is so named as it endows one with prosperity; Bhasma - "ashes" because it burns away all sins; Bhasitam - "brightened" because it increases one's spiritual splendor; Ksharam - "destruction" since it removes danger; and Raksha - "protector" for it is an armor against the machinations of evil spirits. 
- Sathyam Shivam Sundaram, Vol 1, Chapter 9, The Wave of the Hand

title: Vidya Dayini Bhagavathi
lyrics:
Vidya Dayini Bhagavathi
Namo Namo Namo Sai Narayani [ Vidya Dayini ... ]
Chinmaya Roopini Naada Swaroopini [ Namo Namo ... ]
meaning: Obeisance to the Goddess who bestows Knowledge and who plays musical instruments (Goddess Saraswathi), the embodiment of sound, energy and Cosmic consciousness.

title: Vighna Harana Prabhu Paahi Gajanana
lyrics:
Vighna Harana Prabhu Paahi Gajanana
Parvathi Nandana Parama Dayaghana
Nithya Niranjana Bhava Bhaya Bhanjana
Pashupathi Tanaya Hey Jagavandana
Lambodhara Hey Mooshika Vahana [ Parvathi Nandana ... ]
meaning: Protect us, O elephant-faced Lord Ganesha, the remover of obstacles, the most compassionate and the ever pure son of Mother Parvathi. O the son of Shiva, who is worshipped by the whole world, the one with a large stomach and the one who has the mouse as the vehicle, we pray to You to remove our fear of worldly existence.

title: Vighna Vinashaka Devadi Deva
lyrics:
Vighna Vinashaka Devadi Deva
Adi Sanathana Deva
Prathama Poojya Gananatha
Bhava Bhaya Bhanjana Nithya Niranjana
Siddhi Vinayaka Deva
Mangala Dayaka Shambho Manohara [ Prathama Poojya ... ]
meaning: O Lord Ganesha, Lord of the Ganaas (the attendants of Lord Shiva), You are always offered the first prayers in any worship. O Lord of Lords, one who is eternal, ancient and destroyer of obstacles, You annihilate the fear of birth and death. You are the Lord of powers acquired through austerities, blemishless, who bestows auspiciousness and the dear son of Lord Shiva.

title: Vighna Vinashaka Gananatha
lyrics:
Vighna Vinashaka Gananatha
Gajanana Hey Gajavadana
Gananatha Gananatha
Pranava Swaroopa Gananatha
Parthi Pureeshwara Gananatha [ Gajanana Hey ... ]
meaning: The elephant faced Lord Ganesha is the leader of ganaas (the attendants of Lord Shiva) and the destroyer of all obstacles. He is the embodiment of primordial sound "Om". He is verily Lord Sai who resides in Parthi.

title: Vighneshwara Gananatha Gajanana
lyrics:
Vighneshwara Gananatha Gajanana
Parvathi Nandana Shubhanana
Mangala Murthy Sri Ganaraya
Jaya Ganaraya Sri Ganaraya (2)
Ashta (Siddhi) Vinayaka Shubhanana
meaning: Victory to Lord Vighneshwara (Lord Ganesha) the son of Parvathi,, having a pleasant and auspicious face, who bestows eight types of blessings. He is also known as Siddhi Vinayaka, the one who fulfills our prayers.

title: Vighneshwara Vinayaka
lyrics:
Vighneshwara Vinayaka
Vishwadhara Namostuthey
Namostuthey Namostuthey [ Vishwadhara ... ]
Suramuni Vanditha Vinayaka
Bhava Bhaya Nasha Vinayaka
Sharanam Sharanam Vinayaka (2)
meaning: Salutations and surrender to Lord Vighneshwara (Ganesha) who sustains the Universe, who is worshipped by pious sages and the one who destroys the fear of this world.

title: Vighneshwaram Bhaja Vighneshwaram Sadguru Natham
lyrics:
Vighneshwaram Bhaja Vighneshwaram Sadguru Natham Gowri Sutham
Jaya Shiva Nandana Vighneshwaram Pranavanandam Devi Sutham
Siddhi Vinayaka Vighneshwaram Vidya Dayaka Gowri Sutham
Vighneshwaram Bhaja Vighneshwaram
Sharanam Sharanam Devi Sutham
meaning:
Sing the praises of the master of obstacles, Lord Vighneshwara (Lord Ganesha), son of Shiva and Gowri, the embodiment of "Om" (the primordial sound), one who bestows knowledge and spiritual boons. Let us surrender to the son of Devi.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Vighneshwaram Bhajorey Manasa Vighna Haram
lyrics:
Vighneshwaram Bhajorey Manasa Vighna Haram Bhajorey (2) 
(Bhajorey) Vighneshwaram Bhajorey Manasa Vighna Haram Bhajorey
meaning: Oh Mind! Sing the praises of Lord Vighneshwara (Lord Ganesha) who removes all obstacles and destroys them.

title: Vinati Suno Merey Sai Bhagawan
lyrics:
Vinati Suno Merey Sai Bhagawan
Daya Karo Merey Sai Bhagawan
Bhaktha Janon Ke Tum Ho Pran
Deena Dayala Karuna Nidhan
Tribhuvana Pala Sadhu Paritra
meaning: Please listen to my pleadings Oh my Lord Sai, have compassion on me, you are the very life of your devotees, you are the treasure house of compassion showing mercy on the downtrodden, you are the one who sustains the three worlds and the protector of Saints.

title: Vinayaka Vighna Nashaka
lyrics:
Vinayaka Vighna Nashaka
Anatha Rakshaka Ananda Dayaka
Uma Maheshwara Hey Shiva Nandana
meaning: Salutations to Lord Vinayaka, the destroyer of obstacles, protector of the downtrodden, who bestows happiness and who is the son of Goddess Uma (Parvathi's another name) and Lord Shiva.

title: Vinayaka Vinayaka
lyrics:
Vinayaka Vinayaka
Vighna Vinashaka Vinayaka
Gowri Nandana Hey Shiva Nandana
Parvathi Nandana Gajanana
Mooshika Vahana Gajanana
Modaka Hasta Gajanana
meaning: Salutations to Lord Vinayaka (Lord Ganesha), the destroyer of obstacles, the elephant-faced son of Parvathi and Shiva, the one who rides on the mouse and the one who has Modaka (a type of sweet) in His hand.

title: Vinayaka Vinayaka
lyrics:
Vinayaka Vinayaka
Vishwadhara Vinayaka (Hey) [ Vinayaka Vinayaka ... ]
Siddhi Vinayaka Bhava Bhaya Nasha
Suramuni Vanditha Sri Ganesha [ Vishwadhara Vinayaka ... ]
meaning: Salutations to Lord Vinayaka (Lord Ganesha) who gives sustenance to the Universe, who fulfills the wishes of everyone, the one who destroys fear and the one who is worshipped by all sages and noble souls.

title: Vishnu Satchidananda Venu Gopala Bala
lyrics:
Vishnu Satchidananda Venu Gopala Bala
Krishna Rama Govinda Hari Hari (3)
meaning: Chant the various names of the Lord Vishnu, namely Rama, Govinda, Hari and the sweet child Krishna holding the flute in His hand, who are all the embodiments of Being (Sath), Awareness (Chith) and Bliss (Ananda).

title: Vishwadhari Shiva Avatari
lyrics:
Vishwadhari Shiva Avatari
Sai Shankara Namo Namo [ Vishwadhari Shiva ... ]
Mathura Natha Narayana Hari
Sai Shankara Namo Namo (Sathya) (2)
meaning: Salutations to You O Lord Sai, You are the very incarnation of Lord Shiva and Lord Narayana of Mathura (Krishna).

title: Vittala Bhajo Sai Vittala Bhajo
lyrics:
Vittala Bhajo Sai Vittala Bhajo (2)
Pandari Natha Panduranga Vittala Bhajo
Parthi Vasa Sai Deva Vittala Bhajo
meaning: Sing the glory of the Lord Vittala, also known as Panduranga, the Lord of Pandharpur and who is none other than Lord Sai residing in Parthi.

title: Vittala Hari Vittala
lyrics:
Vittala Hari Vittala (3)
Panduranga (Purandara) Vittaley Hari Narayana
Hari Narayana Bhajo Narayana
Sai Narayana Sathya Narayana
meaning: Sing the glory of Hari Vittala, also known as Panduranga Vittala, Purandara Vittala, Sai Narayana and Sathya Narayana.

title: Vittala Narayana
lyrics:
Vittala Narayana
Narayana Sai Narayana [ Vittala ... ]
Madhusudhana Narayana
Hey Shesha Shayana Narayana
Narayana (Hari) Sai Narayana (2)

Vittala Vittala Panduranga Vittala (2)
Vittala Vittala Parthi Ranga Vittala
Vittala Vittala Sai Ranga Vittala
meaning: Sing the glory of Lord Vittala who is verily Lord Narayana reclining on Adi Sesha (the celestial Snake). He is also Madhusudhana (Krishna) and Lord Sai who resides in Parthi.

title: Vittala Vittala Hari Vittala
lyrics:
Vittala Vittala Hari Vittala
Vittala Vittala Naama Bhajo Hari Vittala
Panduranga Vittala Vittala Vittala Naam
Vittala Vittala Naama Bhajo Hari Vittala
Vittala Vittala Hari (Sai) Vittala
meaning: Chant the name and sing the glory of Lord Panduranga Vittala and Lord Sai who is verily Lord Vittala.

title: Vittobha Vittala Panduranga
lyrics:
Vittobha Vittala Panduranga
Panduranga Hari Panduranga [ Vittobha Vittala ... ]
Narahari Ranga Ranga Panduranga
Purandara Ranga Panduranga [ Panduranga Hari ... ]
meaning: Sing the glory of Lord Panduranga, also known as Vittobha and Vittala, Narahari Ranga, Purandara Ranga and several other names.

title: Vol overgave
lyrics:
Vol overgave kniel ik aan uw voeten neer
In mijn levensboot ben ik dan veilig Heer
Ere zij U God, koning van mijn hart
(Sathya) Sai Baba, alle glorie in aan U
Om ik buig voor Shiva, Om ik buig voor Shiva, Om ik buig voor Shivaya Shiva ik buig voor U
U doet mijn hart verwarmen, U doet mijn hart verwarmen, U doet mijn hart verwarmen, Heer Shiva dit komt door U
Baba ik zing uw Naam, Baba ik zing uw Naam, Baba ik zing uw Naam, ik zing uw Naam en buig voor U
meaning:
Full of surrender I bow to Your Feet; In my lifeboat, there I am, save my Lord; Praise be to Thee, king of my heart; (Sathya) Sai Baba, all glory be to Thee; Om I bow to Shiva, Shiva I bow to Thee; You warm my heart, Lord Shiva, You are making that happen; Baba I sing Your name, I sing Your name, I bow to You.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: We Are Blessed
lyrics:
We Are Blessed We Are Blessed We Are Blessed
Sai Baba Is Watching Over Us
We Are Here To Sing Your Sweet Name
Let The Light Of Your Glory Shine On Us
Bless Us All With Your Presence, Gurudev [ We Are Blessed ... ]
No More Tears No More Sorrow No More Death
Banish The Darkness With Your Love
We Are Born In The Golden Age Of Sai [ We Are Blessed ... ]

title: We bow to Him who removes all obstacles
lyrics:
We bow to Him who removes all obstacles,
 We bow to Ganapathi Sai Ganesh
 We bow to Him who can do all miracles,
 We bow to Ganapathi Sai Ganesh
 Ganapathi Deva, Ganapathi Deva, Ganapathi Deva Sai Ganesh (2)

title: We Pray To You Ganesha
lyrics:
We Pray To You Ganesha, Our Lord
We Sing To You Ganesha, Our Lord
We Bow To You Ganesha, Our Lord
Oh Mighty Lord Ganesha, Remove All Our Obstacles (2)
Bless Us Ganesha, Our Lord (3)

title: We’re Never Away From The Avatar Eyes
lyrics:
We're Never Away From The Avatar Eyes, Avatar Eyes, Sai Avatar Eyes
We're Only As Far As The Space From Our Hearts, He Lives ...
... In Our Hearts, He Lives In Our Hearts
We're Never Lost He Is Always The Light, Always The Light, Sai ...
... Always The Light
Soothing Our Souls With His Avatar Eyes, Avatar Eyes, Sai Avatar Eyes
[ Never Away ... ]

title: When Dark Clouds Fill Your Skies
lyrics:
When Dark Clouds Fill Your Skies, Hiding Sunshine From Your Eyes
Say His Name, See His Form, Hold On
Hold On, Sai Ram, Say His Name, See His Form, Hold On
When Things Are Getting Rough And You Feel Enough's Enough
Say His Name, See His Form, Hold On
Hold On, Sai Ram, Say His Name, See His Form, Hold On
When Life Seems So Unfair And No One Seems To Care
Say His Name, See His Form, Hold On
Hold On, Sai Ram, Say His Name, See His Form, Hold On
Keep A Smile And Say I Can, Love And Serve Your Fellow Men
Say His Name, See His Form, Hold On
Hold On, Sai Ram, Say His Name, See His Form, Hold On

title: Worship In Your Mind The Feet Of The Guru
lyrics:
Worship in your mind the Feet of the Guru
For crossing the ocean of life is hard to do
Remover of all darkness, praise to Thee
Shiva Sai, Lord of Light, Shiva Sai
Praise to You, Shiva, Praise to You, Shiva,
Praise to You, Shiva
You light the pathway Home
Lord of the Mountain, Shiva,
Lord of the Mountain, Shiva,
Lord of the Mountain, Shiva,
You light the pathway Home
You are Om, Baba, You are Om, Baba,
You are Om, Baba, You are the Form of Om

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Worshipping In Your Mind At The Guru’s Feet
lyrics:
Worshipping in your mind at the Guru's Feet
Gives you the blessing to make your life complete
Banisher of darkness, praise to You
Sathya Sai, our Lord ever true
Praise to Shiva, Praise to Shiva, Praise to Shiva
Sai Shiva, praise to You
Lord of Protection, Lord of Protection, Lord of
Protection, Lord Sai, praise to You
You are Om, Baba, You are Om, Baba, You are
Om, Baba, You are the Form of Om

title: Yadu Nanda Ananda Nanda Gopala
lyrics:
Yadu Nanda Ananda Nanda Gopala
Radhey Radhey Govinda Radhey Gopala
Hari Anandamaya Sai Gopala (2)
Radha Lola Ananda Nanda Gopala [ Radhey Radhey ... ]

Radhey Radhey Radhey Radhey (2) [ Radha Lola ... ]
meaning:
Glory to Lord Krishna, the blissful child of the Yadu dynasty, the beloved of Radha. Glory to Lord Sai who is the embodiment of bliss and is verily Krishna, the incarnation of Hari (Vishnu).

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Yadu Nandana Gopala
lyrics:
Yadu Nandana Gopala
Jaya Brindavana Lola
Jaya Murali Gaana Vilola
Gopala Gopala Sai Gopala
meaning: Chant the name of Sai Gopala, the son of Yadu dynasty, who moved around in Brindavan and who is enchanted by the sound of Flute He plays.

title: Yadu Nandana Yashoda Bala
lyrics:
Yadu Nandana Yashoda Bala
Madhava Keshava [ Yadu Nandana ... ]
Mathura Natha Mama Sai Natha
Mandara Giridhara Madhusudhana Hey
meaning: Glory be to You, Oh Lord Krishna, the son of Yadu dynasty, the son of Yashoda, You are the Lord Madhava and Keshava, the one who held aloft the hillock Mandara, You are the destroyer of the demon Madhu.

title: You are mine
lyrics:
You are mine mine mine, You are mine
My beloved Divine, You are mine!
No one can ever take You from me, 
Nor surpass You in Your beauty.
For I possess You and You possess me.
You are mine mine mine, You are mine
My beloved Divine, You are mine!
Every conscious being worships and adores You
Oh love Divine, Oh love Divine
But still You bless me with this special feeling that You're mine and only mine!

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: You take all the obstacles away
lyrics:
You take all the obstacles away, O Lord Gananatha
You give us happiness, You give us auspiciousness
You take all the sorrows away, O Lord Gananatha
There is no emptiness, there is no loneliness
When we start off the day with Your name, O Lord Gananatha

title: Yug Yug Ke Avatar Tum
lyrics:
Yug Yug Ke Avatar Tum Hi Ho
Merey Ram Merey Shyam Shirdi Sai Parthi Ram
Jag Ke Palanhaar Tum Hi Ho
Allah Eshwara Terey Naam
Sab Ko Sanmati Do Bhagawan
Allah Eshwar Terey Naam Shirdi Sai Parthi Ram [ Jag Ke ... ]
meaning: O Lord Sai of Shirdi and Parthi, You have incarnated from age to age, You are my Lord Rama and my Lord Krishna. You are the protector of this Universe. You are hailed by many names such as Allah and Eshwar (Shiva). O Lord Sai Rama of Shirdi and Parthi, bless us all with wisdom.

title: Yuga Avatara Radhey Shyam
lyrics:
Yuga Avatara Radhey Shyam
Radhey Shyam Bol Radhey Shyam
Bhava Bhaya Bhanjana Radhey Shyam
Paapa Vimochana Radhey Shyam
Parthi Pureeshwara Radhey Shyam [ Radhey Shyam ... ]
meaning:
Sing the name of Lord Sai of Parthi who is verily Lord Krishna (Shyam). Lord Sai is the incarnation of this Kali age, who destroys the fear of worldly afflictions and liberates us from all our sins.

---

*Scraped from [sairhythms.sathyasai.org](https://sairhythms.sathyasai.org) — Sri Sathya Sai International Organization*

title: Yuga Avatara Sai Rama
lyrics:
Yuga Avatara Sai Rama
Rama Rama Ram (Sai)
Rama Rama Ram Sita Pathey Sri Ram (2) [ Yuga Avatara ... ]
Parama Niranjana Prashanthi Rama
Sri Raghu Rama Sai Rama
Rama Rama Ram (Sai)
meaning: O Lord Sai, You are the incarnation of this Kali age. You are verily Lord Rama, the consort of Sita. O Lord of Prashanthi, You are eternally pure. Glory to Lord Rama of the Raghu dynasty who is none other than Lord Sai.

title: Yuga Yuga Ke Avatara Sai
lyrics:
Yuga Yuga Ke Avatara Sai Rama Sai Krishna Sai Baba
Baba Sai Baba Baba Sai Baba [ Yuga Yuga ... ]
Allah Yesu Nanak Sai
Buddha Zohrashtra Mahavira Sai
Ram Rahim Jai Ram Rahim Jai Ram Rahim Jai Ram (2)
meaning: O Lord Sai, You incarnate through different ages as Rama, Krishna and as Sai Baba. The devotees worship You by different names as Allah, Eshwara (Shiva), Nanak, Buddha, Zohrashtra, Mahavira, Ram and Rahim.

title: Yuuki wo sazukeru Vinayaka
lyrics:
Yuuki wo sazukeru Vinayaka
Kono kokoro wo kiyomeru Vinayaka
Eichi no Akari wo tomosu Gajanana
Warare wo michibiku Sai Gajanana
Shinri to seigi no Parthi Gajanana
Jai Jai Ganesha Jai Sai Ganesha (4)
meaning:
Grant me courage and braveness, O Lord Vinayaka. Please cleanse this heart of mine, Lord. Illuminate our minds with intelligence, O Lord Gajanana, and guide us all towards truth and justice.

---
